17.17: Nā, ka oho a Īhu, ka mea, “E te uri whakapono kore, parori kē, kia pēhea te roa o tōku noho ki a koutou? Kia pēhea te roa o tōku manawanui ki a koutou? Kawea mai ia ki konei, ki ahau.”
17.18: Nā, ka rīria te rēwera e Īhu; ā, puta ana i roto i a ia; ā, ora ake te tamaiti i taua wā pū anō.
17.19: Me i reira ka haere puku ngā ākonga ki a Īhu, ka mea, “He aha rā tē āhei ai i a mātou te pei i a ia ki waho?”
17.20: Nā, ka mea a Īhu ki a rātou: “Nā, tō koutou whakapono iti; he pono hoki tāku e mea nei ki a koutou, ki te mea he whakapono tō koutou, pērā me tō te pua nanī te rahi, e mea koutou ki tēnei maunga, ‘Neke atu i konei ki tērā wāhi’; ā, ka neke; kāhore hoki he mea e kore e taea e koutou.
17.21: Otirā, e kore e puta noa te pēnā, mā te īnoi anake mā te nohopuku.” Ka Kōrero anō a Īhu mō Tōna Matenga (Māka 9.30-32; Ruka 9.43b-45)
17.22: Ā, i a rātou e noho ana i Kariri, ka mea a Īhu ki a rātou, “Meāke tukua te Tama a te tangata ki ngā ringa o ngā tāngata;
17.23: ā, ka whakamatea e rātou, ā, i te toru o ngā rā ka ara.” Ā, nui atu tō rātou pōuri. Me Hoatu te Takoha Temepara
17.24: Ā, nō tō rātou taenga ki Kapere­nauma, ka haere mai ki a Pita ngā kaikohikohi i te hāwhe hekere, ka mea, “E kore ianei tōu Kaiwhakaako e hōmai i te hāwhe hekere?”
17.25: Ka mea ia, “E hoatu anō.” Ā, nō ka tapoko ia ki te whare, ko Īhu kua kōrero ki a ia, kua mea, “E pēhea ana tōu whakaaro, e Haimona? E tangohia ana e ngā kīngi o te ao ngā takoha taonga me te takoha tangata i a wai? I ā rātou ake tama, i a ngā tāngata kē rānei?”
17.26: Ka mea a Pita ki a ia, “I a ngā tāngata kē.” Nā, ko te kīanga a Īhu ki a ia, “Ha, pēnā ka haere noa ngā tamariki.
17.27: Ahakoa rā, kei whai take hē mai rātou ki a tātou, haere ki te moana, piua tētahi matau, ā, ka eke te ika mātāmua, tangohia; nā, ka whakatuwhera i tōna māngai, ka kite ai koe i tētahi moni, tangohia tēnā, ka hoatu ki a rātou, hei mea mōku, mōu.”

18.1: I taua wā, ka haere mai ngā ākonga ki a Īhu, ka mea, “Ko wai te nui rawa i te rangatiratanga o te rangi?”
18.2: Nā, ka karangatia e Īhu tētahi tamaiti nohinohi, ka whakatūria e ia ki waenganui i a rātou,
18.3: ka mea, “He pono tāku e mea nei ki a koutou, ki te kore koutou e tahuri, ā, e pēnei me ngā tamariki nonohi, e kore koutou e tomo ki te rangatiratanga o te rangi.
18.4: Nā, ki te whakaiti tētahi i a ia, ā, ka rite ki tēnei tamaiti nohinohi, ko ia te nui rawa i te rangatiratanga o te rangi.
18.5: Ā, ki te manako tētahi ki tētahi tamaiti nohinohi pēnei, he whakaaro hoki ki tōku ingoa, e manako ana ki ahau.” He Whakamātauranga ki te Hara (Māka 9.42-48; Ruka 17.1-2)
18.6: “Tēnā ko tēnei, ka hē i tētahi tangata tētahi o ēnei mea nonohi e whakapono nei ki ahau, nui kē te pai ki a ia me i whakawerewerea ki tōna kakī te kōhatu mira kāihe, me i pungaia ia ki te rire o te moana.
18.7: Auē te mate mō te ao i ngā take hē! Kua tino takoto rawa hoki he putanga mō ngā take hē; otiia, auē te mate mō tērā tangata e puta ai te take hē!
18.8: “Ki te hē koe i tōu ringa, i tōu waewae rānei, pōutoa, makā atu; pai kē hoki mōu te tomo ki te ora he kopa, he ringa mutu, i te makā ki te ahi kā tonu, he ringa rua, he waewae rua.
18.9: Ki te hē hoki koe i tōu kanohi, tīkarohia, makā atu; pai kē hoki mōu te tomo kanohi tahi ki te ora, i te makā kanohi rua ki te kāpura o Kehena.” Te Kupu Whakarite mō te Hipi Kotiti Kē (Ruka 15.3-7)
18.10: “Kia mahara kei whakahāwea ki tētahi o ēnei mea nonohi; ko tāku kupu hoki tēnei ki a koutou, E titiro tonu ana ō rātou anahera i te rangi ki te kanohi o tōku Matua i te rangi.
18.11: I haere mai hoki te Tama a te tangata ki te whakaora i te mea i ngaro.
18.12: “Pēhea tō koutou whakaaro? Ki te mea he rau ngā hipi a tētahi tangata, ā, ka kotiti kē tētahi, e kore ianei e waiho e ia ngā iwa tekau mā iwa, ka haere i runga i ngā maunga, rapu ai i te mea i kotiti kē?
18.13: Ā, ki te kitea, he pono tāku e mea nei ki a koutou, tērā atu tōna hari ki taua hipi, i te hari ki ngā iwa tekau mā iwa kīhai i kotiti kē.
18.14: Waihoki kāhore he ngākau o tō koutou Matua i te rangi kia ngaro tētahi o ēnei mea nonohi.” Ka Hara tētahi Tangata
18.15: “Ā, ki te hara tōu teina ki a koe, haere, kōrerotia tōna hara ki a ia, kōrua anake; ki te whakarongo ia ki a koe, ka riro i a koe tōu teina.
18.16: Ā, ki te kore ia e whakarongo, kawea atu hei hoa mōu kia kotahi, kia tokorua rānei, kia mau ai ngā kupu katoa i ngā māngai o ngā kaiwhakarongo tokorua, tokotoru rānei.
18.17: Ā, ki te pake ia ki a rāua, kōrerotia ki te hāhi; ā, ki te pake anō ia ki te hāhi, me waiho e koe hei tautangata, hei pupirikana.” Ngā Herenga me ngā Wewete
18.18: “He pono tāku e mea nei ki a koutou, Ko ā koutou e here ai i te whenua e herea anō ki te rangi; ko ā koutou e wewete ai i te whenua e wetekia anō ki te rangi.
18.19: “Tēnei anō tāku kupu ki a koutou, Ki te mea ka tokorua o koutou e rite tahi ana ngā whakaaro i te whenua mō tētahi mea e īnoi ai rāua, e meinga anō mō rāua e tōku Matua i te rangi.
18.20: Nā, ko te wāhi e whakaminea ai te hunga tokorua, tokotoru rānei, he whakaaro ki tōku ingoa, kei reira ahau kei waenganui i a rātou.” Te Kupu Whakarite mō te Pononga Murukore
18.21: Kātahi, ka haere a Pita ki a ia, ka mea, “E te Ariki, kia hia ngā haranga o tōku teina ki ahau, me tāku whakarere noa iho i tōna hara? Kia whitu?”
18.22: Ka mea a Īhu ki a ia, “E kore ahau e mea ki a koe, Kia whitu, engari, kia whitu tekau whitu.”
18.23: “Koia, ka rite ai te rangatiratanga o te rangi ki tētahi kīngi, i mea kia kōrerotia ki a ia āna moni e āna pononga.
18.24: Ā, ka tīmata ia te ui, ka kawea ki a ia he tangata, tekau mano ngā taranata i a ia.
18.25: Ā, tē whai rawa ia hei utu, ka mea tōna ariki kia hokona ia, tāna wahine me āna tamariki, me āna taonga katoa, hei whakautu.
18.26: Nā, ka tāpapa iho taua pononga, ka koropiko ki a ia, ka mea, ‘E te Ariki, kia āta hanga ki ahau, ā, ka utua katoatia e ahau ki a koe.’
18.27: Nā, ka oho i te aroha te ariki o taua pononga, tuku ana i a ia, ā, whakarērea noatia iho e ia āna moni tārewa.
18.28: “Heoi, te putanga o taua pononga ki waho, ka kite i tētahi o ōna hoa pononga, kotahi rau āna pene i a ia; nā, hopukia ana e ia, nōtia iho te kakī, me te kī anō, ‘Utua tāku nama.’
18.29: Heoi, tāpapa ana tōna hoa pononga ki ōna waewae, ka īnoi ki a ia, ka mea, ‘Kia āta hanga ki ahau, ā, ka utua katoatia e ahau ki a koe.’
18.30: Ā, kīhai ia i pai; heoi haere ana, maka ana i a ia ki te whare herehere, kia utua katoatia rā anō te nama.
18.31: Heoi, nō te kitenga o ōna hoa pononga i taua meatanga, nui atu tō rātou pōuri, ā, haere ana, whakaaturia ana ki tō rātou ariki ngā mea katoa i meatia.
18.32: Kātahi, ka karanga tōna ariki i a ia, ka mea ki a ia, ‘Pononga kino, i whakarērea noatia e ahau taua moni tārewa katoa i a koe, nāu hoki i īnoi ki ahau.
18.33: Ehara oti i te tika kia tohungia e koe tōu hoa pononga, me ahau hoki i tohu i a koe?’
18.34: Nā, ka riri tōna ariki, ā, tukua ana ia ki ngā kaiwhakamamae, kia utua katoatia rā anō tāna nama.
18.35: “Tērā anō, e pērā tōku Matua i te rangi ki a koutou, ki te kore e whakarērea noatia i roto i ō koutou ngākau ngā hē o te teina o tēnei, o tēnei, o koutou.”

19.1: Ā, ka mutu ēnei kupu a Īhu, ka tūria atu e ia i Kariri, ā, ka tae ki ngā wāhi o Hūria, ki tāwāhi atu o Horano.
19.2: He rahi hoki te hui i aru i a ia; ā, whakaorangia ana rātou e ia i reira.
19.3: Nā, ka haere mai ngā Parihi ki a ia, ki te whakamātautau i a ia, ka mea ki a ia, “He mea tika rānei kia whakarērea e te tangata tāna wahine mō tētahi take?”
19.4: Nā, ka whakahoki ia, ka mea ki a rātou, “Kīanō koutou i kite noa i hangā rāua e te Kaihanga i te tīmatanga, he tāne, he wahine?
19.5: I mea anō ia, ‘Mō konei ka mahue i te tangata tōna pāpā, tōna whaea ka piri ki tāna wahine, ā, hei kikokiko kotahi rāua tokorua’?
19.6: Nā, heoi anō tō rāua tokoruatanga, engari kotahi anō kikokiko. Nā, ko ā te Atua i hono ai, kaua e wehea e te tangata.”
19.7: Ka mea rātou ki a ia, “He aha rā a Mohi i ako ai kia hoatu he pukapuka whakarere, ka whakarere ai i a ia?”
19.8: Ka mea ia ki a rātou, “Nā, te pakeke o ō koutou ngākau i tukua ai koutou e Mohi kia whakarere i ā koutou wāhine; i te tīmatanga iho ia kāhore i pēnā.
19.9: Ā, tēnei tāku kupu ki a koutou, Ki te whakarere tētahi i tāna wahine, ehara nei i te take moepuku, ā, ka mārenatia ki tētahi atu, e pūremu ana ia; ā, ki te mārena tētahi i te wahine i whakarērea, e pūremu ana ia.”
19.10: Ka mea āna ākonga ki a ia, “Ki te pēnei te tikanga mō te tangata rāua ko tāna wahine, ehara te mārena.”
19.11: Otirā, ka mea ia ki a rātou, “E kore tēnei kupu e rite i ngā tāngata katoa, engari, i te hunga i hoatu ai.
19.12: He ūnaka hoki ētahi nō te whānautanga mai i te kōpū o te whaea; ko ētahi ūnaka he mea whakaūnaka nā te tangata; ko ētahi ūnaka he mea whakaūnaka nā rātou anō, he whakaaro hoki ki te rangatiratanga o te rangi. Ki te taea tēnei te whakarite e tētahi, māna e whakarite.” Ka Manaakitia e Īhu ngā Tamariki Nohinohi (Māka 10.13-16; Ruka 18.15-17)
19.13: I reira, ka kawea mai he tamariki nonohi ki a ia, kia whakapā ai ia i ōna ringa ki a rātou, kia īnoi; ā, rīria iho rātou e ngā ākonga.
19.14: Nā, ko te kīanga a Īhu, “Tukua mai ngā tamariki nonohi, aua hoki e āraia atu tā rātou haere mai ki ahau; nō ngā pēnei hoki te rangatiratanga o te rangi.”
19.15: Ā, whakapākia iho e ia ōna ringa ki a rātou, ā, haere atu ana i reira. He Taitama Whai Taonga (Māka 10.17-31; Ruka 18.18-30)
19.16: Nā, ka haere mai tētahi ki a ia, ka mea, “E te Kaiwhakaako, he aha te mahi pai māku, e whiwhi ai ahau ki te ora tonu?”
19.17: Nā, ko tāna meatanga ki a ia, “He aha ka ui koe ki ahau mō te mea pai? Tērā anō tētahi i pai, kotahi tonu; ki te mea koe kia tomo ki te ora, whakaritea ngā ture.”
19.18: Ka mea ia ki a ia, “Ko ēhea?” Nā, ka mea a Īhu, “Kaua e patu tangata; kaua e pūremu; kaua e tāhae; kaua e whakapae teka;
19.19: Whakahōnoretia tōu pāpā me tōu whaea; me tēnei; kia aroha ki tōu hoa tata ānō ko koe.”
19.20: Ka mea taua taitama ki a ia, “Kua rite i ahau ēnei mea katoa nō tōku tamarikitanga; tēnā hoki tētahi mea e hapa ana i ahau?”
19.21: Ka mea a Īhu ki a ia, “Ki te mea koe kia tino tika, haere, hokona ōu taonga, ka hoatu ki ngā rawakore, ā, e whai taonga koe ki te rangi; ā, haere mai i muri i ahau.”
19.22: Nā, ka rongo taua taitama i taua kupu, haere pōuri ana ia, he maha hoki ōna taonga.
19.23: Ka mea a Īhu ki āna ākonga, “He pono tāku kupu ki a koutou, e tapoko whakauaua te tangata taonga ki te rangatiratanga o te rangi.
19.24: Tēnei anō tāku kupu ki a koutou, he ngāwari kē atu te haere o te kāmera rā te kōwhao o te ngira i te haere o te tangata taonga ki roto ki te rangatiratanga o te Atua.”
19.25: Ā, nō ka rongo āna ākonga, nui rawa tō rātou mīharo, ka mea, “Ko wai rā e ora?”
19.26: Nā, ka titiro a Īhu ki a rātou, ka mea, “Ki te tangata e kore tēnei e taea, ki te Atua ia e taea ngā mea katoa.”
19.27: Kātahi, ka whakahoki a Pita, ka mea ki a ia, “Nā, kua mahue nei i a mātou ngā mea katoa, kua aru nei i a koe, he aha rā mā mātou?”
19.28: Ka kī a Īhu ki a rātou, “He pono tāku e mea nei ki a koutou, ko koutou i aru nei i ahau, kia taea te whānautanga houtanga, te wā e noho ai te Tama a te tangata ki runga ki te torōna o tōna korōria, ka noho anō koutou ki runga ki ētahi torōna kotahi tekau mā rua, ki te whakawā i ngā iwi kotahi tekau mā rua o Īharaira.
19.29: Ā, ki te mea kua mahue i tētahi he whare, he tēina, he tuāhine rānei, he pāpā, he whaea, he tamariki, he whenua, i tōna whakaaro ki tōku ingoa, ka tātakirau ngā mea e riro i a ia, ā, ka whiwhi ia ki te ora tonu.
19.30: He tokomaha ia ō mua e waiho ki muri; ko ō muri ki mua.”

20.1: “He rite hoki te rangatiratanga o te rangi ki tētahi rangatira whare, i haere i te atatū ki te kōrero kaimahi mō tāna māra wāina.
20.2: Ā, nō ka oti te whakarite ki ngā kaimahi kia kotahi rā he pene, tonoa ana rātou e ia ki tāna māra wāina.
20.3: Ā, ka haere atu ia i te toru o ngā hāora, ka kite i ētahi atu e tū māngere ana i te kāinga hokohoko,
20.4: ka mea ki a rātou, ‘Haere hoki koutou ki te māra wāina, ā, ka hoatu e ahau ki a koutou te mea e tika ana.’ Nā, haere ana rātou.
20.5: I haere anō ia i te ono, i te iwa o ngā hāora, ā, pērā ana anō.
20.6: I te tekau mā tahi o ngā hāora ka haere atu anō ia, ka kite i ētahi atu e tū ana, ka mea ki a rātou, ‘He aha tā koutou e tū māngere i konei i te rā roa nei?’
20.7: Ka mea rātou ki a ia, ‘Nō te mea rā kāhore he tangata i kōrero ki a mātou ki te mahi.’ Ka mea ia ki a rātou, ‘Haere anō koutou ki te māra wāina.’
20.8: “Ā, nō te ahiahi ka mea te rangatira o te māra wāina ki tāna kaiwhakahauhau, ‘Karangatia ngā kaimahi, utua hoki rātou, hei ō muri tīmata ai puta noa ki ō mua.’
20.9: Ā, nō te taenga mai o te hunga i kōrerotia i te tekau mā tahi o ngā hāora, kotahi te pene i riro i tētahi, i tētahi.
20.10: Ka tae anō ō mua, hua noa rātou tērā atu te mea e riro i a rātou; heoi, kotahi anō te pene i riro i a rātou.
20.11: Ā, nō ka riro i a rātou, ka amuamu ki taua rangatira whare,
20.12: ka mea, ‘Kotahi te hāora i mahi ai ēnei ō muri, ā, ka oti rātou te whakarite ki a mātou, ki te hunga i pēhia nei e te taimaha e te tīkākātanga o te rā.’
20.13: “Ā, ka whakahoki ia, ka mea ki tētahi o rātou, ‘E hoa, kāhore āku hē ki a koe; kīhai koe i whakarite ki ahau me pene?
20.14: Tangohia tāu, haere. E pai ana ahau kia rite ki tāu te mea e hoatu ki tēnei ō muri.
20.15: Ehara ianei i te tika kia meatia e ahau tāku e pai ai ki āku mea? He kino oti tōu kanohi nō te mea he pai ahau?’
20.16: “Heoi, ko ō muri e meinga ki mua, ko ō mua ki muri; he tokomaha hoki e karangatia, he ruarua ia e whiriwhiria.” Ngā Kōrerotanga a Īhu mō Tōna Matenga (Māka 10.32-34; Ruka 18.31-34)
20.17: Ā, i a Īhu e haere ana ki Hiruhārama, i a rātou i te ara, ka kawea e ia āna ākonga kotahi tekau mā rua ki tahaki, ā, ka mea ki a rātou,
20.18: “Nā, e haere ana tēnei tātou ki Hiruhārama; ā, ka tukua te Tama a te tangata ki ngā tohunga nui, ki ngā karaipi, ka kīa ia e rātou kia mate,
20.19: ka tukua ia ki ngā tauiwi kia tāwaia, kia whiua, kia rīpekatia; ā, i te toru o ngā rā ka whakaarahia ake.” He Īnoi a tētahi Whaea (Māka 10.35-45)
20.20: Me i reira ka tae ki a ia te whaea o ngā tama a Heperi, rātou ko āna tama, ā, ka koropiko, ka īnoi ki tētahi mea i a ia.
20.21: Nā, ka mea ia ki a ia, “He hiahia aha tōu?” Ka mea ia ki a ia, “Whakaaetia ēnei tama tokorua āku, kia noho, tētahi ki tōu matau, tētahi ki tōu mauī, i tōu rangatiratanga.”
20.22: Otirā, ka whakahoki a Īhu, ka mea, “Kāhore kōrua e mōhio ki tā kōrua e īnoi nei. E āhei rānei kōrua te inu i te kapu meāke inumia e ahau, kia iriiria hoki ki te iriiringa ka iriiria nei ahau?” Ka mea rāua ki a ia, “E āhei anō.”
20.23: Ka mea ia ki a rāua, “E inu anō kōrua i tāku kapu, e iriiria ki te iriiringa e iriiria ai ahau; ko te noho ia ki tōku matau, ki tōku mauī, ehara i ahau māna e hoatu, engari, ka riro i te hunga i whakaritea nei e tōku Matua mō rātou.”
20.24: Ā, nō ka rongo te tekau, ka riri ki aua hoa tokorua.
20.25: Otirā, ka karangatia rātou e Īhu, ā, ka mea ia, “E mātau ana koutou, ko ngā kāwana o ngā tauiwi hei whakatupu rangatira ki a rātou, ko ngā tāngata rarahi hei akiaki i a rātou.
20.26: E kore e pērā i roto i a koutou; engari, ki te mea tētahi kia tupu ia hei tangata nui i roto i a koutou, me whakatupu kaimahi ia mā koutou.
20.27: Ā, ki te mea tētahi kia tupu ko ia hei tino tangata i roto i a koutou, me whakatupu pononga ia mā koutou;
20.28: pērā i te Tama a te tangata, kīhai nei i haere mai kia mahia he mea māna, engari, kia mahi ia, ā, kia tuku i a ia kia mate hei whakautu mō ngā tāngata tokomaha.” Ka Whakaorangia e Īhu ētahi Tāngata Tokorua, he Matapō (Māka 10.46-52; Ruka 18.35-43)
20.29: Ā, i a rātou e haere atu ana i Heriko, he rahi te hui i aru i a ia.
20.30: Nā, tokorua ngā matapō e noho ana i te taha o te ara; ka rongo rāua ko Īhu tērā e haere atu ana, ka karanga ake, ka mea, “Kia aroha ki a māua, e te Ariki, e te Tama a Rāwiri.”
20.31: Ā, i rīria rāua e te mano kia noho puku; heoi rahi ake tā rāua karanga, ka mea, “Kia aroha ki a māua, e te Ariki, e te Tama a Rāwiri.”
20.32: Nā, ka tū a Īhu, ka karanga i a rāua, ka mea, “Kia ahatia kōrua e ahau?”
20.33: Ka mea rāua ki a ia, “E te Ariki, kia kite ō māua kanohi!”
20.34: Nā, ka aroha a Īhu, ka pā ki ō rāua kanohi; ā, titiro tonu ake ō rāua kanohi, ā, aru ana rāua i a ia.

21.1: Ā, nō ka tata rātou ki Hiru­hā­ra­ma, ka tae ki Petapaki, ki Maunga Ōriwa, ka tonoa atu e Īhu ngā ākonga tokorua,
21.2: ka mea ia ki a rāua “Haere ki te kāinga e anga mai ana ki a kōrua; nā, ka kite tonu kōrua i tētahi kāihe e here ana me tāna kūao; wetekia, ka ārahi mai ki ahau.
21.3: Ā, ki te whai kupu tētahi tangata ki a kōrua, kī atu, ‘E mea ana te Ariki ki a rāua māna’; nā, ka tukua tonutia mai rāua e ia.”
21.4: I meinga tēnei katoa hei whakarite mō te kupu a te poropiti, i mea ai:
21.5: “Mea atu ki te tamāhine o Hiona, ‘Nā, ko tōu kīngi e haere mai nā ki a koe, he ngākau māhaki tōna, e noho ana i runga i te kāihe, i te kūao hoki, i te tama a te kāihe.’ ”
21.6: Nā, haere ana ngā ākonga, meatia ana tā Īhu i mea ai ki a rāua:
21.7: ārahina mai ana te kāihe me te kūao, whārikitia ana ki runga ō rāua kākahu, ā, noho ana ia ki runga.
21.8: Ā, he nui rawa te hui ki te whāriki i ō rātou kākahu ki te ara; ko ētahi i tapahi manga mai i ngā rākau, ā, whārikitia ana ki te ara.
21.9: Ko ngā mano i haere i mua, me te hunga i haere i muri, kei te karanga, kei te mea, “Ohana ki te Tama a Rāwiri! Ka whakapaingia tēnei e haere mai nei i runga i te ingoa o te Ariki! Ohana i runga rawa!”
21.10: Ā, nō ka uru ia ki Hiruhārama, ka oho katoa te pā, ka mea, “Ko wai tēnei?”
21.11: Ka mea te mano, “Ko Īhu tēnei, ko te poropiti o Nahareta o Kariri.” Ka Haere a Īhu ki te Temepara (Māka 11.15-19; Ruka 19.45-48; Hoani 2.13-22)
21.12: Ā, ka tomo a Īhu ki te temepara o te Atua, nā, peia katoatia ana e ia te hunga e hoko mai ana, e hoko atu ana i roto i te temepara, turakina ake ngā tēpu a ngā kaiwhakawhitiwhiti moni, me ngā nohoanga o te hunga hoko kūkupa.
21.13: Ā, ka mea ki a rātou, “Kua oti te tuhituhi, ‘Ka kīa tōku whare he whare īnoi’; heoi, kua oti nei te mea e koutou hei ana mō ngā kaipāhua.”
21.14: Ā, i haere mai ki a ia ki roto ki te temepara ngā matapō me ngā kopa, ā, whakaorangia ake rātou e ia.
21.15: Nō te kitenga ia o ngā tohunga nui, o ngā karaipi i ngā mea whakamīharo i meatia e ia, i ngā tamariki hoki e karanga ana i te temepara, e mea ana, “Ohana ki te Tama a Rāwiri”; ka riri rātou.
21.16: Ka mea ki a ia, “E rongo ana koe ki tā ēnei e mea nei?” Ka mea a Īhu ki a rātou, “Āe rā; kīanō koutou i kite noa, ‘Pūmau tonu i a koe te whakamoemiti a te waha o ngā kōhungahunga, o ngā mea ngote ū’?”
21.17: Ā, ka mahue rātou i a ia, haere ana ia ki waho o te pā, ki Petani, ā, moe ana i reira. Ka Kanga a Īhu i tētahi Rākau Piki (Māka 11.12-14, 20-24)
21.18: Nā, i te ata, i a ia e hoki ana ki te pā, ka hiakai ia.
21.19: Ā, i tōna kitenga i tētahi piki i te taha o te ara, ka haere ia ki taua rākau, heoi, kīhai i kitea tētahi mea i runga, he rau anake. Ka mea ia ki te rākau, “Kei whai hua koe ā ake ake!” Ā, maroke tonu ake te piki.
21.20: Ā, nō te kitenga o ngā ākonga, ka mīharo, ka mea, “I pēheatia i hohoro ai te maroke o te piki nei?”
21.21: Nā, ka whakahoki a Īhu, ka mea ki a rātou, “He pono tāku e mea nei ki a koutou, me he whakapono tō koutou, kāhore i ruarua te whakaaro, e kore e meatia e koutou ko tēnei anake i meatia nei ki te piki, engari, ahakoa mea noa koutou ki tēnei maunga, ‘Kia rangā atu koe, kia whakatakā ki te moana’; ka meatia.
21.22: Ko ngā mea katoa hoki e tono ai koutou ina īnoi, ki te whakapono, ka riro i a koutou.” Te Take e Pā ana ki te Mana o Īhu (Māka 11.27-33; Ruka 20.1-8)
21.23: Ā, ka tae ia ki roto ki te temepara, ka haere mai ngā tohunga nui me ngā kaumātua o te iwi, i a ia anō e ako ana, ā, ka mea, “Tēnā koa te mana i meatia ai ēnei mea e koe? Nā wai hoatu tēnei mana ki a koe?”
21.24: Nā, ka whakahoki a Īhu, ka mea ki a rātou, “Māku e ui ki a koutou kia kotahi kupu, ki te kōrerotia e koutou ki ahau, māku hoki e kōrero ki a koutou te mana i mea ai ahau i ēnei mea.
21.25: Ko te iriiringa a Hoani, nō hea koia? Nō te rangi, nō ngā tāngata rānei?” Ā, ka kōrerorero rātou ki a rātou anō, ka mea, “Ki te mea tātou, ‘Nō te rangi,’ e mea mai ia ki a tātou, ‘Ha, he aha koutou tē whakapono ai ki a ia?’
21.26: Ā, ki te mea tātou, ‘Nō ngā tāngata’; ka wehi tātou i te mano; ki tā rātou katoa hoki he poropiti a Hoani.”
21.27: Nā, ka whakahoki rātou ki a Īhu, ka mea, “Kāhore mātou e mōhio.” Nā, ko tāna meatanga ki a rātou, “E kore anō e kōrerotia e ahau ki a koutou te mana i mea ai ahau i ēnei mea.” Te Kupu Whakarite o ngā Tama Tokorua
21.28: “Nā, e pēhea ana tō koutou whakaaro? Tokorua ngā tama a tētahi tangata; ā, ka haere ia ki tō mua, ka mea, ‘E tama, haere ki te mahi āianei ki tāku māra wāina.’
21.29: Nā, ka whakahoki ia, ka mea, ‘Kāhore ahau e pai’; otirā, i muri iho ka puta kē tōna whakaaro, ā, haere ana.
21.30: Ā, ka haere mai ia ki te tuarua, ka pērā anō tāna kupu. Nō, ka whakahoki tērā, ka mea, ‘E kara, ka haere ahau,’ ā, kīhai i tae.
21.31: Ko wai o taua tokorua i mea i tā tōna matua i pai ai?” Ka mea rātou ki a ia, “Ko tō mua.” Ka mea a Īhu ki a rātou, “He pono tāku e mea nei ki a koutou, ko ngā pupirikana me ngā wāhine kairau e tika ana i mua i a koutou ki te rangatiratanga o te Atua.
21.32: I haere hoki a Hoani ki a koutou rā te ara o te tika, ā, kīhai koutou i whakapono ki a ia; tēnā ko ngā pupirikana me ngā wāhine kairau i whakapono ki a ia; ko koutou ia, i tō koutou kitenga, kīhai i puta kē ō koutou whakaaro i muri, kīhai i whakapono ki a ia.” Te Kupu Whakarite mō ngā Kaimahi i roto i te Māra Wāina (Māka 12.1-12; Ruka 20.9-19)
21.33: “Whakarongo ki tētahi atu kupu whakarite. Tērā tētahi rangatira whare i whakatō i te māra wāina, ā, taiepatia ana, ā, taka noa, keria ana e ia te takahanga wāina i roto, hangā ana tētahi whare tiketike, tukua ana e ia ki ngā kaimahi, ā, haere ana ia ki tawhiti.
21.34: Ā, nō ka tata te pō hua, ka tonoa e ia āna pononga ki ngā kaimahi, ki te tiki i ōna hua.
21.35: Nā, ka mau ngā kaimahi ki āna pononga, whiua ana tētahi, whakamatea ana tētahi, ā, ākina ana tētahi ki te kōhatu.
21.36: Nā, ka tonoa anō e ia ētahi atu pononga, he tokomaha atu i ō mua; heoi, i pērātia anō rātou.
21.37: Nā, muri rawa iho, ka tono ia i tāna tama ki a rātou, i mea ia, ‘E hopohopo rātou ki tāku tama.’
21.38: Nō te kitenga ia o ngā kaimahi i te tama, ka mea ki a rātou anō, ‘Ko te tangata tēnei mōna te kāinga; tēnā, tātou ka whakamate i a ia, ka tango i tōna kāinga.’
21.39: Nā, ka mau rātou ki a ia, maka ana ki waho o te māra wāina, ā, whakamatea iho.
21.40: “Nā, ina tae te rangatira o te māra wāina, ka pēheatia e ia aua kaimahi?”
21.41: Ka mea rātou ki a ia, “Pōuriuri ana āianei tāna whakangaro i taua hunga whakarihariha; ā, ka tukua te māra wāina ki ētahi atu kaimahi, ki te hunga e tukua ai ki a ia ngā hua i ngā pō hua.”
21.42: Ka mea a Īhu ki a rātou, “Kīanō koutou i kite noa i roto i ngā karaipiture? ‘Ko te kōhatu i kapea e ngā kaihanga, kua meinga tēnei hei ūpoko mō te kokonga; nā te Ariki tēnei, he mea whakamīharo hoki ki ō tātou kanohi!’
21.43: “Koia, ahau ka mea nei ki a koutou, Ka tangohia te rangatiratanga o te Atua i a koutou, ā, ka hoatu ki tētahi iwi, e puta ai ngā hua o taua rangatiratanga.
21.44: Ko te tangata e hinga ki runga ki tēnei kōhatu, nā, mongamonga ana ia; ki te taka ia taua kōhatu ki runga ki tētahi, nā, ngotangota noa ia me he puehu.”
21.45: Ā, ka rongo ngā tohunga nui me ngā Parihi ki āna kupu whakarite, ka mōhio mō rātou āna kōrero.
21.46: Nā, i a rātou e whai ana kia hopukia ia, ka wehi i te mano, ki tā rātou hoki he poropiti ia.

22.1: Ā, ka oho ake a Īhu, ka kōrero kupu whakarite anō ki a rātou, ka mea,
22.2: “Ka rite te rangatiratanga o te rangi ki tētahi kīngi, i whakatakoto mārena mō tāna tama.
22.3: Ā, tonoa ana āna pononga, hei karanga i te hunga i kōrerotia ki te mārena; heoi, kīhai rātou i pai ki te haere.
22.4: Ka tono anō ia i ērā atu pononga, ka mea, ‘Mea atu ki te hunga i kōrerotia; Nā, kua rite tāku hākari, kua oti āku pūru, āku mea mōmona te patu, ā, kua rite katoa ngā mea; haere mai ki te mārena.’
22.5: Otirā, i paopaongia e rātou, haere ana ko tētahi ki tāna māra, ko tētahi ki tāna hokohoko.
22.6: Nā, hopukina ana āna pononga e ngā mea i mahue, tūkinotia ana rātou, ā, whakamatea iho.
22.7: Otiia, i riri te kīngi; ā, tonoa atu ana āna taua, whakangaromia ana taua hunga kōhuru, tahuna iho tō rātou pā.
22.8: Kātahi, ia ka mea ki āna pononga, ‘E rite ana te mārena, ko te hunga ia i karangatia kīhai i pai.
22.9: Nā, haere koutou ki ngā pekanga o ngā ara, ā, tonoa mai ki te mārena te hunga katoa e kite ai koutou.’
22.10: Nā, ka haere aua pononga ki ngā ara, ā, huihuia katoatia ana te hunga i kitea e rātou, āna pai, āna kino; nā, kikī ana te mārena i ngā manuhiri.
22.11: “Otiia, nō te tapokoranga o te kīngi kia kite i ngā manuhiri, ka kitea e ia i reira he tangata kāhore nei ōna kākahu mārena;
22.12: ā, ka mea ki a ia, ‘E hoa, he aha koe i tomo mai ai ki konei kāhore nei ōu kahu mārena?’ Heoi, kīhai ia i kuihi.
22.13: Nā, ka mea te kīngi ki ngā kaimahi, ‘Herea ōna ringa, ōna waewae, kawea atu, makā ki te pōuri i waho rawa; ko te wāhi tērā o te tangi, o te tetēā o ngā niho.’
22.14: “He tokomaha hoki e karangatia, he ruarua ia e whiriwhiria.” Te Take e Pā ana ki te Hoatu Takoha (Māka 12.13-17; Ruka 20.20-26)
22.15: Me i reira ka haere ngā Parihi, ka rūnanga ki te pēhea e mau ai tētahi kupu āna.
22.16: Ā, ka tonoa ki a ia ā rātou ākonga me ngā tāngata piri ki a Herora, hei mea, “E te Kaiwhakaako, e mātau ana mātou he pono koe, e whakaako ana koe i te ara a te Atua i runga i te pono, e kore anō tā te tangata, e whakaaroa e koe; e kore nei hoki koe e titiro ki te kanohi tangata.
22.17: Tēnā, kōrerotia ki a mātou, e pēhea ana tōu whakaaro? He mea tika rānei te hoatu takoha ki a Hīhā, kāhore rānei?”
22.18: Otiia, i mōhio a Īhu ki tō rātou whakaaro kino, ā, ka mea, “He aha tā koutou e whakamātautau nā i ahau, e te hunga tinihanga?
22.19: Tēnā koa, kia kite ahau i te moni i takoha.” Ā, mauria mai ana e rātou ki a ia he pene.
22.20: Nā, ka mea ia ki a rātou, “Nō wai tēnei āhua me te tuhituhinga?”
22.21: Ka mea rātou ki a ia, “Nō Hīhā.” Kātahi ia ka mea ki a rātou, “Hoatu ki a Hīhā, ngā mea a Hīhā, ki te Atua anō ngā mea a te Atua.”
22.22: Ka rongo rātou, ka mīharo; ā, mahue ake ia i a rātou, ā, haere ana rātou. Te Take e Pā ana ki te Aranga ake i te Mate (Māka 12.18-27; Ruka 20.27-40)
22.23: I taua rā ka haere mai ki a ia ngā Haruki, e mea nei kāhore he aranga, ka ui ki a ia,
22.24: ka mea, “E te Kaiwhakaako, i mea a Mohi, ki te mate te tangata, ā, kāhore āna tamariki, mā tōna teina e mārena tāna wahine, e whakatupu ake he uri mō tōna tuakana.
22.25: Nā, tokowhitu tētahi whānau i a mātou, he tuākana, he tēina; te mārenatanga o te tuatahi, ka mate, ā, hore ōna uri, waiho iho tāna wahine mā tōna teina.
22.26: Me te tuarua anō, me te tuatoru, puta noa i te tuawhitu.
22.27: Ā muri iho i a rātou katoa, ka mate te wahine.
22.28: Nā, i te aranga, mā wai o te tokowhitu te wahine? I a rātou katoa nei hoki ia.”
22.29: Nā, ka whakahoki a Īhu, ka mea ki a rātou, “E hē ana koutou, tē mōhio ki ngā karaipiture, ki te kaha anō o te Atua.
22.30: I te aranga hoki e kore rātou e mārena, e kore anō e hoatu kia mārenatia, engari, ka rite ki ngā anahera a te Atua i te rangi.
22.31: Nā, ko te aranga o te hunga mate, kāhore anō koutou i kite i tā te Atua i kōrero ai ki a koutou, i mea ai,
22.32: ‘Ko ahau te Atua o Āperahama, te Atua o Īhaka, te Atua o Hākopa’? Ehara te Atua i te Atua nō te hunga mate, engari, nō te hunga ora.”
22.33: Ā, nō ka rongo te mano, ka mīharo ki tāna ako. Te Tino Ture Nui (Māka 12.28-34; Ruka 10.25-28)
22.34: Nō te rongonga ia o ngā Parihi, kua kopi i a ia te māngai o ngā Haruki, ka whakamine tahi rātou.
22.35: Nā, ka ui tētahi o rātou, he kaiako i te ture, ka whakamātautau i a ia, ka mea,
22.36: “E te Kaiwhakaako, ko tēhea te kupu nui o te ture?”
22.37: Ka mea a Īhu ki a ia, “ ‘Kia whakapaua tōu ngākau, tōu wairua, tōu hinengaro, ki te aroha ki te Ariki, ki tōu Atua.’
22.38: Ko te tuatahi tēnei, ko te kupu nui.
22.39: He rite anō te tuarua ki tēnei, ‘Kia aroha koe ki tōu hoa tata, ānō ko koe.’
22.40: Kei runga i ēnei kupu e rua e iri ana te ture me ngā poropiti.” Te Take e Pā ana mō te Karaiti (Māka 12.35-37; Ruka 20.41-44)
22.41: Ā, i ngā Parihi e noho huihui ana, ka ui a Īhu ki a rātou,
22.42: ka mea, “He pēhea ō koutou whakaaro ki a te Karaiti? Nā wai ia tama?” Ka mea rātou ki a ia, “Nā Rāwiri.”
22.43: Ka mea ia ki a rātou, “He aha rā a Rāwiri, i a ia e nohoia ana e te Wairua, i karanga ai i a ia he Ariki? I mea hoki ia,
22.44: ‘I mea te Ariki ki tōku Ariki: Hei tōku matau koe noho ai, kia meinga rā anō e ahau ōu hoariri hei tūranga waewae mōu.’
22.45: Nā, ka kīa nei ia e Rāwiri he Ariki, he pēhea i tama ai ki a ia?”
22.46: Ā, hore he tangata i āhei te whakahoki kupu ki a ia, kīhai rawa anō tētahi i māia ki te ui ki a ia i taua rā iho anō.

23.1: Me i reira ka kōrero a Īhu ki te mano, ki āna ākonga hoki,
23.2: ka mea, “Kei te nohoanga o Mohi ngā karaipi rātou ko ngā Parihi e noho ana;
23.3: ko ngā mea katoa e mea ai rātou hei pupuri mā koutou, puritia, mahia; kei rite ia ā koutou mahi ki ā rātou mahi; ko tā rātou hoki he kōrero, kāhore he mahi.
23.4: E hereherea ana hoki e rātou ngā wahanga taimaha, he uaua me ka pīkaua, ā, whakawahā iho ki runga ki ngā pokohiwi o te tangata; heoi, kāhore rātou e pai kia whakakorikoria ki tētahi o ō rātou maihao.
23.5: Ko ā rātou mahi katoa e meatia ana hei mātakitaki mā te tangata; e whakawhānuitia ana e rātou ā rātou pairakere; e whakanuia ana anō ngā tāniko o ō rātou kākahu.
23.6: Ko tā rātou e rawe ai ko ngā nohoanga rangatira i ngā hākari, me ngā nohoanga rangatira i ngā whare karakia,
23.7: me ngā ohatanga i ngā kāinga hokohoko, ā, kia karangatia e te tangata, ‘E Rapi.’
23.8: Otiia, aua koutou e karangatia, ‘E Rapi,’ kotahi hoki tō koutou kaiwhakaako; ā, he tuākana, he tēina, koutou katoa.
23.9: Kaua anō tētahi e kīa hei matua mō koutou i runga i te whenua; kotahi hoki tō koutou Matua, ko tērā i te rangi.
23.10: Kaua anō koutou e kīa he kaiārahi, kotahi anō tō koutou kaiārahi, ko te Karaiti.
23.11: Ko te mea nui rawa hoki o koutou, hei kaimahi ia mā koutou.
23.12: Ki te whakahira hoki tētahi i a ia, ka whakaititia, ā, ki te whakaiti tētahi i a ia, ka whakahirangia.” Ka Whakahē a Īhu i ō Rātou Tinihanga (Māka 12.40; Ruka 11.39-42, 44, 52; 20.47)
23.13: “Auē, te mate mō koutou, e ngā karaipi, e ngā Parihi, e te hunga tinihanga! E tūtakina ana hoki e koutou te rangatiratanga o te rangi ki ngā tāngata. Kāhore koutou e tomo, kāhore anō e tukua te hunga e tomo ana kia tapoko.
23.14: Auē, te mate mō koutou, e ngā karaipi, e ngā Parihi, e te hunga tinihanga! Nō te mea, ka pau i a koutou ngā whare o ngā pouaru, ā, e māminga ana ki te īnoi roa; mō reira he nui rawa te hē e tau ki a koutou.
23.15: “Auē, te mate mō koutou, e ngā karaipi, e ngā Parihi, e te hunga tinihanga! E taiāwhiotia ana hoki e koutou te moana me te whenua, kia tahuri mai ai tētahi hei porohiraiti, ā, nō ka riro mai, ka meinga ia e koutou hei tamaiti mō Kehena, kino noa atu i a koutou.
23.16: “Auē, te mate mō koutou, e ngā kaiārahi matapō, e mea nei, ‘Ki te oatitia te whare tapu e tētahi, he mea noa anō; otirā, ki te oatitia e tētahi te kōura o te whare tapu, ka mau tāna!’
23.17: E ngā kūware, e ngā matapō, ko tēhea te mea nui, ko te kōura rānei, ko te whare tapu rānei i tapu ai te kōura?
23.18: Me tēnei, ‘Ki te oatitia e tētahi te āta, he mea noa anō; otirā, ki te oatitia te whakahere i runga i te āta, ka mau tāna.’
23.19: E ngā kūware, e ngā matapō, ko tēhea te mea nui, ko te whakahere, ko te āta rānei, i tapu ai te whakahere?
23.20: Nā, ki te oatitia e tētahi te āta, e oatitia ana e ia tērā mea, me ngā mea katoa i runga.
23.21: Ki te oatitia e tētahi te whare tapu, e oatitia ana e ia tērā mea, me te kainoho o roto.
23.22: Ki te oatitia hoki e tētahi te rangi, e oatitia ana e ia te torōna o te Atua, me te kainoho o runga.
23.23: “Auē, te mate mō koutou, e ngā karaipi, e ngā Parihi, e te hunga tinihanga! E hoatu ana e koutou te wāhi whakatekau o te miniti, o te anihi, o te kumine, ā, kapea ake ngā mea nunui o te ture, te whakawā, te tohu tangata, te whakapono; he tika kia meatia e koutou ēnei, engari kaua tērā rā e kapea.
23.24: E ngā kaiārahi matapō, e tātari nei i te waeroa, ā, horomia ake te kāmera.
23.25: “Auē, te mate mō koutou e ngā karaipi, e ngā Parihi, e te hunga tinihanga! E horoi nei i waho o te kapu, o te pereti, ko roto ia kī tonu i te pāhua, i te taikaha.
23.26: E te Parihi matapō, mātua horoia a roto o te kapu, o te pereti, kia mā ai hoki a waho.
23.27: “Auē, te mate mō koutou, e ngā karaipi, e ngā Parihi, e te hunga tinihanga! He rite hoki koutou ki ngā urupā kua oti te pani ki te paru mā, ko waho he ātaahua ki te titiro atu, ko roto ia kī tonu i ngā kōiwi tūpāpaku, i ngā mea poke katoa.
23.28: He pēnā hoki koutou, ko waho e tika ana ki tā te tangata titiro, ko roto ia e kī ana i te tinihanga, i te kino. Ka Waitohu a Īhu i ō Rātou Whuinga (Ruka 11.47-51)
23.29: “Auē, te mate mō koutou, e ngā karaipi, e ngā Parihi, e te hunga tinihanga! Ko koutou nei hoki hei hanga i ngā tanumanga o ngā poropiti, hei whakapaipai i ngā urupā o ngā tāngata tika,
23.30: me te kī anō, ‘Me i ngā rā tātou o ō tātou mātua, kīhai tātou i uru tahi me rātou ki te whakaheke i te toto o ngā poropiti.’
23.31: He whakaatu tērā nā koutou, ko koutou ngā tamariki a te hunga nāna i patu ngā poropiti.
23.32: Tēnā rā, kia kī i a koutou te mēhua a ō koutou mātua.
23.33: E ngā neke, e te uri nākahi, me aha ka rere ai koutou i te kupu tuku ki te rēinga?
23.34: Nā, ka tonoa atu e ahau ki a koutou ngā poropiti, ngā tāngata mahara, ngā karaipi; ko ētahi o rātou e whakamatea e koutou, e rīpekatia; ko ētahi e whiua i roto i ō koutou whare karakia, e whāia hoki i tētahi pā ki tētahi pā.
23.35: Ā, ka utaina ki a koutou ngā toto katoa o te hunga tika i whakahekea ki te whenua, nō te toto o Āpera, o te tangata tika tae iho ki te toto o Hakaraia, o te tama a Parakia, i kōhurutia e koutou i waenganui o te whare tapu, o te āta.
23.36: He pono tāku e mea nei ki a koutou, tērā e pā ēnei mea katoa ki tēnei whakatupuranga. Te Aroha o Īhu mō Hiruhārama (Ruka 13.34-35)
23.37: “E Hiruhārama, e Hiruhārama, e whakamate nei i ngā poropiti, e āki nei ki te kāmaka i te hunga e tonoa ana ki a koe, anō te tini o āku meatanga kia whakaminea āu tamariki, kia pērātia me te heihei e whakamine nei i āna pī ki raro i ōna parirau, ā, kīhai koutou i pai!
23.38: Nā, ka mahue atu ki a koutou tō koutou whare kia takoto noa ana.
23.39: Ko tāku kupu hoki tēnei ki a koutou, e kore koutou e kite i ahau ā mua ake nei, kia mea rā anō koutou ‘Ka whakapaingia ia e haere mai ana i runga i te ingoa o te Ariki.’ ”

24.1: Ā, ka puta atu a Īhu ki waho o te temepara, ka haere, nā, ka tae mai āna ākonga ki a ia kia whakakitea ki a ia ngā whare i hangā mō te temepara.
24.2: Otirā, ka mea ia ki a rātou, “Kāhore ianei koutou e kite i ēnei mea katoa? He pono tāku e mea nei ki a koutou, e kore e toe ki konei tētahi kōhatu ki runga ake i tētahi kōhatu, engari ka whakahoroa katoatia.” Ngā Raruraru me ngā Whakatoinga (Māka 13.3-13; Ruka 21.7-19)
24.3: Ā, i a ia e noho ana i runga i Maunga Ōriwa, ka haere puku mai ngā ākonga ki a ia, ka mea, “Kōrerotia ki a mātou, ko āhea ēnei mea? He aha te tohu o tōu haerenga mai, o te mutunga hoki o te ao?”
24.4: Nā, ka whakahoki a Īhu, ka mea ki a rātou, “Kia tūpato kei māmingatia koutou e te tangata.
24.5: He tokomaha hoki e haere mai i runga i tōku ingoa, e mea, ‘Ko te Karaiti ahau’, ā, he tokomaha e whakapōhēhētia.
24.6: Ā, tērā koutou e rongo ki ngā pakanga, ki ngā hau kōrero pakanga; kia tūpato kei ohorere koutou; tā te mea kua rite kia puta ēnei mea katoa, taihoa ia te mutunga.
24.7: E whakatika hoki tētahi iwi ki tētahi iwi, tētahi rangatiratanga ki tētahi rangatiratanga; ā, e puta ngā pō matekai, ngā mate urutā, me ngā rū, ki ngā tini wāhi.
24.8: Otirā, ko te tīmatanga kau ēnei katoa o ngā mamae.
24.9: “Ko reira koutou tukua ai kia tūkinotia, ā, e whakamatea koutou; ā, e kino hoki ngā iwi katoa ki a koutou, he whakaaro ki tōku ingoa.
24.10: Ā, he tokomaha e hē, ā, ka tuku tētahi i tētahi, ka kino anō tētahi ki tētahi.
24.11: He tokomaha anō ngā poropiti teka e whakatika, ā, he tokomaha e whakapōhēhētia e rātou.
24.12: Ā, i te kino ka hua, ka mātoke haere te aroha o te tini tāngata.
24.13: Ko te tangata ia e ū ana, ā taea noatia te mutunga, ka ora ia.
24.14: Ā, e kauwhautia tēnei rongopai o te rangatiratanga puta noa i te ao, hei mea whakaatu ki ngā iwi katoa; ā, ko reira puta ai te mutunga.” Te Mea Whakarihariha (Māka 13.14-23; Ruka 21.20-24)
24.15: “Ā, e kite koutou i te mea whakarihariha, i te mea whakangaro, i kōrerotia ai e Raniera poropiti, i a ia e tū ana i te wāhi tapu.” (Kia mātau te kaititiro pukapuka.)
24.16: Ko reira kia rere te hunga i Hūria ki ngā maunga;
24.17: ko te tangata i runga i te whare kei heke iho ki te tiki mea i roto i tōna whare.
24.18: Kauaka anō te tangata i te māra e hoki ki te tiki i ōna kākahu.
24.19: Auē, te mate mō te hunga e hapū ana, mō ngā mea hoki e whāngai ana ki te ū, i aua rā!
24.20: Me īnoi koutou kei rokohanga koutou e te whati i te hōtoke, i te hāpati rānei.
24.21: Kei taua wā, hoki te whiu nui, kāhore ōna rite mai o te tīmatanga o te ao ā mohoa noa nei, e kore anō e pērā ā mua ake nei.
24.22: Ā, me i kāhore aua rā i poroa i waenga, hore he kikokiko e ora; otirā, ka whakaaroa te hunga i whiriwhiria, ā, ka poroa aua rā.
24.23: “Ki te mea tētahi ki a koutou i reira, ‘Nā, tēnei a te Karaiti’; nā, ‘Tērā’; aua e whakaponohia.
24.24: E whakatika hoki ngā karaiti teka, me ngā poropiti teka, ā, ka hoatu e rātou ngā tohu nunui, me ngā mea whakamīharo; ā, mehemea e taea, ka māmingatia anō te hunga i whiriwhiria.
24.25: Nā, kua kōrerotia wawetia nei e ahau ki a koutou.
24.26: “Nā, ahakoa mea rātou ki a koutou ‘Nā, kei te koraha ia’; aua e haere atu. ‘Nā, kei ngā rūma o roto rawa’; aua e whakaponohia.
24.27: Ka rite hoki ki te uira e puta mai nei i te rāwhiti, ā, hiko tonu atu ki te uru, te haerenga mai o te Tama a te tangata.
24.28: “Ko te wāhi hoki i te tūpāpaku, ko reira huihui ai ngā kāhu. Te Haerenga Mai o te Tama a te Tangata (Māka 13.24-27; Ruka 21.25-28)
24.29: “Ā muri tonu iho i te whakapāwera i aua rā, ‘Ka whakapōuritia te rā, e kore anō e titi te atarau, ka taka iho ngā whetū i te rangi, ā, ka ngāueue ngā mea kaha o ngā rangi.’
24.30: Ko reira anō puta ai te tohu o te Tama a te tangata i te rangi; ā, ko reira ngā iwi katoa o te whenua tangi ai, ā, e kite rātou i te Tama a te tangata e haere mai ana i runga i ngā kapua o te rangi me te kaha, me te korōria nui.
24.31: Ā, e tonoa e ia āna anahera me te tētere tangi nui, ā, ka huihuia e rātou āna i whiriwhiri ai i ngā hau e whā, i tētahi pito o te rangi puta noa i tētahi pito. Te Whakaakoranga mō te Rākau Piki (Māka 13.28-31; Ruka 21.29-33)
24.32: “Nā, kia ākona koutou e te piki ki tētahi kupu whakarite. I tōna manga e ngāwari ana anō, ā, ka puta ōna rau, ka mōhio koutou ka tata te raumati.
24.33: Waihoki ko koutou, ina kite i ēnei mea katoa, ka mātau koutou ka tata ia, kei ngā kūwaha tonu.
24.34: He pono tāku e mea nei ki a koutou, E kore rawa tēnei whakatupuranga e pahemo, kia puta katoa rā anō ēnei mea.
24.35: Ko te rangi me te whenua e pahemo, ko āku kupu ia e kore e pahemo. Kāhore tētahi Tangata e Mōhio hei tēhea Rā, hei tēhea Hāora (Māka 13.32-37; Ruka 17.26-30, 34-36)
24.36: “Otirā, kāhore tētahi tangata e mōhio ki taua rā, ki taua hāora, kāhore rawa ngā anahera o te rangi, kāhore te Tama a te tangata, ko tōku Matua anake.
24.37: Ka rite hoki ki ngā rā i a Noa te haerenga mai o te Tama a te tangata.
24.38: Ka rite hoki ki tā rātou i ngā rā i mua atu o te waipuke; e kai ana, e inu ana, e mārena ana, e hoatu ana kia mārenatia, ā tae noa ki te rā i tomo ai a Noa ki roto ki te āka,
24.39: ā, kāhore rātou i mōhio, ā, pakaru noa te waipuke, ā, kāhakina ana rātou katoa; e pērā anō te haerenga mai o te Tama a te tangata.
24.40: I taua wā tokorua ki te māra; kotahi e tangohia, kotahi e waiho.
24.41: Tokorua wāhine e huri ana i te mira; kotahi e tangohia, kotahi e waiho.
24.42: “Kia mataara rāpea; e kore hoki koutou e mōhio ki te hāora e puta mai ai tō koutou Ariki.
24.43: Kia mōhio ki tēnei, me i mātau te tangata o te whare ki te mataaratanga e puta ai te tāhae, kua tautīaki ia, ā, kāhore i tukua tōna whare kia pokaia.
24.44: Nā, kia mataara hoki koutou; nō te mea ka puta mai te Tama a te tangata i te hāora e kore ai koutou e mahara. Te Pononga Pono, Ponokore Rānei (Ruka 12.41-48)
24.45: “Ko wai rā te pononga pono, mahara, i meinga e tōna ariki hei rangatira mō āna tāngata, hei hoatu i te kai mā rātou i te wā e tika ai?
24.46: Ka koa taua pononga ki te rokohanga e tōna ariki, ina haere mai, e pērā ana.
24.47: He pono tāku e mea nei ki a koutou, Ka meinga ia hei rangatira mō ōna taonga katoa.
24.48: Otirā, ki te mea taua pononga kino i roto i tōna ngākau, ‘Ka roa te putanga mai o tōku ariki,’
24.49: ā, ka anga, ka patu i ōna hoa pononga, ka kai, ka inu tahi me te hunga haurangi.
24.50: E tae mai te ariki o taua pononga i te rā e kore ai ia e mahara, i te hāora e kore ai ia e mōhio.
24.51: Ka hātepea pūtia ia, ka meinga he wāhi mōna i roto i te hunga tinihanga; ko te wāhi tērā o te tangi, o te tetēā o ngā niho.

25.1: “Nā, ka rite te rangatiratanga o te rangi ki ngā wāhina kotahi tekau, i mau i ā rātou rama, ā, haere ana ki te whakatau i te tāne mārena hou.
25.2: Tokorima o rātou he maharakore, tokorima he mahara.
25.3: Ko ngā mea maharakore i mau i ā rātou rama, kīhai ia i mau hinu.
25.4: Ko te hunga mahara i mau hinu atu i roto i ā rātou ipu me ā rātou rama.
25.5: Ka whakaroa te tāne mārena hou, ka tunewha rātou katoa, ka moe.
25.6: “Nā, i waenganui pō, ka pā te karanga, ‘Ē, ko te tāne mārena hou! Puta mai koutou ki te whakatau i a ia.’
25.7: Kātahi ka ara katoa aua wāhina, ka whakapai i ā rātou rama.
25.8: Nā, ka mea te hunga maharakore ki te hunga mahara, ‘Hōmai ki a mātou tētahi wāhi o tā koutou hinu; ka pirau hoki ā mātou rama.’
25.9: Nā, ka whakahoki te hunga mahara, ka mea, ‘Kāhore! Kei kore e ranea mā mātou, mā koutou; engari, me haere koutou ki ngā kaihoko, hoko ai i tētahi mā koutou.’
25.10: Ā, nō tō rātou haerenga atu ki te hoko, ka tae mai te tāne mārena hou; ā, tomo tahi ana me ia ki te mārena te hunga kua āta rite; ā, tūtakina ana te tatau.
25.11: “Muri iho ka tae ērā wāhina, ka mea, ‘E te ariki, e te ariki, uakina ki a mātou.’
25.12: Nā, ka whakahoki ia, ka mea, ‘He pono tāku e mea nei ki a koutou, kāhore ahau e mōhio ki a koutou.’
25.13: “Kia mataara rāpea koutou, e kore hoki koutou e mōhio ki te rā, ki te hāora, e puta mai ai te Tama a te tangata. Te Kupu Whakarite o ngā Pononga Tokotoru (Ruka 19.11-27)
25.14: “Ka rite hoki ki te tangata e haere ana ki tawhiti, karangatia ana e ia āna pononga ake, ā, hoatu ana ki a rātou āna taonga.
25.15: Ki tētahi i hoatu e ia e rima taranata, ki tētahi e rua, ki tētahi kotahi; ki ia tangata, ki ia tangata, he mea whakarite ki tō rātou uaua; ā, haere ana ia.
25.16: Nā, ko te haerenga o te tangata i a ia nei ngā taranata e rima, hokohokona ana aua mea e ia, ā, riro ana i a ia e rima atu ngā taranata.
25.17: Pērā anō hoki te tangata i ngā mea e rua; e rua atu i riro i a ia.
25.18: Ko te tangata ia i te mea kotahi, haere ana, kei te keri ki te whenua, ā, hunā ana e ia te moni a tōna ariki.
25.19: “Ā roa rawa iho, ka puta te ariki o aua pononga, ka mea kia kōrerotia āna moni e rātou ki a ia.
25.20: Ā, ko te haerenga o te tangata i a ia nei ngā taranata e rima, ka mauria mai e ia e rima atu ngā taranata, ā, ka mea, ‘E te ariki, e rima āu taranata i hōmai ai ki ahau; nā, e rima atu ngā taranata kua riro mai i ahau hei tāpiri mō ērā.’
25.21: Ka mea tōna ariki ki a ia, ‘Pai rawa, e te pononga pai, e te pononga pono; pono tāu mahi ki ngā mea ruarua māku koe e mea hei rangatira mō ngā mea maha; uru mai koe ki te hari o tōu ariki.’
25.22: “Me tērā hoki i a ia nei ngā taranata e rua, ka haere mai, ka mea, ‘E te ariki, e rua āu taranata i hōmai ai ki ahau; nā, e rua atu ngā taranata kua riro mai i ahau hei tāpiri mō ērā.’
25.23: Ka mea tōna ariki ki a ia, ‘Pai rawa, e te pononga pai, e te pononga pono; pono tonu tāu mahi ki ngā mea ruarua, māku koe e mea hei rangatira mō ngā mea maha; uru mai koe ki te hari o tōu ariki.’
25.24: “Ā, ko te haerenga mai hoki o te tangata i a ia nei te taranata kotahi, ka mea, ‘E te ariki, i mātau ahau ki a koe he tangata pakeke koe, e kokoti ana i te wāhi kīhai i ruia e koe, e kohikohi ana i te wāhi kīhai i whakatītaria e koe.
25.25: Nā, ka wehi ahau, ā, haere ana, hunā ana i tāu taranata ki te whenua; nā, tāu nā.’
25.26: “Nā, ka whakahoki tōna ariki, ka mea ki a ia, ‘Pononga kino, pononga māngere, i mātau koe e kokoti ana ahau i te wāhi kīhai i ruia e ahau, e kohikohi ana i te wāhi kīhai i whakatītaria e ahau.
25.27: Ko te mea tika hoki kia kawea e koe tāku moni ki ngā rangatira pēke moni, ā, ka tae mai ahau, ka riro mai tāku me ōna hua anō.
25.28: Ko tēnei, tangohia te taranata i a ia, hoatu ki tērā i ngā taranata kotahi tekau.
25.29: Ki te whai mea hoki tētahi, ka hoatu anō ki a ia, ā, ka maha atu āna; ā, ki te kāhore he mea a tētahi, ko āna mea ake ka tangohia i a ia.
25.30: Nā, makā te pononga huakore ki te pōuri i waho; ko te wāhi tērā o te tangi, o te tetēā o ngā niho.’ Te Whakawā Whakamutunga
25.31: “Nā, hei te taenga mai o te Tama a te tangata me tōna korōria, rātou tahi ko ngā anahera, ko reira ia noho ai ki runga ki te torōna o tōna korōria.
25.32: Ā, ka whakaminea ki tōna aroaro ngā iwi katoa; ka wehea rātou e ia ētahi i ētahi, ka pērātia me te hēpara e wehe nei i ngā hipi, i ngā koati.
25.33: Ka whakatūria e ia ngā hipi ki tōna matau, ko ngā koati ki mauī.
25.34: Kātahi, te Kīngi ka mea ki te hunga i tōna matau, ‘Haere mai, e te hunga whakapai a tōku Matua, nohoia te rangatiratanga kua rite noa ake mō koutou nō te orokohanganga rā anō o te ao.
25.35: I hiakai hoki ahau, ā, whāngainga ana e koutou. I matewai ahau, ā, whakainumia ana e koutou; he manene ahau, ā, whakamanuhiritia ana e koutou.
25.36: I tū tahanga, ā, whakakākahuria ana e koutou; he tūroro, ā, tirotirohia ana ahau e koutou; i te whare herehere ahau, ā, haere mai ana koutou ki ahau.’
25.37: “Nā, ka whakahoki te hunga tika ki a ia, ka mea, ‘E te Ariki, nōnahea mātou i kite ai i a koe e hiakai ana, ā, whāngai ana i a koe? E mate ana rānei i te wai, ā, whakainu ana i a koe?
25.38: Nōnahea mātou i kite ai i a koe e manene ana, ā, whakamanuhiri ana i a koe? E tū tahanga ana rānei, ā, whakakākahu ana i a koe?
25.39: Nōnahea hoki mātou i kite ai i a koe e tūroro ana, i te whare herehere rānei, ā, haere ana ki a koe?’
25.40: Ko reira whakahoki ai te Kīngi, mea ai ki a rātou, ‘He pono tāku e mea nei ki a koutou, ko tā koutou i mea ai ki tētahi o āku tēina, ahakoa ki te iti rawa, he meatanga tēnā ki ahau.’
25.41: “Ko reira ia kī atu ai ki te hunga i te taha ki mauī, ‘Mawehe atu i ahau, e te hunga ka oti nei te kanga, ki te ahi kā tonu, kua kā noa ake mō te rēwera rātou ko āna anahera.
25.42: I hiakai hoki ahau, ā, kīhai i whāngainga e koutou; i mate i te wai, ā, kīhai i whakainumia e koutou.
25.43: He manene ahau, ā, kīhai i whakamanuhiritia e koutou. I tū tahanga, ā, kīhai i whakakākahuria e koutou; he tūroro ahau, i te whare herehere, ā, kīhai koutou i tirotiro i ahau.’
25.44: “Ko reira anō rātou whakahoki ai ki a ia, mea ai, ‘E te Ariki, nōnahea mātou i kite ai i a koe e hiakai ana, e matewai ana, e manene ana, e tū tahanga ana, e tūroro ana, i te whare herehere rānei, ā, kīhai i mahi mea māu?’
25.45: Ko reira whakahoki ai ia ki a rātou, mea ai, ‘He pono tāku e mea nei ki a koutou, I te mea kīhai nei i meatia e koutou ki tētahi o ngā nonohi rawa nei, inā, kīhai i meatia ki ahau.’
25.46: Nā, ko ēnei e haere ki te whiu utu hara kāhore nei ōna mutunga; ko te hunga tika ia ki te ora tonu.”

26.1: Ā, ka mutu ēnei kupu katoa a Īhu, ka mea ia ki āna ākonga,
26.2: “E mātau ana koutou kia rua ake rā ko te Kapenga, ā, ka tukua te Tama a te tangata kia rīpekatia.”
26.3: Nā, ka whakamine ngā tohunga nui, ngā karaipi, me ngā kaumātua o te iwi, ki te whare o te tohunga nui, ko Kaiapa te ingoa,
26.4: ka whakatakoto tikanga nanakia e mau ai a Īhu, e whakamatea ai.
26.5: Otirā, i mea rātou, “Kauaka i te hākari, kei ngangau te iwi.” Ka Whakawahia a Īhu i Petani (Māka 14.3-9; Hoani 12.1-8)
26.6: Nā, i a Īhu i Petani i te whare o Haimona repera,
26.7: ka haere mai tētahi wahine ki a ia me te pouaka kōhatu, kī tonu i te hinu kakara utu nui, ā, ringihia ana ki runga ki tōna mātenga, i a ia e noho ana ki te kai.
26.8: Nō te kitenga ia o āna ākonga, ka riri, ka mea, “Hei aha tēnei maumau?
26.9: He nui hoki te utu me i hokona tēnei hinu kakara, ka hoatu ki te hunga rawakore.”
26.10: Ā, i mōhio a Īhu, ka mea ki a rātou, “He aha tā koutou e whakapāwerawera i te wahine nei? He mahi pai hoki tāna i mea nei ki ahau.
26.11: Kei a koutou tonu hoki te hunga rawakore i ngā wā katoa; tēnā ko ahau e kore e noho tonu ki a koutou.
26.12: I ringihia ai hoki tēnei hinu kakara ki tōku tinana, he mea mō tōku tanumanga.
26.13: He pono tāku e mea nei ki a koutou, Ko ngā wāhi o te ao katoa e kauwhautia ai tēnei rongopai, ka kōrerotia anō tā tēnei wahine i mea ai, hei whakamahara ki a ia.” Ka Whakaae a Hūrā ki te Tuku i a Īhu (Māka 14.10-11; Ruka 22.3-6)
26.14: Kātahi, ka haere tētahi o te tekau mā rua, ko Hūrā Ikariote te ingoa, ki ngā tohunga nui,
26.15: ka mea, “He aha tā koutou e pai ai kia hōmai ki ahau, ā, māku ia e tuku ki a koutou?” Ā, ka pāunatia e rātou e toru tekau hiriwa ki a ia.
26.16: Ā, nō reira mai anō ia i rapu ai i te wā pai e tukua ai ia. Ka Kainga e Īhu te Kapenga i te Taha i Āna Ākonga (Māka 14.12-21; Ruka 22.7-13, 21-23; Hoani 13.21-30)
26.17: Nā, i te rā tuatahi o te Taro Rēwenakore, ka haere ngā ākonga ki a Īhu, ka mea ki a ia, “Ko hea tāu e pai ai kia takā e mātou te Kapenga hei kai māu?”
26.18: Nā, ka mea ia, “Haere ki te pā, ki a mea, ka kī atu ki a ia, ‘E mea ana te Kaiwhakaako, Ka tata tōku tāima; hei a koe mātou ko āku ākonga mea ai i te Kapenga.’ ”
26.19: Ā, meatia ana e ngā ākonga tā Īhu i whakarite ai ki a rātou; takā ana e rātou te Kapenga.
26.20: Ka ahiahi, ka noho ia me te tekau mā rua.
26.21: Ā, i a rātou e kai ana, ka mea ia, “He pono tāku e mea nei ki a koutou, mā tētahi o koutou ahau e tuku.”
26.22: Ā, pōuri noa iho rātou, ka anga, ka kōrero takitahi ki a ia, “Ko ahau rānei, e te Ariki?”
26.23: Ā, ka whakahoki ia, ka mea, “Ko te tangata, e toutou tahi nei ō māua ringa ki te rīhi, māna ahau e tuku.
26.24: E haere ana hoki te Tama a te tangata, e pērā ana me te mea i tuhituhia mōna. Otiia, auē te mate mō te tangata e tukua ai te Tama a te tangata! He pai mō taua tangata me i kaua ia e whānau.”
26.25: Kātahi a Hūrā, tōna kaituku, ka oho ake, ka mea, “E te Kaiwhakaako, ko ahau rānei?” Anō rā ko ia ki a ia, “Kua kōrerotia nā e koe.” Te Hapa a te Ariki (Māka 14.22-26; Ruka 22.14-20; 1 Koriniti 11.23-25)
26.26: Ā, i a rātou e kai ana, ka mau a Īhu ki te taro, ā, ka mutu te whakapai, ka whawhati. Ka hoatu ki ngā ākonga, ka mea, “Tangohia, kainga; ko tōku tinana tēnei.”
26.27: Nā, ka mau ia ki te kapu, ā, ka mutu te whakawhetai, ka hoatu ki a rātou, ka mea, “Inumia tētahi wāhi o tēnei e koutou katoa.
26.28: Ko ōku toto hoki ēnei, ko o te kawenata hou, e whakahekea ana mō te tini, hei murunga hara.
26.29: Nā, ko tāku kupu tēnei ki a koutou, e kore ahau e inu i tēnei hua o te wāina ā mua ake nei, kia taea rā anō taua rā e inumia houtia ai e tātou i te rangatiratanga o tōku Matua.”
26.30: Ā, nō ka mutu tā rātou hīmene, ka haere ki Maunga Ōriwa. Ka Poropiti a Īhu i Whakakāhore a Pita (Māka 14.27-31; Ruka 22.31-34; Hoani 13.36-38)
26.31: Kātahi, a Īhu ka mea ki a rātou, “Ka hē katoa koutou ki ahau i tēnei pō, kua oti hoki te tuhituhi, ‘Ka patua e ahau te hēpara, ā, ka whakamararatia ngā hipi o te kāhui.’
26.32: Otirā, muri iho i tōku aranga, ka haere ahau i mua i a koutou ki Kariri.”
26.33: Nā, ka whakahoki a Pita, ka mea ki a ia, “Ahakoa hē noa te katoa ki a koe, e kore rawa ahau e hē.”
26.34: Ka mea a Īhu ki a ia, “He pono tāku e mea nei ki a koe, ko tēnei pō anō, i te mea kāhore anō i tangi noa te tīkaokao, ka toru āu whakakāhoretanga i ahau.”
26.35: Ka mea a Pita ki a ia, “Ahakoa kua takoto te tikanga kia mate tahi tāua, e kore ahau e whakakāhore i a koe.” I pērā anō te kī a ngā ākonga katoa. Ka Īnoi a Īhu i Kehemane (Māka 14.32-42; Ruka 22.39-46)
26.36: Kātahi, ka haere rātou ko Īhu ki tētahi wāhi, tōna ingoa nei ko Kehemane, ā, ka mea ia ki āna ākonga, “Hei konei koutou noho ai, kia haere ahau ki kōina īnoi ai.”
26.37: Nā, ka mau ia ki a Pita rātou ko ngā tama tokorua a Heperi, ā, ka tīmata te pōuri, te tūmatatenga.
26.38: Nā, ka mea ia ki a rātou, “Kī tonu tōku wairua i te pōuri, tata pū ki te mate; hei konei koutou noho ai, kia mataara tahi tātou.”
26.39: Ā, haere ana ia ki tahaki tata atu, ka takoto tāpapa, ka īnoi, ka mea, “E tōku Matua, ki te mea e āhei, kia pahemo atu tēnei kapu i ahau; otirā, kaua e waiho i tāku e pai ai, engari, i tāu.”
26.40: Ā, ka haere ia ki āna ākonga, rokohanga atu e moe ana, nā, ka mea ia ki a Pita, “Ha, ko tā koutou tēnei, tē mataara tahi tātou kia kotahi hāora?
26.41: Kia mataara me te īnoi, kei uru ki te whakamātautauranga. He hihiko te wairua, ko te kikokiko ia he ngoikore.”
26.42: Ka haere atu anō ia, ko te rua o ōna hokinga, ka īnoi, ka mea, “E tōku Matua, ki te kore e āhei kia pahemo atu tēnei kapu i ahau, ā, me inu anō e ahau, waiho i tāu i pai ai.”
26.43: Ko tōna haerenga mai anō, nā, rokohanga mai e moe ana anō rātou; i taimaha hoki ō rātou kanohi.
26.44: Nā, ka waiho anō rātou e ia, ā, haere ana anō, ka īnoi, ko te toru o ngā īnoinga, me te whakahua i taua kupu anō.
26.45: Kātahi, ia ka haere ki āna ākonga, ka mea ki a rātou, “Moe tonu, takoto mārie. Nā, ka tata te hāora, ka tukua te Tama a te tangata ki ngā ringa o te hunga hara.
26.46: Maranga, ka haere tātou. Nana, ka tata te kaituku i ahau.” Te Hopukanga o Īhu (Māka 14.43-50; Ruka 22.47-53; Hoani 18.3-12)
26.47: Ā, i a ia anō e kōrero ana, nā, ka tae mai a Hūrā, tētahi o te tekau mā rua, he tini hoki ngā tāngata i a ia, me ngā hoari, me ngā patu, he mea tono mai nā ngā tohunga nui, nā ngā kaumātua o te iwi.
26.48: Kua oti hoki tētahi tohu te whakarite ki a rātou e tōna kaituku, i mea ia, “Nā, ko tāku tangata e kihi ai, koia tēnā; hopukia.”
26.49: Nā, tika tonu ia ki a Īhu, ka mea, “Tēnā koe, e te Kaiwhakaako!” ā, kihi ana i a ia.
26.50: Nā, ka mea a Īhu ki a ia, “E hoa, meinga tāu i haere mai ai ki te mahi.” Me i reira ka haere mai rātou, ka pā ō rātou ringa ki a Īhu, ā, hopukia ana ia.
26.51: Nā, ka totoro te ringa o tētahi o ngā hoa o Īhu, ā, unuhia ana tāna hoari, ka hāua iho te pononga a te tino tohunga, tapahia ana tōna taringa.
26.52: Kātahi, ka mea a Īhu ki a ia, “Whakahokia iho tāu hoari ki tōna pūkoro; ka mate hoki i te hoari te hunga hāpai hoari.
26.53: E hua koe e kore e āhei i ahau āianei te īnoi ki tōku Matua, ā, e hōmai e ia ki ahau he anahera maha atu i ngā rihiona kotahi tekau mā rua?
26.54: Nei rā, mā te aha ka rite ai tā ngā karaipiture, arā, ko tēnei kia meatia?”
26.55: I taua wā, ka mea a Īhu ki ngā mano, “He tāhae ahau i haere mai ai koutou me ngā hoari me ngā patu ki te hopu i ahau? I a koutou ahau e noho ana i te temepara, e ako ana i tēnā rā, i tēnā rā, ā, kīhai koutou i hopu i ahau.
26.56: Nā, i meatia tēnei katoa hei whakarite mō ngā karaipiture a ngā poropiti.” Nā, ka whakarere ngā ākonga katoa i a ia, ā, oma ana. Ko Īhu i te Aroaro o te Rūnanga (Māka 14.53-65; Ruka 22.54-55, 63-71; Hoani 18.13-14, 19-24)
26.57: Kātahi, ka kawea a Īhu e ngā kaihopu ki te whare o Kaiapa, o te tino tohunga, i reira hoki ngā karaipi me ngā kaumātua e huihui ana.
26.58: Ko Pita ia i aru i a ia i tawhiti ki te marae o te tino tohunga, ā, tomo atu ana, noho tahi ana me ngā kaimahi, kia kite i te mutunga.
26.59: Nā, ka rapu ngā tohunga nui, me ngā kaumātua, me te rūnanga katoa, ki te whakapae teka mō Īhu, kia mate ai ia.
26.60: Heoi, kīhai i kitea; ahakoa he tokomaha ngā kaiwhakapae teka i haere mai. Muri iho ka puta ngā kaiwhakapae teka tokorua,
26.61: ka kī, “I mea ia, ‘E taea e ahau te whakahoro te whare tapu o te Atua, ā, kia toru ngā rā ka oti i ahau te hanga.’ ”
26.62: Nā, kua whakatika te tino tohunga, ka mea ki a ia, “Kāhore āu kupu? He aha tā ēnei e whakaatu nei mōu?”
26.63: Heoi, kīhai a Īhu i kuihi. Nā, ka kī anō te tino tohunga, ka mea ki a ia, “Ko te Atua ora tāku whakaoati mōu, nā, kōrero mai ki a mātou, ko te Karaiti rānei koe, ko te Tama a te Atua?”
26.64: Ka mea a Īhu ki a ia, “Kua kōrerotia mai nā e koe. Otirā, tēnei anō tāku kupu ki a koutou, ‘Tēnei ake ka kite koutou i te Tama a te tangata e noho ana ki matau o te kaha, e haere mai ana i runga i ngā kapua o te rangi.’ ”
26.65: Kātahi, ka haehae te tino tohunga i ōna kākahu, ka mea, “Kua kohukohu! Hei aha atu mā tātou ngā kaiwhakaatu? Nā, kua rongo nei koutou i tāna kohukohu.
26.66: E pēhea ana ō koutou whakaaro?” Nā, ka whakahoki rātou, ka mea, “Ka tika kia mate.”
26.67: Nā, ka tuwhaina tōna mata e rātou, ka kurua ia; ko ētahi i papaki i a ia,
26.68: i mea, “Poropiti ki a mātou, e te Karaiti! Nā wai koe i papaki?” Ka Whakakāhorengia a Īhu e Pita (Māka 14.66-72; Ruka 22.56-62; Hoani 18.15-18, 25-27)
26.69: Nā, i waho a Pita e noho ana, i te marae; ā, ka haere mai tētahi kōtiro ki a ia, ka mea, “Ko koe hoki i a Īhu o Kariri.”
26.70: Otirā, ka whakakāhore ia i te aroaro o rātou katoa, ka mea, “Kāhore ahau e mōhio ki tāu e kī mai nā.”
26.71: Ā, ka puta atu ia ki waho ki te whakamahau, ka kite anō tētahi atu kōtiro i a ia, ā, ka mea tērā ki te hunga i reira, “I a Īhu anō o Nahareta tēnei.”
26.72: Ā, ka whakakāhore anō ia, me te oati anō, “Kāhore ahau e mōhio ki tēnā tangata.”
26.73: Ā muri tata iho, ka haere mai te hunga e tū ana, ka mea ki a Pita, “Koia anō, ko koe tētahi o rātou; nā tōu reo koe i whakaatu.”
26.74: Kātahi ia, ka tīmata te kanga, te oati, “Kāhore rawa ahau e mōhio ki tēnā tangata!” Ā, tangi tonu iho te tīkaokao,
26.75: nā, ka mahara a Pita ki tā Īhu kupu i mea ai ki a ia, “E kore e tangi te tīkaokao, ka toru āu whakakāhoretanga i ahau.” Nā, haere ana ia ki waho, ā, nui atu tōna tangi.

27.1: Ā, ka tākiri te ata, ka rūnanga ngā tohunga nui katoa me ngā kaumātua o te iwi mō Īhu kia whakamatea.
27.2: Ā, nō ka oti ia te here, ka ārahina atu, tukua ana ki a Pirato, ki te kāwana. Te Matenga o Hūrā (Ngā Mahi 1.18-19)
27.3: Ā, nō te kitenga o Hūrā, o te kaituku i a ia, kua whakaaetia ia kia whakamatea, ka puta kē tōna whakaaro, whakahokia ana e ia ngā hiriwa e toru tekau ki ngā tohunga nui rātou ko ngā kaumātua,
27.4: ka mea, “Kua hara ahau i tāku tukunga i te toto harakore.” Ka mea rātou, “Hei aha mā mātou? Māu tēnā e titiro.”
27.5: Nā, makā iho e ia ngā hiriwa ki te whare tapu, ā, puta ana ki waho, haere ana, tārona ana i a ia.
27.6: Nā, ka tango ngā tohunga nui i ngā hiriwa, ka mea, “E kore e tika kia pangā ēnei ki te takotoranga moni, he utu toto hoki.”
27.7: Nō ka rūnanga rātou, ā, hokona ana ki aua mea te māra a te kaihanga rīhi, hei tanumanga mō ngā manene.
27.8: Nā reira hoki i huaina ai taua māra, “Ko te Māra o te Toto” ā mohoa noa nei.
27.9: Kātahi, ka rite tā Heremaia poropiti i kōrero ai, i mea ai: “Tangohia ana e rātou ngā hiriwa e toru tekau, te utu mō te tangata i whakaritea nei ōna utu, i whakaritea nei ngā utu e ētahi o ngā tama a Īharaira,
27.10: ā, hoatu ana mō te māra a te kaihanga rīhi; i pērā anō me tā te Ariki i whakarite ai ki ahau.” Ka Pātaitaitia a Īhu e Pirato (Māka 15.2-5; Ruka 23.3-5; Hoani 18.33-38)
27.11: Nā, i te tū tērā a Īhu i te aroaro o te kāwana; ka ui te kāwana ki a ia, ka mea, “Ko koe rānei te Kīngi o ngā Hūrai?” Ka mea a Īhu ki a ia, “Kua kōrerotia mai nā e koe.”
27.12: Ā, i te whakapānga a ngā tohunga nui rātou ko ngā kaumātua i tētahi hē ki a ia, kīhai ia i whakahoki kupu atu.
27.13: Kātahi, ka mea a Pirato ki a ia, “Kāhore koe e rongo i te tini o ngā mea e kōrerotia nei e rātou mōu?”
27.14: Heoi, kāhore kia kotahi kupu i whakahokia e ia ki a ia; tino mīharo noa te kāwana. Ka Tukua a Īhu kia Rīpekatia (Māka 15.6-15; Ruka 23.13-25; Hoani 18.39–19.16)
27.15: Nā, ko tā te kāwana tikanga i taua hākari he tuku i tētahi herehere ki te iwi, i tā rātou e pai ai.
27.16: I reira anō i a rātou tētahi herehere ingoa nui, ko Parapa te ingoa.
27.17: Ā, nō rā ka mine rātou, ka mea a Pirato ki a rātou, “Ko wai tā koutou e pai ai kia tukua e ahau ki a koutou? Ko Parapa, ko Īhu rānei e huaina nei ko te Karaiti?”
27.18: I mahara hoki ia he hae nō rātou i tukua ai ia.
27.19: Nā, i a ia e noho ana i runga i te nohoanga whakawā, ka tono tangata mai tāna wahine ki a ia, ka mea, “Kei ahatia e koe taua tangata tika. He maha hoki ngā mea i pā moemoeā mai ki ahau ināianei, he mea mōna.”
27.20: Otiia, i whakakīkītia e ngā tohunga nui rātou ko ngā kaumātua te mano, kia īnoia a Parapa, kia whakangaromia a Īhu.
27.21: Nā, ka whakahoki te kāwana ka mea ki a rātou, “Ko tēhea o te tokorua tā koutou e pai ai kia tukua e ahau ki a koutou?” Ka mea rātou, “Ko Parapa!”
27.22: Ka mea a Pirato ki a rātou, “Me aha oti e ahau a Īhu, e huaina nei ko te Karaiti?” Ka mea rātou katoa ki a ia, “Rīpekatia!”
27.23: Nā, ka mea te kāwana, “He aha koia tāna kino i mea ai?” Heoi, nui noa atu tā rātou hāmama, ka mea, “Rīpekatia ia!”
27.24: Ā, i te kitenga o Pirato kāhore ia i whai wāhi, engari, ka nui kē atu te ngangau, ka mau ia ki te wai, ka horoi i ōna ringa i te aroaro o te mano, ka mea, “Kāhore ahau e whai hara i te toto o tēnei tangata tika; mā koutou tēnā e titiro.”
27.25: Nā, ka whakahoki te iwi katoa, ka mea, “Hei runga ōna toto i a mātou, i ā mātou tamariki.”
27.26: Nā, ka tukua e ia a Parapa ki a rātou; ā, ka oti a Īhu te whiu, ka tukua kia rīpekatia. Ka Whakatoitoi ngā Hōia ki a Īhu (Māka 15.16-20; Hoani 19.2-3)
27.27: Kātahi ka mauria a Īhu e ngā hōia a te kāwana ki te whare whakawā, ā, whakaminea ana ki a ia te rōpū katoa.
27.28: Nā, ka tangohia e rātou ōna kākahu, ā, whakakākahuria ana ia ki te kākahu whero.
27.29: Ā, nō ka oti tētahi karauna tātarāmoa te whiri, ka pōtaea ki tōna mātenga, me te kākaho ki tōna ringa matau; ā, ka tukua ngā turi ki a ia, ka taunu ki a ia, ka mea, “Tēnā koe, e te Kīngi o ngā Hūrai!”
27.30: Ā, ka tuwhaina ia e rātou, ā, ka mau rātou ki te kākaho, ka patua ki tōna mātenga.
27.31: Nā, ka mutu tā rātou tāwai ki a ia, ka tīhorea atu i runga i a ia te kākahu rā, whakakākahuria ana ōna ki a ia, ā, ārahina ana ia kia rīpekatia. Ka Ripekatia a Īhu (Māka 15.21-32; Ruka 23.26-43; Hoani 19.17-27)
27.32: Ā, i a rātou e haere ana ki waho, ka kitea e rātou he tangata nō Hairini, ko Haimona te ingoa; meinga ana ia e rātou kia haere tahi me rātou hei amo i tōna rīpeka.
27.33: Ā, i tō rātou taenga ki te wāhi e kīa nei ko Korokota, arā, ko “Te Wāhi Angaanga.”
27.34: Ka hoatu e rātou he wāina ki a ia kia inumia, he mea whakananu ki te au; ā, nō tāna whakamātauranga atu, kīhai i pai ki te inu.
27.35: Ā, ka oti ia te rīpeka, ka wehewehea ōna kākahu, he mea maka ki te rota; i rite ai te kupu i kōrerotia e te poropiti, “I wehewehea ōku weruweru mō rātou, i maka rota hoki mō tōku kākahu.”
27.36: Nā, noho ana rātou ki te tiaki i a ia i reira.
27.37: Ā, whakanohoia ana e rātou ki runga ake i tōna mātenga te mea i whakawākia ai ia, he mea tuhituhi, “Ko Īhu tēnei, ko te Kīngi o ngā Hūrai.”
27.38: Nā, tokorua ngā tāhae i rīpekatia ngātahitia me ia, kotahi ki matau, kotahi ki mauī.
27.39: Ā, ka kohukohu ki a ia te hunga e haere ana rā reira, me te oioi ō rātou mātenga,
27.40: ka mea, “Ko koe hei whakahoro i te whare tapu, hei hanga anō i ngā rā e toru, whakaorangia koe e koe anō! Ki te mea ko te Tama koe a te Atua, heke iho i te rīpeka.”
27.41: I pēnā anō te tāwai a ngā tohunga nui, rātou ko ngā karaipi, ko ngā kaumātua, i mea,
27.42: “Ko ērā atu i whakaorangia e ia; tē taea e ia te whakaora i a ia anō. Ko ia te Kīngi o Īharaira, tēnā kia heke iho oti ia i te rīpeka, ka whakapono mātou ki a ia.
27.43: I whakawhirinaki ia ki te Atua; mā tērā ia e whakaora āianei, ki te pai ia ki a ia; nāna hoki te kī, ‘Ko te Tama ahau a te Atua.’ ”
27.44: Me ngā tāhae hoki i rīpekatia tahitia rā me ia, i pērā anō tā rāua tāwai ki a ia. Te Matenga o Īhu (Māka 15.33-41; Ruka 23.44-49; Hoani 19.28-30)
27.45: Nā, ka pōuri a runga katoa o te whenua, nō te ono o ngā hāora ā taea noatia te iwa o ngā hāora.
27.46: Ā, ka tata ki te iwa o ngā hāora, ka karanga a Īhu, he nui te reo, ka mea, “Eri, Eri, rama hapakatani?” arā, “E tōku Atua, e tōku Atua, he aha koe i whakarere ai i ahau?”
27.47: I te rongonga o ētahi o te hunga e tū ana i reira, ka mea, “E karanga ana te tangata nei ki a Irāia.”
27.48: Nā, kua rere tētahi o rātou, kua mau ki te hautai, whakakīa ana ki te winika, ā, whakanohoia ana ki runga ki te kākaho, whakainumia ana māna.
27.49: Ka mea ehinu, “Kāti, kia kite tātou e haere mai rānei a Irāia ki te whakaora i a ia.”
27.50: Nā, ka karanga anō a Īhu, he nui te reo, ā, tuku atu ana i tōna wairua.
27.51: Nā, ka wāhia te ārai o te whare tapu i waenganui pū, mai i runga, ā, ki raro. Ka rū te whenua, pakaru ana ngā kāmaka.
27.52: Ko ngā urupā tuwhera kau; ā, he maha ngā tinana o te hunga tapu kua moe i ara mai.
27.53: Ko te putanga ake i ngā urupā i muri iho o tōna aranga mai, haere ana ki roto ki te pā tapu, ā, he tokomaha te hunga i kite i a rātou.
27.54: Nā, i te kitenga o te keneturio rātou ko ōna hoa tiaki i a Īhu i te rū, i ngā mea anō i meatia, nui atu tō rātou wehi, ka mea, “He pono ko te Tama tēnei a te Atua.”
27.55: Ā, he tokomaha ngā wāhine i reira e mātakitaki ana mai i tawhiti, ngā mea i aru mai i a Īhu i Kariri, i mahi mea māna.
27.56: I roto i a rātou a Meri Makarini, a Meri whaea o Hēmi rāua ko Hohi, me te whaea hoki o ngā tama a Heperi. Te Tanumanga o Īhu (Māka 15.42-47; Ruka 23.50-56; Hoani 19.38-42)
27.57: Nā, ka ahiahi, ka haere mai tētahi tangata taonga nui o Arimatia, ko Hōhepa te ingoa, he ākonga anō ia nā Īhu.
27.58: I haere taua tangata ki a Pirato, ā, tonoa ana e ia te tinana o Īhu. Nā, ka mea a Pirato kia hoatu te tinana.
27.59: Nā, ka tango a Hōhepa i te tinana, ā, takaia ana e ia ki te rīnena mā,
27.60: whakatakotoria ana ki tāna urupā hou, i hāua e ia ki roto ki te kāmaka. Nā, whakatakā atu ana e ia tētahi kōhatu nui ki te kūwaha o te urupā, ā, haere ana.
27.61: I reira anō a Meri Makarini, me tērā Meri, e noho ana i te ritenga atu o te tanumanga. Te Kaitiaki i te Urupā
27.62: Nā, i te aonga ake, i te rā i muri i te Takanga hākari, ka haere ngā tohunga nui me ngā Parihi ki a Pirato,
27.63: ka mea, “E mara, kei te mahara mātou ki te kōrero a tērā tangata tinihanga i a ia anō e ora ana, ‘Kia taka ngā rā e toru ka ara ahau.’
27.64: Nā reira, whakahaua atu kia tiakina te tanumanga, ā tae noa ki te toru o ngā rā, kei haere āna ākonga i te pō, ka tāhae i a ia, ka mea ki te iwi, ‘Kua ara ia i te hunga mate,’ pēnei kino atu i tō mua tō muri hē.”
27.65: Ka mea a Pirato ki a rātou, “He kaitiaki anō a koutou; haere, kia puta ō koutou whakaaro kei taea atu ia.”
27.66: Nā, haere ana rātou, hīritia ana te kōhatu, me te whakanoho anō i ngā kaitiaki, kei taea atu te tanumanga.

28.1: I te mutunga o te hāpati i te mea ka tata tonu te pūao te rā tuatahi o te wiki, ka haere a Meri Makarini me tērā Meri kia kite i te tanumanga.
28.2: Nā, he nui te rū i puta mai; i heke iho hoki tētahi anahera a te Ariki i te rangi, ā, haere ana, whakatakā atu ana e ia te kōhatu i te kūwaha, ā, noho ana i runga.
28.3: Ko tōna āhua me te mea he uira, mā tonu tōna kākahu ānō he hukarere.
28.4: Ā, wiri noa iho ngā kaitiaki i te wehi ki a ia, ka rite ki te tūpāpaku.
28.5: Nā, ka oho te anahera, ka mea ki ngā wāhine, “Kei wehi kōrua; e mātau ana hoki ahau, e rapu ana kōrua i a Īhu i rīpekatia.
28.6: Kāhore ia i konei; kua ara kē, kua pērā me tāna i mea ai. Haere mai kia kite i te wāhi i takoto ai te Ariki.
28.7: Ā, hohoro te haere, kōrerotia ki āna ākonga, ‘Kua ara ia i te hunga mate; tēnā ia te haere nā i mua i a koutou ki Kariri; ko reira koutou kite ai i a ia.’ Nā, kua kōrero nei ahau ki a kōrua.”
28.8: Ā, hohoro tonu tā rāua haere atu i te urupā, me te wehi, me te harakoa nui, ā, oma ana ki te kōrero ki āna ākonga.
28.9: Nā, ka tūtaki a Īhu ki a rāua, ka mea mai, “E ia mā.” Nā, ka haere atu rāua, ka pupuri i ōna waewae, ka koropiko ki a ia.
28.10: Kātahi a Īhu ka mea ki a rāua, “Aua e wehi; haere, kī atu ki ōku tēina kia haere ki Kariri, ko reira hoki rātou kite ai i ahau.” Ngā Kōrero a ētahi Kaitiaki
28.11: Ā, i a rāua e haere ana, nā, kua tae ētahi o ngā kaitiaki ki te pā, kua kōrero ki ngā tohunga nui i ngā mea katoa i meatia.
28.12: Nā, ka mutu tā rātou huihui ko ngā kaumātua, ā, ka rūnanga, ka hoatu e rātou he moni nui ki ngā hōia,
28.13: ka mea atu, “Me kī e koutou, ‘I haere āna ākonga i te pō, ā, tāhaetia ana ia, i a mātou e moe ana.’
28.14: Ā, ki te tae te rongo o tēnei ki te kāwana, mā mātou ia e whakamārie, ā, kāhore he mānukanuka mō koutou.”
28.15: Nā, ka tango rātou i ngā moni, ā, meinga ana ngā mea i ākona ai rātou. Heoi, kei te kōrerotia tēnei e ngā Hūrai, ā taea noatia tēnei rā. Ka Puta Mai a Īhu ki Āna Ākonga (Māka 16.14-18; Ruka 24.36-49; Hoani 20.19-23; Ngā Mahi 1.6-8)
28.16: Nā, ka haere ngā ākonga tekau mā tahi ki Kariri, ki te maunga i whakaritea e Īhu ki a rātou.
28.17: Ā, i tō rātou kitenga i a ia, ka koropiko ki a ia; ko ētahi ia i ruarua.
28.18: Nā, ka haere mai a Īhu, ka kōrero ki a rātou, ka mea, “Kua tukua katoatia mai ki ahau te mana i te rangi, ā, i runga i te whenua
28.19: Nā reira haere, meinga hei ākonga ngā iwi katoa, iriiria i runga i te ingoa o te Matua, o te Tama, o te Wairua Tapu,
28.20: ākona rātou kia mau ki ngā mea katoa i whakahaua, e ahau ki a koutou. Nā, ko ahau tēnā hei hoa mō koutou i ngā rā katoa, ā te mutunga rā anō o te ao.” Āmine.

1.1: Ko te tīma­tanga o te rongo­pai o Īhu Karaiti, o te Tama a te Atua.
1.2: Ko te mea ia i tuhi­tuhia i roto i tā Ihāia poro­piti: “Nā, ka tonoa e ahau tāku karere i mua i tōu aro­aro, māna e whaka­pai tōu ara i mua i a koe.
1.3: He reo nō tētahi i te koraha e karanga ana, ‘Whaka­paia te hua­rahi o te Ariki, whaka­tikaia ōna ara.’ ”
1.4: I haere mai a Hoani, ka iri­iri i te koraha, ka kauwhau i te iri­iri rīpe­netā hei muru­nga hara.
1.5: Nā, ka haere ki a ia te whenua katoa o Hūria, me ngā tāngata o Hiruhārama, ā, iri­iria katoa­tia ana e ia ki te awa ki Horano, me te whāki anō i ō rātou hara.
1.6: Nā, ko te kākahu o Hoani he huru­huru kāmera, he hiako hoki te whī­tiki o tōna hope; ko tāna kai he mā­whiti­whiti he honi koraha.
1.7: Ā, i kauwhau ia, i mea, “Tēnei te haere mai nei i muri i ahau tētahi he kaha rawa ake i ahau, e kore ahau e tau ki te piko iho wewete ai i te here o ōna hū.
1.8: Ko ahau nei, he iri­iri tāku i a koutou ki te wai; māna ia koutou e iri­iri ki te Wairua Tapu.” Te Iriiritanga o Īhu me te Whakamātautau o Īhu (Matiu 3.13–4.11; Ruka 3.21-22; 4.1-13)
1.9: Ā, i aua rā ka haere mai a Īhu i Nahareta o Kariri, ka iri­iria e Hoani ki Horano.
1.10: Ā, i taua wā anō i a ia e haere ake ana i te wai, ka kite ia i ngā rangi e wāhia ana kia tu­whera, me te Wairua, ānō he kūkupa, e heke iho ana ki a ia.
1.11: Ā, ka puta mai he reo nō te rangi, e mea ana, “Ko koe tāku Tama i aroha ai, tāku i āhua­reka ai.”
1.12: Ā, i reira pū anō ka tonoa ia e te Wairua ki te koraha.
1.13: Ā, e whā tekau ōna rā i reira i te koraha e whaka­mā­tau­tau­ria ana e Hātana; i roto ia i ngā kararehe mohoao; ko ngā ana­hera hoki ki te mahi mea māna. Ka Karangatia e Īhu ētahi Kahao Ika Tokowhā (Matiu 4.12-22; Ruka 4.14-15; 5.1-11)
1.14: Nā, i muri i a Hoani i tukua ai ki te here­here, ka haere a Īhu ki Kariri, ka kauwhau i te rongo­pai o te Atua,
1.15: ka mea, “Kua rite tēnei te wā, kua tata hoki te ranga­tira­tanga o te Atua; rīpe­netā, whaka­pono­hia te rongo­pai.”
1.16: Nā, i a ia e haere ana i te taha o te moana o Kariri, ka kite i a Haimona rāua ko tōna teina, ko Anaru, e maka ana i te kupe­nga ki te moana, he kaihao ika hoki rāua.
1.17: Nā, ka mea a Īhu ki a rāua, “Haere mai i muri i ahau, ā, māku kōrua e mea hei kaihao tāngata.”
1.18: Ā, mahue tonu ake i a rāua, ngā kupe­nga, aru ana i a ia.
1.19: Ā, haere tata atu ana i reira, ka kite ia i a Hēmi, tama a Heperi, rāua ko tōna teina ko Hoani, i te kai­puke anō rāua, e tā ana i ngā kore­nga o ā rātou kupe­nga.
1.20: Nā, karanga tonu atu ia i a rāua; ā, mahue ake i a rāua tō rāua matua a Heperi i te kai­puke me ngā kai­mahi, ā, haere ana i muri i a ia. He Tāne, he Wairua Poke Tōna (Ruka 4.31-37)
1.21: Ā, ka tomo rātou ki Kaperenauma; nā, haere tonu ia i te hāpati ki te whare kara­kia, ka whaka­ako.
1.22: Ā, mīharo ana rātou ki tāna ako, i rite hoki tāna ako i a rātou ki tā te tangata whai mana, kīhai i rite ki tā ngā kara­ipi.
1.23: Nā, i tō rātou whare kara­kia tētahi tangata, he wairua poke tōna; ā, ka karanga ia,
1.24: ka mea, “Kāti rā, he aha tā mātou ki a koe, e Īhu o Nahareta? Kua tae mai rānei koe ki te whaka­ngaro i a mātou? E mātau ana ahau ko wai koe, ko te Mea Tapu a te Atua.”
1.25: Ā, ka riri a Īhu ki a ia, ka mea, “Kāti te kōrero, puta mai i roto i a ia!”
1.26: Nā, ka hae­hae te wairua kino i a ia, nui atu hoki tōna reo ki te karanga, ā, puta ana mai i roto i a ia.
1.27: Ā, mīharo noa rātou katoa, uiui ana ki a rātou anō, mea ana, “He aha tēnei? He aha tēnei ako hou? Mana tonu tāna nei tono i ngā wairua poke, ā, rongo rawa ki a ia.”
1.28: Nā, pakū tonu atu tōna rongo ki ngā wāhi katoa e tata ana ki Kariri. Ka Whakaoratia e Īhu te Tini Tāngata (Matiu 8.14-17; Ruka 4.38-41)
1.29: Nā, i reira tonu, i tō rātou pu­tanga mai i te whare kara­kia, tomo tonu atu rātou ko Hēmi, ko Hoani, ki te whare o Haimona rāua, ko Anaru.
1.30: Nā, i te takoto te hunga­wai wahine o Haimona, he kirikā, ā, kōrero­tia tonu­tia atu ia e rātou ki a ia.
1.31: Heoi, i tōna taenga atu, ka mau ki tōna ringa, whaka­ara­hia ana ia; mutu tonu ake tōna kirikā, ka tahuri ki te taka mea mā rātou.
1.32: Nā, i te ahi­ahi, i te toene­tanga o te rā, ka mauria mai ki a ia ngā tūroro katoa, me te hunga e nohoia ana e ngā rēwera.
1.33: Ā, hui­hui katoa ana te pā ki te kūwaha.
1.34: He toko­maha te hunga e ngaua ana e te tini o ngā mate i whaka­ora­ngia e ia, he maha hoki ngā rēwera i peia; ā, kīhai i tukua e ia ngā rēwera kia kōrero, nō te mea i mātau rātou ki a ia. Ka Kauhau a Īhu i Kariri (Ruka 4.42-44)
1.35: Nā, i te atatū, i mua noa atu o te awa­tea, ka ara ia, ka puta ki waho, ka haere ki te wāhi koraha, ki reira īnoi ai.
1.36: Nā, ka whai a Haimona rātou ko ōna hoa i a ia.
1.37: Ā, ka kitea ia, ka mea ki a ia, “E rapu ana ngā tāngata katoa i a koe.”
1.38: Kātahi ia ka mea ki a rātou, “Tātou ka haere he wāhi kē ki ngā kāinga tata, ki reira ahau kauwhau ai. Ko tāku hoki tērā i haere mai ai.”
1.39: Nā, ka tomo ia ki roto i ō rātou whare kara­kia puta noa i Kariri, ka kauwhau, ka pei hoki i ngā rēwera ki waho. Ka Whakaoratia e Īhu tētahi Tāne (Matiu 8.1-4; Ruka 5.12-16)
1.40: Ā, ka haere mai ki a ia tētahi repera, ka īnoi ki a ia, tuku rawa ngā turi ki a ia, ka mea, “Ki te pai koe, e taea ahau e koe te mea kia mā.”
1.41: Nā, ka aroha a Īhu, ka totoro tōna ringa, ka pā ki a ia, ka mea ki a ia, “E pai ana ahau; kia mā koe.”
1.42: Ā, puaki kau tōna reo, kua kore tōna repera, nā, kua mā.
1.43: Nā, ka whaka­tūpato ia ki a ia, ā, tonoa tonu­tia atu,
1.44: ka mea atu hoki ki a ia, “Kei kōrero­tia tētahi mea ki te tangata; engari haere, kia kite te tohu­nga i a koe, ā, mauria atu mō tōu whaka­mā­kanga ngā mea i whaka­ritea e Mohi, hei mea whaka­atu ki a rātou.”
1.45: Heoi, i tōna pu­tanga atu, ka anga ki te kōrero nui haere, ka whaka­pua­kina taua mea, ā, kīhai a Īhu i āhei te haere nui ki te pā i muri iho. Engari i noho ia i waho i ngā wāhi koraha; ā, haere ana mai rātou ki a ia i ngā wāhi katoa.

2.1: Ā, i a ia i tomo ai anō ki Kaperenauma i ētahi rā mai, ka rangona kei te whare ia.
2.2: Nā, ka hui mai te tini o te tangata, kāhore rawa he wāhi e ō ai rātou, hore rawa i te taha o te kūwaha; ā, ka kōrero­tia e ia te kupu ki a rātou.
2.3: Ka haere mai hoki ētahi, ka kawe mai i tētahi pararūtiki ki a ia, toko­whā ki te kauhoa.
2.4: Ā, tē taea te whaka­tata ki a ia i te mano hoki, ka pokaia te tuanui o te wāhi i noho ai ia; ā, ka oti te wāwāhi, ka tukua iho te moenga i takoto ai te pararūtiki.
2.5: Ā, nō te kite­nga o Īhu i tō rātou whaka­pono, ka mea ia ki te pararūtiki, “E tama, ka oti ōu hara te muru.”
2.6: Nā, i reira ētahi o ngā kara­ipi e noho ana, e whaka­aro­aro ana i roto i ō rātou ngākau,
2.7: “He aha ēnei kupu kohu­kohu a tēnei tangata? Ko wai hei muru hara, kotahi tonu ko te Atua anake?”
2.8: Nā, mōhio tonu a Īhu i roto i tōna wairua, e pēnei ana ō rātou whaka­aro i roto i a rātou, ā, ka mea ia ki a rātou, “He aha koutou ka whaka­aro­aro ai i ēnei mea i roto i ō koutou ngākau?
2.9: Ko tēhea te mea takoto noa, ko te mea ki te pararūtiki, ‘Ka oti ōu hara te muru,’ ko te mea rānei, ‘Whaka­tika, tango­hia ake tōu moenga, haere’?
2.10: Otirā, kia mātau ai koutou he mana muru hara tō te Tama a te tangata i runga i te whenua.” Ka mea ia ki te pararūtiki,
2.11: “Ko tāku kupu tēnei ki a koe, whaka­tika, tango­hia ake tōu moenga, haere ki tōu whare.”
2.12: Nā, whaka­tika tonu ake ia, ā, tango­hia ake ana tōna moenga, haere atu ana i te aro­aro o rātou katoa. Nō, ka mīharo rātou katoa ka whaka­korōria i te Atua, ka mea, “Kāhore anō tātou i kite noa i te pēnei!” Ka Karanga a Īhu i a Rīwai (Matiu 9.9-13; Ruka 5.27-32)
2.13: Ā, haere atu ana ia i te taha o te moana; nā, ka tae te mano katoa ki a ia, ā, ka whaka­akona rātou e ia.
2.14: Ā, i a ia e haere ana, ka kite ia i a Rīwai tama a Arapiu e noho ana i te wāhi tango takoha, ka mea ki a ia, Aru­mia ahau. Nā, whaka­tika ana ia, aru ana i a ia.
2.15: Ā, i a ia e noho ana i tōna whare, he toko­maha ngā pupiri­kana me ngā tāngata hara e noho tahi ana ki a Īhu rātou ko āna ākonga; he toko­maha hoki rātou, ā, i aru i a ia.
2.16: Ā, nō te kite­nga o ngā kara­ipi a ngā Parihi i a ia e kai tahi ana me ngā pupiri­kana, me ngā tāngata hara, ka mea ki āna ākonga, “Kei te kai tahi ia, kei te inu tahi me ngā pupiri­kana me ngā tāngata hara.”
2.17: Ā, i te rongo­nga o Īhu, ka mea ia ki a rātou, “Kāhore he aha o ngā tāngata ora e meatia ai e te rata, engari o te hunga e mate ana; kīhai hoki ahau i haere mai ki te karanga i te hunga tika, engari i te hunga hara.” Te Take e Pā ana ki te Nohopuku (Matiu 9.14-17; Ruka 5.33-39)
2.18: Nā, kei te noho­puku ngā ākonga a Hoani rātou ko ā ngā Parihi; ā, ka haere mai rātou, ka mea ki a ia, “He aha ngā ākonga a Hoani me a ngā Parihi ka noho­puku ai, tēnā ko āu ākonga kāhore e noho­puku?”
2.19: Nā, ka mea a Īhu ki a rātou, “E āhei rānei ngā tama o te whare mārena te noho­puku i te mea kei a rātou te tāne mārena hou? E kore rātou e āhei te noho­puku i ngā wā kei a rātou nei te tāne mārena hou.
2.20: Nā, tērā e tae mai ngā rā e tango­hia ai te tāne mārena hou i a rātou, kātahi rātou ka noho­puku i aua rā.
2.21: “E kore e tuia e te tangata tētahi wāhi o te kahu hou, hei pāpaki mō te kahu tawhito; kei riro tētahi wāhi o te kahu tawhito i tōna whaka­kapi hou, ā, ka nui rawa te pakaru.
2.22: E kore hoki e ringi­hia e te tangata te wāina hou ki ngā ipu tawhito; kei pakaru ngā ipu i te wāina hou, ā, ka ma­ringi te wāina, kore ake ngā ipu; engari me riri­ngi te wāina hou ki ngā ipu hou.” Te Take e Pā ana ki te Hāpati (Matiu 12.1-8; Ruka 6.1-5)
2.23: Ā, i a ia e haere ana i waenga wīti i te hāpati, ka anga āna ākonga ka kakato haere i ngā puku wīti.
2.24: Nā, ka mea ngā Parihi ki a ia, “Nā, he aha rātou ka mahi ai i te mea e kore e tika i te hāpati?”
2.25: Ā, ka mea ia ki a rātou, “Kāhore anō koutou i kite noa i tā Rāwiri i mea ai, i a ia e ngaua ana e te hia­kai, rātou ko ōna hoa?
2.26: I tōna tomo­kanga ki te whare o te Atua i ngā rā o Apiata tohu­nga nui, ā, kainga ana e ia ngā taro aro­aro, ngā mea kīhai nei i tika kia kainga, mā ngā tohu­nga anake, ā, hoatu ana e ia ki ōna hoa?”
2.27: I mea anō ia ki a rātou, “Hei mea mō te tangata te hāpati, ehara i te mea ko te tangata mō te hāpati;
2.28: wai­hoki ko te Tama a te tangata te Ariki o te hāpati.”

3.1: Ā, ka tomo atu anō ia ki te whare kara­kia, nā, i reira tētahi tangata kua memenge tōna ringa.
3.2: Ā, ka whaka­mau tā rātou ti­tiro ki a ia, me kore ia e whaka­ora i a ia i te hāpati; he mea kia whaka­pā ai rātou i tētahi hē ki a ia.
3.3: Nā, ka mea ia ki te tangata i te ringa memenge, “Whaka­tika ki waenga­nui.”
