3.4: Nā, ka mea ia ki a rātou, “He mea tika rānei te mahi pai i te hāpati, te mahi kino rānei? Te whaka­ora rānei, te whaka­mate rānei?” Heoi, kāhore rātou i kīkī.
3.5: Nā, ka tiro­tiro riri ia ki a rātou, he pōuri hoki mō te pakeke o ō rātou ngākau, ka mea ki taua tangata, “Totoro tōu ringa.” Ā, ko te toro­nga o tōna ringa, kua ora.
3.6: Nā, ka haere atu ngā Parihi, ka rū­nanga tahi me ngā Herōriana mōna, ki te pēhea e whaka­ngaro­mia ai ia. He Mano i te taha o te Moana
3.7: Nā, ka maunu atu a Īhu rātou ko āna ākonga ki te moana; he nui hoki te tangata i aru i a ia i Kariri, i Hūria,
3.8: I Hiruhārama, i Irumia, i tāwāhi hoki o Horano; me te hunga hoki e tata ana ki Tāira, ki Hairona, nui atu te hui­hui; i tō rātou rongo­nga i ngā mea i mea ai ia, haere ana ki a ia.
3.9: Nā, ka mea ia ki āna ākonga kia noho tata mai tētahi kai­puke iti ki a ia, i te mano hoki, kei tute­tutea ia e rātou.
3.10: He toko­maha hoki i whaka­ora­ngia e ia; nō ka popō mai ki a ia te hunga katoa e mate ana, kia pā ai ki a ia.
3.11: Me ngā wairua poke hoki, i tō rātou kite­nga i a ia, takoto ana ki tōna aro­aro, ka karanga, ka mea, “Ko te Tama koe a te Atua!”
3.12: Ā, he maha āna kupu ki a rātou kia kaua ia e whaka­atu­ria e rātou. Ka Whiriwhiria e Īhu ngā Āpōtoro Tekau mā rua (Matiu 10.1-4; Ruka 6.12-16)
3.13: Nā, ka kake ia ki te maunga, karanga­tia ana ki a ia āna i pai ai, ā, ka tae rātou ki a ia.
3.14: Ā, kotahi tekau mā rua āna i whaka­rite ai hei hoa mōna, hei tono­nga hoki māna ki te kauwhau,
3.15: kia whai mana hoki e ora ai ngā mate, e peia ai ngā rēwera.
3.16: Ā, huaina iho e ia a Haimona ko Pita;
3.17: ko Hēmi, tama a Heperi, rāua ko Hoani, teina o Hēmi; ā, huaina iho rāua ko Poaneki, arā, ko ngā Tama a te Whati­tiri;
3.18: ko Anaru, ko Piripi, ko Patoromu, ko Matiu, ko Tamati, ko Hēmi, tama a Arapiu, ko Tariu ko Haimona Kanaani,
3.19: ko Hūrā Ikariote hoki, nāna nei ia i tuku. Nā, ka tae ia ki te whare. Ko Īhu rāua ko Perehepura (Matiu 12.22-32; Ruka 11.14-23; 12.10)
3.20: Nā, ka hui­hui anō te mano, nō kīhai rawa rātou i āhei te kai taro.
3.21: Ā, nō ka rongo ōna hoa, ka haere ki te pupuri i a ia: i mea hoki, “He pō­rewa­rewa ia.”
3.22: Nā, ka mea ngā kara­ipi i haere mai rā i Hiruhārama, “Kei a ia a Perehepura, ā, nā te ranga­tira o ngā rēwera tāna peinga rēwera.”
3.23: Nā, ka karanga­tia rātou e ia, ā, ka kōrero whaka­rite ki a rātou: “Me pēhea a Hātana ka pei ai i a Hātana?
3.24: Ki te tahuri iho hoki tētahi ranga­tira­tanga ki a ia anō, e kore taua ranga­tira­tanga e tū.
3.25: Ki te tahuri iho hoki tētahi whare ki a ia anō, e kore taua whare e tū.
3.26: Ki te whaka­tika a Hātana, ā, ka tahuri iho ki a ia anō, e kore ia e tū, engari, he mutu­nga tōna.
3.27: “E kore te tangata e āhei te haere ki roto ki te whare o te tangata kaha, pāhua ai i ōna taonga, ki te kāhore e mātua herea te tangata kaha; ko reira pāhua ai i tōna whare.
3.28: “He pono tāku e mea nei ki a koutou, Ko ngā hara katoa o ngā tama a ngā tāngata e murua, me ngā kohu­kohu e kohu­kohu ai rātou.
3.29: Tēnā ko te tangata e kohu­kohua ai te Wairua Tapu, e kore e murua tōna hara ā ake ake, engari ka tau te hē ki a ia ā ake ake.”
3.30: Mō rātou i kī, “He wairua poke tōna.” Ko te Whaea rātou ko ngā Tēina o Īhu (Matiu 12.46-50; Ruka 8.19-21)
3.31: Ā, ko te taenga mai o ōna tēina rātou ko tōna whaea, ka tū i waho, ka tono tāngata mai ki a ia, ki te karanga i a ia.
3.32: E noho ana hoki te mano i tētahi taha ōna, i tētahi taha, ā, ka mea rātou ki a ia, “Nā, tōu whaea me ōu tēina kei waho, e rapu ana i a koe.”
3.33: Nā, ka whaka­hoki ia ki a rātou, ka mea, “Ko wai tōku whaea, ko wai hoki ōku tēina?”
3.34: Nā, ka tiro­tiro ia ki te hunga e noho ana i tētahi taha ōna, i tētahi taha, ka mea, “Nā, tōku whaea, ōku tēina!
3.35: Ki te meatia hoki e tētahi tā te Atua i pai ai, hei teina ia ki ahau, hei tua­hine, hei whaea.”

4.1: Nā, ka tīmata anō ia te whaka­ako i te taha o te moana. He nui hoki te tangata i hui­hui ki a ia, nō ka eke ia ki runga ki te kai­puke, ka noho ki te moana; i uta te mano katoa i te taha o te moana.
4.2: Ā, he maha āna mea i whaka­ako ai ki a rātou, he mea whaka­rite, i mea hoki ki a rātou i a ia e ako ana:
4.3: “Whaka­rongo! Nā, i haere atu te kairui ki te rui.
4.4: Ā, i a ia e rui ana, ka nga­horo ētahi ki te taha o te ara, ā, ko te rere­nga mai o ngā manu o te rangi, nā, kainga ake.
4.5: Ko ētahi i nga­horo ki te wāhi kāmaka, ki te wāhi kīhai i nui te one­one; ā, pīhi tonu ake, kāhore hoki i hōhonu te one­one.
4.6: Ā, nō te whiti­nga o te rā, ngaua iho; ā, nō te mea kāhore he pūtake, memenge noa iho.
4.7: Ko ētahi i nga­horo ki roto ki ngā tā­tarā­moa, ā, nō te tupu­nga ake o ngā tā­tarā­moa, kōwao­wao­tia ana ngā pura­pura, ā, kore ake he hua.
4.8: Ko ētahi i nga­horo ki te one­one pai, ā, whai hua ana; ka tupu, ka nui, ka ea ake, nō ētahi e toru tekau, nō ētahi e ono tekau, nō ētahi kotahi rau.”
4.9: I mea anō ia ki a rātou, “Ki te whai tari­nga tētahi hei whaka­rongo, kia rongo ia.” Te Take o ngā Kupu Whakarite (Matiu 13.10-17; Ruka 8.9-10)
4.10: Nā, ka mahue ko ia anake, ka ui ki a ia ōna hoa me te tekau mā rua ki taua kupu whaka­rite.
4.11: Ka mea ia ki a rātou: “Kua hoatu ki a koutou te mātau­ranga ki te mea ngaro o te ranga­tira­tanga o te Atua; ki te hunga ia o waho e rā roto­tia ana ngā mea katoa i te kupu whaka­rite,
4.12: mō, ‘Te ti­tiro rawa atu rātou, nā, e kore e kite; rongo rawa, nā, e kore e mātau; kei tahuri, ā, ka murua ō rātou hara.’ ” Ka Whakamārama a Īhu i te Kupu Whakarite mō te Kairui (Matiu 13.18-23; Ruka 8.11-15)
4.13: I mea anō ia ki a rātou, “Kāhore rānei koutou e mātau ki tēnei kupu whaka­rite? Ā, me pēhea ka mātau ai koutou ki ngā kupu whaka­rite katoa?
4.14: Ko te kairui e rui ana i te kupu.
4.15: Ko ēnei te hunga i te taha o te ara, i te wāhi e ruia ana te kupu; i tō rātou rongo­nga, nā, haere tonu mai a Hātana, kapo­hia ake te kupu i ruia ki ō rātou ngākau.
4.16: Ko ēnei anō te hunga i ngā pura­pura i ngā wāhi kāmaka; ko te hunga, i tō rātou rongo­nga ai i te kupu, hohoro tonu te tango, hari tonu.
4.17: Nā, kāhore ō rātou paki­aka, ka whaka­pakari kau noa; heoi, i te pānga o te whaka­pāwera, o te whaka­toi rānei mō te kupu, hē tonu iho.
4.18: Nā, ko ēnei te hunga i ngā pura­pura i roto i ngā tā­tarā­moa; ko ngā mea i rongo ki te kupu,
4.19: ā, i te pu­tanga o te whaka­aro ki tēnei ao, o te hanga­rau o ngā taonga, o ngā hia­hia ki ērā atu mea, kōwao­wao­tia iho te kupu, ā, kore ake he hua.
4.20: Nā, ko ēnei te hunga i ngā pura­pura i te one­one pai: ko te hunga e rongo ana ki te kupu, ā, tango ana, ā, whai hua ana, o ētahi e toru tekau, o ētahi e ono tekau, o ētahi kotahi rau.” He Rama i raro i te Oko (Ruka 8.16-18)
4.21: I mea anō ia ki a rātou, “Ko raro koia i te mēhua whaka­tū ai i te rama, ina mauria mai, ko raro rānei i te moenga? He teka ianei me whaka­tū ki runga ki te tū­ranga?
4.22: E kore hoki tētahi mea i huna e mahue te whaka­kite; kāhore hoki tētahi mea i huna, engari, kia puta ki te mārama­tanga.
4.23: Ki te mea he tari­nga o tētahi hei whaka­rongo, kia rongo ia.”
4.24: I mea anō ia ki a rātou, “Kia tūpato ki tā koutou e rongo ai; ko te mēhua hoki e mēhua ai koutou, hei mēhua anō tēnā ki a koutou; ā, ka tāpiri­tia anō he mea mā koutou, mā ngā kai­whaka­rongo.
4.25: Ki te whai mea hoki tētahi, ka hoatu anō ki a ia; ki te kāhore he mea a tētahi, ka tango­hia i a ia āna ake.” Te Kupu Whakarite mō te Purapura e Tipu ake ana
4.26: I mea anō ia, “I rite hoki te ranga­tira­tanga o te rangi ki te tangata i makā e ia he pura­pura ki te one­one;
4.27: ā, ka moe, ka ara, i te pō, i te ao, me te tupu anō tērā te pura­pura, tē mātau ia nā te aha.
4.28: E hua ana hoki te whenua i tōna kaha ake anō; ko te rau ki mua, ko reira te puku, muri iho ko te wīti pakari i roto i te puku.
4.29: Otirā, ka rite ngā hua, hohoro tonu tāna tuku atu i tāna toro­nai­hi, kua taea hoki te kotinga.” Te Kupu Whakarite mō te Pua Nanī (Matiu 13.31-32, 34; Ruka 13.18-19)
4.30: I mea anō ia, “Me whaka­rite e tātou te ranga­tira­tanga o te Atua ki te aha? He aha oti te kupu whaka­rite hei whaka­ahua atu mā tātou?
4.31: E rite ana ki te pua nanī, i tōna whaka­tōkanga ki te whenua, ko te iti rawa ia o ngā pura­pura katoa i runga i te whenua.
4.32: Otirā, ka oti te whaka­tō, ka tupu, ka nui ake i ngā ota­ota katoa, ā, ka nunui ōna manga; nō ka noho ngā manu o te rangi i tōna tau­maru­maru­tanga iho.”
4.33: Nā, he maha āna kupu whaka­rite pērā, i kōrero­tia ai e ia te kupu ki a rātou, ko ā rātou i āhei ai te whaka­rongo.
4.34: Ā, heoi āna kupu ki a rātou he kupu whaka­rite anake; otiia, ka noho ko rātou anake, ka whaka­atu­ria e ia ngā mea katoa ki āna ākonga. Ka Whakamarinotia e Īhu tētahi Tūpuhi (Matiu 8.23-27; Ruka 8.22-25)
4.35: Nā, i taua rā, i te ahi­ahi, ka mea ia ki a rātou, “Tātou ka whaka­whiti ki tāwāhi.”
4.36: Nā, ka mahue iho te mano, ka mauria ia e rātou, i runga tonu anō ia i te kai­puke. I a ia anō ētahi atu kai­puke.
4.37: Nā, ko te pu­tanga o tētahi hau, he tūpuhi, ā, eke ana ngā ngaru ki runga ki te kai­puke, ā, tomo noa.
4.38: Nā, ko ia i te kei i runga i te urunga e moe ana; ā, ka whaka­ara rātou i a ia, ka mea ki a ia, “E te Kai­whaka­ako, kāhore ōu manawa­pā ki a tātou ka ngaro?”
4.39: Nā, ka ara ia, ā, rīria iho e ia te hau, ka mea ia ki te moana, “Kāti, whaka­mutua.” Nā, māriri tonu iho te hau, takoto ana he marino nui.
4.40: Kātahi ia ka mea ki a rātou, “He aha tā koutou e mataku nei? He aha koutou tē whaka­pono ai?”
4.41: Nā, ka mataku whaka­hara­hara rātou, ka mea tētahi ki tētahi, “Ko wai tēnei, inā ka rongo rawa te hau me te moana ki a ia?”

5.1: Ā, ka whiti rātou ki tāwāhi o te moana, ki te whenua o ngā Kararini.
5.2: Nā, mahuta kau i te kai­puke, ka tūtaki ki a ia tētahi tangata i puta mai i ngā urupā, he wairua poke tōna.
5.3: Kei ngā urupā nei tōna nohoa­nga; ā, ahakoa he meka­meka, hore rawa ia i taea e tētahi tangata te here.
5.4: He maha hoki ōna here­nga ki ngā here wae­wae, ki ngā meka­meka, heoi motu­motu­hia ana e ia ngā meka­meka, monga­monga noa anō ngā here wae­wae. Kīhai tētahi tangata i kaha ki te whaka­mārie i a ia.
5.5: I ngā urupā tonu ia, i ngā maunga i te pō, i te ao, e hāmama ana, e hae­hae ana i a ia ki te kōhatu.
5.6: Ā, i tōna kite­nga i a Īhu i tawhiti, oma ana ia, koro­piko ana ki a ia.
5.7: He nui tōna reo ki te karanga, ka mea, “Ko te aha tāku ki a koe, e Īhu, e te Tama a te Atua, a te Runga Rawa? Ko te Atua tāku whaka­oati mōu, nā, kaua ahau e whaka­mamae­tia.”
5.8: He mea­tanga hoki nāna ki a ia, “Puta mai i tēnei tangata, e te wairua poke.”
5.9: Nā, ka ui ia ki a ia, “Ko wai tōu ingoa?” Ka whaka­hokia e tērā, ka mea, “Ko Rihiona tōku ingoa; he toko­maha hoki mātou.”
5.10: Ā, he nui tāna īnoi ki a ia kia kaua rātou e tonoa atu i taua whenua.
5.11: Nā, kei reira, kei ngā maunga, tētahi kāhui poaka e kai ana, tōna tini.
5.12: Nā, ka īnoi ngā rēwera katoa ki a ia, ka mea, “Tonoa mātou ki ngā poaka, kia tomo mātou ki a rātou.”
5.13: Nā, tukua ana rātou e Īhu. Heoi, ko te pu­tanga o ngā wairua poke, ka tomo ki ngā poaka. Ko te tino rere­nga o te kāhui rā te pari ki te moana, ko te maha kei te rua mano, ā, paremo iho ki te moana.
5.14: Nā, whati ana ngā kai­whāngai o ngā poaka, ā, kōrero­tia ana ki te pā, ki aua whenua. Nā, ka puta rātou kia kite i taua mea kua meatia nei.
5.15: Ā, nō tō rātou taenga mai ki a Īhu, ka kite i te tangata i nohoia nei e ngā rēwera, tērā i te rihi­ona, e noho ana, kua oti te whaka­kākahu, kua tika ngā mahara, ka mataku rātou.
5.16: Ā, ka kōrero­tia ki a rātou, e te hunga i kite, te mea­tanga ki te tangata i ngā rēwera, ki ngā poaka hoki.
5.17: Nā, ka anga rātou, ka tohe ki a ia kia haere atu i ō rātou wāhi.
5.18: Ā, nō ka eke ia ki te kai­puke, ka īnoi ki a ia te tangata i ngā rēwera, kia waiho ia hei hoa mōna.
5.19: Otirā, kīhai a Īhu i tuku i a ia, engari i mea atu ki a ia, “Haere ki tōu whare, ki ōu whanau­nga, ka kōrero ki a rātou i ngā mea nui i meinga e te Ariki ki a koe, i tāna ata­whai­tanga hoki i a koe.”
5.20: Nā, ka haere ia, ka anga, ka kōrero ki Rekaporihi, i ngā mea nunui i mea ai a Īhu ki a ia; ā, mīharo ana ngā tāngata katoa. Te Tamāhine a Hairua me te Wahine i Whakapā ki te Kākahu o Īhu (Matiu 9.18-26; Ruka 8.40-56)
5.21: Ā, nō te whiti­nga atu anō o Īhu ki tāwāhi i runga i te kai­puke, he nui te tangata i hui­hui ki a ia; i te taha anō ia o te moana.
5.22: Nā, ko te haere­nga mai o tētahi o ngā ranga­tira o te whare kara­kia, ko Hairuha tōna ingoa; ka kite i a ia, ka takoto ki ōna wae­wae,
5.23: he nui tāna īnoi ki a ia, ka mea, “Ko tāku tamā­hine nohi­nohi kei te whaka­hemo­hemo! Kia haere ake koe ki te whaka­pā i ōu ringa ki a ia kia ora ai, ā, ka ora.”
5.24: Nā, haere tahi ana rāua; he tini hoki te tangata i aru i a ia, popō tonu ki a ia.
5.25: Nā, ko tētahi wahine e mate ana i te pākaru­hanga toto, ka tekau mā rua ngā tau.
5.26: He maha ngā mea­tanga a ngā rata toko­maha ki a ia, hemo noa āna rawa katoa, tē mātūtū ake tētahi wāhi, heoi, kake haere ana te mate.
5.27: Ā, nō tōna rongo­nga ki a Īhu, ka haere i muri i roto i te mano, ā, pā ana ki tōna kākahu.
5.28: I mea hoki, “Ahakoa pā kau ahau ki ōna kākahu, ka ora ahau.”
5.29: Ā, mimiti tonu ake te puna o ōna toto; nō ka mahara a roto o tōna tinana kua ora ia i te mate.
5.30: Nā, mōhio tonu a Īhu kua puta he mana i roto i a ia, ka tā­huri­huri i roto i te mano, ka mea, “Ko wai tēnei kua pā nei ki ōku kākahu?”
5.31: Ka mea āna ākonga ki a ia, “E kite ana koe i te mano e popō nei ki a koe, ā, e mea ana koe, ‘Ko wai tēnei kua pā mai ki ahau?’ ”
5.32: Heoi, tiro­tiro ana ia kia kite i te wahine i mea nei i tēnei mea.
5.33: Nā, ka haere mai te wahine me te wehi, me te wiri, i mahara hoki ki te mea i meatia ki a ia, ā, takoto ana ki tōna aro­aro, kōrero­tia katoa­tia ana e ia te tikanga ki a ia.
5.34: Anō rā, ko Īhu ki a ia, “E kō, nā tōu whaka­pono koe i ora ai; haere mārie, kia ora koe i tōu mate.”
5.35: I a ia anō e kōrero ana, ka haere mai ētahi o ngā tāngata a te ranga­tira o te whare kara­kia, ka mea, “Kua mate tāu tamā­hine. Hei aha ake māu te whaka­raru­raru i te Kai­whaka­ako?”
5.36: Otirā, kāhore a Īhu i aro ki te kupu i kōrero­tia, ka mea atu ki te ranga­tira o te whare kara­kia, “Kaua e wehi, ko te whaka­pono ia kia whaka­pono.”
5.37: Ā, kīhai tētahi tangata i tukua kia haere tahi me ia, ko Pita anake, ko Hēmi, ko Hoani teina o Hēmi.
5.38: Ā, nō te taenga atu ki te whare o te ranga­tira o te whare kara­kia, ka kite ia i te nga­ngau, i te nui hoki o te tangi, o te auē a ētahi.
5.39: Ā, i tōna tomo­kanga ki roto, ka mea ia ki a rātou, “He aha koutou ka nga­ngau ai, ka tangi ai? Kāhore te kōtiro i mate, engari e moe ana.”
5.40: Nā, kata­ina iho ia e rātou. Heoi, ka oti katoa te pei ki waho, ka mau ia ki te pāpā, ki te whaea o te kōtiro, rātou ko ōna hoa, ka tomo ki te wāhi i takoto ai te kōtiro.
5.41: Nā, ka mau ia ki te ringa o te kōtiro, ka mea ki a ia, “Tarita kumi!” ko tōna whaka­māori­tanga tēnei, “E kō, ko tāku kupu tēnei ki a koe, e ara!”
5.42: Nā, whaka­tika tonu ake te kōtiro, ā, haere ana; kotahi tekau mā rua hoki ōna tau. Nā, ko te tino mīharo­tanga i mīharo ai rātou.
5.43: Ā, he nui tāna whaka­tūpato i a rātou, kia kaua tēnei e mōhio­tia e tētahi tangata; ka kī kia hoatu he kai māna.

6.1: Ā, haere ia i reira, ā ka tae ki tōna kāinga tupu; me te aru anō āna ākonga i a ia.
6.2: Ā, ka taka mai te hāpati, ka anga ia, ka whaka­ako i roto i te whare kara­kia; ā, he toko­maha hoki, i tō rātou rongo­nga, i mīharo, i mea, “Nō hea ēnei mea a tēnei tangata? He mātau­ranga aha tēnei kua hoatu nei ki a ia, ā, he aha te tikanga o ēnei mere­kara nunui kua oti nei i ōna ringa?
6.3: Ehara ianei tēnei i te kāmura, i te tama a Meri, i te tua­kana o Hēmi, o Hohi, o Hūrā, o Haimona? Kāhore ianei ōna tuā­hine i konei, i a tātou nei?” Heoi hē ana rātou ki a ia.
6.4: Otirā, ka mea a Īhu ki a rātou, “Kei tōna kāinga anake, kei ōna whanau­nga, kei tōna whare, te poro­piti hapa ai i te hōnore.”
6.5: Ā, kīhai ia i āhei te mea i tētahi mere­kara ki reira, heoi anō, ko te whaka­pā i ōna ringa ki ētahi tāngata tūroro toru­toru kia ora ai.
6.6: Ā, mīharo ana ia ki tō rātou whaka­pono kore. Nā, hāere­erea ana e ia ngā kāinga ā tawhio noa, whaka­ako ai. Ka Tonoa e Īhu ngā Ākonga Tekau mā Rua (Matiu 10.5-15; Ruka 9.1-6)
6.7: Kātahi ia ka karanga i te tekau mā rua, ka anga, ka tono i a rātou toko­rua, toko­rua; ā, hoatu ana ki a rātou he mana hei pei i ngā wairua poke.
6.8: I whaka­hau ia ki a rātou, kia kaua tētahi mea e mauria ki te ara, he toko­toko anake; kaua he pūtea, kaua he taro, kaua he moni mō roto i te whī­tiki.
6.9: Engari ngā hū, e here nā; kaua hoki e taki­rua­tia he koti hei kākahu.
6.10: I mea anō ia ki a rātou, “Ka tapoko ki tētahi whare, hei reira noho ai, ā, haere noa i reira.
6.11: Ā, ki te kāhore ētahi e manako ki a koutou, ki te kore e whaka­rongo ki a koutou, ina haere atu koutou i reira, ruia atu te puehu i raro i ō koutou wae­wae hei whaka­atu ki a rātou.”
6.12: Nā, ka haere rātou, ka kauwhau kia rīpe­netā te tangata.
6.13: He maha hoki ngā rēwera i peia, he toko­maha anō ngā tūroro i kau­kau­ria ki te hinu, i whaka­ora­ngia. Te Matenga o Hoani Kaiiriiri (Matiu 14.1-12; Ruka 9.7-9)
6.14: Ā, ka rongo a Kīngi Herora ki ēnei mea; kua nui haere hoki tōna ingoa, ā, ka mea ia, “Kua ara a Hoani Kai­iri­iri i te hunga mate, nā reira i mahi ai ngā mere­kara i roto i a ia.”
6.15: Ko ētahi i mea, “Ko Irāia tēnei.” Ko ētahi, “He poro­piti ia, he pērā rānei me tētahi o ngā poro­piti.”
6.16: Heoi, i te rongo­nga o Herora, ka mea ia, “Ko Hoani tēnei i pōutoa e ahau te māte­nga; kua ara ia.”
6.17: I tono tāngata hoki taua Herora, ā, hopu­kia ana a Hoani, herea iho ki te whare here­here, he mea mō Herōriaha, mō te wahine a tōna tua­kana a Piripi; kua mārena­tia hoki e ia.
6.18: Nā, Hoani hoki i mea ki a Herora, “E kore e tika kia riro i a koe te wahine a tōu tua­kana.”
6.19: Nā, ka mauā­hara a Herōriaha ki a ia, ka mea kia whaka­matea ia; heoi, kīhai i taea.
6.20: I hopo­hopo hoki a Herora ki a Hoani, i mōhio hoki ki a ia he tangata tika, he tapu, nā, ka āta tiaki i a ia. I tōna rongo­nga ki a ia he nui tōna poro­raru; ā, i whaka­ahua­reka anō ki te whaka­rongo ki a ia.
6.21: Ā, ka tae ki tētahi wā pai, i te taka­nga ai a Herora i tōna rā whānau­tanga, he hākari mā āna tāngata nunui, mā ngā ranga­tira hōia, mā ngā tino tāngata o Kariri.
6.22: Ā, ka haere te tamā­hine a taua Herōriaha ki roto, ka kani­kani, ka āhua­reka a Herora rātou ko te hunga e noho tahi ana, ā, ka mea te kīngi ki te kōtiro rā, “Māu e tono ki ahau tāu e pai ai, ā, ka hoatu e ahau ki a koe.”
6.23: Nā, ka oati ia ki a ia, “Ko tāu e tono ai ki ahau, ahakoa ko tētahi taha o tōku ranga­tira­tanga, me hoatu e ahau ki a koe.”
6.24: Nā, ka haere ia, ka kōrero ki tōna whaea, “Me tono e ahau ki te aha?” Ka mea tērā, “Ki te māte­nga o Hoani Kai­iri­iri.”
6.25: Nā, hohoro tonu tōna haere ki te kīngi, ka tono, ka mea, “Ko tāku e pai ai, kia hōmai e koe ki ahau āia­nei ko te māte­nga o Hoani Kai­iri­iri i runga i te rīhi.”
6.26: Nā, nui atu te pōuri o te kīngi; otirā, i te whaka­aro ki āna oati, ki te hunga hoki e noho tahi ana me ia, kīhai i pai kia whaka­kāhore­tia tāna.
6.27: Nā, tonoa tonu­tia atu e te kīngi tētahi o āna hōia kai­tiaki me te whaka­hau atu kia mauria mai tōna māte­nga. Ā, haere ana tērā, pōutoa iho e ia tōna māte­nga i roto i te whare here­here,
6.28: ā, mauria mai ana tōna māte­nga i runga i te rīhi, hoatu ana ki te kōtiro. Ā, nā te kōtiro i hoatu ki tōna whaea.
6.29: Ā, nō ka rongo āna ākonga, ka haere mai ka tango­hia tōna tinana, ā, whaka­takoto­ria ana ki te urupā. Ka Whāngaia e Īhu te Rima Mano (Matiu 14.13-21; Ruka 9.10-17; Hoani 6.1-14)
6.30: Nā, ka hui­hui ngā āpō­toro ki a Īhu, kōrero­tia ana e rātou ki a ia ngā mea katoa i mea ai rātou, i whaka­ako ai.
6.31: Nā, ka mea ia ki a rātou, “Haere mai koutou nā ki te koraha ki te wāhi motu kē, kia tā ai te manawa.” He toko­maha hoki e haere mai ana, e haere atu ana, nō kīhai rawa rātou i wātea ki te kai.
6.32: Ā, haere puku ana rātou ki te koraha ki tētahi wāhi motu kē rā te kai­puke.
6.33: Ā, i kite ngā mano i tō rātou haere­nga, he toko­maha i mātau ki a ia, nā, ka oma ā-wae­wae ki reira i roto i ngā pā katoa, ā, ko rātou kua tae wawe.
6.34: Ā, ka puta a Īhu, ka kite i te hui nui, ka aroha ki a rātou, nō te mea i rite rātou ki te hipi hēpara­kore; ā, ka anga ia, ka whaka­ako i a rātou ki ngā mea maha.
6.35: Nā, kua heke noa atu te rā, ka haere atu āna ākonga ki a ia, ka mea, “He wāhi koraha tēnei, kua heke noa atu te rā.
6.36: Tonoa atu rātou kia haere ki ngā whenua, ki ngā kāinga i tētahi taha, i tētahi taha, ki te hoko kai mā rātou.”
6.37: Nā, ka whaka­hoki ia, ka mea ki a rātou, “Mā koutou e hoatu he kai mā rātou.” Ka mea rātou ki a ia, “Me haere oti mātou ki te hoko taro ki ngā pene e rua rau, ka hoatu ai hei kai mā rātou?”
6.38: Ka mea ia ki a rātou, “E hia ā koutou taro? Tīkina tiro­hia.” Ka mōhio rātou, nā ka mea, “E rima, e rua hoki ngā ika.”
6.39: Ka mea ia ki a rātou kia meinga rātou katoa kia noho, he nohoa­nga, he nohoa­nga, ki runga ki te taru­taru mato­mato.
6.40: Nā, ka noho rātou, he rōpū, he rōpū, tā­taki­rau, tā­taki­rima tekau.
6.41: Ā, ka mau ia ki ngā taro e rima, ki ngā ika hoki e rua, ka ti­tiro ki runga ki te rangi, ka whaka­pai, ka whawhati i ngā taro, ā, hoatu ana ki āna ākonga kia whaka­takoto­ria mā rātou; i tu­whai­na anō hoki e ia ngā ika e rua mā rātou katoa.
6.42: Ā, kai katoa ana rātou, ā, ka mākona.
6.43: Ā, kotahi tekau mā rua ngā kete i kohia e rātou, kī tonu i ngā whati­whatinga, i ngā ika hoki.
6.44: Ā, me te mea e rima mano ngā tāne i kai taro rā. Ka Haere a Īhu i runga i te Moana (Matiu 14.22-33; Hoani 6.15-21)
6.45: Ā, aki­aki tonu iho ia i āna ākonga kia eke ki te kai­puke, kia whaka­whiti i mua i a ia ki tāwāhi, ki Petahaira, i a ia e tono ana i te mano kia haere.
6.46: Nā, ka mutu tāna poro­poro­aki, ka haere ia ki te maunga ki te īnoi.
6.47: Nā, kua ahi­ahi, i waenga moana te kai­puke, ko ia anake hoki i uta.
6.48: Nā, ka kite ia i a rātou e ruwha ana i te hoenga; i hē hoki te hau ki a rātou; ā, i te whā o ngā mataara­tanga o te pō ka haere atu ia ki a rātou, i haere māori atu i runga i te moana. Me te mea hoki ka pahika kē i a rātou.
6.49: Ā, nō ka kite rātou i a ia e haere ana i runga i te moana, ka mahara he wairua, ka auē;
6.50: i kite hoki rātou katoa i a ia, ā, ihi­ihi ana. Otirā, ka hohoro ia te kōrero ki a rātou, ka mea ki a rātou, “Kia manawa­nui, ko ahau tēnei; kaua e wehi.”
6.51: Nā, ka eke ia ki te kai­puke ki a rātou; ā, māriri iho te hau. Ā, nui atu tō rātou oho­mauri, mīharo ana.
6.52: Kīhai hoki i mahara ki ngā taro, he pakeke hoki nō ō rātou ngākau. Ka Whakaorangia e Īhu te Hunga Tūroro i Kenehareta (Matiu 14.34-36)
6.53: Ā, nō tō rātou whiti­nga atu, ka tae ki te whenua o Kenehareta, ka herea te kai­puke ki uta.
6.54: Nō tō rātou mahuta­tanga i te kai­puke, mōhio tonu rātou ki a ia,
6.55: Ā, ka oma puta noa i taua whenua, ā, tawhio noa, ka anga, ka mau mai i ngā tūroro i runga i ngā moenga ki te wāhi, i rongo ai rātou kei reira ia.
6.56: Ā, i ōna haere­nga katoa­tanga ki ngā kāinga, ki ngā pā, ki ngā whenua rānei, ka whaka­takoto­ria e rātou ngā tūroro ki ngā kāinga hoko­hoko, ka īnoi ki a ia kia pā kau atu rātou ki te tāniko o tōna kākahu, ā, ora ake ngā tāngata katoa i pā ki a ia.

7.1: Nā, ka hui­hui ki a ia ngā Parihi, me ētahi o ngā kara­ipi i haere mai i Hiruhārama.
7.2: Ā, nō tō rātou kite­nga i ētahi o āna ākonga e kai taro ana me te noa anō ngā ringa, arā, kīhai i horoia, ka whaka­hē rātou.
7.3: E kore hoki ngā Parihi me ngā Hūrai katoa e kai, ki te kāhore i āta horoia ngā ringa, e pupuri ana hoki i te whaka­rere­nga iho a ngā kaumātua.
7.4: E kore anō rātou e kai ina hoki mai i te kāinga hoko­hoko, ki te mea kāhore i horoi. He maha hoki ērā atu mea tuku iho kia puri­tia e rātou, ngā horoi­nga o ngā kapu, o ngā pāta, o ngā mea parāhi, o ngā nohoa­nga.
7.5: Kātahi, ka ui ngā Parihi me ngā kara­ipi ki a ia, “He aha āu ākonga tē haere ai i runga i te whaka­rere­nga iho a ngā kaumātua, ā, kāhore e horoi i ngā ringa ina kai taro?”
7.6: Nā, ka mea ia ki a rātou: “Tika rawa tā Ihāia i poro­piti ai mō koutou, mō te hunga tini­hanga, te mea hoki i tuhi­tuhia, ‘Ko te iwi nei, ko ō rātou ngutu hei whaka­hōnore i ahau, ko ō rātou ngākau ia matara noa atu i ahau.
7.7: Otirā, mau­mau kara­kia noa rātou ki ahau, ko tā rātou nei hoki e whaka­ako ai ko ngā whaka­hau a te tāngata.’
7.8: “Kei te whaka­rere hoki koutou i tā te Atua kupu ako, ka mau ki te waiho­tanga iho a te tāngata.”
7.9: Ā, ka mea ia ki a rātou, “Tēnā rā tā koutou hanga ki te whaka­kāhore i te whaka­hau a te Atua, kia mau ai koutou ki tā koutou whaka­rere­nga iho.
7.10: I mea hoki a Mohi, ‘Whaka­hōnore­tia tōu pāpā me tōu whaea’; me tēnei, ‘Ki te kōrero kino tētahi mō tōna pāpā, mō tōna whaea rānei, kia mate ia, mate rawa.’
7.11: Ko koutou ia hei mea, ‘Ki te mea tētahi ki tōna pāpā, ki tōna whaea rānei, ko tāku mea hei ata­whai­nga mōu he Koropana’ (arā, He mea i hoatu ki te Atua),
7.12: kāhore koutou āia­nei i te tuku i a ia ki te mea i tētahi aha mā tōna pāpā, mā tōna whaea rānei;
7.13: ka waiho e koutou tā koutou whaka­rere­nga iho, i whaka­rērea iho nei e koutou, hei whaka­kāhore mō tā te Atua kupu. He maha hoki ngā mea pēnā e meinga ana e koutou.” Ngā Mea e Poke ana i te Tangata (Matiu 15.10-20)
7.14: Nā, karanga­tia ana anō e ia te mano ki a ia, ā, mea ana ki a rātou, “Whaka­rongo mai koutou katoa, kia mātau hoki.
7.15: Kāhore he mea o waho o te tāngata ka tapoko nei ki roto ki a ia hei whaka­noa i a ia; engari, ngā mea e puta ana mai i roto i a ia, mā ēnā e noa ai te tāngata.
7.16: “Ki te whai tari­nga tētahi hei whaka­rongo, kia rongo ia.”
7.17: Ā, nō ka mawehe kē ia i te mano ki te whare, ka ui āna ākonga ki a ia ki te tikanga o tēnā kupu whaka­rite.
7.18: Nā, ka mea ia ki a rātou, “Ha, he kūware anō koutou? Kāhore koutou i mātau, ko ngā mea katoa o waho e tapoko nei ki te tangata, e kore ia e noa i ērā;
7.19: Nō te mea e kore e tapoko ki tōna ngākau, engari, ki te kōpū a puta ana ki te poka?” He kōrero tēnei nāna kia kīa ai he mā ngā kai katoa.
7.20: I mea anō ia, “Ko te mea e puta ake ana i te tangata, mā tērā e noa ai te tangata.
7.21: Nō roto hoki, nō te ngākau o ngā tāngata te pu­tanga o ngā whaka­aro kino, o ngā moe­puku,
7.22: o ngā tāhae, o ngā kōhuru, o ngā pūremu, o ngā hia­hia apo, o ngā kino, o te tini­hanga, o te hia­hia tai­kaha, o te kanohi kino, o te kohu­kohu, o te whaka­peha­peha, o te wai­rangi.
7.23: Nō roto te pu­tanga ake o ēnei kino katoa, ā, mā reira e noa ai te tangata.” Te Whakapono o tētahi Wahine (Matiu 15.21-28)
7.24: Nā, ka whaka­tika atu ia i reira, ka haere ki ngā wāhi o Tāira, o Hairona; ā, tomo ana ki tētahi whare, kīhai hoki ia i pai kia rongo tētahi tangata. Otiia, kīhai ia i ngaro.
7.25: I reira hoki, ka rangona ia e tētahi wahine, he wairua poke tō tāna kōtiro, ā, haere ana mai, takoto ana ki ōna wae­wae.
7.26: He wahine Kariki hoki ia, ko Hairopinihia tōna iwi. Ka īnoi ki a ia kia peia e ia te rēwera i roto i tāna kōtiro.
7.27: Nā, ka mea a Īhu ki a ia, “Tukua kia mātua mākona ngā tama­riki. E kore hoki e pai kia tango­hia te taro a ngā tama­riki, kia makā mā ngā kurī.”
7.28: Otirā, ka whaka­hoki ia, ka mea ki a ia, “Āe rā, e te Ariki, e kai ana anō ngā kurī i raro i te tēpu i ngā konga­konga a ngā tama­riki.”
7.29: Nā, ka mea ia ki a ia, “Koia kei tēnā kupu, haere; kua puta te rēwera i roto i tāu kōtiro.”
7.30: Ā, ka haere atu ia ki tōna whare, nā, roko­hanga atu e takoto ana tāna kōtiro i runga i te moenga, kua puta te rēwera. Ka Whakaoratia e Īhu tētahi Tangata, e Turi Whango ana
7.31: Ā, i hoki anō ia i ngā wāhi o Tāira, o Hairona, haere ana ki te moana o Kariri, rā waenga o ngā wāhi o Rekaporihi.
7.32: Nā, ka mauria mai ki a ia he turi e whango ana; ka tohe ki a ia kia whaka­pā­kia iho tōna ringa ki a ia.
7.33: Nā, ka tango­hia ia e ia i roto i te mano ki tahaki, ā, kuhua ana ōna maihao ki ōna tari­nga, nā, ka tuwha, ka whaka­pā ki tōna arero.
7.34: Ka ti­tiro ki te rangi, ka whaka­pū­manawa, ka mea ki a ia, “Epata,” arā, “Kia puare.”
7.35: Nā, puare tonu iho ōna tari­nga, koro­koro noa ana te here o tōna arero, nā, kua tika āna kōrero.
7.36: Kātahi ia ka whaka­tūpato i a rātou kia kaua e kōrero­tia ki te tangata. Otirā, ahakoa te nui o tāna whaka­tūpato i a rātou, nui noa atu tā rātou kōrero haere.
7.37: Ā, tino mīharo rawa rātou, ka mea, “Pai tonu tāna mea­tanga i ngā mea katoa; e mea ana ia i ngā turi kia rongo, i ngā wa­hangū kia kōrero.”

8.1: I aua rā, i te mea he nui rawa te mano, kāhore hoki he kai mā rātou, ka karanga a Īhu ki āna ākonga, ka mea ki a rātou,
8.2: “E aroha ana ahau ki ngā tāngata, ka toru nei hoki ō rātou rā e noho ana ki ahau, ā, kāhore ā rātou kai.
8.3: Ki te tonoa puku­tia rātou e ahau ki tō rātou kāinga, ka hemo ki te ara; i haere mai hoki ētahi o rātou i tawhiti.”
8.4: Nā, ka whaka­hokia e āna ākonga ki a ia, “Me aha e te tangata ka mākona ai ēnei i te taro i konei, i te koraha?”
8.5: Ka ui ia ki a rātou, “E hia ā koutou taro?” Ka mea rātou, “E whitu.”
8.6: Nā, ka mea ia ki te mano kia noho ki te whenua; ā, ka mau ki ngā taro e whitu, ka whaka­whetai, ka whawhati, ā, hoatu ana e ia ki āna ākonga kia whaka­takoto­ria ki mua i a rātou; whaka­takoto­ria ana e rātou mā te mano.
8.7: He ika anō a rātou toru­toru nei, he mea no­nohi, ā, ka mutu te whaka­pai, ka mea ia kia whaka­takoto­ria hoki ērā.
8.8: Nā, kai ana rātou, ā, ka mākona, ā, kohia ake ana o ngā whati­whatinga i toe e whitu ngā kete.
8.9: Me te mea e whā mano te hunga i kai, ā, tonoa atu ana rātou e ia.
8.10: Nā, eke tonu ia rātou ko āna ākonga ki te kai­puke, ā, ka tae ki ngā wāhi o Taramanuta. Ka Tono ngā Parihi i tētahi Tohu (Matiu 12.38-42; 16.1-4)
8.11: Nā, ka puta mai ngā Parihi, ka anga, ka totohe ki a ia, ka rapu tohu ki ia i te rangi, hei whaka­mā­tau­tau mōna.
8.12: Nā, ka hotu tōna wairua, ka mea ia, “He aha tēnei whaka­tupu­ranga ka rapu ai ki te tohu? He pono tāku e mea nei ki a koutou, e kore e hoatu he tohu ki tēnei whaka­tupu­ranga.”
8.13: Nā, mahue ake rātou i a ia, ā, eke ana anō ki te kai­puke, rere ana ki tērā taha. Te Rēwena a ngā Parihi, a Herora hoki (Matiu 16.5-12)
8.14: Nā, i ware­ware rātou ki te mau taro, kotahi tonu ā rātou taro i te kai­puke.
8.15: Nā, ka whaka­tūpato ia i a rātou, ka mea, “Kia mahara, kia tūpato i te rēwena a ngā Parihi, i te rēwena hoki a Herora.”
8.16: Ā, ka kōrero­rero rātou ki a rātou anō, ka mea, “Nō te mea kāhore ā tātou taro.”
8.17: Ka mōhio a Īhu, ka mea ki a rātou, “He aha koutou ka kōrero­rero ai nō te mea kāhore ā koutou taro? Kīanō koutou i mātau noa, kīanō i mahara? E pakeke tonu ana anō rānei ō koutou ngākau?
8.18: He kanohi nei ō koutou, ā, kāhore e kite? He tari­nga nei ō koutou, ā, kāhore e rongo? Kāhore e mahara?
8.19: I ahau i whawhati i ngā taro e rima mā ngā mano e rima, e hia ngā kete kī o ngā whati­whatinga i kohia e koutou?” Ka mea rātou ki a ia, “Kotahi tekau mā rua.”
8.20: “Ā, i ngā taro hoki e whitu mā ngā mano e whā, e hia ngā kete kī o ngā whati­whatinga i kohia e koutou?” Ka mea rātou, “E whitu.”
8.21: Nā, ka mea ia ki a rātou, “Kāhore anō ia koutou kia mātau noa?” Ka Whakaorangia e Īhu he Tangata Matapō i Petahaira
8.22: Ā, ka tae rātou ki Petahaira. Nā, ka kawea mai e rātou he matapō ki a ia, ka īnoi ki a ia kia whaka­pā­ngia e ia.
8.23: Nā, ka mau ia ki te ringa o te matapō, ka ārahi i a ia ki waho o te kāinga; ka tuwha ki ōna kanohi, ā, ka whaka­pā i ōna ringa ki a ia, ka ui ki a ia me kore ia e kite i tētahi mea.
8.24: Nā, ka ti­tiro ake ia, ka mea, “E kite ana ahau i ngā tāngata e hāere­ere ana me te mea he rākau.”
8.25: Me i reira, ka whaka­pā­kia anō ngā ringa ki ōna kanohi, ka mea i a ia kia ti­tiro. Nā, ka ora ia, ā, ka mārama te ti­tiro ki ngā mea katoa.
8.26: Nā, ka tono ia i a ia ki tōna whare, ka mea atu, “Kaua e tomo ki te kāinga.” Te Pānuitanga a Pita mō Īhu (Matiu 16.13-20; Ruka 9.18-21)
8.27: Nā, ka haere a Īhu rātou ko āna ākonga ki ngā kāinga o Hiha­ria Piripai, ā, i te ara ka ui ia ki āna ākonga, ka mea ki a rātou, “Ki tā ngā tāngata kī, ko wai ahau?”
8.28: Nā, ko tā rātou whaka­hoki­nga, “Ko Hoani Kai­iri­iri; ki tā ētahi, ko Irāia; ki tā ētahi, ko tētahi o ngā poro­piti.”
8.29: Nā, ka mea ia ki a rātou, “Ki tā koutou nā kī, ko wai ahau?” Nā, ka whaka­hoki a Pita, ka mea ki a ia, “Ko te Karaiti koe.”
8.30: Nā, ka whaka­tūpato ia i a rātou, kia kaua ia e kōrero­tia ki te tangata. Ka Kōrero a Īhu mō Tōna Mamaetanga me Tōna Matenga (Matiu 16.21-28; Ruka 9.22-27)
8.31: Kātahi ia ka anga, ka whaka­ako i a rātou, kua takoto te tikanga kia maha ngā mamae o te Tama a te tangata, kia whaka­kino­ngia hoki e ngā kaumātua, e ngā tohu­nga nui, e ngā kara­ipi, ā, kia whaka­matea, ā, kia ara anō ina pahure ngā rā e toru.
8.32: I kōrero­tia mata­nui­tia anō taua kupu e ia. Nā, ka mau a Pita ki a ia, ka anga, ka whaka­hē ki tāna.
8.33: Otirā, ka tahuri ia, ā, i te kite­nga i āna ākonga, ka whaka­hē ki tā Pita, ka mea, “Haere ki muri i ahau, e Hātana. Kāhore hoki ōu ngākau ki ngā mea a te Atua, engari, ki a te tangata.”
8.34: Nā, ka karanga­tia e ia te mano, rātou ko āna ākonga, ka mea ki a rātou, “Ki te mea tētahi tangata kia haere mai ki te whai i ahau, me whaka­kāhore ia i a ia anō, me amo i tōna rīpeka, ka aru ai i ahau.
8.35: Ki te whai tētahi kia ora, ka mate ia; ki te mate hoki tētahi, mōna i whaka­aro ki ahau, ki te rongo­pai hoki, ka ora ia.
8.36: Ā, he aha te pai ki te tangata, ki te riro i a ia te ao katoa, ā, ka kore he ora mōna?
8.37: He aha hoki tā te tangata e hoatu ai hei utu mōna kia ora?
8.38: Ki te whaka­mā hoki tētahi ki ahau, ki āku kōrero, i tēnei whaka­tupu­ranga pūremu, kino, ka whaka­mā anō te Tama a te tangata ki a ia, ina haere mai i runga i te korōria o tōna Matua, rātou ko ngā ana­hera tapu.”

9.1: I mea anō ia ki a rātou, “He pono tāku e mea nei ki a koutou, tēnei anō ētahi o te hunga e tū nei, e kore e pāngia e te mate, kia kite rā anō i te ranga­tira­tanga o te Atua e haere mai ana i runga i te kaha.” Te Whakaahua Kētanga (Matiu 17.1-13; Ruka 9.28-36)
9.2: Ā, ka pahure ngā rā e ono, ka mau a Īhu ki a Pita, ki a Hēmi, ki a Hoani, nā, kawea ana rātou e ia ki runga ki tētahi maunga tike­tike, ko rātou anake. Ā, ka puta kē tōna āhua i tō rātou aro­aro.
9.3: Nā, kanapa tonu ōna kākahu, mā tonu me te huka­rere; e kore e taea e te kai­horoi i runga i te whenua te mea kia pērā te mā.
9.4: Nā, ka puta mai ki a rātou a Irāia rāua ko Mohi; e kōrero­rero ana rāua ki a Īhu.
9.5: Nā, ka oho a Pita, ka mea ki a Īhu, “E te Kai­whaka­ako, he mea pai kia noho tātou ki konei; nā, kia hangā e mātou ētahi wharau kia toru; kia kotahi mōu, kia kotahi mō Mohi, kia kotahi mō Irāia.”
9.6: Kāhore hoki ia i mātau ki tāna e kōrero ai; i wehi hoki rātou.
9.7: Nā, ko tētahi kapua e tau­maru­maru ana ki runga ki a rātou; ā, ka puta he reo i te kapua, e mea ana, “Ko tāku Tama tēnei i aroha ai; whaka­rongo ki a ia.”
9.8: Ā, ti­tiro rawa ake rātou ki tētahi taha, ki tētahi taha kāhore ā rātou tāngata i kite ai, ko rātou anake, ko Īhu.
9.9: Ā, i a rātou e heke iho ana i te maunga, ka whaka­tūpato ia i a rātou kia kaua e kōrero­tia ki te tangata ā rātou i kite ai, kia ara rā anō te Tama a te tangata i te hunga mate.
9.10: Ā, i puri­tia taua kupu e rātou, ka uiui ki a rātou anō, he aha rā te aranga ake i te hunga mate.
9.11: Ā, ka ui rātou ki a ia, ka mea, “He aha ngā kara­ipi ka mea ai, ko Irāia kia mātua puta mai?”
9.12: Nā, ka whaka­hoki ia, ka mea ki a rātou, “E puta ana anō a Irāia i mua ki te whaka­tika i ngā mea katoa. Kua oti anō te tuhi­tuhi mō te Tama a te tangata, kia maha ōna mamae, kia whaka­kāhore­tia.
9.13: Ko tāku kupu ia tēnei ki a koutou, Kua tae mai anō a Irāia, heoi, meatia ana e rātou ki a ia tā rātou i pai ai, ngā mea hoki i tuhi­tuhia mōna.” Ka Whakaorangia e Īhu he Tama he Wairua Poke Tōna (Matiu 17.14-21; Ruka 9.37-43a)
9.14: Ā, nō tō rātou taenga ki ngā ākonga, ka kite rātou he rahi te hui e kara­poti ana i a rātou, me ngā kara­ipi e totohe ana ki a rātou.
9.15: Ā, kite kau te mano katoa i a ia, ka mīharo, ā, oma ana, oha ana ki a ia.
9.16: Nā, ka ui ia ki a rātou, “He aha tā koutou e totohe nā ki a rātou?”
9.17: Nā, ka whaka­hoki tētahi i roto i te mano, ka mea, “E te Kai­whaka­ako, i kawea mai e ahau tāku tama ki a koe, he wairua reo­kore tōna.
9.18: Ā, i ngā wāhi e hopu ai te wairua i a ia, ka tāia iho. Tutū ana te huka, tetēā ana ōna niho, ā, pakoko haere ana: i mea anō ahau ki āu ākonga kia peia ia ki waho; heoi, kīhai i taea e rātou.”
9.19: Nā, ko tāna whaka­hoki­nga ki a ia, ka mea, “E te uri whaka­pono kore, kia pēhea te roa o tōku noho ki a koutou? Kia pēhea te roa o tāku manawa­nui ki a koutou? Kawea mai ki ahau.”
9.20: Nā, kawea ana mai ia ki a ia. Ā, i tōna kite­nga i a ia, nā, hāea tonu­tia iho ia e te wairua; ā, hinga ana ia ki te whenua, ka oke, ka huka.
9.21: Nā, ka ui ia ki tōna matua, “Ka pēhea te roa o te mea nei ki ia?” Ka mea ia, “Nō te tama­riki­tanga.
9.22: He maha āna tura­kanga i a ia ki te kāpura, ki te wai, kia ngaro ai: otirā ki te taea e koe te aha rānei, aroha­ina māua, kia puta tōu whaka­aro ki a māua.”
9.23: Ka mea a Īhu ki a ia, “Ki te taea e koe te whaka­pono, ka taea ngā mea katoa e te tangata whaka­pono.”
9.24: Nā, karanga tonu mai te matua o te tama, ka mea, “E whaka­pono ana ahau, e te Ariki; kia puta tōu whaka­aro ki tōku whaka­pono kore.”
9.25: Ā, nō te kite­nga o Īhu i te mano e oma mai ana, ka rīria e ia te wairua poke, ka mea ki a ia, “E te wairua reo­kore, turi, ko tāku tēnei ki a koe, Puta mai i roto i a ia, kaua anō e tomo ki roto ki a ia ā muri ake nei.”
9.26: Nā, hāmama ana tērā, hae­hae noa iho ana i a ia, ā, puta ana mai ki waho; nō ka pērā taua tangata me te tū­pā­paku, ā, he toko­maha i mea, “Kua mate.”
9.27: Otirā, ka mau a Īhu ki tōna ringa, ka whaka­ara i a ia, ā, ka whaka­tika ia.
9.28: Ā, i a ia ka tomo ki te whare, ka ui puku āna ākonga ki a ia, “He aha mātou tē āhei ai te pei i a ia ki waho?”
9.29: Anō rā, ko ia ki a rātou, “E kore e puta noa te pēnā, mā te īnoi anake, mā te noho­puku.” Ka Kōrero anō a Īhu mō Tōna Matenga (Matiu 17.22-23; Ruka 9.43b-45)
9.30: Nā, ka hāpai­nga e rātou i reira, ā, haere ana rā waenga­nui o Kariri; kīhai hoki ia i pai kia rangona e tētahi.
9.31: Ko tāna hoki i whaka­ako ai ki āna ākonga, i mea ai ki a rātou, “Ka tukua te Tama a te tangata ki ngā ringa o ngā tāngata, ā, mā rātou ia e whaka­mate; ā, ka oti ia te whaka­mate, ka ara ake i te toru o ngā rā.”
9.32: Nā, kīhai rātou i mātau ki taua kupu, ka mataku hoki ki te ui ki a ia. Ko Wai te Tino Nui Rawa? (Matiu 18.1-5; Ruka 9.46-48)
9.33: Nā, ka tae rātou ki Kaperenauma; ā, i a ia i roto i te whare, ka ui ia ki a rātou, “He aha tā koutou i kōrero­rero ai ki a koutou i te ara?”
9.34: Otiia, kīhai rātou i kīkī; ko tā rātou hoki i kōrero­rero ai ki a rātou i te ara, ko wai te mea nui rawa.
9.35: Nā, ka noho ia, ka karanga i te tekau mā rua, ka mea ki a rātou, “Ki te whai tētahi kia whiti ko ia hei mua, ka waiho ia hei muri i te katoa, hei kai­mahi mā te katoa.”
9.36: Nā, ka mau ia ki tētahi tama­iti nohi­nohi, ā, whaka­tū­ria ana ki waenga­nui i a rātou; nā, ka oko­oko i a ia, ka mea ki a rātou,
9.37: “Ki te manako tētahi ki tētahi o ngā tama­riki pēnei, he whaka­aro ki tōku ingoa, e manako ana ia ki ahau; ki tē manako hoki tētahi ki ahau, ehara i ahau tāna i manako ai, engari ko tōku kai­tono mai.” Ko Ia ehara i te Hoa Whawhai, Nō Tātou Ia (Ruka 9.49-50)
9.38: Nā, ka mea a Hoani ki ia, “E te Kai­whaka­ako, i kite mātou i tētahi e pei rēwera ana i runga i tōu ingoa. Nā, rīria iho e mātou, kāhore hoki ia e haere tahi me tātou.”
9.39: Nā, ka mea a Īhu, “Kaua ia e rīria ki te mea hoki nōku te ingoa e mahi mere­kara ai tētahi, e kore e hohoro tāna kōrero kino mōku.
9.40: Ko ia hoki ehara i te hoa­riri ki a tātou, nō tātou ia.
9.41: Ki te whaka­inu­mia koutou e tētahi ki te kapu wai, he whaka­aro ki tōku ingoa, nō te mea nō te Karaiti koutou, he pono tāku e mea nei ki a koutou, e kore ia e hapa i tōna utu. Ngā Whakawai kia Hara (Matiu 18.6-9; Ruka 17.1-2)
9.42: “Nā, ki te mea tētahi kia hē tētahi o ēnei mea no­nohi e whaka­pono nei ki ahau, he pai kē ki a ia me i whaka­iria tētahi kōhatu mira ki tōna kakī, ā, ka makā ia ki te moana.
9.43: Nā, ki te hē koe i tōu ringa, pōutoa; pai kē hoki mōu te tomo mutu ki te ora i te makā ringa­rua­tia ki Kehena, ki te kāpura e kore e tineia.
9.44: Ki te wāhi e kore ai e mate tō rātou kutu­kutu, ki te kāpura e kore e tineia.
9.45: Ki te hē anō koe i tōu wae­wae, pōutoa. Pai kē hoki mōu te tomo kopa ki te ora i te makā wae­wae­rua­tia ki Kehena,
9.46: Ki te wāhi e kore ai e mate tō rātou kutu­kutu, ki te kāpura e kore e tineia.
9.47: Ā, ki te hē koe i tōu kanohi, makā atu; pai kē hoki mōu te tomo kanohi tahi ki te ranga­tira­tanga o te Atua i te makā kanohi­rua­tia ki Kehena,
9.48: ki te wāhi e kore ai e mate tō rātou kutu­kutu, ki te kāpura e kore e tineia.
9.49: “Tā te mea ka totea ngā tāngata katoa ki te kāpura.
9.50: “He pai te tote; otirā, ki te pirau te tote, mā te aha e whai tikanga tote ai? “Kia whai tote i roto i a koutou, kia mau hoki te rongo a tētahi ki tētahi.”

10.1: Nā, ka whaka­tika ia i reira, haere ana ki ngā wāhi o Hūria ki tērā taha o Horano. Nā, ka hui­hui mai anō ngā mano ki a ia; ka whaka­ako anō ia i a rātou, ko tāna tikanga hoki tērā.
10.2: Nā, ka haere mai ngā Parihi, ka ui ki a ia, “He mea tika rānei kia whaka­rere te tangata i tāna wahine?” He whaka­mā­tau­tau hoki mōna.
10.3: Nā, ka whaka­hoki ia, ka mea ki a rātou, “He aha tā Mohi i mea ai ki a koutou?”
10.4: Ka kī rātou, “I tukua e Mohi kia tuhi­tuhia he puka­puka whaka­rere, ka whaka­rere ai.”
10.5: Nā, ka whaka­hoki a Īhu, ka mea ki a rātou, “Nā te pakeke o ō koutou ngākau i tuhi­tuhia ai e ia tēnei kupu ako ki a koutou.
10.6: I te oroko­hanga­nga ia, ‘I hangā rāua e te Atua he tāne, he wahine.
10.7: Mō konei ka mahue i te tangata tōna pāpā me tōna whaea, ka piri ki tāna wahine;
10.8: hei kiko­kiko kotahi hoki rāua toko­rua.’ Nā, heoi anō tō rāua toko­rua­tanga, engari, kotahi anō kiko­kiko.
10.9: Nā, ko ā te Atua i hono ai, kaua e wehea e te tangata.”
10.10: Ā, i te whare ka ui anō āna ākonga ki a ia ki taua mea.
10.11: Ka mea ia ki a rātou, “Ki te whaka­rere tētahi i tāna wahine, ā, ka mārena i tētahi atu, e pūremu ana ia, e hara ana ki tērā.
10.12: Ki te whaka­rere hoki te wahine i tāna tāne, ā, ka mārena­tia ki tētahi atu, e pūremu ana ia.” Ka Manaakitia e Īhu ngā Tamariki Nonohi (Matiu 19.13-15; Ruka 18.15-17)
10.13: Nā, ka kawea mai ki a ia ētahi tama­riki no­nohi, kia pā ai ia ki a rātou; otirā, ka rīria e ngā ākonga te hunga nāna i kawe mai.
10.14: Nō te kite­nga ia o Īhu, ka riri, ka mea ki a rātou, “Tukua ngā tama­riki no­nohi kia haere mai ki ahau, kaua hoki rātou e āraia atu; nō ngā pēnei hoki te ranga­tira­tanga o te Atua.
10.15: He pono tāku e mea nei ki a koutou, ki te kāhore e rite te tango a tētahi i te ranga­tira­tanga o te Atua ki tā te tama­iti nohi­nohi, e kore ia e tomo ki roto.”
10.16: Nā, oko­okona ana rātou e ia, whaka­pā­kia iho ōna ringa ki a rātou, manaaki­tia ana rātou. Te Tangata Whai Taonga (Matiu 19.16-30; Ruka 18.18-30)
10.17: Nā, i a ia e haere ana i te hua­rahi, ka oma mai tētahi, ka tuku iho i ngā turi ki a ia, ka ui, “E te Kai­whaka­ako pai, me aha ahau ka whi­whi ai ki te ora tonu?”
10.18: Nā, ka mea a Īhu ki a ia, “He aha ahau i kīa ai e koe he pai? Kāhore tētahi i pai, kotahi anake, ko te Atua.
10.19: E mātau ana koe ki ngā ture, ‘Kaua e pūremu. Kaua e patu tangata. Kaua e tāhae. Kaua e whaka­pae teka. Kaua e kaiā. Whaka­hōnore­tia tōu pāpā me tōu whaea.’ ”
10.20: Nā, ka whaka­hoki tērā, ka mea ki a ia, “E te Kai­whaka­ako, kua rite katoa ēnei mea i ahau nō tōku tama­riki­tanga ake.”
10.21: Nā, ka ti­tiro a Īhu ki a ia, ka aroha ki a ia, ka mea ki a ia, “Kotahi te mea kāhore nei i a koe. Haere, hokona āu mea, ka hoatu ki ngā rawa­kore, ā, e whai taonga koe ki te rangi. Kātahi ka haere mai, ka aru i ahau.”
10.22: Otirā, ka tuku tōna mata i taua kupu, ā, haere pōuri atu ana; he maha hoki ōna taonga.
10.23: Nā, ka tiro­tiro a Īhu, ka mea ki āna ākonga, “Anō te whaka­uaua o te tapoko o te hunga taonga ki te ranga­tira­tanga o te Atua!”
10.24: Nā, ka mīharo ngā ākonga ki āna kupu. Otirā, ka whaka­hoki anō a Īhu, ka mea ki a rātou, “E tama mā, anō te whaka­uaua o te tapoko ki tō te Atua ranga­tira­tanga o te hunga e whaka­whiri­naki ana ki ngā taonga!
10.25: Erangi, te haere o te kāmera rā te kōwhao o te ngira he mea takoto noa, he whaka­uaua rawa ia te haere o te tangata taonga ki roto ki te ranga­tira­tanga o te Atua.”
10.26: Nā, rahi rawa tō rātou mīharo, ka mea ki a rātou anō, “Ko wai rā e ora?”
10.27: Nā, ka ti­tiro a Īhu ki a rātou, ka mea, “E kore tēnei e taea e te tangata, ki te Atua ia ka taea; e taea hoki ngā mea katoa e te Atua.”
10.28: Kātahi, ka anga a Pita, ka mea ki a ia, “Nā, kua mahue nei i a mātou ngā mea katoa, kua aru nei i a koe.”
10.29: Nā, ka whaka­hoki a Īhu, ka mea, “He pono tāku e mea nei ki a koutou, ki te whaka­rērea e tētahi tangata, he whare, he tēina, he tuā­hine, he whaea, he pāpā, he tama­riki, he māra, he whaka­aro nōna ki ahau, ki te rongo­pai hoki,
10.30: inā, tā­taki­rau ngā mea e riro i a ia, i tēnei wā, he whare, he tēina, he tuā­hine, he whaea, he tama­riki, he māra, me te whaka­toi; ā, i te ao meāke puta, he ora tonu.
10.31: He toko­maha ia ō mua e waiho ki muri; ko ō muri hoki ki mua.” Ngā Kōrerotanga a Īhu mō Tōna Matenga (Matiu 20.17-19; Ruka 18.31-34)
10.32: Nā, i te hua­rahi rātou e haere ana ki Hiruhārama, me te haere anō a Īhu i mua i a rātou; nā, e mīharo ana rātou, e aru mataku ana. Heoi, ka mau anō ia i te tekau mā rua, ka anga, ka kōrero ki a rātou i ngā mea meāke pā ki a ia.
10.33: “Nana, e haere ana tēnei tātou ki Hiruhārama; ā, ka tukua te Tama a te tangata ki ngā tohu­nga nui, ki ngā karai­pi; ka kīa e rātou kia mate, ka tuku hoki rātou i a ia ki ngā tauiwi;
10.34: ka tāwaia ia, ka tu­whai­na, ka whiua, ka whaka­matea, ā, i te toru o ngā rā, ka ara.” Te Īnoi a Hēmi rāua ko Hoani (Matiu 20.20-28)
10.35: Nā, ka whaka­tata mai ki a ia a Hēmi rāua ko Hoani, ngā tama a Heperi, ka mea, “E te Kai­whaka­ako, e hia­hia ana māua kia meatia e koe tā māua e īnoi ai.”
10.36: Nā, ka mea ia ki a rāua, “He aha tā kōrua e hia­hia ai kia meatia e ahau mā kōrua?”
10.37: Ka mea rāua ki a ia, “Tukua ki a māua kia noho, tētahi ki tōu matau, tētahi ki tōu mauī, i tōu korōria.”
10.38: Nā, ko te mea­tanga a Īhu ki a rāua, “Kāhore kōrua e mātau ki tā kōrua e īnoi nei; e āhei rānei kōrua te inu i te kapu ka inumia nei e ahau? Kia iri­iria ki te iri­iri­nga ka iri­iria nei ahau?”
10.39: Ka mea rāua ki a ia, “E āhei anō.” Ka kī atu a Īhu ki a rāua, “E inu anō kōrua i te kapu ka inumia e ahau; e iri­iria kōrua ki te iri­iri­nga e iri­iria ai ahau.
10.40: Tēnā, ko te noho ki tōku matau, ki tōku mauī rānei, ehara i te mea māku e hoatu, engari, ka riro i te hunga i whaka­ritea nei mō rātou.”
10.41: Ā, nō te rongo­nga o te tekau, ka anga ka riri ki a Hēmi rāua ko Hoani.
10.42: Nā, karanga­tia ana rātou e Īhu ki a ia, ka mea ki a rātou, “E mahara ana koutou, ko te hunga e kīa ana he kāwana nō ngā tauiwi hei whaka­tupu ranga­tira ki a rātou; ko ō rātou tāngata rarahi hoki hei aki­aki i a rātou.
10.43: Otirā, e kore e pērā i roto i a koutou; engari, ki te mea tētahi kia whaka­tupu tangata rahi i roto i a koutou, me whaka­tupu kai­mahi ia mā koutou.
10.44: Ki te mea hoki tētahi o koutou kia whaka­tupu tino tangata, me whaka­tupu pono­nga ia mā te katoa.
10.45: Kīhai nei hoki te Tama a te tangata i haere mai kia mahia he mea māna, engari, kia mahi ia, kia tuku hoki i a ia kia mate hei utu mō ngā tāngata toko­maha.” Ka Whakaorangia e Īhu a Paratimiuha he Matapō (Matiu 20.29-34; Ruka 18.35-43)
10.46: Nā, ka tae rātou ki Heriko. A, i a ia e haere atu ana i roto i Heriko, rātou ko āna ākonga me te mano tini, e noho ana a Paratimiuha, tama a Timiuha, he matapō, i te taha o te ara, ki te tono mea māna.
10.47: Ā, i tōna rongo­nga ko Īhu o Nahareta tēnā, ka anga ia, ka karanga, ka mea, “E Īhu, e te Tama a Rāwiri, kia aroha ki ahau.”
10.48: Ā, he toko­maha ki te riri i a ia kia noho puku, heoi, tino rahi ake tāna karanga, “E te Tama a Rāwiri, kia aroha ki ahau.”
10.49: Nā, ka tū a Īhu, ka mea kia karanga­tia ia. Ā, karanga­tia ana e rātou te matapō, ka mea ki a ia, “Kia māia, whaka­tika; e karanga ana ia ki a koe.”
10.50: Nā, ka whaka­rērea e ia tōna kākahu, ā, whaka­tika ana, haere ana ki a Īhu.
10.51: Nā, ka oho a Īhu, ka mea ki a ia, “He aha tāu e hia­hia nā kia meatia e ahau māu?” Ka kī te matapō ki a ia, “E te Ariki, kia ti­tiro ahau.”
10.52: Ka mea a Īhu ki a ia, “Haere; nā tōu whaka­pono koe i ora ai.” Nā, ti­tiro tonu iho ia, aru ana i a Īhu i te ara.

11.1: Ā, nō ka tata rātou ki Hiruhārama, ki Petapaki, ki Petani, ā, ka tae ki Maunga Ōriwa, toko­rua āna ākonga i tonoa e ia,
11.2: ā, i mea ia ki a rāua, “Haere ki te kāinga e anga mai ana ki a kōrua; e tomo kau ki reira, ka kite kōrua i tētahi kūao e here ana, kāhore anō kia nohoia e te tangata; wete­kina, āra­hina mai.
11.3: Ā, ki te kī mai tētahi tangata ki a kōrua, ‘He aha tēnei ka meinga ai e kōrua?’ Ka mea atu, ‘E mea ana te Ariki ki a ia māna; nā, ka tukua tonu­tia mai ki konei.’ ”
11.4: Nā, haere ana rāua, ka kite i te kūao e here ana ki te kūwaha i waho i te ara, ā, wete­kina ana e rāua.
11.5: Ā, ka mea ētahi o te hunga e tū ana i reira ki a rāua, “He aha tā kōrua e wewete nā i te kūao?”
11.6: Nā, ka kōrero­tia e rāua ki a rātou tā Īhu i mea ai; ā, tukua ana rāua e rātou.
11.7: Ka āra­hina te kūao ki a Īhu, nā, whā­riki­tia ana ō rāua kākahu ki runga ki a ia; ā, noho ana ia i runga.
11.8: Nā, he toko­maha i whā­riki i ō rātou kākahu ki te ara. Ko ētahi i kokoti i ngā manga o ngā rākau, whā­riki­tia ana ki te ara.
11.9: Ko te hunga i haere i mua, me te hunga i haere i muri, i karanga, i mea, “Ohana! Ka whaka­pai­ngia ia e haere mai ana i runga i te ingoa o te Ariki!
11.10: Ka whaka­pai­ngia te ranga­tira­tanga e haere mai ana, te ranga­tira­tanga o tō tātou matua o Rāwiri! Ohana i runga rawa!”
11.11: Nā, ka tomo a Īhu ki Hiruhārama, ki roto hoki ki te teme­para; ā, ka mutu tāna tiro­tiro i ngā mea katoa, ko te wā hoki o te ahi­ahi, ka haere rātou ko te tekau mā rua ki Petani. Ka Kanga a Īhu i te Rākau Piki (Matiu 21.18-19)
11.12: Nā, i te aonga ake, i a rātou kua puta i Petani, ka hia­kai ia.
11.13: Ā, i tōna kite­nga i tētahi piki i tawhiti, he rau ōna, ka haere ia, me kore e kitea tētahi mea i runga; ā, nō tōna taenga, kīhai i kitea e ia tētahi mea, he rau anake: ehara hoki i te wā o te piki.
11.14: Nā, ka oho a Īhu, ka mea ki taua rākau, “Kaua rawa te tangata e kai i tētahi hua ōu ake tonu atu.” Me te whaka­rongo anō āna ākonga. Ka Haere a Īhu ki te Temepara (Matiu 21.12-17; Ruka 19.45-48; Hoani 2.13-22)
11.15: Ā, ka tae rātou ki Hiruhārama. Nā, ka tomo a Īhu ki te teme­para, ka anga ki te pei ki waho i te hunga e hoko atu ana, e hoko mai ana i roto i te teme­para, ā, whaka­tahuri­tia ake ngā tēpu o ngā kai­whaka­whiti­whiti moni, me ngā nohoa­nga o ngā kai­hoko kūkupa.
11.16: Ā, kīhai i tukua e ia kia mauria tētahi oko e te tangata rā te teme­para.
11.17: Ā, i whaka­ako ia, i mea ki a rātou, “Kāhore koia i tuhi­tuhia, ‘Ka kīa tōku whare he whare īnoi mō ngā tauiwi katoa’? Otiia, kua meinga nei e koutou hei ana mō ngā kai­pāhua.”
11.18: I rongo hoki ngā tohu­nga nui me ngā kara­ipi, ā, ka rapu ki te pēhea e whaka­ngaro­mia ai ia. I mataku hoki rātou i a ia, nō te mea i mīharo te mano katoa ki tāna ako.
11.19: Ā, i ngā ahi­ahi ka haere ia ki waho o te pā. Te Whakaakoranga mō te Rākau Piki (Matiu 21.20-22)
11.20: Ā, i te ata i a rātou e haere ana, ka kite i te piki, kua maroke ake i ngā paki­aka.
11.21: Nā, ka mahara a Pita, ka mea ki a ia, “E te Kai­whaka­ako, nā, te piki i kangā rā e koe, kua maroke.”
11.22: Nā, ka whaka­hoki a Īhu, ka mea ki a rātou, “Kia mau te whaka­pono ki te Atua.
11.23: He pono hoki tāku e mea nei ki a koutou, ki te mea tētahi ki tēnei maunga, ‘Kia rangā atu koe, kia whaka­takā ki te moana,’ e kore hoki e rua­rua tōna ngākau, engari, ka whaka­pono ia tērā e puta mai ngā mea i kīa e ia; ka whi­whi ia ki tāna i mea ai.
11.24: Koia ahau ka mea nei ki a koutou, ko ngā mea katoa e tono ai koutou ina īnoi, me whaka­pono ka riro mai i a koutou, ā, ka whi­whi koutou.
11.25: Ā, ka tū koutou, ka kara­kia, ki te mea he take riri tā koutou ki tētahi, murua; kia murua ai hoki ō koutou hē e tō koutou Matua i te rangi.
11.26: Nā, ki te kore koutou e muru, e kore anō tō koutou Matua i te rangi e muru i ō koutou hē.” Te Take e Pā ana ki te Mana o Īhu (Matiu 21.23-27; Ruka 20.1-8)
11.27: Nā, ka tae anō rātou ki Hiruhārama. Ā, i a ia e hāere­ere ana i te teme­para, ka haere mai ki a ia ngā tohu­nga nui, me ngā kara­ipi, me ngā kaumātua
11.28: ka mea ki a ia, “Tēnā, te mana i meatia ai ēnei mea e koe? Nā wai hoki tēnei mana i hoatu ki a koe, i mea ai koe i ēnei mea?”
11.29: Nā, ka whaka­hoki a Īhu, ka mea ki a rātou, “Māku hoki e ui ki a koutou kia kotahi kupu, mā koutou e whaka­hoki mai ki ahau, kātahi, ka kōrero­tia e ahau ki a koutou te mana i mea ai ahau i ēnei mea.
11.30: Ko te iri­iri­nga a Hoani, nō te rangi, nō te tangata rānei? Kōrero­tia mai ki ahau.”
11.31: Ā, ka kōrero­rero rātou ki a rātou anō, ka mea, “Ki te mea tātou, ‘Nō te rangi’; ka mea ia, ‘Ha, he aha koutou tē whaka­pono ai ki a ia?’
11.32: Ā, ki te mea tātou, ‘Nō te tangata.’ ” (Ka mataku rātou i te iwi; ki tā rātou katoa hoki he poro­piti pono a Hoani.)
11.33: Nā, ka whaka­hoki rātou, ka mea ki a Īhu, “Kāhore mātou e mātau.” Nā, ka mea a Īhu ki a rātou, “E kore anō e kōrero­tia e ahau ki a koutou te mana i mea ai ahau i ēnei mea.”

12.1: Nā, ka tīmata ia ki te kōrero kupu whaka­rite ki a rātou: “I whaka­tō­kia e tētahi tangata he māra wāina, tai­epa­tia ana ki te taiepa, nā, ka keria te takoto­ranga wāina, hangā ana tētahi whare tike­tike, tukua ana e ia ki ngā kai­mahi, nā, ko tōna haere­nga ki tawhiti.
12.2: Ā, i te pō i tika ai ka tonoa e ia he pono­nga ki ngā kai­mahi ki te tiki i ētahi hua o te māra wāina i a rātou.
12.3: Nā, ka mau rātou ki a ia, ā, whiua ana, tonoa kautia atu ana.
12.4: Nā, ka tonoa anō e ia ki a rātou tētahi atu pono­nga; ā, ka ākina ia e rātou ki te kōhatu, ngawhā iho tōna māte­nga, ā, ka tūkino­tia ia e rātou ka tonoa atu.
12.5: Nā, ka tonoa anō e ia tētahi atu; ā, whaka­matea iho ia e rātou; me ērā atu, tōna tini, ko ētahi i whiua, ko ētahi i whaka­matea.
12.6: Nā, kotahi ake anō tāna, he tama aroha nāna, ko ia ō muri rawa i tonoa ai e ia ki a rātou, i mea hoki ia, ‘E hopo­hopo rātou ki tāku tama.’
12.7: Nā, ka mea aua kai­mahi ki a rātou anō, ‘Ko te tangata tēnei mōna te kāinga; tēnā, tātou ka whaka­mate i a ia, ā, mō tātou te kāinga.’
12.8: Nā, ka mau rātou ki a ia, whaka­matea iho, makā ana ki waho o te māra wāina.
12.9: “Nā, ka pēhea te ranga­tira o te māra wāina? Ka haere ia, ka whaka­ngaro i ngā kai­mahi, ka hoatu te māra wāina ki ētahi atu.
12.10: Kāhore koia koutou i kite i tēnei karaipi­ture: ‘Ko te kōhatu i kapea e ngā kai­hanga kua meinga hei ūpoko mō te koko­nga.
12.11: Nā te Ariki tēnei, ā, he mea whaka­mīharo hoki ki ō tātou kanohi.’?”
12.12: Nā, ka whai rātou kia hopu­kina ia, otiia, i mataku i te mano. I mātau hoki rātou mō rātou te kupu whaka­rite i kōrero­tia nei e ia; nā, whaka­rērea ana ia, haere ana rātou. Te Take e Pā ana ki te Utu Takoha (Matiu 22.15-22; Ruka 20.20-26)
12.13: Nā, ka tonoa mai e rātou ki a ia ētahi o ngā Parihi, rātou ko ngā Herōriana, hei hopu mō tētahi kupu āna.
12.14: Ā, nō tō rātou taenga mai, ka mea ki a ia, “E te Kai­whaka­ako, e mātau ana mātou he kupu pono tāu, e kore anō tā te tangata e whaka­aroa e koe; e kore anō koe e ti­tiro ki te kanohi tangata, engari, ka whaka­ako i te ara a te Atua i runga i te pono. He mea tika rānei te hoatu takoha ki a Hīhā, ehara rānei?
12.15: “Me hoatu rānei e mātou, kaua rānei e hoatu?” Otirā, i mōhio ia ki tō rātou tini­hanga, ka mea ki a rātou, “He aha koutou ka whaka­mā­tau­tau ai i ahau? Mauria mai he pene ki ahau, kia kite ahau.”
12.16: Ā, mauria ana mai. Nā, ko tāna mea­tanga ki a rātou, “Nō wai tēnei āhua me te tuhi­tuhi­nga?” Ka mea rātou ki a ia, “Nō Hīhā.”
12.17: Nā, ka whaka­hoki a Īhu, ka mea ki a rātou, “Hoatu ki a Hīhā, ngā mea a Hīhā, ki te Atua ngā mea a te Atua.” Ā, mīharo ana rātou ki a ia. Te Take e Pā ana ki te Aranga ake i te Mate (Matiu 22.23-33; Ruka 20.27-40)
12.18: Nā, ka haere mai ki a ia ngā Haruki, e mea nei kāhore he aranga; ka ui ki a ia, ka mea,
12.19: “E te kai­whaka­ako, i tuhi­tuhi a Mohi ki a mātou, ‘Ki te mate te tua­kana o tētahi tangata, mahue iho tāna wahine, kāhore he tama­riki hei waiho­tanga iho, me tango tāna wahine e tōna teina, ka whaka­tupu uri ai mō tōna tua­kana.’
12.20: Nā, tērā tētahi whānau, toko­whitu, he tuā­kana, he tēina: ka tango tō mua i te wahine, ka mate, ā, kāhore he uri hei waiho­tanga iho.
12.21: Kātahi, ka tango te tuarua i a ia, ka mate, kāhore anō hoki ōna uri hei waiho­tanga iho. Pērā tonu anō hoki te tua­toru.
12.22: I tango anō te toko­whitu i a ia, ā, kāhore ō rātou uri hei waiho­tanga iho. Muri rawa iho ka mate ko te wahine.
12.23: Nā, i te aranga, i te mea ka ara rātou, mā wai o rātou te wahine? He wahine hoki ia nā rātou toko­whitu.”
12.24: Nā, ka whaka­hoki a Īhu, ka mea ki a rātou, “Ehara ianei tēnei i te mea i hē ai koutou, kāhore nei hoki e mōhio ki ngā karaipi­ture, ki te kaha hoki o te Atua?
12.25: I te mea hoki ka ara mai rātou i te hunga mate, e kore e mārena, e kore anō e hoatu kia mārena­tia; engari, ka rite ki ngā ana­hera o te rangi.
12.26: Nā, mō te hunga mate, mō tō rātou aranga mai; kāhore koutou i kite i roto i te Puka­puka a Mohi, i te wāhi ki te Rākau, i tā te Atua i kī ai ki a ia, i mea ai, ‘Ko te Atua ahau o Āperahama, ko te Atua o Īhaka, ko te Atua o Hākopa’?
12.27: Ehara ia i te Atua nō te hunga mate, engari, he Atua nō te hunga ora; nā, nui atu tō koutou hē!” Te Ture Tino Nui (Matiu 22.34-40; Ruka 10.25-28)
12.28: Ā, ko te haere­nga mai o tētahi o ngā kara­ipi, ko te rongo­nga ki a rātou e totohe ana, ka kite he pai tāna whaka­hoki ki a rātou, ka ui ki a ia, “Ko tēhea te tua­tahi o ngā ture katoa?”
12.29: Nā, ko te whaka­hoki­nga a Īhu ki a ia, “Ko te tua­tahi o ngā ture katoa, ‘Whaka­rongo, e Īharaira: Ko te Ariki, ko tō tātou Atua, he Ariki kotahi;
12.30: kia whaka­paua hoki tōu ngākau, tōu wairua, tōu hine­ngaro, tōu kaha, ki te aroha ki te Ariki, ki tōu Atua. Ko te ture tua­tahi tēnei.’
12.31: Ko te tuarua tēnei, ‘Kia aroha koe ki tōu hoa tata, ānō ko koe.’ Kāhore he ture kē atu e rahi ake ana i ēnei.”
12.32: Nā, ka mea te kara­ipi ki a ia, “He pono, e te Kai­whaka­ako, he tika tāu kōrero kotahi tonu ia, ā, kāhore tētahi ko ia anake;
12.33: ā, ‘Ko te whaka­pau i te ngākau, i te hine­ngaro, i te wairua, i te kaha, ki te aroha ki a ia, me te aroha ki tōna hoa tata, ānō ko ia,’ nui atu ēnā i ngā tahu­nga tinana, i ngā patu­nga tapu katoa.”
12.34: Ā, nō te kite­nga o Īhu he kupu mōhio tāna i whaka­hoki ai, ka mea ki a ia, “Kāhore koe i matara atu i te ranga­tira­tanga o te Atua.” Ā, kīhai tētahi tangata i māia ki te ui ki a ia i muri iho. Te Take e Pā ana mō te Karaiti (Matiu 22.41-46; Ruka 20.41-44)
12.35: Nā, ka kī a Īhu, ka mea, i a ia e whaka­ako ana i roto i te teme­para, “Nā te aha ngā kara­ipi ka mea ai, he tama nā Rāwiri a te Karaiti?
12.36: Nā Rāwiri ake hoki te kupu i roto i te Wairua Tapu, ‘I mea te Ariki ki tōku Ariki: Hei tōku matau koe noho ai, kia meinga rā anō e ahau ōu hoa­riri hei tū­ranga wae­wae mōu.’
12.37: Ko Rāwiri tonu tēnei e karanga nei ki a ia he Ariki; ā, nō hea ia i tama ai ki a ia?” Te Whakatūpato a Īhu mō ngā Kaiwhakaako i te Ture (Matiu 23.1-36; Ruka 20.45-47) Ā, āhua­reka ana te mano tini ki te whaka­rongo ki a ia.
12.38: Nā, i mea anō ia ki a rātou i tāna ako­ranga, “Kia tūpato ki ngā kara­ipi, ko tā rātou e rawe ai ko te hāere­ere i roto i ngā kākahu roroa, me ngā oha­tanga i ngā kāinga hoko­hoko,
12.39: me ngā nohoa­nga ranga­tira i ngā whare kara­kia, me ngā nohoa­nga ranga­tira i ngā hākari.
12.40: Ka pau nei i a rātou ngā whare o ngā pouaru, ā, ka māminga ki te īnoi roa. He nui rawa te mate e pā ki ēnei.” Te Koha a te Pouaru (Ruka 21.1-4)
12.41: Ā, ka noho a Īhu i te rite­nga atu o te takoto­ranga moni, ka mā­taki­taki ki te mano e panga moni ana ki te takoto­ranga moni; ā, he toko­maha ngā tāngata whai taonga i panga moni maha ki roto.
12.42: Nā, ko te haere­nga mai o tētahi pouaru rawa­kore, ka maka i ngā mea no­nohi e rua, kotahi pātene ki te huia.
12.43: Nā, ka karanga­tia e ia āna ākonga, ka mea ki a rātou, “He pono tāku e mea nei ki a koutou, ko tā tēnei pouaru rawa­kore i maka ai, nui atu i a rātou katoa e maka rā ki te takoto­ranga moni.
12.44: Ko rātou katoa hoki, he hira nei ō rātou taonga, i makā ko tētahi wāhi; tēnā ko ia i tōna rawa­kore­tanga i maka i āna mea katoa, arā, i tōna oranga katoa.”

13.1: Ā, i a ia e haere atu ana i te teme­para, ka mea tētahi o āna ākonga ki a ia, “E te Kai­whaka­ako, Nana, te tū o ngā kōhatu, te tū o ngā whare!”
13.2: Nā, ka whaka­hoki a Īhu, ka mea ki a ia, “Ka kite koe i ēnei whare nunui? E kore tētahi kōhatu e waiho i konei i runga ake i tētahi kōhatu, engari, ka whaka­horoa.” Ngā Raruraru me ngā Whakatoinga (Matiu 24.3-14; Ruka 21.7-19)
13.3: Ā, i a ia e noho ana i runga i Maunga Ōriwa i te rite­nga atu o te teme­para, ka ui puku ki a ia a Pita, a Hēmi, a Hoani, a Anaru,
13.4: “Kōrero­tia mai ki a mātou, ko āhea ēnei mea, ā, he aha te tohu ina tata ēnei mea katoa te rite?”
13.5: Nā, ka anga ia, ka kōrero ki a rātou, “Kia tūpato kei māminga­tia koutou e te tangata.
13.6: He toko­maha hoki e haere mai i runga i tōku ingoa, e mea, ‘Ko ahau ia!’ ā, he toko­maha e māminga­tia.
13.7: E rongo koutou ki ngā pakanga, ki ngā hau pakanga, kei oho­rere. Kua takoto hoki he pu­tanga mō aua mea; taihoa rawa ia te mutu­nga.
13.8: Ka whaka­tika hoki tētahi iwi ki tētahi iwi, tētahi ranga­tira­tanga ki tētahi ranga­tira­tanga; ā, he tini ngā wāhi e puta ai he rū; ka puta anō hoki he pō matekai. Ko te tīma­tanga ēnei o ngā mamae.
13.9: “Nā, kia tūpato ki a koutou: ka tukua hoki koutou ki ngā rū­nanga; ka whiua koutou i roto i ngā whare kara­kia; ā, ka whaka­tū­ria koutou ki te aro­aro o ngā kāwana, o ngā kīngi, mō te whaka­aro ki ahau, hei mea whaka­atu ki a rātou.
13.10: Kua takoto ia te tikanga kia mātua kauwhau­tia te rongo­pai ki ngā tauiwi katoa.
13.11: Ina, āra­hina koutou ki te whaka­wā, ā, ka tukua atu, kaua e mā­nuka­nuka wawe ki tā koutou e kōrero ai: engari, ko te mea e hoatu ki a koutou i taua hāora, ko tēnā tā koutou e kōrero ai: ehara hoki i te mea mā koutou ngā kōrero, engari, mā te Wairua Tapu.
13.12: Nā, ka tukua te tua­kana e te teina ki te mate, te tama­iti hoki e te pāpā; ā, ka whaka­tika ngā tama­riki ki ngā mātua, ka mea kia whaka­matea.
13.13: Ā, ka kino­ngia koutou e ngā tāngata katoa, he mea mō tōku ingoa. Ko te tangata ia e ū ana ā taea noatia te mutu­nga, ko ia e ora.” Te Mea Whakarihariha (Matiu 24.15-28; Ruka 21.20-24)
13.14: “Ā, ki te kite koutou i te mea whaka­riha­riha, i te mea whaka­ngaro e tū ana i te wāhi e kore e tika, kia mātau te kai­titiro puka­puka, ko reira me rere te hunga i Hūria ki ngā maunga.
13.15: Ko te tangata hoki i runga i te whare kaua e heke iho ki roto ki te whare, kaua hoki e tomo ki te tiki i tētahi mea i roto i tōna whare.
13.16: Kaua anō te tangata i te māra e hoki ki muri, ki te tiki i tōna kākahu.
13.17: Auē te mate mō te hunga e hapū ana, mō ngā mea hoki e whāngai ana ki te ū, i aua rā!
13.18: Mā koutou ia e īnoi kei roko­hanga koutou e te whati i te hōtoke.
13.19: He whaka­pāwera hoki aua rā, kāhore ōna rite o te oroko­hanga­nga rā anō i hangā nei e te Atua, ā, mohoa noa nei, kāhore hoki he pērā ā muri ake nei.
13.20: Me i kāhore hoki aua rā i poroa i waenga e te Ariki, e kore tētahi kiko­kiko e ora. Otirā, ka whaka­aroa te hunga whiri­whiri i whiri­whiria e ia, ā, poroa ana aua rā i waenga.
13.21: “Ki te mea tētahi ki a koutou i reira, ‘Nā, tēnei a te Karaiti.’ Nā, ‘Tērā!’ kaua e whaka­pono­hia.
13.22: E whaka­tika hoki ngā Karaiti teka, me ngā poro­piti teka, ka whaka­atu i ngā tohu me ngā mea whaka­mīharo, ā, me i taea, ka māminga­tia e rātou te hunga whiri­whiri.
13.23: Kia tūpato rā koutou; nā, kua kōrero­tia wawe­tia nei e ahau ngā mea katoa ki a koutou.” Te Haerenga Mai o te Tama a te Tangata (Matiu 24.29-31; Ruka 21.25-28)
13.24: “Nā, i aua rā, i muri iho i taua whaka­pāwera, ka whaka­pōuri­tia te rā, e kore hoki e titi te ata­rau,
13.25: ka taka iho ngā whetū o te rangi, ka ngā­ueue ngā mea kaha o ngā rangi.
13.26: Nā, ko reira kitea ai te Tama a te tangata e haere mai ana i runga i ngā kapua, me te kaha nui, me te korōria.
13.27: Ko reira anō ia tono ai i āna ana­hera, ā, ka hui­huia ana i whiri­whiri ai i ngā hau e whā, i te pito o te whenua tae noa ki te pito o te rangi.” Te Whakaakoranga mō te Rākau Piki (Matiu 24.32-35; Ruka 21.29-33)
13.28: “Nā, kia ākona koutou e te piki ki tētahi kupu whaka­rite. I tōna manga e ngā­wari ana, e puta ana hoki ngā rau, ka mōhio koutou ka tata te rau­mati.
13.29: Wai­hoki ko koutou, ina kite i ēnei mea e puta mai ana, ka mātau ka tata ia, kei ngā kūwaha.
13.30: He pono tāku e mea nei ki a koutou, E kore tēnei whaka­tupu­ranga e pahemo, kia puta rā anō ēnei mea katoa.
13.31: Ko te rangi me te whenua e pahemo, ko āku kupu ia e kore e pahemo.” Kāhore e Mōhiotia ana hei tēhea Rā, hei tēhea Hāora (Matiu 24.36-44)
13.32: “Otiia, kāhore tētahi tangata e mātau ki taua rā, ki taua hāora, kāhore ngā ana­hera o te rangi, kāhore te Tama, ko te Matua anake.
13.33: Kia tūpato, kia mata­ara, me te īnoi anō. Kāhore hoki koutou e mātau ki te wā, ko āhea rānei.
13.34: Ka rite hoki ki te tangata e haere ana ki tawhiti, mahue iho i a ia tōna whare, ā, tukua iho e ia ngā tikanga ki āna pono­nga, tāna mahi mā tētahi, mā tētahi, ka whaka­hau iho hoki ki te kai­tiaki tatau kia mata­ara.
13.35: Āe rā, kia mata­ara; kāhore hoki koutou e mātau ki te wā e haere mai ai te ranga­tira o te whare, ko te ahi­ahi, ko waenga­nui pō rānei, ko te tangi­hanga o te hei­hei, ko te atatū rānei;
13.36: kei puta whaka­rere mai, ka roko­hanga koutou e ia e moe ana.
13.37: Nā, ko tāku ka mea atu nei ki a koutou, e meatia ana anō ki te katoa: Kia mata­ara!”

14.1: Nā, kia rua ake ngā rā ko te Kape­nga me te Hākari o te Taro Rēwenakore. Nā, ka rapu ngā tohu­nga nui me ngā kara­ipi i tētahi tini­hanga e mau ai ia, e whaka­matea ai.
14.2: I mea hoki rātou, “Kauaka i te hākari, kei nga­ngau te iwi.” Ka Whakawahia a Īhu i Petani (Matiu 26.6-13; Hoani 12.1-8)
14.3: Ā, i a ia i Petani i te whare o Haimona repera, i a ia anō e noho ana ka haere mai tētahi wahine me tētahi pouaka kōhatu, kī tonu i te hinu kakara, he tino nara, he mea utu nui; ā, wāhia ana e ia te pouaka kōhatu, ringi­hia ana ki tōna māte­nga.
14.4: I riri anō ētahi i roto i a rātou, i mea, “Hei aha tēnei mau­mau o te hinu kakara?
14.5: Maha atu hoki i te toru rau ngā pene te utu me i hokona tēnei hinu, nā, ka hoatu ki te hunga rawa­kore.” Nā, ka amu­amu rātou ki a ia.
14.6: Ka mea atu a Īhu, “Waiho atu ū āna! He aha tā koutou e whaka­pā­wera­wera nā i a ia? He mahi pai tāna i mea nei ki ahau.
14.7: Kei a koutou tonu hoki te hunga rawa­kore i ngā wā katoa, hei ata­whai­tanga hoki rātou mā koutou i ngā wā e pai ai koutou; e kore ia ahau e noho tonu ki a koutou.
14.8: Kua mahia e ia te mea e taea e ia; kua whaka­wahia e ia i mua nei tōku tinana mō te tanu­manga.
14.9: He pono tāku e mea nei ki a koutou, Ko ngā wāhi katoa o te ao e kauwhau­tia ai tēnei rongo­pai, ka kōrero­tia anō tā tēnei wahine i mea ai, hei whaka­mahara ki a ia.” Ka Whakaae a Hūrā ki te Tuku i a Īhu (Matiu 26.14-16; Ruka 22.3-6)
14.10: Nā, ka haere a Hūrā Ikariote, tētahi o te tekau mā rua, ki ngā tohu­nga nui, ki te tuku i a ia ki a rātou.
14.11: Ā, nō ka rongo rātou, ka hari, ka whaka­ae kia hoatu he moni māna. Nā, ka rapu ia ki te wā pai e tukua ai ia. Ka Kainga e Īhu te Kapenga i te Taha i Āna Ākonga (Matiu 26.17-25; Ruka 22.7-14, 21-23; Hoani 13.21-30)
14.12: Ā, i te rā tua­tahi o te Taro Rēwenakore, i te wā e patua ai te Kape­nga, ka mea āna ākonga ki a ia, “Ko hea koe pai ai kia haere mātou ki te taka, kia kai ai koe i te Kape­nga?”
14.13: Nā, ka tonoa e ia toko­rua o āna ākonga, ka mea ki a rāua, “Haere ki te pā, ā, ka tūtaki mai ki a kōrua he tangata e mau ana i te tahā wai. Haere i muri i a ia.
14.14: Ā, ka mea ki te tangata o te whare e tomo ai ia, ‘E mea ana te Kai­whaka­ako, “Kei hea te rūma e kai ai mātou ko āku ākonga i te Kape­nga?” ’
14.15: Ā, māna tonu e whaka­atu ki a kōrua he rūma nui i runga, oti rawa te whā­riki, te whaka­pai. Hei reira taka ai mā tātou.”
14.16: Nā, haere ana āna ākonga, ā, nō te taenga ki te pā, ka kite i tāna i kōrero ai ki a rāua; ā, takā ana e rāua te Kape­nga.
14.17: Ā, nō ka ahi­ahi, ka haere atu ia me te tekau mā rua.
14.18: I a rātou e noho ana, e kai ana, ka mea a Īhu, “He pono tāku e mea nei ki a koutou, Ko tētahi o koutou, kei tōku taha nei e kai ana, māna ahau e tuku.”
14.19: Nā, ka pā te pōuri ki a rātou, ka kī taki­tahi ki a ia, “Ko ahau koia?”
14.20: Nā, ka mea ia ki a rātou, “Ko tētahi o te tekau mā rua, ko ia e tou­tou tahi nei māua ki te rīhi.
14.21: E haere ana te Tama a te tangata, e pērā ana me te mea i tuhi­tuhia mōna; otiia, auē te mate mō te tangata e tukua ai te Tama a te tangata! He mea pai kē mō taua tangata me i kaua ia e whānau.” Te Hapa a te Ariki (Matiu 26.26-30; Ruka 22.14-20; 1 Koriniti 11.23-25)
14.22: Ā, i a rātou e kai ana, ka mau ia ki te taro, ā, ka mutu te whaka­pai, ka whawhati, nā, ka hoatu ki a rātou, ka mea, “Tango­hia, kainga: ko tōku tinana tēnei.”
14.23: Nā, ka mau ia ki te kapu, ā, ka mutu te whaka­whetai, ka hoatu ki a rātou; ā, ka inumia e rātou katoa.
14.24: Ā, ka mea ia ki a rātou, “Ko ōku toto ēnei, ko ō te kawe­nata hou, e whaka­hekea ana mō te tini.
14.25: He pono tāku e mea nei ki a koutou, E kore ahau e inu atu anō i te hua o te wāina, kia taea rā anō taua rā e inumia houtia ai e ahau i te ranga­tira­tanga o te Atua.”
14.26: Ā, nō ka mutu tā rātou hīmene, ka haere rātou ki Maunga Ōriwa. Ka Poropiti a Īhu i te Whakakorenga a Pita (Matiu 26.31-35; Ruka 22.31-34; Hoani 13.36-38)
14.27: Kātahi a Īhu ka mea ki a rātou, “Ko koutou katoa nā ka hē. Kua oti hoki te tuhi­tuhi, ‘Ka patua e ahau te hēpara, ā, ko ngā hipi ka whaka­marara­tia.’
14.28: Otirā, muri iho i tōku aranga, ka haere ahau i mua i a koutou ki Kariri.”
14.29: Nā, ka mea a Pita ki a ia, “Ahakoa hē te katoa, ko ahau e kore!”
14.30: Ā, ka mea a Īhu ki a ia, “He pono tāku e mea nei ki a koe, ko ākua­nei, i tēnei pō anō, i te mea kāhore anō kia rua ngā tangi­hanga o te tī­kao­kao, ka toru āu whaka­kore­nga i ahau.”
14.31: Kātahi, ka tino ārita rawa tāna mea­tanga atu, “Ahakoa kua takoto te tikanga kia mate tahi au me koe, e kore ahau e whaka­kāhore i a koe.” I pērā anō te kōrero a rātou katoa. Ka Īnoi a Īhu i Kehemane (Matiu 26.36-46; Ruka 22.39-46)
14.32: Ā, ka tae rātou ki tētahi wāhi, e huaina ana ko Kehemane. Nā, ka mea atu ia ki āna ākonga, “Hei konei koutou noho ai, kia īnoi ahau.”
14.33: Nā, ka mau ia ki a Pita rātou ko Hēmi, ko Hoani, ā, ka tīmata te koera, te tū­mata­te­nga;
14.34: nā, ka mea ia ki a rātou, “Kei te tino pēhia tōku wairua e te pōuri, tata pū ki te mate; noho iho koutou i konei, kia mata­ara.”
14.35: Nā, ka haere ia ki pahaki tata atu, ka hinga ki te whenua, ka īnoi, me kāhore e āhei kia pahemo atu tēnei hāora i a ia.
14.36: Ā, ka mea ia, “E Apa, e Pā, ka taea e koe ngā mea katoa; tango­hia atu tēnei kapu i ahau. Otiia, kaua e waiho i tāku e pai ai, engari, i tāu.”
14.37: Nā, ka haere ia, ka roko­hanga atu e moe ana rātou, ā, ka mea ia ki a Pita, “E Haimona, kei te moe ia koe? E kore rānei e taea e koe te mata­ara kia kotahi hāora?
14.38: Kia mata­ara, me te īnoi, kei uru koutou ki te whaka­mā­tautau­ranga. Kei te hihiko te wairua, ko te kiko­kiko ia kei te ngoi­kore.”
14.39: Nā, ka haere atu anō ia, ka īnoi, me te whaka­hua i aua kupu anō.
14.40: Nā, ka hoki mai anō ia, ka roko­hanga e moe ana rātou, he nui hoki te tai­maha o ō rātou kanohi; ā, kīhai rātou i mātau ki tā rātou e whaka­hoki ai ki a ia.
14.41: Nā, haere ana anō ia, ko te toru o ngā haere­nga, ka mea ki a rātou, “E moe rā, whaka­tā i a koutou? Heoi rā, kua taea te hāora; nā, ka tukua te Tama a te tangata ki ngā ringa o te hunga hara.
14.42: Ma­ranga, ka haere tātou; nā, ka tata te kai­tuku i ahau.” Te Hopukanga o Īhu (Matiu 26.47-56; Ruka 22.47-53; Hoani 18.3-12)
14.43: Nā, ina­mata, i a ia tonu e kōrero ana, kua puta a Hūrā, tētahi o te tekau mā rua, me te tini o te tangata, me ngā hoari, me ngā patu, i ahu mai i ngā tohu­nga nui, i ngā kara­ipi, i ngā kaumātua.
14.44: Nā, kua oti tētahi tohu te whaka­rite ki a rātou e tōna kai­tuku; i mea ia, “Ko tāku tangata e kihi ai, ko ia tērā; hopu­kina, kia mau te ārahi atu.”
14.45: Nā, i tōna taenga mai, tika tonu ki a ia, ka mea, “E Rapi!” ā, kihi ana i a ia.
14.46: Nā, ka mau ō rātou ringa ki a ia, ā, hopu­kina ana ia.
14.47: Nā, ka unuhia e tētahi o te hunga e tū ana i reira tāna hoari, hāua iho e ia te pono­nga a te tohu­nga nui, poroa ana tōna tari­nga.
14.48: Nā, ka whaka­hoki a Īhu, ka mea ki a rātou, “He tāhae ahau, i haere mai ai koutou me ngā hoari, me ngā patu, ki te hopu i ahau?
14.49: I a koutou ahau e whaka­ako ana i te teme­para i tēnā rā, i tēnā rā, ā, kīhai koutou i hopu i ahau. Otirā, i mahia tēnei mea kia rite ai ngā karaipi­ture.”
14.50: Nā, whaka­rere ana rātou katoa i a ia, oma ana.
14.51: Nā, tērā tētahi tai­tama­riki i aru tahi mai me ia, takaia ai he kākahu rīnena ki runga ake i tōna kiri­kau. Nā, ka hopu­kina ia e rātou,
14.52: otirā, i whaka­rērea atu e ia te kākahu rīnena, ā, oma ta­ha­nga atu ana. Ko Īhu i te Aroaro o te Rūnanga (Matiu 26.57-68; Ruka 22.54-55, 63-71; Hoani 18.13-14, 19-24)
14.53: Nā, ka āra­hina atu e rātou a Īhu ki te tino tohu­nga, ā, ka hui­hui mai ki a ia ngā tohu­nga nui katoa, ngā kaumātua me ngā kara­ipi.
14.54: Nā, tērā a Pita te aru rā i a ia i tawhiti, tae noa ki roto, ki te marae o te tino tohu­nga; ā, tērā te noho rā me ngā kai­mahi, pā­ina­ina ai i a ia i te taha o te ahi.
14.55: Nā, i rapu ngā tohu­nga nui me te rū­nanga katoa i te kōrero mō Īhu, e whaka­matea ai; heoi, kīhai i kitea.
14.56: He toko­maha hoki ngā kai­whaka­pae teka mōna, otiia, kīhai i rite ā rātou kōrero.
14.57: Nā, ka whaka­tika ētahi, ka whaka­pae teka ki a ia, ka mea,
14.58: “I rongo mātou ki a ia e mea ana, ‘Māku e whaka­horo tēnei whare tapu i hangā nei e te ringa, ā, kia toru ngā rā ka hangā e ahau tētahi atu, ehara i te ringa i mahi.’ ”
14.59: Ā, ahakoa tērā kīhai ā rātou kōrero i rite­rite.
14.60: Nā, ka whaka­tika te tohu­nga nui i waenga­nui, ka ui ki a Īhu, ka mea, “Kāhore āu kupu? He aha tā ēnei e whaka­atu nei mōu?”
14.61: Heoi, kīhai ia i kuihi, kāhore hoki he kupu i whaka­hokia e ia. Nā, ka ui anō te tino tohu­nga ka mea ki a ia, “Ko koe rānei a te Karaiti, te Tama a tērā e Whaka­pai­ngia nei?”
14.62: Ka mea a Īhu ki a ia, “Ko ahau ia, ā, tērā koutou e kite i te Tama a te tangata e noho ana i te ringa matau o te kaha, e haere mai ana me ngā kapua o te rangi.”
14.63: Kātahi, ka hae­hae te tino tohu­nga i ōna kākahu, ka mea, “Hei aha atu mā tātou ētahi kai­whaka­atu anō?
14.64: Kua rongo koutou ki te kohu­kohu. E pēhea ana ō koutou whaka­aro?” Nā, ka whaka­ae rātou katoa ka tika te mate mōna.
14.65: Kātahi, ka anga ētahi, ka tuwha ki a ia, ka ārai i tōna kanohi, ka kuru i a ia, ā, ka mea ki a ia, “Poro­piti mai!” Ā, ka paki­pakia ia e ngā kai­mahi ki ō rātou ringa. Ka Whakakorengia a Īhu e Pita (Matiu 26.69-75; Ruka 22.56-62; Hoani 18.15-18, 25-27)
14.66: Ā, i a Pita i te marae i raro, ka haere mai tētahi o ngā kōtiro a te tino tohu­nga.
14.67: Ā, i tōna kite­nga i a Pita e pā­ina­ina ana, ka ti­tiro atu ki a ia, ā, ka mea, “Ko koe anō tētahi i te tangata o Nahareta, arā i a Īhu.”
14.68: Otirā, ka whaka­kāhore ia, ka mea, “Kāhore rawa ahau i mātau, i mārama rānei ki tāu e kōrero mai nā.” Nā, ka puta atu ia ki te whaka­mahau, ā, ka tangi te tī­kao­kao.
14.69: Ā, ka kite te kōtiro i a ia, ka anga anō, ka kōrero ki te hunga e tū tata ana, “Nō rātou hoki tēnei.”
14.70: Otirā, ka whaka­kāhore anō ia. Ā muri tata iho ka kōrero anō ki a Pita te hunga e tū tata ana, “He pono ko koe tētahi o rātou; nō Kariri hoki koe.”
14.71: Kātahi ia ka tīmata te kanga, te oati, “Kāhore ahau e mātau ki tēnā tangata e kōrero nā koutou.”
14.72: I reira ka tangi anō te tī­kao­kao, ko te tuarua o ngā tangi­hanga. Nā, ka mahara a Pita ki te kupu i kōrero ai a Īhu ki a ia, “E kore e tuarua te tangi o te tī­kao­kao, ka toru āu whaka­kāhore­tanga i ahau.” Ā, ka whaka­aroa iho e ia, nā, ka tangi.

15.1: Ā, mea kau ake te ata, ka rū­nanga ngā tohu­nga nui, ngā kaumātua, ngā kara­ipi, me te rū­nanga katoa, ā, ka herea e rātou a Īhu, ka āra­hina atu, ā, tukua atu ana ki a Pirato.
15.2: Ka ui a Pirato ki a ia, “Ko koe rānei te Kīngi o ngā Hūrai?” Ka whaka­hokia e ia ki a ia, “Kua kōrero­tia nā e koe.”
15.3: He maha hoki ngā mea i whaka­paea ki a ia e ngā tohu­nga nui.
15.4: Ka ui anō a Pirato ki a ia, ka mea, “Kāhore āu kupu whaka­hoki? Nā, te tini o ngā kupu e kōrero nei rātou mōu.”
15.5: Heoi, kāhore a Īhu i whaka­hoki atu anō; nō, ka mīharo a Pirato. Ka Tukua a Īhu kia Rīpekatia (Matiu 27.15-26; Ruka 23.13-25; Hoani 18.39–19.16)
15.6: Nā, i taua hākari kotahi te here­here e tukua ana e ia ki a rātou, ko tā rātou e īnoi ai.
15.7: Nā, i reira tētahi tangata ko Parapa te ingoa, e here tahi ana me ōna hoa tutū, he hunga i patu tangata i te nga­ngare­tanga.
15.8: Nā, ka haere te mano, ka anga, ka tono ki a ia kia pērā­tia me tāna i mea ai ki a rātou i mua.
15.9: Nā, ka whaka­hoki a Pirato ki a rātou, ka mea, “E pai ana rānei koutou kia tukua e ahau ki a koutou te Kīngi o ngā Hūrai?”
15.10: I mahara hoki ia he hae i tukua ai ia e ngā tohu­nga nui.
15.11: Otirā, ka whaka­tūtehu­tia e rātou te mano, kia tukua e ia ko Parapa kē ki a rātou.
15.12: Nā, ka whaka­hoki anō a Pirato, ka mea ki a rātou, “He aha oti tā koutou e pai ai kia meatia e ahau ki tēnei e huaina nei e koutou ko te Kīngi o ngā Hūrai?”
15.14: Nā, ka mea a Pirato ki a rātou, “He aha koia tāna kino i mea ai?” Heoi, nui noa atu tā rātou hāmama, “Rīpekatia ia!”
15.15: Nā, i tōna hia­hia kia whaka­mārie­tia te mano, tukua ana e Pirato a Parapa ki a rātou, ā, ka oti a Īhu te whiu, ka tukua kia rīpeka­tia. Ka Whakatoitoi ngā Hōia i a Īhu (Matiu 27.27-31; Hoani 19.2-3)
15.16: Nā, ka āra­hina ia e ngā hōia ki te marae, arā, ki te whare whaka­wā, ā, kāranga­ranga­tia ana te rōpū katoa.
15.17: Ka whaka­kākahu­ria ia ki te kākahu pāpura, ā, ka oti tētahi karauna tā­tarā­moa te whiri, ka pōtaea ki a ia.
15.18: Nā, ka anga rātou, ka oha ki a ia, “Tēnā koe, e te Kīngi o ngā Hūrai!”
15.19: Patua ana e rātou tōna māte­nga ki te kākaho, tuwha ana ki a ia, ka tuku i ngā turi ki a ia, ā, koro­piko ana ki a ia.
15.20: Ā, nō ka mutu tā rātou taunu ki a ia, ka tango­hia te kahu pāpura i a ia, nā, whaka­kākahu­ria ana ia ki ōna ake kākahu, ā, āra­hina ana ia kia rīpeka­tia. Ka Ripekatia a Īhu (Matiu 27.32-44; Ruka 23.26-43; Hoani 19.17-27)
15.21: Nā, ka meinga e rātou tētahi tangata e tika ana nā reira, a Haimona o Hairini, i ahu mai i ngā whenua, ko te pāpā o Arēhanera rāua ko Rupuha, kia haere me rātou, kia riro ai māna e amo tōna rīpeka.
15.22: Nā, ka āra­hina ia ki tētahi wāhi, ki Korokota, tōna tikanga ina, whaka­māori­tia “Ko te Wāhi Anga­anga.”
15.23: Ā, hoatu ana ki a ia he wāina, he mea whaka­nanu ki te maira, kia inumia; otirā, kīhai i tango­hia e ia.
15.24: Ā, rīpeka­tia ana ia e rātou, ka wehe­wehea ōna kākahu, he mea maka ki te rota, kia kitea ai ko te aha e riro i tētahi, i tētahi.
15.25: Nā, ko te toru tērā o ngā hāora, ā, ka rīpeka­tia ia e rātou.
15.26: Ko te mea i whaka­wā­kia ai ia i tuhi­tuhia ki runga, “Ko te Kīngi o ngā Hūrai.”
15.27: Nā, toko­rua ngā tāhae i rīpeka­tia ngā­tahi­tia me ia; ko tētahi ki matau, ko tētahi ki tōna mauī.
15.28: Nā, ka rite te karaipi­ture e mea nei, “I tāua ngā­tahi­tia ia me te hunga hara.”
15.29: Ko te hunga e hāere­ere ana i reira ka tāwai ki a ia, ka rūrū i ō rātou māte­nga, ka mea, “Ha, ko koe ka whaka­horo nei i te whare tapu, ka hangā nei anō i ngā rā e toru!
15.30: Whaka­ora i a koe anō, ka heke iho i te rīpeka!”
15.31: Wai­hoki ko ngā tohu­nga nui ka tāwai i a ia, rātou ko ngā kara­ipi, ka mea, “Ko ērā atu i whaka­ora­ngia e ia, tē taea e ia te whaka­ora a ia ake anō!
