15.32: Tēnā rā, kia heke iho āia­nei a te Karaiti, te Kīngi o Īharaira, i te rīpeka, kia kite ai tātou, kia whaka­pono ai.” I tāwai hoki ki a ia te hunga i rīpeka­tia ngā­tahi­tia me ia. Te Matenga o Īhu (Matiu 27.45-56; Ruka 23.44-49; Hoani 19.28-30)
15.33: Ā, nō ka tae ki te ono o ngā hāora, ka pōuri a runga o te whenua katoa, taea noatia te iwa o ngā hāora.
15.34: Ā, i te iwa o ngā hāora ka karanga a Īhu, he nui te reo, ka mea, “Eroi, Eroi, rama hapaka­tani?” Ko te tikanga tēnei ina whaka­māori­tia, “E tōku Atua, e tōku Atua, he aha koe i whaka­rere ai i ahau?”
15.35: Ā, nō te rongo­nga o ētahi o te hunga e tū ana i reira, ka mea, “Nana, e karanga ana ia i a Irāia.”
15.36: Nā, ka oma tētahi, ka whaka­kī i tētahi hau­tai ki te winika, whaka­noho­ia ana ki te kākaho, ka hoatu kia inumia e ia, ka mea, “Kāti; tēnā kia kite tātou me kore a Irāia e haere mai ki te tango i a ia ki raro.”
15.37: Nā, he nui te reo i puaki i a Īhu, ā, hemo ake.
15.38: Ā, ka wāhia te ārai o te teme­para i waenga­nui pū mai i runga ki raro.
15.39: Ā, nō te kite­nga o te kene­turio, e tū hāngai atu ana ki a ia, i pērā te āhua o tāna tuku­nga i tōna wairua, ka mea ia, “He pono ko te Tama a te Atua tēnei tangata.”
15.40: Nā, i reira ētahi wāhine e mā­taki­taki ana mai i tawhiti; i roto i a rātou a Meri Makarini, a Meri hoki whaea o Hēmi, te mea iti, rāua ko Hohi, me Hāromi;
15.41: arā, ko ngā wāhine i aru nei i a ia, i a ia i Kariri, i mahi mea nei māna; me ētahi atu wāhine toko­maha i haere tahi mai nei me ia ki Hiruhārama. Te Tanumanga o Īhu (Matiu 27.57-61; Ruka 23.50-56; Hoani 19.38-42)
15.42: Nā, ka ahi­ahi, i te mea ko te rā Taka­nga, arā, ko te rā i mua ake o te hāpati.
15.43: Ka haere mai a Hōhepa o Arimatia, he ranga­tira rū­nanga, he tangata nui tonu, e tatari ana anō hoki ia ki te ranga­tira­tanga o te Atua; ā, ka haere māia tonu ki a Pirato, ka īnoi i te tinana o Īhu.
15.44: Nā, ka mīharo a Pirato, hua noa kāhore anō i mate; ka karanga­tia e ia te kene­turio, ka ui ki a ia, me­he­mea kua mate atu rā ia.
15.45: Ā, nō ka rongo ki te kene­turio kua mate, ka whaka­ae­tia e ia te tinana ki a Hōhepa.
15.46: Nā, ka hokona e tērā he rīnena, ka tango­hia mai ia ki raro, ā, takaia ana ki te rīnena; whaka­takoto­ria ana ia ki roto ki te urupā kua hāua atu ki te kāmaka, ā, whaka­takā atu ana he kōhatu ki te kūwaha o te urupā.
15.47: I kite a Meri Makarini, rāua ko Meri whaea o Hohi, i te wāhi i whaka­takoto­ria ai ia.

16.1: Ā, nō te pahemo­tanga o te hāpati, ka hokona he mea kakara e Meri Makarini, e Meri whaea o Hēmi, e Hāromi, kia haere ai rātou ki te whaka­wahi i a ia.
16.2: Nā, i te atatū o te rā tua­tahi o te wiki, ka haere rātou ki te urupā i te pu­tanga mai o te rā;
16.3: ka kōrero­rero ki a rātou anō, “Ko wai rā hei whaka­taka mā tātou i te kōhatu i te kūwaha o te urupā?”
16.4: Ā, i tā rātou tiro­hanga ake, ka kite kua huri­hia atu te kōhatu; he mea nui whaka­hara­hara hoki.
16.5: Ā, nō ka tomo rātou ki te urupā, ka kite rātou i tētahi tai­tama­riki e noho ana i te taha matau, he kākahu mā tōna; nā, ka koera rātou.
16.6: Ā, ka mea ia ki a rātou, “Kaua e koera! E rapu ana koutou i a Īhu o Nahareta i rīpeka­tia. Kua ara ia; kāhore ia i konei. Tēnā! ti­tiro ki te wāhi i whaka­takoto­ria ai ia!
16.7: Engari haere, kōrero­tia atu ki āna ākonga, ki a Pita hoki, kei te haere ia i mua i a koutou ki Kariri. Ko reira koutou kite ai i a ia, pērā i tāna i mea ai ki a koutou.”
16.8: Nā, ka puta atu rātou, ā, oma ana i te urupā; kua tae mai hoki te tūiri, te koera ki a rātou. Kīhai rawa i kōrero ki tētahi tangata; nō te mea i wehi rātou. Ka Whakakitea a Īhu ki a Meri Makarini (Matiu 28.9-10; Hoani 20.11-18)
16.9: Nā, i tōna aranga ake i te atatū o te rā tua­tahi o te wiki, ka whaka­kite tua­tahi ia ki a Meri Makarini, i peia nei e ia e whitu ngā rēwera i roto i a ia.
16.10: Nā, ka haere tērā ka kōrero ki te hunga i piri rā ki a ia i mua, i a rātou e pōuri ana, e tangi ana.
16.11: Ā, ko rātou, i tō rātou rongo­nga kei te ora ia, ā, kua kitea e ia, kāhore i whaka­pono. Ka Kitea a Īhu e ētahi Ākonga Tokorua (Ruka 24.13-35)
16.12: Nā, i muri iho i ēnei mea, ka puta ia, he āhua kē tōna, ki ētahi atu o rātou, toko­rua, i a rāua e haere ana, e anga ana ki ngā whenua.
16.13: Nā, ka haere hoki ēnā ka kōrero ki ētahi atu o rātou; otirā kāhore ērā i whaka­pono. Ka Kitea a Īhu e te tekau mā tahi (Matiu 28.16-20; Ruka 24.36-49; Hoani 20.19-23; Ngā Mahi 1.6-8)
16.14: Muri iho ka puta ia ki te tekau mā tahi, i a rātou e noho ana ki te kai, ā, rīria iho e ia tō rātou whaka­pono kore, me te pakeke o te ngākau, mō rātou kīhai i whaka­pono ki te hunga i kite nei i a ia kua ara.
16.15: Ka mea ki a rātou, “Haere koutou ki te ao katoa, kauwhau­tia te rongo­pai ki ngā tāngata katoa.
16.16: Ko ia e whaka­pono ana, ka oti te iri­iri, ka whaka­ora­ngia; otirā, ko te tangata e kore e whaka­pono, ka whaka­taua te hē ki a ia.
16.17: Ka whai tahi hoki ēnei tohu i te hunga e whaka­pono ana. Mā tōku ingoa rātou ka pei rēwera ai; ka kōrero­tia ai e rātou ngā reo hou;
16.18: ka tango ake ai rātou i ngā nākahi; ā, ki te inu i tētahi mea whaka­mate, e kore rātou e ahatia; ka pā ō rātou ringa ki ngā tūroro, ā, ka ora.” Ka Tangohia ake a Īhu ki te Rangi (Ruka 24.50-53; Ngā Mahi 1.9-11)
16.19: Nā, i te mutu­nga o tāna kōrero ki a rātou, ka tango­hia atu te Ariki a Īhu ki te rangi, ā, noho ana ki te ringa matau o te Atua.
16.20: Nā, haere ana rātou, kauwhau ana i ngā wāhi katoa, me te mahi tahi anō te Ariki me rātou, me te whakaū i te kupu ki ngā tohu e whai ana i muri. Āmine.

1.1: Nā, i te mea he toko­maha kua anga ki te whaka­kaupapa i te kōrero o ngā mea kua whaka­tutuki­tia nei i waenga­nui i a tātou.
1.2: He mea whaka­rite ki ngā mea i hōmai ki a tātou e te hunga i kite ā-kanohi, i mahi hoki i te kupu.
1.3: Koia ahau i mahara ai, i te mea kua āta whaka­takina iho e ahau ngā mea katoa i te tīma­tanga mai, kia tuhi­tuhi whaka­tepe atu ki a koe, e Tiopira, e te tangata pai rawa,
1.4: kia mātau ai koe ki te tūturu­tanga o ngā mea i whaka­akona ai koe. Ka Pānuitia te Whānautanga o Hoani Kaiiriiri
1.5: Nō mua, nō ngā rā o Herora kīngi o Hūria, tērā tohu­nga, ko Hakaraia te ingoa, nō te wiki o Apia. Ko tāna wahine hoki nō ngā tamā­hine a Ārona, ko Erihāpeti tōna ingoa.
1.6: He hunga tika hoki rāua i te aro­aro o te Atua, kāhore he hē o tā rāua haere i runga i ngā kupu ako katoa, i ngā tikanga a te Ariki.
1.7: Nā, kāhore ā rāua tama­riki, he pākoko hoki a Erihāpeti, ā, i taua wā kua maha haere rawa ngā rā o tētahi, o tētahi.
1.8: Nā, tūpono tonu, i a ia e mahi ana i ā te tohu­nga mahi i te aro­aro o te Atua i te taka­nga o tāna wiki,
1.9: e whaka­rite ana i ngā rite­nga a ngā tohu­nga, ka taka māna te haere ki roto ki te whare tapu o te Ariki, tahu ai i te whaka­kakara.
1.10: Nā, i waho te nuinga katoa o te iwi e īnoi ana i te hāora whaka­kakara.
1.11: Ā, ka puta mai ki a ia tētahi ana­hera a te Ariki e tū ana i te taha matau o te āta whaka­kakara.
1.12: Nā, ka oho­rere a Hakaraia i tōna kite­nga i a ia, ā, tau ana te wehi ki a ia.
1.13: Otirā, ka mea te ana­hera ki a ia, “Kaua e wehi, e Hakaraia. Kua rangona hoki tāu īnoi, ā, ka whānau i tāu wahine, i a Erihāpeti, he tama māu, ā, ka huaina e koe tōna ingoa ko Hoani.
1.14: Ā, ka whi­whi koe i te hari me te hara­koa; ā, he toko­maha hoki e hari i tōna whānau­tanga.
1.15: E nui hoki ia i te aro­aro o te Atua. E kore ia e inu i te wāina, i te wai whaka­hau­rangi rānei; ā, ka kī ia i te Wairua Tapu, mai anō o te kōpū o tōna whaea.
1.16: He toko­maha anō hoki o ngā tama a Īharaira ka whaka­tahuri­tia e ia ki te Ariki, ki tō rātou Atua.
1.17: Ka haere anō ia i tōna aro­aro i runga i te wairua, i te mana, o Irāia, hei whaka­tahuri i ngā ngākau o ngā mātua ki ngā tama­riki, i te hunga whaka­tuturi ki ngā whaka­aro o te hunga tika; hei whaka­rite mō te Ariki i tētahi iwi i āta takā mōna.”
1.18: Nā, ko te mea­tanga a Hakaraia ki te ana­hera, “Mā te aha ka mātau ai ahau ki tēnei mea? He koro­heke nei hoki ahau, kua maha haere hoki ngā rā o tāku wahine.”
1.19: Nā, ka whaka­hoki te ana­hera, ka mea ki a ia, “Ko Kapariera ahau, kei te aro­aro o te Atua tōku tū­ranga; kua tonoa mai hoki ahau ki te kōrero ki a koe ki te whaka­puaki i tēnei rongo pai ki a koe.
1.20: Nana, ka noho puku koe, kāhore hoki e puta te kōrero i a koe, kia tae mai rā anō te rā e meatia ai ēnei mea, mōu kīhai i whaka­pono ki āku kupu, ka mana nei i te wā e rite ai.”
1.21: Ā, tatari tonu te iwi ki a Hakaraia, me te mīharo anō i a ia e whaka­roa ana i roto i te whare tapu.
1.22: Ā, i tōna pu­tanga mai ki waho, kīhai ia i āhei te kōrero ki a rātou; ā, ka mōhio rātou kua kite ia i tētahi pu­tanga atua ki a ia i roto i te whare tapu. Hono tonu tāna wai­tohu ki a rātou me te wa­hangū anō.
1.23: Ā, ka rite ngā rā hei minita­tanga māna, ka hoki ia ki tōna whare.
1.24: Nā, muri iho i aua rā ka hapū tāna wahine, a Erihāpeti, ā, e rima ngā marama i whaka­ngaro ai i a ia, ā, i mea ia,
1.25: “Ko tā te Ariki tēnei i mea ai ki ahau, i ngā rā i ti­tiro mai ai ia, ki te whaka­mutu i tōku tāwai­nga i roto i ngā tāngata.” Ka Pānuitia te Whānautanga o Īhu
1.26: Nā, i te ono o ngā marama ka tonoa a Kapariera, te ana­hera, e te Atua ki tētahi pā o Kariri, ko Nahareta te ingoa,
1.27: ki tētahi wāhina i tau­mau­tia mā tētahi tangata, ko Hōhepa te ingoa, nō te whare o Rāwiri; ko te ingoa o te wāhina ko Meri.
1.28: Nā, ko tōna haere­nga ki roto, ki a ia, ka mea, “Tēnā koe, e te wahine kua manako­hia nei; kei a koe te Ariki, ko koe te manaaki­tia i roto i ngā wāhine.”
1.29: Otirā he nui tōna oho ki taua kupu, ka whaka­aro­aro ki te tikanga o tēnei oha­tanga.
1.30: Nā, ka mea te ana­hera ki a ia, “Kei wehi koe, e Meri; kua pai­ngia hoki koe e te Atua.
1.31: Nana, tērā koe e hapū, ka whānau he tama, ā, ka huaina e koe tōna ingoa ko Īhu.
1.32: Ka nui ia, ka kīa hoki ko te Tama a te Runga Rawa; ā, ka hoatu ki a ia e te Ariki, e te Atua, te torōna o Rāwiri, o tōna pāpā.
1.33: Hei kīngi hoki ia mō te whare o Hākopa ake ake; e kore anō e mutu tōna ranga­tira­tanga.”
1.34: Nā, ka mea a Meri ki te ana­hera, “E pēhea­tia tēnei, kāhore nei hoki ahau e mōhio ki te tāne?”
1.35: Nā, ka whaka­hoki te ana­hera, ka mea ki a ia, “Ka tae te Wairua Tapu ki runga ki a koe, ka tau­maru­maru iho te kaha o te Runga Rawa ki runga ki a koe; nō reira hoki ka kīa te mea e whānau mai he tapu, ko te Tama a te Atua.
1.36: Nā, ko tōu whanau­nga, ko Erihāpeti, kua hapū hoki ia i tōna rūruhi­tanga, he tama; ā, ko te ono tēnei o ngā marama ki a ia, i kīa rā he pākoko.
1.37: Kāhore hoki he kupu i ahu mai i te Atua i kore e whai mana!”
1.38: Anō rā ko Meri, “Inā, te pono­nga a te Ariki; kia pērā­tia ahau me tāu i kōrero ai.” Ā, mawehe atu ana te ana­hera i a ia. Ka Tono a Meri i a Erihāpeti
1.39: Nā, ka whaka­tika a Meri i aua rā, ā, haere kaikā ana ki te whenua puke­puke ki tētahi pā o Hūrā;
1.40: ā, ka tomo ki te whare o Hakaraia, ka oha ki a Erihāpeti.
1.41: Ā, nō te rongo­nga o Erihāpeti, i te oha a Meri, ka koiri te tama­iti i roto i tōna kōpū; nā, kua kī a Erihāpeti i te Wairua Tapu.
1.42: Ā, he nui tōna reo ki te karanga, ka mea, “Ka manaaki­tia koe i roto i ngā wāhine, ka manaaki­tia anō te hua o tōu kōpū.
1.43: Nō hea hoki tēnei ki ahau, kia haere mai te whaea o tōku Ariki ki ahau?
1.44: Nā, pā kau mai te reo o tāu oha ki ōku tari­nga, ka oho te tama­iti i tōku kōpū i te hari.
1.45: Ka koa anō ia e whaka­pono ana, ka whaka­ritea hoki ngā mea i kōrero­tia ki a ia e te Ariki.” Te Waiata Whakawhetai a Meri
1.46: Ā, ka mea a Meri, “Ka whaka­nui tōku wairua i te Ariki;
1.47: e hari ana tōku wairua ki te Atua, ki tōku Kai­whaka­ora;
1.48: mōna i ti­tiro ki te iti o tāna pono­nga; tā te mea hoki kātahi ahau ka kīa e ngā whaka­tupu­ranga katoa e haere ake nei, he wahine hari.
1.49: He nui hoki ngā mahi a te Mea Kaha ki ahau. He tapu hoki tōna ingoa;
1.50: he mahi tohu tāna ki te hunga e wehi ana ki a ia, ki tēnei whaka­tupu­ranga, ki tēnei whaka­tupu­ranga.
1.51: Kua whaka­puta­ina he kaha e ia, arā e tōna ringa; nāna te hunga whaka­kake i marara ai, i te whaka­aro o ō rātou ngākau.
1.52: Kua whaka­takā e ia ngā piriniha i ō rātou torōna, ā, whaka­tei­tei­tia ake ana te hunga iti.
1.53: Kua whaka­kīa e ia te hunga mate hia­kai ki ngā mea pai; kua tonoa kautia atu te hunga taonga.
1.54: Kua tau­tokona e ia a Īharaira, tāna pono­nga, he whaka­mahara hoki ki tāna mahi tohu.
1.55: Ki a Āperahama rātou ko tāna whānau ake tonu atu, pērā hoki me tāna i kōrero ai ki ō tātou mātua.”
1.56: Nā, tata tonu ki te toru marama a Meri e noho ana ki a ia, ā, hoki ana ki tōna whare. Te Whānautanga o Hoani Kaiiriiri
1.57: Ā, ka rite te tāima o Erihāpeti, e whānau ai; nā, ka whānau he tama.
1.58: Ā, ka rongo te hunga e noho tata ana, me ōna whanau­nga, kua whaka­nuia e te Ariki tōna aroha ki a ia; nā, ka hari tahi me ia.
1.59: Ā, i te waru o ngā rā ka haere mai rātou ki te kokoti i te tama­iti; ka mea kia huaina e rātou ko Hakaraia, ko te ingoa o tōna pāpā.
1.60: Nā, ka whaka­hoki tōna whaea, ka mea, “Kāhore; engari me hua ia ko Hoani.”
1.61: Nā, ko tā rātou mea­tanga ki a ia, “Arā, kāhore tēnei ingoa i huaina ki tētahi o ōu whanau­nga.”
1.62: Nā, ka ui rātou ki tōna pāpā, he mea wai­tohu, ko wai tāna e pai ai kia huaina ki a ia.
1.63: Ka mea ia ki tētahi papa tuhi­tuhi, ā, ka tuhi­tuhi, ka mea, “Ko Hoani hei ingoa mōna.” Ā, mīharo ana rātou katoa.
1.64: Nā, whai reo tonu iho tōna māngai, ka matara tōna arero, ka kōrero ia, ka whaka­pai ki te Atua.
1.65: Ā, tau ana te wehi ki te hunga katoa e noho tata ana ki a rātou, ka kōrero­tia ēnei mea katoa puta noa i te whenua puke­puke katoa o Hūria.
1.66: Nā, ka rongoā­tia ēnei mea e te hunga katoa i rangona ai ki roto ki ō rātou ngākau, ka mea, “He tama­iti aha ianei tēnei?” I a ia hoki te ringa o te Ariki. Te Poropititanga a Hakaraia
1.67: Nā, kua kī a Hakaraia, tōna pāpā, i te Wairua Tapu, ka poro­piti, ka mea:
1.68: “Kia whaka­pai­ngia te Ariki, te Atua o Īharaira! Kua ti­tiro mai hoki ia, kua hoko i tāna iwi.
1.69: Kua whaka­ara­hia ake e ia he hāona whaka­ora mō tātou, i roto i te whare o Rāwiri, o tāna pono­nga.
1.70: Ko tāna hoki ia i kōrero­tia e te māngai o āna poro­piti tapu, nō te tīma­tanga mai anō o te ao;
1.71: hei whaka­ora i a tātou i ō tātou hoa whawhai, i te ringa anō o te hunga katoa e kino ana ki a tātou;
1.72: hei whaka­puta i te mahi tohu ki ō tātou tūpuna, hei whaka­mahara ki tāna kawe­nata tapu.
1.73: Ki te oati i oati ai ia ki a Āperahama, ki tō tātou tupuna,
1.74: kia tukua mai e ia ki a tātou he ora i te ringa o ō tātou hoa whawhai, kia mahi wehi­kore tātou ki a ia,
1.75: i runga i te tapu, i te tika, ki tōna aro­aro, i ngā rā katoa e ora ai tātou.
1.76: “Ā, ko koe, e tama, ka kīa ko te poro­piti a te Runga Rawa. E haere hoki koe i te aro­aro o te Ariki, hei whaka­pai i ōna ara;
1.77: hei whaka­mātau i tāna iwi ki te ora, i ō rātou hara e murua ana.
1.78: He mea hoki nā te aroha, nā te mahi tohu a tō tātou Atua; nā reira hoki i puta mai ai te pūao­tanga o runga ki a tātou,
1.79: hei whaka­mārama i te hunga e noho ana i te pōuri, i te ātā­rangi hoki o te mate, hei whaka­tika i ō tātou wae­wae ki te hua­rahi o te rangi­mārie.”
1.80: Nā, ka tupu taua tama­iti, ā, ka kaha haere tōna wairua; ā, noho ana i ngā koraha, taea noatia te rā e whaka­kitea ai ia ki a Īharaira.

2.1: I aua rā ka whaka­takoto­ria he tikanga e Hīhā Ākuhata kia tuhi­tuhia te ao katoa.
2.2: Ko te tuhi­tuhi­nga tua­tahi tēnei i meatia i te wā ko Kuirinia te kāwana o Hīria.
2.3: Ā, ka haere ngā tāngata katoa kia tuhi­tuhia, ia tangata, ia tangata, ki tōna ake pā.
2.4: I haere atu anō a Hōhepa i Kariri, i te pā, i Nahareta, ki Hūria, ki te pā o Rāwiri, ko Pēterehema te ingoa; nō te mea nō te whare ia, nō te kāwei o Rāwiri.
2.5: Kia tuhi­tuhia ai rāua ko tāna wahine taumau, ko Meri, e hapū ana ia.
2.6: Ā, i a rāua i reira, ka rite ngā rā e whānau ai ia.
2.7: Nā, ka whānau tāna mātā­mua, ā, takaia ana e ia ki ngā kākahu, ka whaka­takoto­ria ki te takoto­ranga kai mā ngā kararehe; nō te mea kāhore he wāhi mō rātou i te whare. Ngā Hēpara me ngā Anahera
2.8: I taua wāhi hoki ētahi hēpara e noho koraha ana, e tiaki ana i tā rātou kāhui i te pō.
2.9: Nā, tū ana tētahi ana­hera a te Ariki i ō rātou taha, ā, whiti ana te korōria o te Ariki ki a rātou, ā, tawhio noa; ā, nui whaka­hara­hara tō rātou wehi.
2.10: Nā, ka mea te ana­hera ki a rātou, “Kaua e mataku, tā te mea he kai­kauwhau tēnei ahau ki a koutou mō te hari nui, meāke puta mai ki te iwi katoa.
2.11: Nō nāia­nei hoki i whānau ai he Kai­whaka­ora mō koutou i te pā o Rāwiri, arā a te Karaiti, te Ariki.
2.12: Ko te tohu tēnei ki a koutou; e kite koutou i te tama­iti ka oti te tākai ki te kākahu, e takoto ana i te takoto­ranga kai mā ngā kararehe.”
2.13: Nā, oho­rere tonu ko tētahi ope nui o te rangi e tū tahi ana me taua ana­hera, e whaka­moe­miti ana ki te Atua, e mea ana:
2.14: “Kia whai korōria te Atua i runga rawa, kia mau te rongo ki runga ki te whenua, me te whaka­aro pai ki ngā tāngata!”
2.15: Ā, ka mawehe atu ngā ana­hera i a rātou ki te rangi, ka mea ngā hēpara tētahi ki tētahi, “Tātou ka haere ki Pēterehema, kia kite i tēnei mea kua puta nei, kua whaka­pua­kina mai nei e te Ariki ki a tātou.”
2.16: Nā, kaikā tonu tā rātou haere, ā, ka kite i a Meri, i a Hōhepa i te tama­iti hoki e takoto ana i te takoto­ranga kai mā ngā kararehe.
2.17: Ā, nō ka kite, ka whaka­pua­kina te mea i kōrero­tia ki a rātou mō tēnei tama­iti.
2.18: Ā, mīharo ana ngā kai­whaka­rongo katoa ki ēnei mea, i kōrero­tia nei ki a rātou e ngā hēpara.
2.19: Ko Meri ia i āta rongoā i ēnei mea katoa, me te whaka­aro­aro i roto i tōna ngākau.
2.20: Nā, ka hoki ngā hēpara, me te whaka­korōria, me te whaka­moe­miti ki te Atua mō ngā mea katoa i rongo nei, i kite nei rātou, i rite nei ki ngā mea i kōrero­tia ki a rātou. Ka Whakaingoatia a Īhu
2.21: Ā, nō ka rite ngā rā e waru, e kotia ai te tama­iti, ka huaina tōna ingoa ko Īhu, ko tā te ana­hera i hua ai i te mea kāhore anō i hapū tōna whaea. Ka Tāpaea a Īhu i roto i te Temepara
2.22: Ā, ka rite ngā rā e purea ai te whaea, e whaka­ritea ai te ture a Mohi, ka kawea ia e rātou ki Hiruhārama, kia tāpaea ki te Ariki.
2.23: Kia pērā­tia me te mea i tuhi­tuhia ki te ture a te Ariki: “Ko ngā tāne katoa e oroko puta mai i te kōpū, e kīa he tapu ki te Ariki.”
2.24: Kia hoatu anō he patu­nga tapu, te mea i kōrero­tia i roto i te ture a te Ariki, kia rua kūkupa, kia rua rānei pī kūkupa.
2.25: Nā, i Hiruhārama tētahi tangata, ko Himiona te ingoa; he tangata tika, he tangata whaka­aro, e tatari ana ki te whaka­hari­nga o Īharaira, kei runga hoki te Wairua Tapu i a ia.
2.26: Nā, kua whaka­mahara­tia ia e te Wairua Tapu, e kore ia e kite i te mate, kia kite rā anō ia i tā te Ariki Karaiti.
2.27: Nā, ka haere ia ki te teme­para, he mea­tanga nā te Wairua; ā, i ngā mātua e mau ana i te tama­iti, i a Īhu, kia meatia ai e rāua ki a ia tā te ture i whaka­rite ai,
2.28: ka tango ia i a ia ki ōna ringa, ka whaka­pai ki te Atua, ka mea:
2.29: “Kātahi, e te Ariki, ka tukua tāu pono­nga kia haere i runga i te rangi­mārie, ka pērā me tāu i kōrero ai.
2.30: Ka kite nei hoki ōku kanohi i tāu whaka­ora­nga,
2.31: ka whaka­takoto­ria nei e koe ki te aro­aro o ngā iwi katoa;
2.32: hei whaka­mārama e kite ai ngā tauiwi, hei korōria hoki mō tāu iwi, mō Īharaira.”
2.33: Ā, mīharo tonu a Hōhepa rāua ko tōna whaea ki ngā kupu i kōrero­tia mōna.
2.34: Nā, ka manaaki a Himiona i a rāua, ā, ka mea ki tōna whaea, ki a Meri, “Nana, ka waiho tēnei tama hei taka­nga, hei aranga, mō te tini o te tangata i roto i a Īharaira; hei tohu hoki e kōrero­tia kino­tia.
2.35: Āe rā, ka tika atu anō te hoari, ā, puta noa i tōu ake wairua, e hura­hia ai ngā whaka­aro o ngā ngākau maha.”
2.36: Ā, tērā hoki tētahi ko Ana, he poro­piti, he tamā­hine nā Panuera, nō te iwi o Āhera; kua kaumātua ia, e whitu ngā tau o tōna wāhina­tanga ake i noho ai i te tāne.
2.37: He pouaru, kua waru tekau mā whā rawa ōna tau e pērā ana; heoi, kīhai i mahue i a ia te teme­para; he kara­kia tonu tāna, he noho­puku, he īnoi, i te pō, i te ao.
2.38: Nā, ka tae atu ia i taua hāora anō, ka whaka­whetai ki te Ariki, ā, kōrero­tia ana ia e ia ki te hunga katoa o Hiruhārama e tatari ana ki te whaka­ora­nga. Te Hokinga ki Nahareta
2.39: Ā, nō ka oti ngā mea katoa e rite ana ki tā te Ariki ture, ka hoki rātou ki Kariri, ki tō rātou ake pā, ki Nahareta.
2.40: Nā, ka tupu te tama­iti, ka pakari haere, ka kī i ngā whaka­aro nunui, ā, i runga i a ia te aroha noa o te Atua. Ko Īhu te Tamaiti i roto i te Temepara
2.41: Ā, i haere ōna mātua i ia tau, i ia tau ki Hiruhārama i te Hākari o te Kape­nga.
2.42: Ā, ka tekau mā rua ōna tau, ka haere rātou i runga i ngā rite­nga o te hākari.
2.43: Ā, ka rite ngā rā, i a rāua e hoki ana, ka whaka­ware iho te tama­iti, a Īhu, i Hiruhārama; kīhai hoki ōna mātua i mōhio.
2.44: I mahara hoki rāua kei roto ia i te tira, nā, ka haere, kotahi te rā ki te ara; ā, ka rapu rāua i a ia i roto i ngā whanau­nga, i ā rāua tāngata hoki i mōhio ai.
2.45: Ā, nō te kore­nga i kitea ia, hoki ana rāua ki Hiruhārama, ki te rapu i a ia.
2.46: Ā muri iho i ngā rā e toru ka kitea ia i roto i te teme­para, e noho ana i waenga­nui o ngā kai­whaka­ako, e whaka­rongo ana ki a rātou, e ui ana ki a rātou.
2.47: Ā, mīharo katoa ki tōna mātau­ranga, ki āna kōrero, te hunga i rongo ki a ia.
2.48: Ā, nō ka kite rāua i a ia, ka tino mīharo; ka mea tōna whaea ki a ia, “E tama, he aha koe i pēnei ai ki a māua? Nā, pōuri noa iho māua ko tōu pāpā, i a māua i rapu nei i a koe.”
2.49: Ka mea ia ki a rāua, “He aha kōrua i rapu ai i ahau? Kīhai kōrua i mahara kia noho ahau i te whare o tōku Matua?”
2.50: Heoi, kīhai rāua i mātau ki te kupu i kōrero­tia rā e ia ki a rāua.
2.51: Nā, ka haere tahi atu ia me rāua ka tae ki Nahareta, ka ngohe­ngohe ia ki a rāua. Ko tōna whaea ia i rongoā i ēnei kupu katoa i roto i tōna ngākau.
2.52: Nā, ka kake haere a Īhu te whaka­aro nui, te kaumātua, ka pai­ngia anō e te Atua, e te tangata.

3.1: Nā, i te tekau mā rima o ngā tau o te ranga­tira­tanga o Tai­piria Hīhā, i a Ponotio Pirato e kāwana ana i Hūria, i a Herora e teta­raki ana i Kariri, i tōna teina hoki, i a Piripi, e teta­raki ana i Ituria, i te whenua hoki o Tarakonaiti, ko Raihānia, e teta­raki ana i Apirini;
3.2: ko Anaha rāua ko Kaiapa ngā tohu­nga nui, ka puta te kupu a te Atua ki a Hoani tama a Hakaraia ki te koraha.
3.3: Nā, ka haere mai ia ki ngā wāhi katoa e pātata ana ki Horano, ka kauwhau i te iri­iri rīpe­netā hei muru­nga hara.
3.4: I pērā anō ia me te mea i tuhi­tuhia ki te puka­puka o ngā kōrero a Ihāia poro­piti: “He reo nō tētahi i te koraha e karanga ana: ‘Whaka­paia te hua­rahi o te Ariki, whaka­tikaia ōna ara!
3.5: Ka whaka­kīa ngā awa­awa katoa, ka whaka­horoa ngā maunga me ngā puke­puke katoa. E meinga hoki kia tika ngā wāhi kōpiko­piko, ko ngā wāhi tara­tara hei ara māeneene.
3.6: Ā, e kite ngā kiko­kiko katoa i te whaka­ora­nga a te Atua!’ ”
3.7: Nā reira, ka mea ia ki ngā mano i haere kia iri­iria e ia, “E te uri nākahi, nā wai koutou i whaka­mahara kia rere i te riri meāke puta mai?
3.8: Nā, whaka­puta­ina ngā hua e rite ana ki ō te rīpe­netā; kei anga kei mea i roto i a koutou, ‘Ko Āperahama tō tātou matua.’ Ko tāku kupu hoki tēnei ki a koutou, e āhei ana anō i te Atua te whaka­ara tama­riki ake mā Āperahama i roto i ēnei kōhatu.
3.9: Nā, ināia­nei anō kei te pā te toki ki te paki­aka o ngā rākau; ki te kāhore tētahi rākau e hua i te hua pai, ka tuaina, ka makā ki te ahi.”
3.10: Nā, ka ui ngā mano ki a ia, ka mea, “Me aha rā mātou?”
3.11: Nā, ka whaka­hoki ia, ka mea ki a rātou, “Ko te tangata i ngā koti e rua, kia hoatu ki te tangata kāhore ōna; me te tangata he kai tāna, kia pērā anō.”
3.12: Nā, ka haere mai hoki ngā pupiri­kana kia iri­iria ka mea ki a ia, “E te kai­whaka­ako, me aha mātou?”
3.13: Ka mea ia ki a rātou, “Kei nui ake i ngā mea i whaka­ritea mā koutou tā koutou e tango ai.”
3.14: Ka ui anō hoki ngā hōia ki a ia, ka mea, “Me aha hoki mātou?” Nā, ko tāna mea­tanga ki a rātou, “Kaua e tūkino­tia tētahi, kaua e muru noa i tētahi mea; kāti anō mā koutou ko ō koutou utu.”
3.15: Nā, i te iwi e tatari ana e whaka­aro­aro katoa ana i roto i ō rātou ngākau ki a Hoani, me­he­mea ko te Karaiti ia.
3.16: Ka whaka­hoki a Hoani, ka mea ki a rātou katoa, “Ko ahau nei, he iri­iri tāku i a koutou ki te wai; kei te haere mai ia tētahi he kaha rawa ake i ahau, e kore ahau e tāu hei wewete i te here o ōna hū. Māna koutou e iri­iri ki te Wairua Tapu, ki te kāpura.
3.17: Ko tāna mea tahi kei tōna ringa, hei tino tahi i tāna patu­nga wīti, hei kohi hoki i te wīti ki roto ki tāna whare wīti; ko te pāpapa ia e tahuna ki te kāpura e kore e tineia.”
3.18: He maha atu anō āna kupu whaka­hau i kauwhau ai ia i te rongo­pai ki te iwi.
3.19: Otirā, nā tōna riri­nga i a Herora teta­raki mō Herōriaha, mō te wahine a tōna tua­kana, a Piripi, ā, mō ngā kino katoa hoki i meinga e Herora;
3.20: ka āpiti­tia atu e Herora tēnei ki runga i ērā katoa, tū­taki­na ana e ia a Hoani ki te whare here­here. Te Iriiringa o Īhu (Matiu 3.13-17; Māka 1.9-11)
3.21: Nā, ka poto katoa te iwi te iri­iri, i a Īhu kua oti te iri­iri, ā, i a ia e īnoi ana, ka tu­whera te rangi,
3.22: ā, ka heke iho te Wairua Tapu, ka heke tinana iho, ānō he kūkupa, ki runga ki a ia, ā, ka puta mai he reo nō te rangi, e mea ana, “Ko koe tāku Tama i aroha ai, tāku i āhua­reka ai.” Te Whakapapa o Īhu (Matiu 1.1-17)
3.23: Nā, ko Īhu, i a ia i tīmata ai ki te whaka­ako, kei te toru tekau ōna tau, ā, ki tā te tangata kī, he tama ia nā Hōhepa tama a Heri,
3.24: ko ia he tama nā Matata, tama a Rīwai, tama a Mereki, tama a Iana, tama a Hōhepa,
3.25: tama a Matatiaha, tama a Āmoho, tama a Nahumu, tama a Eheri, tama a Nakai,
3.26: tama a Māta, tama a Matatiaha, tama a Hemei, tama a Hōhepa tama a Hūrā,
3.27: tama a Hoana, tama a Reha, tama a Herupapera, tama a Haratiera, tama a Neri,
3.28: tama a Mereki, tama a Ari, tama a Kohama, tama a Eremorama, tama a Ere,
3.29: tama a Hohe, tama a Eriētere, tama a Horimi, tama a Matata, tama a Rīwai,
3.30: tama a Himiona, tama a Hūrā, tama a Hōhepa tama a Honana, tama a Eriakimi,
3.31: tama a Merea, tama a Menana, tama a Matata, tama a Nātana, tama a Rāwiri,
3.32: tama a Hehe, tama a Ōpere, tama a Poaha, tama a Haramono, tama a Nāhona,
3.33: tama a Aminarapa, tama a Arame tama a Heteromo, tama a Parete, tama a Hūrā,
3.34: tama a Hākopa, tama a Īhaka, tama a Āperahama, tama a Tera, tama a Nahora,
3.35: tama a Haruku, tama a Rakau, tama a Pereke, tama a Ēpere, tama a Haraha,
3.36: tama a Kai­nana, tama a Arapahata, tama a Hema, tama a Noa, tama a Rameka,
3.37: tama a Matuhara, tama a Ēnoka, tama a Iarere, tama a Marerēre, tama a Kai­nana,
3.38: tama a Ēnoha, tama a Heta, tama a Ārama, a te tama a te Atua.

4.1: Nā, ko Īhu, kī tonu i te Wairua Tapu, hoki atu ana i Horano, ā, ka āra­hina e te Wairua i te koraha.
4.2: Mō ngā rā e whā tekau, whaka­mā­tau­tau­ria ai e te rēwera. Kīhai ia i kai i tētahi mea i aua rā, ā, nō ka pahemo, ka hia­kai ia.
4.3: Nā, ka mea te rēwera ki a ia, “Ki te mea ko te Tama koe a te Atua, kīa iho tēnei kōhatu kia meinga hei taro.”
4.4: Nā, ka whaka­hoki a Īhu ki a ia, ka mea, “Kua oti te tuhi­tuhi, ‘E kore e ora te tangata i te taro kau.’ ”
4.5: Kātahi ka āra­hina ia e ia ki runga, ā, mea kau iho kua whaka­kitea ki a ia ngā ranga­tira­tanga katoa o te ao.
4.6: Ka mea te rēwera ki a ia, “Māku e hoatu ki a koe tēnei ranga­tira­tanga katoa, me te korōria o ēnei mea; kua tukua hoki ki ahau, ā, ka hoatu e ahau ki tāku e pai ai.
4.7: Nā, ki te koro­piko koe ki tōku aro­aro, mōu katoa.”
4.8: Nā, ka whaka­hoki a Īhu ki a ia, ka mea, “Kua oti te tuhi­tuhi, ‘Me koro­piko koe ki te Ariki, ki tōu Atua, me mahi anō ki a ia anake!’ ”
4.9: Nā, ka kawea ia e ia ki Hiruhārama, ā, whaka­tū­ria ana ki runga ki te keo­keo­nga o te teme­para, nā, ka mea ia ki a ia, “Ki te mea ko te Tama koe a te Atua, rere atu i konei ki raro,
4.10: kua oti hoki te tuhi­tuhi, ‘Ka kōrero­tia iho koe e ia ki āna ana­hera, kia tiaki­na koe.’
4.11: Ā, ‘Mā rātou koe e hiki ake ki ō rātou ringa, kei tūtuki tōu wae­wae ki te kōhatu.’ ”
4.12: Nā, ka whaka­hoki a Īhu, ka mea ki a ia, “Kua takoto te kōrero, ‘Aua e whaka­mā­tau­tau ki te Ariki, ki tōu Atua.’ ”
4.13: Ā, ka mutu katoa ngā whaka­mā­tautau­ranga a te rēwera, ka mawehe atu i a ia mō tētahi wāhi. Ka Tīmata a Īhu i Tāna Mahi i Kariri (Matiu 4.12-17; Māka 1.14-15)
4.14: Nā, ka hoki a Īhu i runga i te kaha o te Wairua ki Kariri, ā, haere ana tōna rongo, ā, puta noa i ngā wāhi tata katoa.
4.15: Ka whaka­ako ia i roto i ō rātou whare kara­kia, me te whaka­korōria te katoa i a ia. Ka Makaia atu a Īhu i Nahareta (Matiu 13.53-58; Māka 6.1-6)
4.16: Nā, ka haere ia ki Nahareta, ki te wāhi i whāngaia ai ia; ā, ka tomo i te rā hāpati ki te whare kara­kia, ko tāna hanga hoki ia, ka whaka­tika ki te kōrero puka­puka.
4.17: Ā, ka hoatu ki a ia te puka­puka a Ihāia poro­piti. Ā, nō ka whera­hia te puka­puka, ka kitea e ia te wāhi i tēnei tuhi­tuhi­nga:
4.18: “Kei ahau te Wairua o te Ariki, nāna nei hoki ahau i whaka­wahi, hei kauwhau i te rongo­pai ki te hunga rawa­kore. Kua tonoa ahau e ia ki te kauwhau ki ngā here­here, kia haere noa, ki ngā matapō kia ti­tiro; ki te tuku i te hunga e marū ana, kia haere noa atu,
4.19: ki te kauwhau i te tau manako­hanga mai a te Ariki.”
4.20: Nā, ka kopia e ia te puka­puka, ka hoatu ki te kai­tiaki, ā, noho ana. Nā, ka ti­tiro mata­tau ki a ia ngā kanohi o te hunga katoa i roto i te whare kara­kia.
4.21: Kātahi ia ka anga, ka kōrero ki a rātou, “Nō nāia­nei, i ō koutou tari­nga e whaka­rongo mai nei, i mana ai tēnei karaipi­ture.”
4.22: Ā, i whaka­pai rātou katoa ki a ia, i mīharo ki ngā kupu pai i puta i tōna māngai. Ka mea rātou, “Ehara ianei tēnei i te tama a Hōhepa?”
4.23: Ka mea ia ki a rātou, “Tērā pea e puaki mai i a koutou tēnei kupu whaka­rite ki ahau, ‘E rata, rongoā koe i a koe anō! Ko ngā mea i rongo ai mātou kua meinga ki Kaperenauma, meinga hoki ki konei, ki tōu whenua.’ ”
4.24: I mea anō ia, “He pono tāku e mea nei ki a koutou, e kore te poro­piti e manako­hia i tōna ake whenua.
4.25: “Otirā, he pono tāku e mea nei ki a koutou, he toko­maha ngā pouaru i roto i a Īharaira i ngā rā i a Irāia, i te rangi kua oti te kōpani i ngā tau e toru i ngā marama e ono, i te mate­kai­tanga nui o te whenua katoa.
4.26: Heoi, kīhai a Irāia i tonoa ki tētahi o rātou, ki a Harepata anake o Hairona, ki te wahine pouaru.
4.27: He toko­maha hoki ngā repera i roto i a Īharaira, i ngā rā o Eriha poro­piti; ā, kīhai tētahi o rātou i whaka­mā­kia, ko Nāmana anake, ko te Hīriani.”
4.28: Ā, kī tonu i te riri te hunga katoa i te whare kara­kia, i te rongo­nga ki ēnei mea.
4.29: Nā, ko tō rātou whaka­tikanga ake, ka maka i a ia ki waho o te pā, ā, āra­hina ana ia ki te pari o te puke i hangā ai tō rātou pā, kia whaka­takā ai ia ki raro.
4.30: Otirā, i tika ia rā waenga­nui o rātou, ā, haere ana. He Tangata he Wairua Poke tōna (Māka 1.21-28)
4.31: Ā, ka tae ki Kaperenauma, ki tētahi pā o Kariri, ka whaka­ako i a rātou i te hāpati.
4.32: Nā, ka mīharo rātou ki tāna ako, i whai mana hoki tāna kupu.
4.33: Nā, i te whare kara­kia tētahi tangata he wairua rēwera poke tōna, nui atu tōna reo ki te karanga,
4.34: ka mea, “Kāti rā; he aha mātou nāu, e Īhu o Nahareta; kua tae mai koe ki te whaka­ngaro i a mātou? E mōhio ana ahau ki a koe, ko wai koe; ko te Mea Tapu a te Atua!”
4.35: Nā, rīria iho ia e Īhu, ka mea ia, “Kāti te kōrero, puta mai hoki i roto i a ia.” Kātahi te rēwera ka turaki i a ia ki waenga­nui, ā, puta mai ana i roto i a ia, kīhai hoki tērā i ahatia.
4.36: Nā tau ana te mīharo ki a rātou katoa, ka kōrero­rero tētahi ki tētahi, ka mea, “He aha tēnei kupu? Mana tonu nei hoki tāna tono i ngā wairua poke, kaha tonu, ā, puta mai ana ki waho.”
4.37: Ā, pakū ana tōna rongo puta noa i ngā wāhi tūtata katoa. Ka Whakaoratia e Īhu te Tini Tāngata (Matiu 8.14-17; Māka 1.29-34)
4.38: Ā, ko tōna whaka­tikanga i te whare kara­kia, tomo tonu ki te whare o Haimona. Nā, e mate ana te whaea o te wahine a Haimona, he nui te kirikā; ka īnoi rātou ki a ia mōna.
4.39: Nā, ka tū ia ki runga i a ia, ā, rīria iho te kirikā; ā, mutu ake, nā, ara tonu ake ia kei te taka mea mā rātou.
4.40: I te toene­tanga o te rā, ka kawea mai ki a ia e ngā tāngata katoa ngā mea o rātou e mate ana i te tini o ngā mate; nā, whaka­pā­kia iho e ia ōna ringa ki tēnei, ki tēnei o rātou, ā, ora ake rātou.
4.41: He toko­maha hoki te hunga i puta mai ngā rēwera i roto i a rātou; i karanga hoki aua wairua i mea, “Ko te Tama koe a te Atua!” Ā, rīria ana rātou e ia, kīhai i tukua kia kōrero, i mātau hoki rātou ko te Karaiti ia. Ka Kauwhau a Īhu i ngā Whare Karakia (Māka 1.35-39)
4.42: Ka ao te rā, ka puta atu ia, ka haere ki tētahi wāhi koraha; ā, ka rapu ngā mano i a ia, ka tae ki a ia, nā, puri­tia ana ia, kei whaka­rērea rātou e ia.
4.43: Ka mea ia ki a rātou, “Me kauwhau e ahau te ranga­tira­tanga o te Atua ki ērā atu pā anō; koia hoki ahau i tonoa mai ai.”
4.44: Ā, kauwhau ana ia i ngā whare kara­kia o Kariri.

5.1: Ā, i te mano e āki ana ki a ia ki te whaka­rongo ki te kupu a te Atua, nā, e tū ana ia i te taha o te roto o Kenehareta,
5.2: nā, ka kite ia i ētahi kai­puke e rua e tū ana i te taha o te roto; ko ngā kaihao ia kua riro i runga, e horoi ana i ā rātou kupe­nga.
5.3: Nā, ka eke ia ki tētahi o ngā kai­puke, ki tō Haimona, ka mea ki a ia kia neke atu ki waho tata. Nā, noho ana ia, whaka­akona ana e ia te mano i runga i te kai­puke.
5.4: Ā, ka mutu tāna kōrero, ka mea ia ki a Haimona, “Neke atu ki te wāhi hōhonu, ka tuku ai i ā koutou kupe­nga ki te hao.”
5.5: Nā, ka whaka­hoki a Haimona, ka mea ki a ia, “E kara, mahi noa mātou i te pō roa nei, tē mau tētahi; heoi, nāu nā te kupu me tuku e ahau te kupe­nga.”
5.6: Ā, nō tā rātou mea­tanga i tēnei, he mano tini ngā ika i mau i a rātou; ka whaka­pakaru tā rātou kupe­nga.
5.7: Nā, ka tā­whiri rātou ki ō rātou hoa i tērā o ngā kai­puke kia hoe mai hei hoa mō rātou. Ā, i tō rātou taenga mai, whaka­kīa ana ngā kai­puke e rua, nō ka whaka­totohu.
5.8: Otiia, nō te kite­nga o Haimona Pita, ka hinga iho ki ngā turi o Īhu, ka mea, “Mawehe atu i ahau, e te Ariki, he tangata hara hoki ahau.”
5.9: Mau tonu hoki tōna mīharo me tō ōna hoa katoa, ki te haonga o ngā ika i haoa nei e rātou;
5.10: i pērā anō hoki a Hēmi rāua ko Hoani, he tama rāua nā Heperi, he hoa hoki nō Haimona. Nā, ka mea a Īhu ki a Haimona, “Kaua e mataku; i ēnei wā e takoto ake nei ka hao tāngata koe.”
5.11: Ā, ka whaka­ūria ngā kai­puke ki uta, mahue ake ngā mea katoa i a rātou, ā, aru ana i a ia. Ka Whakaoratia e Īhu te Tāne (Matiu 8.1-4; Māka 1.40-45)
5.12: Nā, i a ia i tētahi o ngā pā, nā, ko tētahi tangata kapi tonu i te repera; ā, i tōna kite­nga i a Īhu, ka takoto tāpapa, ka īnoi ki a ia, ka mea, “E te Ariki, ki te pai koe, e taea ahau e koe te mea kia mā.”
5.13: Nā, ka totoro tōna ringa, ka pā ki a ia, ka mea, “E pai ana ahau. Kia mā koe.” Ā, mutu tonu ake tōna repera.
5.14: Ā, ka whaka­tūpato ia i a ia kia kaua e kōrero­tia ki te tangata, engari “Haere, kia kite te tohu­nga i a koe, kawea atu hoki mō tōu whaka­mā­kanga ngā mea i whaka­ritea e Mohi, hei mea whaka­atu ki a rātou.”
5.15: Heoi, tino pakū atu ana tōna rongo; he toko­maha noa atu hoki i hui­hui ki te whaka­rongo, kia whaka­ora­ngia ai e ia ō rātou ngoi­kore­tanga.
5.16: Otirā, haere ana ia, ko ia anake ki te koraha ki te īnoi. Ka Whakaora a Īhu i te Tangata Pararūtiki (Matiu 9.1-8; Māka 2.1-12)
5.17: Ā, i tētahi o aua rā, e whaka­ako ana ia, me te noho anō ngā Parihi me ngā kai­whaka­ako o te ture, i haere mai nei i ngā kāinga katoa o Kariri, o Hūria, o Hiruhārama; i reira anō te kaha o te Ariki hei whaka­ora i a rātou.
5.18: Nā, ka kawea mai e ētahi tāngata i runga i te moenga tētahi tangata, he pararūtiki; mea noa rātou kia kawea ia ki roto, kia whaka­takoto­ria ki tōna aro­aro.
5.19: Ā, i te kore­nga e kitea e rātou he hua­rahi hei kawe­nga mai i a ia ki roto, i te mano o te tangata, ka kakea te whare, ā, tukua iho ana ia rā ngā taera, me te moenga anō, ki waenga­nui, ki te aro­aro o Īhu.
5.20: Ā, i tōna kite­nga i tō rātou whaka­pono, ka mea ia ki a ia, “E hoa, ka oti ōu hara te muru.”
5.21: Nā, ka anga, ka whaka­aro­aro ngā kara­ipi me ngā Parihi, ka mea, “Ko wai tēnei nāna ngā kupu kohu­kohu? Ko wai hei muru hara? Ko te Atua anake.”
5.22: Otirā, i mōhio a Īhu ki ā rātou whaka­aro­aro­nga, ka oho, ka mea ki a rātou, “He aha tā koutou e whaka­aro­aro nā i roto i ō koutou ngākau?
5.23: Ko tēhea te mea takoto noa, ko te mea, ‘Ka oti ōu hara te muru,’ ko te mea rānei, ‘Whaka­tika, haere’?
5.24: Otiia, kia mātau ai koutou he mana muru hara tō te Tama a te tangata i runga i te whenua.” Ka mea ia ki te pararūtiki, “Ko tāku kupu tēnei ki a koe, whaka­tika, tango­hia ake tōu moenga, haere ki tōu whare.”
5.25: Nā, whaka­tika tonu ake ia i tō rātou aro­aro, tango­hia ake ana te mea i takoto ai ia, haere ana ki tōna whare, me te whaka­korōria i te Atua.
5.26: Nā, mīharo ana rātou katoa, ka whaka­korōria i te Atua, kī tonu hoki rātou i te mataku, ka mea, “Puta kē ngā mea i kite nei tātou ināia­nei!” Ka Karanga a Īhu i a Rīwai (Matiu 9.9-13; Māka 2.13-17)
5.27: Ā, i muri i ēnei mea, ka haere ia, ka kite i tētahi pupiri­kana, ko Rīwai te ingoa, e noho ana i te wāhi tango takoha, ka mea ki a ia, “Aru­mia mai ahau.”
5.28: Nā, whaka­rērea ake e ia ngā mea katoa, whaka­tika ana, aru ana i a ia.
5.29: Nā, ka takā e Rīwai he hākari nui māna i tōna whare; he toko­maha hoki ngā pupiri­kana me ngā tāngata kē i noho tahi rātou.
5.30: Nā, ka amu­amu ngā Parihi me ō rātou kara­ipi ki āna ākonga, ka mea, “He aha koutou ka kai tahi ai, ka inu tahi ai me ngā pupiri­kana, me ngā tāngata hara?”
5.31: Nā, ka whaka­hoki a Īhu, ka mea ki a rātou, “Kāhore he aha o ngā tāngata ora e meatia ai e te rata, engari o te hunga e mate ana.
5.32: Kīhai ahau i haere mai ki te karanga i te hunga tika, engari i te hunga hara, kia rīpe­netā.” Te Take e Pā ana ki te Nohopuku (Matiu 9.14-17; Māka 2.18-22)
5.33: Nā, ka mea rātou ki a ia, “Ko ngā ākonga a Hoani hono tonu te noho­puku, te īnoi, me ngā ākonga anō a ngā Parihi; ko āu ia e kai ana, e inu ana.”
5.34: Nā, ko te mea­tanga a Īhu ki a rātou, “E taea rānei e koutou te mea kia noho­puku ngā tama o te whare mārena, i te mea kei a rātou te tāne mārena hou?
5.35: Nā, tērā e tae mai ngā rā; ā, ina tango­hia te tāne mārena hou i a rātou, kātahi rātou ka noho­puku i aua rā.”
5.36: I kōrero­tia anō e ia tētahi kupu whaka­rite ki a rātou: “E kore e hāea e te tangata tētahi wāhi o te kahu hou hei pāpaki mō te kahu tawhito; kei pakaru te mea hou, ā, e kore te pāpaki i tango­hia i te mea hou e hāngai ki te mea tawhito.
5.37: E kore hoki te tangata e riri­ngi i te wāina hou ki ngā ipu tawhito; kei pakaru ngā ipu i te wāina hou, nā, ka ma­ringi, ā, kore ake ngā ipu.
5.38: Engari me riri­ngi te wāina hou ki ngā ipu hou.
5.39: Ka inu hoki te tangata i te wāina tawhito, e kore ia e hia­hia ki te mea hou, e mea hoki ia, ‘Erangi te mea tawhito.’ ”

6.1: Nā, i te hāpati ka haere ia rā waenga wīti; ā, kato­hia ana e āna ākonga ngā puku, wīti, kainga ake, he mea kō­muku­muku ki te ringa.
6.2: Nā, ka mea ētahi o ngā Parihi, “He aha koutou ka mahi ai i te mea e kore e tika kia mahia i te hāpati?”
6.3: Nā, ka whaka­hoki a Īhu, ka mea ki a rātou, “Kāhore ianei koutou i kite i tā Rāwiri i mea ai, i a ia e mate ana i te hia­kai, rātou ko ōna hoa.
6.4: I tōna tomo­kanga ki te whare o te Atua, ka tango ia i ngā taro aro­aro, nā, kainga ana e ia, hoatu ana hoki ki ōna hoa; ko ngā mea kīhai nei i tika kia kainga, engari mā ngā tohu­nga anake?”
6.5: I mea anō ia ki a rātou, “Ko te Tama a te tangata te Ariki o te hāpati.” Te Tangata i te Ringa Memenge (Matiu 12.9-14; Māka 3.1-6)
6.6: Ā, i tētahi atu hāpati ka tomo ia ki te whare kara­kia, ka whaka­ako; i reira anō tētahi tangata, ko tōna ringa matau kua memenge.
6.7: Ka ti­tiro whaka­mau ngā kara­ipi me ngā Parihi ki a ia, me kore ia e whaka­ora i te hāpati; kia whai take ai hei whaka­wā­kanga mōna.
6.8: Nā, ka mōhio ia ki ō rātou whaka­aro, ka mea ki te tangata i te ringa memenge, “Whaka­tika, e tū ki waenga­nui.” Ā, whaka­tika ana ia, tū ana.
6.9: Kātahi ka mea a Īhu ki a rātou, “Māku hoki e ui ki a koutou; he mea tika rānei te mahi pai i te hāpati, te mahi kino rānei? Te whaka­ora, te whaka­mate rānei?”
6.10: Nā, ka tiro­tiro ia ki a rātou katoa ka mea ki taua tangata, “Totoro mai tōu ringa.” Ā, pērā ana ia; nā, kua ora anō tōna ringa.
6.11: Nā, kī tonu rātou i te hono­honoā ka kōrero­rero ki a rātou anō, me aha rānei a Īhu e rātou. Ka Whiriwhiria e Īhu ngā Āpōtoro Tekau mā rua (Matiu 10.1-4; Māka 3.13-19)
6.12: Ā, i aua rā ka haere ia ki te maunga ki te īnoi, he īnoi tonu tāna i te roa o te pō ki te Atua.
6.13: Ā, ka ao te rā, ka karanga­tia e ia āna ākonga; ka whiri­whiria e ia kotahi tekau mā rua o rātou, ā, huaina ana hoki e ia hei āpō­toro:
6.14: Ko Haimona (i huaina hoki e ia ko Pita) ko tōna teina ko Anaru; ko Hēmi rāua ko Hoani, ko Piripi rāua ko Patoromu,
6.15: ko Matiu rāua ko Tamati, ko Hēmi tama a Arapiu, ko Haimona (e kīa nei ko Heroti),
6.16: ko Hūrā tama a Hēmi, ko Hūrā Ikariote hoki, ko ia nei te kai­tuku. Ka Ako ka Whakaora a Īhu (Matiu 4.23-25)
6.17: Nā, ka heke ngā­tahi iho rātou, tū ana i tētahi wāhi tai­rite, rātou ko te rōpū o āna ākonga, me te hui­hui­nga nui o te iwi i Hūria katoa, i Hiruhārama, i te taha hoki o te moana o Tāira o Hairona, i haere mai nei ki te whaka­rongo ki a ia, kia whaka­ora­ngia hoki ō rātou mate;
6.18: me te hunga anō e whaka­toia ana e ngā wairua poke, ā, whaka­ora­ngia ana rātou.
6.19: I whai anō te mano katoa kia pā ki a ia; i puta hoki he kaha i a ia, ā, whaka­ora­ngia ana rātou katoa. Te Hari me te Pōuri (Matiu 5.1-12)
6.20: Nā, ka ti­tiro ōna kanohi ki āna ākonga, ka mea ia, “Ka koa koutou, e ngā rawa­kore; mō koutou hoki te ranga­tira­tanga o te Atua!
6.21: Ka koa koutou e hia­kai nei ināia­nei; ka mākona hoki koutou! Ka koa koutou e tangi nei ināia­nei; e kata hoki koutou!
6.22: “Ka koa koutou ina kino­ngia koutou e ngā tāngata, ina wehea atu i roto i a rātou, ina tāwaia ina rukea atu tō koutou ingoa, ānō he mea kino, mō te whaka­aro ki te Tama a te tangata.
6.23: Kia hari i taua rā, me te tū­peke­peke. He nui hoki tō koutou utu i te rangi; i pērā­tia hoki ngā poro­piti e ō rātou mātua.
6.24: Otirā, auē te mate mō koutou, mō te hunga taonga; kua riro hoki i a koutou tō koutou whaka­mārie!
6.25: Auē, te mate mō koutou, mō te hunga e mākona ana ināia­nei, e mate hoki koutou i te hia­kai! Auē, te mate mō koutou, mō te hunga e kata ana ināia­nei, ka auē hoki koutou, ka tangi!
6.26: “Auē, te mate mō koutou ua kōrero­tia paitia koutou e ngā tāngata katoa! I pērā hoki ō rātou mātua ki ngā poro­piti teka. Te Aroha ki ngā Hoariri (Matiu 5.38-48; 7.12a)
6.27: “Nā, ko tāku kupu tēnei ki a koutou e whaka­rongo mai nei: aroha­ina ō koutou hoa whawhai; kia pai te mahi ki te hunga e kino ana ki a koutou.
6.28: Manaaki­tia te hunga e kanga ana i a koutou, me īnoi mō te hunga e whaka­whiu ana i a koutou.
6.29: Nā, ki te pākia tōu pā­pā­ringa e tētahi, whaka­anga­hia atu hoki tētahi; ki te tango­hia tōu ngeri e tētahi, kaua e kai­ponu­hia tōu koti.
6.30: Hoatu ki ngā tāngata katoa e īnoi ana ki a koe; kaua hoki e tonoa āu mea ki te tango­hia e te tangata.
6.31: Ā, ko tā koutou e pai ai kia meatia e ngā tāngata ki a koutou, meatia anō e koutou ki a rātou.
6.32: “Ki te aroha koutou ki te hunga e aroha ana ki a koutou, kei hea he whaka­whetai ki a koutou? E aroha ana hoki te hunga hara ki te hunga e aroha ana ki a rātou.
6.33: Ki te ata­whai hoki koutou i te hunga e ata­whai ana i a koutou, kei hea he whaka­whetai ki a koutou? E pēnā ana anō te hunga hara.
6.34: Ki te tuku moni koutou ki te hunga e mea ai koutou ka utua mai rātou, kei hea he whaka­whetai ki a koutou? E tuku moni ana hoki te hunga hara ki te hunga hara, mō te pērā kia whaka­hokia ki a rātou.
6.35: Engari, kia aroha ki ō koutou hoa whawhai, mahia te pai ki a rātou, ka tuku atu he moni, kaua anō e mutu te tū­mana­ko; ā, tērā e rahi te whaka­utu ki a koutou, ka tupu koutou hei tama­riki mā te Runga Rawa; e ata­whai ana hoki ia i te hunga e kore e whaka­whetai, i te hunga kino.
6.36: Kia ngā­wari rāpea koutou, kia pērā me tō koutou Matua e ngā­wari ana. Te Whakawā i Ētahi atu (Matiu 7.1-5)
6.37: “Kaua e whaka­wā, ā, e kore koutou e whaka­wā­kia; kaua e whaka­tau hē, e kore te hē, ā, e whaka­taua ki a koutou. Houhia te rongo, ā, e houhia anō te rongo ki a koutou.
6.38: Hoatu, ā, ka hōmai ki a koutou; he mēhua pai, pēhi rawa, oioi rawa, pūrena tonu tā rātou e hōmai ai ki te kokoru o ō koutou kākahu. Ko te mēhua hoki e mēhua ai koutou, hei mēhua anō tēnā ki a koutou.”
6.39: Ā, ka puaki tāna kupu whaka­rite ki a rātou: “E āhei rānei te matapō te ārahi i te matapō? E kore rānei e taka tahi rāua ki te poka?
6.40: E kore te ākonga e rahi ake i tōna kai­whaka­ako; engari, ka rite anō ki ō rātou kai­whaka­ako ngā tāngata katoa kua tino pū­kenga­tia.
6.41: “He aha tāu e ti­tiro ki te ota­ota i roto i te kanohi o tōu teina, tē kite i te kuru­pae i tōu ake kanohi?
6.42: Ā, me pēhea e taea ai e koe te kōrero ki tōu teina, ‘E tōku teina, iaua, kia kapea atu e ahau te ota­ota i roto i tōu kanohi,’ tē kite i te kuru­pae i roto i tōu kanohi? E te tangata tini­hanga, mātua kapea atu e koe te kuru­pae i roto i tōu kanohi, kātahi koe ka mārama ai ki te kape i te ota­ota i roto i te kanohi o tōu teina. He Rākau me āna Hua (Matiu 7.16-20; 12.33-35)
6.43: “E kore hoki te rākau āta­ahua e hua i te hua kino; e kore anō te rākau kino e hua i te hua āta­ahua.
6.44: Mā ōna hua tonu ka mōhio­tia ai tēnei rākau, tēnei rākau. E kore hoki e kohia he piki i runga i ngā tā­tarā­moa, e kore anō e whakia he karepe i runga i te tū­mata­kuru.
6.45: He tangata pai, he pai tāna e whaka­puta ai i roto i te taonga pai o tōna ngākau. He tangata kino, he kino tāna e whaka­puta ai i roto i ngā taonga kino o tōna ngākau. He pūrena­tanga hoki nō te ngākau ngā kupu a te māngai. Ngā Kaihanga Whare Tokorua (Matiu 7.24-27)
6.46: “He aha koutou ka karanga ai ki ahau, ‘E te Ariki, e te Ariki,’ tē mahi i āku e kōrero ai?
6.47: Nā, ko te tangata e haere mai ana ki ahau, e rongo ana ki āku kupu, ā, e mahi ana, māku e whaka­atu ki a koutou tōna rite.
6.48: Ka rite ia ki te tangata i hanga i tētahi whare, i keri, i whaka­hōhonu, ā, whaka­takoto ana i te papa ki runga ki te toka. Ā, i te pu­tanga o te wai­puke, ka pakaru te roma ki taua whare, heoi kīhai i taea te whaka­ngāueue; nō te mea i ū tōna hanga­nga.
6.49: Tēnā ko te tangata i rongo, ā, kīhai i mahi, ka rite ia ki te tangata i hanga i tētahi whare ki runga ki te one­one, tē ai he tū­ranga; i te pākaru­tanga o te roma, nā, hinga tonu iho; ā, nui atu te pakaru o taua whare.”

7.1: Ā, nō ka mutu ēnei kupu katoa āna, me te whaka­rongo anō te iwi, ka tomo ia ki Kaperenauma.
7.2: Nā, e mate ana te pono­nga a tētahi kene­turio, meāke marere, ko tāna hoki i mate­nui ai.
7.3: Ā, nō tōna rongo­nga i a Īhu, ka tonoa mai ki a ia ētahi kaumātua o ngā Hūrai, hei mea ki a ia kia haere ki te whaka­ora i tāna pono­nga.
7.4: Ā, i tō rātou taenga ki a Īhu, he kaha tā rātou īnoi, ka mea, “He pai te tangata e meatia ai tēnei e koe,
7.5: E aroha ana hoki ia ki tō tātou iwi, nāna hoki i hanga te whare kara­kia mō mātou.”
7.6: Nā, haere tahi ana a Īhu me rātou. Ā, i a ia kāhore nei i matara i te whare, ka tono te kene­turio i ētahi hoa ki a ia, ka mea ki a ia, “E te Ariki, kei mau­mau nge­nge noa koe, ehara hoki ahau i te tikanga tangata e haere ake ai koe ki raro i tōku tuanui;
7.7: koia tē tae ai tōku aro ki te haere atu ki a koe. Engari kia puaki mai tāu kupu, ā, ka ora tāku pono­nga.
7.8: He tangata hoki ahau e whaka­haua ana, he hōia anō āku hei whaka­hau­nga māku, nā, ka mea ahau ki tēnei, ‘Haere,’ ā, ka haere; ki tētahi atu hoki, ‘Haere mai,’ ā, ka haere mai; ki tāku pono­nga anō hoki, ‘Meatia tēnei,’ ā, ka meatia e ia.”
7.9: Ā, i te rongo­nga o Īhu ki ēnei mea, ka mīharo ki a ia, ka tahuri, ka mea ki te mano e aru ana i a ia, “Ko tāku kupu tēnei ki a koutou, kāhore anō ahau i kite i te whaka­pono hei rite mō tēnei te nui, ahakoa i roto i a Īharaira.”
7.10: Ā, roko­hanga atu e te hunga i tonoa, i tō rātou hoki­nga atu ki te whare, kua ora te pono­nga rā. Ka Whakaara a Īhu i te Tama a tētahi Pouaru
7.11: Nā, i muri tata iho ka haere ia ki tētahi pā, ko Naina te ingoa; ā, i haere tahi āna ākonga me ia, he rahi hoki te hui.
7.12: Ā, ka whaka­tata ia ki te kūwaha o te pā, nā, he tū­pā­paku tērā e kauhoa­tia ana mai, he hua­tahi nā tōna whaea, ā, he pouaru tērā: he toko­maha o te pā e haere tahi ana me ia.
7.13: Ā, i te kite­nga o te Ariki i a ia, ka aroha ki a ia, ka mea ki a ia, “Kaua e tangi.”
7.14: Nā, ka whaka­tata ia, ka pā ki te kauhoa, ā, tū tonu ngā kai­kauhoa. Nā, ko tāna mea­tanga, “E tama, ko tāku kupu tēnei ki a koe, e ara.”
7.15: Nā, ka noho te tū­pā­paku ki runga, ka anga, ka kōrero, ā, hoatu ana ia e ia ki tōna whaea.
7.16: Nā, ka tau te wehi ki a rātou katoa; ka whaka­korōria i te Atua, ka mea, “Kua puta ake i roto i a tātou he poro­piti nui!” ā, “Kua ti­tiro mai hoki te Atua ki tāna iwi.”
7.17: Nā, haere ana tēnei kōrero mōna puta noa i Hūria, i ngā wāhi pātata katoa anō hoki. Ngā Karere a Hoani Kaiiriiri (Matiu 11.2-19)
7.18: Ā, ka kōrero­tia ēnei mea katoa ki a Hoani e āna ākonga.
7.19: Nā, ka karanga­tia e Hoani ētahi o āna ākonga toko­rua, ka tonoa ki te Ariki, mea ai, “Ko koe rānei tērā e haere mai ana? Me tatari rānei tātou ki tētahi atu?”
7.20: Ā, nō te taenga mai o aua tāngata ki a ia, ka mea, “Kua tonoa mai māua e Hoani Kai­iri­iri ki a koe, mea ai, Ko koe rānei tērā e haere mai ana? Me tatari rānei tātou ki tētahi atu?”
7.21: I taua wā pū anō he toko­maha te hunga i whaka­ora­ngia e ia i ngā tū­roro­tanga, i ngā mate, i ngā wairua kino; he toko­maha ngā matapō i meinga kia kite.
7.22: Ā, ka whaka­hoki ia, ka mea ki a rāua, “Haere, kōrero­tia ki a Hoani ngā mea e kite nei, e rongo nei kōrua; ko ngā matapō e ti­tiro ana, ko ngā kopa e hāere­ere ana, ko ngā repera kua mā, ko ngā turi e rongo ana, ko ngā tū­pā­paku e whaka­ara­hia ana, e kauwhau­tia ana te rongo­pai ki te hunga rawa­kore;
7.23: nā, ka koa te tangata e kore e hē ki ahau.”
7.24: Ā, nō te riro­nga atu o ngā karere a Hoani, ka tīmata ia ki te kōrero ki te mano mō Hoani: “I haere atu koutou ki te koraha kia kite i te aha? I te kākaho e whaka­ngāue­ue­tia ana e te hau?
7.25: Anō rā, i haere koutou kia kite i te aha? I te tangata he kākahu māeneene ōna? Nā, kei ngā whare kīngi te hunga i ngā kākahu whaka­pai­pai, i ngā kai papai.
7.26: Anō rā, i haere koutou kia kite i te aha? I te poro­piti? Āe rā, ko tāku kupu tēnei ki a koutou, tērā atu i te poro­piti.
7.27: Mōna te mea kua tuhi­tuhia nei, ‘Nā, ka tonoa e ahau tāku karere ki mua i tōu aro­aro, māna e whaka­pai tōu hua­rahi i mua i a koe.’
7.28: Ko tāku kupu hoki tēnei ki a koutou, kāhore he poro­piti nui atu i a Hoani Kai­iri­iri i roto i ngā whānau a te wahine; heoi, rahi ake i a ia te nohi­nohi rawa o te ranga­tira­tanga o te Atua.”
7.29: Nā, i tō rātou rongo­nga ai, whaka­tikaia ana tā te Atua e te hunga katoa i rongo, e ngā pupiri­kana anō, i iri­iria hoki rātou ki te iri­iri a Hoani.
7.30: Ko ngā Parihi ia rātou ko ngā kai­whaka­ako o te ture i whaka­kāhore i tā te Atua whaka­aro ki a rātou, kīhai nei rātou i iri­iria e ia.
7.31: “Me whaka­rite e ahau ngā tāngata o tēnei whaka­papa­ranga ki te aha? He rite rātou ki te aha?
7.32: He rite ki ngā tama­riki e noho ana i te kāinga hoko­hoko, e karanga ana ki a rātou anō, e mea ana, ‘Whaka­tangi noa mātou i te pūtō­rino ki a koutou, ā, kāhore koutou i kani­kani. Auē noa mātou ki a koutou, nā, kāhore koutou i tangi.’
7.33: I haere mai hoki a Hoani Kai­iri­iri, kīhai i kai taro, kīhai i inu wāina; heoi ka mea koutou, ‘He rēwera tōna.’
7.34: I haere mai te Tama a te tangata me te kai, me te inu; ā, ka mea koutou, ‘Nā, he tangata kakai, he tangata inu wāina, he hoa nō ngā pupiri­kana, nō ngā tāngata hara!’
7.35: Otirā, e whaka­tikaia ana te whaka­aro nui e āna tama­riki katoa.” Ko Īhu i te Kāinga a Haimona te Parihi
7.36: Nā, ka mea tētahi o ngā Parihi ki a ia kia kai tahi rāua. Ā, ka tomo ia ki te whare o te Parihi, ka noho.
7.37: Nā, tērā tētahi wahine hara o te pā ka mōhio, kei te whare o te Parihi ia e noho ana; nā, ka kawea mai e ia tētahi pouaka kōhatu, he hinu i roto.
7.38: Ā, tū tangi ana i muri i ōna wae­wae, ka anga ka whaka­mākūkū i ōna wae­wae ki ōna roi­mata, ka muru ki ngā makawe o tōna māte­nga, ka kihi i ōna wae­wae, ka whaka­wahi ki te hinu kakara.
7.39: Nā, i te kite­nga o te Parihi nāna rā ia i karanga, ka kōrero i roto i a ia, ka mea, “Me he poro­piti tēnei, kua mātau ia ki te wahine e pā nei ki a ia, tōna pēhea­tanga; he wahine hara hoki.”
7.40: Nā, ka kōrero a Īhu, ka mea ki a ia, “E Haimona, he kupu tāku ki a koe.” Ka mea ia, “Kōrero, e te Kai­whaka­ako.”
7.41: “Nā, toko­rua ngā tāngata i a rāua te moni a tētahi kai­tuku moni; e rima rau ngā pene i tētahi, e rima tekau i tētahi.
7.42: I te kore ngā mea a rāua hei whaka­utu, whaka­rērea noatia ana e ia ki a rāua; tēnā, ko wai o rāua e tino nui tōna aroha ki a ia?”
7.43: Nā, ka whaka­hoki a Haimona, ka mea, “Ki tōku whaka­aro, ko te tangata nāna te mea nui i whaka­rērea noatia atu.” Nā, ko tāna mea­tanga ki a ia, “Tika rawa tāu.”
7.44: Nā, ka tahuri ia ki te wahine, ka mea ki a Haimona, “E kite ana koe i tēnei wahine? I haere mai ahau ki roto ki tōu whare, kāhore i hōmai e koe he wai mō ōku wae­wae; nāna ia i whaka­mākūkū ōku wae­wae ki ōna roi­mata, ā, murua iho ki ngā makawe o tōna māte­nga.
7.45: Kīhai koe i kihi i ahau; tēnā ko ia, mai o tōku taenga mai, kāhore anō i tāmutu te kihi i ōku wae­wae.
7.46: Kīhai koe i whaka­wahi i tōku māte­nga ki te hinu; nāna ia ōku wae­wae i whaka­wahi ki te hinu.
7.47: Koia ahau ka mea nei ki a koe, kua murua ōna tini hara; he nui hoki tōna aroha; ko te tangata ia he iti ngā mea i murua ka iti anō tōna aroha.”
7.48: Ā, ka mea ia ki a ia, “Kua murua ōu hara.”
7.49: Nā, ka anga ōna hoa noho ka kōrero ki a rātou anō, “Ko wai tēnei, muru rawa hoki i ngā hara?”
7.50: Nā, ko tāna mea­tanga ki te wahine, “Nā, tōu whaka­pono koe i ora ai; haere mārie.”

8.1: Ā muri tata iho ka hāere­ere anō ia ki ngā pā ki ngā kāinga, ka kauwhau, ka whaka­puaki i te rongo­pai o te ranga­tira­tanga o te Atua. I a ia hoki te tekau mā rua,
8.2: me ētahi wāhine kua oti nei te whaka­ora i ngā wairua kino, i ngā ngoi­kore­tanga. Ko Meri (e huaina ana ko Makarini), e whitu nei ngā rēwera i puta mai i roto i a ia,
8.3: ko Hoana hoki, ko te wahine a Kūha, a te kai­whaka­hau­hau a Herora, me Huhana, me te toko­maha noa atu. Nā rātou i mahi ētahi o ā rātou taonga hei mea mā rātou. Te Kupu Whakarite mō te Kairui (Matiu 13.1-9; Māka 4.1-9)
8.4: Nā, ka rahi te hui i mine mai, ā, ka haere mai ki a ia o ia pā, o ia pā, ka kōrero kupu whaka­rite ia:
8.5: “I haere atu te kairui ki te rui i tāna pura­pura; ā, i a ia e rui ana, ka nga­horo ētahi ki te taha o te ara; ā, taka­hia ana ki raro, kainga ake e ngā manu o te rangi.
8.6: Ko ētahi i nga­horo ki runga ki te toka; ko te tupu­nga ake, kua maroke, kāhore hoki he mākūkū.
8.7: Ko ētahi i nga­horo ki roto ki ngā tā­tarā­moa; ā, tupu tahi ana ngā tā­tarā­moa, kōwao­wao­tia iho.
8.8: Ko ētahi i nga­horo ki te one­one pai; tupu ana, tā­taki­rau ngā hua.” Ka mutu ēnei kōrero, ka karanga ia, “Ko ia he tari­nga ōna hei whaka­rongo, kia rongo ia.” Te Take o ngā Kupu Whakarite (Matiu 13.10-17; Māka 4.10-12)
8.9: Nā, ka ui āna ākonga ki a ia, ka mea, “He aha te tikanga o tēnei kupu whaka­rite?”
8.10: Ka mea ia, “Kua hoatu ki a koutou te mātau­ranga ki ngā mea ngaro o te ranga­tira­tanga o te Atua; ki ērā atu ia, he whaka­rite ngā kupu. Kia kite ai rātou, ā, e kore e kite, kia rongo ai, ā, kore ake e mātau.” Ka Whakamārama a Īhu i te Kupu Whakarite o te Kairui (Matiu 13.18-23; Māka 4.13-20)
8.11: “Nā, tēnei te kupu whaka­rite: Ko te pura­pura ko te kupu a te Atua.
8.12: Ko ērā i te hua­rahi, ko ngā kai­whaka­rongo; me i reira ka haere mai te rēwera, ka kapo i te kupu i roto i ō rātou ngākau, kei whaka­pono rātou, ā, ka ora.
8.13: Ko ērā i runga i te toka ko te hunga i tango i te kupu me te hari anō i tō rātou rongo­nga. Otirā kāhore ō rātou paki­aka, ka whaka­pono mō te wā poto nei, ā, i te wā o te whaka­mā­tau­tau ka taka atu.
8.14: Ko tērā i nga­horo ki roto ki ngā tā­tarā­moa, ko te hunga e whaka­rongo ana, ā, ko te haere­nga atu, ka kōwao­wao­tia e ngā mā­nuka­nuka, e ngā taonga, e ngā whaka­ahua­reka o te ao, ā, hore ake e pakari ō rātou hua.
8.15: Ko tērā i te one­one pai, ko te hunga e tika ana, e pai ana te ngākau, i te rongo­nga i te kupu, ka pupuri, ā, hua ana ngā hua i runga i te manawa­nui.” He Rama i raro o te Oko (Māka 4.21-25)
8.16: “E kore e tahuna te rama e tētahi, e hīpoki­na ki te oko, e waiho rānei i raro i te moenga; engari, ka whaka­tū­ria ki runga ki te tū­ranga, kia kitea ai te mārama e te hunga e tomo ana.
8.17: “E kore hoki tētahi mea i huna, e mahue te whaka­kite; e kore anō tētahi mea i ngaro, e mahue te mōhio, te puta hoki ki te mārama.
8.18: “Nā reira kia tūpato tā koutou whaka­rongo. Ki te whai mea hoki tētahi, ka hoatu anō ki a ia; ki te kāhore he mea a tētahi, ko te mea i mahara ai ia nāna ake, ka tango­hia i a ia.” Te Whaea me ngā Tēina o Īhu (Matiu 12.46-50; Māka 3.31-35)
8.19: Nā, ka haere mai ki a ia tōna whaea, me ōna tēina, otirā, kāhore rātou i āhei te tutuki mai ki a ia, i te pipiri o te tangata.
8.20: Nā, ka kōrero­tia ki a ia, “Ko tōu whaea me ōu tēina te tū mai nei i waho, e mea ana kia kite i a koe.”
8.21: Otirā, ka whaka­hoki ia, ka mea ki a rātou, “Ko ēnei, e whaka­rongo nei, ā, e mahi nei i te kupu a te Atua, tōku whaea me ōku tēina.” Ka Whakamarinotia e Īhu tētahi Marangai (Matiu 8.23-27; Māka 4.35-41)
8.22: Nā, i tētahi o aua rā ka eke ia, rātou ko āna ākonga ki te kai­puke, ā, ka mea ia ki a rātou, “Tātou ka whaka­whiti ki tāwāhi o te roto.” Nā, rere ana rātou.
8.23: Otirā, i a rātou e rere ana, ka moe ia. Nā, ko te pu­tanga o tētahi hau, he tūpuhi, ki te roto; ā, ka tomo rātou, tata pū te totohu.
8.24: Nā, ka haere rātou, ka whaka­ara i a ia, ka mea, “E kara, e kara, ka mate tātou!” Nā, ka ara ia, ā, rīria ana e ia te hau, me te ngaru o te moana; ā, mutu iho, nā, kua marino.
8.25: Nā, ka mea ia ki a rātou, “Kei hea tō koutou whaka­pono?” Mataku ana rātou, mīharo ana, ka mea ki a rātou anō, “Ko wai rā tēnei, ka tapa nei ki ngā hau, ki te moana, ā, rongo rawa ki a ia?” Ka Whakaorangia e Īhu tētahi Tangata he Rēwera Ōna (Matiu 8.28-34; Māka 5.1-20)
8.26: Nā, ka tae rātou ki te whenua o ngā Kararini, ki tāwāhi atu o Kariri.
8.27: Ā, nō tōna haere­nga atu ki uta, ka tūtaki ki a ia he tangata nō te pā, he rēwera ōna, he roa kāhore anō i mau kākahu, kīhai anō i noho i roto i te whare, engari ki ngā urupā.
8.28: Ā, i tōna kite­nga i a Īhu, ka karanga, ka takoto ki tōna aro­aro, he nui tōna reo ki te mea, “He aha tāku ki a koe e Īhu, e te Tama a te Atua, a te Runga Rawa? Ē, kaua rā ahau e whaka­mamae­tia.”
8.29: I mea hoki ia ki te wairua poke kia puta i taua tangata. He maha hoki ngā wā i hopu­kia ai ia e ia, e tiaki­na ana hoki ia, he mea here ki ngā meka­meka, ki ngā here wae­wae; heoi, motu­motu­hia ana e ia ngā here, ā, āia ana ia e te rēwera ki te koraha.
8.30: Nā, ka ui a Īhu ki a ia, “Ko wai tōu ingoa?” Ka mea ia, “Ko Rihiona,” he toko­maha hoki ngā rēwera i tomo ki roto ki a ia.
8.31: Kātahi ka īnoi rātou ki a ia kia kaua rātou e tonoa e ia kia haere ki te hōhonu.
8.32: Nā, i reira tētahi kāhui poaka maha e kai ana i runga i te maunga; ā, ka īnoi rātou ki a ia kia tukua rātou kia tomo ki aua poaka. Ā, tukua ana rātou.
8.33: Ā, ko te pu­tanga o aua rēwera i roto i te tangata, ka tomo ki roto ki ngā poaka, nā, ko te tino rere­nga o te kāhui rā te pari ki te moana, ā, paremo iho.
8.34: Ā, nō ka kite ngā kai­whāngai i taua mea i meatia, ka whati, ka haere ka kōrero ki te pā, ki aua whenua hoki.
8.35: Nā, ka haere rātou kia kite i taua mea i meatia, ā, i tō rātou taenga mai ki a Īhu, ka kite i te tangata i puta nei ngā rēwera i roto i a ia, kua oti te whaka­kākahu, kua tika ōna whaka­aro, e noho ana i ngā wae­wae o Īhu, ā, ka mataku rātou.
8.36: Ā, kōrero­tia ana ki a rātou e te hunga i kite, te whaka­ora­nga o te tangata i ngā rēwera.
8.37: Nā, ka mea te hui­hui katoa o ngā kāinga pātata o ngā Kararini kia mawehe atu ia i a rātou, i mataku whaka­hara­hara hoki rātou; ā, eke ana ia ki te kai­puke, hoki ana.
8.38: Otirā, ka īnoi ki a ia te tangata i puta rā ngā rēwera i roto i a ia, kia waiho ia hei hoa mōna. Heoi, ka tono atu a Īhu i a ia, ka mea,
8.39: “Hoki atu ki tōu whare, kōrero­tia ngā mea nui kua meinga nei e te Atua ki a koe.” Nā, haere ana ia, kōrero­tia ana ki te pā katoa ngā mea nui i mea ai a Īhu ki a ia. Te Tamāhine a Hairuha me te Wahine i Whakapā ki te Kākahu o Īhu (Matiu 9.18-26; Māka 5.21-43)
8.40: Ā, i a Īhu i hoki ai, ka koa te mano, i te tatari katoa hoki rātou ki a ia.
8.41: Nā, ka haere mai tētahi tangata, ko Hairuha te ingoa, he ranga­tira nō te whare kara­kia. Ā, takoto ana ki ngā wae­wae o Īhu, ka īnoi ki a ia kia tomo ki tōna whare.
8.42: Kotahi tāna tamā­hine, he hua­tahi kei te tekau mā rua ōna tau, nā, e whaka­hemo­hemo ana. Nā, i tōna haere­nga atu, ka popō ngā mano ki a ia.
8.43: Nā, tērā tētahi wahine e mate ana i te pākaru­hanga toto, tekau mā rua ngā tau, ā, poto katoa tōna oranga ki ngā rata, kīhai rawa i taea te whaka­ora e tētahi.
8.44: Ka haere ia i muri i a ia, ka pā ki te tāniko o tōna kākahu; ā, mutu iho te rere o ōna toto.
8.45: Nā, ka mea a Īhu, “Ko wai tēnei kua pā nei ki ahau?” Ā, nō ka whaka­kāhore katoa, ka mea a Pita rātou ko ōna hoa, “E kara, e pipiri ana ngā mano ki a koe, e tute­tute ana.”
8.46: Otirā, i mea a Īhu, “Ehara, kua pā tētahi ki ahau; e mōhio ana ahau, kua puta atu he mana i ahau.”
8.47: Ā, nō te kite­nga o te wahine kīhai ia i ngaro, haere wiri ana, takoto ana i tōna aro­aro, kōrero­tia ana e ia ki a ia i te aro­aro o te iwi katoa te take i pā ai ia ki a ia, me te hohoro o tōna oranga.
8.48: Nā, ka mea ia ki a ia, “E kō, nā tōu whaka­pono koe i ora ai; haere mārie.”
8.49: I a ia anō e kōrero ana, ka haere mai tētahi i te whare o te ranga­tira o te whare kara­kia, ka mea ki a ia, “Kua mate tāu tamā­hine; kaua e whaka­raru­raru i te Kai­whaka­ako.”
8.50: Otiia, i te rongo­nga o Īhu, ka whaka­hoki ki a ia, ka mea, “Kaua e mataku; ko te whaka­pono ia kia whaka­pono, ā, ka ora ia.”
8.51: Ā, i tōna tomo­kanga ki te whare, kīhai tētahi i tukua e ia kia tapoko, ko Pita anake, ko Hēmi, ko Hoani, me te pāpā rāua ko te whaea o te kōtiro.
8.52: E tangi ana rātou katoa, e auē ana mōna. Nā, ka mea ia, “Kaua e tangi; kāhore ia i mate, engari e moe ana.”
8.53: Ā, kata­ina iho ia e rātou, i mōhio hoki rātou kua mate ia.
8.54: Otirā, ka mau ia ki tōna ringa, ka karanga, ka mea, “E kō, e ara.”
8.55: Nā, hoki mai ana tōna wairua, ā, whaka­tika tonu ake ia. Nā ka whaka­hau­tia e ia kia hoatu he kai māna.
8.56: Ā, mīharo tonu ōna mātua; nā, ka whaka­tūpato ia i a rātou kia kaua e kōrero­tia taua mea­tanga ki tētahi.

9.1: Nā, ka karanga­tia e ia te tekau mā rua, ka hoatu ki a rātou he kaha, he mana, e peia ai ngā rēwera katoa, e ora ai ngā mate.
9.2: Ā, tonoa ana rātou e ia ki te kauwhau i te ranga­tira­tanga o te Atua, ki te whaka­ora hoki i te hunga e mate ana.
9.3: I mea anō ia ki a rātou, “Kaua tētahi mea e mauria ki te ara, kaua he toko­toko, kaua he pūtea, kaua he taro, kaua he moni; kaua anō e taki­rua­tia he koti.
9.4: Ā, ka tomo koutou ki tētahi whare, hei reira noho ai, ā, haere noa i reira.
9.5: Ā, ki te kāhore ētahi e manako ki a koutou, ina haere atu koutou i taua pā, ruia atu te puehu o ō koutou wae­wae, hei mea whaka­atu ki a rātou.”
9.6: Nā, ko tō rātou mawehe­tanga atu, ka hāere­erea e rātou ngā kāinga, me te kauwhau i te rongo­pai, me te whaka­ora i ngā wāhi katoa. Te Pororaru o Herora (Matiu 14.1-12; Māka 6.14-29)
9.7: Ā, ka rongo a Herora teta­raki i ngā mea katoa i meinga e ia; ā, he nui tōna poro­raru, nō te mea ki tā ētahi kī, kua ara mai a Hoani i te hunga mate.
9.8: Ki tā ētahi, kua puta mai a Irāia; ki tā ētahi, kua ara mai tētahi o ngā poro­piti ona­mata.
9.9: Nā, ka mea a Herora, “I pōutoa e ahau te māte­nga o Hoani; ko wai hoki tēnei mōna nei ēnei kōrero ka rangona nei e ahau?” Ā, ka whai ia kia kite i a ia. Ka Whāngaia e Īhu te Rima Mano (Matiu 14.13-21; Māka 6.30-44; Hoani 6.1-14)
9.10: Ā, nō te hoki­nga mai o ngā āpō­toro, ka kōrero­tia ki a ia ngā mea katoa i mea ai rātou. Ā, ka tango ia i a rātou, ka haere ko rātou anake ki tētahi pā, ko Petahaira te ingoa.
9.11: Otirā, i te kite­nga o ngā mano, ka aru i a ia; ā, ka manaaki ia i a rātou, ka kōrero­tia ki a rātou te ranga­tira­tanga o te Atua, whaka­ora­ngia ana hoki e ia te hunga e mea ana kia rongoā­tia.
9.12: Nā, kua tītaha haere te rā; ā, ka haere mai te tekau mā rua, ka mea ki a ia, “Tonoa te mano, kia haere ai ki ngā kāinga, ki ngā whenua i tētahi taha, i tētahi taha, moe ai, ki te mea kai hoki mā rātou; he wāhi koraha hoki tēnei i a tātou nei.”
9.13: Ā, ka mea ia ki a rātou, “Mā koutou e hoatu he kai mā rātou.” Ka mea rātou, “Heoi anō a mātou e rima ngā taro, e rua ngā ika; ki te kāhore anō ia mātou e haere ki te hoko kai mā tēnei iwi katoa.”
9.14: (Me te mea anō, e rima mano ngā tāne.) Ka mea ia ki āna ākonga, “Meinga rātou kia noho, kia rima tekau ki te nohoa­nga.”
9.15: Ā, pērā ana rātou, meinga katoa­tia ana kia noho.
9.16: Nā, ka mau ia ki ngā taro e rima, ki ngā ika e rua, ka ti­tiro ake ki te rangi, ka whaka­pai i aua mea, ka whawhati, ka hoatu ki ngā ākonga kia whaka­takoto­ria atu mā te mano.
9.17: Nā, ka kai rātou, ka mākona katoa; ā, kotahi tekau mā rua ngā kete i kohia ake e rātou, he toenga nā rātou nō ngā whati­whatinga. Te Pānuitanga a Pita mō Īhu (Matiu 16.13-19; Māka 8.27-29)
9.18: Ā, i a ia e īnoi ana ko ia anake, i a ia anō āna ākonga; nā, ka ui ia ki a rātou, ka mea, “Ko wai ahau ki te kī a te mano?”
9.19: Nā, ka whaka­hoki rātou, ka mea, “Ko Hoani Kai­iri­iri, ki tā ētahi ia; ko Irāia, ki tā ētahi; kua ara mai tētahi o ngā poro­piti ona­mata.”
9.20: Nā, ka mea ia ki a rātou, “Ki tā koutou nā kī, ko wai ahau?” Ka whaka­hoki a Pita, ka mea, “Ko te Karaiti a te Atua.” Ka Kōrero a Īhu mō Tōna Mamaetanga me Tōna Matenga (Matiu 16.20-28; Māka 8.30–9.1)
9.21: Kātahi ia ka whaka­tūpato i a rātou, ka mea, “Kia kaua tēnei e kōrero­tia ki te tangata.”
9.22: I mea anō ia, “Kua takoto te tikanga kia maha ngā mamae o te Tama a te tangata, kia whaka­kāhore­tia anō ia e ngā kaumātua, e ngā tohu­nga nui, e ngā kara­ipi, kia whaka­matea, ā, i te toru o ngā rā ka whaka­ara­hia.”
9.23: I mea anō ia ki a rātou katoa, “Ki te mea tētahi kia haere mai i muri i ahau, me whaka­kāhore ia e ia anō, me amo tōna rīpeka i ngā rā katoa, ka aru ai i ahau.
9.24: Ki te whai hoki tētahi kia ora, ka mate ia; otirā, ki te mate tētahi, mōna i whaka­aro ki ahau, ka ora ia.
9.25: He aha oti te pai ki te tangata, ki te riro i a ia te ao katoa, ā, ka ngaro ko ia anō, ka riro rānei i te hē?
9.26: Ki te whaka­mā hoki tētahi ki ahau, ā, ki āku kōrero, ka whaka­mā anō te Tama a te tangata ki a ia, ina haere mai ia i runga i tōna ake korōria, i te korōria hoki o te Matua, o ngā ana­hera tapu.
9.27: Nā, he pono tāku kōrero ki a koutou, tēnei anō ētahi o te hunga e tū nei e kore e pāngia e te mate, kia kite rā anō i te ranga­tira­tanga o te Atua.” Te Whakaahua Kētanga (Matiu 17.1-8; Māka 9.2-8)
9.28: Ā, ka tata ki te waru o ngā rā i muri i ēnei kōrero, ka mau ia ki a Pita, ki a Hoani, ki a Hēmi, ka haere ki runga ki te maunga ki te īnoi.
9.29: Ā, i a ia e īnoi ana, ka puta kē te āhua o tōna mata, mā tonu tōna kākahu, kanapa tonu.
9.30: Nā, toko­rua ngā tāngata e kōrero tahi ana me ia, ko Mohi rāua ko Irāia,
9.31: i puta korōria mai, i kōrero anō ki tōna mate­nga meāke nei rite i a ia ki Hiruhārama.
9.32: I pēhia hoki a Pita rātou ko ōna hoa e te moe; ā, i tō rātou aranga ake, ka kite i tōna korōria, me ngā tāngata toko­rua e tū tahi ana me ia.
9.33: Ā, i a rāua e mawehe atu ana i a ia, ka mea a Pita ki a Īhu, “E kara, he pai kia noho tātou i konei; nā, kia hangā e mātou ētahi wharau kia toru; kia kotahi mōu, kia kotahi mō Mohi, kia kotahi mō Irāia.” (Kīhai ia i mōhio ki tāna i kōrero ai.)
9.34: Ā, i a ia e kōrero ana i ēnei mea, ka puta he kapua, ā, tau­maru iho ana ki a rātou; ā, mataku ana rātou i tō rātou haere­nga ki roto ki te kapua.
9.35: Nā, ka puta mai he reo i te kapua e mea ana, “Ko tāku Tama tēnei, ko tāku i whiri­whiri ai; whaka­rongo ki a ia!”
9.36: Ā, nō te pu­tanga o te reo, ko Īhu anake i kitea. Ā, whaka­rongo puku ana rātou, kīhai hoki i kōrero­tia e rātou ki te tangata i aua rā tētahi o ngā mea i kite ai rātou. Ka Whakaorangia e Īhu te Tama he Wairua Poke Tōna (Matiu 17.14-18; Māka 9.14-27)
9.37: Nā, i te aonga ake o te rā, i a rātou kua tatū iho i runga i te maunga, he rahi te hui i tūtaki ki a ia.
9.38: Nā, ka karanga tētahi tangata i roto i te mano, ka mea, “Tēnā koa, e te Kai­whaka­ako, ti­tiro mai ki tāku tama; ko ia anake hoki tāku.
9.39: Nā, ka hopu te wairua i a ia, ina­mata ka hāmama. Nā, ka hae­hae i a ia, tutū ana te huka i a ia. Whaka­uaua ana te whaka­rere i a ia, ā, marū iho ia.
9.40: Ā, i te īnoi ahau ki āu ākonga kia peia ia ki waho; heoi, kīhai i taea e rātou.”
9.41: Nā, ka whaka­hoki a Īhu, ka mea, “E te uri whaka­pono kore, parori kē, kia pēhea te roa o tōku noho ki a koutou, o tōku manawa­nui ki a koutou? Kawea mai tāu tama ki konei.”
9.42: Nā, i a ia e haere mai ana, ka tāia iho ia e te rēwera, hae­haea iho. Nā, ka rīria te wairua poke e Īhu, ā, whaka­ora­ngia ana te tama­iti, hoatu ana ki tōna pāpā.
9.43: Oho mauri katoa ana rātou ki te nui o te Atua. Ka Kōrero anō a Īhu mō Tōna Matenga (Matiu 17.22-23; Māka 9.30-32) Ā, i a rātou e mīharo ana ki ngā mea katoa i meinga e Īhu, ka mea ia ki āna ākonga,
9.44: “Rongoātia ēnei kōrero ki roto ki ō koutou tari­nga; meāke hoki tukua te Tama a te tangata ki ngā ringa o ngā tāngata.”
9.45: Otirā, kīhai rātou i mōhio ki tēnei kupu, he mea huna hoki i a rātou, kei kite rātou; i mataku hoki rātou ki te ui ki a ia i taua kupu. Ko Wai te Nui Rawa (Matiu 18.1-5; Māka 9.33-37)
9.46: Nā, ka puta ake he kōrero­rero i roto i a rātou, ko wai o rātou te mea nui rawa.
9.47: Otirā, i te kite­nga o Īhu i te whaka­aro­aro­nga a ō rātou ngākau, ka mau ia ki tētahi tama­iti nohi­nohi, ā, whaka­tū­ria ana ki tōna taha,
9.48: ka mea ki a rātou, “Ki te manako tētahi ki tēnei tama­iti, nā te whaka­aro hoki ki tōku ingoa, e manako ana ia ki ahau. Ki te manako hoki tētahi ki ahau, e manako ana ia ki tōku kai­tono mai. Nā, ko te iti rawa i roto i a koutou katoa ko ia hei mea nui.” Ko ia ehara i te Hoa Whawhai, nō Koutou ia (Māka 9.38-40)
9.49: Nā, ka whaka­hoki a Hoani, ka mea, “E kara, i kite mātou i tētahi e pei rēwera ana i runga i tōu ingoa; ā, rīria iho e mātou, mōna kāhore e haere tahi tātou.”
9.50: Otirā, i mea a Īhu ki a ia, “Kaua e rīria; ki te mea hoki ehara tētahi i te hoa whawhai nō koutou, nō koutou ia.” Kīhai i Manakohia a Īhu e tētahi Kāinga Hamari
9.51: Ā, nō ka tata ngā rā mō tōna tango­hanga ki runga, ka whaka­mau tōna kanohi ki te haere ki Hiruhārama,
9.52: Ā, ka tonoa atu e ia he karere i mua i tōna aro­aro; ā, ka haere rātou, ka tomo ki tētahi kāinga o ngā Hamari ki te mea tuku­nga iho mōna.
9.53: Heoi, kīhai ērā i manako ki a ia, ko te āhua hoki o tōna kanohi me te mea e haere ana ia ki Hiruhārama.
9.54: Ā, nō te kite­nga o āna ākonga, o Hēmi rāua ko Hoani, ka mea rāua, “E te Ariki, e pai ana rānei koe kia kōrero­tia e māua he kāpura kia heke iho i te rangi, hei whaka­ngaro i a rātou?”
9.55: Otirā, ka tahuri ia, ka rīria rāua, “Kāhore kōrua e mātau nō tēhea wairua kōrua.
9.56: Kīhai hoki te Tama a te tangata i haere mai ki te whaka­mate tangata, engari ki te whaka­ora.” Nā, haere ana rātou he kāinga kē. Te Hunga e Hia-Whai i a Īhu (Matiu 8.19-22)
9.57: Ā, i a rātou e haere ana i te ara, ka mea tētahi tangata ki a ia, “Ka aru ahau i a koe ki ngā wāhi katoa e haere ai koe.”
9.58: Nā, ko te mea­tanga a Īhu ki a ia, “He rua o ngā pokiha, he kō­hanga o ngā manu o te rangi; tēnā ko te Tama a te tangata hore ōna wāhi e takoto ai tōna māte­nga.”
9.59: Ka mea ia ki tētahi atu, “Aru­mia mai ahau.” Ā, ka mea ia, “E te Ariki, tukua ahau kia mātua haere ki te tanu i tōku pāpā.”
9.60: Nā, ka mea a Īhu ki a ia, “Waiho mā ngā tū­pā­paku e tanu ō rātou nā tū­pā­paku. Ko koe ia me haere ki te kauwhau i te ranga­tira­tanga o te Atua.”
9.61: Ka mea hoki tētahi atu, “E te Ariki, ka aru ahau i a koe; otirā, tukua ahau kia mātua poro­poro­aki ki te hunga i tōku whare.”
9.62: Otirā, ka mea a Īhu ki a ia, “Ki te pā te ringa o tētahi ki te parau, ā, ka ti­tiro ki muri, e kore ia e tau mō te ranga­tira­tanga o te Atua.”

10.1: Nā, i muri i ēnei mea ka whaka­ritea e te Ariki ētahi atu e whitu tekau, ā, tonoa ana rātou taki­rua, taki­rua, i mua i a ia ki ngā pā katoa, ki ngā wāhi meāke nei ia haere ki reira.
10.2: I mea anō ia ki a rātou, “He nui te kotinga, ko ngā kai­mahi ia he rua­rua; nā īnoi atu ki te Ariki nāna te kotinga, kia tonoa e ia he kai­mahi ki tāna kotinga.
10.3: Haere! Nana, ka tonoa nei koutou e ahau, ānō he reme ki waenga­nui o ngā wuruhi.
10.4: Kaua e mauria he takoto­ranga moni, kaua he pūtea, kaua he hū; kaua anō e oha atu ki tētahi i te hua­rahi.
10.5: Ki te tomo koutou ki tētahi whare, mātua mea atu, ‘Kia tau te rangi­mārie ki tēnei whare.’
10.6: Ā, ki te mea kei reira te tama a te rangi­mārie, ka tau tā koutou rangi­mārie ki a ia; ki te kāhore, e hoki anō ki a koutou.
10.7: Nā, hei taua whare koutou noho ai, kai ai, inu ai i tā rātou e hōmai ai; ka tika hoki te utu mō te kai­mahi. Kaua e hāere­ere i tēnei whare ki tērā whare.
10.8: Ka tomo koutou ki tētahi pā, ā, ka manako rātou ki a koutou, kainga ngā mea e whaka­takoto­ria ana mā koutou.
10.9: Me whaka­ora te hunga mate o reira, ka mea ki a rātou, ‘Kua tata ki a koutou te ranga­tira­tanga o te Atua.’
10.10: Tēnā, ki te tomo koutou ki tētahi pā, ā, e kore rātou e manako ki a koutou, me haere atu ki ngā hua­rahi o reira, me kī atu,
10.11: ‘Nā, ko te puehu o tō koutou pā e piri nei ki a mātou, tēnei ka tahia atu nei e mātou ki a koutou; otirā, kia mōhio koutou ki tēnei, kua tata ki a koutou te ranga­tira­tanga o te Atua.’
10.12: Ko tāku kupu tēnei ki a koutou, Engari tō Horoma i taua rā e māmā i tō taua pā.” Ngā Taone Whakapono kore (Matiu 11.20-24)
10.13: “Auē, te mate mōu, e Kora­hina! Auē, te mate mōu, e Petahaira! Me i meatia hoki ki Tāira, ki Hairona ngā mere­kara kua meatia nei ki a kōrua, kua rīpe­netā kē rāua, he tara­tara hoki te kākahu, me te noho i roto i te punga­rehu.
10.14: Otirā, erangi tō Tāira, tō Hairona i te whaka­wā e māmā i tō kōrua.
10.15: Ā, ko koe, e Kaperenauma, tērā koe e ike­ike, ā, tae noa ki te rangi? Ka whaka­takā koe ki te rēinga.
10.16: “Ki te whaka­rongo tētahi ki a koutou, e whaka­rongo ana ia ki ahau; ki te whaka­kāhore tētahi ki a koutou, e whaka­kāhore ana ia ki ahau; ki te whaka­kāhore tētahi ki ahau, e whaka­kāhore ana ki tōku kai­tono mai.” Te Hokinga mai o te Whitu Tekau
10.17: Nā, hoki hari ana te whitu tekau, ka mea, “E te Ariki, rongo tonu ngā rēwera nei ki a mātou, he mea nā tōu ingoa!”
10.18: Ka mea ia ki a rātou, “I kite ahau i a Hātana, me te mea he uira te taka­nga i te rangi.
10.19: Nā, ka hoatu nei e ahau ki a koutou he mana e takahi ai koutou i runga i ngā nākahi, i ngā kopi­ona, i te kaha katoa anō o te hoa whawhai; ā, e kore rawa koutou e mate i tētahi mea.
10.20: Otirā, kaua e hari ki tēnei, ki ngā wairua ka riro nei ki raro i a koutou; ko tā koutou ia e tino hari ai, ko ō koutou ingoa kua oti te tuhi­tuhi ki te rangi!” Ka Hari a Īhu (Matiu 11.25-27; 13.16-17)
10.21: I taua wā anō ka hari ia i te Wairua Tapu, ka mea, “Ka whaka­whetai ahau ki a koe, e Pā, e te Ariki o te rangi, o te whenua, kua hunā nei hoki e koe ēnei mea i te hunga mātau, i te hunga mahara, ā, whaka­kitea ana ki ngā kō­hunga­hunga; āe rā, e Pā, i pai hoki te pēnei ki tāu ti­tiro.
10.22: “Kua oti ngā mea katoa te tuku ki ahau e tōku Matua; e kore anō tētahi e mātau ki te Tama ko wai ia, ko te Matua anake; ko wai rānei te Matua, ko te Tama anake, me te tangata anō hoki e pai ai te Tama kia whaka­kitea ia.”
10.23: Nā, ka tahuri ia ki ngā ākonga, ka mea puku atu, “Ka hari ngā kanohi e kite ana i ngā mea e kite nei koutou!
10.24: Ko tāku kupu hoki tēnei ki a koutou, he toko­maha ngā poro­piti me ngā kīngi i hia­hia kia kite i ngā mea e kite nei koutou, ā, kāhore i kite; kia rongo anō i ngā mea e rongo nei koutou, ā, kāhore i rongo.” Te Kupu Whakarite o te Hamari Pai
10.25: Nā, ka whaka­tika tētahi kai­whaka­ako o te ture, ka whaka­mā­tau­tau i a ia, ka mea, “E te Kai­whaka­ako, me aha ahau ka whi­whi ai ki te ora tonu?”
10.26: Ka mea ia ki a ia, “He aha te mea i tuhi­tuhia ki te ture? Ka pēhea tāu kōrero?”
10.27: Nā, ka whaka­hoki ia, ka mea, “ ‘Kia whaka­paua tōu ngākau, tōu wairua, tōu kaha, tōu hine­ngaro, ki te aroha ki te Ariki, ki tōu Atua; me aroha hoki ki tōu hoa tata ānō ko koe.’ ”
10.28: Ka mea ia ki a ia, “Ka tika tāu kōrero; meinga tēnei, ā, ka ora koe.”
10.29: Otirā, ka mea ia ki te whaka­tika i a ia, ka kī atu ki a Īhu, “Ko wai rā tōku hoa tata?”
10.30: Nā, ka whaka­hoki a Īhu, ka mea, “E haere iho ana tētahi tangata i Hiruhārama ki Heriko, ā, ka tūtaki ki ngā kai­pāhua, nā, ka huia ōna e rātou, ka tuki­tukia ia, ā, haere ana, whaka­rērea iho ia, me te mea kua mate.
10.31: Nā, ko tētahi tohu­nga e haere noa ana i taua ara, ā, i tōna kite­nga i a ia, ni­nihi kē ana nā tahaki.
10.32: I pēnā hoki tētahi Rīwaiti, tae kau ki taua wāhi, ka haere, ka ti­tiro, ni­nihi kē ana nā tahaki.
10.33: Otirā, ko tētahi Hamari e haere ana ki ngā whenua, i te taenga ki a ia, ka kite i a ia, ka aroha.
10.34: Nā, ka haere, ka takai i ōna patu­nga, ringi­hia iho ki te hinu, ki te wāina, ka whaka­noho i a ia ki tōna ake kararehe, ā, kawea ana ia ki te whare tira, ata­whai­tia ana ia.
10.35: I te aonga ake, i tōna haere­nga, ka tango­hia e ia e rua ngā pene, hoatu ana ki te tangata i te whare, ka mea ki a ia, ‘Māu ia e tiaki; ā, ki te maha atu āu mea e pau, māku koe e utu ina hoki mai ahau.’
10.36: “Nā, ki tōu whaka­aro, ko wai o tēnei toko­toru te hoa ōna i tūtaki nei ki ngā kai­pāhua?”
10.37: Ka mea ia, “Ko tērā i ata­whai­tia ai ia.” Nā, ka mea a Īhu ki a ia, “Haere, kia pērā anō tāu mahi.” Ka Toro a Īhu i a Māta rāua ko Meri
10.38: Ā, i tō rātou haere­nga atu, ka tomo ia ki tētahi kāinga, nā, ko tētahi wahine ko Māta te ingoa, i whaka­manu­hiri i a ia ki tōna whare.
10.39: He teina anō tōna, ko Meri te ingoa. Nā, ka noho tēnei ki ngā wae­wae o Īhu, whaka­rongo ai ki tāna kupu.
10.40: Nā, raru­raru noa iho a Māta i te nui o te mahi tuari, ā, haere ana, ka mea, “E te Ariki, he mea noa oti ki a koe kia waiho e tōku teina māku anake te tuari? Nā, kōrero atu kia haere mai ia hei hoa mōku.”
10.41: Ka whaka­hoki te Ariki, ka mea ki a ia, “E Māta, e Māta, e mā­nuka­nuka ana koe, e raru­raru ana ki ngā mea maha.
10.42: Kotahi ia te mea e matea ana; ā, kua whiri­whiria e Meri tēnā wāhi pai, e kore nei e tango­hia i a ia.”

11.1: Ā, i a ia e īnoi ana i tētahi wāhi, ā, ka mutu, ka kī atu tētahi o āna ākonga ki a ia, “E te Ariki, whaka­akona mātou ki te īnoi, me Hoani hoki i whaka­ako rā i āna ākonga.”
11.2: Ka mea ia ki a rātou, “Ka īnoi koutou, mea atu: ‘E tō mātou Matua i te rangi, kia tapu tōu ingoa. Kia tae mai tōu ranga­tira­tanga, kia meatia tāu e pai ai ki runga ki te whenua, kia rite anō ki tō te rangi.
11.3: Hōmai tā mātou taro ki a mātou, tō tēnei rā, tō tēnei rā.
11.4: Murua ō mātou hara; e murua ana hoki e mātou o ngā tāngata katoa e hara ana ki a mātou. Aua hoki mātou e kawea kia whaka­waia.’ ”
11.5: I mea anō ia ki a rātou, “Ko wai o koutou ki te mea he hoa tōna, ā, ka tae atu ki a ia i waenga­nui pō, ka mea ki a ia, ‘E hoa, hōmai ki ahau ētahi taro, kia toru.
11.6: Kua tae mai hoki tōku hoa ki ahau i te ara, kāhore āku mea e whaka­takoto ai ahau māna.’
11.7: Ā, ka whaka­hoki tērā i roto, ka mea, ‘Hōhā kī! Kāti rā; kua tū­taki­na noatia ake te tatau, kei te moenga mātou ko āku tama­riki; e kore e āhei kia whaka­tika atu ahau ki te hoatu ki a koe.’
11.8: Ko tāku kupu tēnei ki a koutou, ahakoa kāhore ia i whaka­tika ki te hoatu ki a ia, nō te mea he hoa nōna, mā tāna tohe anō ka ara ake ai ia, ka hoatu ai ki a ia i ngā mea i tonoa e ia.
11.9: “Ko tāku kupu anō tēnei ki a koutou; īnoi, ā, ka hoatu ki a koutou; e rapu, ā, ka kite koutou; pā­tukia, ā, ka uakina ki a koutou.
