11.10: Ka whi­whi hoki ngā tāngata katoa ina īnoi; ka kite ina rapu; ka uakina ki te tangata e pātuki ana.
11.11: Ko tēhea matua o koutou ki te īnoia e tāna tama tētahi taro, e hoatu rānei ki a ia he kāmaka? Ki te īnoia he ika, e hoatu rānei ki a ia he nākahi hei ika?
11.12: Ki te īnoia he hua manu, e hoatu rānei ki a ia he kopi­ona?
11.13: Ki te mea ko koutou, hunga kino nei, e mātau ana ki te hoatu mea papai ki ā koutou tama­riki; tērā noa ake te hōmai­tanga o te Wairua Tapu e tō koutou Matua i te rangi ki te hunga e īnoi ana ki a ia.” Ko Īhu rāua ko Perehepura (Matiu 12.22-30; Māka 3.20-27)
11.14: Nā, e pei rēwera ana ia, he mea wa­hangū anō hoki. Ā, nō te pu­tanga o te rēwera ki waho, ka kōrero te wa­hangū; ā, mīharo ana te mano.
11.15: Nā, ka mea ētahi o rātou, “Nā te ranga­tira o ngā rēwera, nā Perehepura, tāna peinga rēwera.”
11.16: Nā, ka whaka­mā­tau­tau ētahi, ka mea ki tētahi tohu i a ia i te rangi.
11.17: Otiia, i mātau ia ki ō rātou whaka­aro, ā, ka mea ki a rātou, “Ki te tahuri iho tētahi ranga­tira­tanga ki a ia anō, ka kore; ki te tahuri hoki tētahi whare ki tētahi whare, ka hinga.
11.18: Ā, ki te tahuri iho a Hātana ki a ia anō, me pēhea e tū ai tōna ranga­tira­tanga? E mea nā hoki koutou, nā Perehepura tāku peinga rēwera.
11.19: Nā, ki te mea nā Perehepura tāku peinga rēwera, nā wai te peinga a ā koutou tama? Mō konei hei kai­whaka­wā rātou mō koutou.
11.20: Tēnā ki te mea nā te ringa o te Atua tāku peinga rēwera, inā, kua tae mai te ranga­tira­tanga o te Atua ki a koutou.
11.21: “Ki te tiaki­na e te tangata kaha, he patu nei āna, tōna whare, ka āta takoto āna taonga.
11.22: Ki te puta mai ia te mea e kaha atu ana i a ia, ā, ka hinga tērā, nā, ka tango­hia āna patu i whaka­manawa ai ia, ka tu­whatu­whaia ōna taonga.
11.23: “Ko te tangata ehara i te hoa nōku, he hoa­riri ia ki ahau, ko te tangata kāhore e kohi­kohi tahi māua, e tī­tari­tari ana. Te Hokinga mai o te Wairua Poke (Matiu 12.43-45)
11.24: “Ka puta te wairua poke i roto i te tangata, ka hāere­ere ia rā ngā wāhi waikore rapu oki­oki­nga ai; ā, kāhore e kitea, ka mea ia, ‘Ka hoki ahau ki tōku whare i puta mai ai ahau.’
11.25: Ā, nō te taenga atu, roko­hanga atu kua oti te tahi­tahi, te whaka­pai­pai.
11.26: Nā, ka haere ia, ka tango i ētahi atu wairua toko­whitu, he kino atu i a ia; ā, ka tomo atu, ka noho i reira; ā, kino atu i te tīma­tanga te whaka­mutu­nga o taua tangata.” Te Hari Pono
11.27: Ā, i a ia e kōrero ana i ēnei mea, ka karanga ake tētahi wahine i roto i te mano, ka mea ki a ia, “Koa tonu te kōpū i kawea ai koe, me ngā ū i ngotea e koe.”
11.28: Anō rā hoki ko ia, “Engari rā, tino koa te hunga e whaka­rongo ana ki te kupu a te Atua, ā, e mahi ana.” Te Rapu mō tētahi Tohu (Matiu 12.38-42)
11.29: Ā, nō ka rūpeke te mano, ka anga ia ka kōrero, “He whaka­tupu­ranga kino tēnei; e rapu ana ki tētahi tohu, ā, e kore tētahi tohu e hoatu, ko te tohu anake o Hona poro­piti.
11.30: I waiho nei hoki a Hona hei tohu ki ngā tāngata o Ninewe, ka pērā anō te Tama a te tangata ki tēnei whaka­tupu­ranga.
11.31: Ka whaka­tika ngā­tahi te kuīni o te tonga i te whaka­wā­kanga me ngā tāngata o tēnei whaka­tupu­ranga, ka whaka­tau i te hē ki a rātou; i haere hoki ia i ngā pito o te whenua ki te whaka­rongo ki te whaka­aro nui o Horomona; ā, tēnei tētahi he nui kē atu i a Horomona.
11.32: Ka whaka­tika ngā­tahi ngā tāngata o Ninewe i te whaka­wā­kanga me tēnei whaka­tupu­ranga, ka whaka­tau i te hē ki a rātou, i rīpe­netā hoki rātou i te kauwhau­tanga a Hona; ā, tēnei tētahi he nui kē atu i a Hona!” Te Māramatanga o te Tinana (Matiu 5.15; 6.22-23)
11.33: “Ka tahuna te rama, e kore e waiho e te tangata ki te wāhi ngaro, ki raro rānei i te pūhera, engari ki runga ki te tū­ranga, kia kitea ai te mārama e te hunga e tomo atu ana.
11.34: Ko te kanohi te rama o te tinana. Nā, ki te ātea tōu kanohi, ka mārama anō tōu tinana katoa; tēnā ki te kino, ka pōuri anō hoki tōu tinana.
11.35: Nā reira, kia āta ti­tiro me­he­mea ehara i te pōuri te mārama i roto i a koe.
11.36: Nā, ki te mārama tōu tinana katoa, ā, ki te kore ōna wāhi pōuri, ka mārama katoa anō, me te mea ko te mura o te rama e whaka­mārama ana i a koe.” Ka Whakapae a Īhu i ngā Parihi me ngā Kaiako i te Ture (Matiu 23.1-36; Māka 12.38-40)
11.37: Nā, i a ia e kōrero ana, ka tono tētahi Parihi kia kai ia ki a ia; ā, haere ana ia ki roto, ka noho.
11.38: Ā, i te kite­nga o te Parihi, ka mīharo nō te mea kāhore ia e horoi i mua o te kainga.
11.39: Ka mea te Ariki ki a ia, “Tēnei koutou, e ngā Parihi, te horoi nei i waho o te kapu, o te rīhi; ko roto ia o koutou e kī ana i te pāhua, i te kino.
11.40: E te hunga kūware, kīhai ianei i hangā a roto e te kai­hanga o waho?
11.41: Engari, hoatu ngā mea o roto hei ata­whai­nga mō ngā rawa­kore; ā, ka mā ngā mea katoa ki a koutou.
11.42: “Otirā, auē, te mate mō koutou, e ngā Parihi! E hoatu ana hoki e koutou te wāhi whaka­tekau, o te miniti, o te rū, o ngā ota­ota katoa, ā, kapea ake te whaka­rite whaka­wā me te aroha ki te Atua; he tika anō ko ēnei kia meatia kia kaua anō hoki ērā e kapea.
11.43: “Auē, te mate mō koutou, e ngā Parihi! Ko tā koutou hoki e rawe ai ko ngā nohoa­nga ranga­tira i ngā whare kara­kia, me ngā oha­tanga i ngā kāinga hoko­hoko.
11.44: Auē, te mate mō koutou, e ngā kara­ipi, e ngā Parihi, e te hunga tini­hanga! E rite nā koutou ki ngā urupā ngaro, e kore e kitea e ngā tāngata e hāere­ere ana i runga.”
11.45: Nā, ka whaka­hoki tētahi o ngā kai­whaka­ako o te ture, ka mea ki a ia, “E te Kai­whaka­ako, he whaka­hē anō hoki mō mātou ēnei kōrero āu.”
11.46: Nā, ko tāna mea­tanga, “Auē, te mate mō koutou hoki, e ngā kai­whaka­ako o te ture! E whaka­waha ana hoki koutou i ngā tāngata ki ngā kawe­nga tai­maha rawa hei pīkau­nga, ā, e kore tētahi o ō koutou mati­hao e pā atu ki aua kawe­nga.
11.47: Auē, te mate mō koutou! Ko koutou nei hoki hei hanga i ngā urupā o ngā poro­piti, nā ō koutou mātua hoki rātou i whaka­mate.
11.48: Nā, he kai­whaka­atu koutou he kai­whakaae ki ngā mahi a ō koutou mātua; nā rātou hoki rātou i whaka­mate, ko koutou hoki hei hanga i ō rātou urupā.
11.49: Nā, konei anō te mātau­ranga o te Atua i mea ai, ‘Māku e tono he poro­piti, he āpō­toro ki a rātou, ā, ka whaka­mate, ka tūkino rātou i ētahi o rātou.’
11.50: Kia rapua ai he utu i tēnei whaka­papa­ranga mō te toto o ngā poro­piti katoa i ringi­hia nei nō te tīma­tanga rā anō o te ao;
11.51: nō te toto o Āpera, tae noa ki te toto o Hakaraia i mate nei ki waenga­nui o te āta o te wāhi tapu, āe rā, ka mea atu ahau ki a koutou, E rapua he utu i tēnei whaka­papa­ranga.
11.52: “Auē, te mate mō koutou, e ngā kai­whaka­ako o te ture! Kua tango­hia hoki e koutou te kī o te mātau­ranga; kīhai koutou i tomo ki roto, ā, i ārai hoki koutou i te hunga e tomo ana.”
11.53: Nā, i tōna pu­tanga mai ki waho, ā, ka tīmata te tohe­tohe kaha a ngā kara­ipi, a ngā Parihi ki a ia, he mea kia maha atu ai āna kōrero
11.54: e whaka­moho ana hoki, kia mau tētahi kupu a tōna māngai.

12.1: Nā, kei te hui­hui anō tērā ngā mano, tōna tini, nō ka taka­takahi i a rātou anō, ā, ka anga ia ka kōrero i te tua­tahi tonu ki āna ākonga, ka mea, “Kia tūpato i te rēwena o ngā Parihi; arā i te tini­hanga.
12.2: Kāhore hoki he mea i hīpoki­na e mahue te hura; kāhore hoki tētahi mea ngaro e mahue te mōhio.
12.3: Mō konei ko tā koutou e kōrero ai i te pōuri, ka rangona i te mārama. Ko tā koutou e kī ai ki te tari­nga i ngā rūma i roto rawa, ka kauwhau­tia i runga o ngā whare.” Koia hei Wehinga (Matiu 10.28-31)
12.4: “Nā, ko tāku kupu tēnei ki a koutou, e ōku hoa, kaua e wehi ki te hunga e whaka­mate nei i te tinana, ā muri iho kāhore he mea e taea e rātou.
12.5: Engari māku e whaka­atu ki a koutou tā koutou e wehi ai. E wehi ki a ia kei a ia nei te mana, i muri i tāna whaka­mate­nga, ki te maka ki Kehena. Āe rā hoki, ko tāku kupu tēnei ki a koutou, e wehi ki a ia!
12.6: “Kāhore ianei e hokona ngā pī­hoi­hoi e rima ki ngā pātene e rua, ā, kāhore tētahi o rātou e ware­ware i te Atua?
12.7: Heoi, kua oti katoa te tatau ngā makawe katoa nei o ō koutou māte­nga. Kaua e wehi; engari koutou i ngā pī­hoi­hoi maha.” Te Whākinga, te Whakahāwea rānei, i a te Karaiti (Matiu 10.32-33; 12.32; 10.19-20)
12.8: “Ko tāku kupu tēnei ki a koutou, ki te whaka­ae tētahi ki ahau i te aro­aro o ngā tāngata, ka whaka­ae­tia anō ia e te Tama a te tangata i te aro­aro o ngā ana­hera a te Atua.
12.9: Ki te whaka­kāhore tētahi i ahau i te aro­aro o ngā tāngata, ka whaka­kāhore­tia anō ia i te aro­aro o ngā ana­hera a te Atua.
12.10: “Ki te kōrero tētahi he whaka­hē mō te Tama a te tangata, ka murua tōna hara; tēnā ko te tangata e kohu­kohua ai te Wairua Tapu, e kore tōna e murua.
12.11: “Ki te kawea koutou ki ngā whare kara­kia, ki ngā ranga­tira, ki te hunga whai mana, kaua e mā­nuka­nuka ki te pēhea, ki te aha rānei e whaka­hoki atu ai koutou, ki tā koutou rānei e kōrero ai.
12.12: Mā te Wairua Tapu hoki koutou e ako i taua hāora anō ki ngā mea e tika ana kia kōrero­tia e koutou.” Te Kupu Whakarite o te Kūare Whai Rawa
12.13: Nā, ka mea tētahi i roto i te mano ki a ia, “E te Kai­whaka­ako, mea atu ki tōku tua­kana, kia wehea mai mōku tētahi wāhi o te kāinga.”
12.14: Nā, ko tāna mea­tanga ki a ia, “E te tangata nei, nā wai ahau i mea hei kai­whaka­wā, hei kai­wehe­wehe i waenga­nui i a koutou?”
12.15: I mea anō ia ki a rātou, “Kia mahara, kia tūpato ki te apo; ehara i te mea mā te nui o ngā taonga a te tangata e ora ai ia.”
12.16: Nā, ka kōrero­tia e ia tētahi kupu whaka­rite ki a rātou, ka mea: “Nā, he nui te hua o te whenua o tētahi tangata whai taonga.
12.17: Nā, ka whaka­aro­aro ia i roto i a ia, ‘Me pēhea ahau? Kāhore hoki ōku wāhi hei putu­nga mō āku hua.’
12.18: Ā, ka mea ia, ‘Tēnei tāku e mea ai, ka wā­wāhia e ahau ōku whare wīti, ā, ka hangā kia nui. Ā, ka kohiko­hia ki reira āku hua katoa, me āku taonga.
12.19: Kātahi ahau ka mea ki tōku wairua, E tōku wairua, ka maha āu mea papai kei te rongoā mō ngā tau e maha; noho noa iho, e kai, e inu, kia koa te ngākau.’
12.20: Otiia, ka mea te Atua ki a ia, ‘Kūware, ko ā tēnei pō anō tango­hia ai tōu wairua i a koe; ā, mā wai ngā mea kua pae nā i a koe?’
12.21: “Nā, ka pēnā te tangata e whaka­pū­ranga ana i te taonga māna ake, ā, kāhore e hua tāna whaka te Atua.” Whakawhirinaki ki te Atua (Matiu 6.25-34)
12.22: Nā, ka mea ia ki āna ākonga, “Koia ahau ka mea nei ki a koutou, kaua e mā­nuka­nuka ki tō koutou oranga, ki tā koutou e kai ai, ki te tinana rānei, ki tā koutou e kākahu ai.
12.23: Rahi atu te ora i te kai, me te tinana i te kākahu.
12.24: Whaka­aroa ngā raweni: kāhore nei e whaka­tō, kāhore e kokoti, kāhore ā rātou pākoro, kāhore he whare wīti, heoi, e whāngaia ana rātou e te Atua. Tērā noa ake koutou i ngā manu?
12.25: Ā, ko wai o koutou e taea e ia te whaka­aro iho, te hono tētahi wāhi ki tōna roa, kia kotahi te whatīa­nga?
12.26: Ā, ki te kore e taea e koutou te mea nohi­nohi rawa, he aha i mā­nuka­nuka ai ki tētahi atu?
12.27: Whaka­aroa ngā renga­renga, tō rātou tupu; e kore nei e mahi, e kore e miro, nā, ko tāku tēnei ki a koutou, kīhai a Horomona me tōna korōria katoa i rite ki tētahi o ēnei te whai kākahu.
12.28: Nā, ki te pēnei tā te Atua whaka­kākahu i te taru­taru i te pārae, kei reira āia­nei, ā, āpōpō ka makā ki te oumu. Tērā noa ake tāna i a koutou, e te hunga whaka­pono iti.
12.29: “Kaua rā e rapu ki tā koutou e kai ai, ki tā koutou e inu ai, kaua e tīrengi noa te whaka­aro.
12.30: E rapu ana hoki ngā iwi o te ao i ēnei mea katoa, otirā e mātau ana tō koutou Matua e matea ana e koutou ēnei mea.
12.31: Engari rapua te ranga­tira­tanga o te Atua, ā, ka tāpiri­tia ēnei mea katoa mā koutou.” Ngā Taonga i te Rangi (Matiu 6.19-21)
12.32: “Kaua e mataku, e te kāhui nohi­nohi; kua pai hoki tō koutou Matua ki te hōmai i te ranga­tira­tanga ki a koutou.
12.33: Hokona ō koutou taonga, hoatu he mea mā te hunga rawa­kore. Hangā mā koutou he pēke moni e kore e tawhito­tia, he taonga ki te rangi e kore e memeha, ki te wāhi e kore nei e tata atu te tāhae, e kore anō te huhu e kai.
12.34: Ko te wāhi hoki i tō koutou taonga, ko reira anō ō koutou ngākau.” Ngā Pononga Pono Mataara
12.35: “Whī­tiki­ria ō koutou hope, tahuna ngā rama kia kā;
12.36: ko tō koutou rite hei ngā tāngata e tatari ana ki tō rātou ranga­tira, ina hoki mai i te hākari o te mārena, mō tōna tae rawa mai, ka pātōtō, nā uaki tonu atu rātou ki a ia.
12.37: Ka koa ngā pono­nga e roko­hina mai e tō rātou ranga­tira, ā tōna taenga mai, e mata­ara ana. He pono tāku e mea nei ki a koutou, ka whī­tiki ia i a ia, ā, ka mea i a rātou kia noho, ka haere ki te mahi mea mā rātou.
12.38: Ā, ki te haere mai ia i te rua o ngā mataara­tanga, i te toru rānei, ā, ka roko­hina mai e pērā ana anō, ka koa aua pono­nga.
12.39: Otirā, kia mōhio koutou ki tēnei, me i mātau te tangata i te whare, ki te wā e haere mai ai te tāhae, kua mata­ara ia, ā, kāhore i tukua kia pokaia tōna whare.
12.40: Kia ta­ta­nga rā koutou, nō te mea e puta mai te Tama a te tangata i te hāora e kore ai koutou e mahara.” Te Pononga Pono, Ponokore Rānei (Matiu 24.45-51)
12.41: Nā, ka mea a Pita ki a ia, “E te Ariki, ki a mātou tēnei kupu whaka­rite e kōrero nei koe? Ki te katoa rānei?”
12.42: Nā, ka mea te Ariki, “Ko wai rā te tuari pono, mahara, e meinga e tōna ariki hei ranga­tira mō āna tāngata, hei hoatu i te mēhua kai i te wā e tika ai?
12.43: Ka koa taua pono­nga, ki te roko­hina e tōna ranga­tira ina tae mai, e pēnā ana.
12.44: He pono tāku e mea nei ki a koutou, ka meinga ia hei ranga­tira mō āna taonga katoa.
12.45: Otirā, ki te mea taua pono­nga i roto i tōna ngākau, ‘Ka roa te haere­nga mai o tōku ariki’; ā, ka anga, ka whiu i ngā pono­nga tāne, i ngā pono­nga wāhine, ka kai, ka inu, ka hau­rangi,
12.46: ka haere mai te ranga­tira o taua pono­nga i te rā e kore ai ia e mahara, i te hāora e kore ai ia e mōhio, ā, ka hau­topea ia, ka meinga mōna he wāhi i roto i te hunga whaka­pono kore.
12.47: “Nā, ko taua pono­nga, i mōhio nei ki tā tōna ranga­tira i pai ai, ā, kīhai i whaka­aro wawe, kīhai hoki i mea i tāna i pai ai, he maha ngā whiu mōna.
12.48: Tēnā, ko ia kīhai i mōhio, ā, i mahi i ngā mea e tika ai kia whiua, he toru­toru ngā whiu mōna. Ko te tangata hoki i nui te hoatu­tanga ki a ia he nui anō hei hōmai­tanga māna; ā, ko te tangata i nui te tuku­nga ki a ia, hira noa atu te mea e tonoa i a ia.” Ko Īhu te Pūtake o te Wehewehenga (Matiu 10.34-36)
12.49: “I haere mai ahau ki te maka kāpura ki te whenua; ā, ka pēhea ahau, me­he­mea kua kā kē?
12.50: Otirā, he iri­iri­nga tōku e iri­iria ai ahau; anō tōku tā­kare­kare kia oti rā anō!
12.51: E mea ana rānei koutou, i haere mai ahau ki te hōmai i te rangi­mārire ki te whenua? Tēnei tāku kupu ki a koutou, kāhore; engari i te wehe­wehe.
12.52: Hei ngā rā hoki e takoto ake nei ka toko­rima i roto i te whare kotahi, ā, ka tahuri ki a rātou anō, toko­toru ki te toko­rua, toko­rua ki te toko­toru.
12.53: Ka tahuri atu te pāpā ki te tama, te tama ki te pāpā, te whaea ki te tamā­hine, te tamā­hine ki tōna whaea, te hunga­wai wahine ki tāna hunao­nga wahine, me te hunao­nga wahine ki tōna hunga­wai wahine.” Te Mātau ki te Wā (Matiu 16.2-3)
12.54: Ā, i mea anō ia ki ngā mano, “Ka kite koutou i te kapua e puta mai ana i te hau­āuru, nā, mea tonu ake koutou, ‘He ua te haere mai nei,’ ā, ko ia anō ia.
12.55: Ka kite koutou i te tonga e pupuhi ana, ka mea koutou, ‘Meāke ko te wera­wera’, ā, ko ia anō ia.
12.56: E te hunga tini­hanga, e mātau ana koutou ki te ti­tiro ki te mata o te whenua, o te rangi; he aha koutou tē mātau ai ki te ti­tiro ki tēnei tāima? Whakaritea tōu Hoa Tauwhāinga (Matiu 5.25-26)
12.57: “Ā, he aha koutou tē whaka­aro noa ake ai i te mea tika?
12.58: I a kōrua ko tōu hoa tau­whāi­nga e haere ana ki te kai­whaka­wā, hei te hua­rahi anō kia kaha te mea kia makere atu ia i a koe; kei tōia koe e ia ki te kai­whaka­wā, ā, ka tukua koe e te kai­whaka­wā ki te kātipa, ā, ka makā koe e te kātipa ki te whare here­here.
12.59: Ko tāku kupu tēnei ki a koe, E kore rawa koe e puta mai i reira, kia poto rā anō ngā moni iti rawa te utu e koe.”

13.1: Nā, i reira ētahi i taua wā, nāna i kōrero ki a ia ngā tāngata o Kariri, i whaka­ranua nei ō rātou toto e Pirato ki ā rātou patu­nga tapu.
13.2: Nā, ka whaka­hoki ia, ka mea ki a rātou, “E mea ana rānei koutou, he hara rawa aua tāngata o Kariri i ngā tāngata katoa o Kariri, nō te mea he pērā ō rātou mate?
13.3: Nā, ko tāku kupu tēnei ki a koutou, kāhore; engari ki te kore koutou e rīpe­netā, ka pērā anō hoki koutou katoa te mate.
13.4: Me taua tekau mā waru i horoa nei e te pourewa o Hiroama, ā, mate iho, e mea ana oti koutou, he hara rawa rātou i ngā tāngata katoa e noho ana i Hiruhārama?
13.5: Ko tāku tēnei ki a koutou, kāhore; engari ki te kore koutou e rīpe­netā, ka pērā anō koutou katoa te mate.” Te Kupu Whakarite o te Rākau Piki Huakore
13.6: Ā, i kōrero­tia e ia tēnei kupu whaka­rite, “He piki tā tētahi tangata, he mea whaka­tō ki tāna māra wāina; nā, ka haere mai ia, ka rapu hua i runga, ā, kīhai i kitea.
13.7: Kātahi ia ka mea ki te kai­mahi wāina, ‘Nā, ka toru ēnei ōku tau e haere mai ana ki te rapu hua i runga i tēnei piki, heoi, kāhore i kitea. Tuaina ki raro; hei aha i mau­mau­ria ai hoki te whenua?’
13.8: Nā, ka whaka­hoki tērā, ka mea ki a ia, ‘E te ariki, waiho anō hoki i tēnei tau, kia keria rā anō e ahau ngā taha kia makā hoki he wai­rākau.
13.9: Ā, ki te whai hua ā houa­nga, ka waiho; ki te kāhore, māu e tua ki raro.’ ” Ka Whakaorangia e Īhu tētahi Wahine Memenge i te Hāpati
13.10: Ā, i roto ia i tētahi o ngā whare kara­kia e whaka­ako ana i te hāpati.
13.11: Nā, ko tētahi wahine, he wairua ngoi­kore tōna, kotahi tekau mā waru ngā tau, piko tonu, kīhai rawa i āhei te whaka­tika ake.
13.12: Ā, nō te kite­nga o Īhu i a ia, ka karanga atu ki a ia, ka mea ki a ia, “E kui, ka oti tōu ngoi­kore te whaka­matara.”
13.13: Nā, whaka­pā­kia iho e ia ōna ringa ki a ia, ā, kīhai i aha kua tika, whaka­korōria ana i te Atua.
13.14: Nā, he riri nōna mō Īhu i whaka­ora i te hāpati, ka kōrero te ranga­tira o te whare kara­kia, ka mea ki te mano, “E ono ngā rā e tika ai te tangata te mahi. Hei reira koutou haere mai ai kia whaka­ora­ngia, kauaka i te hāpati.”
13.15: Nā, ka whaka­hoki te Ariki ki a ia, ka mea, “E ngā tāngata tini­hanga, e kore ianei tēnei tangata, tēnei tangata o koutou e wewete i tāna kau i te hāpati, i tāna kāihe rānei, ka ārahi atu ai i te tū­ranga ki te whaka­inu?
13.16: Kāhore rānei tēnei wahine, he tamā­hine nei nā Āperahama, i herea nei e Hātana i ēnei tau tekau mā waru, e tika kia wete­kina i tōna here i te rā hāpati?”
13.17: Ā, nō ka kōrero­tia ēnei mea e ia, ka whaka­mā katoa te hunga e whaka­hē ana ki a ia, ā, hari katoa te mano ki ngā mea korōria katoa i meinga e ia. Te Kupu Whakarite o te Pua Nanī (Matiu 13.31-32; Māka 4.30-32)
13.18: Nā, ka mea ia, “He rite te ranga­tira­tanga o te Atua ki te aha? Ā, me whaka­rite e ahau ki te aha?
13.19: He rite ki te pua nanī, i kawea e te tangata, i ruia ki tāna kāri; ā, ka tupu, ka whaka­rākau, nō ka noho ngā manu o te rangi ki ōna manga.” Te Kupu Whakarite o te Rēwena (Matiu 13.33)
13.20: Ā, i mea anō ia, “Me whaka­rite e ahau te ranga­tira­tanga o te Atua ki te aha?
13.21: He rite ki te rēwena i tango­hia e tētahi wahine, ā, whao­ngia ana ki roto ki ngā mēhua parāoa e toru, nō ka rēwena­tia katoa.” Te Kūwaha Kūiti (Matiu 7.13-14, 21-23)
13.22: Ā, ka hāere­erea e ia ngā pā, ngā kāinga, whaka­ako ai, me te ahu tonu ki Hiruhārama.
13.23: Nā, ka mea tētahi ki a ia, “E te Ariki, he toru­toru koia te hunga e ora?” Nā, ko tāna mea­tanga ki a rātou,
13.24: “Kia kaha te tohe ki te tomo mā te kūwaha kūiti. Ko tāku kupu hoki tēnei ki a koutou, he toko­maha e whai ki te tomo, ā, e kore e taea.
13.25: Kia whaka­tika kau te tangata i te whare, kia tū­taki­na te tatau, kātahi koutou ka anga, ka tū i waho, ka pātuki ki te tatau, ka mea, ‘E te Ariki, uakina ki a mātou,’ nā, ka whaka­hoki ia, ka mea ki a koutou, ‘Kāhore ahau i mōhio ki a koutou, nō hea rānei.’
13.26: Ko reira koutou tīmata ai te mea, ‘Kua kai mātou, kua inu i tōu aro­aro, i whaka­ako anō koe i ō mātou hua­rahi.’
13.27: Ā, ka kī anō ia, ‘Ka mea atu ahau ki a koutou, kāhore ahau i mātau ki a koutou, nō hea rānei. Mawehe atu i ahau, e ngā kai­mahi katoa i te kino.’
13.28: Ko te wā tēnā o te tangi, o te tetēā o ngā niho, ina kite koutou i a Āperahama, i a Īhaka, i a Hākopa, i ngā poro­piti katoa, kei te ranga­tira­tanga o te Atua, ā, ko koutou kua makā ki waho.
13.29: Ā, ka haere mai rātou i te rā­whiti, i te hau­āuru, i te hau­raro, i te tonga, ka noho ki te ranga­tira­tanga o te Atua
13.30: Nā, tērā ētahi ō muri e meinga ki mua, me ētahi ō mua ki muri.” Te Aroha o Īhu ki Hiruhārama (Matiu 23.37-39)
13.31: I taua hāora anō ka tae mai ētahi Parihi, ka mea ki a ia, “Haere, whaka­rērea a konei; e hia­hia ana hoki a Herora kia whaka­matea koe.”
13.32: Ka mea ia ki a rātou, “Haere, mea atu ki taua pokiha, ‘Nā, tēnei ahau te pei rēwera nei, te mahi nei i te mahi whaka­ora āia­nei, āpōpō, ā, i te toru o ngā rā ka oti tāku.
13.33: Otiia, me hāere­ere ahau āia­nei, āpōpō, ā tahi rā; e kore hoki e āhei kia mate he poro­piti i waho o Hiruhārama.’
13.34: “E Hiruhārama, e Hiruhārama, e whaka­mate nei i ngā poro­piti, e āki nei ki te kāmaka i te hunga e tonoa ana ki a koe; anō te tini o āku mea­tanga kia whaka­minea āu tama­riki, kia pērā­tia me te hei­hei e whaka­mine nei i āna pī ki raro ki ōna pari­rau, ā, kīhai koutou i pai!
13.35: Nā, ka mahue atu ki a koutou tō koutou whare kia takoto noa ana. He pono tāku e mea nei ki a koutou, e kore koutou e kite i ahau, kia tae mai rā anō te rā e mea ai koutou, ‘Ka whaka­pai­ngia ia e haere mai ana i runga i te ingoa o te Ariki.’ ”

14.1: Ā, i tōna haere­nga ki te whare o tētahi o ngā ranga­tira, he Parihi, ki te kai taro i te hāpati, nā ti­tiro pū mai ana rātou ki a ia.
14.2: Nā, ko tētahi tangata i tōna aro­aro, he kōpū tetere tōna mate.
14.3: Nā, ka oho a Īhu, ka kōrero ki ngā kai­whaka­ako o te ture, ki ngā Parihi, ka mea, “He mea tika rānei te whaka­ora i te hāpati?”
14.4: Ā, kīhai rātou i kīkī. Nā, ka mau ia ki a ia, ā, whaka­ora­ngia ana, tukua ana kia haere.
14.5: Nā, ka whaka­hoki ia ki a rātou, ka mea, “Ki te taka te kāihe, te kau rānei, a tētahi o koutou ki te poka, e kore ianei e hūtia ake e ia i reira pū anō i te rā hāpati?”
14.6: Ā, kīhai i taea e rātou te utu ēnei kupu āna. Te Whakaiti me te Manaaki
14.7: Nā, ka kōrero­tia e ia tētahi kupu whaka­rite ki te hunga i karanga­tia, i tōna kite­nga i a rātou e whiri­whiri ana i ngā nohoa­nga ranga­tira; i mea ia ki a rātou,
14.8: “Ki te karanga­tia koe e tētahi ki te mārena, kaua e noho ki te noho­anga ranga­tira, kei karanga­tia hoki e ia tētahi he nui atu i a koe,
14.9: ā, ka haere mai te tangata i karanga­tia ai kōrua, ka mea ki a koe, ‘Tukua he nohoa­nga mō tēnei,’ ā, ka whaka­mā koe, ka haere ki tō muri rawa nohoa­nga noho ai.
14.10: Engari, ka karanga­tia koe, haere, e noho ki tō muri rawa nohoa­nga. Mō te tae rawa mai o te tangata nāna koe i karanga, nā, ka mea ia ki a koe, ‘E hoa, neke ake.’ Ko reira hoki koe whai korōria ai i te aro­aro o ngā tāngata e noho tahi ana koutou.
14.11: Ki te whaka­nui hoki tētahi i a ia, ka whaka­iti­tia; ki te whaka­iti tētahi i a ia, ka whaka­nuia.”
14.12: Nā, ka mea ia ki te tangata nāna nei ia i karanga, “E taka koe i te tina, i te hapa rānei, kaua e karanga­tia ōu hoa, kaua hoki ōu tēina, kaua hoki ōu whanau­nga, kaua anō ngā tāngata taonga e noho tata ana; kei karanga­tia anō koe, ā, ka whai utu koe.
14.13: Engari, ka taka hākari koe, karanga­tia ngā rawa­kore, ngā hauā, ngā kopa, ngā matapō.
14.14: Ā, ka koa koe; kāhore hoki ā rātou utu ki a koe; engari, ka utua koe ā te aranga o te hunga tika.” Te Kupu Whakarite o te Hākari Nui (Matiu 22.1-10)
14.15: Ā, nō ka rongo tētahi o te hunga e noho tahi ana ki te kai ki ēnei mea, ka mea ki a ia, “Ka koa te tangata kai taro i te ranga­tira­tanga o te Atua.”
14.16: Nā, ka mea ia ki a ia, “I takā he hapa nui e tētahi tangata, ā, he toko­maha i karanga­tia.
14.17: Ā, ka tonoa tāna pono­nga i te hāora o te hapa, hei mea ki te hunga i karanga­tia, ‘Haere mai; kua rite hoki ngā mea katoa.’
14.18: Nā, ka anga rātou katoa ka whaka­kāhore ngā­tahi. Ka mea tō mua ki a ia, ‘Kua hokona e ahau he māra, me haere ahau kia kite. E mea ana ahau ki a koe, kia tukua ahau kia whaka­kāhore.’
14.19: Nā, ko te mea­tanga a tētahi, ‘E rima taki­rua ngā ōkiha kua hokona e ahau, ka haere ahau ki te whaka­mātau. E mea ana ahau ki a koe, kia tukua ahau kia whaka­kāhore.’
14.20: I mea anō tētahi, ‘Kua mārena­tia ahau ki te wahine. He mea tēnei e kore ai ahau e āhei te haere atu.’
14.21: “Ā, ko te haere­nga mai o taua pono­nga, ka kōrero­tia ēnei mea ki tōna ranga­tira, nā, ka riri te tangata i te whare, ka mea ki tāna pono­nga, ‘Hohoro te haere ki ngā ara, ki ngā hua­rahi o te pā, āra­hina mai ki konei ngā rawa­kore, ngā ngonge­ngonge, ngā matapō, me ngā kopa.’
14.22: Nā, ka mea te pono­nga, ‘E kara, kua rite tāu i mea ai, ā, tēnei anō he wāhi takoto noa.’
14.23: Ā, ka mea te ranga­tira ki te pono­nga, ‘Haere ki ngā hua­rahi, ki ngā taiepa, tōia mai ki roto nei, kia kī ai tōku whare.
14.24: Ko tāku kupu hoki tēnei ki a koutou, e kore tētahi o aua tāngata i karanga­tia rā e kai i tāku hapa.’ ” Te Utu o te Meanga hei Ākonga (Matiu 10.37-38)
14.25: Nā, he tini te tangata i haere tahi me ia, ā, ka tahuri ia, ka mea ki a rātou,
14.26: “Ki te haere mai tētahi ki ahau, ā, ka kore e whaka­kino ki tōna pāpā, whaea, wahine, tama­riki, tēina, tuā­hine, āe rā ki te ora anō mōna ake, e kore ia e āhei hei ākonga māku.
14.27: Ki te kore tētahi e mau ki tōna rīpeka, e haere mai i muri i ahau, e kore ia e āhei hei ākonga māku.
14.28: “Ko wai hoki o koutou, ki te mea ia ki te hanga tau­maihi, e kore e mātua noho ki te tatau i ngā utu, me­he­mea e ranea ana āna mea hei whaka­oti?
14.29: Kei whaka­takoto ia i te tū­ranga, ka kore e taea te whaka­oti, ā, ka tāwai mai ki a ia te hunga katoa e mā­taki­taki ana,
14.30: ka mea, ‘I tīmata te tangata nei te hanga whare, ā, kīhai i taea te i whaka­oti.’
14.31: “Ko tēhea kīngi rānei e haere ana ki te whawhai ki tētahi atu kīngi, e kore e mātua noho, e whaka­aro, e taea rānei e ia me ngā mano kotahi tekau te tū ki te riri ki tērā e haere mai rā ki a ia me ngā mano e rua tekau?
14.32: Ā, ki te kāhore, i te mea i tawhiti anō tērā, ka tukua atu e ia he karere, ka mea ki ngā kaupapa e houhia ai te rongo.
14.33: Wai­hoki, ko te tangata o koutou e kore e whaka­rere i āna mea katoa, e kore e āhei hei ākonga māku. Tote Koretake (Matiu 5.13; Māka 9.50)
14.34: “Nō reira, he pai te tote; otirā ki te hemo te hā o te tote, mā te aha ka whai hā ai?
14.35: E kore e pai mō te whenua, e kore anō hei whaka­wairākau; ā, ka ākiri­tia ai e te tangata ki waho. Ko ia he tari­nga ōna hei whaka­rongo, kia rongo ia.”

15.1: Nā, ka whaka­tata ki a ia ngā pupiri­kana katoa me ngā tāngata hara, ki te whaka­rongo ki a ia.
15.2: Ā, ka amu­amu ngā Parihi, me ngā kara­ipi, ka mea, “E manako ana tēnei tangata ki ngā tāngata hara, e kai tahi ana me rātou.”
15.3: Nā, ka kōrero­tia e ia tēnei kupu whaka­rite ki a rātou, ā, ka mea:
15.4: “Ko tēhea tangata o koutou he rau āna hipi, ā, ka ngaro tētahi o rātou, e kore ianei e waiho e ia ngā mea e iwa tekau mā iwa i te koraha, ā, ka haere ki taua mea i ngaro, kia kitea rā anō?
15.5: Ā, ka kitea, ka waha i runga i ōna poko­hiwi, ka koa.
15.6: Ā, nō ka tae ki te whare, ka karanga­tia ōna hoa me ngā tāngata e noho tata ana, ka mea ki a rātou, ‘Kia hari tahi tātou; kua kitea hoki tāku hipi i ngaro.’
15.7: Ko tāku kupu tēnei ki a koutou, ka pērā anō te hari i te rangi mō te tangata hara kotahi ina rīpe­netā, nui atu i te hari mō ngā tāngata tika e iwa tekau mā iwa, kāhore nei ō rātou mea e rīpe­netā ai.” Te Moni Ngaro
15.8: “Ko tēhea wahine rānei, kotahi tekau nei āna moni hiriwa, ki te ngaro tētahi, e kore ianei ia e tahu i te rama, e tahi i te whare, e rapu mārie, kia kitea rā anō?
15.9: Ā, nō ka kitea, ka karanga­tia e ia ōna hoa me te hunga e noho tata ana, ka mea, ‘Kia hari tahi me ahau, kua kitea hoki tāku moni i ngaro rā.’
15.10: Wai­hoki, ko tāku kupu tēnei ki a koutou, he hari kei te aro­aro o ngā ana­hera a te Atua mō te tangata hara kotahi ina rīpe­netā.” Te Tama Ngaro
15.11: I mea anō ia, “Toko­rua ngā tama a tētahi tangata.
15.12: Ka mea tō muri o rāua ki tōna pāpā, ‘E pā, hōmai ki ahau te wāhi taonga e wehea e koe mōku.’ Nā, ka wehe­wehea e ia ki a rāua tōna oranga.
15.13: Ā, kīhai i maha ngā rā, ka kohiko­hia e te tama ō muri ngā mea katoa, ā, haere ana ki te whenua tawhiti, mau­mau­ria ana ōna taonga ki reira, he tō­rere­tanga ki te kino.
15.14: Ā, nō ka poto āna mea katoa, ka pā te matekai ki taua whenua, ā, ka tīmata ia te rawa­kore.
15.15: Nā, ka haere ia, ka piri ki tētahi o ngā tāngata o taua whenua; ka tonoa e ia ki āna māra ki te whāngai poaka.
15.16: I hia­hia hoki ia kia whaka­kīa tōna kōpū ki ngā kiri e kainga ana e ngā poaka, heoi, kīhai i hoatu e tētahi ki a ia.
15.17: Nō te hoki­nga ake ia o ōna whaka­aro, ka mea ia, ‘Anō te tini o ngā kai­mahi a tōku pāpā, he nui noa atu ā rātou taro, ko ahau ia ka ngaro i te kai­kore!
15.18: Ka whaka­tika ahau, ka haere ki tōku matua, ka mea ki a ia, E pā, kua hara ahau ki te rangi, ki tōu aro­aro anō.
15.19: Ā, heoi anō tikanga kia kīa ahau he tama nāu; meinga ahau kia rite ki tētahi o āu kai­mahi.’
15.20: Nā, ka whaka­tika ia, ā, haere ana ki tōna matua. “Nā, i a ia anō i tawhiti, ka kite tōna matua i a ia, ka aroha, ka oma, hinga iho ki tōna kakī kihi ana i a ia.
15.21: Nā, ko te mea­tanga a te tama ki a ia, ‘E pā, kua hara ahau ki te rangi, ki tōu aro­aro anō, ā, heoi anō tikanga kia kīa ahau he tama nāu.’
15.22: Nā, ka mea te matua ki āna pono­nga, ‘Kia hohoro te mau mai i te kākahu pai rawa, ā, ka whaka­kākahu ki a ia; hōmai hoki he mō­whiti mō tōna ringa, he hū hoki mō ōna wae­wae.
15.23: Kawea mai anō te kūao kau, te mea whāngai, patua, kia kai tātou, kia koa te ngākau.
15.24: Ko tēnei tama hoki āku i mate, ā, kua ora; i ngaro, ā, kua kitea.’ Ā, ka anga rātou ka koa.
15.25: “Nā, kei te māra tāna tama mātā­mua, ā, nō tōna haere­nga mai, ka whaka­tata ki te whare, ka rongo i te waiata, i te kani­kani.
15.26: Nā, karanga­tia ana e ia tētahi o ngā kai­mahi, ka ui atu, ‘He aha rā ēnei mea?’
15.27: Nā, ka mea mai tērā ki a ia, ‘Kua tae mai tōu teina; kua patua e tōu matua te kūao mōmona a te kau, nō te mea kua tae ora mai ia ki a ia.’
15.28: “Nā, ka riri ia, kīhai hoki i pai kia haere ki roto; me i reira ka haere atu tōna matua ki waho, ka tohe ki a ia.
15.29: Nā, ka whaka­hoki ia, ka mea ki tōna matua, ‘Nana, te tini o ngā tau i mahi ai ahau ki a koe, kāhore rawa hoki i taka­takahi i tāu kupu; heoi, kāhore rawa i hōmai e koe ki ahau he kūao koati, kia koa tahi ai ahau me ōku hoa.
15.30: Otirā, i te taenga mai o tēnei tama āu, i pau nei tōu oranga i a ia, rātou tahi ko ngā wāhine kairau, kua patua e koe te kūao mōmona a te kau māna.’
15.31: Nā, ka mea tērā ki a ia, ‘E tama, kei ahau tonu koe, māu hoki āku mea katoa.
15.32: He tika ia kia koa tātou, kia hari; i mate hoki tōu teina nei, ā, kua ora, i ngaro, ā, kua kitea.’ ”

16.1: Ā, i mea anō ia ki āna ākonga, “Tērā tētahi tangata whai rawa i mua, he tuari taonga tōna; ā, ka kōrero­tia ki a ia kei te mau­mau­ria e ia āna taonga.
16.2: Nā, karanga­tia ana ia e ia, ā, ka mea atu ia ki a ia, ‘He aha tēnei e rangona nei e ahau mōu? Kōrero­tia mai te tikanga o ngā mea i tuari­tia e koe; e kore hoki e āhei kia waiho koe hei tuari.’
16.3: Nā, ko te mea­tanga a taua tuari i roto i a ia, ‘Me aha ahau? E tango­hia ana hoki i ahau te tuari­tanga e tōku ariki; e kore ahau e kaha ki te keri; e whaka­mā ana ahau ki te tono mea māku.
16.4: E mōhio ana ahau ki tāku e mea ai, mō tōku peinga rawa­tanga atu i te tuari­tanga, ka ai ō rātou whare hei tuku­nga atu mōku.’
16.5: “Nā, ka karanga­tia e ia tēnei tangata, tēnei tangata o te hunga i a rātou nei ētahi mea a tōna ariki, ka mea ia ki te tua­tahi, ‘E hia ngā mea a tōku ariki i a koe?’
16.6: Nā, ka mea tērā, ‘Kotahi rau mēhua hinu.’ Nā, ko tāna mea­tanga ki a ia, ‘Tango­hia tāu puka­puka, hohoro te noho, tuhi­tuhia e rima tekau.’
16.7: Kātahi ia ka mea ki tētahi, ‘E hia hoki i a koe?’ ka mea ia, ‘Kotahi rau mēhua wīti.’ Nā, ka mea ia ki a ia, ‘Tango­hia tāu puka­puka, tuhi­tuhia e waru tekau.’
16.8: “Nā, ka mihia te tuari kino e tōna ariki, mōna i whai whaka­aro; engari hoki ngā tama­riki o tēnei ao, i tō rātou whaka­papa­ranga, nui kē te whaka­aro i tō ngā tama­riki o te mārama.
16.9: “Nā, ko tāku kupu tēnei ki a koutou, waiho te taonga kino hei mea i ētahi hoa aroha mō koutou; mō te hē rawa iho, ka ai he tuku­nga atu mō koutou ki ngā whare ora tonu.
16.10: Ko ia e pono ana ki te mea nohi­nohi rawa, e pono anō i te mea nui; ko ia e kore e tika i te mea nohi­nohi rawa, e kore anō e tika i te mea nui.
16.11: Nā, ki te kāhore i pono tā koutou mahi ki te taonga hē, mā wai e tuku ki a koutou hei tiaki i te taonga pono?
16.12: Ki te kāhore koutou i pono i te mea a te tangata kē, mā wai e hoatu he mea mā koutou ake ki a koutou?
16.13: “E kore e āhei i te pono­nga te mahi ki ngā ranga­tira toko­rua; ka kino hoki ki tētahi, ka aroha ki tētahi; ka ū rānei ki tētahi, ka whaka­hāwea ki tētahi. E kore e āhei i a koutou te mahi ki te Atua, ki te taonga.” Ētahi Pepeha a Īhu (Matiu 11.12-13; 5.31-32; Māka 10.11-12)
16.14: Ā, ko ngā Parihi, he hunga apoapo moni i rongo ki ēnei mea katoa, ā, ka whaka­hī rātou ki a ia.
16.15: Nā, ko tāna mea­tanga ki a rātou, “Ko koutou te hunga e whaka­tika­tika ana i a koutou anō i te aro­aro o ngā tāngata; ko te Atua ia e mātau ana ki ō koutou ngākau; ko te mea hoki e whaka­nuia ana e ngā tāngata hei mea whaka­riha­riha i te aro­aro o te Atua.
16.16: “I tutuki te ture me ngā poro­piti ki a Hoani; nō reira i kauwhau­tia mai ai te ranga­tira­tanga o te Atua, ā, tāruke ana ngā tāngata katoa ki roto.
16.17: Erangi te pahemo­tanga o te rangi, o te whenua e takoto noa ana, e kore ia tētahi tohu o te ture e taka.
16.18: “Ki te whaka­rere tētahi i tāna wahine, ā, ka mārena i tētahi atu, e pūremu ana ia; ki te mārena tētahi te wahine kua whaka­rērea e te tangata, e pūremu ana ia.” Te Tangata Whai Rawa me Raharuhi
16.19: “Nā, tērā tētahi tangata whai taonga i mua, he kākahu pāpura ōna, he rīnena pai, ā, ko tāna mahi he kai tonu i ngā kai papai i ngā rā katoa.
16.20: Nā, ka whaka­takoto­ria ki tōna kūwaha tētahi tangata rawa­kore, ko Raharuhi te ingoa, he tū­whenua,
16.21: e hia­hia ana hoki kia whāngaia ki ngā konga­konga e nga­horo ana i te tēpu a te tangata taonga; ā, ko ngā kurī rawa hoki i haere mai, ka miti­miti i ōna mate.
16.22: “Nāwai ā, ka mate te tangata rawa­kore, ā, kawea ana e ngā ana­hera ki te uma o Āperahama. Ā, ka mate hoki ko te tangata taonga, ā, tanu­mia ana.
16.23: Ā, i te rēinga ka ti­tiro ake ia, i a ia e whaka­mamae­tia ana, ka kite i a Āperahama i tawhiti, me Raharuhi i tōna uma.
16.24: Nā, ka karanga ia, ka mea, ‘E pā, e Āperahama, kia aroha ki ahau, tonoa mai hoki a Raharuhi ki te tou i te pito o tōna mati­hao ki te wai, hei whaka­mātao i tōku arero; e mamae ana hoki ahau i tēnei mura.’
16.25: “Otirā, ka mea a Āperahama, ‘E tama, kia mahara kua riro i a koe āu mea papai i a koe e ora ana, he kino ia ngā mea i a Raharuhi; nā, ka whaka­mārie­tia nei ia, e whaka­mamae­tia ana koe.
16.26: Hāunga anō ēnei mea katoa, kua oti te whaka­pūmau tētahi tawhā nui i waenga­nui o koutou, o mātou. Ā, ki te mea ētahi ki te whaka­whiti atu i konei ki a koutou, e kore e āhei; e kore anō e whiti mai i konā ki a mātou.’
16.27: Anō rā ko tērā, ‘Koia ahau ka mea nei ki a koe, e pā, kia tonoa ia ki te whare o tōku pāpā;
16.28: toko­rima hoki ōku tēina? Kia kōrero ai ia ki a rātou, kei haere mai hoki rātou ki tēnei wāhi mamae.’
16.29: “Ka mea a Āperahama ki a ia, ‘Kei a rātou rā a Mohi rātou ko ngā poro­piti; me whaka­rongo ki a rātou.’
16.30: Ka mea ia, ‘Kāhore, e pā, e Āperahama, engari ki te haere atu tētahi ki a rātou o te hunga mate, ka rīpe­netā rātou.’
16.31: Nā, ka mea tērā ki a ia, ‘Ki te kore rātou e whaka­rongo ki a Mohi, ki ngā poro­piti hoki, e kore anō e whaka­ae ahakoa ara ake te tangata i te hunga mate.’ ”

17.1: Nā, ka mea ia ki āna ākonga, “E kore e taea te whaka­kāhore te pu­tanga o ngā take hē; otiia, auē te mate mō te tangata e puta ai!
17.2: He nui te pai ki a ia ki te whaka­tārewa­tia ki tōna kakī te kōhatu mira kāihe, kia makā hoki ia ki te moana, ā, kia kaua e taka i a ia ki te hē tētahi ēnei mea no­nohi.
17.3: Kia tūpato ki a koutou! “Ki te hara tōu teina ki a koe, rīria; ā, ki te rīpe­netā, murua tōna.
17.4: Ā, ki te whitu ngā hara­nga ki a koe i te rā kotahi, ā, ka whitu ōna hoki­nga mai ki a koe, ā, ka mea, ‘E rīpe­netā ana ahau,’ murua tōna.” Te Whakapono
17.5: Ā, ka mea ngā āpō­toro ki te Ariki, “Whaka­nuia tō mātou whaka­pono.”
17.6: Nā, ka mea te Ariki, “Ki te mea he whaka­pono tō koutou, me te pua nanī te rahi, ka mea koutou ki tēnei hika­maina, ‘Kia rangā atu koe, kia whaka­tō­kia ki te moana,’ nā, ka rongo ki a koutou. Te Mahi i Whakaritea mā te Pononga
17.7: “Nā, ko wai o koutou he pono­nga tāna e parau ana, e tiaki ana rānei i ngā hipi, e mea atu ki a ia, i tōna hoki­nga mai i te māra, ‘Haere tonu mai, ka noho ki te kai’?
17.8: Ā, e kore e mea ki a ia, ‘Takā he hapa māku, ka whī­tiki ai i a koe, ka tuari mai ki ahau, kia mutu rā tāku kai, tāku inu; ā muri iho ka kai ai koe, ka inu ai’?
17.9: E whaka­whetai oti ia ki taua pono­nga, mōna i mea i ngā mea i whaka­haua ai ia?
17.10: Wai­hoki ko koutou, ka oti ngā mea katoa i whaka­haua ai koutou, ka kī atu, ‘He pono­nga hua­kore mātou; ko tā mātou i mea ai ko te mea anō i whaka­ritea kia mahia e mātou.’ ” Ka Whakaorangia e Īhu ngā Tāne Tekau
17.11: Nā, i a rātou e haere ana ki Hiruhārama, ka haere ia rā waenga­nui o Hamaria, o Kariri.
17.12: Ā, i a ia e tomo ana ki tētahi kāinga, kotahi tekau ngā tāngata i tūtaki ki a ia, he repera, nā, ka tū mai rātou i tawhiti.
17.13: Ka karanga, ka mea, “E kara, e Īhu, kia aroha ki a mātou.”
17.14: Ā, i tōna kite­nga atu, ka mea ki a rātou, “Haere, kia kite ngā tohu­nga i a koutou.” Ā, i a rātou e haere ana, nā kua mā.
17.15: Ā, nō te kite­nga o tētahi o rātou kua ora ia, ka hoki, ā, he rahi tōna reo ki te whaka­korōria i te Atua.
17.16: Ā, takoto tāpapa ana ia ki ōna wae­wae, ka whaka­whetai ki a ia. Ā, nō Hamaria ia.
17.17: Ā, ka oho atu a Īhu, ka mea, “Kīhai rānei te tekau i whaka­ora­ngia? Ā, kei hea ngā toko­iwa?
17.18: Heoi anō, ngā mea i kitea e hoki mai ana ki te hōmai i te korōria ki te Atua, ko tēnei tangata iwi kē.”
17.19: Nā, ka mea ia ki a ia, “Whaka­tika, haere; nā tōu whaka­pono koe i ora ai.” Te Haerenga mai o te Rangatiratanga (Matiu 24.23-28, 37-41)
17.20: Ā, i te uinga a ngā Parihi ki a ia, ko āhea puta mai ai te ranga­tira­tanga o te Atua, ka whaka­hoki ia ki a rātou, ka mea, “E kore e kitea te pu­tanga mai o te ranga­tira­tanga o te Atua.
17.21: E kore anō rātou e mea, ‘Nā, tēnei!’, ‘Nā, tērā!’ Kei roto hoki i a koutou te ranga­tira­tanga o te Atua.”
17.22: Ā, ka mea ia ki ngā ākonga, “Tērā e tae mai ngā rā e hia­hia ai koutou kia kite i tētahi o ngā rā o te Tama a te tangata, ā, e kore koutou e kite.
17.23: Ā, e mea rātou ki a koutou, ‘Nā, tēnei!’, ‘Nā, tērā!’ Kaua e haere atu, kaua e aru atu.
17.24: Ka rite hoki ki te uira e hiko mai ana i tētahi wāhi i raro o te rangi; ā, tīaho atu ana ki tētahi atu wāhi i raro o te rangi. E pērā anō te Tama a te tangata ā tōna rā.
17.25: Otiia, ko te tikanga tēnei kia maha ngā mamae mōna i mua, kia whaka­kino­ngia anō hoki e tēnei whaka­tupu­ranga.
17.26: Ka rite hoki ki ngā rā i a Noa ngā rā o te Tama a te tangata.
17.27: E kai ana rātou, e inu ana, e mārena ana, e tukua ana ki te mārena, taea noatia te rā i tomo ai a Noa ki te āka, ā, ko te pu­tanga mai o te wai­puke, nā, whaka­ngaro­mia katoa­tia rātou.
17.28: Ka rite anō hoki ki ngā rā i a Rota; e kai ana rātou, e inu ana, e hoko mai ana, e hoko atu ana, e whaka­tō ana, e hanga whare ana.
17.29: Heoi, i te rā i puta mai ai a Rota i Horoma, ka uaina he kāpura, he whānā­riki i te rangi, nā, whaka­ngaro­mia katoa­tia rātou.
17.30: Ka pērā anō ā te rā e whaka­kitea ai te Tama a te tangata.
17.31: “I taua rā, kei runga tētahi i te whare, me ōna taonga hoki i roto i te whare, kaua ia e heke iho ki te tiki i aua mea; ko te tangata hoki i te māra, kaua ia e hoki atu ki ngā mea ō muri.
17.32: Kia mahara ki te wahine a Rota.
17.33: Ki te whai tētahi kia ora ia, ka mate anō ia; ki te mate tētahi, ka ora anō ia.
17.34: Ko tāku kupu tēnei ki a koutou, I taua pō toko­rua i te moenga kotahi; kotahi e tango­hia, kotahi e waiho.
17.35: Toko­rua ngā wāhine e huri ana; kotahi e tango­hia, kotahi e waiho.
17.36: Toko­rua ngā tāngata i te māra; kotahi e tango­hia, kotahi e waiho.”
17.37: Nā, ka whaka­hoki rātou, ka mea ki ia, “Ko hea, e te Ariki?” Ka mea ia ki a rātou, “Ko te wāhi i te tū­pā­paku, ko reira hui­hui ai ngā ēkara.”

18.1: Nā, ka kōrero ia i tētahi kupu whaka­rite ki a rātou mō tēnei, kia īnoi rātou i ngā wā katoa, kia kaua e ngoi­kore.
18.2: I mea ia, “I tētahi pā tērā tētahi kai­whaka­wā, he tangata kīhai nei i wehi ki te Atua, kīhai anō i hopo­hopo ki te tangata.
18.3: I taua pā anō tētahi pouaru; ā, ka haere mai tērā ki a ia, ka mea, ‘Taki­takina tōku mate i tōku hoa tau­whāi­nga.’
18.4: Ā, he roa kīhai ia i pai, muri iho ka mea ia i roto i a ia, ‘Ahakoa kāhore ahau e wehi ki te Atua, e hopo­hopo ki te tangata,
18.5: heoi, ka pō­rea­rea ahau i te pouaru nei, nā, ka taki­takina e ahau tōna mate, kei haere tonu mai ka mate ahau i te hōhā.’ ”
18.6: Ka mea te Ariki, “Whaka­rongo ki tā te kai­whaka­wā kino i mea rā.
18.7: Ā, e kore rānei te Atua e ngaki i te mate o āna tāngata i whiri­whiri ai, e karanga nei ki a ia i te ao, i te pō, ahakoa whaka­roa noa ia ki a rātou?
18.8: Ko tāku kupu tēnei ki a koutou, ka hohoro ia te taki­taki i tō rātou mate. Otirā, ka tae mai te Tama a te tangata, e roko­hina mai rānei e ia he whaka­pono i runga i te whenua?” Te Kupu Whakarite o te Parihi me te Kaikohi Tāke
18.9: Nā, ka kōrero anō ia i tēnei kupu whaka­rite ki ētahi, i whaka­manawa nei ki a rātou anō he tika, i whaka­kore­kore ki ērā atu katoa,
18.10: “Toko­rua ngā tāngata i haere ki te teme­para ki te īnoi; he Parihi tētahi, ko tētahi he pupiri­kana.
18.11: “Tū ana te Parihi ko ia anake, ko tāna kara­kia tēnei, ‘E te Atua, ka whaka­whetai ahau ki a koe, nō te mea kāhore ahau e rite ki ērā atu tāngata, ki te hunga hao taonga, kino, pūremu, mōku hoki tē rite ki tēnei pupiri­kana.
18.12: Taki­rua āku nohoa­nga puku­tanga i te wiki, e hoatu ana e ahau te wāhi whaka­tekau o āku mea katoa.’
18.13: “Ko te pupiri­kana ia i tū mai i tawhiti, kīhai i mea kia anga ake ōna kanohi ki te rangi, heoi, pātuki ana ki tōna uma, ka mea, ‘E te Atua, tohu­ngia ahau, te tangata hara.’
18.14: Ko tāku kupu tēnei ki a koutou, nui atu te tika o tēnei i tō tērā i te hoki­nga ki tōna whare; ki te whaka­nui hoki tētahi i a ia, ka whaka­iti­tia; ki te whaka­iti tētahi i a ia, ka whaka­nuia.” Ka Manaakitia e Īhu ngā Tamariki Nonohi (Matiu 19.13-15; Māka 10.13-16)
18.15: Nā, ka kawea mai e rātou ki a ia ā rātou tama­riki no­nohi, kia pā ai ia ki a rātou; otiia, nō te kite­nga o āna ākonga, ka rīria atu rātou.
18.16: Otirā, ka karanga­tia atu rātou e Īhu ki a ia, ka mea ia, “Tukua ngā tama­riki no­nohi kia haere mai ki ahau, kaua hoki rātou e āraia atu; nō ngā pēnei hoki te ranga­tira­tanga o te Atua.
18.17: He pono tāku e mea nei ki a koutou, ki te kāhore e rite te tango a tētahi i te ranga­tira­tanga o te Atua ki tā te tama­iti nohi­nohi, e kore rawa ia e tomo ki roto.” He Tangata Whai Taonga (Matiu 19.16-30; Māka 10.17-31)
18.18: Nā, ka ui tētahi ranga­tira ki a ia, ka mea, “E te kai­whaka­ako pai, me aha ahau ka whi­whi ai ki te ora tonu?”
18.19: Nā, ko te mea­tanga a Īhu ki a ia, “He aha ahau i kīa ai e koe he pai? Kāhore tētahi i pai, kotahi anake, ko te Atua.
18.20: E mātau ana koe ki ngā ture, kaua e pūremu, kaua e patu tangata, kaua e tāhae, kaua e whaka­pae teka, whaka­hōnore­tia tōu pāpā me tōu whaea.”
18.21: Nā, ka mea ia, “Kua rite i ahau ēnei katoa nō tōku tama­riki­tanga ake.”
18.22: Ā, i te rongo­nga o Īhu ki tēnei, ka mea ki a ia, “Kotahi te mea kāhore anō i rite i a koe; hokona āu mea katoa, ka tuwha atu mā ngā mea rawa­kore, ā, e whai taonga koe ki te rangi, ā, haere mai i muri i ahau.”
18.23: Nā, ka rongo ia ki ēnei mea, ka pōuri rawa; he nui hoki ōna taonga.
18.24: Ā, ka kite a Īhu i a ia, ka mea, “Anō te whaka­uaua o te tapoko o te hunga taonga ki te ranga­tira­tanga o te Atua!
18.25: Erangi hoki te haere o te kāmera rā te kōwhao o te ngira e takoto noa ana, he whaka­uaua rawa ia te tomo o te tangata taonga ki roto ki te ranga­tira­tanga o te Atua.”
18.26: Nā, ka mea ngā kai­whaka­rongo, “Ko wai rā e ora?”
18.27: Otirā, i mea ia, “Ko ngā mea e kore e taea e te tangata, ka taea e te Atua.”
18.28: Ā, ka mea a Pita, “Nā, kua whaka­rērea nei e mātou ā mātou nei mea, ā, kua aru i a koe.”
18.29: Nā, ka mea ia ki a rātou, “He pono tāku e mea nei ki a koutou, kāhore he tangata i whaka­rere, he whare, he wahine, he tuā­kana, he mātua, he tama­riki, i te whaka­aro ki te ranga­tira­tanga o te Atua,
18.30: e kore e riro mai i a ia i tēnei wā ngā mea tini noa atu, ā, i te ao meāke puta ko te ora tonu.” Ngā Kōrerotanga a Īhu mō Tōna Matenga (Matiu 20.17-19; Māka 10.32-34)
18.31: Ā, ka mau ia ki te tekau mā rua, ka mea ki a rātou, “Nā, e haere ana tēnei tātou ki Hiruhārama, ā, ka rite katoa ngā mea i tuhi­tuhia e ngā poro­piti mō te Tama a te tangata.
18.32: Ka tukua hoki ia ki ngā tauiwi, ka tāwaia, ka whaka­tupu­ria kino­tia, ka tu­whai­na.
18.33: Ā, ka oti ia te whiu, ka whaka­matea, ā, i te toru o ngā rā ka ara.”
18.34: Ā, kīhai rātou i mātau ki tētahi o ēnei mea; he mea huna hoki i a rātou tēnei kupu, kīhai rātou i mōhio ki ngā mea i kōrero­tia. Ka Whakaorangia e Īhu tētahi Tangata Matapō Tono Mea (Matiu 20.29-34; Māka 10.46-52)
18.35: Ā, i a ia e whaka­tata ana ki Heriko, tērā tētahi matapō e noho ana i te taha o te hua­rahi e tono mea ana māna.
18.36: Ā, i tōna rongo­nga i te mano e haere ana, ka ui atu, “He aha tēnei?”
18.37: Ka mea rātou ki a ia, “Ko Īhu o Nahareta e haere ana.”
18.38: Kātahi ia ka karanga, ka mea, “E Īhu, e te Tama a Rāwiri, kia aroha ki ahau.”
18.39: Nā, ka rīria ia e te hunga i haere i mua kia noho puku; heoi rahi noa ake tāna karanga, “E te Tama a Rāwiri, kia aroha ki ahau.”
18.40: Nā, ka tū a Īhu, ka mea kia āra­hina mai ki a ia; ā, nō ka tata, ka ui ki a ia,
18.41: ka mea, “Kia ahatia koe e ahau”? Ka mea ia, “E te Ariki, kia ti­tiro ahau.”
18.42: Ka mea a Īhu ki a ia, “Ti­tiro; nā tōu whaka­pono koe i whaka­ora.”
18.43: Ā, ti­tiro tonu ake ia, ā, aru ana i a ia, me te whaka­korōria i te Atua; ā, nō te kite­nga o te iwi katoa, ka whaka­moe­miti ki te Atua.

19.1: Ā, ka tomo ia, ā, tika ana rā waenga­nui o Heriko.
19.2: Nā, ko tētahi tangata, ko Hakiaha te ingoa i huaina ai, he ranga­tira pupiri­kana, he tangata taonga anō.
19.3: I whai ia kia kite i a Īhu he pēhea rānei ia; heoi, kīhai i taea e ia i te mano, he tangata poto hoki.
19.4: Nā, ka oma ia ki mua, ā, kake ana ki tētahi hika­mora, kia kite i a ia, meāke hoki ia tika rā reira.
19.5: Ā, nō ka tae a Īhu ki taua wāhi, ka ti­tiro ake, ka mea ki a ia, “E Hakiaha, kia hohoro te heke iho; me noho hoki ahau ki tōu whare āia­nei.”
19.6: Ā, hohoro tonu tōna heke iho, ā, ka koa ki a ia hei manu­hiri māna.
19.7: Ā, i tō rātou kite­nga, ka amu­amu katoa, ka mea, “Kua riro ia ki te tangata hara noho ai.”
19.8: Nā, ka tū a Hakiaha, ka mea ki te Ariki, “E te Ariki, nā, e hoatu ana e ahau te hāwhe o āku taonga ki te hunga rawa­kore, ā, ki te mea kua riro hē mai i ahau te mea a tētahi, ka taki­whā­tia e ahau tāku utu.”
19.9: Nā, ko te mea­tanga a Īhu ki a ia, “Nō nāia­nei te ora i tae mai ai ki tēnei whare, he tama nei hoki ia nā Āperahama.
19.10: I haere mai hoki te Tama a te tangata ki te rapu, ki te whaka­ora i te mea i ngaro.” Te Kupu Whakarite o ngā Moni Koura (Matiu 25.14-30)
19.11: Ā, i a rātou e whaka­rongo ana ki ēnei mea ka kōrero­tia anō e ia tētahi kupu whaka­rite, nō te mea e tata ana ia ki Hiruhārama, e mea ana hoki rātou, ko taua wā pū anō whaka­kitea ai te ranga­tira­tanga o te Atua.
19.12: Nā reira ia ka mea, “I haere tētahi ranga­tira nui ki tētahi whenua mamao, kia riro mai i a ia tētahi ranga­tira­tanga, ka hoki mai ai.
19.13: Kotahi tekau āna pono­nga i karanga­tia e ia, kotahi tekau ngā pāuna i hoatu e ia ki a rātou, ka mea ki a rātou, ‘Mahia ēnei, kia hoki mai rā anō ahau.’
19.14: Otirā, i kino tōna iwi ki a ia, ka tono karere i muri i a ia, ka mea, ‘E kore mātou e pai ki tēnei hei kīngi mō mātou.’
19.15: “Ā, i tōna hoki­nga mai, kua riro mai hoki i a ia te ranga­tira­tanga, ka mea kia karanga­tia ki a ia aua pono­nga, i hoatu nei e ia te moni ki a rātou, kia kite ai ia i tā tētahi, i tā tētahi i mahi ai.
19.16: Ka tae mai tō mua, ka mea, ‘E te ariki, ka nga­huru ngā pāuna kua mahia ki tāu pāuna.’
19.17: Ka mea ia ki a ia, ‘Ka pai, e te pono­nga pai; pono tonu tāu mahi i te mea nohi­nohi rawa, nā, hei ranga­tira koe mō ngā pā kotahi tekau.’
19.18: Ā, ko te haere­nga mai o te tuarua, ka mea, ‘E te ariki, e rima ngā pāuna kua mahia ki tāu pāuna.’
19.19: Ka mea ia ki tēnei, ‘Hei ranga­tira anō koe mō ngā pā e rima.’
19.20: “Nā, ko te haere­nga mai o tētahi, ka mea, ‘E te ariki, nā, tāu pāuna, i te rongoā hoki i ahau i roto i te tauera.
19.21: I mataku hoki ahau i a koe, nō te mea he tangata uaua koe; e tango ana koe i te mea kīhai i whaka­takoto­ria iho e koe, e kokoti ana i te mea kīhai i ruia e koe.’
19.22: Nā, ko tāna mea­tanga ki a ia, ‘Kei tā tōu māngai he whaka­hēa­nga māku i a koe, e te pono­nga kino. I mōhio koe he tangata uaua ahau, e tango ana i te mea kīhai i whaka­takoto­ria e ahau, e kokoti ana i te mea kīhai i ruia e ahau.
19.23: He aha koe tē hoatu ai i tāku moni ki te pēke, pēnei kua riro mai taua mea i ahau, me ōna hua anō, i tōku taenga mai?’
19.24: “Nā, ka mea ia ki te hunga e tū tata ana, ‘Tango­hia te pāuna i a ia, hoatu hoki ki tērā i ngā pāuna kotahi tekau.’
19.25: Ka mea rātou ki a ia, ‘E te ariki kotahi nei tekau āna pāuna.’
19.26: ‘Ko tāku kupu hoki tēnei ki a koutou, Ki te whai mea tētahi, ka hoatu anō ki a ia; ki te kāhore he mea a tētahi, ko āna mea ake ka tango­hia i a ia.
19.27: Tēnā ko aua hoa­riri ōku kīhai nei i pai ki ahau hei kīngi mō rātou, āra­hina mai ki konei, ka patu ki tōku aro­aro!’ ” Te Tomonga Manahau ki Hiruhārama (Matiu 21.1-11; Māka 11.1-11; Hoani 12.12-19)
19.28: Ā, nō ka mutu ēnei kōrero, ka tūria atu e ia ki mua, ka haere ki Hiruhārama.
19.29: Ā, nō ka tata ia ki Petapaki, ki Petani, ki te maunga e kīa nei ko tō ngā Ōriwa, nā, toko­rua āna ākonga i tonoa e ia.
19.30: I mea ia, “Haere kōrua ki te kāinga e anga mai ana ki a kōrua; ā, nō ka tomo atu, ka kite kōrua i tētahi kūao kāihe e here ana, he mea kāhore anō i nohoia noatia e te tangata. Wete­kina, āra­hina mai.
19.31: Ki te mea hoki tētahi, ki a kōrua, ‘He aha i wete­kina ai e kōrua?’ Kia pēnei tā kōrua kī atu, ‘E mea ana te Ariki ki a ia mōna.’ ”
19.32: Nā, haere atu ana te hunga i tonoa, roko­hanga atu, rite tonu ki tāna i kōrero ai ki a rāua.
19.33: Nā, i a rāua e wewete ana i te kūao, ka mea ōna ranga­tira ki a rāua “He aha kōrua ka wewete ai i te kūao nā?”
19.34: Nā, ko tā rāua mea­tanga atu, “E mea ana te Ariki ki a ia mōna,”
19.35: nā, ka āra­hina ia ki a Īhu; ā, pangā iho e rāua ō rāua kākahu ki runga ki te kūao, whaka­noho­ia ana a Īhu ki runga.
19.36: Ā, i a ia e haere ana, ka whā­riki­tia ō rātou kākahu ki te hua­rahi.
19.37: Ā, i a ia e whaka­tata ana ki te heke­tanga o Maunga Ōriwa, ka koa te hui­hui katoa o ngā ākonga, ka anga, ka whaka­moe­miti ki te Atua, he nui hoki te reo, mō ngā mere­kara katoa i kite ai rātou;
19.38: ka mea, “Ka whaka­pai­ngia te Kīngi e haere mai ana i runga i te ingoa o te Ariki! He rongo mau ki runga ki te rangi, he korōria ki runga rawa.”
19.39: Nā, ka mea ētahi o ngā Parihi i roto i te mano ki a ia, “E te Kai­whaka­ako, rīria āu ākonga!”
19.40: Nā, ka whaka­hoki ia, ka mea, “Ko tāku kupu tēnei ki a koutou, me i noho puku ēnei, kua karanga ake ngā kāmaka.” Ka Tangi a Īhu mō Hiruhārama
19.41: Ā, nō ka tata ia, ka kite i te pā, ka tangi­hia e ia.
19.42: Ka mea ia, “Me i mōhio koe, ā, koe anō, ahakoa i tēnei rā nei anō ōu, ki ngā mea e mau ai tōu rongo! Ko tēnei kua huna atu i ōu kanohi.
19.43: Tērā hoki e tae mai ngā rā ki a koe, e hangā ai e ōu hoa­riri he pare­pare mōu ā taka noa, ā, ka kara­potia koe, ka kōpania hoki i ngā taha katoa.
19.44: Ā, ka whaka­horoa koe ki raro, me āu tama­riki i roto i a koe. E kore anō e waiho tētahi kāmaka i runga i tētahi kāmaka i roto i a koe, nō te mea kīhai koe i mātau ki te wā i tiro­hia ai koe!” Ka Haere a Īhu ki te Temepara (Matiu 21.12-17; Māka 11.15-19; Hoani 2.13-22)
19.45: Ā, ka tomo ia ki te teme­para, ka anga, ka pei ki waho i te hunga i reira e hoko ana.
19.46: Ka mea ki a rātou, “Kua oti te tuhi­tuhi, ‘Ko tōku whare hei whare īnoi,’ ā, kua meinga nei e koutou hei ana mō ngā kai­pāhua!”
19.47: Ā, whaka­ako ana ia i te teme­para i ia rā, i ia rā. Otiia, ka rapu ngā tohu­nga nui me ngā kara­ipi me ngā ranga­tira o te iwi kia whaka­ngaro­mia ia.
19.48: Heoi, kīhai i kitea tā rātou e mea ai, nō te mea e ū ana ngā tāngata katoa ki a ia, e whaka­rongo ana.

20.1: Ā, i tētahi o aua rā, i a ia e whaka­ako ana i te iwi i roto i te teme­para, e kauwhau ana i te rongo­pai, ka tae mai ngā tohu­nga nui, ngā kara­ipi, me ngā kaumātua ki a ia,
20.2: ka kōrero ki a ia, ka mea, “Kōrero­tia mai ki a mātou te mana i mea ai koe i ēnei mea? Nā wai hoki i hoatu tēnā mana ki a koe?”
20.3: Ka whaka­hoki ia, ka mea ki a rātou, “Māku hoki e ui ki a koutou kia kotahi kupu; mā koutou e mea mai ki ahau.
20.4: Ko te iri­iri­nga a Hoani, nō te rangi rānei, nō te tangata rānei?”
20.5: Ā, ka kōrero rātou ki a rātou anō, ka mea, “Ki te mea tātou, ‘Nō te rangi,’ ka mea mai ia, ‘Ha, he aha koutou tē whaka­pono ai ki a ia?’
20.6: Ā, ki te mea tātou, ‘Nō te tangata,’ ka ākina tātou e te iwi katoa ki te kāmaka, e whaka­pono ana hoki rātou he poro­piti a Hoani.”
20.7: Nā, ka whaka­hokia e rātou, “E kore e kitea nō hea rānei.”
20.8: Nā, ko te mea­tanga a Īhu ki a rātou, “E kore anō e kōrero­tia e ahau ki a koutou te mana i mea ai ahau i ēnei mea.” Te Kupu Whakarite o ngā Kaimahi i roto i te Māra Wāina (Matiu 21.33-46; Māka 12.1-12)
20.9: Nā, ka anga ia, ka kōrero i tēnei kupu whaka­rite ki te iwi: “I whaka­tō­kia tētahi māra wāina e tētahi tangata, ā, tukua ana ki ngā kai­mahi, ā, haere ana ki tawhiti, ā, maha noa ngā rā.
20.10: Ā, i te pō i tika ai ka tonoa e ia he pono­nga ki ngā kai­mahi, kia hoatu ai e rātou ki a ia ētahi o ngā hua o te māra wāina; otirā, ka whiua ia e ngā kai­mahi, whaka­hokia kautia ana.
20.11: Nā, ka tonoa anō e ia tētahi atu pono­nga; ā, ka whiua anō ia e rātou, ka tūkino­tia, whaka­hokia kautia ana.
20.12: Nā, ka tonoa anō hoki tētahi e ia, te tua­toru, ā, tuki­tukia ana ia e rātou, makā ana ki waho.
20.13: Nā, ka mea te ranga­tira o te māra wāina, ‘Me pēhea ahau? Ka tonoa e ahau tāku tama, tāku e aroha nei, tērā pea rātou e hopo­hopo ki a ia.’
20.14: Otirā, nō te kite­nga o ngā kai­mahi i a ia, ka kōrero­rero ki a rātou anō, ka mea, ‘Ko te ranga­tira tēnei mōna te kāinga, tēnā, tātou ka whaka­mate i a ia, kia riro mai ai te kāinga i a tātou.’
20.15: Nā, makā ana ia ki waho o te māra wāina, whaka­matea iho. “Nā, ka aha te ranga­tira o te māra wāina ki a rātou?
20.16: Ka haere ia, ka whaka­ngaro i aua kai­mahi, ka hoatu te māra wāina ki ētahi atu.” Ā, ka rongo rātou, ka mea, “Kauaka!”
20.17: Ka ti­tiro ia ki a rātou, ka mea, “He aha rā tēnei kua oti nei te tuhi­tuhi, ‘Ko te kōhatu i kapea e ngā kai­hanga, kua meinga tēnei hei ūpoko mō te koko­nga?’
20.18: Nā, ki te hinga tētahi ki runga ki tēnei kōhatu, monga­monga noa; ki te hinga tēnei kōhatu ki runga ki tētahi, ngota­ngota noa ia, ānō he puehu.” Te Take e Pā ana ki te Hoatu Takoha (Matiu 22.15-22; Māka 12.13-17)
20.19: Nā, ka whai ngā tohu­nga nui me ngā kara­ipi kia hopu­kia ia i taua wā anō, ka mataku rātou i te iwi, i mōhio hoki rātou i kōrero­tia e ia tēnei kupu whaka­rite mō rātou.
20.20: Nā, ka āta tiro­hia ia e rātou, ka tonoa mai he kai­whaka­rongo, anō te āhua kei tō te hunga tika, hei hopu mō tāna kōrero, kia tukua ai ia ki te ranga­tira­tanga, ki te kaha o te kāwana.
20.21: Ā, ka ui rātou ki a ia, ka mea, “E te Kai­whaka­ako, e mōhio ana mātou he tika tāu e kōrero nei, e whaka­ako nei, e kore anō e manako­hia e koe te kanohi tangata, engari e whaka­ako pono ana koe i te hua­rahi o te Atua.
20.22: He mea tika rānei te hoatu takoha e mātou ki a Hīhā, kāhore rānei?”
20.23: Otirā, i kitea e ia tō rātou hīanga, ā, ka mea ki a rātou, “He aha koutou ka whaka­mā­tau­tau nei i ahau?
20.24: Kia kite ahau i tētahi pene. Nō wai tōna āhua me te tuhi­tuhi­nga?” Nā, ka whaka­hoki rātou, ka mea, “Nō Hīhā.”
20.25: Kātahi ia ka mea ki a rātou, “Hoatu rāpea ki a Hīhā ngā mea a Hīhā, ki te Atua anō ngā mea a te Atua.”
20.26: Heoi, kīhai i taea e rātou te hopu i tētahi kōrero āna i te aro­aro o te iwi; nā, ka mīharo rātou ki tāna kupu, ā, whaka­rongo kau ana. Te Take e Pā ana ki te Aranga ake i te Mate (Matiu 22.23-33; Māka 12.18-27)
20.27: Nā, ka tae mai ētahi o ngā Haruki e mea nei kāhore he aranga; ka ui ki a ia,
20.28: ka mea, “E te Kai­whaka­ako, i tuhi­tuhi a Mohi ki a mātou: ‘Ki te mate te tua­kana o tētahi tangata, he wahine anō tāna, ā, ka mate uri­kore ia, me tango te wahine e tōna teina, ka whaka­tupu uri ai mō tōna tua­kana.’
20.29: Nā, toko­whitu taua whānau; ka tango tō mua i te wahine, ā, mate uri­kore āna.
20.30: Nā, ka tango te tuarua i te wahine, ā, ka mate uri­kore anō ia.
20.31: Nā, ka tango te tua­toru i a ia; pēnei anō ngā toko­whitu, kāhore ā rātou tama­riki i waiho ai, ā, mate iho rātou.
20.32: Nā, muri iho i te katoa ka mate hoki te wahine.
20.33: Nā, i te aranga, mā wai o rātou te wahine? He wahine hoki ia nā te toko­whitu.”
20.34: Ka whaka­hoki a Īhu, ka mea ki a rātou, “E mārena ana, e hoatu ana ki te mārena, ngā tama­riki o tēnei ao.
20.35: Tēnā, ko te hunga e pai­ngia ana kia whi­whi ki tērā ao, ki te aranga anō i roto i te hunga mate, e kore e mārena, e kore anō e hoatu ki te mārena.
20.36: E kore anō rātou e āhei kia mate. E rite ana hoki ki ngā ana­hera, he tama hoki rātou nā te Atua, he tama nā te aranga.
20.37: Nā, ko te aranga o te hunga mate, kua whaka­kitea mai tēnā e Mohi i tāna mō te Rākau, i karanga­tia ai te Ariki ‘Ko te Atua o Āperahama, ko te Atua o Īhaka, ko te Atua o Hākopa.’
20.38: Nā, ehara ia i te Atua nō te hunga mate, engari nō te hunga ora, e ora katoa ana hoki i roto i a ia.”
20.39: Nā, ka whaka­hoki ētahi o ngā karai­pi ka mea, “E te Kai­whaka­ako, he pai tāu kōrero.”
20.40: Kīhai hoki rātou i māia ki te ui anō ki a ia i tētahi mea. Te Take e Pā ana ki te Karaiti (Matiu 22.41-46; Māka 12.35-37)
20.41: Nā, ka mea ia ki a rātou, “Nā te aha rātou i mea ai he tama nā Rāwiri a te Karaiti?
20.42: Kua mea nei a Rāwiri i te puka­puka o Ngā Waiata, ‘I mea te Ariki ki tōku Ariki, Hei tōku matau koe noho ai,
20.43: kia meinga rā anō e ahau ōu hoa­riri hei tū­ranga wae­wae mōu.’
20.44: Nā, ka kīa ia e Rāwiri he Ariki, ā, he pēhea i tama ai ki a ia?” Te Whakatūpato a Īhu ki ngā Kaiwhakaako o te Ture (Matiu 23.1-36; Māka 12.38-40)
20.45: Ā, i te iwi katoa e whaka­rongo ana, ka mea ia ki āna ākonga,
20.46: “Kia tūpato ki ngā kara­ipi, ko tā rātou nei e rawe ai ko ngā kākahu roroa ina hāere­ere rātou, e mate­nui ana ki ngā oha­tanga i ngā kāinga hoko­hoko, me ngā nohoa­nga ranga­tira i ngā whare kara­kia me ngā nohoa­nga ranga­tira i ngā hākari.
20.47: Pau ake hoki i a rātou ngā whare o ngā pouaru, e īnoi roa ana hoki, he āhua kau. Nui rawa te hē e tau ki a rātou!”

21.1: Nā, ka ti­tiro ake ia, ka kite i te hunga taonga, e maka ana i ā rātou moni hoatu noa ki te takoto­ranga moni.
21.2: Ā, ka kite ia i tētahi pouaru rawa­kore, e maka ana i ngā moni no­nohi rawa e rua ki reira.
21.3: Nā, ka mea ia, “He pono tāku e mea nei ki a koutou, nui kē tā tēnei pouaru rawa­kore i maka ai i a rātou katoa.
21.4: Ko rātou katoa hoki e makā ana ko tētahi wāhi o ā rātou mea hira noa atu ki roto ki ngā moni tuku noa, ko ia o tōna rawa­kore­tanga e maka ana i tōna oranga katoa.” Ka Kōrero a Īhu mō te Wāwāhinga o te Temepara (Matiu 24.1-2; Māka 13.1-2)
21.5: Ā, i ētahi e kōrero ana ki te teme­para, ka oti nei te whaka­pai­pai ki ngā kōhatu papai, ki ngā whaka­here, ka mea ia,
21.6: “Nā, ko ēnei mea e kite nei koutou; tērā e tae mai ngā rā e kore ai e toe tētahi kōhatu i runga i tētahi kōhatu; engari ka whaka­horoa.” Ngā Raruraru me ngā Whakatoinga (Matiu 24.3-14; Māka 13.3-13)
21.7: Nā, ka ui rātou ki a ia, ka mea, “E te Kai­whaka­ako, ko āhea ēnei mea? He aha hoki te tohu ina tata ēnei mea te puta?”
21.8: Ā, ka mea ia, “Kia mahara kei māminga­tia koutou; he toko­maha hoki e haere mai i runga i tōku ingoa, e mea, ‘Ko ahau ia, kua tata te tāima.’ Nā, kei whai i muri i a rātou.
21.9: Nā, ka rongo koutou ki ngā taua, ki ngā whaka­oho, kaua e mataku. Kua takoto hoki te tikanga mō ēnei mea kia mātua puta mai; taihoa ia te mutu­nga.”
21.10: Kātahi ia ka mea ki a rātou, “Ka whaka­tika tētahi iwi ki tētahi iwi, tētahi ranga­tira­tanga ki tētahi ranga­tira­tanga.
21.11: Tērā hoki e puta ngā rū nunui, ā, i ngā tini wāhi ka pā te matekai me ngā mate urutā, me ngā mea whaka­mataku hoki, me ngā tohu nunui o te rangi.
21.12: Ā, ko mua ake i ēnei mea katoa pā ai ō rātou ringa ki a koutou, tūkino ai i a koutou, tuku ai i a koutou ki ngā whare whaka­wā, ki ngā whare here­here, me te ārahi i a koutou ki ngā kīngi, ki ngā kāwana, mō tōku ingoa.
21.13: Ā, ka waiho ki a koutou hei tohu whaka­atu.
21.14: Nā, whaka­tatū­tia iho ki ō koutou ngākau, kia kaua e whaka­aroa wawe­tia tā koutou kupu e whaka­hoki atu ai.
21.15: Māku hoki e hoatu ki a koutou he māngai, he mātau­ranga, e kore e taea te whaka­kāhore, te pēhi, e ō koutou hoa whawhai katoa.
21.16: Ā, ka tukua atu koutou e ngā mātua, e ngā tēina, e ngā whanau­nga, e ngā hoa. Ka whaka­matea anō ētahi o koutou.
21.17: Ka kino anō ngā tāngata katoa ki a koutou, he whaka­aro ki tōku ingoa.
21.18: Otiia, e kore e ngaro tētahi makawe o ō koutou ūpoko.
21.19: Mā te manawa­nui e mau ai ō koutou wairua. Ka Kōrero a Īhu mō te Wāwāhinga o Hiruhārama (Matiu 24.15-21; Māka 13.14-19)
21.20: “Otirā, ka kite koutou i Hiruhārama e kara­potia ana e ngā taua, ko reira koutou mōhio ai, kua tata tōna whaka­ngaro­manga.
21.21: Hei reira kia oma te hunga i Hūria ki ngā maunga; me te hunga i waenga­nui ōna kia haere atu ki waho, kei haere hoki ki reira te hunga i ngā tua­whenua.
21.22: Ko ngā rā hoki ēnei o te rapu­nga utu, e rite ai ngā mea katoa kua oti te tuhi­tuhi.
21.23: Otirā, auē te mate o te hunga e hapū ana, o ngā mea e whāngai ana ki te ū, i aua rā! E nui hoki te aituā ki te whenua, me te riri ki tēnei iwi.
21.24: Ā, ka hinga rātou i te mata o te hoari, ka riro pārau ki ngā iwi katoa. Ā, ka taka­hia Hiruhārama e ngā tauiwi, kia rite rā anō ngā wā o ngā tauiwi. Te Haerenga mai o te Tama a te Tangata (Matiu 24.29-31; Māka 13.24-27)
21.25: “Ā, ka whai tohu te rā, te marama, me ngā whetū, ā, ki runga ki te whenua he pāwera nō ngā tauiwi, he tū­mata­te­nga ki te haruru o te moana, o te ngaru.
21.26: Ka whiti ngā tāngata i te mataku, i te manawa­pā ki ngā mea e puta mai ana ki te ao, e ngā­ueue hoki ngā mea kaha o ngā rangi.
21.27: Ko reira rātou kite ai i te Tama a te tangata e haere mai ana i runga i te kapua, me te kaha, me te korōria nui.
21.28: Ā, nō ka tīmata ēnei mea te puta, ti­tiro ake, kia ara hoki ō koutou māte­nga; ka tata hoki tō koutou whaka­ora­nga.” Te Whakaakoranga o te Rākau Piki (Matiu 24.32-35; Māka 13.28-31)
21.29: Nā, ka kōrero­tia e ia tētahi kupu whaka­rite ki a rātou: “Ti­tiro ki te piki, ki ngā rākau katoa.
21.30: I te mea e pihi ana, nā, ka kite koutou, ka mātau noa ake, kua tata te rau­mati.
21.31: Wai­hoki, ko koutou, ina kite i ēnei mea e puta ana, ka mātau kua tata te ranga­tira­tanga o te Atua.
21.32: “He pono tāku e mea nei ki a koutou, e kore rawa e pahemo tēnei whaka­tupu­ranga, kia puta rā anō ēnei mea katoa.
21.33: E pahemo te rangi me te whenua; ko āku kupu ia e kore e pahemo. Te Mea kia Mataara
21.34: “Otirā, kia tūpato ki a koutou anō, kei tai­maha ō koutou ngākau i te kakai, i te hau­rangi, i ngā raru­raru o te ao, ā, ka puta whaka­rere mai taua rā, ānō he reti, ki a koutou.
21.35: Ka puta hoki ki ngā tāngata katoa e noho ana i te mata o te whenua katoa.
21.36: Mō konei rā kia mata­ara, i ngā wā katoa kia īnoi tonu, kia pai­ngia ai koutou kia mawhiti i ēnei mea katoa meāke nei puta, kia tū hoki i te aro­aro o te Tama a te tangata.”
21.37: Ā, i ia rā e whaka­ako ana ia i roto i te teme­para, ā, i ia pō e haere ana, ka noho i te maunga e kīa nei ko te Maunga o ngā Ōriwa.
21.38: Ā, i te atatū ka haere mai ngā tāngata ki a ia ki te teme­para, ki te whaka­rongo ki a ia.

22.1: Nā, kua tata te Hākari Taro Rēwenakore e kīa nei ko te Kape­nga.
22.2: Ā, ka rapu ngā tohu­nga nui me ngā kara­ipi ki te pēhea e whaka­mate ai rātou i a ia, i mataku hoki rātou i te iwi. Ka Whakaae a Hūrā ki te Tuku i a Īhu (Matiu 26.14-16; Māka 14.10-11)
22.3: Nā, ka uru a Hātana ki a Hūrā, tōna ingoa nei ko Ikariote, ko ia nei tētahi o te tekau mā rua.
22.4: Ā, ka haere ia, ka kōrero ki ngā tohu­nga nui, ki ngā ranga­tira hōia, me pēhea e tukua ai ia e ia ki a rātou.
22.5: Ā, ka hari rātou, ka whaka­ae kia hoatu he moni ki a ia.
22.6: Nā, ka whaka­ae ia, ka rapu i te wā pai hei tuku­nga i a ia ki a rātou i te mea e ngaro atu ana te mano. Ka Whakariterite a Īhu ki te Kai i te Kapenga (Matiu 26.17-25; Māka 14.12-21; Hoani 13.21-30)
22.7: Nā, ka taka mai te rā o te Taro Rēwenakore i tika nei kia patua te Kape­nga.
22.8: Ka tonoa e ia a Pita rāua ko Hoani ka mea, “Tīkina, takā te Kape­nga mā tātou, kia kai ai tātou.”
22.9: Nā, ka mea rāua ki a ia, “Ko hea koe pai ai kia takā e māua?”
22.10: Ka mea ia ki a rāua “Nā, ka tomo kōrua ki te pā, ka tūtaki he tangata ki a kōrua e mau ana i te kāhaka wai, e aru kōrua i a ia ki te whare e tomo ai ia.
22.11: Ka kī atu ki te tangata i te whare, ‘E mea ana te Kai­whaka­ako ki a koe, “Kei hea te rūma e kai ai mātou ko āku ākonga i te Kape­nga?” ’
22.12: Ā, ka whaka­atu­ria e ia ki a kōrua he rūma nui i runga, oti rawa te whā­riki; me taka e kōrua ki reira.”
22.13: Nā, haere ana rāua, ā, roko­hanga atu rite tonu ki tāna i kōrero ai ki a rāua, ā, takā ana e rāua te Kape­nga. Te Hapa a te Ariki (Matiu 26.26-30; Māka 14.22-26; 1 Koriniti 11.23-25)
22.14: Ā, ka rite te hāora, ka noho ia, rātou ko ngā āpō­toro kotahi tekau mā rua.
22.15: Nā, ka mea ia ki a rātou, “Nui atu tōku hia­hia kia kai tahi tātou i tēnei Kape­nga, i te mea kāhore anō ahau i mate noa.
22.16: Ko tāku kupu hoki tēnei ki a koutou, e kore ahau e kai i tēnei ā muri ake nei, kia tino rite rā anō i te ranga­tira­tanga o te Atua.”
22.17: Nā, ka mau ia ki te kapu, ka mutu te whaka­whetai, ka mea ia, “Tango­hia tēnei, tu­whai­na mā koutou,
22.18: ko tāku kupu hoki tēnei ki a koutou, e kore ahau e inu i te hua o te wāina, kia tae mai rā anō te ranga­tira­tanga o te Atua.”
22.19: Nā, ka mau ia ki te taro, ka mutu te whaka­whetai, ka whawhati, ka hoatu e ia ki a rātou, ka mea, “Ko tōku tinana tēnei e hoatu ana mō koutou; meinga tēnei hei whaka­mahara ki ahau.”
22.20: I pērā­tia anō hoki te kapu, i muri iho i te hapa, ā, i mea ia, “Ko te kawe­nata hou tēnei kapu i runga i ōku toto e ringi­hia nei mō koutou.
22.21: “Otirā, tēnei kei ahau nei, kei te tēpu, te ringa o te kai­tuku i ahau.
22.22: E haere ana hoki rā te Tama a te tangata, e pērā ana me te mea i whaka­ritea; otirā, auē mō te tangata e tukua ai ia!”
22.23: Nā, ka anga rātou, ka rapu ki a rātou anō, mā wai o rātou tēnei e mea. Te Tautohe e Pā ana ki te Tino Nui
22.24: Ā, ka ara anō he tau­tohe a rātou, ko wai o rātou e meinga ko te tangata tino nui.
22.25: Nā, ka mea ia ki a rātou, “Ko ngā kīngi o ngā tauiwi e whaka­rangatira ana ki a rātou; ko te hunga whai mana ki runga i a rātou ka kīa, ‘He hunga ata­whai’.
22.26: Otiia, kaua koutou e pērā; engari, kia rite ki tō muri te mea nui o koutou kia rite anō te tino tangata ki te kai­mahi.
22.27: Ko wai hoki te mea nui, ko ia e noho ana ki te kai, ko te kai­mahi rānei? Ehara rānei te tangata e noho ana ki te kai? Tēnei rāia ahau i roto i a koutou te rite nei ki te kai­mahi.
22.28: “Otirā, ko koutou te hunga i noho tahi tonu me ahau i ōku whaka­mā­tautau­ranga.
22.29: Ā, ka whaka­rite ahau i te ranga­tira­tanga mō koutou, i te pērā me tā tōku Matua i whaka­rite ai mōku;
22.30: kia kai ai, kia inu ai koutou ki tāku tēpu i tōku ranga­tira­tanga, ā, ka noho koutou ki runga ki ngā torōna, whaka­wā ai i ngā iwi kotahi tekau mā rua o Īharaira.” Ka Poropiti a Īhu i Whakakāhore a Pita (Matiu 26.31-35; Māka 14.27-31; Hoani 13.36-38)
22.31: “E Haimona, e Haimona, nā, kua īnoi a Hātana kia riro koe i a ia, kia tā­tari­tia ai koutou e ia, ānō he wīti.
22.32: Otiia, kua īnoi ahau mōu, kei hemo tōu whaka­pono, ā, ki te tahuri mai anō koe, whaka­kaha­ngia ōu tēina.”
22.33: Nā, ka mea tērā ki a ia, “E te Ariki, e pai ana ahau kia haere hei hoa mōu ki te whare here­here, ki te mate hoki.”
22.34: Anō rā ko ia, “Tēnei tāku kupu ki a koe, e Pita, e kore te tī­kao­kao e tangi āia­nei, ka toru āu whaka­kāhore­tanga i tōu mātau ki ahau.” Pāhi, Pūtea, me te Hoari
22.35: Ā, ka mea ia ki a rātou, “I tāku tono­nga i a koutou, kāhore he pēke moni, kāhore he pūtea, kāhore he hū, i hapa rānei koutou i tētahi mea?” Ka mea rātou, “Kāhore.”
22.36: Anō rā ko ia ki a rātou, “Tēnā, ko tēnei ki te mea he pēke moni tā tētahi, mauria atu, me te pūtea anō; me ia hoki kāhore āna hoari, hokona atu tōna kākahu, ka hoko mai ai i tētahi.
22.37: Ko tāku kupu hoki tēnei ki a koutou, ko te tikanga tēnei, kia rite i ahau te mea kua oti nei te tuhi­tuhi, arā, ‘Kua hui­huia ia ki te hunga hara,’ he tutuki­tanga hoki tō ngā mea mōku.”
22.38: Nā, ka mea rātou, “E te Ariki, nā, e rua ēnei hoari.” Ka mea ia ki a rātou, “Kāti anō.” Ka Īnoi a Īhu i runga i Maunga Ōriwa (Matiu 26.36-46; Māka 14.32-42)
22.39: Nā, ka puta atu ia, ka haere ki Maunga Ōriwa, ko tāna hanga hoki tērā; me te aru anō āna ākonga i a ia.
22.40: Ā, i a ia i taua wāhi, ka mea ia ki a rātou, “Me īnoi kei uru koutou ki te whaka­mā­tautau­ranga.”
22.41: Nā, ka mawehe atu ia i a rātou, kei tō te taunga kāmaka te matara, ā, ka tuku i ōna turi ka īnoi,
22.42: ka mea, “E Pā, ki te pai koe, tango­hia atu tēnei kapu i ahau; otirā kauaka e waiho i tāku e pai ai, engari i tāu.”
22.43: Nā, ka puta mai ki a ia tētahi ana­hera i te rangi, e whaka­kaha ana i a ia.
22.44: Ā, i te oke o tōna wairua, ka hōhonu ake tāna īnoi; ko tōna kakawa ka pēnā i te tepe toto e turu­turu iho ana ki te whenua.
22.45: Nā, ka ara ia i te īnoi, ā, ka tae ki āna ākonga, roko­hanga atu e moe ana rātou, he ngākau pōuri hoki.
22.46: Nā, ko tāna mea­tanga ki a rātou, “He aha koutou ka moe ai? Whaka­tika ki te īnoi, kei uru koutou ki te whaka­mā­tautau­ranga.” Te Hopukanga o Īhu (Matiu 26.47-56; Māka 14.43-50; Hoani 18.3-11)
22.47: I a ia e kōrero ana, nā, ko te hui­hui­nga tāngata, ā, ko tērā e huaina rā ko Hūrā, ko tētahi o te tekau mā rua, e haere ana i mua i a rātou; ā, ka whaka­tata ia ki a Īhu ki te kihi i a ia.
22.48: Anō rā ko Īhu ki a ia, “E Hūrā, he kihi tāu hei tuku mō te Tama a te tangata?”
22.49: Ā, nō te kite­nga o te hunga i tōna taha i ngā mea tērā e tūpono, ka mea rātou, “E te Ariki, me patu rānei e mātou ki te hoari?”
22.50: Nā, hāua iho e tētahi o rātou te pono­nga a te tohu­nga nui, poroa ana tōna tari­nga matau.
22.51: Nā, ka oho a Īhu, ka mea, “Kāti rā i tēnei.” Whaka­pā­kia ana tōna tari­nga, nā kua ora.
22.52: Kātahi a Īhu ka mea ki ngā tohu­nga nui, ki ngā ranga­tira o te teme­para, ki ngā kaumātua, i haere atu ki a ia, “He tāhae ahau i haere mai ai koutou me ngā hoari, me ngā patu?
22.53: I ahau e noho ana i a koutou i te teme­para i ia rā, i ia rā, kīhai i totoro mai ō koutou ringa ki ahau. Otirā, nō koutou tēnei hāora, ko te kaha­nga hoki o te pōuri.” Ka Whakakāhorengia a Īhu e Pita (Matiu 26.57-58, 69-75; Māka 14.53-54, 66-72; Hoani 18.12-18, 25-27)
22.54: Nā, ka hopu­kina ia e rātou, ka āra­hina atu, ā, kawea ana ki roto ki te whare o te tino tohu­nga. Ko Pita ia i aru mai i tawhiti.
22.55: Ā, nō ka oti i a rātou he kāpura te tahu ki waenga marae, i a rātou e noho tahi ana, ka noho hoki a Pita i waenga­nui o rātou.
22.56: Nā, ka kitea ia e tētahi kōtiro, i a ia e noho ana i te mārama o te kāpura, ā, mata­tau tonu te ti­tiro ki a ia, ka mea, “I a ia anō hoki tēnei.”
22.57: Nā, ka whaka­kāhore ia ki a ia, ka mea, “E kō, kāhore ahau e mōhio ki a ia.”
22.58: Ā, taro kau iho ka kite tētahi atu i a ia, ka mea, “Nō rātou hoki koe.” Nā, ka mea a Pita, “E mara, kāhore.”
22.59: Ā, me te mea kotahi te hāora i muri iho, ka tohe anō tētahi atu, ka mea, “He pono i a ia anō hoki tēnei; nō Kariri hoki.”
22.60: Ā, ka mea a Pita, “E mara, kāhore ahau e mātau ki tāu e mea nā.” Ā, i reira pū anō, i a ia e kōrero ana, ka tangi te tī­kao­kao.
22.61: Nā, ka tahuri te Ariki, ka ti­tiro ki a Pita. Ā, ka mahara a Pita ki te kupu a te Ariki, ki tāna mea­tanga ki a ia, “E kore e tangi te tī­kao­kao, ka toru āu whaka­kāhore­tanga i ahau.”
22.62: Nā, haere atu ana a Pita ki waho, ā, nui atu tōna tangi. Ka Taunutia, ka Patua a Īhu (Matiu 26.67-68; Māka 14.65)
22.63: Nā, ka taunu ngā kai­pupuri o Īhu ki a ia, ka whiu i a ia.
22.64: Ka kōparea ōna kanohi, ā, ka ui rātou ki a ia, ka mea, “Poro­piti mai, nā wai koe i papaki?”
22.65: He maha hoki ērā atu kupu kino i kōrero ai rātou ki a ia. Ka Mauria a Īhu i te Aroaro o te Rūnanga (Matiu 26.59-66; Māka 14.55-64; Hoani 18.19-24)
22.66: Ā, i te aonga tonu­tanga o te rā, ka hui­hui ngā kaumātua o te iwi, ngā tohu­nga nui, me ngā kara­ipi, ā, āra­hina atu ana ia ki tō rātou rū­nanga, ka mea rātou,
22.67: “Ki te mea ko te Karaiti koe, kōrero­tia mai ki a mātou.” Anō rā ko ia ki a rātou, “Ki te kōrero­tia e ahau ki a koutou, e kore koutou e whaka­pono;
22.68: ki te ui ahau, e kore koutou e whaka­hoki kupu mai ki ahau.
22.69: Haere ake nei ka noho te Tama a te tangata ki matau o te kaha o te Atua.”
22.70: Nā, ka mea rātou katoa, “Ko te Tama rānei koe a te Atua?” Anō rā ko ia ki a rātou, “Kua kōrero­tia mai nā e koutou ko ahau ia.”
22.71: Nā, ka mea rātou, “Hei aha ake he kai­whaka­atu mā tātou? Kua rongo nei hoki tātou i tā tōna māngai.”

23.1: Kātahi ka whaka­tika tō rātou hui­hui katoa, ā, āra­hina ana ia ki a Pirato.
23.2: Nā, ka anga rātou, ka whaka­pā hē ki a ia, ka mea, “Kua mau i a mātou tēnei tangata e kukume kē ana i te iwi, e mea ana kia kaua e hoatu te takoha ki a Hīhā, e kī ana he kīngi ia, ko te Karaiti.”
23.3: Nā, ka ui a Pirato ki a ia, ka mea, “Ko koe rānei te kīngi o ngā Hūrai?” Ka whaka­hoki ia ki a ia, ka mea, “Kua kōrero­tia mai nā e koe.”
23.4: Nā, ko te mea­tanga a Pirato ki ngā tohu­nga nui, ki ngā mano, “Kāhore tētahi hē o tēnei tangata i mau i ahau.”
23.5: Ā, nui atu tā rātou tohe ka mea, “E whaka­tūtehu ana ia i te iwi, e whaka­ako ana puta noa i Hūria, tīmata mai i Kariri, ā, tae noa mai ki konei.” Ka Tonoa a Īhu i te Aroaro o Herora
23.6: I te rongo­nga ia o Pirato ki Kariri, ka ui, “Nō Kariri rānei tēnei tangata?”
23.7: Ā, i tōna mōhio­tanga nō te ranga­tira­tanga ia o Herora, ka tonoa ia ki a Herora, i Hiruhārama hoki ia i aua rā.
23.8: Nā, i te kite­nga o Herora i a Īhu, nui rawa tōna hari, kua roa ia e hia­hia ana kia kite i a ia, he maha hoki ngā mea i rangona e ia mōna. Nā, ka tū­mana­ko ia kia kite i tētahi mere­kara e meinga ana e ia.
23.9: Nā, he maha ngā kupu i ui ai ia ki a ia; heoi, kāhore kau he kupu i whaka­hokia e ia.
23.10: Nā, tū ana ngā tohu­nga nui me ngā kara­ipi, kaha rawa hoki tā rātou whaka­pā hē ki a ia.
23.11: Nā, ka whākore­kore a Herora rātou ko āna hōia ki a ia, ka taunu, ā, ka oti ia te whaka­kākahu ki te kahu whaka­pai­pai, ka whaka­hokia atu ki a Pirato.
23.12: I taua rangi anō ka houhia te rongo a Pirato rāua ko Herora; i mua hoki e mauā­hara ana ki a rāua. Ka Whakataua a Īhu ki te Mate (Matiu 27.15-26; Māka 15.6-15; Hoani 18.39–19.16)
23.13: Nā, ka karanga­tia e Pirato ngā tohu­nga nui, ngā ranga­tira, me te iwi anō,
23.14: ka mea ia ki a rātou, “Kua kawea mai nei e koutou tēnei tangata ki ahau, me te kī anō kei te kukume kē ia i te iwi; ā, ka oti nei ia te uiui e ahau i tō koutou aro­aro, nā, kīhai i mau i ahau tētahi hē o tēnei tangata i roto i ngā mea i whaka­pā­ngia nei e koutou ki a ia.
23.15: Ā, kīhai anō hoki a Herora, nāna ia i whaka­hoki mai ki a tātou, nā, kāhore āna mahi e tika ai kia mate ia.
23.16: Nā, me whiu ia e ahau, ka tuku atu ai.”
23.17: Kua takoto hoki te tikanga kia tukua atu tētahi ki a rātou i te hākari.
23.18: Nā, ka pānui rātou ki te karanga, ka mea, “Whaka­matea tēnei, ko Parapa te tuku mai ki a mātou”
23.19: (Ko tēnei hoki i makā ki te whare here­here mō te nana­nga i nana ai ia i roto i te pā, mō te patu tangata.)
23.20: Nā, ka mea atu anō a Pirato, he mea hoki nāna kia tukua a Īhu.
23.21: Heoi, hāmama ana rātou, mea ana, “Rīpekatia ia, rīpeka­tia!”
23.22: Ka mea anō ia ki a rātou, ko te toru o ngā mea­tanga, “He aha rā te kino i meinga e tēnei tangata? Kāhore anō i mau i ahau tētahi hē ōna e mate ai; māku ia e whiu, ka tuku atu ai.”
23.23: Otirā, nui atu ō rātou reo ki te tohe e tono ana kia rīpeka­tia ia. Ā, riro rawa i tā ō rātou reo.
23.24: Nā, ka whaka­ōtia e Pirato kia waiho i tā rātou i tono ai.
23.25: Nā, ka tukua anō ki a rātou te tangata i makā ki te whare here­here mō te nana­nga, mō te patu tangata, tā rātou hoki i tono ai; ko Īhu ia i tukua ki tā rātou i pai ai. Ka Rīpekatia a Īhu (Matiu 27.32-44; Māka 15.21-32; Hoani 19.17-27)
23.26: Ā, i a rātou e ārahi ana i a ia, ka mau rātou ki tētahi tangata o Hairini, ki a Haimona, e haere mai ana i ngā whenua, ā, utaina ana ki a ia te rīpeka, kia amo­hia i muri i a Īhu.
23.27: Nā, he nui te hui­hui­nga o te iwi i aru i a ia, me ngā wāhine hoki e tangi ana, e auē ana ki a ia.
23.28: Nā, ka tahuri a Īhu ki a rātou, ka mea, “E ngā tamā­hine o Hiruhārama, kaua e tangi ki ahau, engari me tangi ki a koutou anō, ki ā koutou tama­riki.
23.29: Tērā hoki e puta ngā rā e mea ai rātou, ‘Koa tonu ngā pākoko, me ngā kōpū kāhore i whānau, me ngā ū kāhore i ngotea.’
23.30: Ko reira tīmata ai rātou te mea ki ngā maunga, ‘Horo iho ki runga ki a mātou,’ ki ngā puke­puke hoki, ‘Hīpoki­na mātou.’
23.31: Ki te meinga hoki ēnei mea e rātou i te rākau e kai­mata ana, ko te aha e meatia i te rākau ka maroke?”
23.32: Nā, tērā atu ētahi toko­rua, he hunga mahi kino, e āra­hina ngā­tahi­tia ana me ia kia whaka­matea.
23.33: Ā, ka tae rātou ki te wāhi e kīa nei ko Te Anga­anga, ka rīpeka­tia ia ki reira, me aua kai­mahi kino, kotahi ki matau, kotahi ki mauī.
23.34: Nā, ka mea a Īhu, “E Pā, houhia te rongo ki a rātou; kāhore hoki rātou e mōhio ki tā rātou e mea nei.” Ā, wehe­wehea ana ōna kākahu e rātou he mea maka ki te rota.
23.35: Me te tū anō te iwi mā­taki­taki ai. Ko ngā ranga­tira hoki ka tāwai ki a ia, ka mea, “Ko ērā atu i whaka­ora­ngia e ia, māna anō ia e whaka­ora, ki te mea ia ko te Karaiti a te Atua, ko tāna i whiri­whiri ai!”
23.36: Ko ngā hōia ētahi i taunu ki a ia, ka haere mai me te kawe mai he winika ki a ia,
23.37: ka mea, “Ki te mea ko koe te Kīngi o ngā Hūrai, whaka­ora i a koe.”
23.38: Ā, tērā te mea i tuhi­tuhia ki runga ake i a ia, “Ko te Kīngi tēnei o ngā Hūrai”.
23.39: Nā, ko tētahi o ngā kai­mahi kino i whaka­iria rā i kohu­kohu ki a ia, i mea, “Ki te mea ko te Karaiti koe, whaka­ora­ngia koe, māua hoki.”
23.40: Nā, ka whaka­hoki tētahi, ka riri ki a ia, ka mea, “E kore rānei koe e wehi ki te Atua, kei tēnei mate tahi nei hoki koe?
23.41: Ka tika rāia tō tāua; ka whi­whi hoki tāua ki ngā mea e tika ana mō ā tāua hanga; ko tēnei ia kāhore āna mahi hē.”
23.42: Nā, ko tāna mea­tanga ki a Īhu, “E te Ariki, kia mahara koe ki ahau ina haere mai koe i runga i tōu ranga­tira­tanga.”
23.43: Anō rā ko Īhu ki a ia, “He pono tāku e mea nei ki a koe, ko āia­nei koe noho ai ki ahau ki Pararaiha.” Te Matenga o Īhu (Matiu 27.45-56; Māka 15.33-41; Hoani 19.28-30)
23.44: Nā, kua tata ki te ono o ngā hāora, ā, ka pōuri a runga o te whenua katoa, tae noa ki te iwa o ngā hāora.
23.45: I pōuri hoki te rā, ā, i wāhia te ārai o te whare tapu i waenga­nui pū.
23.46: Ā, nui atu te reo o Īhu ki te karanga; i mea ia, “E Pā, tēnei tōku wairua ka tukua atu nei ki ōu ringa.” Ka mutu ēnei kupu, ka hemo ia.
