23.47: Ā, i te kite­nga o te kene­turio i taua mea, ka whaka­korōria ia i te Atua, ka mea, “He pono he tangata tika tēnei.”
23.48: Me te hunga katoa hoki i hui­hui mai ki te mā­taki­taki, i tō rātou kite­nga i aua mea i meatia rā, ka pātuki i ō rātou uma, ā, hoki ana.
23.49: Ā, ko te hunga katoa i mōhio ki a ia, rātou ko ngā wāhine i aru mai i a ia i Kariri, i tū mai i tawhiti, mā­taki­taki ai ki ēnei mea. Te Tanumanga o Īhu (Matiu 27.57-61; Māka 15.42-47; Hoani 19.38-42)
23.50: Nā, tērā tētahi tangata, ko Hōhepa te ingoa, he tangata noho rū­nanga; he tangata pai, he tangata tika.
23.51: Kīhai ia i whaka­ae ki tō rātou whaka­aro, ki tā rātou mahi, nō Arimatia ia, nō tētahi pā o ngā Hūrai, ā, he tangata ia e tatari ana ki te ranga­tira­tanga o te Atua.
23.52: I haere ia ki a Pirato, ā, tonoa ana e ia te tinana o Īhu.
23.53: Nā, ka tango­hia iho e ia taua tinana, ā, takaia ana ki te rīnena, ka waiho ki te rua i hāua ki roto ki te kōhatu, kāhore hoki i takoto noa tētahi tangata ki reira.
23.54: Nā, ko te rā Taka­nga hākari ia, ā, meāke pūao te hāpati.
23.55: I aru anō ngā wāhine i haere tahi mai nei me ia i Kariri, ā, kite ana i te urupā, i te whaka­takoto­ranga anō o tōna tinana.
23.56: Nā, ka hoki rātou, ka mahi i ngā mea kakara, i ngā hinu. Ā, noho ana i te hāpati, he whaka­aro hoki ki te ture.

24.1: Nā, i te rā tua­tahi o te wiki, i te tino ata pō, ka haere mai rātou ki te urupā, me te mau mai i ngā mea kakara kua mahia nei e rātou.
24.2: Ā, roko­hanga atu e rātou kua huri­hia te kāmaka i te urupā.
24.3: Ā, ka tomo rātou ki roto, kīhai i kitea te tinana o te Ariki, o Īhu.
24.4: Nā, i a rātou e pō­kai­kaha ana ki tēnei, nā, tū ana ngā tāngata toko­rua i ō rātou taha, uira tonu ngā kākahu.
24.5: Nā, i a rātou e mataku ana, e kūpapa iho ana ō rātou kanohi ki te whenua, ka mea rāua ki a rātou, “He aha koutou ka rapu ai i te tangata ora i roto i te hunga mate?
24.6: Kāhore ia i konei, engari kua ara. Kia mahara ki tāna i mea ai ki a koutou i a ia anō i Kariri,
24.7: ki tāna mea­tanga, ‘Kua takoto te tikanga kia tukua te Tama a te tangata ki ngā ringa o te hunga hara, kia rīpeka­tia, ā, i te toru o ngā rā ka ara.’ ”
24.8: Nā, ka mahara rātou ki āna kupu,
24.9: ā, hoki mai ana i te urupā, ka kōrero i ēnei mea katoa ki te tekau mā tahi, ki a rātou ko ērā atu katoa.
24.10: Nā, ko Meri Makarini rātou ko Hoana, ko Meri whaea o Hēmi, ko ō rātou hoa wāhine, ngā kai­kōrero i ēnei mea ki ngā āpō­toro.
24.11: Ā, ko te āhua o aua kupu ki tā rātou whaka­aro he mea tito noa; kīhai i whaka­pono­hia e rātou.
24.12: Kātahi ka whaka­tika a Pita, ka oma ki te urupā. Ā, ko tōna piko­nga iho ka kite, ko ngā kākahu tākai anake e takoto ana; ā, hoki ana ki tōna whare me te mīharo anō i roto i a ia ki taua mea i meatia. Te Haere ki Emāuha (Māka 16.12-13)
24.13: Nā, toko­rua o rātou e haere ana i taua rā ki tētahi kāinga, e ono tekau pā­ronga te matara i Hiruhārama, ko Emāuha te ingoa.
24.14: E kōrero­rero ana hoki rāua tētahi ki tētahi ki ēnei mea katoa i meinga.
24.15: Ā, i a rāua e kōrero­rero ana, e uiui ana ki a rāua, nā ko Īhu, ko ia tonu, kua whaka­tata, ā, haere tahi ana me rāua.
24.16: I puri­tia hoki ō rāua kanohi, i kore ai rāua e mōhio ki a ia.
24.17: Nā, ka mea ia ki a rāua, “He aha ēnei kupu e kōrero nei kōrua ki a kōrua, i a kōrua e haere nei?” Nā, ka tū rāua, kīhai i kori­kori, me te āhua pōuri.
24.18: Nā, ka whaka­hoki tētahi, ko Kereopa te ingoa, ka mea ki a ia, “I Hiruhārama koe e noho ana, ā, ko koe anake kāhore i mōhio ki ngā mea kua meinga nei ki reira i ēnei rā?”
24.19: Ka mea ia ki a rāua, “Ki ēhea mea?” Ka mea rāua ki a ia, “Ki ngā mea o Īhu o Nahareta, he poro­piti hoki ia, he kaha tāna mahi, tāna kupu, i te aro­aro o te Atua, o te iwi katoa.
24.20: Ki tōna hoatu­tanga e ngā tohu­nga nui, e ō mātou ranga­tira hoki kia tukua ki te mate, ā, rīpeka­tia ana ia.
24.21: I tū­mana­ko anō mātou ki a ia, māna e whaka­ora a Īharaira. Nā, i te taha o ēnei mea katoa, ko te toru tēnei o ngā rā i meinga ai ēnei mea.
24.22: Ā, mīharo noa iho mātou ki ētahi wāhine o mātou, i haere i te atatū ki te urupā;
24.23: heoi, i te kore­nga i kitea e rātou tōna tinana, ka hoki mai, ka mea, i kitea anō e rātou he pu­tanga ana­hera, e kī ana mai kei te ora ia.
24.24: Nā, ka haere atu ētahi o ō māua hoa ki te urupā, ā, roko­hanga atu, rite tonu ki tā ngā wāhine i kōrero ai; otirā, kīhai ia i kitea.”
24.25: Nā, ko tāna mea­tanga ki a rāua, “E te hunga whaka­aro­kore, ngākau pūhoi ki te whaka­pono ki ngā mea katoa i kōrero ai ngā poro­piti.
24.26: Kāhore ianei i takoto te tikanga kia pā ēnei mea ki a te Karaiti, kia tomo ia ki tōna korōria?”
24.27: Nā, ka tīmata ia ki tā Mohi, ki tā ngā poro­piti katoa, whaka­atu­ria ana ki a rāua ngā mea mōna o ngā karaipi­ture katoa.
24.28: Ā, ka tata ki te kāinga i haere ai rāua, nā, ka ahu atu ia, me te mea e haere tonu ana ia.
24.29: Nā, ka tohe rāua ki a ia, ka mea “E noho ki a māua; kua ahi­ahi hoki, kua tītaha te rā.” Nā, ka tomo atu ia, ka noho ki a rāua.
24.30: Ā, i tōna nohoa­nga iho ki a rāua ki te kai, ka mau ia ki te taro, ka whaka­pai, ka whawhati, ā, hoatu ana ki a rāua.
24.31: Nā, kua kite ō rāua kanohi, ā, ka mōhio ki a ia; ā, ngaro whaka­rere atu ia i a rāua.
24.32: Ā, ka mea rāua ki a rāua, “Kīhai koia ō tāua ngākau i mu­mura i roto i a tāua, i a ia e kōrero ana ki a tāua i te ara, e whaka­atu ana i ngā karaipi­ture ki a tāua?”
24.33: Nā, ka whaka­tika rāua i taua hāora anō, ā, hoki ana ki Hiruhārama, ā, roko­hanga atu kua hui­hui te tekau mā tahi me ō rātou hoa.
24.34: E mea ana, “Koia rawa anō! Kua ara te Ariki, kua puta ki a Haimona.”
24.35: Nā, ka kōrero­tia e rāua ngā mea­tanga i te ara, tō rāua mōhio­tanga hoki ki a ia i te whati­whatinga o te taro. Ka Puta Mai a Īhu ki Āna Ākonga (Matiu 28.16-20; Māka 16.14-18; Hoani 20.19-23; Ngā Mahi 1.6-8)
24.36: Ā, i a rāua e kōrero ana i ēnei mea, nā tērā ia tū ana i waenga­nui o rātou, mea ana ki a rātou, “Kia tau te rangi­mārie ki a koutou.”
24.37: Otirā, koera ana rātou, wehi ana; i mahara hoki he wairua tā rātou i kite ai.
24.38: Nā, ko tāna mea­tanga ki a rātou, “He aha koutou ka poro­raru ai? Nā te aha hoki i puta ake ai ngā whaka­aro­aro­nga i roto i ō koutou ngākau?
24.39: Tiro­hia ōku ringa me ōku wae­wae, ko ahau tonu tēnei; whā­whā­kia ahau, kia kite ai koutou; kāhore hoki o te wairua kiko­kiko, wheua rānei, pēnei i ōku e kitea mai nā e koutou.”
24.40: Ā, nō ka kōrero­tia e ia tēnei, ka whaka­kitea e ia ki a rātou ōna ringa me ōna wae­wae.
24.41: Ā, i a rātou kāhore nei i whaka­pono i te hari, e mīharo ana hoki, ka mea ia ki a rātou, “He kai rānei tā koutou kei konei?”
24.42: Nā, ka hoatu e rātou ki a ia tētahi ika, he mea tunu­tunu.
24.43: Nā, ka tango ia, ā, kainga ana e ia i tō rātou aro­aro.
24.44: I mea anō ia ki a rātou, “Ko ngā kupu ēnei i kōrero ai ahau ki a koutou, i ahau anō i a koutou, me whaka­rite ngā mea katoa kua oti te tuhi­tuhi i roto i te ture a Mohi, i ngā poro­piti, i ngā waiata, mōku.”
24.45: Kātahi ia ka whaka­makoha i ō rātou hine­ngaro, kia mātau ai ki ngā karaipi­ture,
24.46: ka mea ki a rātou, “Ko te mea tēnei i tuhi­tuhia: ko te tikanga anō tēnei, ko te Karaiti kia whaka­mamae­tia, kia ara anō i te hunga mate i te toru o ngā rā;
24.47: kia kauwhau­tia hoki te rīpe­netā me te muru­nga hara i runga i tōna ingoa ki ngā tauiwi katoa, ki Hiruhārama tīmata ai.
24.48: Nā, ko koutou hei kai­whaka­atu mō ēnei mea.
24.49: Nana, māku e tuku ki a koutou te mea i kōrero­tia i mua e tōku Matua; otiia, e noho koutou ki te pā, ki Hiruhārama, kia whi­whi rā anō ki te kaha i runga.” Ka Tangohia ake a Īhu ki te Rangi (Māka 16.19-20; Ngā Mahi 1.9-11)
24.50: Nā, āra­hina ana rātou e ia ki waho, ki Petani, nā, kua ara ōna ringa, whaka­pai­ngia ana rātou e ia.
24.51: Ā, i a ia e whaka­pai ana i a rātou, ka mawehe atu ia i a rātou, kā­hakina atu ana ki te rangi.
24.52: Nā, ka koro­piko rātou ki a ia, ā, hoki ana ki Hiruhārama, he nui hoki te koa.
24.53: Ā, noho tonu ai rātou i te teme­para, me te whaka­pai ki te Atua. Āmine.

1.1: I te tīma­tanga te Kupu, i te Atua te Kupu, ko te Atua anō te Kupu.
1.2: I te Atua anō tēnei Kupu i te tīma­tanga.
1.3: Nāna ngā mea katoa i hanga; kāhore hoki tētahi mea i kore te hanga e ia o ngā mea i hangā.
1.4: I a ia te ora; ko te ora te mārama mō ngā tāngata.
1.5: I roto i te pōuri te mārama e whiti ana; heoi, kīhai i mau i te pōuri.
1.6: I tonoa mai he tangata e te Atua, ko Hoani tōna ingoa.
1.7: I haere mai ia hei kai­whaka­atu, hei whaka­atu mō te mārama, kia meinga ai e ia ngā tāngata katoa kia whaka­pono.
1.8: Ehara ia i te mārama, engari, i haere mai hei kai­whaka­atu mō te mārama.
1.9: Ko te mārama pono tērā, arā, ko te mārama e mārama ai ngā tāngata katoa e haere mai ana ki te ao.
1.10: I te ao ia, i hangā anō e ia te ao, ā, kīhai te ao i mōhio ki a ia.
1.11: I haere mai ia ki ōna, ā, kīhai ōna i manako ki a ia.
1.12: Tēnā ko te hunga i manako ki a ia i tukua e ia ki a rātou ngā tikanga e meinga ai rātou hei tama­riki mā te Atua, arā ki te hunga e whaka­pono ana ki tōna ingoa.
1.13: Ki te hunga ehara nei i te toto, ehara i tā te kiko­kiko i pai ai, ehara i tā te tangata i pai ai, engari, nā te Atua i whānau ai.
1.14: I whaka­kiko­kiko­tia te Kupu, ā, noho ana i a mātou, i kite anō mātou i tōna korōria he korōria e rite ana ki tō te Tama kotahi a te Matua, kī tonu i te aroha noa, i te pono.
1.15: I kōrero­tia ia e Hoani; i karanga tērā, i mea, “Ko ia tēnei i kōrero­tia rā e ahau, ‘Ko ia e haere mai ana i muri i ahau e meinga ana ki mua i ahau; nō mua hoki ia i ahau.’ ”
1.16: Kua riro hoki i a tātou katoa tētahi wāhi o tōna ranea­tanga, te aroha noa hono iho ki te aroha noa.
1.17: Nā Mohi hoki i hōmai te ture; ko te aroha noa me te pono i ahu mai i a Īhu Karaiti.
1.18: Kāhore anō he tangata i kite noa i te Atua; ko te Tama kotahi, kei te uma nei o te Matua, nāna ia i whaka­puaki. Te Kōrero a Hoani Kaiiriiri (Matiu 3.1-12; Māka 1.1-8; Ruka 3.1-18)
1.19: Nā, ko te kōrero tēnei a Hoani, i te tono­nga mai a ngā Hūrai i Hiruhārama i ngā tohu­nga nui rātou ko ngā Rīwaiti hei ui ki a ia, “Ko wai koe?”
1.20: Nā, ka whākina e ia, kīhai i whaka­kāhore, i whāki hoki, “Ehara ahau i a te Karaiti.”
1.21: Ā, ka ui rātou ki a ia, “Tēnā, pēhea? Ko Irāia koe?” Ka mea ia, “Kāhore.” “Ko te poro­piti oti koe?” Ka whaka­hokia e ia, “Kāhore.”
1.22: Nā, ka mea rātou ki a ia, “Ko wai koia koe? Hei kupu whaka­hoki mā mātou ki te hunga i tonoa mai ai mātou. E pēhea ana koe ki a koe?”
1.23: Ka mea ia: “He reo ahau nō tētahi e karanga ana i te koraha, ‘Whaka­tikaia te hua­rahi o te Ariki!’ He pērā me tā Ihāia poro­piti i mea ai.”
1.24: Nō ngā Parihi hoki te hunga i tonoa mai rā.
1.25: Nā, ka ui rātou ki a ia, ka mea ki a ia, “He aha oti koe i iri­iri ai, ki te mea ehara koe i a te Karaiti, ehara i a Irāia, ehara i te poro­piti?”
1.26: Nā, ka whaka­hoki a Hoani ki a rātou, ka mea, “He iri­iri tāku ki te wai; otiia tēnā te tū nā i waenga­nui i a koutou tētahi kāhore e mōhio­tia e koutou.
1.27: Ko ia tēnei e haere mai ana i muri i ahau kāhore hoki ahau e tau hei wewete i te here o tōna hū.”
1.28: I meatia ēnei mea ki Petapara, ki tāwāhi atu o Horano, ki te wāhi e iri­iri ana a Hoani. Te Reme a te Atua
1.29: I te aonga ake, ka kite ia i a Īhu e haere ana mai ki a ia, ka mea, “Nā, te Reme a te Atua, hei waha atu i te hara o te ao!
1.30: Ko ia tēnei i kōrero ai ahau, ‘Kei te haere mai i muri i ahau tētahi tangata kua meinga ki mua i ahau; nō mua hoki ia i ahau.’
1.31: Ā, kāhore ahau i mātau ki a ia; heoi, hei whaka­kite i a ia ki a Īharaira, i haere mai ai ahau me tāku iri­iri ki te wai.”
1.32: Nā, ka whaka­atu a Hoani, ka mea, “I kite ahau i te Wairua e heke iho ana i te rangi, ānō he kūkupa, ā, noho ana i runga i a ia.
1.33: Ā, kāhore ahau i mātau ki a ia; engari i kī mai ki ahau te kai­tono mai i ahau ki te iri­iri ki te wai, ‘Ko te tangata e kite ai koe i te Wairua e heke iho ana, e noho ana ki runga ki a ia, ko ia tēnā te kai­iri­iri ki te Wairua Tapu.’
1.34: Ā, kua kite ahau, kua whaka­atu nei hoki, ko te Tama tēnei a te Atua.” Ngā Ākonga Tuatahi a Īhu
1.35: I te aonga ake i te tū anō a Hoani me āna ākonga toko­rua;
1.36: nā, ka ti­tiro ia ki a Īhu e haere ana, ka mea, “Nā, te Reme a te Atua!”
1.37: Ā, ka rongo ngā ākonga toko­rua ki a ia e kōrero ana, ā, aru ana rāua i a Īhu.
1.38: Ā, ka tahuri a Īhu, ka kite i a rāua e aru ana, ka mea ia ki a rāua “E rapu ana kōrua i te aha?” Nā, ko tā rāua mea­tanga ki a ia, “E Rapi” (ko te tikanga tēnei ina whaka­māori­tia, e te Kai­whaka­ako), “kei hea tōu kāinga?”
1.39: Ka mea ia ki a rāua, “Haere mai kia kite.” Haere ana rāua, ā, ka kite i tōna wāhi i noho ai, ā, noho ana i a ia i taua rā; ko te tekau hoki ia o ngā hāora.
1.40: Ko Anaru, teina o Haimona Pita tētahi o taua toko­rua i rongo nei ki a Hoani e kōrero ana, ā, aru ana i a ia.
1.41: Ko ia kua kite wawe i tōna tua­kana ake, i a Haimona, ka mea ki a ia, “Kua kitea e māua te Mīhaia.” (Ko te tikanga tēnei ina whaka­māori­tia, ko te Karaiti).
1.42: Nā, ka āra­hina mai ia e ia ki a Īhu. Ā, ka ti­tiro a Īhu ki a ia, ka mea, “Ko Haimona koe, ko te tama a Hona, me hua koe ko Kipa.” (Tōna whaka­māori­tanga ko Pita, arā ko Kōhatu). Ka Karangatia e Īhu ki a Piripi rāua ko Natanahira
1.43: I te aonga ake ka mea a Īhu kia haere ki Kariri, ā, ka kite i a Piripi; ā, ka mea a Īhu ki a ia, “E aru i ahau.”
1.44: (Nā, ko Piripi nō Petahaira, nō te pā o Anaru rāua ko Pita.)
1.45: Ka kite a Piripi i a Natanahira, ka mea ki a ia, “Kua kitea e mātou a ia, mōna nei te tuhi­tuhi a Mohi i roto i te ture, tā ngā poro­piti hoki, a Īhu o Nahareta te tama a Hōhepa.”
1.46: Nā, ka mea a Natanahira ki a ia, “E puta koia tētahi mea pai i Nahareta?” Ka mea a Piripi ki a ia, “Haere mai kia kite.”
1.47: Ka kite a Īhu i a Natanahira e haere ana mai ki a ia, ka puaki tāna kupu mōna, “Nā, he tino tangata nō Īharaira, kāhore ōna tini­hanga.”
1.48: Ka mea a Natanahira ki a ia, “Nō hea koe i mātau ai ki ahau?” Ka whaka­hoki a Īhu ki a ia, ka mea, “I te mea kīanō koe i karanga­tia e Piripi, i a koe anō i raro i te piki, i kite ahau i a koe.”
1.49: Nā, ka whaka­hoki a Natanahira, ka mea ki a ia, “E Rapi, ko te Tama koe a te Atua, ko te Kīngi koe o Īharaira!”
1.50: Nā, ka whaka­hoki a Īhu, ka mea ki a ia, “Nō tāku mea­tanga ki a koe, ‘I kite ahau i a koe i raro i te piki’, i whaka­pono ai koe? Rahi atu i ēnei ngā mea e kitea e koe.”
1.51: I mea anō ia ki a ia, “He pono, he pono tēnei kupu āku ki a koutou, tērā koutou e kite i te rangi e tu­whera ana, i ngā ana­hera a te Atua e piki ake ana, e heke iho ana ki te Tama a te tangata.”

2.1: Nā, i te toru o ngā rā he mārena i Kana o Kariri, ā, i reira te whaea o Īhu.
2.2: I karanga­tia anō a Īhu rātou ko āna ākonga ki te mārena.
2.3: Ā, i te paunga o te wāina, ka mea te whaea o Īhu ki a ia, “Kāhore ā rātou wāina.”
2.4: Ka mea a Īhu ki a ia, “E tai, he aha tāku ki a koe? Kāhore anō kia taea noatia tōku hāora.”
2.5: Ka mea tōna whaea ki ngā kai­mahi, “Ko tāna e mea ai ki a koutou, meatia.”
2.6: Nā, i reira ētahi ipu kōhatu e ono e tū ana, he tikanga nā ngā Hūrai mō te horoi, e rua, e toru ngā mēhua o tētahi, o tētahi, ina kī.
2.7: Ka mea a Īhu ki a rātou, “Whaka­kīa ngā ipu ki te wai.” Ā, whaka­kīa ana e rātou, pūrena noa.
2.8: Nā, ka mea ia ki a rātou, “Tēnā, utuhia, kawea atu ki te ranga­tira o te hākari.” Ā, kawea ana e rātou.
2.9: Ā, nō ka whaka­mātau te ranga­tira o te hākari i te wai i whaka­wāina­tia, ā, kīhai i mōhio nō hea rānei (ko ngā pono­nga ia i utuhia ai te wai i mōhio), ka karanga te ranga­tira o te hākari ki te tāne mārena hou,
2.10: ka mea ki a ia, “E whaka­takoto­ria ana e ngā tāngata katoa te wāina pai i te tīma­tanga; ā, ka roa te inu­manga, mō reira te wāina he iti iho nei te pai ko koe ia, kua tohu i te wāina pai mō nāia­nei.”
2.11: I meatia tēnei tīma­tanga mere­kara e Īhu ki Kana o Kariri, i whaka­kitea e ia tōna korōria; ā, whaka­pono ana āna ākonga ki a ia.
2.12: Muri iho i tēnei ka haere iho ia ki Kaperenauma, ā, ia, tōna whaea, ōna tēina, me āna ākonga; ā, kīhai i maha ngā rā i noho ai rātou ki reira. Ka Haere a Īhu ki te Temepara (Matiu 21.12-13; Māka 11.15-17; Ruka 19.45-46)
2.13: Nā, kua tata te Kape­nga o ngā Hūrai, ā, ka haere a Īhu ki Hiruhārama.
2.14: Nā, roko­hanga atu e ia i roto i te teme­para e noho ana ngā kai­hoko kau, hipi, kūkupa, me ngā kai­whaka­whiti­whiti moni.
2.15: Ā, ka hangā e ia he whiu ki ngā aho no­nohi, ka whiua katoa­tia e ia ki waho i te teme­para, ngā hipi, me ngā kau; ringi­hia ana hoki te moni a ngā kai­whaka­whiti­whiti moni, tura­kina ake ngā tēpu.
2.16: I mea anō ia ki ngā kai­hoko kūkupa, “Tango­hia atu ēnei i konei; aua te whare o tōku Matua e meinga hei whare hoko­hoko.”
2.17: Ā, ka mahara āna ākonga ki te mea i tuhi­tuhia, “Ka pau ahau i te aroha ki tōu whare.”
2.18: Nā, ka whaka­hoki ngā Hūrai, ka mea ki a ia, “He aha te tohu e whaka­kitea ana e koe ki a mātou, inā koe ka mea nei i ēnei mea?”
2.19: Nā, ka whaka­hoki a Īhu, ka mea ki a rātou, “Wā­wāhia tēnei whare tapu, ā, kia toru ngā rā ka ara anō i ahau.”
2.20: Anō rā ko ngā Hūrai, “E whā tekau mā ono ngā tau i hangā ai tēnei whare tapu, e oti rānei te hanga e koe i ngā rā e toru?”
2.21: Otirā, ko te whare tapu o tōna tinana tāna i kōrero ai.
2.22: Nā reira, i tōna aranga ake i te hunga mate, ka mahara āna ākonga ki tāna kōrero­tanga i tēnei; ā, whaka­pono ana rātou ki te karaipi­ture, ki te kupu hoki i kōrero­tia e Īhu. Te Mōhiotanga o Īhu ki te Āhua Tangata
2.23: Nā, i a ia i Hiruhārama, i te Kape­nga, i te hākari, he toko­maha i whaka­pono ki tōna ingoa, i tō rātou kite­nga i āna mere­kara i meatia e ia.
2.24: Otirā, kīhai a Īhu i tuku atu i a ia ki a rātou, i mōhio hoki ia ki ngā tāngata katoa.
2.25: Ā, kāhore āna mea­tanga kia whaka­atu­ria te tangata e tētahi; i mātau hoki ia ki te mea i roto i te tangata.

3.1: Nā, he tangata tērā nō ngā Parihi, ko Nikorima tōna ingoa, he ranga­tira nō ngā Hūrai.
3.2: Ka haere mai tēnei ki a Īhu i te pō, ka mea ki a ia, “E Rapi, e mātau ana mātou i haere mai koe i te Atua hei kai­whaka­ako, inā hoki e kore tētahi tangata e āhei te mea i ēnei mere­kara e meatia nei e koe, ki te kāhore te Atua i a ia.”
3.3: Ka whaka­hoki a Īhu, ka mea ki a ia, “He pono, he pono, tāku e mea nei ki a koe, ki te kāhore te tangata e whānau hou, e kore ia e āhei te kite i te ranga­tira­tanga o te Atua.”
3.4: Ka mea a Nikorima ki a ia, “Me pēhea ka whānau ai te tangata i tōna koro­heke­tanga? E taea rānei te tuarua o ngā haere­nga ki roto ki te kōpū o tōna whaea, whānau mai ai?”
3.5: Ka whaka­hokia e Īhu, “He pono, he pono tāku e mea nei ki a koe, Ki te kāhore te tangata e whānau i te wai, i te Wairua hoki, e kore ia e āhei te tomo ki te ranga­tira­tanga o te Atua.
3.6: Ko tā te kiko­kiko e whānau ai he kiko­kiko; ko tā te Wairua e whānau ai he wairua.
3.7: Aua rā e mīharo ki tāku i mea nei ki a koe, ‘He mea tūturu tēnei kia whānau hou koutou.’
3.8: E pupuhi ana te hau ki tāna wāhi e pai ai, ka rongo hoki koe ki tōna haruru otiia e kore e mōhio­tia e koe te wāhi i puta mai ai, e tae atu ai rānei. Ko te rite­nga tēnei ki te hunga katoa ka whānau i te Wairua.”
3.9: Ka whaka­hoki a Nikorima, ka mea ki a ia, “Me pēhea ka taea ai ēnei mea?”
3.10: Ka whaka­hoki a Īhu, ka mea ki a ia, “Ko koe te Kai­whaka­ako o Īharaira, ā, kāhore i mātau ki ēnei mea?
3.11: He pono, he pono tāku e mea nei ki a koe, e kōrero­tia ana e mātou tā mātou i mātau ai, e whaka­atu­ria ana tā mātou i kite ai; heoi, e kore koutou e tango ki tā mātou whaka­atu­ranga.
3.12: Ki te mea kua kōrero­tia e ahau ki a koutou ngā mea o te whenua, ā, kāhore koutou e whaka­pono, me pēhea ka whaka­pono ai ki te kōrero­tia e ahau ki a koutou ngā mea o te rangi?
3.13: Kāhore hoki he tangata i kake noa ki te rangi, ko ia anake i heke iho i te rangi, arā ko te Tama a te tangata, e noho mai nei i te rangi.”
3.14: Ka rite hoki ki tā Mohi whaka­iri­nga i te nākahi i te koraha, kua takoto te tikanga kia pērā te whaka­iri­nga o te Tama a te tangata.
3.15: Kia kāhore ai e ngaro te tangata e whaka­pono ana ki a ia, engari kia whi­whi ai ki te ora tonu.
3.16: Koia anō te aroha o te Atua ki te ao, hōmai ana e ia tāna Tama kotahi, kia kāhore ai e ngaro te tangata e whaka­pono ana ki a ia, engari kia whi­whi ai ki te ora tonu.
3.17: Kīhai hoki te Atua i tono mai i tāna Tama ki te ao ki te whaka­hē i te ao; engari kia ora ai te ao i a ia.
3.18: Ko ia e whaka­pono ana ki a ia, e kore e tau te hē ki a ia; tēnā ko ia e kore e whaka­pono, kua whaka­hē­ngia noatia ake, mōna kīhai i whaka­pono ki te ingoa o te Tama kotahi a te Atua.
3.19: Ko te whaka­hē­nga hoki tēnei, nō te mea kua tae mai nei te mārama ki te ao, ā, nui atu tō ngā tāngata aroha ki te pōuri i tō rātou ki te mārama, he kino hoki nō ā rātou mahi.
3.20: E kino ana hoki ki te mārama ngā kai­mahi katoa i te kino, e kore anō hoki e haere mai ki te mārama, kei whaka­kitea ā rātou mahi.
3.21: Tēnā ko te kai­mahi i te pono, e haere mai ana ki te mārama, kia kitea ai āna mahi, he mea mahi i roto i te Atua. Ko Īhu rāua ko Hoani
3.22: Ā, nō muri i ēnei mea ka haere a Īhu, rātou ko āna ākonga, ki te whenua o Hūria; ā, noho tahi ana rātou ki reira, me tāna iri­iri anō.
3.23: Nā, i te iri­iri anō hoki a Hoani ki Ēnona, ki tētahi wāhi e tata ana ki Harema, nō te mea he nui te wai o reira; ā, ka haere mai rātou, ka iri­iria.
3.24: Kāhore anō hoki a Hoani i pangā ki te whare here­here.
3.25: Nā, ka ara he totohe a ngā ākonga a Hoani ki tētahi Hūrai mō te pure­nga.
3.26: Ā, ka haere rātou ki a Hoani, ka mea ki a ia, “E Rapi, ko te tangata i tāwāhi nā kōrua o Horano, ko tāu i whaka­atu mai nā, Nana, kei te iri­iri ia, e haere ana hoki te katoa ki a ia.”
3.27: Ka whaka­hoki a Hoani, ka mea, “E kore tētahi mea e riro i te tangata, ki te kore e hōmai ki a ia i te rangi.
3.28: Ko koutou hei kai­whakaae ki ahau, ki tāku mea­tanga, ‘Ehara ahau i a te Karaiti, engari i tonoa mai ahau i mua i a ia.’
3.29: Ko te tangata i te wahine mārena hou, ko ia te tāne mārena hou. Nā, ko te hoa o te tāne mārena hou, e tū ana, e rongo ana ki a ia, ka hari pū ki te reo o te tāne mārena hou. Nā reira i tutuki ai tēnei hari ōku.
3.30: Ko te tikanga tēnei, ko ia kia nui haere, ko ahau kia iti haere.” Te Mea e Haere mai ana i te Rangi
3.31: Ko ia e haere mai ana i runga, kei runga ake ia i te katoa; ko tō te whenua nō te whenua ia, nō te whenua anō āna kōrero. Ko ia e haere mai ana i te rangi, kei runga ake ia i te katoa.
3.32: Ā, ko tāna i kite ai, i rongo ai, ko ia tāna e whaka­atu ai; kāhore hoki tētahi tangata e tango atu ki tāna whaka­atu­ranga.
3.33: Ki te manako tētahi ki tāna whaka­atu­ranga, kua piri tāna tohu ki te pono o tā te Atua.
3.34: Ko tā te Atua i tono mai ai, e kōrero ana ia i ngā kupu a te Atua; kāhore hoki te Wairua e hōmai e te Atua i runga i te mēhua.
3.35: E aroha ana te Matua ki te Tama, kua hoatu anō ngā mea katoa ki tōna ringa.
3.36: Ko ia e whaka­pono ana ki te Tama, he ora tonu tōna; ko ia e kore e whaka­pono ki te Tama, e kore e kite i te ora, engari ka mau tonu te riri a te Atua ki a ia.

4.1: Ā, nō ka mōhio te Ariki, kua rongo ngā Parihi, ko ngā ākonga a Īhu i mea ai, i iri­iri ai, he toko­maha atu i a Hoani.
4.2: (He ahakoa rā ehara i a Īhu nāna i iri­iri, nā āna ākonga ia.)
4.3: Ka mahue a Hūria i a ia, ā, hoki ana anō ki Kariri.
4.4: Nā, ko te ara mōna i tika nā Hamaria.
4.5: Ā, ka haere ia ki tētahi pā o Hamaria, ko Haika te ingoa, e pātata ana ki te wāhi i hoatu e Hākopa ki tāna tama, ki a Hōhepa.
4.6: Kei reira hoki te puna a Hākopa. Nā, kua nge­nge a Īhu i te haere­nga, heoi noho ana ia ki te taha o te puna, ā, meāke ko te ono o ngā hāora.
4.7: Ka haere mai tētahi wahine o Hamaria ki te utu wai. Ka mea a Īhu ki a ia, “Hōmai he wai mōku.”
4.8: (Kua riro hoki āna ākonga ki te pā, ki te hoko kai.)
4.9: Nā, ko te mea­tanga a te wahine o Hamaria ki a ia, “He aha koe, he Hūrai nā koe, ka tono mai ai i te wai i ahau, he wahine nei ahau nō Hamaria?” (Kāhore hoki e tātata ana ngā Hūrai ki ngā Hamari.)
4.10: Ka whaka­hoki a Īhu, ka mea ki a ia, “Me i mātau koe ki tā te Atua e hōmai ai, ki tēnei hoki e mea nei ki a koe, ‘Hōmai he wai mōku,’ pēnei kua tono koe ki a ia, ā, kua hoatu e ia te wai ora ki a koe.”
4.11: Ka mea te wahine ki a ia, “E kara, kāhore āu mea hei utu wai, he hōhonu anō te puna. Nō hea tēnā wai ora āu?
4.12: He nui oti koe i tō mātou matua, i a Hākopa, i hōmai ai te puna ki a mātou, inu ana ia i konei, rātou ko āna tama­riki, me āna kararehe?”
4.13: Ka whaka­hoki a Īhu, ka mea ki a ia, “E mate anō i te wai te tangata e inu ana i tēnei wai;
4.14: tēnā ko te tangata e inu ana i te wai e hoatu e ahau ki a ia, e kore ia e mate i te wai ā ake ake. Engari, te wai e hoatu e ahau ki a ia, hei puna wai tēnā i roto i a ia e pupū ake ana, ā te ora tonu rā anō.”
4.15: Ka mea te wahine ki a ia, “E kara, hōmai ki ahau tēnei wai, kei mate ahau i te wai, kei haere mai hoki ki konei rawa utu ai.”
4.16: Ka mea a Īhu ki a ia, “Tīkina, karanga­tia tō tahu, ka hoki mai ai.”
4.17: Ka whaka­hoki te wahine, ka mea, “Kāhore āku tahu.” Ka mea a Īhu ki a ia, “He kōrero tika tāu, ‘Kāhore āku tahu’;
4.18: inā hoki kua toko­rima āu tahu, ko ia i a koe nei ehara i te tahu nāu. He pono tēnei kōrero āu.”
4.19: Ka mea te wahine ki a ia, “E kara, e kite ana ahau he poro­piti koe.
4.20: I kara­kia ō mātou mātua i runga i tēnei maunga; ā, e mea ana koutou, Ko Hiruhārama te wāhi e tika ai te kara­kia.”
4.21: Ka mea a Īhu ki a ia, “E tai, whaka­pono ki ahau, meāke puta te wā, e kore ai koutou e kara­kia ki te Matua i runga i tēnei maunga, e kore anō i Hiruhārama.
4.22: Kāhore koutou e mōhio ki tā koutou e kara­kia nei; e mātau ana mātou ki tā mātou e kara­kia nei; nō ngā Hūrai nei hoki te ora.
4.23: Otirā, meāke puta te wā, ā, tēnei anō, e kara­kia ai ngā kai­karakia pono ki te Matua i runga i te wairua, i te pono; e rapu ana hoki te Matua ki te pērā hei kara­kia ki a ia.
4.24: He Wairua te Atua; me kara­kia hoki ngā kai­karakia ki a ia i runga i te wairua, i te pono.”
4.25: Ka mea te wahine ki a ia, “E mātau ana ahau kei te haere mai te Mīhaia,” (e kīa nei ko te Karaiti). “Ka tae mai ia, māna ngā mea katoa e kōrero ki a tātou.”
4.26: Ka mea a Īhu ki a ia, “Ko ahau anō ia e kōrero nei ki a koe.”
4.27: Nā, ka puta i reira āna ākonga, ka mīharo ki tāna kōrero­tanga ki te wahine; heoi, kīhai tētahi i mea, “He aha tāu e rapu? He aha koe ka kōrero ai ki a ia?”
4.28: Nā, ka whaka­rērea e te wahine tāna ipu, ā, haere ana ki te pā, ka mea ki ngā tāngata,
4.29: “Haere mai, kia kite i te tangata i kōrero­tia mai ai ki ahau ngā mea katoa i mea ai ahau. Ehara rānei tēnei i a te Karaiti?”
4.30: Ka puta rātou ki waho o te pā, ā, ka ahu mai ki a ia.
4.31: I taua takiwā anō ka tohe ngā ākonga ki a ia, ka mea, “E te Kai­whaka­ako, e kai rā.”
4.32: Otirā, ka mea ia ki a rātou, “He kai anō tāku hei kai māku, kāhore koutou e mātau.”
4.33: Nā, ka mea ngā ākonga tētahi ki tētahi, “I kawea mai rānei e tētahi he kai māna?”
4.34: Ka mea a Īhu ki a rātou, “Ko tāku kai tēnei, ko te mea i tā tōku kai­tono e pai ai, kia whaka­otia hoki tāna mahi.”
4.35: E kore ianei koutou e mea, “Kia whā atu ngā marama, ā, ka taea te kotinga? Nana, ko tāku kupu tēnei ki a koutou, kia ara ake ō koutou kanohi, ti­tiro ki ngā māra; kua mā noa ake; ko te kotinga tēnei.
4.36: Ka whi­whi te kai­kokoti ki te utu, ka kohia anō hoki e ia ngā hua mō te ora tonu; kia hari tahi ai te kairui rāua ko te kai­kokoti.
4.37: Nā, konei hoki i pono ai taua kī, ‘E rui ana tētahi, e kokoti ana tētahi.’
4.38: I tonoa koutou e ahau ki te kokoti i te mea kīhai i mahia e koutou. He tangata kē nāna i mahi, ā, kua uru koutou ki ā rātou mahi.”
4.39: Ā, he toko­maha ngā Hamari o taua pā i whaka­pono ki a ia, mō te kī a te wahine i mea rā, “I kōrero­tia mai e ia ki ahau ngā mea katoa i mea ai ahau.”
4.40: Ā, nō ka tae ngā Hamari ki a ia, ka mea kia noho ia ki a rātou; ā, e rua ngā rā i noho ai ia ki reira.
4.41: Nā, hira noa ake ngā tāngata i whaka­pono, he mea hoki nā tāna kupu.
4.42: I mea anō ki te wahine, “Ehara i te mea nā tāu kupu i whaka­pono ai mātou ināia­nei; kua rongo nei hoki mātou ake, ā, ka mātau, ko te Karaiti pū tēnei, ko te Kai­whaka­ora o te ao.” Ka Whakaorangia e Īhu te Tama a tētahi Rangatira
4.43: Ka pahure aua rā e rua, ka tūria atu e ia i reira, ā, haere ana ki Kariri.
4.44: Ko Īhu tonu hoki nāna te kī, kāhore he hōnore o te poro­piti i tōna kāinga ake.
4.45: Heoi, i tōna taenga ki Kariri, ka whaka­manu­hiri­tia, ia e ngā tāngata o Kariri, i kite hoki rātou i ngā mea katoa i meatia e ia ki Hiruhārama i te hākari; i haere hoki rātou ki te hākari.
4.46: Ā, ka tae anō a Īhu ki Kana o Kariri, ki te wāhi i meatia ai e ia te wai hei wāina. Nā, ko tētahi tangata a te kīngi, kei Kaperenauma tāna tama e mate ana.
4.47: Ā, nō ka rongo ia kua tae mai a Īhu i Hūria ki Kariri, ka haere ki a ia, ka īnoi ki a ia kia haere ia ki te whaka­ora i tāna tama; meāke hoki marere.
4.48: Nā, ko te mea­tanga a Īhu ki a ia, “Ki te kāhore koutou e kite i ngā tohu, i ngā mere­kara, e kore rawa koutou e whaka­pono.”
4.49: Ka mea te tangata a te kīngi ki a ia, “E te Ariki, haere iho i te mea kāhore anō kia mate noa tāku tama­iti”.
4.50: Ka mea a Īhu ki a ia, “Haere; kua ora tāu tama.” Nā, whaka­pono ana te tangata ki te kupu i kōrero­tia e Īhu ki a ia, ā, haere ana.
4.51: Ā, i a ia e haere ana, ka tūtaki āna pono­nga ki a ia, ka kōrero, “Kua ora tāu tama­iti.”
4.52: Nā, ka ui ia ki a rātou ki te hāora i mātūtū ake ai ia. Ka mea rātou ki a ia, “Nō­nanahi, nō te whitu o ngā hāora, i mutu ai tōna kā.”
4.53: Nā, ka mōhio te pāpā, ko te tino hāora ia i mea ai a Īhu ki a ia, “Kua ora tāu tama.” Ā, whaka­pono ana ia, rātou ko tōna whare katoa.
4.54: Ko te rua anō tēnei o ngā mere­kara i meatia e Īhu, i muri i tōna haere­nga i Hūria ki Kariri.

5.1: Muri iho i ēnei mea he hākari tā ngā Hūrai, ā, haere ana a Īhu ki Hiruhārama.
5.2: Nā, kei Hiruhārama tētahi wai kau­kau­ranga kei te tatau hipi, tōna ingoa Hiperu ko Petehera; e rima ōna whaka­mahau.
5.3: Nā, kei roto i ēnei e takoto ana tōna tini o ngā tūroro, o ngā matapō, o ngā kopa, o ngā memenge, e tatari ana ki te pō­kare­kare­nga o te wai.
5.4: Heke iho ai hoki tētahi ana­hera i te wā i rite ai ki te kau­kau­ranga, whaka­pō­kare­kare ai i te wai; ā, ko ia kua tae wawe i muri iho o te pō­kare­kare­nga o te wai i ora i tōna mate, ahakoa he aha, he aha.
5.5: Nā, kei reira tētahi tangata, e toru tekau mā waru ngā tau e mate ana.
5.6: Nō te kite­nga o Īhu i a ia e takoto ana, ka mātau kua roa kē te wā ōna e mate ana, ka mea ki a ia, “E pai ana rānei koe kia whaka­ora­ngia?”
5.7: Ka whaka­hokia e taua tūroro ki a ia, “E te Ariki, kāhore āku tāngata hei tuku i ahau ki te kau­kau­ranga, ina whaka­pō­kare­karea te wai; heoi, i ahau e haere ana, ka heke iho tētahi i mua i ahau.”
5.8: Ka mea a Īhu ki a ia, “Whaka­tika, tango­hia ake tōu moenga, haere.”
5.9: Ā, ora tonu ake taua tangata, ā, tango­hia ake ana e ia tōna moenga, haere ana. Ko te hāpati anō taua rā.
5.10: Nā, ka mea ngā Hūrai ki taua tangata i whaka­ora­ngia rā, “Ko te hāpati tēnei; e kore e tika kia mauria e koe tōu moenga.”
5.11: Ka whaka­hokia e ia ki a rātou, “Ko te tangata i whaka­ora­ngia ai ahau, nāna i mea ki ahau, ‘Tango­hia ake tōu moenga, haere.’ ”
5.12: Nā, ka ui rātou ki a ia, “Ko wai tēnā tangata i mea nā ki a koe, ‘Tango­hia ake tōu moenga, haere’?”
5.13: Otirā, kīhai taua tangata i whaka­ora­ngia rā i mōhio ko wai ia; i paheno atu hoki a Īhu, he toko­maha hoki ngā tāngata i taua wāhi.
5.14: Muri iho i ēnei mea ka kite a Īhu i a ia i roto i te teme­para, ka mea ki a ia, “Nā, ka oti nei koe te whaka­ora. Kāti te hara kei kino rawa iho te mea e pā ki a koe.”
5.15: Haere ana taua tangata, kōrero ana ki ngā Hūrai, nā Īhu ia i whaka­ora.
5.16: Koia ngā Hūrai i whai ai ki te tūkino i a Īhu, mōna i mea i ēnei mea i te hāpati.
5.17: Nā, ka whaka­hokia e Īhu ki a rātou, “E mahi ana tōku Matua ā taea noatia tēnei rā; e mahi ana anō ahau.”
5.18: Koia ngā Hūrai i tino whai rawa ai kia patua ia, ehara hoki i te mea ko tāna takahi anake i te hāpati, engari, mōna i mea ko te Atua tōna Matua ake, i mea he rite ia ki te Atua te nui. Te Mana o te Tama
5.19: Nā, ka whaka­hoki a Īhu, ka mea ki a rātou, “He pono, he pono tāku e mea nei ki a koutou, e kore e taea e te Tama te mea tētahi mea e ia anake, engari ngā mea e kite ai ia e meatia ana e te Matua; ko tāna hoki e mea ai, e meatia ana hoki e te Tama.
5.20: E aroha ana hoki te Matua ki te Tama, e whaka­kitea ana hoki ki a ia ngā mea katoa e mea ai ia; he nui atu i ēnei ngā mahi e whaka­kitea e ia ki a ia, kia mīharo ai koutou.
5.21: Ko tā te Matua hoki, he whaka­ara, he whaka­ora i ngā tū­pā­paku; ka pērā anō te Tama, ka whaka­ora i āna e pai ai.
5.22: E kore hoki te Matua e whaka­wā i tētahi, engari, kua tukua e ia ngā whaka­wā katoa ki te Tama;
5.23: kia rite ai te whaka­hōnore a ngā tāngata katoa i te Tama ki tā rātou whaka­hōnore i te Matua. Ki te kāhore tētahi e whaka­hōnore i te Tama, e whaka­kāhore ana ia i te hōnore mō te Matua nāna nei ia i tono mai.
5.24: “He pono, he pono tāku e mea atu nei ki a koutou, ko te tangata e rongo ana ki tāku kōrero, e whaka­pono ana hoki ki tōku kai­tono mai, he ora tonu tōna; e kore anō ia e riro ki te whaka­wā, engari, kua whiti i te mate ki te ora.
5.25: He pono, he pono tāku e mea nei ki a koutou, meāke puta te wā, ā, tēnei anō ināia­nei, e rongo ai ngā tū­pā­paku i te reo o tā te Atua Tama; ā, ko te hunga e rongo ana ka ora.
5.26: Tā te mea he ora tō te Matua kei roto i a ia; wai­hoki kua hōmai e ia ki te Tama, kia whai ora i roto i a ia;
5.27: ā, kua hōmai anō ki a ia he tikanga mō te whaka­wā, nō te mea ko ia te Tama a te tangata.
5.28: Kaua e mīharo ki tēnei; nō te mea meāke puta te wā, e rongo ai i tōna reo ngā tāngata katoa i roto i ngā urupā,
5.29: ā, ka puta; ko ngā kai­mahi i te pai ki te aranga o te ora; ko ngā kai­mahi i te kino ki te aranga o te whaka­wā. Ngā Kaiwhakaatu mō Īhu
5.30: “E kore e āhei i ahau te mea tētahi mea e ahau anake; rite tonu tāku whaka­wā ki tāku e rongo ai. He tika hoki tāku whaka­wā; kāhore hoki ahau e rapu i tāku i pai ai, engari, i tā tōku kai­tono i pai ai.”
5.31: “Me­he­mea ko ahau hei whaka­atu i āku aha, i āku aha, ehara tāku i te whaka­atu pono.
5.32: Tērā atu anō tētahi kai­whaka­atu mōku; e mōhio ana anō ahau he whaka­atu pono tāna e whaka­atu nei mōku.
5.33: I tono tāngata koutou ki a Hoani, ā, i whaka­atu­ria e ia te pono.
5.34: Kāhore ahau e manako ki tā te tangata whaka­atu; engari, e kōrero­tia ana e ahau ēnei mea kia ora ai koutou.
5.35: He rama kā tērā, he rama mārama tonu; he wā anō i pai ai koutou kia hari ki tōna mārama.
5.36: Otiia, he kai­whaka­atu anō tōku, nui atu i a Hoani. Ko ngā mahi hoki i hōmai e te Matua kia whaka­otia e ahau, ko aua mahi e mahia nei e ahau, hei whaka­atu mōku, i tonoa mai ahau e te Matua.
5.37: Nā, ko te Matua nāna nei ahau i tono mai, kua oti ahau te whaka­atu e ia. Kāhore anō koutou i rongo noa i tōna reo, kāhore anō i kite i tōna āhua.
5.38: Kāhore anō hoki i mau tāna kupu i roto i a koutou; inā kāhore anō koutou i whaka­pono ki tēnei i tonoa mai nei e ia.
5.39: Whaka­takina ai e koutou ngā tikanga o ngā karaipi­ture; e mea ana hoki koutou kei reira te ora tonu mō koutou; ko ēnei hei kai­whaka­atu mōku.
5.40: Heoi, kāhore koutou e pai kia haere mai ki ahau, kia whi­whi ai ki te ora.
5.41: “He korōria tāngata, kāhore ahau e manako atu.
5.42: Nā, kua mātau ahau ki a koutou, kāhore te aroha o te Atua i roto i a koutou.
5.43: Kua tae mai nei ahau i runga i te ingoa o tōku Matua, ā, kāhore koutou e manako mai ki ahau; ki te haere mai tētahi i runga i tōna ake ingoa, ka manako koutou ki a ia.
5.44: Me pēhea koutou ka whaka­pono ai, ka riro nei i a koutou te korōria e puta ana i a koutou anō, ā, kāhore e rapu i te korōria e puta ana i te Atua kotahi?
5.45: Kei mea koutou e kōrero­tia tō koutou hē e ahau ki te Matua; tērā te kai­kōrero mō tō koutou hē, ko Mohi, ko tā koutou e tū­mana­ko nei.
5.46: Me i whaka­pono hoki koutou ki a Mohi, kua whaka­pono anō ki ahau; ko tāna hoki i tuhi­tuhi ai he mea mōku.
5.47: Otirā, ki te kāhore koutou e whaka­pono ki āna i tuhi­tuhi ai, me pēhea ka whaka­pono ai ki āku kōrero?”

6.1: Muri iho i ēnei mea ka whiti atu a Īhu i te moana o Kariri, (arā, i te moana o Tai­piria.)
6.2: Ā, he rahi te hui i aru i a ia, i kite hoki rātou i āna mere­kara i mea ai ia ki ngā tūroro.
6.3: Nā, ka haere a Īhu ki runga i te maunga, ā, noho ana i reira rātou ko āna ākonga.
6.4: Kua tata hoki te Kape­nga, te hākari a ngā Hūrai.
6.5: Ā, nō te maranga­tanga ake o ngā kanohi o Īhu, ka kite i te rahi o te hui e haere mai ana ki a ia; ka mea ia ki a Piripi, “Ko hea tātou hoko ai i ētahi taro, kia kai ai ēnei?”
6.6: I pēnei ai tāna kī hei whaka­mātau mōna; i mōhio hoki ia ki tāna e mea ai.
6.7: Ka mea a Piripi ki a ia, “E kore e ranea mā rātou ngā taro o ngā pene e rua rau, kia whi­whi ai tēnei, tēnei o rātou i tētahi wāhi iti.”
6.8: Ka mea tētahi o āna ākonga ki a ia, a Anaru, teina o Haimona Pita,
6.9: “He tama­iti tēnei, e rima āna taro pāre, e rua ika no­nohi. Heoi, hei aha ēnei mā tēnei ope nui?”
6.10: Nā, ka mea a Īhu, “Meinga ngā tāngata kia noho.” (He nui hoki te taru­taru i taua wāhi.) Nā, noho ana ngā tāne ki raro, te toko­maha me te mea e rima mano.
6.11: Nā, ka mau a Īhu ki ngā taro; ā, ka mutu te whaka­whetai, ka tuwha atu ki te hunga e noho rā; me ngā ika anō, tā rātou i pai ai.
6.12: Ā, nō ka mākona rātou, ka mea ia ki āna ākonga, “Kohiko­hia ngā toenga o ngā whati­whatinga, kei mau­mau­ria tētahi wāhi.”
6.13: Nā, kohiko­hia ana e rātou, ā, whaka­kīa ana ngā kete tekau mā rua ki ngā whati­whatinga o ngā taro pāre e rima, ki ngā toenga a ngā tāngata i kai rā.
6.14: Ā, i te kite­nga o aua tāngata i te mere­kara i meatia e Īhu, ka kī rātou, “Ko ia anō tēnei, ko te poro­piti e haere mai ana ki te ao.”
6.15: Nā, ka mahara a Īhu, meāke rātou haere mai ki te tango i a ia, ki te whaka­kīngi i a ia, nā, maunu ana anō ia ki te maunga, ko ia anake. Ka Haere a Īhu i runga i te Moana (Matiu 14.22-33; Māka 6.45-52)
6.16: Ā, nō ka ahi­ahi, ka haere āna ākonga ki te moana.
6.17: Nā, ka eke rātou ki te kai­puke, ka whaka­whiti ki tāwāhi o te moana, ki Kaperenauma. Ā, kua pōuri noa ake, kāhore anō a Īhu kia tae noa mai ki a rātou.
6.18: Nā, ko te tū­ranga o te moana, he nui hoki nō te pū­hanga o te hau.
6.19: Nā, i tō rātou hoenga atu, e rua tekau mā rima, e toru tekau rānei pā­ronga, ka kite i a Īhu e haere māori ana i runga i te moana, e whaka­tata ana ki te kai­puke; nā ka mataku rātou.
6.20: Nā, ka mea ia ki a rātou, “Ko ahau tēnei, aua e wehi.”
6.21: Nā, ka mea rātou kia eke ia ki te kai­puke; ā, kīhai i aha kua ū te kai­puke ki te wāhi i hoe ai rātou. Ka Kimi ngā Tāngata i a Īhu
6.22: I te aonga ake, ka mahara te mano e tū ana ki tērā taha o te moana, kāhore he poti kē atu o reira, ko tērā anake i eke ai āna ākonga, kīhai hoki a Īhu i eke tahi rātou ko āna ākonga ki te poti, engari, ko āna ākonga anake i haere.
6.23: He poti kē rā ia i ū mai i Tai­piria ki pahaki atu o te wāhi i kai ai rātou i te taro i tā te Ariki whaka­whetai­nga.
6.24: Ā, i te kite­nga o te mano kāhore a Īhu i reira, kāhore anō hoki āna ākonga, ka eke hoki rātou ki ngā kai­puke, ka rere ki Kaperenauma ki te rapu i a Īhu. Ko Īhu, te Taro o te Ora
6.25: Ā, nō tō rātou kite­nga i a ia i tāwāhi o te moana, ka mea ki a ia, “E Rapi, nōna­hea koe i tae mai ai ki konei?”
6.26: Ka whaka­hoki a Īhu ki a rātou, ka mea, “He pono, he pono tāku e mea nei ki a koutou, ehara i te mea he kite­nga nō koutou i ngā mere­kara i rapu ai koutou i ahau, engari, nō te mea i kai koutou i ngā taro, ā, ka mākona.
6.27: Aua e mahia te kai memeha, engari, te kai e mau tonu ana ā te ora tonu rā anō, ko tā te Tama hoki a te tangata e hoatu ai ki a koutou. Kua oti hoki ia te whai tohu e te Atua, e te Matua.”
6.28: Nā, ka mea rātou ki a ia, “Me aha mātou e mahi ai i ngā mahi a te Atua?”
6.29: Ka whaka­hoki a Īhu, ka mea ki a rātou, “Ko tā te Atua mahi tēnei, kia whaka­pono koutou ki tāna i tono mai ai.”
6.30: Nā, ka mea rātou ki a ia, “Ko tēhea tohu te meatia ana e koe kia kite ai mātou, kia whaka­pono ai ki a koe? Tēnā koa tāu mahi?
6.31: I kai ō tātou mātua i te mana i te koraha; ko te mea hoki tēnā i tuhi­tuhia, ‘I hōmai e ia he taro i te rangi hei kai mā rātou.’ ”
6.32: Nā, ko te mea­tanga a Īhu ki a rātou, “He pono, he pono tāku e mea nei ki a koutou, ehara i a Mohi nāna i hoatu tēnā taro ki a koutou i te rangi. Engari, tēnei te hoatu nei e tōku Matua ki a koutou te taro pono o te rangi.
6.33: Ko te taro hoki a te Atua ko ia e heke iho ana i te rangi, e hōmai ana i te ora ki te ao.”
6.34: Nā, ka mea rātou ki a ia, “E te Ariki, hōmai tēnei taro ki a mātou i ngā wā katoa.”
6.35: Ka mea a Īhu ki a rātou, “Ko ahau te taro o te ora. Ki te haere mai tētahi ki ahau, e kore rawa ia e hia­kai; ki te whaka­pono hoki tētahi ki ahau, e kore rawa ia e mate­wai.
6.36: Otirā, i mea anō ahau ki a koutou, kua kite koutou i ahau, ā, kāhore i whaka­pono.
6.37: Ko ā te Matua e hōmai ai ki ahau ka haere katoa mai ki ahau; ā, ki te haere mai tētahi ki ahau, e kore rawa e pangā e ahau ki waho,
6.38: i heke iho hoki ahau i te rangi, ehara i te mea hei mahi i tāku i pai ai, engari, i tā tōku kai­tono mai i pai ai.
6.39: Ko tā te Matua i pai ai, nāna nei ahau i tono mai, koia tēnei, kia kaua e ngaro i ahau tētahi wāhi o ngā mea katoa i hōmai e ia ki ahau; engari, kia whaka­ara­hia ake e ahau ā te rā whaka­mutu­nga.
6.40: Ko tā tōku Matua hoki tēnei i pai ai, ko te tangata e kite ana i te Tama, e whaka­pono ana anō ki a ia, kia whi­whi ia ki te ora tonu; māku anō ia e whaka­ara ake ā te rā whaka­mutu­nga.”
6.41: Nā, ka kōrero kō­muhu­muhu ngā Hūrai ki a ia, mōna i mea, “Ko ahau te taro i heke iho i te rangi.”
6.42: Ka mea rātou, “Ehara oti tēnei i a Īhu, tama a Hōhepa, e mōhio nei tātou ki tōna pāpā rāua ko tōna whaea? Ha! He pēhea tāna e kī nei, ‘I heke iho ahau i te rangi?’ ”
6.43: Nā, ka whaka­hoki a Īhu, ka mea ki a rātou, “Kāti te kō­muhu­muhu i roto i a koutou.
6.44: Kāhore he tangata e āhei te haere mai ki ahau, ki te kāhore ia e kūmea mai e te Matua, nāna nei ahau i tono mai. Ā, māku anō ia e whaka­ara ake ā te rā whaka­mutu­nga.
6.45: Kua oti te tuhi­tuhi i roto i ngā poro­piti, ‘Ā, ka whaka­akona rātou katoa e te Atua.’ Nā, ko te tangata kua rongo ki te Matua, kua ākona hoki, ka haere mai ki ahau.
6.46: Ehara i te mea kua kite tētahi i te Matua; ko ia anake i puta mai i te Atua, ko ia kua kite i te Matua.
6.47: He pono, he pono tāku, e mea nei ki a koutou, Ki te whaka­pono tētahi, he ora tonu tōna.
6.48: Ko ahau te taro o te ora.
6.49: I kai rā ō koutou mātua i te mana i te koraha, ā, i mate rātou.
6.50: Ko te taro tēnei e heke iho ana i te rangi, kia kai ai te tangata i a ia, ā, kia kaua e mate.
6.51: Ko ahau te taro ora i heke iho i te rangi; ki te kai tētahi i tēnei taro, e ora tonu ia. Āe rā, ko te taro e hoatu e ahau ko ōku kiko­kiko, e hoatu e ahau hei oranga mō te ao.”
6.52: Nā, ka totohe ngā Hūrai tētahi ki tētahi, ka mea, “Me pēhea e hōmai ai e tēnei tangata ōna kiko­kiko kia kainga e tātou?”
6.53: Nā, ko te mea­tanga a Īhu ki a rātou, “He pono, he pono tāku e mea nei ki a koutou, ki te kāhore koutou e kai i ngā kiko­kiko o te Tama a te tangata, e inu i ōna toto, kāhore he ora i roto i a koutou ake.
6.54: Ko ia e kai ana i ōku kiko­kiko, e inu ana i ōku toto, he ora tonu tōna; ā, māku ia e whaka­ara ake ā te rā whaka­mutu­nga.
6.55: He kai pono hoki ōku kiko­kiko, he mea pono ōku toto hei inu­manga.
6.56: Ko ia e kai ana i ōku kiko­kiko, e inu ana i ōku toto, e noho ana i roto i ahau, me ahau hoki i roto i a ia.
6.57: Nā, te Matua ora hoki ahau i tono mai, nō te Matua anō tōku ora; wai­hoki ki te kai tētahi i ahau, kei ahau he ora mōna.
6.58: Ko te taro tēnei i heke iho i te rangi. E kore e pērā i tā ō koutou mātua i kai rā, ā, mate ana. Ki te kai tētahi i tēnei taro, e ora tonu ia.”
6.59: I kōrero­tia ēnei mea e ia i roto i te whare kara­kia, i a ia e whaka­ako ana i Kaperenauma. Ngā Kupu o te Ora Mutungakore
6.60: Nā, he toko­maha āna ākonga i te rongo­nga, i mea, “He kupu pakeke tēnei; ko wai e āhei te whaka­rongo atu?”
6.61: Ka mōhio ia a Īhu i roto i a ia, e kō­muhu­muhu ana āna ākonga ki tēnei, ka mea ia ki a rātou, “E hē ana koutou ki tēnei?
6.62: Ka pēhea rā ki te kite koutou i te Tama a te tangata e kake atu ana ki te wāhi i noho ai ia i mua?
6.63: Ko te wairua te whaka­ora ana; kāhore a te kiko­kiko wāhi. Ko ngā kupu e kōrero nei ahau ki a koutou he wairua, he ora.
6.64: Tēnei anō ia ētahi o koutou kāhore ō rātou whaka­pono.” (I mātau hoki a Īhu nō te tīma­tanga ki ngā mea kāhore ō rātou whaka­pono, ki te tangata anō e tukua ai ia.)
6.65: Ā, ka mea ia, “Nā, konei ahau i mea ai ki a koutou, kāhore he tangata e āhei te haere mai ki ahau, ki te kāhore e hoatu ki a ia e tōku Matua.”
6.66: I taua wā, he toko­maha āna ākonga i hoki ki muri, ā, mutu ake tā rātou haere tahi me ia.
6.67: Nā, ka mea a Īhu ki te tekau mā rua, “E mea ana anō rānei koutou kia haere?”
6.68: Nā, ka whaka­hokia e Haimona Pita ki a ia, “E te Ariki, me haere mātou ki a wai? Kei a koe ngā kupu o te ora tonu.
6.69: Kua whaka­pono mātou, kua mātau, ko te Karaiti koe, ko te Tama a te Atua ora.”
6.70: Ka whaka­hokia e Īhu ki a rātou, “He teka ianei kotahi tekau mā rua koutou i whiri­whiria e ahau, he rēwera anō tētahi o koutou?”
6.71: Ko Hūrā Ikariote tama a Haimona tāna i kōrero ai; ko te tangata hoki ia meāke nei tuku i a ia; ko tētahi hoki ia o te tekau mā rua.

7.1: I muri i ēnei mea ka hāere­ere a Īhu i Kariri; kāhore hoki ia i pai ki te hāere­ere i Hūria, e rapu ana hoki ngā Hūrai kia whaka­matea ia.
7.2: Nā, kua tata te hākari a ngā Hūrai, te Hākari Whare Wharau.
7.3: Nā, ka mea ōna tēina ki a ia, “Haere atu i konei, anga atu ki Hūria, kia kite ai hoki āu ākonga i āu mahi e mahi nei koe.
7.4: E kore hoki tētahi tangata e mea huna i tētahi mea, ki te whai ia kia ara tōna ingoa. Ki te mea koe i ēnei mea, kia kite te ao i a koe.”
7.5: (Ko ōna tēina tonu hoki kīhai i whaka­pono ki a ia.)
7.6: Nā, ka mea a Īhu ki a rātou, “Kāhore anō kia taea noatia tōku tāima; ko tō koutou tāima ia kei ngā wā katoa.
7.7: E kore e āhei kia kino te ao ki a koutou; engari ka kino ki ahau, nō te mea e whaka­atu­ria ana e ahau te kino o āna mahi.
7.8: Haere koutou ki tēnei hākari; e kore ahau e haere wawe ki tēnei hākari; kāhore hoki tōku tāima kia āta rite noa.”
7.9: Ā, ka mutu tēnei kōrero āna ki a rātou, ka noho tonu ia ki Kariri. Ko Īhu i te Hākari Wharau
7.10: Ā, nō ka riro ōna tēina ki te hākari, ka haere anō hoki ia, ehara i te mea whaka­kite nui, engari i tū-ā-huna.
7.11: Heoi, i rapu ngā Hūrai i a ia i te hākari, i mea, “Kei hea ia?”
7.12: He nui hoki te kōrero kō­muhu­muhu mōna i roto i te mano. Ko ētahi i mea, “He tangata pai ia,” ko ētahi i mea, “Kāhore, engari e whaka­pōhēhē ana ia i te iwi.”
7.13: Heoi, kīhai i rahi te kōrero a tētahi tangata mōna, he wehi ki ngā Hūrai.
7.14: Nā, i waenga­nui o te hākari, ka haere a Īhu ki roto ki te teme­para whaka­ako ai.
7.15: Ā, ka mīharo ngā Hūrai, ka mea, “Nā te aha i hua ai te mōhio o tēnei tangata, ehara nei hoki ia i te mea whaka­ako?”
7.16: Ka whaka­hoki a Īhu ki a rātou, ka mea, “Ehara i te mea nāku ake tāku e whaka­ako nei, engari, nā tōku kai­tono mai.
7.17: Ki te pai tētahi tangata ki te mea i tāna e pai ai, e mātau ia ki te whaka­ako­ranga, nā te Atua rānei, he kōrero nāku ake rānei.
7.18: Ko te tangata nāna ake tāna kōrero, e whai ana ia i tōna ake korōria; tēnā ki te whai tētahi i te korōria o tōna kai­tono, e pono ana ia, ā, kāhore ōna hē.
7.19: He teka ianei nā Mohi te ture i hoatu ki a koutou, ā, kāhore e whaka­ritea te ture e tētahi o koutou? He aha koutou ka whai nei kia whaka­matea ahau?”
7.20: Nā, ka whaka­hoki te mano ka mea, “He rēwera tōu! Ko wai te whai ana kia whaka­matea koe?”
7.21: Ka whaka­hoki a Īhu, ka mea ki a rātou, “Kotahi āku mahi i mahi ai, ā, e mīharo­tia ana e koutou katoa.
7.22: I hōmai e Mohi te kotinga ki a koutou (ehara anō ia i te mea nā Mohi ake, engari nā ngā tūpuna), e kokoti ana hoki koutou i te tangata i te hāpati.
7.23: Ki te kotia te tangata i te hāpati, kei taka­hia te ture a Mohi; e riri ana oti koutou ki ahau, mōku i whaka­ora rawa i te tangata i te hāpati?
7.24: Kaua e waiho te whaka­wā i runga i tā te kanohi, engari kia tika tā koutou whaka­wā.” Ko Ia te Karaiti?
7.25: Me i reira ka mea ētahi o ngā tāngata o Hiruhārama, “Ehara oti tēnei i a ia e whāia nei e rātou kia whaka­matea?
7.26: Nā, māia tonu tāna kōrero, ā, kāhore ā rātou kupu ki a ia. E tino mātau ana rānei ngā ranga­tira, ko te Karaiti pū tēnei?
7.27: Otiia, e mātau ana tātou ki te wāhi i puta mai ai tēnei; tēnā ka tae mai a te Karaiti, kāhore he tangata e mātau ki te wāhi e puta mai ai ia.”
7.28: Nā, ka karanga a Īhu i te teme­para i a ia e whaka­ako ana, ka mea, “E mātau ana koutou ki ahau, e mātau ana anō ki te wāhi i haere mai ai ahau. Ehara i ahau ake tāku haere mai, engari, e pono ana te kai­tono mai i ahau; kāhore nei koutou i mātau ki a ia.
7.29: E mātau ana ahau ki a ia; i puta mai hoki ahau i a ia, nāna anō ahau i tono mai.”
7.30: Ā, i whai rātou kia hopu­kia ia; otiia, kīhai i pā te ringa o tētahi ki a ia, kāhore hoki tōna hāora i taka noa.
7.31: Ā, he toko­maha o te mano whaka­pono ki a ia, i mea, “Ka tae mai a te Karaiti, tērā rānei e maha atu āna mere­kara e mea ai i a tēnei e mea nei?” Ka Tonoa atu ngā Kaitiaki kia Hopu i a Īhu
7.32: I rongo ngā Parihi i te mano e kōrero­rero ana i ēnei mea mōna; nā, ka tonoa mai e ngā Parihi rātou ko ngā tohu­nga nui he kātipa ki te hopu i a ia.
7.33: Nā, ka mea a Īhu ki a rātou, “He iti noa ake te wāhi e noho ai ahau ki a koutou, kātahi ahau ka haere ki tōku kai­tono mai.
7.34: Tērā koutou e rapu i ahau, heoi, e kore koutou e kite; e kore hoki koutou e āhei te haere ake ki te wāhi e noho ai ahau.”
7.35: Nā, ka mea ngā Hūrai ki a rātou anō, “E haere oti te tangata nei ki hea, e kore ai e kitea e tātou? E haere oti ia ki ngā manene i roto i ngā Kariki, ako ai i ngā Kariki?
7.36: He kī aha tēnei e kī nei ia, ‘Tērā koutou e rapu i ahau, ā, e kore e kite. E kore hoki koutou e āhei te haere ake ki te wāhi e noho ai ahau’?” Ngā Awa o te Wai Ora
7.37: I te rā whaka­mutu­nga, i te rā nui o te hākari, ka tū a Īhu, ka karanga, ka mea, “Ki te mate­wai tētahi, haere mai ia ki ahau, kia inu.
7.38: Ki te whaka­pono tētahi ki ahau, ka rite ki tā te karaipi­ture, ‘Ka rere mai ngā wai ora i roto i tōna kōpū.’ ”
7.39: I kōrero­tia tēnei e ia mō te Wairua, meāke nei riro i te hunga e whaka­pono ana ki a ia; kāhore anō hoki te Wairua Tapu kia hōmai noa; nō te mea kīanō a Īhu i whaka­korōria­tia noatia. He Wehenga i Waenganui i ngā Tāngata
7.40: Ko ētahi o te mano i tō rātou rongo­nga i tēnei kupu, i mea, “He pono ko te Poro­piti tēnei.”
7.41: Ka mea ētahi, “Ko te Karaiti tēnei.” Ko ētahi i mea, “E puta mai rānei a te Karaiti i Kariri?
7.42: Kāhore koia te karaipi­ture i mea, e puta mai a te Karaiti i te uri o Rāwiri, i Pēterehema, i te kāinga i noho ai a Rāwiri?”
7.43: Nā, ka waiho ia hei take wehe­wehe­nga mā te mano.
7.44: Ko ētahi o rātou i mea kia hopu­kia ia; otirā, kīhai i pā ngā ringa o tētahi ki a ia. Te Whakapono kore o ngā Rangatira Hūrai
7.45: Nā, ko te taenga atu o ngā kātipa ki ngā tohu­nga nui rātou ko ngā Parihi; ka mea atu ēnei ki a rātou, “He aha ia tē kawea mai ai e koutou?”
7.46: Ka whaka­hokia e ngā kātipa, “Kāhore rawa he tangata i rite āna kōrero ki a tēnei.”
7.47: Nā, ka whaka­hokia tā rātou e ngā Parihi, “Kua tini­hanga­tia anō hoki koutou?
7.48: Kua whaka­pono koia tētahi o ngā ranga­tira, o ngā Parihi rānei ki a ia?
7.49: Ko tēnei hunga ia e kore nei e mātau ki te ture, ka oti rātou te kanga.”
7.50: Ka mea a Nikorima ki a rātou, tērā i haere mai rā ki a ia i mua, ko ia hoki tētahi o rātou,
7.51: “Ka whaka­hē­ngia rānei te tangata e tō tātou ture, i te mea kāhore anō i whaka­rongo noa ki a ia, i mātau hoki ki tāna mahi?”
7.52: Nā, ka whaka­hoki rātou, ka mea ki a ia, “Ko koe hoki tētahi nō Kariri? Tēnā rapua, ka kite koe, kāhore kia ara noa tētahi poro­piti i Kariri.”
7.53: Nā, hoki ana rātou ki tōna whare, ki tōna whare.

8.1: Ko Īhu ia i haere ki Maunga Ōriwa.
8.2: Ā, i te atatū ka hoki anō ia ki te teme­para, ā, tae katoa ana te iwi ki a ia. Nā, ka noho ia, ka whaka­ako i a rātou.
8.3: Kātahi, ka āra­hina mai ki a ia e ngā kara­ipi rātou ko ngā Parihi tētahi wahine i hopu­kia e pūremu ana; ā, whaka­tū­ria ana ki waenga­nui.
8.4: Ka mea rātou ki a ia, “E te Kai­whaka­ako, i hopu­kia pūtia te wahine nei e pūremu ana.
8.5: I whaka­hau a Mohi ki a mātou i roto i te ture, kia ākina ngā pēnei ki te kōhatu. Tēnā koa tāu kī?”
8.6: I pēnei ai rātou he whaka­mā­tau­tau mōna, kia whai take ai rātou e whaka­pā­ngia ai he hē ki a ia. Ka piko a Īhu, ā, tuhi­tuhi ana tōna ringa ki te whenua.
8.7: Ā, ka tohe tonu rātou ki te ui ki a ia ka whaka­tika ake ia, ka mea ki a rātou, “Ko te tangata o koutou kāhore ōna hara, māna te kōhatu mātā­mua e āki ki a ia.”
8.8: Nā, ka piko anō ia, ka tuhi­tuhi ki te whenua.
8.9: Ā, i tō rātou rongo­nga, ka haere taki­tahi atu ki waho, nā, ngā kaumātua i tīmata, ā, poto noa ō muri rawa. Ā, ko Īhu anake i mahue, me te wahine e tū ana i waenga­nui.
8.10: Ā, ko te maranga­tanga ake o Īhu, ka mea ki a ia, “E tai, kei hea rātou? Kāhore he tangata i whaka­tau hē ki a koe?”
8.11: Anō rā ko tērā, “Kāhore, e te Ariki.” Ka mea a Īhu ki a ia, “Kāhore anō hoki ahau e whaka­tau i te hē ki a koe; haere, kāti te hara.” Ko Īhu te Mārama o te Ao
8.12: I kī atu anō a Īhu ki a rātou, i mea, “Ko ahau te whaka­mārama o te ao; ki te aru tētahi i ahau, e kore ia e haere i te pōuri, engari, ka whi­whi ki te mārama o te ora.”
8.13: Nā, ka mea ngā Parihi ki a ia, “Ko koe anō tōu kai­whaka­atu; ehara tāu i te whaka­atu pono.”
8.14: Ka whaka­hoki a Īhu, ka mea ki a rātou, “Ahakoa ko ahau anō tōku kai­whaka­atu, he pono tāku whaka­atu; nō te mea e mātau ana ahau ki te wāhi i haere mai ai ahau, ki te wāhi hoki e haere atu nei ahau; ko koutou ia kāhore e mātau ki te wāhi i haere mai ai ahau, ki te wāhi anō e haere atu nei ahau.
8.15: Nā, te kiko­kiko tā koutou tikanga whaka­wā; e kore ahau e whaka­wā i tētahi.
8.16: Ā, ki te whaka­wā ahau, he tika tāku whaka­wā; ehara hoki i te mea ko ahau anake, engari, ko māua ko te Matua nāna nei ahau i tono mai.
8.17: Āe, kua oti anō te tuhi­tuhi i roto i tō koutou ture, He pono te whaka­atu a ngā tāngata toko­rua.
8.18: Ko ahau tēnei hei kai­whaka­atu mōku anō, hei kai­whaka­atu anō mōku te Matua, nāna nei ahau i tono mai.”
8.19: Nā, ka mea rātou ki a ia, “Kei hea tōu Matua?” Ka whaka­hokia e Īhu, “Kāhore koutou e mātau ki ahau, kāhore anō ki tōku Matua; me i mātau koutou ki ahau, kua mātau anō ki tōku Matua.”
8.20: I kōrero­tia ēnei kupu e Īhu i te whare takoto­ranga taonga, i a ia e whaka­ako ana i roto i te teme­para; ā, kāhore tētahi i hopu i a ia; kīanō hoki tōna hāora i taka noa. E Kore Koutou e Āhei te Haere ake ki te Wāhi e Haere ai Ahau
8.21: Me i reira ka kī atu anō a Īhu ki a rātou, “E haere atu ana ahau, ā, tērā koutou e rapu i ahau, e mate anō hoki i roto i tō koutou hara. E kore koutou e āhei te haere ake ki te wāhi e haere ai ahau.”
8.22: Nā, ka mea ngā Hūrai, “E whaka­mate oti ia i a ia anō? Inā ia ka mea, ‘E kore koutou e āhei te haere ake ki te wāhi e haere ai ahau.’ ”
8.23: Anō rā ko ia ki a rātou, “Nō raro nei koutou; nō runga ahau; nō tēnei ao koutou; ehara ahau i tēnei ao.
8.24: Koia ahau i mea ai ki a koutou, e mate koutou i roto i ō koutou hara; ki te kore hoki koutou e whaka­pono ko ahau ia, e mate koutou i roto i ō koutou hara.”
8.25: Kātahi rātou ka mea ki a ia, “Ko wai koe?” Nā, ka mea a Īhu ki a rātou, “Ko tāku anō kōrero ai ki a koutou i te tīma­tanga.
8.26: He maha āku mea e kōrero ai, e whaka­wā ai mō koutou; otirā, e pono ana tōku kai­tono mai; e kōrero­tia ana hoki e ahau ki te ao ngā mea i rongo ai ahau ki a ia.”
8.27: Kīhai rātou i mātau ko te Matua tāna i kōrero ai ki a rātou.
8.28: Kātahi a Īhu ka mea ki a rātou, “Kia oti te Tama a te tangata te whaka­iri e koutou, ko reira koutou mātau ai ko ahau ia, ā, e kore e meatia tētahi mea e ahau ake; engari, ko ā tōku Matua i whaka­ako mai ai ki ahau, ko ēnei āku e kōrero nei.
8.29: Kei ahau nei anō tōku kai­tono mai; kīhai ahau i waiho e te Matua ko ahau anake, nō te mea e mahi tonu ana ahau i ngā mea e pai­ngia ana e ia.”
8.30: Nā, i a ia e kōrero ana i ēnei mea, he toko­maha i whaka­pono ki a ia. Mā te Pono Koutou ka Rangatira ai
8.31: Me i reira ka mea a Īhu ki ngā Hūrai i whaka­pono ki a ia, “Ki te mau tonu koutou ki tāku kupu, he tino ākonga koutou nāku;
8.32: ā, e mātau koutou ki te pono, mā te pono anō koutou ka ranga­tira ai.”
8.33: Ka whaka­hokia e rātou ki a ia, “He whānau mātou nā Āperahama, kāhore mātou i waiho noa hei pono­nga mā tētahi tangata. He aha tāu e mea, Ka ranga­tira koutou?”
8.34: Ka whaka­hokia e Īhu ki a rātou, “He pono, he pono tāku e mea nei ki a koutou, he pono­nga nā te hara ngā kai­mahi katoa i te hara.
8.35: E kore te pono­nga e noho tonu i te whare; ko te Tama ia e noho tonu ana.
8.36: Nā, i te mea ka whaka­rangatira­tia koutou e te Tama, he tino ranga­tira koutou.
8.37: E mātau ana anō ahau, he whānau koutou nā Āperahama; heoi, e whai ana koutou kia whaka­matea ahau, he kore hoki nō tāku kupu e mau i roto i a koutou.
8.38: E kōrero­tia ana e ahau tāku i kite ai ki tōku Matua; e mahia ana e koutou tā koutou i kite ai ki tō koutou matua.”
8.39: Ka whaka­hoki rātou, ka mea ki a ia, “Ko Āperahama tō mātou matua.” Ka mea a Īhu ki a rātou, “Me he tama­riki koutou nā Āperahama, kua mahia e koutou ngā mahi a Āperahama.
8.40: Tēnā ko tēnei e whai ana koutou kia whaka­matea ahau, te tangata nāna i kōrero te pono ki a koutou, tāku hoki i rongo ai ki te Atua. Kīhai a Āperahama i pēnā.
8.41: E mahi ana koutou i ngā mahi a tō koutou matua.” Kātahi rātou ka mea ki a ia, “Kīhai mātou i whānau pōriro; kotahi tō mātou Matua, ko te Atua.”
8.42: Ka mea anō a Īhu ki a rātou, “Me­he­mea ko te Atua tō koutou Matua, kua aroha koutou ki ahau; i haere mai hoki ahau i te Atua, ā, kua tae mai nei. Kīhai hoki ahau i haere noa mai, engari, nāna ahau i tono mai.
8.43: He aha rā koutou tē mātau ai ki tāku kōrero? Nō te mea e kore koutou e āhei te whaka­rongo ki tāku kupu.
8.44: Nā tō koutou matua koutou, nā te rēwera, e pai ana hoki kia mea i tā tō koutou matua i hia­hia ai. He kai­kōhuru ia nō te tīma­tanga, kīhai hoki i tū i roto i te pono, nō te mea kāhore he pono i roto i a ia. Ki te kōrero teka ia, e kōrero ana i āna; he kōrero teka hoki ia, ko te matua o te teka.
8.45: I tāku kōrero­tanga i te pono, kāhore koutou e whaka­pono ki ahau.
8.46: Ko wai o koutou hei whaka­atu he hara tōku? Ki te pono tāku kōrero, he aha koutou tē whaka­pono ai ki ahau?
8.47: E whaka­rongo ana te tangata a te Atua ki ngā kōrero a te Atua; koia koutou tē whaka­rongo ai, nō te mea ehara koutou i te Atua.” Ko Īhu rāua ko Āperahama
8.48: Nā, ka whaka­hoki ngā Hūrai, ka mea ki a ia, “Kāhore koia i tika tā mātou i mea rā, nō Hamaria koe, ā, he rēwera tōu?”
8.49: Ka whaka­hokia e Īhu, “Kāhore ōku rēwera; engari e whaka­hōnore ana ahau i tōku Matua, ko koutou ia te whaka­kāhore ana i te hōnore mōku.
8.50: Kāhore āku whai i te korōria mōku; tērā anō te kai­whai, te kai­whaka­tika­tika.
8.51: He pono, he pono tāku e mea nei ki a koutou, ki te pupuri tētahi i tāku kupu, e kore rawa ia e kite i te mate.”
8.52: Ka mea ngā Hūrai ki a ia, “Kātahi mātou ka mōhio he rēwera tōu. Kua mate a Āperahama rātou ko ngā poro­piti, ā, e mea ana koe, ‘Ki te pupuri tētahi i tāku kupu, e kore rawa ia e pāngia e te mate.’
8.53: He nui oti koe i tō mātou matua, i a Āperahama kua mate nei? Kua mate anō ngā poro­piti. Ki tāu ko wai koe?”
8.54: Ka whaka­hokia e Īhu, “Ki te whaka­hōnore ahau i ahau anō, he hōnore noa tōku. Ko tōku Matua hei whaka­hōnore i ahau; ko tā koutou e mea nei ko ia tō koutou Atua.
8.55: Heoi, kāhore koutou i mātau ki a ia, ko ahau ia e mātau ana ki a ia, ā, ki te mea ahau, ‘Kāhore ahau e mātau ki a ia,’ he tangata teka ahau, he pēnā me koutou. Otirā e mātau ana ahau ki a ia, e pupuri ana i tāna kupu.
8.56: I hari tō koutou matua, a Āperahama, mōna ka kite i tōku rā; i kite ia, ā, koa ake.”
8.57: Kātahi, ka mea ngā Hūrai ki a ia “Kāhore noa i rima tekau noa ōu tau, ā, kua kite koe i a Āperahama?”
8.58: Ka mea a Īhu ki a rātou, “He pono, he pono tāku e mea nei ki a koutou, kāhore noa anō a Āperahama, ko ahau tēnei.”
8.59: Nā, ka mau rātou ki ētahi kōhatu hei epa ki a ia, heoi, huna ana a Īhu i a ia, puta ana i roto i te teme­para.

9.1: Nā, i a Īhu e haere ana, ka kite ia i tētahi tangata i matapō, nō tōna whānau­tanga mai anō.
9.2: Nā, ka ui āna ākonga ki a ia, ka mea, “E te Kai­whaka­ako, ko wai i hara, ko tēnei, ko ōna mātua rānei i whānau matapō ai ia?”
9.3: Ka whaka­hokia e Īhu, “Ehara i te mea ko tēnei kua hara, ko ōna mātua rānei; engari, kia ai ia hei whaka­kite­nga mō ngā mahi a te Atua.
9.4: Me mahi e tātou ngā mahi a tōku kai­tono mai i te mea e ao ana; meāke ko te pō e kore ai e taea he mahi e tētahi tangata.
9.5: I ahau i te ao nei, ko ahau te mārama o te ao.”
9.6: Ka mutu ēnei kōrero āna, ka tūwha ia ki te whenua, ā, poke­pokea ana tētahi paru ki te hūware, pania atu ana te paru ki ngā kanohi o te matapō,
9.7: nā, ka mea ki a ia, “Haere ki te horoi ki te kau­kau­ranga i Hiroama,” ko Tono te whaka­māori­tanga. Nā, haere ana ia, horoi ana, ā, hoki ti­tiro ana mai.
9.8: Nā, ka mea ngā tāngata e noho tata ana, rātou ko ngā tāngata i kite i tōna matapō­tanga i mua, “Ehara ianei tēnei i taua tangata i noho rā, i tono mea rā māna?”
9.9: Ka mea ētahi, “Ko ia tēnei”. Ko ētahi i mea, “Kāhore, engari rite tonu ki a ia te āhua”. Ka mea ia, “Ko ahau rā ia.”
9.10: Kātahi rātou ka mea ki a ia, “Nā te aha rā i kite ai ōu kanohi?”
9.11: Ka whaka­hoki ia ka mea, “Nā te tangata, e huaina nei ko Īhu, i poke­poke he paru, pania ana e ia ki ōku kanohi, ka mea mai ki ahau, ‘Haere ki Hiroama horoi ai.’ Nā, ko tōku haere­nga atu, ko tāku horoi­nga, kite ana ahau.”
9.12: Nā, ka mea rātou ki a ia, “Kei hea ia?” Ka mea ia, “E kore ahau e mōhio.” Ka Tirotiro ngā Parihi i te Whakaoranga
9.13: Ka kawea atu ki ngā Parihi taua tangata i matapō i mua rā.
9.14: Nā, nō te hāpati i poke­pokea ai e Īhu te paru, i meinga ai ōna kanohi kia kite.
9.15: Nā, ka ui anō ngā Parihi ki a ia, ki te pēhea i kite ai ia. Ka mea ia ki a rātou, “I pania e ia he paru ki ōku kanohi, nā, horoi ana ahau, kite ana.”
9.16: Nā, ka mea ētahi o ngā Parihi, “Ehara tēnei i te tangata nā te Atua, inā hoki tē whaka­rite ia i te hāpati.” Ka mea ētahi, “Mā te aha e taea ai ēnei mere­kara e te tangata hara?” Nā, ka wehe­wehea rātou.
9.17: Ka mea anō rātou ki te matapō, “E pēhea ana koe ki a ia, ki tāna mea­tanga i ōu kanohi kia kite?” Ka mea ia, “He poro­piti ia.”
9.18: Heoi, kāhore ngā Hūrai i whaka­pono i matapō taua tangata, kua meinga anō kia kite, karanga­tia noatia e rātou ngā mātua ōna i meinga nei kia kite,
9.19: ā, ka ui rātou ki a rāua, ka mea, “Ko tā kōrua tama tēnei, e mea nei kōrua i whānau matapō mai? Nā te aha rā ia i ti­tiro ai ināia­nei?”
9.20: Ka whaka­hoki ōna mātua ki a rātou, ka mea, “E mōhio ana māua, ko tā māua tama tēnei, i whānau matapō mai anō.
9.21: Ko te mea ia i kite ai ia ināia­nei, kāhore i mōhio­tia e māua; kāhore hoki māua e mōhio nā wai i mea ōna kanohi kia kite. He kaumātua ia; ui atu ki a ia, māna ia e kōrero.”
9.22: I pēnei ōna mātua, nō te mea i mataku rāua i ngā Hūrai. Kua takoto noa ake hoki tā ngā Hūrai tikanga, nā, ki te whaka­ae tētahi, ko te Karaiti ia, me pei ki waho o te whare kara­kia.
9.23: Koia ōna mātua i mea ai, “He kaumātua ia; ui atu ki a ia.”
9.24: Nā, ka karanga tuarua rātou ki te tangata i matapō i mua rā, ka mea ki a ia, “Hoatu he korōria ki te Atua; e mātau ana mātou he tangata hara tēnei.”
9.25: Nā, ka whaka­hoki ia, ka mea, “Kāhore ahau e mātau he tangata hara rānei ia; kotahi anō tāku e mātau nei, he matapō ahau i mua, ā, inā kua kite.”
9.26: Ka mea anō rātou ki a ia, “I aha ia ki a koe? I pēhea­tia ōu kanohi i meinga ai e ia kia kite?”
9.27: Ka whaka­hokia e ia ki a rātou, “Kua kōrero­tia anō e ahau ki a koutou inā tonu nei, ā, kīhai koutou i whaka­rongo. He aha koutou i hia­hia ai kia rongo anō? E mea ana oti koutou kia meinga hei ākonga māna?”
9.28: Nā, whaka­hī ana rātou ki a ia, ka mea, “Ko tāna ākonga koe; ko mātou ia he ākonga nā Mohi.
9.29: E mātau ana mātou i kōrero te Atua ki a Mohi; ko tēnei tangata ia kāhore mātou e mātau ki tōna wāhi i haere mai ai.”
9.30: Nā, ka whaka­hoki taua tangata, ka mea ki a rātou, “Ha! he mea whaka­mīharo rā tēnei kāhore koutou i mātau ki tōna wāhi i haere mai ai, otirā, kua meinga e ia ōku kanohi kia kite.
9.31: E mātau ana rā tātou, e kore te Atua e whaka­rongo ki ngā tāngata hara; tēnā ki te mea he tangata kara­kia tētahi ki te Atua, he mea i tāna e pai ai, ka whaka­rongo ia ki a ia.
9.32: Kāhore rawa i rangona nō te tīma­tanga rā anō o te ao, i whaka­tiro­hia e tētahi ngā kanohi o te tangata i whānau matapō.
9.33: Ki te mea kīhai i puta mai tēnei tangata i te Atua, e kore e taea e ia tētahi mea.”
9.34: Nā, ka whaka­hoki rātou, ka mea ki a ia, “I whānau pū koe i roto i ngā hara, ko koe rānei hei whaka­ako i a mātou?” Nā, peia ana ia e rātou ki waho. Te Matapō Wairuatanga
9.35: I rongo a Īhu kua oti ia te pei e rātou ki waho; ā, i tōna kite­nga i a ia, ka mea ki a ia, “E whaka­pono ana rānei koe ki te Tama a te Atua?”
9.36: Ka whaka­hoki ia, ka mea, “Ko wai ia, e te Ariki, kia whaka­pono ai ahau ki a ia?”
9.37: Ka mea a Īhu ki a ia, “Kua kite koe i a ia, ko ia hoki tēnei e kōrero nei ki a koe.”
9.38: Nā, ko tāna mea­tanga, “E te Ariki, e whaka­pono ana ahau.” Nā, koro­piko ana ia ki a ia.
9.39: Kātahi a Īhu ka mea, “I haere mai ahau ki tēnei ao ki te whaka­rite whaka­wā, he mea e kite ai te hunga kāhore nei i kite; e whaka­matapō­tia ai hoki te hunga e kite ana.”
9.40: Ā, ka rangona ēnei mea e ētahi o ngā Parihi e tū tahi ana me ia, ka mea rātou ki a ia, “E matapō ana anō rānei mātou?”
9.41: Ka mea a Īhu ki a rātou, “Me i matapō koutou, kāhore ō koutou hara. Tēnā ka mea nā koutou, ‘E kite ana mātou,’ nā, e mau nā tō koutou hara.

10.1: “He pono, he pono tāku e mea nei ki a koutou, ki te kāhore tētahi e tomo rā te kūwaha ki te kāinga hipi, ki te piki kē, he tāhae ia, he tangata pāhua.
10.2: Tēnā ko te tangata e tomo ana rā te kūwaha, ko te hēpara ia o ngā hipi.
10.3: Ka uaki te kai­tiaki tatau ki a ia; ka rongo anō ngā hipi ki tōna reo. Nā, ka karanga­tia e ia āna hipi ake, tō tēnei ingoa, tō tēnei ingoa, ka āra­hina ki waho.
10.4: Ā, ka oti āna ake hipi te tuku ki waho, ka haere ia i mua i a rātou, ka aru ngā hipi i a ia; e mātau ana hoki rātou ki tōna reo.
10.5: E kore ia rātou e aru i te tauhou, engari ka oma i a ia; e kore hoki e mātau ki te reo o ngā tauhou.”
10.6: I kōrero­tia tēnei kupu whaka­rite e Īhu ki a rātou; heoi, kīhai rātou i mōhio ki ngā mea i kōrero­tia e ia ki a rātou. Ko Īhu te Hēpara Pai
10.7: Nā, ka mea anō a Īhu ki a rātou, “He pono, he pono tāku e mea nei ki a koutou, Ko ahau te tatau o ngā hipi.
10.8: He tāhae, he kai­pāhua te hunga katoa i haere mai i mua i ahau; heoi kīhai ngā hipi i whaka­rongo ki a rātou.
10.9: Ko ahau te tatau; ki te waiho ahau hei hua­rahi tomo­kanga mō tētahi, e ora ia, ā, ka haere ki roto, ka haere ki waho, ka kite hoki i te kai.
10.10: Heoi anō tā te tāhae e haere mai ai, he tāhae, he patu, he whaka­mōtī hoki. I haere mai ahau kia whi­whi ai rātou ki te ora, inā, tōna nui noa atu.
10.11: “Ko ahau te hēpara pai, he hēpara pai, ka tuku i a ia anō kia mate mō ngā hipi.
10.12: Tēnā ko te tangata e utua ana, ehara nei i te hēpara, ehara nei i a ia ngā hipi, i tōna kite­nga i te wuruhi e haere mai ana, whaka­rērea ake e ia ngā hipi, oma ana; nā, ka hopu­kia rātou e te wuruhi, ā, whaka­marara­tia ana ngā hipi.
10.13: Ka oma te tangata e utua ana, nō te mea e utua ana ia, kāhore hoki ōna whaka­aro ki ngā hipi.
10.14: Ko ahau te hēpara pai, e mātau ana hoki ki āku, ā, e mātau ana āku ki ahau.
10.15: Pērā tonu me tō te Matua mātau ki ahau, me tōku mātau hoki ki te Matua. E tuku ana hoki ahau i ahau ki te mate mō ngā hipi.
10.16: He hipi atu anō āku, ehara nei i tēnei kāinga. Me ārahi mai rātou e ahau, ā, ka rongo rātou ki tōku reo, ā, e whaka­kotahi­tia te kāhui, kotahi anō hoki hēpara.
10.17: “Koia te Matua ka aroha mai ai ki ahau, nō te mea e tuku ana ahau i ahau kia mate, kia whaka­ora ake ai anō ahau i ahau.
10.18: Ehara i te mea mā tētahi tangata ahau e whaka­mate, engari, māku anō ahau e tuku ki te mate. Kei ahau te tikanga mō te tuku atu, kei ahau anō te tikanga mō te whaka­ora. Nā tōku Matua tēnei ture kua riro mai nei i ahau.”
10.19: Kātahi, ka wehe­wehea ngā Hūrai, nā ēnei kupu.
10.20: He toko­maha o rātou i mea, “He rēwera tōna, e hau­rangi ana; he aha koutou ka whaka­rongo ai ki a ia?”
10.21: Ko ētahi i mea, “Ehara ēnei i ngā kupu a te tangata e nohoia ana e te rēwera. E āhei koia i te rēwera te mea i ngā kanohi o ngā matapō kia kite?” Ka Whakarērea a Īhu
10.22: Nā, i Hiruhārama tēnei, i te Hākari Horo­horo­nga. He hōtoke;
10.23: ā, e hāere­ere ana a Īhu i te teme­para, i te whaka­mahau o Horomona.
10.24: Nā, ka kara­potia ia e ngā Hūrai, ka mea rātou ki a ia, “Kia pēhea te roa o tāu waiho i ō mātou ngākau i hiki­rangi ana? Ki te mea ko te Karaiti koe, kōrero­tia mata­nui­tia mai ki a mātou.”
10.25: Ka whaka­hoki a Īhu ki a rātou, “Kua kōrero­tia e ahau ki a koutou, ā, kāhore koutou e whaka­pono. Ko ngā mahi e mahi nei ahau i runga i te ingoa o tōku Matua, ko ēnei hei kai­whaka­atu mōku.
10.26: Otirā, e kore koutou e whaka­pono, nō te mea ehara koutou i te hipi nāku.
10.27: E rongo ana āku hipi ki tōku reo, e mātau ana ahau ki a rātou, e aru ana hoki rātou i ahau.
10.28: E hoatu ana e ahau ki a rātou he ora tonu; e kore rātou e ngaro ake ake, e kore anō hoki tētahi e kapo atu i a rātou i roto i tōku ringa.
10.29: Ko tōku Matua, nāna nei rātou i hōmai ki ahau, nui ake i te katoa; e kore anō rātou e taea e tētahi te kapo atu i roto i te ringa o tōku Matua.
10.30: Ko ahau, ko te Matua, kotahi māua.”
10.31: Kātahi, ka mau anō ngā Hūrai ki te kōhatu hei āki ki a ia.
10.32: Ka whaka­hokia e Īhu ki a rātou, “He maha ngā mahi pai kua whaka­kitea nei e ahau ki a koutou, he mea nā tōku Matua. Mō tēhea o aua mahi ka ākina ai ahau e koutou?”
10.33: Ka whaka­hoki ngā Hūrai ki a ia, ka mea, “Ehara te mahi pai i te mea e ākina ai koe; engari, mō te kohu­kohu, mō te mea hoki ko koe, tangata nei anō, e whaka­atua ana i a koe.”
10.34: Ka whaka­hokia e Īhu ki a rātou, “Kāhore rānei i tuhi­tuhia i roto i tō koutou ture, ‘I mea ahau, “He atua koutou”?’
10.35: Ki te huaina e ia he atua te hunga i tae mai nei te kupu a te Atua ki a rātou, ā, e kore hoki e taea te whaka­kāhore te karaipi­ture.
10.36: E mea ana oti koutou ki tā te Matua i whaka­tapu ai, i tono mai ai hoki ki te ao, ‘E kohu­kohu ana koe’; nōku i mea, ‘Ko te Tama ahau a te Atua’?
10.37: Ki te kore ahau e mahi i ngā mahi a tōku Matua, aua ahau e whaka­pono­hia.
10.38: Tēnā, ki te mahi ahau, ahakoa kāhore koutou e whaka­pono ki ahau, whaka­pono­hia ngā mahi; kia mātau ai koutou kia whaka­pono ai, ko te Matua kei roto i ahau, me ahau hoki kei roto i a ia.”
10.39: Nā, ka whai anō rātou kia hopu­kia ia; heoi, puta ana ia i ō rātou ringa.
10.40: Nā, ka haere anō ia ki tāwāhi o Horano, ki te wāhi i mātua iri­iri ai a Hoani; ā, noho ana i reira.
10.41: Ā, toko­maha hoki i haere ki a ia; i mea rātou “Kīhai a Hoani i mahi i tētahi mere­kara; he pono ia ngā mea katoa i kōrero­tia e Hoani mō tēnei.”
10.42: Ā, he toko­maha o reira i whaka­pono ki a ia.

11.1: Nā, kei te mate tētahi tangata a Raharuhi o Petani, te kāinga o Meri rāua ko tōna tua­kana, ko Māta.
11.2: (Ko taua Meri tēnei nāna nei i whaka­wahi te Ariki ki te hinu, i muru hoki i ōna wae­wae ki ōna makawe; ā, he tu­ngāne nōna a Raharuhi i mate nei.)
11.3: Nā, ka tono tāngata ngā tuā­hine ki a ia, ka mea, “E te Ariki, tēnei kei te mate tāu tangata e aroha nei.”
11.4: I te rongo­nga ia o Īhu, ka mea ia, “Ehara tēnei i te mate e mate rawa ai ia, engari, hei mea mō te korōria o te Atua; mā tēnei hoki ka whai korōria ai te Tama a te Atua.”
11.5: Nā, i aroha a Īhu ki a Māta rāua ko tōna teina, ki a Raharuhi hoki.
11.6: Ā, nō ka rongo ia ki tōna mate­nga, e rua ōna rā i noho ai ki taua wāhi rā anō.
11.7: Muri iho i tēnei, ka mea ia ki āna ākonga, “Tātou ka haere anō ki Hūria.”
11.8: Ka mea ngā ākonga ki a ia, “E te Kai­whaka­ako, i whai ngā Hūrai i mua tata ake nei kia ākina koe ki te kōhatu; ā, e haere atu ana koe ki reira?”
11.9: Ka whaka­hokia e Īhu, “He teka ianei tekau mā rua ngā hāora o te rā? I te haere tētahi i te awa­tea, e kore ia e tūtuki, nō te mea e kite ana ia i te mārama o tēnei ao.
11.10: Tēnā, ka haere tētahi i te pō, ka tūtuki ia, nō te mea kāhore he mārama roto i a ia.”
11.11: Ka kōrero­tia ēnei mea e ia, nā, muri iho ka mea ia ki a rātou, “Kei te moe tō tātou hoa a Raharuhi, otiia, ka haere ahau ki te whaka­ara i a ia i te moe.”
11.12: Nā, ko te mea­tanga a āna ākonga, “E te Ariki, ki te mea kei te moe ia, tērā ia e ora.”
11.13: Kāhore, ko tōna mate­nga tā Īhu i kōrero ai; ko rātou ia i mahara, i kōrero ia mō te takoto­ranga ina moe.
11.14: Kātahi, ka mea nui a Īhu ki a rātou, “Kua mate a Raharuhi.
11.15: Ā, e hari ana ahau, he whaka­aro hoki ki a koutou, nōku kāhore i reira, kia whaka­pono ai koutou. Ahakoa rā kia haere tātou ki a ia.”
11.16: Nā, ka mea a Tamati (e huaina nei ko Ririmu) ki ōna hoa ākonga, “Kia haere anō tātou, kia mate tahi me ia.” Ko Īhu te Aranga me te Oranga
11.17: Heoi, i te taenga atu o Īhu, roko­hanga atu kua whā kē ōna rā i roto i te urupā.
11.18: Nā, e tata ana Petani ki Hiruhārama, kotahi pea tekau mā rima pā­ronga,
11.19: he toko­maha anō ngā Hūrai i tae ki a Māta rāua ko Meri, ki te whaka­mārie i a rāua mō tō rāua tu­ngāne.
11.20: Ā, nō te rongo­nga o Māta, tēnā a Īhu te haere mai nā, ka whaka­tau i a ia; ko Meri ia i noho i roto i te whare.
11.21: Nā, ka mea a Māta ki a Īhu, “E te Ariki, me i konei koe, kīhai i mate tōku tu­ngāne.
11.22: Heoi, e mātau nei anō ahau, ko tāu e īnoi ai ki te Atua, e hōmai e te Atua ki a koe.”
11.23: Ka mea a Īhu ki a ia, “E ara anō tōu tu­ngāne.”
11.24: Ka mea a Māta ki a ia, “E mātau ana ahau e ara anō ia i te aranga ā te rā whaka­mutu­nga.”
11.25: Ka mea a Īhu ki a ia, “Ko ahau te aranga, te ora. Ko ia e whaka­pono ana ki ahau, ahakoa kua mate, e ora anō;
11.26: e kore anō e mate ake ake ngā tāngata katoa e ora ana, e whaka­pono ana ki ahau. E whaka­pono ana rānei koe ki tēnei?”
11.27: Ka mea ia ki a ia, “Āe, e te Ariki, e whaka­pono ana ahau, ko te Karaiti koe, ko te Tama a te Atua, e haere mai ana ki te ao.” Ka Tangi a Īhu
11.28: Ā, ka mutu ēnei kōrero āna, ka haere ka karanga puku ki tōna teina, ki a Meri, ka mea, “Kua tae mai te Kai­whaka­ako, e karanga ana hoki ki a koe.”
11.29: Ā, nō ka rongo ia, hohoro tonu te whaka­tika, ā, haere ana ki a ia.
11.30: (Nā, kāhore a Īhu i tomo noa ki te kāinga; heoi, kei taua wāhi anō ia i tūtaki ai a Māta ki a ia.)
11.31: I te kite­nga o ngā Hūrai e noho ana ki a ia i roto i te whare, e whaka­mārie ana i a ia, ka hohoro a Meri te whaka­tika, te puta ki waho. Ka aru rātou i a ia, ka mea, “E haere ana ia ki te urupā, ki reira tangi ai.”
11.32: Ā, nō ka tae a Meri ki te wāhi kei reira nei a Īhu, ka kite i a ia, ka takoto ki ōna wae­wae, ka mea ki a ia, “E te Ariki, me i konei koe, kīhai i mate tōku tu­ngāne.”
11.33: Ā, nō ka kite a Īhu i a ia e tangi ana, i ngā Hūrai hoki i haere tahi me ia e tangi ana, ka ngu­nguru ia, arā tōna wairua, ka kōingo.
11.34: Nā mea, “I whaka­takoto­ria ia e koutou ki hea?” Ka mea rātou ki a ia, “E te Ariki, haere mai kia kite.”
11.36: Nā, ka mea ngā Hūrai, “Nana, tōna aroha ki a ia!”
11.37: Nā, ka mea ētahi o rātou, “Kāhore rānei i taea e tēnei tangata, nāna nei i whaka­titiro ngā kanohi o te matapō, te mea i tēnei tangata hoki kia kaua e mate?” Te Aranga a Raharuhi
11.38: Nā, ka ngu­nguru anō a Īhu i roto i a ia, ka haere ki te urupā. He ana ia, kua oti te pā ki te kōhatu.
11.39: Ka mea a Īhu, “Tango­hia atu e koutou te kōhatu.” Ka mea ki a ia a Māta tua­hine o te tū­pā­paku, “E te Ariki, kua piro noa ake ia; ko tōna pō whā hoki tēnei.”
11.40: Anō rā, ko Īhu ki a ia, “Kīhai koia ahau i mea ki a koe, ki te whaka­pono koe, e kite koe i te korōria o te Atua?”
11.41: Nā, ka tango­hia e rātou te kōhatu i te wāhi i takoto ai te tū­pā­paku. Nā, ka ara ake ngā kanohi o Īhu, ka mea ia, “E Pā, ko tāku whaka­whetai tēnei ki a koe, mōu i whaka­rongo ki ahau.
11.42: I mahara anō ahau e rongo tonu ana koe ki ahau; heoi, he whaka­aro ki te hunga e tū mai nei i kōrero ai ahau, kia whaka­pono ai rātou, nāu ahau i tono mai.”
11.43: Ā, nō ka pēnei tāna kī, he nui tōna reo ki te karanga, “E Raharuhi, puta mai!”
11.44: Nā, ko te pu­tanga mai o te tū­pā­paku, he mea here ngā ringa me ngā wae­wae ki ngā tākai; he mea takai tōna mata ki te tauera. Ka mea a Īhu ki a rātou, “Wete­kia, tukua kia haere.” Te Whakangārahu ki a Īhu (Matiu 26.1-5; Māka 14.1-2; Ruka 22.1-2)
11.45: Nā, he toko­maha ngā Hūrai haere nei ki a Meri, ā, i tō rātou kite­nga i ngā mea i mea ai a Īhu, ka whaka­pono ki a ia.
11.46: Ko ētahi o rātou i haere ki ngā Parihi, i kōrero ki a rātou i ngā mea i mahia e Īhu.
11.47: Nā, ka whaka­minea he rū­nanga e ngā tohu­nga nui rātou ko ngā Parihi, ka mea, “Kei te aha tātou nei? He maha hoki ngā mere­kara e meatia nei e tēnei tangata.
11.48: Ki te pēnei tā tātou tuku i a ia, ka whaka­pono katoa ki a ia; ā, ka haere mai ngā Roma, ka tango i tō tātou kāinga, i tō tātou iwi.”
11.49: Nā, ko tētahi o rātou ko Kaiapa, ko te tohu­nga nui o taua tau, ka mea ki a rātou, “Kāhore koutou e mātau ki tētahi mea.
11.50: Tē whaka­aro, he pai mō tātou ki te mate te tangata kotahi mō te iwi, ā, kāhore e ngaro te iwi katoa.”
11.51: Nā, ehara tēnei kōrero i te mea nāna ake, engari, ko te tohu­nga nui ia mō tērā tau, heoi, ka poro­piti kia mate a Īhu mō taua iwi.
11.52: Hāunga anō taua iwi anake, engari, kia whaka­minea kia kotahi ngā tama­riki a te Atua kua marara noa atu.
11.53: Nō taua rā ake anō, ka rū­nanga rātou kia whaka­matea ia.
11.54: Koia i mutu ai te haere mata­nui o Īhu i roto i ngā Hūrai. Heoi haere atu ana ia i reira ki te wāhi e tata ana ki te koraha, ki tētahi pā, ko Ēparaima te ingoa, ā, noho ana i reira rātou ko āna ākonga.
11.55: Nā, kua tata te Kape­nga a ngā Hūrai; he toko­maha hoki i haere atu i taua whenua i mua o te Kape­nga ki Hiruhārama ki te pure i a rātou.
11.56: Nā, ka rapu rātou i a Īhu ka kōrero­rero ki a rātou anō, i a rātou e tū ana i te teme­para, “E pēhea ana ō koutou whaka­aro? E kore rānei ia e haere mai ki te hākari?”
11.57: Nā, kua takoto te tikanga a ngā tohu­nga nui rātou ko ngā Parihi, ki te mātau tētahi tangata ki te wāhi e noho ai ia, me whaka­atu, kia hopu­kia ai ia e rātou.

12.1: Nā, e ono ngā rā i mua ake o te Kape­nga ka haere a Īhu ki Petani, kei reira nei a Raharuhi, i whaka­ara­hia ake nei e ia i te hunga mate.
12.2: Ā, takā ana e rātou he hapa māna i reira; ko Māta te kai­taka, ko Raharuhi tētahi o te hunga i noho tahi me ia.
12.3: Nā, ka mau a Meri ki tētahi pāuna hinu kakara he tino nara, he mea utu nui, whaka­wahia ana e ia ngā wae­wae o Īhu, me te muru anō i ōna wae­wae ki ōna makawe; kī noa te whare i te kakara o te hinu.
12.4: Nā, ka mea tētahi o āna ākonga, a Hūrā Ikariote, tēnei meāke nei tuku a ia,
12.5: “He aha tēnei hinu tē hokona ai ki ngā pene e toru rau, ka hoatu ai ki te hunga rawa­kore?”
12.6: I kōrero­tia ai tēnei e ia, ehara i te mea he whaka­aro nōna ki te hunga rawa­kore; erangi, nō te mea he tāhae ia, i a ia hoki te pūtea, ko ia hoki hei mau i ngā mea i whao­ngia ki roto.
12.7: Nā, ko te mea­tanga a Īhu, “Waiho rā ū āna; i tohu­ngia tēnei e ia mō te rā o tōku tanu­manga.
12.8: Kei a koutou hoki ngā rawa­kore i ngā wā katoa; ko ahau ia e kore e noho tonu i a koutou.” He Whakangārahu ki a Raharuhi
12.9: He toko­maha o ngā Hūrai i mātau kei reira a Īhu; ā, haere mai ana, ehara i te mea mō Īhu anake, erangi, kia kite hoki i a Raharuhi, i whaka­ara­hia nei e ia i te hunga mate.
12.10: Otirā, kua takoto te whaka­aro o ngā tohu­nga nui kia whaka­matea anō a Raharuhi;
12.11: nāna hoki i toko­maha ai ngā Hūrai i haere, i whaka­pono ki a Īhu. Te Tomokanga Manahau ki Hiruhārama (Matiu 21.1-11; Māka 11.1-11; Ruka 19.28-40)
12.12: I te aonga ake ka rongo te mano tini i haere nei ki te hākari, e haere ana a Īhu ki Hiruhārama.
12.13: Ka mau rātou ki ngā manga nīkau, haere ana ki te whaka­tau i a ia, me te karanga, “Ohana! Ka whaka­pai­ngia ia, e haere mai nei i runga i te ingoa o te Ariki, te Kīngi o Īharaira!”
