12.14: Ā, nō ka kite a Īhu i tētahi kūao kāihe, ka noho ia i runga; ka pērā anō me te mea i tuhi­tuhia,
12.15: “Kaua e mataku, e te tamā­hine a Hiona. Nā, kei te haere mai tōu Kīngi, e noho ana i runga i te kūao kāihe.”
12.16: Otiia, kīhai āna ākonga i mātau wawe ki ēnei mea; engari, ka oti a Īhu te whaka­korōria, kātahi rātou ka mahara kua tuhi­tuhia ēnei mea mōna, kua meinga anō ēnei mea ki a ia.
12.17: I whaka­ae anō te hunga i tōna taha i tāna karanga­tanga i a Raharuhi i roto i te urupā, i tāna whaka­ara­hanga hoki i a ia i te hunga mate.
12.18: Nā, konei hoki te mano i whaka­tau ai i a ia, i rongo hoki rātou, kua meinga tēnei mere­kara e ia.
12.19: Nā, ka mea ngā Parihi ki a rātou anō, “Ka kite rānei koutou kāhore ā koutou wāhi? Nā, kua riro te ao ki te whai i a ia.” Ka Kimi ētahi Kariki ki a Īhu
12.20: Nā, he Kariki ētahi o te hunga i haere ki te hākari ki te kara­kia.
12.21: Ā, haere ana ēnei ki a Piripi o Petahaira o Kariri, kōrero ana ki a ia, mea atu ana, “E kara, e hia­hia ana mātou kia kite i a Īhu.”
12.22: Haere ana a Piripi, ka kōrero ki a Anaru; ka haere a Anaru, a Piripi, ka kōrero ki a Īhu.
12.23: Ka kī a Īhu ki a rāua, ka mea, “Kua tae mai te hāora e whaka­korōria­tia ai te Tama a te tangata.
12.24: He pono, he pono tāku e mea nei ki a koutou, ki te kore tētahi pata wīti e marere ki te one­one, e pirau, ka takoto ko ia anake; tēnā ki te pirau, he nui ōna hua.
12.25: Ki te aroha tētahi ki tōna ora, ka mate anō ia; ki te kino tētahi ki te ora i tēnei ao, ka tūturu ki a ia te ora ake ake.
12.26: Ki te mea tētahi ko ia hei kai­mahi māku, me aru ia i ahau; ko te wāhi e noho ai ahau, ko reira anō tāku kai­mahi. Ki te mahi tētahi i āku mahi, mā tōku Matua ia e whaka­hōnore.” Ka Kōrero a Īhu mō Tōna Matenga
12.27: “Kua pōuri tēnei tōku wairua; ā, kia pēhea atu ahau? E Pā, whaka­ora­ngia ahau i tēnei wā. Otirā, ko te mea tēnei i haere mai ai ahau ki tēnei wā.
12.28: E Pā, whaka­korōria­tia tōu ingoa.” Nā, ka puta he reo i te rangi, “Kua whaka­korōria­tia e ahau, e whaka­korōria­tia anō.”
12.29: I te rongo­nga o ngā tāngata e tū ana i reira, ka mea, “He whati­tiri.” Ko ētahi i mea, “Kua kōrero tētahi ana­hera ki a ia.”
12.30: Ka whaka­hoki a Īhu, ka mea, “Ehara tēnei reo i puta mai nei i te mea mōku, engari mō koutou.
12.31: Ko āia­nei te whaka­wā mō tēnei ao; ko āia­nei makā ai te ranga­tira o tēnei ao ki waho.
12.32: Ā, ki te whaka­iri­hia ake ahau ki runga ake i te whenua, māku ngā tāngata katoa e kukume ki ahau.”
12.33: (I pēnei ai ia hei whaka­atu i te mate e mate ai ia.)
12.34: Ka whaka­hokia e te mano ki a ia, “Kua rongo mātou ki tā te ture, e ora tonu ana a te Karaiti. He aha tāu e mea, ‘Me whaka­iri te Tama a te tangata?’ Ko wai koia tēnei Tama a te tangata?”
12.35: Anō rā, ko Īhu ki a rātou, “He wāhi iti nei te maunga o te mārama i roto i a koutou. Haere rā i te mea e whai mārama ana koutou, kei roko­hina koutou e te pōuri. Ko ia hoki e haere ana i te pōuri e kore e kite i te wāhi e haere ai ia.
12.36: I te mea kei a koutou te mārama, me whaka­pono ki te mārama, kia meinga ai koutou he tama­riki nā te mārama.” Te Whakapono kore o ngā Tāngata I kōrero­tia e Īhu ēnei mea, ā, haere ana, huna ana i a ia, kei kitea e rātou.
12.37: Heoi, ahakoa i meatia e ia aua mere­kara maha ki tō rātou aro­aro, kīhai rātou i whaka­pono ki a ia.
12.38: I rite ai te kōrero a Ihāia poro­piti, tāna i mea ai: “E te Ariki, ko wai i whaka­pono ki tā mātou kōrero? I whaka­kitea hoki ki a wai te ringa o te Ariki?”
12.39: Koia hoki rātou tē āhei ai te whaka­pono, kua mea nei hoki a Ihāia,
12.40: “I whaka­matapō­tia e ia ō rātou kanohi, i whaka­pakeke­tia ō rātou ngākau; kei kite ō rātou kanohi, kei mātau hoki ō rātou ngākau, kei tahuri rātou, ā, ka whaka­ora­ngia e ahau.”
12.41: I kōrero­tia ēnei mea e Ihāia, i te wā i kite ai ia i tōna korōria, i puaki ai hoki tāna kupu mōna.
12.42: He ahakoa rā he toko­maha anō ngā ranga­tira i whaka­pono ki a ia. Otirā, kīhai i whaka­ae ki a ia, he whaka­aro hoki ki ngā Parihi, kei peia rātou ki waho o te whare kara­kia;
12.43: rawe ake hoki ki a rātou tā te tangata korōria i tā te Atua. Whakawātanga ki ngā Kupu a Īhu
12.44: Nā, ka karanga a Īhu, ka mea, “Ki te whaka­pono tētahi ki ahau, ehara ahau i tāna i whaka­pono mai ai, engari, ko tōku kai­tono mai.
12.45: Ko ia e kite ana i ahau, e kite ana hoki i tōku kai­tono mai.
12.46: Kua tae mai nei ahau hei whaka­mārama mō te ao, kei noho i te pōuri tētahi e whaka­pono ana ki ahau.
12.47: Nā, ki te rongo tētahi ki āku kupu, ki te kore hoki e puri­tia e ia, e kore ahau e whaka­hē i a ia; kīhai hoki ahau i haere mai ki te whaka­hē i te ao, engari, ki te whaka­ora i te ao.
12.48: Ko ia e whaka­kāhore ana ki ahau e kore hoki e tango ki āku kupu, tēnā anō te kai­whaka­hē mōna; ko te kupu i kōrero­tia e ahau, ko tēnā hei whaka­hē mōna ā te rā whaka­mutu­nga.
12.49: Nō te mea ehara i ahau ake āku kōrero; engari, nā te Matua i tonoa mai ai ahau, nāna i tuku mai te ture ki ahau, mō tāku e kōrero ai, mō tāku e kī ai.
12.50: Ā, e mātau ana ahau he ora tonu tāna ture. Nā, ko āku e kōrero nei rite tonu ki tā te Matua i mea mai ai ki ahau tāku kōrero.”

13.1: Nā, i mua ake o te Hākari o te Kape­nga, ka mahara a Īhu kua taka tōna wā e haere atu ai ia i tēnei ao ki te Matua; aroha ana ia ki ōna o te ao nei, aroha­ina ana rātou taea noatia te mutu­nga.
13.2: Ā, i te mutu­nga o te hapa, kua whaka­mahara­tia noatia ake anō hoki e te rēwera te ngākau o Hūrā Ikariote, tama a Haimona, kia tukua ia.
13.3: Ā, ka mahara a Īhu kua oti ngā mea katoa te hōmai e te Matua ki ōna ringa, i haere mai ia i te Atua, e hoki atu ana ki te Atua;
13.4: ka whaka­tika ia i te hapa, ka whaka­rere i ōna kākahu, ka mau ki te tauera, ka whī­tiki i a ia.
13.5: Me i reira, ka ringi­hia e ia he wai ki te pei­hana, ā, ka anga ka horoi i ngā wae­wae o ngā ākonga, ka muru hoki ki te tauera i whī­tiki­ria ai ia.
13.6: Ā, ka tae ia ki a Haimona Pita, ka mea tērā ki a ia, “E te Ariki, e horoi ana koe i ōku wae­wae?”
13.7: Ka whaka­hoki a Īhu, ka mea ki a ia, “E kore koe e mātau āia­nei ki tāku e mea nei; otirā, e mātau koe ā mua ake nei.”
13.8: Ka mea a Pita ki a ia, “E kore rawa koe e horoi i ōku wae­wae.” Ka whaka­hokia e Īhu ki a ia, “Ki te kore ahau e horoi i a koe, kāhore āu wāhi i roto i ahau.”
13.9: Ka mea a Haimona Pita ki a ia, “E te Ariki, aua rā ko ōku wae­wae anake, engari, ko ōku ringa me tōku māte­nga.”
13.10: Ka mea a Īhu ki a ia, “Ki te mea i te kau­kau tētahi, kāhore atu he aha māna, ko te horoi anake i ōna wae­wae, e mā katoa ana hoki ia. E mā ana koutou, otirā kāhore katoa.”
13.11: I mōhio hoki ia ki te tangata e tukua ai ia, koia ia i mea ai, “Kāhore koutou katoa i mā.”
13.12: Ā, ka oti ō rātou wae­wae te horoi, ka mau ia ki ōna kākahu, ka noho anō, nā, ka mea ki a rātou, “E mātau ana i rānei koutou ki tāku i mea nei ki a koutou?
13.13: E karanga­tia ana ahau e koutou, ‘E te Kai­whaka­ako, E te Ariki’, ā, he tika tā koutou kōrero, ko ahau hoki ia.
13.14: Nā, kua horoia nei ō koutou wae­wae e ahau, e tō koutou Ariki, e tō koutou Kai­whaka­ako me horoi anō hoki e koutou ngā wae­wae o tētahi, o tētahi o koutou.
13.15: Kua hoatu nei hoki e ahau he tauira mō koutou, kia rite ai tā koutou mahi ki tāku i mea nei ki a koutou.
13.16: He pono, he pono tāku e mea nei ki a koutou, kāhore te pono­nga e nui ake i tōna ranga­tira; e kore anō te tangata i tonoa e nui atu i tōna kai­tono.
13.17: Ki te mātau koutou ki ēnei mea, ka koa ki te meatia e koutou.
13.18: “Ehara tāku i te kōrero mō koutou katoa; e mātau ana ahau ki āku i whiri­whiri ai. Otirā, kia rite ai te karaipi­ture, ‘Ko ia e kai taro tahi nei māua kua hiki ake tōna reke­reke ki ahau.’
13.19: Nā, ka kōrero­tia nei e ahau ki a koutou i te mea kāhore anō i puta noa, mō te puta rawa mai, kia whaka­pono ai koutou, ko ahau ia.
13.20: He pono, he pono tāku e mea atu nei ki a koutou, ki te tango tētahi ki tāku e tono ai, e tango ana ia i ahau; ā, ki te tango tētahi i ahau, e tango ana ki tōku kai­tono mai.” Ka Poropiti a Īhu i te Whakamoho i a Ia (Matiu 26.20-25; Māka 14.17-21; Ruka 22.21-23)
13.21: Ā, nō ka kōrero­tia e Īhu ēnei mea, ka pōuri tōna wairua, ka kōrero ia, ka mea, “He pono, he pono tāku e mea nei ki a koutou, mā tētahi o koutou ahau e tuku.”
13.22: Nā, ka ti­tiro ngā ākonga tētahi ki tētahi, ka pōhēhē ko wai rānei tāna i kōrero ai.
13.23: Nā, i te whaka­whiri­naki ki te uma o Īhu tētahi o āna ākonga, ko tā Īhu hoki i aroha ai.
13.24: Nā, ka tā­whiri atu a Haimona Pita ki a ia, ka mea atu, “Kōrero­tia mai ki a mātou, ko wai tāna e kōrero nei.”
13.25: Nā, ka takoto atu ia ki te uma o Īhu, ka mea ki a ia, “E te Ariki, ko wai koia?”
13.26: Ka whaka­hokia e Īhu, “Ko te tangata e hoatu ai e ahau te mara­mara taro ki a ia, ina toua iho e ahau.” Ā, nō ka toua iho e ia te mara­mara taro, ka hoatu ki a Hūrā, tama a Haimona Ikariote.
13.27: Ā, muri iho i te mara­mara taro, ka tomo a Hātana ki roto ki a ia. Nā, ka mea a Īhu ki a ia, “Hohoro te mea i tāu e mea ai.”
13.28: Kāhore ia tētahi o te hunga i taua hapa i mātau mō te aha tēnei i kōrero­tia nei e ia ki a ia.
13.29: I mahara ētahi, nō te mea i a Hūrā te pūtea, tērā a Īhu te mea rā ki a ia, “Hokona ngā mea mā tātou mō te hākari; kia hoatu rānei tētahi mea mā ngā rawa­kore.”
13.30: Nā, ka tango­hia e ia te mara­mara taro, haere tonu atu ki waho. He pō anō hoki. Te Ture Hou
13.31: Nō tōna riro­nga atu ki waho, ka mea a Īhu, “Kātahi te Tama a te tangata ka whaka­korōria­tia, ka whai korōria anō te Atua i a ia.
13.32: Ā, ka whaka­korōria te Atua i a ia i roto i a ia ake, inā, ka hohoro tāna whaka­korōria i a ia.
13.33: E ngā tama­riki, poto kau nei tāku noho i a koutou, tērā koutou e rapu i ahau, ko tāku hoki i mea ai ki ngā Hūrai, E kore koutou e āhei te haere ake ki te wāhi e haere ai ahau; ko tāku kupu anō tēnā ki a koutou.
13.34: He ture hou tāku ka hoatu nei ki a koutou, kia aroha koutou tētahi ki tētahi; kia rite ki tōku aroha ki a koutou, wai­hoki kia aroha koutou tētahi ki tētahi.
13.35: Mā konei ka mātau ai te katoa, he ākonga koutou nāku, me ka aroha koutou tētahi ki tētahi.” Ka Poropiti a Īhu i Whakakoretanga a Pita (Matiu 26.31-35; Māka 14.27-31; Ruka 22.31-34)
13.36: Ka mea a Haimona Pita ki a ia, “E te Ariki, e haere ana koe ki hea?” Ka whaka­hokia e Īhu ki a ia, “E kore koe e āhei te aru i ahau āia­nei ki te wāhi e haere atu nei ahau; ā, mua ia ka aru koe i ahau.”
13.37: Ka mea a Pita ki a ia, “E te Ariki, he aha ahau tē aru ai i a koe āia­nei nei anō? Ka tuku ahau i ahau kia mate, he whaka­aro nāku ki a koe.”
13.38: Ka whaka­hokia e Īhu ki a ia, “E tuku oti koe i a koe ki te mate, he whaka­aro nāu ki ahau? He pono, he pono tāku e mea nei ki a koe, e kore e tangi te tī­kao­kao, kia toru rā anō āu whaka­kāhore­tanga ki ahau.”

14.1: “Kei pōuri ō koutou ngākau; e whaka­pono ana koutou ki te Atua, whaka­pono hoki ki ahau.
14.2: He maha ngā nohoa­nga i roto i te whare o tōku Matua; me he kāhore, kua kōrero­tia e ahau ki a koutou. Ka haere hoki ahau ki te mea i tētahi wāhi hei tuku­nga ake mō koutou.
14.3: Ā, ki te haere ahau ki te mea wāhi hei tuku­nga ake mō koutou, ka haere mai anō ahau, ā, ka tango i a koutou ki ahau; kia noho ai hoki koutou ki te wāhi e noho ai ahau.
14.4: Nā, e mātau ana koutou ki te hua­rahi ki te wāhi e haere atu nei ahau.”
14.5: Nā, ka mea a Tamati ki a ia, “E te Ariki, kāhore mātou e mātau ki te wāhi e haere nā koe; me pēhea ka mātau ai mātou ki te hua­rahi?”
14.6: Ka mea a Īhu ki a ia, “Ko ahau te hua­rahi, te pono, te ora; e kore rawa tētahi tangata e haere ake ki te Matua, ki te kāhore ahau.
14.7: Me i mātau koutou ki ahau, kua mātau anō ki tōku Matua. Nā i ēnei ake wā ka mōhio koutou ki a ia, kua kite anō hoki i a ia.”
14.8: Ka mea a Piripi ki a ia, “E te Ariki, whaka­kitea te Matua ki a mātou, ā, ka tatū ō mātou ngākau.”
14.9: Ka mea a Īhu ki a ia, “Roa noa atu tōku noho ki a koutou, ā, kāhore anō koe i mātau noa ki ahau, e Piripi? Ko ia kua kite i ahau kua kite hoki i te Matua; he aha koe ka mea ai, ‘Whaka­kitea mai te Matua ki a mātou?’
14.10: E kore ianei koe e whaka­pono, ko ahau kei roto i te Matua, ko te Matua kei roto i ahau? Ko ngā kupu e kōrero nei ahau ki a koutou, ehara i te kōrero nāku ake; engari, nā te Matua e noho ana i roto i ahau, ko ia te mea ana i ngā mahi.
14.11: Whaka­pono mai ki ahau, kei roto ahau i te Matua, ko te Matua hoki kei roto i ahau; ki te kāhore, whaka­aro ki ngā mahi, ka whaka­pono ai ki ahau.
14.12: He pono, he pono tāku e mea atu nei ki a koutou, ki te whaka­pono tētahi ki ahau, ko ngā mahi e mea nei ahau, e meinga anō e ia; ā, nui atu i ēnei āna e mea ai; nō te mea e haere ana ahau ki tōku Matua.
14.13: Ā, ko tā koutou e īnoi ai i runga i tōku ingoa, e meatia tēnei e ahau, kia whai korōria ai te Matua i te Tama.
14.14: Ki te īnoia e koutou tētahi mea i ahau i runga i tōku ingoa, māku e whaka­mana.” Te Whakaaria o te Wairua Tapu
14.15: “Ki te aroha koutou ki ahau, kia mau ki āku ture.
14.16: Ka īnoi ahau ki te Matua, ā, māna e hoatu ki a koutou tētahi atu Kai­whaka­mārie, hei noho tonu ki a koutou.
14.17: Ko te Wairua o te pono; e kore nei e riro i te ao, nō te mea e kore e kite i a ia, e kore anō e mātau ki a ia. Kei a koutou hoki ia e noho ana, ā, ka noho anō i roto i a koutou.
14.18: “E kore koutou e waiho pani e ahau. E haere mai anō ahau ki a koutou.
14.19: Taro ake, ā, heoi anō kite­nga o te ao i ahau; ko koutou ia e kite i ahau; e ora ana ahau, ka ora anō koutou.
14.20: Ā taua rā koutou mātau ai kei roto ahau i tōku Matua, ko koutou anō kei roto i ahau, me ahau hoki kei roto i a koutou.
14.21: “Ko te tangata kei a ia nei āku ture, e puri­tia ana hoki e ia, ko ia te aroha ana ki ahau: ki te aroha tētahi ki ahau, ka aroha­ina ia e tōku Matua, ā, ka aroha ahau ki a ia, ka whaka­atu i ahau ki a ia.”
14.22: Ka mea a Hūrā ki a ia (hāunga a Ikariote) “E te Ariki, he pēhea i whaka­atu ai koe i a koe ki a mātou, ā, kāhore ki te ao?”
14.23: Ka whaka­hoki a Īhu, ka mea ki a ia, “Ki te aroha tētahi ki ahau, e puri­tia e ia tāku kupu, ā, ka aroha­ina ia e tōku Matua, ka haere atu māua ki a ia, ka noho tonu ki a ia.
14.24: Ki te kāhore tētahi e aroha ki ahau, e kore e puri­tia e ia āku kupu. Nā, ehara i ahau ake te kupu e rongo nei koutou, engari, nā te Matua i tonoa mai ai ahau.
14.25: “Kua kōrero­tia nei e ahau ēnei mea ki a koutou, i ahau e noho nei i a koutou.
14.26: Nā, ko te kai­whaka­mārie, arā ko te Wairua Tapu, e tonoa mai e te Matua i runga i tōku ingoa, māna koutou e whaka­ako ki ngā mea katoa, māna koutou e whaka­mahara ki ngā mea katoa kua kōrero­tia nei e ahau ki a koutou.
14.27: “He rangi­mārie tāku e waiho nei ki a koutou, tēnei tāku rangi­mārie te hoatu nei e ahau ki a koutou. E kore e rite ki tā te ao hoatu tāku hoatu ki a koutou. Kei pōuri ō koutou ngākau, kei mataku.
14.28: Kua rongo nā koutou ki tāku i mea ai ki a koutou, ‘E haere ana ahau, ā, ka hoki mai anō ki a koutou.’ Me i aroha koutou ki ahau, kua hari koutou, nōku i mea, ‘E haere ana ahau ki te Matua.’ He nui ake hoki tōku Matua i ahau.
14.29: Nā, kua kōrero nei ahau ki a koutou; i te mea kāhore anō i puta, mō te puta rawa mai, ka whaka­pono koutou.
14.30: E kore e maha ake āku kōrero ki a koutou. E haere mai ana hoki te ariki o tēnei ao, kāhore hoki āna wāhi i roto i ahau;
14.31: otirā, kia mātau ai te ao, e aroha ana ahau ki te Matua; ko tā te Matua anō i whaka­hau mai ai ki ahau, ko tāku tēnā e mea nei. “Whaka­tika, ka haere atu tātou i konei.”

15.1: “Ko ahau te wāina pono, ko tōku Matua te kai­mahi.
15.2: Ko ngā manga katoa i roto i ahau e kore e whai hua, e tango­hia e ia. Ko ngā mea katoa hoki e whai hua ana, ka whaka­paia e ia, kia maha atu ai ōna hua.
15.3: Nā, kua mā tēnei koutou i te kupu i kōrero­tia e ahau ki a koutou.
15.4: Kia ū koutou ki roto ki ahau, me ahau hoki ki roto ki a koutou. Ka rite hoki ki te manga e kore e whai hua ko ia anake, ki te kāhore e ū ki te wāina; e kore anō hoki koutou, ki te kore e ū ki roto ki ahau.
15.5: “Ko ahau te wāina, ko koutou ngā manga. Ki te ū tētahi ki roto ki ahau, me ahau hoki ki roto ki a ia, ka maha o tērā hua; ki te motu kē hoki i ahau, e kore tētahi mea e taea e koutou.
15.6: Ki te kore e ū tētahi ki roto ki ahau, ka makā atu ia, ānō he manga, ā, ka maroke; nā, ka kohiko­hia, ka makā ki te kāpura, ka tahuna.
15.7: Ki te ū koutou ki roto ki ahau, ki te ū anō āku kupu ki roto ki a koutou, īnoia e koutou tā koutou e pai ai, ā, ka meatia mā koutou.
15.8: Ka whaka­korōria­tia tōku Matua ki te pēnei, ki te whai hua maha koutou, ā, ka meinga koutou he ākonga nāku.
15.9: Rite tonu ki tō te Matua aroha ki ahau tōku aroha ki a koutou; kia ū ki tōku aroha.
15.10: Ki te pupuri koutou i āku ture, ka ū koutou ki tōku aroha; me ahau hoki kua pupuri nei i ngā ture a tōku Matua, ka ū nei ki tōna aroha.
15.11: “Kua kōrero­tia ēnei mea e ahau ki a koutou, kia pūmau ai tōku koa i roto i a koutou, kia tino kī ai tō koutou koa.
15.12: Ko tāku ture tēnei, kia aroha koutou tētahi ki tētahi, me ahau hoki kua aroha nei ki a koutou.
15.13: Kāhore he aroha o tētahi i rahi ake i tēnei, arā, kia tuku te tangata i a ia anō kia mate mō ōna hoa.
15.14: Ko koutou ōku hoa, ki te meatia e koutou āku e whaka­hau nei ki a koutou.
15.15: Heoi anō tāku mea­tanga he pono­nga koutou; e kore hoki te pono­nga e mōhio ki tā tōna ariki e mea ai; engari, kua oti koutou te hua e ahau he hoa; ko āku mea katoa hoki i rongo ai ahau ki tōku Matua, kua oti te whaka­kite e ahau ki a koutou.
15.16: Kāhore koutou i whiri­whiri i ahau, engari, nāku koutou i whiri­whiri, nāku anō koutou i mea kia haere, kia whai hua, kia mau tonu hoki ō koutou hua; ā, ko tā koutou e īnoi ai ki te Matua i runga i tōku ingoa, ka hoatu e ia ki a koutou.
15.17: Ko āku whaka­hau ēnei ki a koutou, kia aroha koutou tētahi ki tētahi.” Ko te Kino o te Ao
15.18: “Ki te mea e kino­ngia ana koutou e te ao, e mōhio ana koutou i kino­ngia ahau i mua i a koutou.
15.19: Me­he­mea nō te ao koutou, e aroha­ina e te ao ōna. Tēnā ko tēnei ehara nei koutou i te ao, nāku koutou i whiri­whiri i roto i te ao, koia te ao ka kino ai ki a koutou.
15.20: Kia mahara ki te kupu i kōrero ai ahau ki a koutou, kāhore te pono­nga e rahi ake i tōna ariki. Ki te mea i whaka­toia ahau e rātou, ka whaka­toia anō koutou; ki te mea i pupuri rātou i tāku kupu, ka pupuri anō rātou i tā koutou.
15.21: Otirā, e meatia katoa­tia ēnei mea e rātou ki a koutou he whaka­aro ki tōku ingoa, nō te mea kāhore rātou i mōhio ki tōku kai­tono mai.
15.22: Me i kaua ahau te haere mai, te kōrero ki a rātou, pēnei kāhore ō rātou hara. Tēnā ko tēnei kāhore ō rātou whaka­ora­ora mō tō rātou hara.
15.23: Ko te tangata e whaka­kino ana ki ahau, e whaka­kino ana hoki ki tōku Matua.
15.24: Me i kaua te mahia e ahau i roto i a rātou ngā mahi kāhore i mahia e tētahi atu, pēnei kāhore ō rātou hara. Tēnā ko tēnei kua kite rātou, kua whaka­kino anō hoki ki a māua tahi ko tōku Matua.
15.25: Mā tēnei ia ka rite ai te kupu i tuhi­tuhia ki tā rātou ture, ‘Kua kino noa rātou ki ahau.’
15.26: “Otiia, ka tae mai te Kai­whaka­mārie e tonoa mai e ahau ki a koutou i te Matua, te Wairua o te pono, e puta mai ana i te Matua, ko ia hei kai­whaka­atu mōku.
15.27: Ko koutou anō hoki hei kai­whaka­atu, nō te mea i ahau koutou nō te tīma­tanga iho rā anō.”

16.1: “Kua kōrero­tia e ahau ēnei mea ki a koutou, kei hē koutou.
16.2: Ka peia atu koutou i roto i ngā whare kara­kia; ā, meāke puta te wā e mea ai te kai­whaka­mate i a koutou, he mahi pai tāna ki te Atua.
16.3: Nā, e meatia ēnei mea, nō te mea kāhore rātou i mōhio ki te Matua, kāhore hoki ki ahau.
16.4: Otiia, kua kōrero­tia ēnei mea e ahau ki a koutou, mō te puta rawa mai o taua wā, ka mahara koutou ki aua mea, he mea kōrero nāku ki a koutou. Ngā Mahi a te Wairua Tapu “Nā, kīhai ēnei mea i kōrero­tia e ahau ki a koutou i te tīma­tanga, nō te mea e noho ana ahau i a koutou.
16.5: Nā, e haere ana tēnei ahau ki tōku kai­tono mai; ā, kāhore tētahi o koutou i ui mai ki ahau, ‘Ko hea koe?’
16.6: Otirā, i tāku kōrero­tanga i ēnei mea ki a koutou, ka kī ō koutou ngākau i te pōuri.
16.7: He pono ia tāku kōrero ki a koutou; nui atu te pai mō koutou ki te haere ahau; ki te kāhore hoki ahau e haere, e kore te Kai­whaka­mārie e tae mai ki a koutou; ā, ki te haere ahau, māku ia e tono mai ki a koutou.
16.8: Nā, ka tae mai ia, māna e whaka­atu ki te ao te hara, te tika, me te whaka­wā.
16.9: Te hara, mō rātou kāhore e whaka­pono ki ahau;
16.10: te tika, nō te mea e haere ana ahau ki tōku Matua, ā, heoi anō tō koutou kite­nga i ahau;
16.11: te whaka­wā, nō te mea kua whaka­tikaia te whaka­wā mō te ranga­tira o tēnei ao.
16.12: “He maha atu anō ngā mea hei kōrero māku ki a koutou, otirā, e kore e taea e koutou te mau āia­nei.
16.13: Otirā, kia tae mai ia, te Wairua o te pono, māna koutou e ārahi ki te pono katoa; ehara hoki tāna i te kōrero nāna ake; engari, ka kōrero­tia e ia ngā mea e rongo ai ia; māna hoki e whaka­kite ki a koutou ngā mea e puta mai ana.
16.14: Ka whaka­korōria­tia ahau e ia; ka tango hoki ia i āku mea, ā, ka whaka­atu­ria ki a koutou.
16.15: Ko ngā mea katoa a te Matua, nāku. Koia ahau i mea ai, ka tango­hia e ia āku mea, ā, ka whaka­atu­ria ki a koutou.” Te Pōuritanga me te Hari
16.16: “Taro ake, ā, e kore koutou e kite anō i ahau; ā, taro ake anō, ka kite koutou i ahau, nō te mea ka haere ahau ki te Matua.”
16.17: Nā, ka mea ētahi o āna ākonga tētahi ki tētahi, “He aha tēnei e mea nei ia ki a tātou, ‘Taro ake, ā, e kore koutou e kite i ahau; ā, taro ake anō, ka kite koutou i ahau’; me tēnei, ‘Nō te mea e haere ana ahau ki te Matua’?”
16.18: Nā, ka mea rātou, “He aha tēnei e mea nei ia, ‘Taro ake?’ E kore tātou e mātau ki tāna e mea nei.”
16.19: Ā, i mōhio a Īhu e hia­hia ana rātou ki te ui ki a ia, ka mea ki a rātou, “E rapu ana koutou ki a koutou anō ki tāku i mea rā, ‘Taro ake, ā, e kore koutou e kite i ahau; ā, taro ake anō ka kite koutou i ahau’?
16.20: He pono, he pono tāku e mea nei ki a koutou, Ka tangi koutou, ka auē, ko te ao ia ka hari; e pōuri anō koutou, otirā ka meinga tō koutou pōuri hei hari.
16.21: I te mea ka whaka­mamae te wahine, ka pōuri, nō te mea ka tae tōna wā. Ka whānau tāna tama­iti, heoi anō, mahara ki te mamae, i te hari hoki, nō te mea ka whānau he tangata ki te ao.
16.22: Nā, tēnei koutou te pōuri nei; e kite anō ia ahau i a koutou, ā, ka hari ō koutou ngākau, e kore hoki e tango­hia i a koutou tō koutou hari e tētahi.
16.23: “Nā, ā taua rā e kore koutou e ui ki tētahi mea i ahau. He pono, he pono tāku e mea nei ki a koutou, ko ā koutou e īnoi ai ki te Matua i runga i tōku ingoa, e hoatu e ia ki a koutou.
16.24: Kāhore anō i īnoia noatia e koutou tētahi mea i runga i tōku ingoa. Īnoia, ā, ka whi­whi koutou, kia tino nui ai tō koutou koa. Te Wikitōria ki te Ao
16.25: “He mea whaka­rite tāku kōrero i ēnei mea ki a koutou. Otiia, meāke puta te wā e kore ai ahau e kōrero kupu whaka­rite ki a koutou, engari, ka mārama tonu tāku kōrero ki a koutou mō te Matua.
16.26: Ā taua rā, ka īnoi koutou i runga i tōku ingoa; ā, e kore ahau e mea ki a koutou e īnoi ahau ki te Matua mō koutou.
16.27: E aroha ana hoki te Matua ake anō ki a koutou, mō koutou i aroha ki ahau, i whaka­pono hoki i haere mai ahau i te Matua.
16.28: I haere mai ahau i te Matua, ā, kua tae mai nei ki te ao; ka mahue anō i ahau te ao, ā, ka haere ki te Matua.”
16.29: Ka mea āna ākonga ki a ia, “Nā, kua mārama tāu kōrero, ehara tāu kōrero i te kupu whaka­rite.
16.30: Kātahi mātou ka mōhio, tēnei koe te mōhio nei ki ngā mea katoa, e kore anō e mea mā tētahi e ui ki a koe; nā konei mātou i whaka­pono ai i haere mai koe i te Atua.”
16.31: Ka whaka­hokia e Īhu ki a rātou, “Kātahi koutou ka whaka­pono?
16.32: Nā, meāke puta te wā, ā, kua puta nei anō, e whaka­marara­tia ai koutou ki tōna wāhi, ki tōna wāhi, ā, ka waiho ko ahau anake. Otiia, he teka ko ahau anake, nō te mea kei ahau nei te Matua.
16.33: Kua kōrero­tia e ahau ēnei mea ki a koutou, kia whai mārie­tanga ai koutou i roto i ahau. Ko tā koutou i te ao nei, he mamate. Otirā kia māia; kua taea e ahau te ao!”

17.1: Ka kōrero­tia ēnei mea e Īhu, nā, ka anga ake ōna kanohi ki te rangi, ka mea, “E Pā, kua taea te hāora; whaka­korōria­tia tāu Tama, kia whaka­korōria­tia ai anō hoki koe e tāu Tama.
17.2: Kua tukua mai nei hoki e koe ki a ia ngā tikanga mō ngā kiko­kiko katoa, kia hoatu e ia te ora tonu ki te hunga katoa kua hōmai nei e koe ki a ia.
17.3: Ko te ora tonu hoki tēnei, kia mātau rātou ki a koe, ko koe anake te Atua pono, ki a Īhu Karaiti anō hoki i tonoa mai nei e koe.
17.4: Kua whaka­korōria­tia koe e ahau i runga i te whenua; ka oti i ahau te mahi i hōmai e koe kia mahia e ahau.
17.5: Nā, kia whai korōria ahau āia­nei i a koe ake, e Pā, hei te korōria i whi­whi ai ahau i a koe i mua atu o te ao.
17.6: “Kua whaka­pua­kina e ahau tōu ingoa ki ngā tāngata i hōmai nei e koe ki ahau i roto i te ao. Nōu rātou, nāu anō hoki rātou i hōmai ki ahau, ā, kua puri­tia e rātou tāu kupu.
17.7: Kātahi rātou ka mātau nāu ngā mea katoa i hōmai nei e koe ki ahau.
17.8: Nō te mea kua hoatu e ahau ki a rātou ngā kupu i hōmai nei e koe ki ahau; ā, kua tango rātou, kua tino mātau anō, i haere mai ahau i a koe, kua whaka­pono rātou, nāu ahau i tono mai.
17.9: “Mō rātou tāku īnoi; kāhore āku īnoi mō te ao, engari, mō āu i hōmai ai ki ahau; nāu hoki rātou.
17.10: Ko āku mea katoa nāu, nāku hoki āu; ā, ka whai korōria ahau i a rātou.
17.11: Nā, heoi anō tōku noho ki te ao; kei te ao nei anō ēnei, ko ahau ia ka haere atu ki a koe. E te Matua tapu, puri­tia i runga i tōu ingoa te hunga kua hōmai nei e koe ki ahau, kia kotahi ai rātou, me tāua nei.
17.12: I ahau anō e noho ana i a rātou i te ao, i puri­tia rātou e ahau i runga i tōu ingoa. Kua tiaki­na e ahau āu i hōmai ai ki ahau, ā, kāhore tētahi o rātou i ngaro, ko te tama anake o te ngaro­manga; kia rite ai te karaipi­ture.
17.13: Nā, ka haere atu nei ahau ki a koe, ā, e kōrero­tia ana e ahau ēnei mea i te ao nei, kia tino nui ai tōku koa i roto i a rātou.
17.14: Kua hoatu e ahau tāu kupu ki a rātou; e kino ana hoki te ao ki a rātou, nō te mea ehara rātou i te ao, me ahau hoki ehara i te ao.
17.15: Kāhore āku īnoi kia tango­hia atu rātou e koe i te ao, engari, kia tiaki­na rātou e koe kei kino.
17.16: Ehara rātou i te ao, me ahau hoki ehara i te ao.
17.17: Whaka­tapua rātou e koe i runga i tōu pono; ko tāu kupu te pono.
17.18: Nāu ahau i tono mai ki te ao, he pēnā anō tāku tono i a rātou ki te ao.
17.19: He whaka­aro hoki ki a rātou i whaka­tapu ai ahau i ahau, kia tapu ai hoki rātou i te pono.
17.20: “Ehara tāku i te īnoi mō ēnei anake, engari, mō te hunga e meinga e tā rātou kupu kia whaka­pono ki ahau.
17.21: Kia kotahi ai rātou katoa; me koe hoki, e Pā, i roto i ahau, me ahau anō i roto i a koe, kia kotahi ai hoki rātou i roto i a tāua; kia whaka­pono ai te ao, nāu ahau i tono mai.
17.22: Kua hoatu anō e ahau ki a rātou te korōria i hōmai e koe ki ahau; kia kotahi ai rātou, me tāua nei hoki he kotahi.
17.23: Ko ahau i roto i a rātou, ko koe hoki i roto i ahau, kia tino tutuki ai rātou ki te kotahi­tanga; kia mōhio ai anō te ao, nāu ahau i tono mai, he rite hoki tōu aroha ki a rātou ki tōu aroha ki ahau.
17.24: “E Pā, e mea ana ahau kia noho tahi ki ahau, ki te wāhi e noho ai ahau, āu i hōmai ai ki ahau; kia kite ai rātou i tōku korōria kua hōmai nei e koe ki ahau; nō mua atu hoki i te hanga­nga o te ao tōu aroha ki ahau.
17.25: E te Matua tika, ahakoa te ao tē mōhio ki a koe, e mōhio ana ahau ki a koe, ā, kua mōhio anō ēnei, nāu ahau i tono mai.
17.26: Kua whaka­pua­kina anō tōu ingoa e ahau ki a rātou, ā, ka whaka­pua­kina anō; kia mau ai i roto i a rātou te aroha i aroha­ina ai ahau e koe, me ahau anō i roto i a rātou.”

18.1: Ka mutu ēnei kōrero a Īhu ka haere ia, rātou ko āna ākonga, ki tāwāhi o te manga wai, arā o Kerono. Nā, he kāri kei reira, ā, tapoko atu ana ia, rātou ko āna ākonga.
18.2: I mātau­ria anō taua wāhi e Hūrā, e te tangata e tukua ai ia; he maha hoki ngā hoki­nga o Īhu, rātou ko āna ākonga ki reira.
18.3: Nā, ka hoatu ki a Hūrā tētahi mātua me ētahi kātipa e ngā tohu­nga nui rātou ko ngā Parihi, ā, haere ana ki reira, me ngā rohe­rohe, me ngā rama, me ngā patu.
18.4: Heoi, i mātau a Īhu ki ngā mea katoa meāke pā ki a ia, ka puta atu, ka mea ki a rātou, “Ko wai tā koutou e rapu?”
18.5: Ka whaka­hokia e rātou ki a ia, “Ko Īhu o Nahareta.” Ka mea a Īhu ki a rātou, “Ko ahau ia.” Ā, i te tū anō i roto i a rātou a Hūrā, tōna kai­tuku.
18.6: Nā, i tāna kōrero­tanga ki a rātou, “Ko ahau ia,” hoki ana rātou ki muri, hinga ana ki te whenua.
18.7: Nā, ka ui anō ia ki a rātou, “Ko wai tā koutou e rapu?” Ka mea rātou, “Ko Īhu o Nahareta.”
18.8: Ka whaka­hokia e Īhu, “Kua mea ahau ki a koutou, ‘Ko ahau ia’, ki te mea e rapu ana koutou i ahau, tukua ēnei kia haere.”
18.9: (Kia rite ai te kupu i kōrero­tia e ia: “Kāhore i ngaro tētahi o te hunga i hōmai e koe ki ahau.”)
18.10: Nā, he hoari tā Haimona Pita, unuhia ana e ia, ā, hāua iho te pono­nga a te tohu­nga nui, tapa­hia ana tōna tari­nga matau. Ko te ingoa o taua pono­nga ko Maraku.
18.11: Ka mea a Īhu ki a Pita, “Kuhua tāu hoari ki te takoto­ranga. Ko te kapu i hōmai nei e tōku Matua ki ahau auaka rānei e inumia e ahau?” Ko Īhu i te Aroaro o Anaha
18.12: Heoi, ka hopu­kina a Īhu e taua ope, e te ranga­tira rātou ko ngā kātipa o ngā Hūrai, ā, hereherea ana ia.
18.13: Ā, ka āra­hina ki a Anaha i te tua­tahi; ko ia hoki te hunga­wai o Kaiapa, o te tohu­nga nui mō taua tau.
18.14: Nā, ko Kaiapa tēnei nāna rā i whaka­takoto te whaka­aro ki ngā Hūrai, he pai kē ki te mate te tangata kotahi mō te iwi. Ka Whakakāhorengia a Īhu e Pita (Matiu 26.69-70; Māka 14.66-68; Ruka 22.55-57)
18.15: Nā, ka aru a Haimona Pita i a Īhu, ā, ka aru anō hoki tētahi atu o ngā ākonga; nā, i mōhio­tia taua ākonga e te tohu­nga nui, ā, tomo tahi ana me Īhu ki te whare o te tohu­nga nui;
18.16: ko Pita ia i tū i te kūwaha i waho. Nā, ka puta atu taua ākonga i mōhio­tia nei e te tohu­nga nui, ka kōrero ki te kai­tiaki o te tatau, ā, āra­hina ana a Pita ki roto.
18.17: Nā, ko te mea­tanga a te kōtiro tiaki o te tatau ki a Pita, “Ehara ianei koe i tētahi o ngā ākonga a tēnei tangata?” Ka mea ia, “Ehara!”
18.18: Nā, i reira ngā pono­nga me ngā kātipa e tū ana, kua whaka­ūngia hoki e rātou te kāpura waro; he maka­riri hoki; ā, e ina­ina ana rātou. Ko Pita hoki tētahi o rātou, e tū tahi ana e ina­ina ana. Ka Uiuia e te Tōhunga Nui a Īhu (Matiu 26.59-66; Māka 14.55-64; Ruka 22.66-71)
18.19: Nā, ka ui te tohu­nga nui ki a Īhu, ki āna ākonga, ki tāna ako.
18.20: Ka whaka­hokia e Īhu ki a ia, “I mārama tonu tāku kōrero ki te ao; i ako tonu ahau i roto i te whare kara­kia, i te teme­para hoki, i te wāhi hui­hui o ngā Hūrai katoa; kāhore hoki tētahi mea i kōrero­tia puku­tia e ahau.
18.21: He aha koe ka ui ai ki ahau? Ui atu ki te hunga i rongo ki tāku i mea ai ki a rātou; Nana, e mōhio ana rātou ki āku i kōrero ai.”
18.22: Nā, i tāna kōrero­tanga i ēnei kupu, ka papaki tētahi o ngā kātipa i tū rā i a Īhu, ka mea, “E pēnā ana koe ki te tohu­nga nui?”
18.23: Ka whaka­hokia e Īhu ki a ia, “Ki te kino āku kōrero, whaka­atu­ria te kino. Ki te pai ia, he aha koe i papaki ai i ahau?”
18.24: Nā, ka tukua here­here­tia atu ia e Anaha ki a Kaiapa tohu­nga nui. Ka Whakakāhorengia anō a Īhu e Pita (Matiu 26.71-75; Māka 14.69-72; Ruka 22.58-62)
18.25: Nā, tērā a Haimona Pita te tū rā me te ina­ina. Nā, ka mea rātou ki a ia, “Ehara ianei koe i tētahi o āna ākonga?” Ka whaka­kāhore ia, ka mea, “Ehara!”
18.26: Ka mea tētahi o ngā pono­nga a te tohu­nga nui, he whanau­nga nōna i tapa­hia nei te tari­nga e Pita, “Kīhai ianei ahau i kite i a koe, kōrua tahi i te kāri?”
18.27: Nā, ka whaka­kāhore anō a Pita; ā, tangi tonu iho te tī­kao­kao. Ka Mauria a Īhu i te Aroaro o Pirato (Matiu 27.1-2, 11-14; Māka 15.1-5; Ruka 23.1-5)
18.28: Kātahi, ka āra­hina atu e rātou a Īhu i a Kaiapa ki te whare whaka­wā. He atatū. Ko rātou ia kīhai i tomo ki te whare whaka­wā, kei poke rātou, engari, kia kai ai rātou i te Kape­nga.
18.29: Nā, ka puta atu a Pirato ki a rātou, ka mea, “He aha tā koutou whaka­pae ki tēnei tangata?”
18.30: Ka whaka­hoki rātou, ka mea ki a ia, “Me i kaua ia te mahi i te kino, kīhai i kawea mai e mātou ki a koe.”
18.31: Nā, ko te mea­tanga a Pirato ki a rātou, “Mauria atu ia, whaka­wā­kia ki tō koutou nā ture.” Ka mea ngā Hūrai ki a ia, “E kore e tika kia whaka­matea tētahi tangata e mātou.”
18.32: Kia rite ai tā Īhu kupu i kōrero ai, hei whaka­atu i te mate e mate ai ia.
18.33: Me i reira ka tomo anō a Pirato ki te whare whaka­wā, ka karanga i a Īhu, ka mea ki a ia, “Ko te Kīngi rānei koe o ngā Hūrai?”
18.34: Ka whaka­hokia e Īhu ki a ia, “Nāu ake anō tēnei kupu, he kōrero rānei mōku nā te tangata kē ki a koe?”
18.35: Ka mea a Pirato, “He Hūrai koia ahau? Nā tōu iwi, nā ngā tohu­nga nui anō hoki, koe i kawe mai ki ahau; i aha koia koe?”
18.36: Ka whaka­hokia e Īhu, “Ehara tōku ranga­tira­tanga i tēnei ao; me­he­mea nō tēnei ao tōku ranga­tira­tanga, kua tatau āku pono­nga, kei tukua ahau ki ngā Hūrai. Tēnā ko tēnei ehara tōku ranga­tira­tanga i konei.”
18.37: Nā, ka mea a Pirato ki a ia, “He kīngi oti koe?” Ka whaka­hokia e Īhu, “Kua kōrero­tia mai nā e koe he kīngi ahau. Ko te mea tēnei i whānau ai ahau; nā, tēnei hoki ahau i haere mai ai ki te ao, hei kai­whaka­atu mō te pono. E whaka­rongo ana ki tōku reo ngā tāngata katoa o te pono.”
18.38: Ka mea a Pirato ki a ia, “He aha te pono?” Ka Whiua a Īhu kia Mate (Matiu 27.15-31; Māka 15.6-20; Ruka 23.13-25) Ā, nō te pua­kanga o tēnei kī, hoki ana ia ki waho, ki ngā Hūrai, ka mea ki a rātou, “Kāhore tētahi hē o tēnei tangata i mau i ahau.
18.39: Otiia, he rite­nga tēnei nā koutou, kia tukua e ahau ki a koutou tētahi tangata i te Kape­nga. E pai ana rānei koutou kia tukua e ahau ki a koutou te Kīngi o ngā Hūrai?”
18.40: Heoi, karanga katoa ana anō rātou, ka mea, “Auaka tēnei, engari a Parapa.” Nā, he tāhae a Parapa.

19.1: Kātahi, ka mau a Pirato ki a Īhu, ka whiu i a ia.
19.2: Ā, ka whiria e ngā hōia he karauna tā­tarā­moa, pōtaea ana ki tōna māte­nga, whaka­kākahu­ria ana hoki ia ki te kahu pāpura.
19.3: Nā, ka mea rātou, “Tēnā koe, e te Kīngi o ngā Hūrai!” Ā, pākia ana ia ki ō rātou ringa.
19.4: Ka haere anō a Pirato, ka mea ki a rātou, “Nā, tēnei te āra­hina atu nei ia e ahau ki a koutou, kia mōhio ai koutou, kāhore rawa i mau i ahau tētahi hē ōna.”
19.5: Nā, ka puta a Īhu ki waho, me te karauna tā­tarā­moa i runga i a ia, me te kākahu pāpura. Ka mea a Pirato ki a rātou, “Nā, te tangata nei!”
19.6: Ā, nō te kite­nga o ngā tohu­nga nui rātou ko ngā kātipa i a ia, ka karanga rātou, ka mea, “Rīpekatia, rīpeka­tia.” Ka kī a Pirato ki a rātou, “Tango­hia atu ia e koutou, rīpeka­tia; kāhore hoki i mau i ahau tētahi hē ōna.”
19.7: Ka whaka­hokia e ngā Hūrai ki a ia, “He ture tō mātou, ā, ki tō mātou ture he mea tika kia mate ia, mōna i mea ko te Tama ia a te Atua.”
19.8: Nō te rongo­nga o Pirato i tēnei kī, nui rawa tōna wehi;
19.9: ka tomo anō ia ki te whare whaka­wā, ka mea ki a Īhu, “Nō hea koe?” Heoi, kāhore a Īhu kupu whaka­hoki ki a ia.
19.10: Nā, ka mea a Pirato ki a ia, “E kore koe e kōrero ki ahau? Kāhore koe e mōhio kei ahau te tikanga mō te rīpeka i a koe, kei ahau anō te tikanga mō te tuku i a koe kia haere?”
19.11: Ka whaka­hokia e Īhu, “Kāhore āu tikanga ki ahau, me kāhore i hōmai ki a koe i runga. Koia i nui rawa ai te hara o te kai­tuku i ahau ki a koe.”
19.12: Nā, i reira anō ka whai a Pirato kia tukua ia kia haere; otiia, ka karanga ngā Hūrai, ka mea, “Ki te tukua tēnei e koe, ehara koe i te hoa nō Hīhā. Ki te whaka­kīngi tētahi tangata i a ia, he whaka­kāhore tāna i a Hīhā.”
19.13: Ā, nō ka rongo a Pirato i tēnei kōrero, ka āra­hina e ia a Īhu ki waho, ā, noho ana ki runga ki te nohoa­nga whaka­wā, ki te wāhi e kīa nei ko te Whā­riki Kōhatu, ki te reo Hiperu, ko Kapata.
19.14: Ko te taka­nga ia o te Kape­nga, i tata pū ki te ono o ngā hāora. Ka mea ia ki ngā Hūrai, “Nā, tō koutou Kīngi!”
19.15: Nā, ko tā rātou karanga­tanga, “Whaka­matea, whaka­matea, rīpeka­tia!” Ka mea a Pirato ki a rātou, “Kia rīpeka koia ahau i tō koutou Kīngi?” Ka whaka­hokia e ngā tohu­nga nui, “Kāhore ō mātou kīngi, ko Hīhā anake.”
19.16: Nō reira, ka hoatu ia e ia ki a rātou kia rīpeka­tia. Ka Rīpekatia a Īhu (Matiu 27.32-44; Māka 15.21-32; Ruka 23.26-43) Ā, ka mau rātou ki a Īhu.
19.17: Ā, amo ana ia i tōna rīpeka, haere ana ki te wāhi e kīa nei ko te wāhi o te anga­anga, tōna ingoa ki te reo Hiperu, ko “Korokota.”
19.18: Nā, rīpeka­tia ana ia e rātou ki reira, ā, ia me ētahi atu toko­rua, kotahi ki tētahi taha, kotahi ki tētahi taha, ko Īhu ki waenga­nui.
19.19: Nā, tuhi­tuhia ana e Pirato tētahi ingoa, whaka­piri­tia ana ki te rīpeka. Ko te tuhi­tuhi tēnei, “Ko Īhu o Nahareta ko te Kīngi o ngā Hūrai.”
19.20: Ā, he toko­maha ngā Hūrai i kite i tēnei ingoa; i tata hoki ki te pā te wāhi i rīpeka­tia ai a Īhu; ā, i tuhi­tuhia taua mea ki te reo Hiperu, ki te reo Kariki, ki te reo Roma.
19.21: Nā, ka mea ngā tohu­nga nui o ngā Hūrai ki a Pirato, “Aua e tuhi­tuhia, ‘Ko te Kīngi o ngā Hūrai,’ engari, ‘Nāna i mea, Ko te Kīngi ahau o ngā Hūrai.’ ”
19.22: Ka whaka­hokia e Pirato, “Ko tāku i tuhi­tuhi ai kua tuhi­tuhia.”
19.23: Ā, ka oti a Īhu te rīpeka e ngā hōia, ka mau rātou ki ōna kākahu, wehea ake kia whā ngā wāhi, ki ia hōia he wāhi; me te koti anō. Nā, kāhore he tui o te koti, he mea whatu iho i runga ā puta noa.
19.24: Nā, ka mea rātou tētahi ki tētahi, “Kaua e haea e tātou, engari, me maka ki te rota kia kitea ai, mō wai rānei.” Nā, ka rite te karaipi­ture e mea nei: “I wehe­wehea ōku kākahu mō rātou, i maka rota hoki mō tōku weru­weru.” Ko tā ngā hōia tēnei i mea ai.
19.25: Nā, i te taha o te rīpeka o Īhu tōna whaea e tū ana, rātou ko te teina o tōna whaea, ko Meri wahine a Kereopa, ko Meri Makarini.
19.26: Ā, nō te kite­nga o Īhu i tōna whaea, i te ākonga hoki i aroha ai ia e tū tahi ana, ka mea ia ki tōna whaea, “E tai, Nana, tāu tama!”
19.27: Kātahi, ia ka mea ki taua ākonga, “Nā, tōu whaea!” Ā, nō taua hāora ka mau taua ākonga i a ia ki tōna whare. Te Matenga o Īhu (Matiu 27.45-56; Māka 15.33-41; Ruka 23.44-49)
19.28: Muri iho i tēnei ka mōhio a Īhu ka oti ngā mea katoa, nā, ka mea ia, hei whaka­rite­nga mō te karaipi­ture, “He mate­wai tōku.”
19.29: Nā, tērā e tū rā tētahi oko, kī tonu i te winika; ā, ka whaka­kīa e rātou tētahi hau­tai ki te winika, whaka­noho­ia ana ki runga ki te hihopa, hoatu ana ki tōna māngai.
19.30: Ā, nō te inu­manga o Īhu i te winika, ka mea ia, “Kua oti.” Nā, ka tuohu tōna māte­nga, tukua ana tōna wairua. Ka Werohia te Kaokao o Īhu
19.31: Nā, i mea ngā Hūrai kia kaua e mau ngā tinana ki te rīpeka i te hāpati, ko te Taka­nga hoki tērā, he rā nui hoki taua hāpati, ka mea rātou ki a Pirato kia whatia ō rātou wae­wae, kia tango­hia atu hoki.
19.32: Nā, ka haere ngā hōia, ka whawhati i ngā wae­wae o tō mua, me o tērā i rīpeka­tia ngā­tahi­tia me ia.
19.33: I tō rātou taenga ia ki a Īhu, ka kite kua mate noa ake ia, kīhai i whatia e rātou ōna wae­wae.
19.34: Engari, i wero­hia tōna kao­kao e tētahi o ngā hōia ki te mātia, ā, puta tonu he toto, he wai.
19.35: Ā, ko te tangata i kite, ko ia anō te kai­whaka­atu, ā, he pono tāna whaka­atu; e mōhio ana ia he kōrero pono tāna, he mea rā kia whaka­pono ai koutou.
19.36: I meatia hoki ēnei mea, kia rite ai te karaipi­ture, “E kore tētahi iwi ōna e whatia.”
19.37: E mea ana anō tētahi atu karaipi­ture, “Ka ti­tiro rātou ki tā rātou i wero ai.” Te Tanumanga o Īhu (Matiu 27.57-61; Māka 15.42-47; Ruka 23.50-56)
19.38: Muri iho i ēnei mea, ka īnoi a Hōhepa o Arimatia ki a Pirato kia tango­hia e ia te tinana o Īhu. (He ākonga ia nā Īhu, otiia, he mea huna i te wehi ki ngā Hūrai.) Ā, whaka­ae ana a Pirato. Nō, ka haere ia, ka tango i te tinana o Īhu.
19.39: I haere mai anō a Nikorima, tērā i haere rā i mua ki a Īhu i te pō, me te mau mai anō i te maira, i te aroe, he mea whaka­nanu, kia kotahi pea rau pāuna.
19.40: Nā, ka tango rāua i te tinana o Īhu, takaia ana ki ngā kākahu rīnena me ngā mea kakara, ko tā ngā Hūrai rite­nga hoki tērā mō te tanu.
19.41: Nā, he kāri kei te wāhi i rīpeka­tia ai ia; i roto anō i taua kāri tētahi urupā hou, he mea kāhore anō i takoto­ria noatia e tētahi.
19.42: Nā, ka whaka­takoto­ria a Īhu e rāua ki reira, nō te mea he rā Taka­nga tērā nō ngā Hūrai; he tata hoki te urupā.

20.1: I te rā tua­tahi o te wiki ka haere a Meri Makarini ki te urupā i te atatū, i te mea e pōuri tonu ana, ā, ka kite i te kōhatu kua tango­hia atu i te urupā.
20.2: Nā, ka oma ia, ka haere ki a Haimona Pita rāua ko tērā ākonga i aroha ai a Īhu, ka mea ki a rāua, “Kua tango­hia e rātou te Ariki i te urupā, ā, kāhore mātou e mōhio ki te wāhi i waiho ai ia e rātou.”
20.3: Nā, ka puta atu a Pita, me taua ākonga, ka haere ki te urupā.
20.4: Ā, oma ngā­tahi ana rāua; otiia, i hohoro tērā ākonga i a Pita, ko ia anō kua tae wawe ki te urupā.
20.5: Nā, piko iho ana ia, ka kite i ngā tākai rīnena e takoto ana; heoi, kīhai i tomo ki roto.
20.6: Nā, ka haere anō a Haimona Pita i muri i a ia, ā, ko tōna tomo­kanga ki te urupā, ka kite i ngā tākai rīnena e takoto ana.
20.7: Me te tauera i takaia ai tōna māte­nga, kīhai i takoto tahi me ngā tākai rīnena, he mea whaka­kopa ia ki tētahi wāhi i tahaki.
20.8: Kātahi, ka tomo tērā ākonga, i tae wawe nei ki te urupā, kite ana, whaka­pono ana.
20.9: (Kīanō hoki rātou i mōhio noa ki te karaipi­ture, kua takoto te tikanga kia ara ake ia i te hunga mate.)
20.10: Nā, hoki ana anō ngā ākonga ki tō rāua kāinga. Ka Kitea a Īhu e Meri Makarini (Matiu 28.9-10; Māka 16.9-11)
20.11: Ko Meri ia tū tonu i waho o te urupā tangi ai. Ā, i a ia e tangi ana, ka piko iho ki te urupā.
20.12: Ka kite i ngā ana­hera toko­rua, he mā ngā kākahu, e noho ana, ko tētahi ki te māte­nga, ko tētahi ki ngā wae­wae, i te wāhi i takoto ai te tinana o Īhu.
20.13: Ka mea rāua ki a ia, “E tai, he aha tāu e tangi?” Ka mea ia ki a rāua, “Kua tango­hia e rātou tōku Ariki, e kore hoki ahau e mātau ki te wāhi i whaka­takoto­ria ai ia.”
20.14: Ka pēnei āna kōrero, ka tahuri whaka­muri, ka kite i a Īhu e tū ana, otiia, kīhai i mōhio ko Īhu ia.
20.15: Ka mea a Īhu ki a ia, “E tai, he aha tāu e tangi? Ko wai tāu e rapu?” Hua noa ia ko te kai­ngaki kāri, nā, ko tāna mea­tanga ki a ia, “E mara, ki te mea kua mauria atu ia e koe, kōrero­tia ki ahau te wāhi i whaka­takoto­ria ai ia, ā, māku ia e tango atu.”
20.16: Ka mea a Īhu ki a ia, “E Meri!” Ka tahuri atu tērā, ka mea ki a ia, “E Rāponi!” Ko te tikanga tēnei, “E te Kai­whaka­ako.”
20.17: Ka mea a Īhu ki a ia, “Kei pā ki ahau; kīanō hoki ahau i kake noa ki tōku Matua. Engari, haere ki ōku tēina, ka mea atu ki a rātou, ‘Ka kake ahau ki tōku Matua, ki tō koutou Matua; ki tōku Atua, ki tō koutou Atua.’ ”
20.18: Haere ana a Meri Makarini, kōrero ana ki ngā ākonga, “Kua kite ia i te Ariki!” Kua kōrero­tia hoki e ia ēnei mea ki a ia. Ka Kitea a Īhu e Āna Ākonga (Matiu 28.16-20; Māka 16.14-18; Ruka 24.36-49)
20.19: I taua rā tua­tahi anō o te wiki, i te ahi­ahi, i ngā tatau e kati ana o te wāhi i hui­hui ai ngā ākonga i te wehi i ngā Hūrai, ka haere mai a Īhu, ka tū i waenga­nui, ka mea ki a rātou, “Kia tau te rangi­mārie ki a koutou.”
20.20: Ā, ka puaki tēnei kupu āna, ka whaka­kitea e ia ōna ringa me tōna kao­kao ki a rātou. Nā, hari tonu ngā ākonga, i tō rātou kite­nga i te Ariki.
20.21: Ka mea anō a Īhu ki a rātou, “Kia tau te rangi­mārie ki a koutou. I tonoa mai ahau e te Matua, ka pērā anō tāku tono i a koutou.”
20.22: Ka kōrero­tia tēnei e ia, ka whaka­hā ia, ka mea ki a rātou, “Kia riro te Wairua Tapu i a koutou.
20.23: Ki te whaka­rērea noatia e koutou ngā hara o ētahi, ka whaka­rērea o rātou; ki te whaka­maua anō o ētahi e koutou, ka mau anō.” Ko Īhu rāua ko Tamati
20.24: Ko Tamati ia, ko tētahi o te tekau mā rua, tētahi o ōna ingoa ko Ririmu, kāhore i a rātou i te taenga mai o Īhu.
20.25: Ā, ko te mea­tanga a ērā ākonga ki a ia, “Kua kite mātou i te Ariki!” Ka mea ia ki a rātou, “Ki te kāhore ahau e kite i te ngau­nga o ngā whao i ōna ringa, e kuhu i tōku mati­hao ki te ngau­nga a ngā whao, e kuhu hoki i tōku ringa ki tōna kao­kao, e kore ahau e whaka­pono.”
20.26: Ā, ka pahemo ngā rā e waru, nā, kei roto anō āna ākonga, rātou ko Tamati. Ka haere mai a Īhu i te mea e kati ana ngā tatau, ka tū ki waenga­nui, ka mea, “Kia tau te rangi­mārie ki a koutou.”
20.27: Kātahi ia ka mea ki a Tamati, “Totoro mai tōu mati­hao, kia kite hoki koe i ōku ringa. Totoro mai hoki tōu ringa, ka kuhu ki tōku kao­kao. Aua e whaka­teka, engari, me whaka­pono.”
20.28: Nā, ka whaka­hoki a Tamati, ka mea ki a ia, “E tōku Ariki, e tōku Atua!”
20.29: Ka mea a Īhu ki a ia, “Nō tōu kite­nga i ahau, i whaka­pono ai koe, e Tamati. Ka koa te hunga kāhore i kite, ā, kua whaka­pono.” Te Tātai o tēnei Pukapuka
20.30: He maha anō ērā atu tohu i oti i a Īhu, i te aro­aro o āna ākonga, kāhore nei i tuhi­tuhia ki tēnei puka­puka.
20.31: Otiia, kua tuhi­tuhia ēnei, kia whaka­pono ai koutou ko te Karaiti a Īhu, ko te Tama a te Atua; kia whi­whi ai hoki ki te ora i runga i tōna ingoa, ina whaka­pono.

21.1: Muri iho i ēnei mea ka whaka­kite a Īhu i a ia ki ngā ākonga i te moana o Tai­piria; ko tāna whaka­kite­nga tēnei.
21.2: E noho tahi ana a Haimona Pita, a Tamati, ko Ririmu nei tōna ingoa, a Natanahira o Kana o Kariri, ngā tama a Heperi, me tētahi toko­rua atu anō o āna ākonga.
21.3: Ka mea a Haimona Pita ki a rātou, “Ka haere ahau ki te hao.” Ka mea rātou ki a ia, “Ko tātou tahi e haere.” Haere ana rātou, eke ana ki runga ki te kai­puke; ā, i taua pō kīhai i mau tētahi mea.
21.4: Nā, ka pūao te ata, ko Īhu e tū ana i tātahi; otiia, kīhai ngā ākonga i mōhio ko Īhu ia.
21.5: Nā, ko te mea­tanga a Īhu ki a rātou, “E tama mā, kāhore ā koutou kai?” Ka whaka­hokia e rātou ki a ia, “Kāhore.”
21.6: Ka mea ia ki a rātou, “Makā te kupe­nga ki te taha matau o te kai­puke, ā, ka mau ētahi.” Nā, i tā rātou maka­nga atu, kīhai i taea te kukume i te tini o ngā ika.
21.7: Kātahi, ka mea te ākonga i aroha­ina e Īhu ki a Pita, “Ko te Ariki!” Ā, nō te rongo­nga o Haimona Pita, ko te Ariki, ka whī­tiki­ria tōna kākahu, e tū kau ana hoki ia, ā, rere ana ki te moana.
21.8: Ko ērā ākonga ia i hoe i runga i te poti, kīhai hoki i mamao atu i te whenua, me te mea e rua rau whatīa­nga, e kukume ana i te kupe­nga, i ngā ika.
21.9: Heoi, nō tō rātou ūnga ki uta, ka kite i te kāpura waro me ngā ika e takoto ana i runga, me tētahi taro.
21.10: Ka mea a Īhu ki a rātou, “Hōmai ētahi o ngā ika kua mau nā i a koutou.”
21.11: Nā, haere ana a Haimona Pita, ā, kūmea ana e ia te kupe­nga ki uta, kī tonu i ngā ika nunui, kotahi rau e rima tekau mā toru; ā, ahakoa tini, kīhai i pakaru te kupe­nga.
21.12: Ka mea a Īhu ki a rātou, “Haere mai ki te kai.” Heoi, kīhai tētahi o ngā ākonga i māia ki te ui ki a ia, “Ko wai koe?” I mōhio hoki ko te Ariki.
21.13: Nā, ka haere a Īhu, ka mau ki te taro, ā, hoatu ana e ia ki a rātou, me ngā ika.
21.14: Ko te toru tēnei o ngā pu­tanga o Īhu ki āna ākonga, i muri i tōna aranga ake i te hunga mate. Ko Īhu rāua ko Pita
21.15: Ā, ka mutu tā rātou kai, ka mea a Īhu ki a Haimona Pita, “E Haimona, tama a Hona, rahi atu rānei tōu aroha ki ahau i tō ēnei?” Ka mea tērā ki a ia, “Āe, e te Ariki; e mōhio ana koe e aroha ana ahau ki a koe.” Ka mea ia ki a ia, “Whāngai­nga āku reme.”
21.16: Ka mea anō ia ki a ia, ko te rua o ngā mea­tanga, “E Haimona, tama a Hona, e aroha ana koe ki ahau?” Ka mea tērā ki a ia, “Āe, e te Ariki; e mōhio ana koe e aroha ana ahau ki a koe.” Ka mea ia ki a ia, “Hēpara­tia āku hipi.”
21.17: Ka mea ia ki a ia, ko te toru o ngā mea­tanga, “E Haimona, tama a Hona, e aroha ana koe ki ahau?” Ka pōuri a Pita nō te mea ka toru rawa āna mea­tanga ki a ia, “E aroha ana koe ki ahau?” Ka mea anō ki a ia, “E te Ariki, e mōhio ana koe ki ngā mea katoa; e mōhio ana koe e aroha ana ahau ki a koe.” Ka mea a Īhu ki a ia, “Whāngai­nga āku hipi.
21.18: He pono, he pono tāku e mea nei ki a koe, i tōu tama­riki­tanga, i whī­tiki koe i a koe, i haere ki tāu wāhi i pai ai. Ka koro­heke­tia koe, ka whaka­mārō­tia e koe ōu ringa, he tangata kē hoki māna koe e whī­tiki, e kawe ki te wāhi e kore ai koe e pai.”
21.19: (I kōrero­tia tēnei e ia, hei tohu mō te mate e whaka­korōria ai ia i te Atua.) Ā, ka puaki tēnei kupu ana, ka mea ia ki a ia, “Haere mai i muri i ahau.” Ko Īhu rāua ko tērā o ngā Ākonga
21.20: Nō te tahuri­tanga, o Pita, ka kite i te ākonga i aroha ai a Īhu e aru ana; ko tērā hoki i whaka­whiri­naki rā ki tōna uma i te hapa, i mea rā, “E te Ariki, ko wai te kai­tuku mōu?”
21.21: Ā, i te kite­nga o Pita i a ia, ka mea ki a Īhu, “E te Ariki, e aha rā tēnei?”
21.22: Ka mea a Īhu ki a ia, “Ki te pai ahau kia noho tonu ia kia tae mai rā anō ahau, hei aha māu? Haere mai koe i muri i ahau.”
21.23: Heoi, ka puta atu tēnei kupu ki ngā hoa, e kore taua ākonga e mate. Otiia, kīhai a Īhu i mea ki a ia, “E kore ia e mate”; engari, “Ki te pai ahau kia noho tonu ia kia tae mai rā anō ahau, hei aha māu?”
21.24: Ko taua ākonga tēnei e whaka­atu nei i ēnei mea, ko te kai­tuhi­tuhi hoki ia i ēnei mea; e mōhio ana anō mātou e tika ana tāna whaka­atu. Whakamutunga
21.25: Nā, tērā atu anō tōna tini o ngā mea i mea ai a Īhu me i tuhia katoa­tia, e mea ana ahau, e kore pea te ao nei e whai takoto­ranga mō ngā puka­puka e tuhia.

1.1: Ko te puka­puka tua­tahi rā he mea tuhi­tuhi nāku, e Tiopira, mō ngā mea katoa i tīmata ai a Īhu te mahi, te ako,
1.2: taea noatia te rā i tango­hia atu ai ia, i muri i tāna whaka­ako­ranga, arā i tā te Wairua Tapu, ki ngā āpō­toro i whiri­whiria e ia.
1.3: He maha hoki ngā tohu i whaka­kite ora ai ia i a ia ki a rātou, i muri i tōna whaka­mamae­tanga, e whā tekau hoki ngā rā i kitea ai e rātou, kōrero­tia ai e ia ngā mea o te ranga­tira­tanga o te Atua.
1.4: Ā, i a rātou ka hui­hui tahi me ia, ka whai kupu ia kia kaua rātou e haere atu i Hiruhārama, ā, ka mea, “Engari, kia tāria te mea i kōrero­tia i mua e te Matua, i rongo rā koutou ki ahau.
1.5: I iri­iri hoki a Hoani ki te wai; ko koutou ia, e kore e maha ake ngā rā, ka iri­iria ki te Wairua Tapu.” Ka Mauria ake a Īhu ki te Rangi (Māka 16.19-20; Ruka 24.50-53)
1.6: Nō reira, i a rātou ka tāmene, ka ui rātou ki a ia, “E te Ariki, ko te wā ianei tēnei e whaka­hoki ai koe i te ranga­tira­tanga ki a Īharaira?”
1.7: Nā, ko tāna mea­tanga ki a rātou, “Ehara mā koutou te mōhio ki ngā tāima, ki ngā wā rānei, kua whaka­ritea e te Matua māna ake te tikanga.
1.8: Otiia, ka riro he kaha i a koutou, ina haere mai te Wairua Tapu ki runga ki a koutou, ā, hei kai­whaka­atu koutou mōku ki Hiruhārama, ki Hūria katoa, ki Hamaria hoki, ā tae noa ki te pito whaka­mutu­nga o te ao.”
1.9: Ā, nō ka mutu tāna kōrero i ēnei mea, i a rātou anō e ti­tiro atu ana, ka tango­hia atu ia, ā, nā te kapua i kōpaki atu i ō rātou kanohi.
1.10: Ā, i a rātou e ti­tiro mata­tau atu ana ki te rangi, i a ia e haere ana, nā, ko ngā tāngata toko­rua e tū ana i tō rātou taha, he mā ngā kākahu.
1.11: E mea ana, “E ngā tāngata o Kariri, he aha tā koutou e tū, e mā­taki­taki atu nā ki te rangi? Ko tēnā Īhu kua tango­hia atu nā i a koutou ki te rangi, ka pērā anō tōna haere­nga mai me ia i tiro­hia atu nā e koutou e haere ana ki te rangi.” Te Kairīwhi o Hūrā (Matiu 27.3-10)
1.12: Nā, hoki ana rātou ki Hiruhārama i te maunga e huaina nei ko Ōriwa, he wāhi e tata ana ki Hiruhārama, he haere­nga hāpati.
1.13: Ā, ka tomo rātou, ka kake ki te rūma i runga, ki te wāhi i noho ai rātou; arā a Pita, a Hēmi, a Hoani, a Anaru, a Piripi, a Tamati, a Patoromu, a Matiu, a Hēmi tama a Arapiu, a Haimona Heroti, a Hūrā te teina o Hēmi.
1.14: Ko ēnei katoa kotahi tonu te whaka­aro i ū ai ki te īnoi, ki te kara­kia, me ngā wāhine; me te whaea o Īhu, me Meri; me ōna tēina.
1.15: I aua rā, ka whaka­tika a Pita i waenga­nui o ngā ākonga; ā, he toko­maha ngā tāngata i hui­hui, kei te kotahi rau e rua tekau; ā, ka mea,
1.16: “E hoa mā, e ōku tēina, i tika anō kia whaka­ritea tēnei karaipi­ture, tā te Wairua Tapu i kōrero­tia rā i mua e te māngai o Rāwiri mō Hūrā, mō te kai­ārahi i te hunga nāna i hopu a Īhu.
1.17: I hui­huia tahi­tia hoki ia ki a tātou, i a ia anō tētahi wāhi o tēnei mahi.”
1.18: (Nā, hokona ana e taua tangata tētahi māra ki te utu o tōna hara; ā, taka tūpou iho, kōara pū i waenga­nui, pakaru katoa ki waho ōna whēkau.
1.19: I mōhio­tia tēnei e te hunga katoa e noho ana i Hiruhārama; nā reira taua wāhi i huaina ai ki tō tātou reo ko Akērama, arā ko te Māra o te Toto.)
1.20: “Kua oti hoki te tuhi­tuhi ki te puka­puka o Ngā Waiata, ‘Kia uru­rua­tia tōna nohoa­nga, kaua hoki tētahi tangata e noho ki reira’, me tēnei: ‘Kia riro tāna mahi tiro­tiro i tētahi atu.’
1.21: “Nō reira, ko ngā tāngata i haere tahi nei tātou, i ngā wā katoa i hāere­ere mai ai, i hāere­ere atu ai te Ariki, a Īhu i roto i a tātou,
1.22: hei te iri­iri­nga a Hoani tīmata ai, ā tae noa ki te rā i tango­hia atu ai ia i a tātou, me whaka­tū tētahi o ērā hei hoa mō tātou ki te whaka­atu i tōna aranga mai.”
1.23: Ā, toko­rua a rātou i whaka­rite ai, ko Hōhepa i huaina nei ko Pāhapa, ko tētahi o ōna ingoa ko Hutuha, rāua ko Matiaha.
1.24: Nā, ka īnoi rātou, ka mea, “Ko koe, e te Ariki, e mōhio ana ki ngā ngākau o te katoa, māu e whaka­atu ko wai o tēnei toko­rua tāu i whiri­whiri ai,
1.25: hei tango i te wāhi i tēnei mahi minita, i te tū­ranga āpō­toro hoki, i taka atu a Hūrā, he mea kia haere ai ia ki tōna wāhi.”
1.26: Nā, ka makā e rātou ō rāua rota; ā, ka tau te rota ki a Matiaha; ā, uru ana ia ki ngā āpō­toro tekau mā tahi.

2.1: Ā, nō ka taka mai te rā o te Petekoha, e noho tahi ana rātou katoa i te wāhi kotahi.
2.2: Nā, puta whaka­rere mai ana he haruru nui nō te rangi, ānō he hau nui e keri ana, ā, kī katoa te whare i noho ai rātou.
2.3: Heoi, puta mai ana ki a rātou ētahi arero he mea manga­nga, ānō he ahi, ā, tau iho ana ki runga ki tēnei, ki tēnei o rātou.
2.4: Nā, kī katoa rātou i te Wairua Tapu, ā, ka tīmata te kōrero rere­kē ana ngā reo, rite tonu ki tā te Wairua i hoatu ai ki a rātou kia kōrero­tia.
2.5: I Hiruhārama anō e noho ana ētahi Hūrai, he hunga whaka­aro, nō ngā iwi katoa i raro o te rangi.
2.6: Nā, i te wā i rangona ai taua haruru, ka whaka­rā­po­poto te mano, ka poro­raru, nō te mea ka rangona e tērā, e tērā, tōna reo e kōrero­tia ana e rātou.
2.7: Nā, ka oho rātou katoa, ka mīharo, ka mea, “Nā, ehara ianei ēnei katoa e kōrero nei i te hunga nō Kariri?
2.8: He aha tātou ka rongo nei, ia tangata, ia tangata, i ō tātou reo o tō tātou whānau­tanga?
2.9: Ko te hunga o Patia, o Meria, o Erama, ko ngā mea e noho ana i Mehopotamia, i Hūria, i Kaparokia, i Ponoto, i Āhia,
2.10: i Perikia, i Pamapu­ria, i Īhipa, i ngā wāhi o Ripia e pātata ana ki Hairini, me ngā manu­hiri o Roma, ngā Hūrai, ngā poro­hira­iti,
2.11: ngā Kariti, ngā Ārapi, e rongo ana tātou i a rātou e whaka­puaki ana i ngā mahi tohu a te Atua, nō tātou anō ngā reo.”
2.12: Ā, mīharo katoa ana rātou, pōhēhē ana, ka mea tētahi ki tētahi, “He aha tēnei?”
2.13: Ko ētahi i tāwai, i mea, “E kī ana rātou i te wāina hou!” Te Kupu a Pita
2.14: Otirā, ka whaka­tika a Pita me te tekau mā tahi, ka hiki­tia tōna reo, ka whai kupu ki a rātou, “E ngā tāngata o Hūria, me koutou katoa e noho nei i Hiruhārama, kia mōhio koutou ki tēnei, kia whai tari­nga mai ki āku kupu.
2.15: Kāhore hoki o ēnei hau­rangi me tā koutou e whaka­aro nei, ko te toru noa hoki tēnei o ngā hāora o te rā.
2.16: Engari, ko te mea tēnei i kōrero­tia e Hoera poro­piti:
2.17: ‘Ā, tēnei ake kei ngā rā whaka­mutu­nga, e ai tā te Atua, ka ringi­hia e ahau tōku Wairua ki ngā kiko­kiko katoa; ka poro­piti hoki ā koutou tama, ā koutou tamā­hine, e kite anō ā koutou tai­tama­riki i ngā kite­nga, ka moe­moeā hoki ō koutou kaumātua.
2.18: Āe, ka ringi­hia anō e ahau tōku Wairua i aua rā, ki āku pono­nga tāne, ki āku pono­nga wāhine; ā, ka poro­piti rātou.
2.19: Ka whaka­kitea anō e ahau ngā mea whaka­mīharo i te rangi i runga, me ngā tohu ki te whenua i raro; he toto, he kāpura, he paowa po­ngere.
2.20: Ko te rā ka huri hei pōuri, ko te marama hoki hei toto, i mua o te pu­tanga mai o te rā o te Ariki, taua rā nui whaka­hara­hara, rongo­nui.
2.21: Nā, ko reira ora ai te hunga katoa e karanga ana ki te ingoa o te Ariki.’
2.22: “E ngā tāngata o Īharaira, kia rongo koutou ki ēnei kupu; Ko Īhu o Nahareta, he tangata i tino whai­tohu­ngia e te Atua ki a koutou i runga i ngā mere­kara, i ngā mea whaka­mīharo, i ngā tohu i mea ai te Atua kia mahia e ia i waenga­nui o koutou, e mōhio ana anō rā koutou.
2.23: Ko tēnei tangata i tukua atu, he mea i āta whaka­aroa, ā, i mōhio­tia noatia ake e te Atua, tango­hia ana e koutou, whaka­matea iho, he mea rīpeka nā te ringa o ngā tāngata kino.
2.24: Nā te Atua ia i whaka­ara ake, nāna i wewete ngā mamae o te mate; nō te mea e kore ia e taea te pupuri e taua mate.
2.25: Ko tā Rāwiri kōrero hoki tēnei mōna: ‘I kite ahau i te Ariki i mua i tōku aro­aro i ngā rā katoa; kei tōku ringa matau nei ia, e kore ai ahau e whaka­kori­koria.
2.26: Koia i koa ai tōku ngākau, i whaka­mana­mana ai tōku arero; i takoto tū­mana­ko ai anō ōku kiko­kiko.
2.27: Nō te mea e kore e waiho e koe tōku wairua i te rēinga, e kore anō e tukua tāu Mea Tapu kia kite i te pirau.
2.28: Kua whaka­kitea e koe ki ahau ngā hua­rahi o te ora; ka meinga e koe kia kī tonu tōku koa i tōu aro­aro.’
2.29: “E ōku tēina, e tika ana kia aronui he kupu ki a koutou mō te tupuna nei mō Rāwiri, arā kua mate ia, kua tanu­mia, kei a tātou anō tōna urupā, ā, taea noatia tēnei rā.
2.30: I te mea he poro­piti ia, ā, i mōhio kua oati te Atua i te oati ki a ia, ka whaka­puta­ina ake tētahi, he hua nō tōna hope, hei noho ki runga ki tōna torōna.
2.31: Ā, i tāna kite wawe i tēnei, kōrero­tia ana e ia te aranga o te Karaiti, arā: ‘Kīhai tōna wairua i waiho i te rēinga, kīhai anō tōna kiko­kiko i kite i te pirau.’
2.32: Kua whaka­ara­hia ake tēnei Īhu e te Atua: ko mātou katoa ngā kai­whaka­atu.
2.33: Ā, ka oti nei ia te whaka­nui e te ringa matau o te Atua, ā, ka hōmai nei ki a ia e te Matua te Wairua Tapu i kōrero­tia rā i mua, nā, kua ringi­hia mai e ia tēnei, e kite nei, e rongo nei koutou.
2.34: Kāhore hoki a Rāwiri i kake ki te rangi; heoi, e mea ana ia: ‘I mea te Ariki ki tōku Ariki, Hei tōku matau koe noho ai,
2.35: kia meinga rā anō e ahau ōu hoa­riri hei tū­ranga wae­wae mōu.’
2.36: “Nō reira rā, kia mātau pū te whare katoa o Īharaira, kua meinga e te Atua hei Ariki, hei Karaiti, taua Īhu i rīpeka­tia nā e koutou.”
2.37: Nō rātou ka rongo, ka wero­wero i roto i ō rātou ngākau, ka mea ki a Pita rātou ko ērā atu āpō­toro, “E ngā tuā­kana, me aha mātou?”
2.38: Nā, ko te mea­tanga a Pita ki a rātou, “Rīpenetā, kia iri­iria, tēnā tangata, tēnā tangata o koutou i runga i te ingoa o Īhu Karaiti, hei muru­nga hara; ā, ka riro i a koutou te mea hōmai, arā te Wairua Tapu.
2.39: Ki a koutou hoki, ki ā koutou tama­riki, te kupu hōmai, ki te hunga katoa anō o tawhiti, ki ngā mea e karanga­tia e te Ariki, e tō tātou Atua, ki a ia.”
2.40: He maha atu anō ngā kupu i kōrero ai, i kauwhau ai ia, i mea ai, “Me whaka­ora koutou i a koutou i tēnei whaka­tupu­ranga parori kē.”
2.41: Nā, ko ngā mea tonu i tango i tāna kupu i iri­iria, me te mea e toru mano ngā wairua i honoa mai ki a rātou i taua rā.
2.42: Ā, i ū tonu rātou ki te whaka­ako­ranga a ngā āpō­toro, ki te kotahi­tanga, ki te whawhati taro, ā, ki te īnoi. Te Ora i waenga o te Hunga Whakapono
2.43: Tau iho ana te wehi ki ngā wairua katoa; he maha hoki ngā mea whaka­mīharo me ngā tohu i meinga e ngā āpō­toro.
2.44: I noho tahi anō te hunga whaka­pono katoa, i hui­huia anō hoki ā rātou mea katoa;
2.45: i hokona atu hoki ā rātou rawa me ngā taonga, tu­whai­na ana mā te katoa, rite tonu, ki te mate o tēnei, o tēnei.
2.46: Haere tonu ana hoki rātou i tēnei rā, i tēnei rā ki te teme­para, kotahi tonu anō te whaka­aro; whawhati taro ana i ō rātou kāinga, kai ana i ā rātou kai i runga i te koa, i te ngākau tapa­tahi;
2.47: e whaka­moe­miti ana ki te Atua, e pai­ngia ana hoki e te iwi katoa. Ā, honoa mai ana e te Ariki ki a rātou i tēnā rā, i tēnā rā, i tēnā rā, te hunga e whaka­ora­ngia ana.

3.1: Nā, e haere tahi atu ana a Pita rāua ko Hoani ki te teme­para i te hāora īnoi, i te iwa o ngā hāora.
3.2: Nā, ka kawea mai tētahi tangata, he kopa nō te kōpū mai anō o tōna whaea, he mea whaka­takoto i ngā rā katoa ki te kūwaha o te teme­para i huaina nei ko Āta­ahua, ki te tono mea māna i te hunga e tomo ana ki te teme­para.
3.3: Nō tōna kite­nga i a Pita rāua ko Hoani meāke tomo ki te teme­para, ka tono ia i tētahi mea māna.
3.4: Nā, ka whaka­mau atu ngā kanohi o Pita rāua ko Hoani ki a ia, ka mea, “Ti­tiro mai ki a māua.”
3.5: Ka whaka­rongo ia ki a rāua, hua noa e riro mai tētahi mea a rāua māna.
3.6: Anō rā ko Pita, “Ko te hiriwa me te kōura kāhore i ahau; ko te mea ia kei ahau, māku tēnā e hoatu ki a koe; i runga i te ingoa o Īhu Karaiti o Nahareta, whaka­tika, haere.”
3.7: Kātahi ia ka hopu i tōna ringa matau ka whaka­ara ake i a ia. I reira tonu kua whai kaha ōna wae­wae me ngā pona.
3.8: Ā, ko tōna mawhiti­tanga ake, ka tū, ka tīmata te haere, tomo tahi ana me rāua ki te teme­para, e haere ana, tūpeke ana, e whaka­moe­miti ana ki te Atua.
3.9: Ā, i kite te iwi katoa i a ia e haere ana, e whaka­moe­miti ana ki te Atua.
3.10: Kātahi rātou ka mōhio ki a ia, ko ia anō tērā i noho rā ki te tatau Āta­ahua o te teme­para, tono mea ai māna; nā, nui atu tō rātou mīharo me te ihi­ihi ki taua mea i pā ki a ia. Te Kupu a Pita i roto i te Temepara
3.11: I a ia e pupuri ana ki a Pita rāua ko Hoani, ka oma atu te iwi katoa ki a rātou i te whaka­mahau i huaina nei ko tā Horomona, nui rawa te whaka­mīharo.
3.12: Ā, i te kite­nga o Pita, ka whai kupu atu ia ki te iwi, “E ngā tāngata o Īharaira, he aha tā koutou e mīharo nei ki tēnei tangata? He aha hoki koutou ka whaka­mau ai te ti­tiro ki a māua, me te mea he mana nō māua ake he ngākau kara­kia rānei i meatia ai ia kia haere?
3.13: Nā te Atua o Āperahama, o Īhaka, o Hākopa, nā te Atua o ō tātou mātua, i whaka­korōria tāna Tama a Īhu; ko tā koutou i tuku nā, i whaka­kāhore nā i te aro­aro o Pirato, kua oti rā i a ia kia tukua ia.
3.14: Otirā, whaka­kāhore­tia ana e koutou te Mea Tapu, te Mea Tika, tonoa ana ko te tangata kōhuru kia hōmai ki a koutou.
3.15: Patua ana hoki e koutou te Take o te Ora; kua whaka­ara­hia nei ia e te Atua i te hunga mate, ko mātou nei ōna kai­whaka­atu.
3.16: Ā, nā te whaka­pono ki tōna ingoa i meinga ai e tōna ingoa tēnei tangata kia kaha, e kite nei, e mātau nei koutou; āe rā, ko te whaka­pono ki a ia te mea nāna i hoatu tēnei ora nui ki tēnei i te aro­aro o koutou katoa.
3.17: “Nā, e ōku tēina, e mahara ana ahau nā te kūware tēnā mahi a koutou, pērā i tā ō koutou ranga­tira.
3.18: Engari, ko ngā mea a te Atua i whaka­kitea i mua e te māngai o ngā poro­piti katoa, mō tāna Karaiti kia whaka­mamae­tia, kua rite ēnei i a ia.
3.19: Nō reira, rīpe­netā, ā, tahuri mai anō koutou, kia murua ai ō koutou hara, kia puta mai ai i te aro­aro o te Ariki he wā whaka­hauora.
3.20: Ā, kia tonoa mai ai e ia te Karaiti i whaka­ritea nei mō koutou, arā a Īhu.
3.21: Kua takoto nei te tikanga kia noho ia ki te rangi ā taea noatia ngā wā o te whaka­hoki­nga mai o ngā mea katoa, i kōrero ai te Atua rā te māngai o āna poro­piti tapu nō te tīma­tanga mai anō o te ao.
3.22: I mea rā hoki a Mohi, ‘Mā te Ariki, mā te Atua, e whaka­ara ake he poro­piti mō koutou i roto i ō koutou tēina, he pēnei anō me ahau. Ko ia tā koutou e whaka­rongo ai i ngā mea katoa e mea ai ia ki a koutou.
3.23: Ā taua wā, ko ngā wairua katoa e kore e whaka­rongo ki taua poro­piti, ka whaka­matea rawa­tia i roto i te iwi.’
3.24: Āe rā, ko ngā poro­piti katoa o Hamuera iho anō, tae mai ki ō muri nei, ko te hunga katoa i kōrero, i whaka­atu anō hoki rātou i ngā rā nei.
3.25: Ko koutou aua tama a ngā poro­piti, a te kawe­nata hoki i whaka­takoto­ria e te Atua ki ō koutou mātua, i mea rā ia ki a Āperahama, ‘Mā tōu uri ka manaaki­tia ai ngā hapū katoa o te ao.’
3.26: Mō koutou kē hoki i te tua­tahi, i tāna whaka­aranga ake ai i tāna Tama, i te tono­nga mai nei a te Atua i a ia ki a koutou hei manaaki i a koutou, hei i whaka­tahuri i tēnei, i tēnei o koutou i ō koutou kino.”

4.1: Ā, i a rāua e kōrero ana ki te iwi, ka puta oho­rere mai ki a rāua ngā tohu­nga, te ranga­tira o te teme­para me ngā Haruki
4.2: he nui te pāwera mō tā rāua ako i te iwi, mō te kauwhau hoki i runga i a Īhu i te aranga mai i te hunga mate.
4.3: Nā, ka mau ō rātou ringa ki a rāua, meinga ana kia tiaki­na kia ao rā anō te rā, i te mea hoki kua ahi­ahi.
4.4: Otirā, he toko­maha o te hunga i rongo i te kupu i whaka­pono, ā, ko te toko­maha o ngā tāngata me te mea e rima mano.
4.5: Nā, i te aonga ake ka hui­hui ō rātou ranga­tira, ngā kaumātua, me ngā kara­ipi ki Hiruhārama,
4.6: rātou ko te tino tohu­nga, ko Anaha, ko Kaiapa, ko Hoani, ko Arēhanara, me ngā whanau­nga katoa o te tohu­nga nui.
4.7: Ā, nō ka whaka­tū­ria rāua ki waenga­nui, ka ui rātou, “Tēnā koa te mana, te ingoa rānei, i meatia ai tēnei e kōrua?”
4.8: Kātahi a Pita, kī tonu i te Wairua Tapu, ka mea ki a rātou, “E ngā ranga­tira o te iwi, e ngā kaumātua:
4.9: me­he­mea ki te uiuia māua āia­nei mō te mahi pai i mahia ki te tangata hauā, i pēhea­tia taua tangata i ora ai.
4.10: Kia mōhio koutou katoa, me te iwi katoa o Īharaira, nā te ingoa o Īhu Karaiti o Nahareta, i rīpeka­tia nā e koutou, i whaka­ara­hia rā e te Atua i te hunga mate, nāna tēnei i tū ora ai i tō koutou aro­aro.
4.11: Ko ia ‘te kōhatu i whaka­kāhore­tia nā e koutou, e ngā kai­hanga, ā, kua meinga nei hei ūpoko mō te koko­nga.’
4.12: Kāhore hoki he ora i tētahi atu; kāhore hoki he ingoa kē atu i raro o te rangi kua hōmai ki ngā tāngata, e ora ai tātou.”
4.13: Nā, ka kite rātou i te māia o Pita rāua ko Hoani, ā, ka mātau ki a rāua ehara i te mea whaka­ako, engari, he hunga kūware, ka mīharo rātou; ka mōhio hoki he hoa rāua nō Īhu.
4.14: Ka kite hoki i te tangata i whaka­ora­ngia e tū tahi ana rātou, kāhore rawa i taea tētahi kupu whaka­hē mā rātou.
4.15: Nā, ka tono rātou i a rāua kia haere ki waho o te rū­nanga, ā, ka kōrero­rero ki a rātou anō,
4.16: ka mea, “Me aha e tātou ēnei tāngata? Ka kite katoa nei hoki te hunga e noho ana i Hiruhārama, he mere­kara nui kua meinga nei, ā, e kore e āhei te whākore­kore e tātou.
4.17: Otiia, kia kaua ai e hōrapa atu ki roto ki te iwi, kia kaha tā tātou whaka­wehi i a rāua kei kōrero ki tētahi tangata ā muri nei i runga i tēnei ingoa.”
4.18: Ā, karanga­tia ana rāua e rātou, ka mea ki a rāua “Kia kaua rawa e kōrero, kia kaua e whaka­ako, i runga i te ingoa o Īhu.”
4.19: Nā, ka whaka­hoki a Pita rāua ko Hoani ki a rātou, ka mea, “Whaka­aroa e koutou, ka tika rānei ki te aro­aro o te Atua ko koutou kia whaka­rangona, kaua te Atua?
4.20: E kore hoki e āhei kia kaua e kōrero­tia e māua ngā mea i kite ai, i rongo ai mātou.”
4.21: Heoi, whaka­wehi ana anō rātou i a rāua, ā, tukua ana kia haere, kīhai hoki i kitea he mea e whiua ai rāua, i wehi i te iwi; i whaka­korōria katoa nei ngā tāngata i te Atua mō taua mea i meatia.
4.22: Nō te mea kua neke atu i te whā tekau ngā tau o te tangata i meinga nei ki a ia tēnei mere­kara whaka­ora. Ka Īnoi te Hunga Whakapono kia Māia
4.23: Ā, ka oti rāua te tuku, ka haere ki ō rāua hoa, ā, kōrero­tia ana ngā mea katoa i kōrero ai ngā tohu­nga nui me ngā kaumātua ki a rāua.
4.24: Ā, i tō rātou rongo­nga, ka karanga ake rātou ki te Atua, he kotahi te reo, ka mea: “E te Ariki, nāu nei i hanga te rangi me te whenua, te moana, me ō reira mea katoa;
4.25: nāu te kupu i kōrero­tia e te Wairua Tapu, nā te māngai o tō mātou matua, o tāu pono­nga, o Rāwiri: ‘He aha ka nana ai ngā tauiwi, ka whaka­aro hori­hori ai ngā iwi?
4.26: I whaka­tika ake ngā kīngi o te whenua, i hui­hui ngā­tahi ngā ranga­tira, ki te whawhai ki te Ariki rāua ko tāna Karaiti.’
4.27: He pono nei hoki te hui­hui­nga ki tēnei pā o Herora, o Ponotio Pirato, o ngā tauiwi, rātou ko te iwi o Īharaira, ki tāu tama tapu, ki a Īhu i whaka­wahia nei e koe,
4.28: ki te mea i tā tōu ringa, i tā tōu whaka­aro i whaka­takoto ai i mua kia meatia.
4.29: Nā, ti­tiro iho, e te Ariki, āia­nei ki ā rātou kupu whaka­wehi. Tukua mai hoki ki au pono­nga kia tino māia te kōrero i tāu kupu.
4.30: Ko koe ia e totoro mai ana tōu ringa ki te whaka­ora; kia meatia hoki he tohu, he mea whaka­mīharo i runga i te ingoa o tāu Pono­nga tapu, o Īhu.”
4.31: I te mutu­nga o tā rātou īnoi, ka ngā­ueue te wāhi i mine ai rātou, ā, kī katoa rātou i te Wairua Tapu, nā, māia noa atu rātou ki te kōrero i te kupu a te Atua. Ka Tuwhaia te Hunga Whakapono i ā Rātou Taonga
4.32: Kotahi anō ngākau, kotahi anō wairua o te mano o te hunga whaka­pono. Kīhai anō tētahi o rātou i mea, māna ake tētahi o āna taonga; heoi he mea hui­hui ā rātou mea katoa.
4.33: Ā, nui atu te kaha i whaka­pua­kina ai e ngā āpō­toro te aranga o te Ariki, o Īhu; he nui anō te aroha noa i runga i a rātou katoa.
4.34: Kāhore hoki tētahi o rātou i hapa; ko te hunga hoki he kāinga, he whare ō rātou, hokona atu ana e rātou, ā, mauria ana mai ngā utu o ngā mea i hokona,
4.35: whaka­takoto­ria ana ki ngā wae­wae o ngā āpō­toro. Nā, ka tu­whai­na mā ia tangata, mā ia tangata, he mea whaka­rite ki te mate o ia tangata.
4.36: Ā, ko Hohi i huaina e ngā āpō­toro ko Pānapa, (ko te tikanga tēnei ina whaka­māori­tia, ko te Tama a te Whaka­mārie­tanga,) he Rīwaiti, ko Kai­peru tōna kāinga.
4.37: He wāhi whenua tōna, nā, hokona atu ana, mauria ana ngā moni, whaka­takoto­ria ana ki ngā wae­wae o ngā āpō­toro.

5.1: Nā, ko tētahi tangata ko Anania tōna ingoa, rāua ko tāna wahine, ko Hapaira, i hoko atu i tētahi whenua.
5.2: Ā, puri­tia ana e ia tētahi wāhi o te utu, ko tāna wahine hoki i mōhio ki taua mea huna, mauria ana tētahi wāhi, whaka­takoto­ria ana ki ngā wae­wae o ngā āpō­toro.
5.3: Nā, ko te mea­tanga atu a Pita, “E Anania, nā te aha i whaka­kīa ai tōu ngākau e Hātana kia teka koe ki te Wairua Tapu, kia puri­tia atu ai tētahi wāhi o te utu o te whenua?
5.4: I te mea kāhore anō i riro, he teka ianei nāu ake tāu mea? Ā, ka oti te hoko atu he teka ianei kei a koe tonu te tikanga? Nā te aha tēnei mea i whaka­aroa ai i roto i tōu ngākau? Kīhai hoki koe i teka ki te tangata, engari ki te Atua.”
5.5: Ā, nō te rongo­nga o Anania i ēnei kupu, hinga ana ki raro, mate rawa. He nui anō te wehi i tau ki te hunga katoa i rongo i ēnei mea.
5.6: Nā, ka whaka­tika ngā tai­tama­riki, takai ana i a ia, ā, maua atu ana ia ki waho, tanu­mia ana.
5.7: Ā, pātata ki te toru hāora i muri, ka tomo mai tāna wahine, kīhai hoki i mōhio he aha te mea kua meatia.
5.8: Nā, ko te mea­tanga a Pita ki a ia, “Kōrero mai ki ahau, ko te utu rānei tērā i hokona atu ai e kōrua te whenua?” Ka mea ia, “Āe, koia tēnā.”
5.9: Ka mea a Pita ki a ia, “He aha kōrua i whaka­aro tahi ai ki te whaka­mā­tau­tau i te Wairua o te Ariki? Nana, kei te kūwaha ngā wae­wae o te hunga i tanu­mia ai tāu tāne, mā rātou koe e kawe ki waho.”
5.10: Nā, hinga tonu iho ia ki ōna wae­wae, hemo rawa. Ā, ko te tomo­nga mai o ngā tai­tama­riki, roko­hanga mai kua mate, nā kawea ana ia ki waho, tanu­mia ana ki te taha o tāna tāne.
5.11: Ā, nui atu te wehi o te hāhi katoa, o te hunga katoa anō i rangona ai ēnei mea. Ngā Tohu me ngā Mea Whakamīharo
5.12: Ā, nā ngā ringa o ngā āpō­toro i mahi ngā tohu maha, me ngā mea whaka­mīharo, i roto i te iwi; i noho hoki rātou katoa ki te whaka­mahau o Horomona, kotahi anō te whaka­aro.
5.13: Tēnā ko ērā atu tāngata kīhai rawa tētahi i māia ki te whaka­uru mai ki a rātou; otirā, whaka­nuia ana rātou e te iwi.
5.14: Ā, he nui noa atu te hunga whaka­pono i honoa mai ki te Ariki, tōna tini o te tāne, o te wāhine.
5.15: Nā reira hoki, ka mauria e rātou ngā tūroro ki ngā ara, whaka­takoto­ria ana ki runga i ngā moenga, i ngā whā­riki, me kore noa e tau­maru­maru iho ki tētahi o rātou te ātā­rangi o Pita, i a ia e haere ana.
5.16: I hui katoa mai anō te mano i ngā pā katoa e pātata ana ki Hiruhārama, me te mau mai i ngā tūroro, i te hunga e whaka­pō­rea­rea­tia ana e ngā wairua poke; ā, whaka­ora­ngia ana rātou katoa. Ka Whakawhiungia ngā Āpōtoro
5.17: Me i reira ka whaka­tika te tohu­nga nui rātou ko ōna hoa katoa, arā te wehe­nga ki ngā Haruki, kī tonu hoki rātou i te hae.
5.18: Ā, ka pā ō rātou ringa ki ngā āpō­toro, makā ana rātou ki te whare here­here nui.
5.19: Otirā, nā tētahi ana­hera a te Ariki i uaki ngā tatau o te whare here­here i te pō; āra­hina mai ana rātou e ia ki waho, ka mea,
5.20: “Haere, e tū i roto i te teme­para, ka kōrero ki te iwi i ngā kupu katoa o tēnei ora.”
5.21: Ā, ka rongo rātou i tēnei, ka tomo ki te teme­para i te atatū, ka whaka­ako. Nā, ko te haere­nga o te tohu­nga nui rātou ko ōna hoa, karanga­tia ana kia hui­hui te rū­nanga me ngā kaumātua katoa o ngā tama a Īharaira, ā, tonoa ana he tangata ki te whare here­here hei tiki i a rātou.
5.22: Otirā, ko ngā kātipa i tae mai, kīhai i kite i a rātou i roto i te whare here­here, nā, ka hoki mai, ka kōrero,
5.23: ka mea, “Rokohina atu e mātou e tūtaki tonu ana te whare here­here ū tonu, me ngā kai­tiaki e tū ana i waho o ngā tatau; nō te hua­kanga atu, kāhore he tangata i kitea e mātou i roto.”
5.24: Ā, nō ka rongo te ranga­tira o te teme­para rātou ko ngā tohu­nga nui ki ēnei kupu, ka poro­raru rātou, he aha rā te tuku­nga iho o taua mea.
5.25: Nā, ko te haere­nga mai o tētahi, ka kōrero ki a rātou, ka mea, “Nana, ko te hunga i makā rā e koutou ki te whare here­here, e tū mai nei i te teme­para, e whaka­ako ana i te iwi!”
5.26: Kātahi, ka haere te ranga­tira rātou ko ngā kātipa, ā, āra­hina mai ana rātou, otirā, kīhai i taka­kino­tia; i wehi hoki rātou i te iwi, kei ākina rātou ki te kōhatu.
5.27: Ā, ka oti rātou te ārahi mai, ka whaka­tū­ria ki mua i te rū­nanga. Nā, ka ui te tohu­nga nui ki a rātou,
5.28: ka mea, “Kīhai ianei mātou i āta whaka­tūpato i a koutou kia kaua e whaka­ako i runga i tēnei ingoa? Nā, kua kī nei Hiruhārama i tā koutou whaka­ako­ranga, ā, e mea ana koutou kia whaka­iria ngā toto o tēnei tangata ki runga i a mātou.”
5.29: Nā, ka whaka­hoki a Pita rātou ko ngā āpō­toro, ka mea, “Me whaka­rongo rā mātou ki te Atua, kaua ki te tangata.
5.30: Nā te Atua o ō tātou tūpuna i whaka­ara ake a Īhu, i whaka­matea nā e koutou, he mea whaka­iri ki te rākau.
5.31: Kua oti ia te whaka­noho e te ringa matau o te Atua ki runga, hei Piriniha, hei Kai­whaka­ora, hei hōmai i te rīpe­netā, i te muru­nga hara ki a Īharaira.
5.32: Ko mātou anō ngā kai­whaka­atu i ēnei mea; ko te Wairua Tapu hoki, i hōmai nei e te Atua ki te hunga e rongo ana ki a ia.”
5.33: Otirā, i tō rātou rongo­nga i tēnei, tū tonu ki ō rātou ngākau, ā, ka whaka­aro kia whaka­matea rātou.
5.34: Nā, ka whaka­tika tētahi o ngā Parihi i roto i te rū­nanga, ko Kamariera te ingoa, he kai­whaka­ako i te ture, he tangata e whaka­nuia ana e te iwi katoa, ka mea, kia neke­hia atu aua tāngata ki waho mō tētahi wā poto nei.
5.35: Nā, ko tāna mea­tanga ki a rātou, “E ngā tāngata o Īharaira, kia tūpato ki tā koutou e mea ai ki ēnei tāngata.
5.36: I ngā rā ki muri ka whaka­tika ake a Teura, me te whaka­ari i a ia, ko ia he tangata nui; piri atu ana ki a ia ētahi tāngata, pātata ki te whā rau. Nā patua iho ia; ā, ko te hunga katoa i whaka­rongo ki a ia, whaka­marara­tia atu ana, ā, kore ake.
5.37: Ā muri iho i taua tangata ka whaka­tika ake ko Hūrā o Kariri i ngā rā o te tatau­ranga, ā, kūmea atu ana e ia ētahi o te iwi ki te whai i a ia; i ngaro anō hoki tēnā; ā, ko te hunga katoa i whaka­rongo ki a ia, whaka­marara­tia atu ana.
5.38: Nā, ko tāku kupu tēnei ki a koutou, kāti te mea ki ēnei tāngata. Waiho noa iho rātou! Ki te mea hoki nā te tangata tēnei whaka­aro, tēnei mahi, tērā e whaka­kāhore­tia,
5.39: otirā, me­he­mea nā te Atua, e kore rawa e taea e koutou te whaka­kāhore. Kei tūpono hoki e whawhai kē ana koutou ki te Atua!”
5.40: Ā, whaka­ae ana rātou ki a ia; nā, ka karanga­tia ngā āpō­toro ki a rātou, ka whiua, ka whaka­tūpato­ria kia kaua rawa e kōrero i runga i te ingoa o Īhu, ā, tukua ana rātou kia haere.
5.41: Heoi, haere hari atu ana rātou i te aro­aro o te rū­nanga, mō rātou kua meinga e pai ana kia whaka­tau­reka­reka­tia mō te Ingoa.
5.42: Ā, i ngā rā katoa, i roto i te teme­para, i ngā kāinga rānei, kāhore e mutu ana tā rātou whaka­ako, tā rātou kauwhau i a Īhu, ko te Karaiti ia.

6.1: Nā, i aua rā, i te mea ka toko­maha haere ngā ākonga ka amu­amu ngā Hūrai Kariki ki ngā Hiperu, nō te mea i mahue ō rātou pouaru i ngā tūw­hanga mea o tēnei rā, o tēnei rā.
6.2: Kātahi, ka karanga­tia e te tekau mā rua te mano o ngā ākonga, ka mea, “E kore e pai kia whaka­rērea e mātou te kupu a te Atua, ā, kia mahi tēpu.
6.3: Nō reira, e ngā tēina, tiro­hia mai i roto i a koutou kia toko­whitu ngā tāngata e kōrero­tia paitia ana, e kī ana i te Wairua Tapu, i te mātau­ranga, ā, mā mātou rātou e whaka­tū ki tēnei mahi.
6.4: Ko mātou ia ka ū tonu ki te īnoi, ki te mahi i te kupu.”
6.5: Ā, pai katoa te mano ki taua kōrero; nā, whiri­whiria ana e rātou a Tepene, he tangata e kī ana i te whaka­pono, i te Wairua Tapu, rātou ko Piripi, ko Porokoru, ko Nikanora, ko Timona, ko Paramena, ko Nīkora, he poro­hira­iti nō Anatioka.
6.6: Nā, whaka­tū­ria ana rātou ki te aro­aro o ngā āpō­toro; ka īnoi ērā, ka whaka­pā i ngā ringa ki runga ki a rātou.
6.7: Heoi, tupu ana te kupu a te Atua. Tino nui haere ana te toko­maha o ngā ākonga i Hiruhārama; ā, he ope nui o ngā tohu­nga i tahuri mai ki te whaka­pono. Te Hopukanga o Tepene
6.8: Ā, ko Tepene, kī tonu i te whaka­pono, i te mana, nui atu ngā mere­kara me ngā tohu i meatia e ia i roto i te iwi.
6.9: Nā, ka whaka­tika ētahi o te whaka­mine­nga, e kīa nei ko te whaka­mine­nga o ngā Riperetini, ētahi hoki o te whaka­mine­nga o te hunga o Hairini, o te hunga o Arehāna­ria, o te hunga hoki o Kiri­kia, o Āhia, ka totohe ki a Tepene.
6.10: Otirā, kīhai i taea e rātou te tū atu ki tōna mātau­ranga me te wairua i kōrero ai ia.
6.11: Nā, ka whaka­kīkī rātou i ētahi tāngata hei mea, “I rongo mātou i a ia e kōrero kohu­kohu ana mō Mohi, mō te Atua anō hoki.”
6.12: Nā, ka tahuri rātou ki te whaka­oho­oho i te iwi, i ngā kaumātua, me ngā kara­ipi hoki, nā, ka mau ia i a rātou, hopu­kia ana, kawea atu ana ki te rū­nanga.
6.13: Ā, whaka­tū­ria ana e rātou ētahi kai­whaka­pae teka, nāna i mea, “Kāhore e mutu te kōrero kino a tēnei tangata mō tēnei kāinga tapu, mō te ture hoki;
6.14: i rongo hoki mātou ki a ia e mea ana, ‘Mā tēnei Īhu o Nahareta e whaka­ngaro te kāinga nei, e whaka­puta kē hoki ngā rite­nga i hōmai e Mohi ki a tātou.’ ”
6.15: Ā, ko te hunga katoa e noho ana i te rū­nanga, ka ti­tiro pū ki a ia, ka kite i tōna mata, ānō he mata nō te ana­hera.

7.1: Kātahi, ka mea te tohu­nga nui, “He pono rānei ēnei mea?”
7.2: Nā, ka mea ia, “E ngā tēina, e ngā mātua, whaka­rongo mai. I puta te Atua o te korōria ki tō tātou matua, ki a Āperahama, i a ia i Mehopotamia, ā, kīanō i noho ki Harana,
7.3: ka mea ki a ia, ‘Haere atu i tōu whenua, i ōu whanau­nga, ā, e tomo ki te whenua e whaka­kitea e ahau ki a koe.’
7.4: Nā, puta mai ana ia i te whenua o ngā Karari, noho ana ki Harana. Ā, nō te mate­nga o tōna pāpā, ka whaka­hekea mai ia i reira e te Atua ki tēnei whenua e noho nei koutou.
7.5: Ā, kīhai i hoatu tētahi kāinga mōna i konei, kore rawa, ahakoa he tū­ranga wae­wae noa; heoi, i oati ia, tērā e hōmai a konei hei kāinga mōna, mō tōna uri hoki i muri i a ia, ahakoa rā i taua wā kāhore āna tama­riki.
7.6: Ā, i pēnei te kōrero a te Atua, ‘Tērā tōna uri e noho manene ki te whenua kē; ka meinga hoki hei pono­nga, ā, e whā rau tau e tūkino­tia ana.
7.7: Nā, ko te iwi e meinga ai rātou hei pono­nga, ka whaka­wā­kia e ahau,’ e ai tā te Atua, ‘muri iho i tēnei ka puta mai rātou, ā, ka mahi ki ahau i tēnei wāhi.’
7.8: Ā, i hōmai anō e ia ki a ia te kawe­nata o te kotinga. Ā, whānau ake tā Āperahama ko Īhaka, ā, i te waru o ngā rā ka kotia; ā, nā Īhaka ko Hākopa; nā Hākopa hoki ngā tūpuna kotahi tekau mā rua.
7.9: “Nā, ka hae ngā tūpuna ki a Hōhepa, ā, hokona ana ia ki Īhipa; otirā i a ia te Atua;
7.10: nāna ia i whaka­ora i ōna mate­nga katoa, ā, hoatu ana ki a ia he pai, he mātau­ranga i te aro­aro o Parao kīngi o Īhipa; ā, meinga ana ia e tērā hei kāwana mō Īhipa, mō tōna whare katoa hoki.
7.11: Nā, i reira ka puta he matekai ki te whenua katoa o Īhipa, o Kanaana, ā, he mate nui; kīhai rawa i kitea he oranga e ō tātou mātua.
7.12: Ā, nō te rongo­nga o Hākopa, e whai wīti ana a Īhipa, ka tonoa e ia ō tātou mātua, ko te tono­nga tua­tahi.
7.13: Ā, nō te tono­nga tuarua, ka whaka­mōhio­tia a Hōhepa ki ōna tuā­kana; ā, ka whaka­atu­ria ki a Parao te iwi o Hōhepa.
