7.14: Nā, ka tono tāngata a Hōhepa ki te karanga i tōna pāpā, i a Hākopa ki a ia, i ōna huānga katoa hoki, e whitu tekau mā rima ngā wairua.
7.15: Nā, heke ana a Hākopa ki Īhipa, ā, ka mate a ia, me ō tātou mātua.
7.16: Ā, kawea atu ana rātou ki Hekeme, whaka­takoto­ria ana ki te urupā i hokona mai rā e Āperahama, he moni hiriwa te utu, i ngā tama a Hāmora i Hekeme.
7.17: “Ā, nō ka tata mai te wā mō te mea i kōrero­tia rā i mua, i oati­tia rā e te Atua ki a Āperahama, ka tupu te iwi, ka tini haere ki Īhipa,
7.18: ā, tae noa ki te pu­tanga ake o tētahi atu kīngi mō Īhipa, kīhai nei i mōhio ki a Hōhepa.
7.19: Ko ia te mea nāna i tini­hanga tō tātou iwi, i whaka­tupu kino ō tātou mātua, i meatia ai kia makā atu ā rātou tama­riki kei puta ki te ora.
7.20: Nō taua wā, ka whānau a Mohi, he tangata tino āta­ahua. E toru ngā marama i whaka­tupu­ria ai ia i roto i te whare o tōna pāpā,
7.21: ā, nō ka makā atu ia, ka tango­hia ake ia e te tamā­hine a Parao, ā, ata­whai­tia ana hei tama­iti ake māna.
7.22: Nā, i āta whaka­akona a Mohi ki ngā mea katoa o te mātau­ranga o ngā Īhipiana; ā, he mana rawa ia, i te kupu, i te mahi.
7.23: “Ā, ka tata ōna tau ki te whā tekau, ka uru mai te whaka­aro ki tōna ngākau kia haere ia ki ōna tuā­kana, ki ngā tama a Īharaira.
7.24: Ā, i tōna kite­nga i tētahi o rātou e tūkino­tia ana, ka āwhina ia i a ia, a patua iho e ia te Īhipiana, ā, ka whai utu mōna i tūkino­tia rā.
7.25: Hua noa e mōhio ōna tuā­kana, nōna te ringa e hōmai ai e te Atua te whaka­ora­nga mō rātou, heoi, kīhai rātou i mōhio.
7.26: Nā, i te aonga ake ka puta atu ia ki ētahi e whawhai ana ki a rāua, ka tahuri ki te wawao i a rāua, ka mea, ‘E hoa mā, he teina, he tua­kana kōrua; he aha kōrua ka kino ai ki a kōrua anō?’
7.27: Otirā, peia atu ana ia e te tangata nāna te hē ki tōna hoa; i mea ia, ‘Nā wai koe i mea hei ranga­tira, hei kai­whaka­wā mō māua?
7.28: E mea ana koe ki te whaka­mate i ahau, me koe i whaka­mate rā i te Īhipiana ina­nahi?’
7.29: Nā, ka tahuti a Mohi i taua kōrero, ā, noho manene ana i Miriana. Ā, toko­rua āna tama i whānau ki reira.
7.30: “Ā, nō ka tutuki ngā tau e whā tekau, ka puta ki a ia tētahi ana­hera a te Ariki i te koraha o Maunga Hinai, i roto i te mura ahi i te rākau.
7.31: Ā, nō te kite­nga o Mohi, ka mīharo ki taua whaka­kite­nga; ā, i a ia ka whaka­tata atu ki te mā­taki­taki, ka puaki mai te reo o te Ariki ki a ia,
7.32: ‘Ko te Atua ahau o ōu mātua, ko te Atua o Āperahama, o Īhaka, o Hākopa.’ Nā, wiri ana a Mohi, kore rawa i kaha ki te ti­tiro atu.
7.33: Ā, ka mea mai te Ariki ki a ia, ‘Wete­kia atu ngā hū i ōu wae­wae; ko te wāhi hoki e tū nā koe he one­one tapu.
7.34: Kua tino kite hoki ahau i te mate o tōku iwi e noho nei i Īhipa, kua rongo hoki i tā rātou auē, ā, kua heke iho nei ahau ki te whaka­ora i a rātou. Nā, haere mai, ka tonoa koe e ahau ki Īhipa.’
7.35: “Nā ko taua Mohi i whaka­kāhore­tia rā e rātou, i mea rā rātou, ‘Nā wai koe i mea hei ranga­tira, hei kai­whaka­wā?’ Ko ia anō i tonoa e te Atua hei ranga­tira, hei kai­whaka­ora, he mea nā te ringa o te ana­hera i puta mai rā ki a ia i te rākau.
7.36: Nā, taua tangata rātou i ārahi atu, i muri iho i tāna mahi­nga i ngā mea whaka­mīharo, i ngā tohu, ki te whenua o Īhipa, ki te Moana Whero, ki te koraha hoki i ngā tau e whā tekau.
7.37: Ko taua Mohi anō tēnei i mea atu rā ki ngā tama­riki a Īharaira, ‘Mā te Atua e whaka­ara ake he poro­piti mō koutou i roto i ō koutou tēina, he pēnei me ahau.’
7.38: Ko ia anō tēnei i te whaka­mine­nga i te koraha, rāua ko te ana­hera i kōrero rā ki a ia i Maunga Hinai, ko ō tātou mātua hoki; i riro mai ai i a ia ngā kupu ora hei hōmai ki a tātou.
7.39: “Kīhai nei ō tātou mātua i pai ki te whaka­rongo ki a ia, heoi, peia atu ana ia e rātou, ā, hoki ana ō rātou ngākau ki Īhipa.
7.40: Ā, mea ana rātou ki a Ārona, ‘Hangā mā tātou ētahi atua hei haere ki mua i a tātou; ko tēnei Mohi hoki i āra­hina mai nei tātou i te whenua o Īhipa, kāhore tātou e mātau kua ahatia rānei.’
7.41: Heoi, hangā ana e rātou he kūao kau i aua rā, tāpaea ana he patu­nga tapu mā taua whaka­pakoko, ā, koa ana ō rātou ngākau ki ngā mahi a ō rātou ringa.
7.42: Nā, ka tahuri kē te Atua, tukua atu ana rātou kia kara­kia ki te ope o te rangi; kia pērā me te mea i tuhia ki te puka­puka a ngā poro­piti: ‘I hōmai koia e koutou ki ahau ngā patu­nga tapu me ngā whaka­here i ngā tau e whā tekau i te koraha, e te whare o Īharaira?
7.43: Nā, kua mau koutou ki te ta­pe­nā­kara o Moroko, ki te whetū o tō koutou atua o Reipana, ki ngā whaka­pakoko i hangā e koutou hei koro­piko atu; nā, māku koutou e kawe atu ki tāwāhi o Papurōna.’
7.44: “I ō tātou mātua te ta­pe­nā­kara o te whaka­atu­ranga i te koraha, tāna hoki i whaka­rite ai, i mea ai ki a Mohi kia hangā e ia, kia rite ki te tauira i kite ai ia.
7.45: Ā, i ō rātou nā rā, nā ō tātou mātua i mau mai, i a rātou ko Hohua i haere mai ai ki te noho i te whenua o ngā tauiwi, i peia atu nei e te Atua i te aro­aro o ō tātou mātua, ā, taea noatia ngā rā i a Rāwiri;
7.46: i pai­ngia nei ia e te Atua, ā, i īnoi hoki māna e rapu he nohoa­nga mō te Atua o Hākopa.
7.47: Nā, Horomona ia i hanga he whare mōna.
7.48: “He ahakoa rā, e kore te Runga Rawa e noho ki ngā whare i hangā e te ringa; ko tā te poro­piti hoki tēnā i mea ai:
7.49: ‘Ko te rangi tōku torōna, ko te whenua tōku tū­ranga wae­wae. He whare pēhea tā koutou e hanga ai mōku?’ e ai tā te Ariki; ‘ā, ko tēhea te wāhi e oki­oki ai ahau?
7.50: Ehara ianei i tōku ringa nāna ēnei mea katoa i hanga?’
7.51: “E te hunga kakī mārō, kāhore nei i kotia te ngākau me ngā tari­nga, he whaka­keke tonu tā koutou ki te Wairua Tapu; rite tonu tā koutou ki tā ō koutou mātua.
7.52: Ko tēhea o ngā poro­piti kīhai i whaka­tupu­ria kino­tia e ō koutou mātua? Whaka­matea iho e rātou te hunga i poro­piti­tia ai te haere­nga mai o te Mea Tika; ko koutou nei ōna kai­tuku, ōna kai­kōhuru.
7.53: Ko koutou, kua riro nā i a koutou te ture, i tā ngā ana­hera i whaka­takoto mai ai, heoi, kīhai i puri­tia e koutou.” Te Ākina o Tepene ki te Kōhatu
7.54: Ā, ka rongo rātou ki ēnei mea, nā tū rawa ki roto ki ō rātou ngākau, tetēā ana ō rātou niho ki a ia.
7.55: Otiia ko ia, kī tonu i te Wairua Tapu, ti­tiro mata­tau atu ana ki te rangi, ka kite i te korōria o te Atua, i a Īhu hoki e tū ana i te ringa matau o te Atua.
7.56: Ā, ka mea, “Nana, e kite ana ahau ko ngā rangi e tūhāhā ana, ā, ko te Tama a te tangata e tū ana i te ringa matau o te Atua!”
7.57: Kātahi, rātou ka hāmama, he nui te reo, ka puru i ō rātou tari­nga, ā, kotahi tonu te omanga atu ki a ia,
7.58: ka makā ia e rātou ki waho o te pā, ā, ākina ana ki te kōhatu. Ko ngā kai­titiro i whaka­takoto i ō rātou kākahu ki ngā wae­wae o tētahi tai­tama, ko Haora te ingoa.
7.59: Heoi, ākina ana e rātou a Tepene ki te kōhatu, me ia e karanga ana ki te Ariki, e mea ana, “E te Ariki, e Īhu, tōku wairua ki a koe.”
7.60: Kātahi, ia ka tūturi ki raro, ka karanga, he nui te reo, “E te Ariki, kaua tēnei mea e whaka­iria ki a rātou.” Ā, i tāna kōrero­tanga i tēnei, ka moe.

8.1: Ā, i reira a Haora e whaka­ae ana ki tōna mate­nga. Te Whakatoinga o Hoara i te Hāhi Nā, i taua rā ka oho he whaka­toi­nga nui ki te hāhi i Hiruhārama, ā, marara katoa ana rātou, puta noa i ngā wāhi o Hūria, o Hamaria; kāhore ia ngā āpō­toro.
8.2: Ā, nā te hunga whaka­aro a Tepene i tanu, ā, he nui tā rātou tangi­hanga mōna.
8.3: Ko Haora ia, tā­horoa ana e ia te hāhi, tomo ana ki tēnā whare, ki tēnā whare, tōia atu ana ngā tāne me ngā wāhine, hoatu ana ki roto ki te whare here­here. Ka Kauwhautia te Rongopai ki Hamaria
8.4: Nō reira ko rātou tonu, ko ngā mea i whaka­marara­tia rā, i hāere­ere ki te kauwhau i te kupu.
8.5: Nā, ko Piripi i heke atu ki te pā o Hamaria, ā, kauwhau ana i a te Karaiti ki a rātou.
8.6: Ā, kotahi tonu te whaka­aro o ngā mano ki te whaka­rongo ki ngā mea i kōrero ai a Piripi, i a rātou e rongo ana, e kite ana i ngā tohu i mea ai ia.
8.7: I puta mai hoki ngā wairua poke i roto i te tini o ngā mea e nohoia ana, he nui te reo ki te karanga. He toko­maha anō ngā pararūtiki, ngā kopa i whaka­ora­ngia.
8.8: Ā, nui atu te hari o taua pā.
8.9: Nā, i reira tētahi tangata, ko Haimona te ingoa, he mahi mākutu tāna i mua atu i roto i taua pā, ā, mīharo ana te iwi o Hamaria, i mea hoki ia i a ia he tangata nui.
8.10: I whaka­rongo katoa hoki rātou ki a ia te iti me te rahi, i mea, “Ko taua kaha o te Atua tēnei tangata, e kīa nei ko te Nui.”
8.11: Ā, i whaka­rongo rātou ki a ia, nō te mea kua roa kē rātou e mīharo ana ki āna mahi mākutu.
8.12: Ā, nō rātou ka whaka­pono ki a Piripi; e kauwhau ana i te rongo­pai o te ranga­tira­tanga o te Atua, i te ingoa hoki o Īhu Karaiti, ka iri­iria rātou, ngā tāne me ngā wāhine.
8.13: Ko Haimona tonu tētahi i whaka­pono. Ā, ka iri­iria ka piri tahi ki a Piripi; ā, nō tōna kite­nga i ngā tohu me ngā mere­kara nunui i mahia, ka mīharo.
8.14: Ā, i te rongo­nga o ngā āpō­toro i Hiruhārama kua tango a Hamaria i te kupu a te Atua, ka tonoa atu e rātou a Pita rāua ko Hoani ki a rātou.
8.15: Nō tō rāua taenga iho, ka īnoi mō rātou, kia riro te Wairua Tapu i a rātou.
8.16: Kāhore anō hoki ia i tau noa ki tētahi o rātou; he mea iri­iri kau i runga i te ingoa o te Ariki, o Īhu.
8.17: Me i reira ka whaka­pā­kia iho ō rātou ringa ki a rātou, ā, ka riro mai te Wairua Tapu i a rātou.
8.18: Ā, nō te kite­nga o Haimona, nā te whaka­pā­nga iho o ngā ringa o ngā āpō­toro i hōmai ai te Wairua Tapu, ka mea ki te hoatu moni ki a rāua,
8.19: ka kī, “Hōmai hoki ki ahau tēnei mana, kia riro ai te Wairua Tapu i te tangata e whaka­pā­kia iho ai e ahau ōku ringa.”
8.20: Nā, ko te mea­tanga a Pita ki a ia, “Kia pirau ngā­tahi kōrua ko tāu moni, ina koe ka whaka­aro mā te moni ka whi­whi ai ki te mea hōmai noa a te Atua!
8.21: Kāhore he wāhi māu, kāhore he taunga mōu i tēnei mea; kāhore hoki i tika tōu ngākau i te aro­aro o te Atua.
8.22: Nā, rīpenetā­tia tēnei kino ōu, ā, īnoi ki te Atua, me kore noa e murua te whaka­aro o tōu ngākau.
8.23: Kua kite hoki ahau i a koe, kei roto koe i te au kawa, kei te here o te kino.”
8.24: Nā, ka whaka­hoki a Haimona, ka mea, “Mā kōrua e īnoi mōku ki te Ariki, kei pā ki ahau tētahi o ngā mea kua kōrero­tia mai nā e kōrua.”
8.25: Ā, ka mutu tā rāua whaka­atu, tā rāua kauwhau i te kupu a te Ariki, ka hoki ki Hiruhārama, he maha hoki ngā kāinga o ngā Hamari i kauwhau­tia ai e rāua te rongo­pai. Ko Piripi rāua ko te Āpiha Etiopiana
8.26: Nā, ka kōrero tētahi ana­hera a te Ariki ki a Piripi, ka mea, “Whaka­tika, haere ki te tonga, ki te ara e heke atu ana i Hiruhārama ki Kaha”; he koraha tērā.
8.27: Whaka­tika ana ia, haere ana. Nā, ko tētahi tangata o Etiopia, he ūnaka, he tangata nui nā Kanarahi, kuīni o ngā Etiopiana, ko te kai­tiaki ia o āna taonga katoa, i haere ki Hiruhārama ki te kara­kia;
8.28: ā, e hoki mai ana, e noho ana i runga i tōna hāri­ata, e kōrero ana i a Ihāia poro­piti.
8.29: Nā, ka mea te Wairua ki a Piripi, “Whaka­tata atu, ka haere atu koe ki te hāri­ata rā.”
8.30: Kātahi a Piripi ka oma atu ki a ia, ka rongo i a ia e kōrero ana i a Ihāia poro­piti, ka mea atu, “E mātau ana rānei koe ki tāu e kōrero nā?”
8.31: Anō rā ko ia, “Me pēhea koia, ki te kore tētahi hei ara­taki i ahau?” Nā, ka mea ia ki a Piripi kia eke ki runga kia noho tahi me ia.
8.32: Nā, ko te wāhi o te karaipi­ture e kōrero nei ia, ko tēnei, “I āra­hina ia ānō he hipi kia patua; ā, me te reme e wa­hangū ana i te aro­aro o tōna kai­kuti­kuti, kīhai i kuihi tōna waha.
8.33: I tōna whaka­iti­nga i whaka­korea he whaka­wā mōna. Mā wai hoki tōna whaka­tupu­ranga e kōrero? Kua tango­hia atu nei tōna ora i te whenua.”
8.34: Nā, ka whaka­hoki te ūnaka ki a Piripi, ka mea, “Tēnā koa, mō wai tēnei kōrero a te poro­piti? Mōna ake anō, mō tētahi atu rānei?”
8.35: Nā, ka puaki te māngai o Piripi, ā, tīmata mai i taua karaipi­ture, kauwhau­tia ana e ia a Īhu ki a ia.
8.36: Ā, i a rāua e haere ana i te ara, ka tae atu rāua ki tētahi wai, ka mea te ūnaka, “Nā, he wai tēnei! He aha te mea e kore ai ahau e iri­iria?”
8.37: Mea atu ana a Piripi, “Ki te whaka­pono tōu ngākau katoa, e āhei anō koe.” Nā, ka whaka­hoki ia, ka mea, “E whaka­pono ana ahau ko Īhu Karaiti te Tama a te Atua.”
8.38: Kātahi ia ka whaka­hau i te hāri­ata kia tū; ka haere atu rāua toko­rua ki roto i te wai, a Piripi rāua ko te ūnaka; ā, iri­iria ana ia e ia.
8.39: Ā, i tō rāua pu­tanga ake i te wai, kā­hakina atu ana a Piripi e te Wairua o te Ariki; ā, mutu tonu te kite­nga atu o te ūnaka i a ia, heoi, haere hari atu ana ia i tōna ara.
8.40: Ko Piripi ia i kitea ki Ahota; ā, i a ia e haere ana, kauwhau­tia ana e ia te rongo­pai ki ngā pā katoa, ā tae noa ia ki Hiha­ria.

9.1: Ko Haora ia kei te kupu­kupu tonu i te whaka­wehi, i te mate mō ngā ākonga a te Ariki, ā, haere ana ki te tohu­nga nui,
9.2: kei te tono puka­puka i a ia ki ngā whaka­mine­nga i Ramahiku, ina kitea e ia tētahi nō te Huarahi, ahakoa tāne, wāhine rānei, kia mauria here­here­tia mai e ia ki Hiruhārama.
9.3: Nā, i a ia e haere ana, ka whaka­tata ia ki Ramahiku; nā, oho­rere ana te whiti­nga mai ki a ia, huri noa, o tētahi mārama nō te rangi.
9.4: Ā, hinga ana ia ki te whenua, ka rongo ake i tētahi reo e mea ana ki a ia, “E Hāora, e Haora, he aha tāu e whaka­toi nei i ahau?”
9.5: Anō rā ko ia, “Ko wai koe, e te Ariki?” Ka mea ia, “Ko Īhu ahau, e whaka­toia nei e koe; ehara tāu, te whana ki ngā koi­koi.”
9.6: Nā, wiri ana ia, ihi­ihi ana, ka mea, “E te Ariki, kia aha ahau?” Anō rā ko te Ariki ki a ia, “Whaka­tika, tomo atu ki te pā, ā, ka kōrero­tia ki a koe tāu e mea ai.”
9.7: Nā, ko ngā tāngata i haere tahi i a ia, tū reo­kore ana, rongo kau ana ki te reo, kāhore ia i kite tangata.
9.8: Nā, ka whaka­tika ake a Haora i te whenua, ā, i te tu­whera­tanga o ōna kanohi, kīhai rawa ia i kite aha; nā, āra­hina ā ringa­tia ana ia e rātou, mauria ana ia ki Ramahiku.
9.9: Ā, e toru ōna rā e kore ana e kite, kīhai hoki i kai, kīhai i inu.
9.10: Nā, i Ramahiku tētahi ākonga, ko Anania te ingoa; ka mea te Ariki ki a ia, he kite, “E Anania.” Ka mea tērā, “Tēnei ahau, e te Ariki.”
9.11: Anō rā ko te Ariki ki a ia, “Whaka­tika, haere ki te ara e kīa nei ko Torotika, ka ui i te whare o Hūrā mō tētahi ko Haora te ingoa, nō Tarahu. Nā, kei te īnoi ia.
9.12: Ā, kua kite ia i tētahi tangata, ko Anania te ingoa, e tomo mai ana, e whaka­pā ana i ōna ringa ki a ia, kia kite ai ia.”
9.13: Otirā, ka whaka­hoki a Anania, “E te Ariki, he toko­maha āku i rongo ai mō tēnei tangata, ki te nui o te kino i mea ai ia ki tāu hunga tapu i Hiruhārama;
9.14: ā, tēnei anō kei a ia he mana nā ngā tohu­nga nui, kia herea te hunga katoa e karanga ana ki tōu ingoa.”
9.15: Heoi, ka mea te Ariki ki a ia, “Haere; nō te mea he kaupapa whiri­whiri ia nāku, hei mau i tōku ingoa ki te aro­aro o ngā tauiwi, o ngā kīngi, o ngā tama hoki a Īharaira.
9.16: Ka whaka­kitea hoki e ahau ki a ia te nui o ngā mea e mamae ai ia mō tōku ingoa.”
9.17: Nā, haere ana a Anania, tomo ana ki roto ki te whare. Ka whaka­pā i ōna ringa ki a ia, ka mea, “E tōku teina, e Haora, nā te Ariki, nā Īhu, i puta rā ki a koe i te ara i haere mai nā koe, nāna ahau i tono mai, kia kite ai koe, ā, kia kī ai hoki i te Wairua Tapu.”
9.18: Nā, marere tonu iho ētahi mea, ānō he unahi, i ōna kanohi, ā, kite ana ia, ka whaka­tika, ka iri­iria.
9.19: Nā, ka kai ia, ka whai kaha. Ka Kauwhau a Haora i Ramahiku Nā, noho ana a Haora ki ngā ākonga i Ramahiku mō ētahi rā.
9.20: Ā, i reira tonu kauwhau­tia ana e ia a te Karaiti i roto i ngā whare kara­kia, ko te Tama ia a te Atua.
9.21: Ā, mīharo ana te hunga katoa i rongo, ka mea, “Ehara ianei tēnei i te kai­tūkino o te hunga i karanga ki tēnei ingoa i Hiruhārama? Ā, ko te mea anō tēnei i haere mai ai ia, kia herea rātou, kia āra­hina ki ngā tohu­nga nui?”
9.22: Ko Haora ia ka nui haere kē atu tōna kaha, ā, whaka­poro­raru­tia ana e ia ngā Hūrai e noho ana i Ramahiku, i a ia e whaka­kite ana ko te Karaiti tēnei.
9.23: Ā, ka maha ngā rā ka pahure, ka rū­nanga ngā Hūrai kia whaka­matea ia.
9.24: Heoi, i mātau a Haora ki tā rātou whaka­papa­nga mōna. Ā, whanga ana rātou ki ngā tatau i te ao, i te pō, kia whaka­matea ia;
9.25: otiia, i mau ngā ākonga ki a ia i te pō, tukua iho ana e rātou rā te taiepa i roto i te kete. Ko Haora kei Hiruhārama
9.26: Ā, nō tōna taenga mai ki Hiruhārama, ka whai ia kia uru atu ia ki ngā ākonga; heoi, wehi katoa ana rātou i a ia, kīhai i whaka­pono he ākonga ia.
9.27: Ko Pānapa ia i tango i a ia, ā, mauria ana ia ki ngā āpō­toro, kōrero­tia ana e ia ki a rātou tōna kite­nga i te Ariki i te ara, tāna kōrero­tanga ki a ia, tōna māia hoki ki te kauwhau i Ramahiku i runga i te ingoa o Īhu.
9.28: Nā, ka noho ia ki a rātou, hāere­ere atu ana, hāere­ere mai ana i Hiruhārama.
9.29: Me te māia hoki ki te kauwhau i runga i te ingoa o te Ariki; ā, kōrero ana ia, totohe ana ki ngā Hūrai Kariki. Otirā ka whaka­ngākau rātou kia whaka­matea ia.
9.30: Nō te mōhio­tanga o ngā tuā­kana, ka mauria ia e rātou ki raro ki Hiha­ria, ā, tonoa atu ana ia ki Tarahu.
9.31: Nā, ka whai tānga manawa te hāhi, puta noa i Hūria katoa, i Kariri, i Hamaria, ā tupu ana; haere ana i runga i te wehi o te Ariki, i te whaka­mārie hoki a te Wairua Tapu, nō ka whaka­roaka. Ko Pita kei Raira kei Hopa
9.32: Nā, i a Pita e hāere­ere ana puta noa ngā wāhi katoa, ka tae iho hoki ia ki te hunga tapu e noho ana i Raira.
9.33: Ka kitea e ia i reira tētahi tangata ko Inia te ingoa, kua waru ōna tau e takoto ana i runga i tōna moenga; he pararūtiki hoki ia.
9.34: Nā, ko te mea­tanga a Pita ki a ia, “E Inia, ka ora koe i a Īhu Karaiti; whaka­tika, whā­riki­tia tōu moenga.” Nā, whaka­tika tonu ake ia.
9.35: I kite katoa hoki i a ia te hunga e noho ana i Raira, i Harona, ā, tahuri ana ki te Ariki.
9.36: Nā, tērā tētahi ākonga i Hopa e noho ana, ko Tapita te ingoa, ko te whaka­māori­tanga ko Roka. He wahine tēnei i aro nui ki ngā mahi pai, ki ngā mahi ata­whai rawa­kore.
9.37: Ā, i aua rā ka tū­roro­tia ia, ka mate. Ā, ka oti ia te horoi e rātou, ka whaka­takoto­ria ia ki tētahi rūma i runga.
9.38: Nā, i te mea e tata atu ana a Raira ki Hopa, ka rongo ngā ākonga kei reira a Pita, ā, ka tonoa e rātou toko­rua ngā tāngata ki a ia, hei mea, “Kaua e whaka­roa te haere mai ki a mātou.”
9.39: Nā, whaka­tika ana a Pita, haere ana i a rāua. Ā, i tōna taenga atu ka āra­hina e rātou ki te rūma i runga. Ā, tū ana ngā pouaru katoa i tōna taha, tangi ana, ka whaka­kite ki a ia i ngā koti, i ngā kākahu i hangā e Roka, i a ia e noho ana i a rātou.
9.40: Otiia, ka tonoa rātou katoa e Pita ki waho, ka tuku ia i ōna turi, ka īnoi; kātahi ka tahuri ake ia ki te tū­pā­paku, ka mea, “Tapita, e ara.” Nā, ka ti­tiro ōna kanohi, ā, i tōna kite­nga i a Pita, ka noho ia ki runga.
9.41: Kātahi, ka hoatu e ia tōna ringa ki a ia, ka whaka­ara ake i a ia. Ā, karanga­tia ana e ia te hunga tapu me ngā pouaru, ā, tukua oratia atu ana ia.
9.42: Ā, i mōhio­tia tēnei mea puta noa i Hopa katoa; he toko­maha hoki i whaka­pono ki te Ariki.
9.43: Ā, he maha ōna rā i noho ai ia ki Hopa, ki a Haimona kai­mahi hiako.

10.1: Nā, i Hiha­ria tētahi tangata, ko Koroniria te ingoa, he kene­turio nō te pū i kīa nei ko tō Itari.
10.2: He tangata kara­kia ia, e wehi ana i te Atua, rātou ko tōna whare katoa, he maha āna mahi ata­whai ki te iwi, me te īnoi tonu ki te Atua.
10.3: I kite nui ia, he whaka­rehu, i te mea ka tata ki te iwa o ngā hāora o te rā, i tētahi ana­hera a te Atua, e haere mai ana ki a ia, e mea ana hoki ki a ia, “E Koroniria!”
10.4: Nā, ka ti­tiro mata­tau atu ia ki a ia, ka wehi, ka mea, “He aha, e te Ariki?” Ka kī tērā ki a ia, “Kua puta ake āu īnoi me āu mahi ata­whai, hei whaka­mahara ki te aro­aro o te Atua.
10.5: Nā, tonoa āia­nei he tangata ki Hopa, ki te tiki i a Haimona, ko te rua nei o ōna ingoa ko Pita.
10.6: He manu­hiri ia nā Haimona kai­mahi hiako, i te taha nei o te moana tōna whare.”
10.7: Ā, nō te riro­nga atu o te ana­hera i kōrero nei ki a ia, ka karanga­tia e ia toko­rua o āna pono­nga tāne, me tētahi hōia kara­kia nō te hunga e mahi tonu ana ki a ia;
10.8: ā, ka oti ngā mea katoa te kōrero ki a rātou, ka tonoa rātou e ia ki Hopa.
10.9: Nā i te aonga ake, i a rātou e haere ana, e whaka­tata atu ana ki te pā, ka kake a Pita ki runga ki te tuanui, i te ono o ngā hāora, ki te īnoi.
10.10: Nā ka pā ki a ia te matekai, ka mea ki te kai; otirā, i a rātou e taka mai ana, ka tau iho te wairua mata­kite ki a ia.
10.11: Nā, ka kite ia i te rangi kua tu­whera, me tētahi mea e heke iho ana, he mea tuku iho mā ngā pito e whā, ki te whenua.
10.12: I roto i taua mea ngā momo kararehe wae­wae whā katoa, ngā mea ngōki­ngōki katoa o te whenua, me ngā manu o te rangi.
10.13: I reira, ka puta mai he reo ki a ia, “Whaka­tika, e Pita; patua, kainga.”
10.14: Ko Pita ia i mea, “Kāhore, e te Ariki; kīanō ahau i kai i te mea noa, i te mea poke rānei.”
10.15: Ka puta mai anō he reo ki a ia, ka tua­rua­tia, “Ko ā te Atua i mea ai kia mā, kaua e whaka­noa­tia e koe.”
10.16: E toru mea­tanga o tēnei, ā, i reira tonu ka tango­hia atu taua mea ki te rangi.
10.17: I taua wā tonu, i a Pita e whaka­aro­aro ana i roto i a ia ki te tikanga o tēnei whaka­kite­nga, nā, ko ngā tāngata i tonoa mai rā e Koroniria, tērā kua uiui ki te whare o Haimona, tū ana i mua i te kūwaha.
10.18: Karanga ana mai, ui ana, kei reira rānei e noho ana a Pita, te rua nei o ōna ingoa ko Haimona.
10.19: Ā, i a Pita e whaka­aro ana mō taua whaka­kite­nga, ka mea te Wairua ki a ia, “Nana, toko­toru ēnei tāngata e rapu ana i a koe.
10.20: Nā, whaka­tika, heke atu, haere tahi koutou, kei rua­rua; nāku hoki rātou i tono mai.”
10.21: Nā, ka heke atu a Pita ki aua tāngata, ka mea, “Nā, ko ahau tēnei e rapu nei koutou. He aha te take o tā koutou haere mai?”
10.22: Nā, ka mea rātou, “Ko Koroniria rā, he kene­turio, he tangata tika, e wehi ana i te Atua, e kōrero­tia paitia ana e te iwi katoa o ngā Hūrai, kua whaka­mahara­tia ia e te Atua nā tētahi ana­hera tapu kia tīkina atu koe ki tōna whare, kia rongo ia ki ētahi kupu i a koe.”
10.23: Nā, karanga ana ia i a rātou ki roto hei manu­hiri māna. Ā, i te aonga ake, ka whaka­tika ia ka haere atu me rātou, ā, ko ētahi o ngā tēina nō Hopa i haere tahi me ia.
10.24: Ā, ao ake ka tomo rātou ki Hiha­ria. Nā, ko Koroniria e tatari mai ana ki a rātou, he mea karanga nāna kia hui­hui mai ōna whanau­nga me ōna hoa tupu.
10.25: Ā, nō ka tomo atu a Pita, ka tūtaki a Koroniria ki a ia, ka hinga ki ōna wae­wae, ka koro­piko ki a ia.
10.26: Otirā, ka whaka­ara ake a Pita i a ia, ka mea, “E tū ki runga; he tangata nei anō ahau.”
10.27: Nā, i a ia e kōrero ana ki a ia, ka tomo atu ia ki roto, ka kite i te mene­nga toko­maha,
10.28: ka mea atu ki a rātou, “E mātau ana koutou e kore e tika kia hui­hui te tangata o ngā Hūrai, kia haere atu rānei ki te tangata iwi kē; otiia, kua whaka­kitea e te Atua ki ahau kia kaua e kīa tētahi tangata he noa, he poke.
10.29: Koia ahau i haere mai ai, kīhai i aha i te tiki­nga ake i ahau. Nā, ka ui nei ahau, he aha te take i tīkina ake ai ahau?”
10.30: Ka mea a Koroniria, “Ka whā ngā rā ināia­nei tae mai ki tēnei hāora, e whaka­rite ana ahau i te īnoi­nga o te iwa o ngā hāora i roto i tōku whare; nā, ko te tangata e tū ana i tōku aro­aro, kanapa tonu te kākahu,
10.31: e mea ana, ‘E Koroniria, kua rangona tāu īnoi, ā, e mahara­tia ana āu mahi ata­whai i te aro­aro o te Atua.
10.32: Nā, tonoa he tangata ki Hopa, ka karanga ki a koe i a Haimona, te rua nei o ōna ingoa ko Pita; he manu­hiri ia i roto i te whare o Haimona kai­mahi hiako, i te taha moana.’
10.33: I reira tonu ka tono tāngata atu ahau ki a koe. Nā, he pai rawa tōu haere­nga mai. Nō reira, kei konei katoa mātou kei te aro­aro o te Atua, whaka­rongo ai ki ngā mea katoa kua whaka­haua e te Ariki ki a koe.” Te Whaikōrero a Pita
10.34: Nā, ka puaki te māngai o Pita, ka mea: “He pono ka kite ahau kāhore a te Atua whaka­pai kanohi,
10.35: otiia, i roto i ngā tini iwi ko te tangata e wehi ana ki a ia, ā, e mahi ana i te tika, ka pai­ngia e ia.
10.36: Ko te kupu i tukua mai e ia ki ngā tama­riki a Īharaira, he kauwhau i te rongo­pai o te rangi­mārie nā Īhu Karaiti; ko ia nei te Ariki o te katoa.
10.37: Ko taua kupu, kei te mōhio koutou, i kauwhau­tia rā puta noa i Hūria katoa, i tīmata mai i Kariri, i muri o te iri­iri i kauwhau­tia e Hoani;
10.38: arā, ko Īhu o Nahareta, tā te Atua whaka­wahinga i a ia ki te Wairua Tapu, ki te kaha; ā, hāere­ere ana ia ki te mahi i te pai, ki te whaka­ora i te hunga katoa i pēhia e te rēwera; nō te mea i a ia te Atua.
10.39: Ko mātou hoki ngā kai­whaka­atu o ngā mea katoa i mea ai ia ki te whenua o ngā Hūrai, ki Hiruhārama hoki. Ā, whaka­matea ana ia e rātou, he mea whaka­iri ki runga ki te rākau.
10.40: Nā, ko ia i whaka­ara­hia ake e te Atua i te toru o ngā rā, ā, meinga ana ia kia kitea nuitia,
10.41: ehara i te mea e te iwi katoa, engari e te hunga i whiri­whiria i mua e te Atua, arā e mātou, i kai tahi nei, i inu tahi nei me ia, i muri i tōna aranga ake i te hunga mate.
10.42: I whai kupu hoki ia ki a mātou kia kauwhau ki te iwi, kia whaka­atu, ko ia tā te Atua i whaka­rite ai hei Kai­whaka­wā mō ngā tāngata ora, mō ngā tāngata mate.
10.43: He kai­whaka­atu ngā poro­piti katoa mōna, arā mā tōna ingoa ka whi­whi ai ki te muru­nga hara ngā tāngata katoa e whaka­rongo, ana ki a ia.” Te Whiwhinga o ngā Tauiwi ki te Wairua Tapu
10.44: I a Pita anō e kōrero ana i ēnei kupu, ka tau iho te Wairua Tapu ki te hunga katoa e whaka­rongo ana ki te kupu.
10.45: Ā, ko te hunga o te kotinga i whaka­pono nei, ko ngā mea i haere tahi mai me Pita, mīharo ana nō te mea kua ringi­hia tahi­tia iho te Wairua Tapu ki ngā tauiwi.
10.46: I rongo hoki rātou ki ngā reo i kōrero ai rātou, i whaka­nui ai i te Atua. I reira ka whaka­hoki a Pita,
10.47: “E āhei rānei te whaka­kāhore e tētahi te wai, kei iri­iria ēnei kua whi­whi tahi nei me tātou ki te Wairua Tapu?”
10.48: Nā, ka whaka­hau ia kia iri­iria rātou i runga i te ingoa o Īhu Karaiti. I reira ka tohe rātou ki a ia kia noho mō ētahi rā.

11.1: Ā, ka rongo ngā āpō­toro me ngā tuā­kana i Hūria, kua tango hoki ngā tauiwi i te kupu a te Atua.
11.2: Ā, nō te taenga ake o Pita ki Hiruhārama, ka whaka­wā­kia ia e te hunga o te kotinga,
11.3: i mea rātou, “I haere koe ki roto ki ngā tāngata kīhai i kotia, i kai tahi me rātou!”
11.4: Nā, ka tīmata a Pita, ka kōrero whaka­tepe atu ki a rātou, ka mea:
11.5: “I te pā ahau, i Hopa, e īnoi ana; ā, ka kite moe­moeā ahau i tētahi whaka­kite­nga, ko tētahi mea e heke iho ana, ānō he kākahu nui, he mea tuku iho i te rangi mā ngā pito e whā; ā, tae tonu mai ki ahau.
11.6: Nō te whaka­mau­nga atu o ōku kanohi ki taua mea, ka whaka­aro ahau, ā, ka kite i ngā kararehe wae­wae whā o te whenua, i ngā kararehe mohoao me ngā mea ngōki­ngōki me ngā manu o te rangi.
11.7: Ā, ka rongo hoki ahau he reo e mea mai ana ki ahau, ‘E ara, e Pita; patua, kainga.’
11.8: Otirā, ka kī atu ahau, ‘Kāhore, e te Ariki; kīanō hoki tētahi mea noa, poke rānei, i tapoko noa ki tōku māngai.’
11.9: Nā, ka whaka­hoki tuarua mai he reo nō te rangi, ‘Ko ā te Atua i mea ai kia mā, kaua e meinga e koe kia noa.’
11.10: E toru ngā mea­tanga o tēnei; ka hūtia katoa­tia atu anō ki te rangi.
11.11: Nā, i taua wā anō kua tū ngā tāngata toko­toru ki mua i te whare i noho ai ahau, he mea tono mai nō Hiha­ria ki ahau.
11.12: Nā, ka mea te Wairua ki ahau kia haere tahi mātou, kia kaua ahau e rua­rua. I haere tahi anō i ahau ēnei tēina toko­ono, ā, tomo ana mātou ki te whare o taua tangata.
11.13: Nā, ka kōrero­tia mai e ia ki a mātou tōna kite­nga i te ana­hera i tōna whare e tū ana, e mea ana ki a ia, ‘Tonoa ētahi tāngata ki Hopa, tīkina a Haimona, te rua nei o ōna ingoa ko Pita.
11.14: Māna e kōrero ki a koe ētahi kupu, e ora ai koutou ko tōu whare katoa.’
11.15: Ā, nōku ka tīmata ki te kōrero, ka tau iho te Wairua Tapu ki a rātou, ka pērā anō me ia ki a tātou i te tīma­tanga.
11.16: Kātahi ahau ka mahara ki te kupu a te Ariki, ki tāna i mea ai, ‘I iri­iri rā a Hoani ki te wai; ko koutou ia ka iri­iria ki te Wairua Tapu.’
11.17: Nā, me­he­mea rite tonu tā te Atua mea i hoatu ai ki a rātou ki tāna i hōmai ai hoki ki a tātou, i a tātou i whaka­pono ai ki te Ariki, ki a Īhu Karaiti; ko wai ahau, kia āhei te tū atu ki te Atua?”
11.18: Ā, nō ka rongo rātou ki ēnei mea, mutu pū tā rātou kōrero, heoi, ka whaka­korōria i te Atua, ka mea, “Koia anō, kua hōmai hoki e te Atua ki ngā tauiwi te rīpe­netā e ora ai.” Te Hāhi i Anatioka
11.19: Nā, ko te iwi i whaka­marara­tia atu i runga i te tūkino­tanga i puta ake i tō Tepene, hāere­ere ana rātou ā tae noa ki Pini­kia, ki Kai­peru, ki Anatioka, me te kauwhau anō i te kupu ki ngā Hūrai anake, kāhore ki ētahi atu.
11.20: Otirā, ko ētahi o rātou, he tāngata nō Kai­peru, nō Hairini, i tō rātou taenga ki Anatioka, ka kōrero ki ngā Kariki hoki, ka kauwhau i te Ariki, i a Īhu.
11.21: Ko te ringa hoki o te Ariki i a rātou; ā, he toko­maha rawa i whaka­pono, i tahuri ki te Ariki.
11.22: Nā, ka tae tō rātou rongo ki ngā tari­nga o te hāhi i Hiruhārama, ā, ka tonoa e rātou a Pānapa kia haere ki Anatioka.
11.23: Nō tōna taenga atu, ka kite i te aroha noa o te Atua, ka hari, ka whaka­hau i a rātou katoa kia ū te ngākau, kia piri ki te Ariki.
11.24: He tangata pai hoki ia, kī tonu i te Wairua Tapu, i te whaka­pono. He nui anō te hunga i honoa ki te Ariki.
11.25: Me i reira ka haere atu a Pānapa ki Tarahu, ki te rapu i a Haora,
11.26: ā, nō ka kitea ia e ia, ka kawea mai ia e ia ki Anatioka. Ā, kotahi tino tau i hui­hui tahi ai rāua ki te hāhi, ā, he nui te hunga i whaka­akona. I mātua huaina hoki ngā ākonga he Karaiti­ana ki Anatioka.
11.27: Nā, i aua rā ka heke mai ētahi poro­piti i Hiruhārama ki Anatioka.
11.28: Ā, ka tū ake tētahi o rātou, ko Akapu te ingoa, ka whaka­kite, he mea nā te Wairua, tērā ka pā he mate nui i te hia­kai ki te whenua katoa; i puta anō tēnei i ngā rā o Karau­ria.
11.29: Nā, ka whaka­takoto tikanga ngā ākonga i runga i te mea e taea e tēnā, e tēnā, kia tukua atu he āwhina mō ngā tuā­kana e noho ana i Hūria.
11.30: Pērā ana hoki rātou, tukua atu ana ki ngā kaumātua mā te ringa o Pānapa rāua ko Haora.

12.1: Nā, i taua wā, ka totoro atu ngā ringa o Kīngi Herora ki te tūkino i ētahi o te hāhi.
12.2: Ā, whaka­matea ana e ia ki te hoari a Hēmi, te tua­kana o Hoani.
12.3: Ā, nō tōna kite­nga e pai ana ki ngā Hūrai, ka anga ia ki te hopu hoki i a Pita. Nā, ko ngā rā ēnā o te Taro Rēwenakore.
12.4: Ā, nō ka mau ia, ka makā ki te whare here­here, ka tukua ki ngā hōia kotahi tekau mā ono kia tiaki­na; ko te whaka­aro mō muri iho i te Kape­nga ka whaka­puta mai ai i a ia ki te iwi.
12.5: Nā, ka puri­tia a Pita ki roto ki te whare here­here; otiia, kīhai i mutu­mutu te īnoi a te hāhi ki te Atua mōna. Te Putanga mai o Pita i te Whare Herehere
12.6: Ā, nō ka tata a Herora te whaka­puta mai i a ia, i taua pō anō e moe ana a Pita i waenga­nui o ngā hōia toko­rua, he mea here ki ngā meka­meka e rua; me ngā kai­tiaki i mua i te tatau e tiaki ana i te whare here­here.
12.7: Nā, tū ana tētahi ana­hera nā te Ariki i tōna taha, ā, tīaho ana te mārama i roto i te rūma. Nā, ka papaki ia i te kao­kao o Pita, ka whaka­ara i a ia, ka mea, “E ara, hohoro.” Ā, marere iho ōna meka­meka i ōna ringa.
12.8: Ka mea atu anō te ana­hera ki a ia, “Whī­tiki i a koe, ka here i ōu pā­reke­reke.” Ā, meinga ana e ia. Ka mea anō ki a ia, “Kākahu­ria tōu kākahu, haere mai i muri i ahau.”
12.9: Nā, ka haere ia ki waho, ka aru i a ia, ā, kīhai ia i mahara he pono tā te ana­hera i mea ai; hua noa he reka­nga kanohi tāna i kite ai.
12.10: Ā, nō ka mahue i a rāua te tua­tahi, te tuarua o ngā kai­tiaki, ka tae rāua ki te tatau rino i te pu­tanga atu ki te pā; tu­whera noa ana tērā ki a rāua. Puta ana rāua ki waho, haere ana, puta rawa i tētahi ara, mawehe tonu atu te ana­hera i a ia.
12.11: Ā, i te hoki­nga ake o ngā whaka­aro o Pita, ka mea ia, “Kātahi ahau ka tino mōhio, kua tono mai te Ariki i tāna ana­hera, hei tango i ahau i roto i te ringa o Herora, i ngā mea katoa hoki e tāria nei e te iwi o ngā Hūrai.”
12.12: Ā, nō ka whaka­aro­aro ia ki taua mea, ka haere ia ki te whare o Meri, whaea o Hoani, ko te rua nei o ōna ingoa ko Māka; he toko­maha hoki kua hui­hui ki reira ki te īnoi.
12.13: Ā, nō te pātōtō­tanga a Pita i te tatau o te whati­toka, ka tae mai he kōtiro ki te whaka­rongo, ko Rora te ingoa.
12.14: Ā, nō ka mōhio ia ki te reo o Pita, kīhai i uakina te tatau i te hari, heoi, oma ana ki roto, ki te kōrero kei te tatau a Pita e tū ana.
12.15: Nā, ka mea rātou ki a ia, “E hau­rangi ana koe!” Heoi, ka tohe tonu ia he pono. Nā, ka mea rātou, “Ko tōna ana­hera.”
12.16: Me te pātuki tonu anō tērā a Pita; ā, i tā rātou ua­kanga, ka kite i a ia, ka mīharo.
12.17: Nā, ka pēpehi atu tōna ringa i a rātou kia kaua e kuihi, ka kōrero­tia ki a rātou tōna whaka­puta­nga mai e te Ariki i te whare here­here. Ka mea, “Kōrero­tia ēnei mea ki a Hēmi rātou ko ngā tēina.” Nā, ka puta ia ki waho, haere ana he wāhi kē.
12.18: Nā, i te aonga ake anō o te rā, kīhai i iti te poro­raru o ngā hōia, i ahatia rānei a Pita.
12.19: Nā, ka rapu a Herora i a ia, ā, nō te kore­nga i kitea, ka whaka­wā i ngā kai­tiaki, ka whaka­hau kia whaka­matea. Nā, haere atu ana ia i Hūria ki raro ki Hiha­ria noho ai. Te Matenga o Herora
12.20: Nā, tino nui te riri o Herora ki te hunga o Tāira, o Hairona. Otirā, ka hui­hui mai rātou ki a ia, ā, ka oti a Parahitu, te kai­tiaki o te whare moenga o te kīngi, te whaka­kīkī e rātou, ka tono rātou kia houhia te rongo, nō te mea ko ngā kai i whāngaia ai tō rātou whenua nō te whenua o te kīngi.
12.21: Ā, i tētahi rā i whaka­ritea ka kākahu a Herora i te kākahu kīngi, ka noho ki runga ki te torōna, ā, whaka­tū ana ki a rātou.
12.22: Nā, ko te karanga­tanga a te hui­hui, “He reo atua, ehara i tō te tangata!”
12.23: I reira, pū anō ka patua ia e tētahi ana­hera a te Ariki, nō te mea kīhai i hoatu e ia te korōria ki te Atua, ā, kainga ana ia e te kutu­kutu, hemo ake.
12.24: Ko te kupu ia a te Atua i tupu, i nui haere.
12.25: Ā, ka hoki a Pānapa rāua ko Haora i Hiruhārama, i te otinga o tā rāua mahi, ka mauria a Hoani, ko te rua nei o ōna ingoa ko Māka.

13.1: Nā, tērā ētahi poro­piti me ētahi kai­whaka­ako i Anatioka, i te hāhi i reira, ko Pānapa, ko Himiona i huaina nei ko Nikera, ko Rukiu nō Hairini, ko Manaena, he mea whaka­tupu ngā­tahi nei rāua ko Herora teta­raki, me Haora.
13.2: Ā, i a rātou e kara­kia ana ki te Ariki, e noho­puku ana, ka mea te Wairua Tapu, “Motu­hia mai ki ahau a Pānapa rāua ko Haora ki te mahi i karanga­tia ai rāua e ahau.”
13.3: Nā, ka mutu tā rātou noho­puku me te īnoi, ā, ka popoki iho i ō rātou ringa ki a rāua ka tonoa atu rāua kia haere. I Kaiperu
13.4: Nā, ka tonoa nei rāua e te Wairua Tapu, ka haere ki Herukia; ā, rere atu ana i reira ki Kai­peru.
13.5: Nā, i a rāua i Harami, ka kauwhau­tia e rāua te kupu a te Atua i roto i ngā whare kara­kia o ngā Hūrai. I a rāua anō a Hoani hei kai­mahi.
13.6: Ā, nō tō rātou pu­tanga i te motu katoa ki Papaho, ka kitea tētahi tangata mākutu, he poro­piti teka, he Hūrai, ko Paraīhu te ingoa.
13.7: I te tino kāwana ia, i a Herekiu Paora; he tangata mahara a Herekiu. Ā, karanga­tia ana e ia a Pānapa rāua ko Haora, ā, ka whai kia rongo i te kupu a te Atua.
13.8: Otirā, i tau­tohe ki a rāua a Erima te kai­mākutu, ko te whaka­māori­tanga hoki tēnei o tōna ingoa, i mea kia tahuri kē te tino kāwana i te whaka­pono.
13.9: Otirā, ko Haora, e huaina nei anō ko Paora, kī tonu i te Wairua Tapu, i whaka­mau i ōna kanohi ki a ia,
13.10: ā, i mea, “E te tangata kī tonu i te tini­hanga, i ngā tini mahi poka­noa, e te tama a te rēwera, hoa­riri o ngā mahi tika katoa, e kore ianei e mutu tāu whaka­puta kē i ngā ara tika a te Ariki?
13.11: Nana, āia­nei pā ai te ringa o te Ariki ki a koe, ka matapō­tia koe, e kore e kite i te rā ā taka noa tētahi wā.” Nā, taka tonu iho ki a ia he kohu, he pōuri; ā, hāere­ere noa ia ki te rapu kai­ārahi mōna.
13.12: Ā, nō te kite­nga o te tino kāwana i taua mea­tanga, ka whaka­pono ia, i mīharo hoki ki te ako a te Ariki. I Anitioka o Pihiria
13.13: Nā, ka rere atu a Paora rātou ko ōna hoa i Papaho, ka ū ki Pereka i Pamapu­ria. Ā, whaka­rere ana a Hoani i a rāua, hoki ana ki Hiruhārama.
13.14: Ko rāua ia haere atu ana i Pereka, tae tonu atu ki Anatioka i Pihi­ria, ā, tomo ana ki te whare kara­kia i te rā hāpati, noho ana.
13.15: Ā, ka mutu te kōrero­tanga o te ture, o ngā poro­piti, ka tono tāngata ngā ranga­tira o te whare kara­kia ki a rāua, ka mea, “E hoa mā, ki te mea he kupu whaka­ako tā kōrua ki te hunga nei, kōrero­tia.”
13.16: Nā, ka tū a Paora ki runga, ka tā­whiri tōna ringa, ka mea: “E ngā tāngata o Īharaira, e te hunga e wehi ana ki te Atua, whaka­rongo mai.
13.17: Nā, te Atua o tēnei iwi, o Īharaira i whiri­whiri ō tātou mātua, ā, whaka­nuia ana e ia tēnei iwi, i a rātou e noho manene ana i te whenua o Īhipa, i runga tonu anō te ringa i āra­hina mai ai rātou e ia i reira.
13.18: Nā, me te mea e whā tekau ngā tau i whaka­manawa­nui ai ki tō rātou āhua i te koraha.
13.19: Ā, ka whitu ngā iwi ka ngaro i a ia i te whenua o Kanaana, ka hoatu e ia ki a rātou tō rātou whenua hei whenua pūmau, mō ngā tau me te mea e whā rau e rima tekau.
13.20: “Ā muri iho i ēnei mea, ka hoatu e ia ki a rātou he kai­whaka­wā, taea noatia a Hamuera poro­piti.
13.21: Ā muri iho ka tono rātou ki tētahi kīngi; ā, hoatu ana e te Atua ki a rātou a Haora, tama a Kihi, he tangata nō te pū o Pineamine, ā, e whā tekau ngā tau.
13.22: Ā, ka oti ia te whaka­taka, ka whaka­ara­hia ake e ia a Rāwiri hei kīngi mō rātou; i whaka­atu­ria hoki ia e ia, i kōrero­tia, ‘Kua kitea e ahau a Rāwiri tama a Hehe, he tangata e whaka­ae­tia ana e tōku ngākau; ka meatia e ia ngā mea katoa e pai ai ahau.’
13.23: He uri nō tēnei tangata tā te Atua i hōmai ai ki a Īharaira, he Kai­whaka­ora, ko Īhu, hei whaka­rite i te mea i kōrero­tia ai i mua.
13.24: Nō mua tata anō hoki i tōna haere­nga mai te kauwhau­tanga a Hoani i te iri­iri rīpe­netā, ki te iwi katoa o Īharaira.
13.25: Ā, ka tutuki a Hoani ki tōna tutuki­tanga, ka mea ia, ‘Ko wai koia ahau ki tō koutou whaka­aro? Ehara rā ahau i a ia. Engari, tērā te haere mai ana tētahi i muri i ahau, ko ōna hū e kore ahau e tau hei wewete.’
13.26: “E ōku tuā­kana, e ngā tama o te kāwei o Āperahama, e te hunga i roto i a koutou e wehi ana ki te Atua, kua hōmai te kupu o tēnei ora kia whaka­pua­kina ki a tātou.
13.27: Nā, ko te hunga e noho ana Hiruhārama, me ō rātou ranga­tira, i te mea kīhai rātou i mōhio ki a ia, ki ngā reo rānei o ngā poro­piti e kōrero­tia ana i ngā hāpati katoa, nā rātou i whaka­rite aua reo, i a rātou i tuku i a ia ki te mate.
13.28: Ahakoa kīhai i kitea e rātou he mea e mate ai ia, ka tohe rātou ki a Pirato kia whaka­matea ia.
13.29: Ā, nō ka rite i a rātou ngā mea katoa i tuhi­tuhia mōna, tango­hia iho ana ia i te rākau, whaka­takoto­ria ana ki roto ki te urupā.
13.30: Heoi, nā te Atua ia i whaka­ara ake i te hunga mate.
13.31: Ā, he maha ngā rā i kitea ai ia e te hunga i haere tahi i a ia i Kariri ki Hiruhārama, ko rātou nei ngā kai­whaka­atu mōna ki te iwi.
13.32: Nā, he kauwhau tēnei nā māua ki a koutou i te rongo­pai, i kōrero­tia i mua ki ngā mātua,
13.33: arā, kua mana tēnei i te Atua, hei mea mā ā tātou tama­riki, i a ia whaka­ara nei i a Īhu; ko te mea hoki tēnā i tuhi­tuhia i te rua o ngā waiata: ‘Ko tāku Tama koe; nō nāia­nei koe whaka­tupu­ria ai e ahau.’
13.34: Ko tāna kōrero anō tēnei mōna whaka­ara­hia nei e ia i te hunga mate, tē hoki anō ki te pirau i muri iho: ‘Ka hoatu e ahau ki a koutou ngā mea tapu, ngā manaaki­tanga pono o Rāwiri.’
13.35: Koia hoki ia i mea ai i tētahi atu waiata: ‘E kore koe e tuku i tāu Mea Tapu kia kite i te pirau.’
13.36: Ko Rāwiri hoki i mahi i tā te Atua i pai ai i tōna whaka­tupu­ranga anō, ā, moe iho, whaka­takoto­ria ana ki ōna mātua, kite ana i te pirau.
13.37: Ko tēnei ia i whaka­ara­hia ake nei e te Atua, kīhai ia i kite i te pirau.
13.38: Nā, kia mōhio koutou, e ōku tuā­kana, nā tēnei tangata te muru­nga hara e kauwhau­tia nei ki a koutou.
13.39: Māna hoki ngā tāngata katoa e whaka­pono ana, ka whaka­tikaia ai i ngā mea katoa, e kore nei koutou e whaka­tikaia i runga i tā Mohi ture.
13.40: Nā, kia mahara, kei pā ki a koutou te mea i kōrero­tia rā e ngā poro­piti:
13.41: ‘Ti­tiro mai, e te hunga whaka­hāwea, ka mīharo ai, ā, whaka­ngaro­mia iho! Ka mahia hoki e ahau he mahi i ō koutou rā, he mahi e kore e whaka­pono­hia e koutou, ki te whaka­pua­kina e te tangata ki a koutou!’ ”
13.42: Nā, i a rātou e puta ana ki waho, ka tohe rātou kia kauwhau­tia anō aua kupu ki a rātou i tō muri iho hāpati.
13.43: Heoi, ka pākaru­karu te hui­hui, he toko­maha ngā Hūrai me ngā poro­hira­iti kara­kia i aru i a Paora rāua ko Pānapa, ā, ka kōrero rāua ki a rātou, ka ako kia mau tonu rātou ki te aroha noa o te Atua.
13.44: Nā, i tō muri iho hāpati ka hui­hui mai te pā, me te mea ko rātou katoa, ki te whaka­rongo ki te kupu a te Atua.
13.45: Nō te kite­nga ia o ngā Hūrai i te hui­hui, ka kī rātou i te hae, ka whaka­kāhore ki ngā mea i kōrero­tia e Paora, ka whaka­teka, ka kohu­kohu.
13.46: Kātahi a Paora rāua ko Pānapa ka kōrero māia atu, ka mea: “I takoto te tikanga kia mātua kōrero­tia te kupu a te Atua ki a koutou. Nā, ka peia nei e koutou, ka whaka­aro koutou e kore koutou e tau mō te ora tonu, nā, ka tahuri atu nei māua ki ngā tauiwi.
13.47: I pēnei hoki te ako a te Ariki ki a mātou: ‘Kua waiho koe e ahau hei mārama ki ngā tauiwi, kia ai koe hei oranga puta noa i ngā pito o te whenua.’ ”
13.48: Nā, i te rongo­nga o ngā tauiwi, ka hari, ka whaka­korōria i te kupu a te Ariki; ka whaka­pono anō te hunga i rite mō te ora tonu.
13.49: Ā, pakū ana te kupu a te Ariki puta noa i taua whenua.
13.50: Otirā, i whaka­oho­kia e ngā Hūrai ngā wāhine kara­kia, ranga­tira, me ngā tāngata nunui o te pā, ā, ara ana i a rātou he whaka­toi mō Paora rāua ko Pānapa, peia ana rāua i ō rātou wāhi.
13.51: Heoi, ruia atu ana e rāua te puehu o ō rāua wae­wae ki a rātou, ā, haere ana ki Ikoniuma.
13.52: Nā, kī tonu ngā ākonga i te hari, i te Wairua Tapu.

14.1: Ā, i Ikoniuma ka haere tahi rāua ki roto ki te whare kara­kia o ngā Hūrai, ā, ka kōrero, nō ka whaka­pono tōna tini o ngā Hūrai, o ngā Kariki.
14.2: Nā, ngā Hūrai whaka­teka ia i whaka­oho, i whaka­kino ngā ngākau o ngā tauiwi ki ngā tēina.
14.3: Nā, he nui te wā i noho ai rāua i reira, i māia ai te kōrero i ngā mea a te Ariki, nāna i whaka­ae te kupu o tōna aroha noa, me te hōmai anō e ia ngā tohu me ngā mea whaka­mīharo kia meatia e ō rāua ringa.
14.4: Otiia, i wehe­wehea ngā tāngata o te pā; ko ētahi i ū ki ngā Hūrai, ko ētahi ki ngā āpō­toro.
14.5: Ā, i ngā tauiwi rātou ko ngā Hūrai, ko ō rātou ranga­tira hoki e huaki ana ki te whaka­tupu kino, ki te āki i a rāua ki te kōhatu.
14.6: Ka tūpato rāua, ā, rere ana ki Raihitara, ki Rerepe, ki ngā pā o Raikaonia, ki pahaki tata atu anō hoki.
14.7: Ā, kauwhau­tia ana e rāua te rongo­pai ki reira. I Raihitara me Rerepe
14.8: I Raihitara hoki e noho ana tētahi tangata wae­wae ngoi­kore, he kopa nō te kōpū mai o tōna whaea, kāhore i haere i mua iho.
14.9: I rongo tēnei i a Paora e kōrero ana; ko te tiro­hanga pu­tanga atu o tērā ki a ia, ka kite he whaka­pono tōna e ora ai,
14.10: he nui noa atu tōna reo ki te karanga atu, “E tū ōu wae­wae ki runga.” Nā, moko­whiti ake ana ia, haere ana.
14.11: Nō te kite­nga o ngā tāngata i tā Paora i mea ai, ka ara tō rātou reo, ka mea i te reo o Raikaonia, “Kua heke iho ngā atua ki a tātou, nō ngā tāngata te āhua!”
14.12: Ā, huaina ana e rātou a Pānapa ko Hupita, a Paora ko Merekurai, nō te mea ko ia te pū kōrero.
14.13: Nā, ka kawea mai e te tohu­nga o Hupita, i te ngutu nei o te pā tōna teme­para, he pūru, he tūpare ki ngā kūwaha, ka mea kia patua he whaka­here e rātou ko ngā mano.
14.14: Otirā, i te rongo­nga o ngā āpō­toro, o Pānapa rāua ko Paora, ka hae­hae i ō rāua kākahu, ā, rere ana ki roto ki ngā tāngata, ka karanga atu,
14.15: ka mea, “E mara mā, he aha koutou ka mea ai i ēnei mea? He tāngata anō māua, he rite tahi ki a koutou te tū, e kauwhau ana hoki i te rongo­pai, kia tahuri kē koutou i ēnei mea teka­teka noa ki te Atua ora, nāna nei i hanga te rangi me te whenua, te moana me ō reira mea katoa.
14.16: I ngā whaka­tupu­ranga hoki kua pahemo atu, i tukua e ia ngā iwi katoa kia haere i ō rātou ake ara.
14.17: Otiia, kīhai i tukua e ia kia kāhore he kai­whaka­atu mōna; i ata­whai hoki ia, i hōmai anō e ia ki a koutou te ua o te rangi, me ngā pō hua, i mākona ai ō koutou ngākau i te kai, i te koa.”
14.18: Ā, ka kōrero­tia ēnei kupu, nā, mutu whaka­uaua i a rāua te mea a ngā tāngata ki te patu whaka­here mā rāua.
14.19: Otirā, ka haere mai ētahi Hūrai i Anatioka, i Ikoniuma; ā, ka whaka­kīkī rātou i ngā mano, ā, ākina ana a Paora ki te kōhatu, tōia ana ki waho o te pā, hua noa kua mate.
14.20: Otiia, i ngā ākonga e tū ana i tōna taha, ka whaka­tika ia, haere ana ki roto ki te pā. Ā, i te aonga ake ka haere rāua ko Pānapa ki Rerepe. Te Hokinga ki Anitioka i Hīria
14.21: Ā, nō ka kauwhau rāua i te rongo­pai ki taua pā, ā, he toko­maha ka meinga hei ākonga, ka hoki rāua ki Raihitara, ki Ikoniuma, ki Anatioka;
14.22: whakaū ana i ngā wairua o ngā ākonga, whaka­hau ana i a rātou kia mau tonu ki te whaka­pono, kua takoto hoki te tikanga, me nā runga i ngā mate­nga maha he ara atu mō tātou ki te ranga­tira­tanga o te Atua.
14.23: Ā, nō ka whaka­ritea e rāua he kaumātua mō rātou i tēnei hāhi, i tēnei hāhi, me te īnoi anō rāua me te noho­puku, ka tukua atu rātou e rāua ki te Ariki, i whaka­pono nei rātou.
14.24: Nā, ka haere rāua nā waenga­nui o Pihi­ria, tae tonu atu ki Pamapu­ria.
14.25: Ā, ka oti te kauwhau e rāua te kupu ki Pereka, ka haere rāua ki raro ki Ataria.
14.26: Ā, rere atu ana i reira ki Anatioka, ki te wāhi i tukua ai rāua ki te aroha noa o te Atua, mō te mahi ka oti nei i a rāua.
14.27: Nā, ka tae rāua ka hui­huia te hāhi, ka kōrero­tia ngā mea i mahi tahi ai te Atua me rāua ko tāna ua­kanga hoki i te tatau o te whaka­pono ki ngā tauiwi.
14.28: Ā, kīhai i iti te wā i noho ai rāua i reira ki ngā ākonga.

15.1: Nā, ka tae iho ētahi tāngata i Hūria ka whaka­ako i ngā tēina, “Ki te kore koutou e kotia, kia rite ki tā Mohi, e kore koutou e taea te whaka­ora.”
15.2: Nā, kīhai i iti te whawhai, te uiui a Paora rāua ko Pānapa ki a rātou, ka whaka­ritea ko Paora, ko Pānapa, ko ētahi atu hoki o rātou, e haere ki ngā āpō­toro, ki ngā kaumātua ki Hiruhārama, mō tēnei pūtake.
15.3: Heoi, āra­hina ana rātou e te hāhi haere ana rā Pini­kia, rā Hamaria kōrero ana i te tahuri­tanga o ngā tauiwi, ā, hoatu ana e rāua he hari nui ki ngā tēina katoa.
15.4: Ā, nō tō rāua taenga ki Hiruhārama ka whaka­manu­hiri­tia rāua e te hāhi, e ngā āpō­toro hoki rātou ko ngā kaumātua, ka kōrero­tia ngā mea i mahi tahi ai te Atua me rāua.
15.5: Nā, ko te whaka­tikanga o ētahi tāngata whaka­pono nō te tītore­hanga ki ngā Parihi, ka mea, “Me kokoti rātou, me ako hoki kia whaka­ritea te ture a Mohi.”
15.6: Nā, ka hui­hui ngā āpō­toro rātou ko ngā kaumātua ki te whaka­aro ki tēnei mea.
15.7: Ā, ka nui te tau­tohe­tohe, ka whaka­tika a Pita, ka mea ki a rātou, “E ngā tuā­kana, e mātau ana koutou ki te whiri­whiringa a te Atua i mua rawa i roto i a koutou, ko tōku māngai e rongo ai ngā tauiwi i te kupu o te rongo­pai, e whaka­pono ai hoki.
15.8: I whaka­ae hoki ki a rātou te Atua e mātau nei ki ngā ngākau, i a ia i hoatu ai i te Wairua Tapu ki a rātou, rite tahi ki tāna ki a tātou;
15.9: kāhore hoki i puta kē tōna whaka­aro ki a tātou, ki a rātou, i ō rātou ngākau kua mā i a ia i runga i te whaka­pono.
15.10: Ko tēnei, he aha koutou ka whaka­mā­tau­tau ai i te Atua, ka whaka­takoto ioka ai ki te kakī o ngā ākonga, he mea kīhai nei i taea te mau e ō tātou mātua, e tātou rānei?
15.11: Heoi, ka whaka­pono nei tātou, tērā tātou e ora i runga i te aroha noa o te Ariki, o Īhu Karaiti, ka pērā tahi hoki me rātou.”
15.12: Nā, noho puku ana te mano katoa, whaka­rongo ana ki a Pānapa rāua ko Paora e kōrero ana i ngā tohu, i ngā mea whaka­mīharo i mea ai te Atua kia mahia e rāua i roto i ngā tauiwi.
15.13: Ā, ka mutu tā rāua ka whaka­hoki a Hēmi, ka mea: “E ngā tuā­kana, whaka­rongo ki ahau!
15.14: Kua kōrero­tia e Himiona tā te Atua tiro­hanga mai i mua, tāna tango­hanga i tētahi iwi i roto i ngā tauiwi mō tōna ingoa.
15.15: E rite ana anō ki tēnei ngā kōrero a ngā poro­piti; i tuhi­tuhia rā:
15.16: ‘I muri o ēnei mea ka hoki mai ahau, ka hangā anō e ahau te ta­pe­nā­kara o Rāwiri, kua hinga nei; ka hangā anō e ahau ōna wāhi kua horoa, ā, ka whaka­ara­hia e ahau.
15.17: Kia rapu ai ngā toenga o ngā tāngata ki te Ariki, me ngā tauiwi katoa hoki i karanga­tia nei tōku ingoa ki runga ki a rātou, e ai tā te Ariki, e mahi nei i ēnei mea katoa.
15.18: Nāna nei i mea kia mōhio­tia ēnei mea katoa nō te tīma­tanga rā anō o te ao.’
15.19: “Nā, ko tōku whaka­aro tēnei; kia kaua e whaka­rarua te hunga e tahuri ana mai ki te Atua i roto i ngā tauiwi;
15.20: engari, kia tuhi atu tātou ki a rātou, kia mawehe atu rātou i ngā poke o ngā whaka­pakoko, i te moe tāhae, i te mea kua nōtia te kakī, i te toto.
15.21: Nō ngā whaka­tupu­ranga hoki ō mua ngā kai­kauwhau i a Mohi i tēnei pā, i tēnei pā, he mea kōrero i roto i ngā whare kara­kia i ngā hāpati katoa.” Te Pukapuka ki ngā Tauiwi Whakapono
15.22: Kātahi, ka pai ngā āpō­toro rātou ko ngā kaumātua me te hāhi katoa, kia whiri­whiria ētahi tāngata i roto i a rātou kia tonoa hei hoa mō Paora rāua ko Pānapa ki Anatioka; a Hūrā, i huaina nei ko Pāhapa, rāua ko Hira, he hunga ingoa nui i roto i ngā tēina,
15.23: ka tuhia hoki ēnei mea hei mau­ranga: “Nā ngā āpō­toro rātou ko ngā kaumātua, ko ngā tuā­kana, ki ngā tēina o roto i ngā tauiwi, i Anatioka, i Hīria, i Kiri­kia; tēnā koutou.
15.24: Nā, ka rongo nei mātou, tērā ētahi i haere atu nei i a mātou, i whaka­raru i a koutou ki ngā kōrero, i whaka­pōhēhē i ō koutou ngākau, kāhore nei ā mātou kupu ki a rātou.
15.25: Kotahi tonu tō mātou whaka­aro he pai kia whiri­whiria ētahi tāngata, kia tonoa atu ki a koutou, hei hoa mō ā mātou tāngata e aroha nei, mō Pānapa rāua ko Paora;
15.26: he hunga i tuku nei i a rāua ki te mate hei mea mō te ingoa o tō tātou Ariki, o Īhu Karaiti.
15.27: Nā, kua tonoa atu nei e mātou a Hūrā rāua ko Hira, mā rāua hoki e kōrero a kupu atu aua mea anō.
15.28: I pai hoki ki te Wairua Tapu, ki a mātou hoki, kia kaua e utaina ki a koutou tētahi atu whaka­tai­maha, ko ēnei mea tika anake;
15.29: kia mawehe koutou i ngā mea e patua ana mā ngā whaka­pakoko, i te toto, i te mea kua nōtia te kakī, i te moe tāhae. Ka tiaki koutou i a koutou i ēnei mea, ka pai tā koutou mahi. Kia ora koutou.”
15.30: Ā, nō tō rātou tuku­nga atu, ka haere ki Anatioka. Nā, ka hui­huia te mano, ka hoatu te puka­puka.
15.31: Ā, ka oti te kōrero, ka koa rātou mō te kupu whaka­hauora.
15.32: Nā, he maha ngā kupu a Hūrā rāua ko Hira i whaka­hau ai, i whakaū ai i ngā tēina; he poro­piti hoki rāua.
15.33: Ā, ka roa iho rāua ki reira, ka tukua rāua e ngā tēina i runga i te rangi­mārie ki te hunga nāna rāua i tono atu.
15.34: Heoi, i pai a Hira kia noho ki reira.
15.35: Ko Paora ia rāua ko Pānapa i noho i Anatioka, i whaka­ako, i kauwhau i te kupu a te Ariki, rātou tahi ko tērā hunga toko­maha. Ka Wehe a Paora rāua ko Pānapa
15.36: Nā, muri iho i ētahi rā ka kī atu a Paora ki a Pānapa, “Tāua ka hoki, ka tiro­tiro i ngā tēina i ngā pā katoa i kauwhau­tia ai e tāua te kupu a te Ariki, i tō rātou pēhea­tanga.”
15.37: Ā, ka mea a Pānapa kia mauria hei hoa a Hoani, e huaina nei ko Māka.
15.38: Otiia, kīhai a Paora i pai kia haere i tō rāua tira te tangata i whaka­rere rā i a rāua i Pamapu­ria, kīhai hoki i haere tahi me rāua ki te mahi.
15.39: Heoi, nui atu tō rāua nga­ngare, mawehe ai rāua i a rāua, ā, mauria ana e Pānapa a Māka, rere ana ki Kai­peru.
15.40: Nā, tango ana a Paora i a Hira, haere ana, he mea tuku ki te aroha noa o te Atua e ngā tēina.
15.41: Ā, haere ana ia rā Hīria, rā Kiri­kia, whakaū ana i ngā hāhi.

16.1: Nā, ka tae atu hoki ia ki Rerepe, ki Raihitara, ā, i reira tētahi ākonga, ko Tīmoti te ingoa, he tama nā tētahi wahine whaka­pono, he Hūrai, ko tōna pāpā ia he Kariki.
16.2: He pai te kōrero mōna a ngā tēina i Raihitara, i Ikoniuma.
16.3: I mea a Paora kia haere ia hei hoa mōna, ā, tango­hia ana ia, kotia ana, he mea hoki mō ngā Hūrai e noho ana i aua wāhi; i mātau hoki rātou katoa he Kariki tōna pāpā.
16.4: Ā, i a rātou e hāere­ere ana i ngā pā, ka tukua e rātou hei pupuri mā rātou ngā tikanga i whaka­ritea e ngā āpō­toro, e ngā kaumātua, i Hiruhārama.
16.5: Nā, ka whaka­ū­kia ngā hāhi ki te whaka­pono, ka nui haere hoki i tēnei rā, i tēnei rā. Te Whakakitenga ki a Paora i Toroa
16.6: Nā, haere ana rātou nā waenga­nui o te whenua o Pirikia, o Karatia, kua āraia hoki e te Wairua Tapu kei kōrero i te kupu ki Āhia.
16.7: Ā, i te taenga atu ki Maihia, ka whaka­mātau rātou ki te haere ki Pitinia; heoi, kīhai i tukua e te Wairua o Īhu;
16.8: nā, kapea ana Maihia, ka haere ki Toroa.
16.9: Ā, ka kitea e Paora he kite­nga i te pō: He tangata nō Makeronia e tū ana, e tohe ana ki a ia, e mea ana, “Whiti mai ki Makeronia, āwhina­tia mātou.”
16.10: Ā, nō ka kitea te kite­nga, ka mea tonu mātou kia haere ki Makeronia, i whaka­aro hoki, nā te Atua mātou i karanga ki te kauwhau i te rongo­pai ki a rātou. I Piripai: Te Huringa o Riria ki te Whakapono
16.11: Heoi, ko te rere­nga atu i Toroa, ka tika tonu mātou ki Hamotarakia, ā, ao ake te rā ki Neapori.
16.12: I reira atu ki Piripai, ko te pā nui ia o taua wāhi o Makeronia, he koroni nō Roma. Ā, noho ana mātou i taua pā ā taka noa ētahi rā.
16.13: Nā, i te rā hāpati ka haere mātou ki waho o te pā, ki te taha o tētahi awa, he whaka­aro ko te wāhi tērā hei karakia­tanga; ā, ka noho, ka kōrero ki ngā wāhine i haere tahi ake.
16.14: Nā, ka whaka­rongo tētahi wahine, ko Riria te ingoa, he kai­hoko pāpura, nō te pā o Taiataira, he wahine kara­kia ki te Atua. He mea whaka­puare tōna ngākau e te Ariki, i rongo ai ia ki ngā mea i kōrero­tia e Paora.
16.15: Ā, nō ka oti ia te iri­iri, rātou ko tōna whare, ka tohe ia, ka mea, “Ki te mea kua Whaka­aro koutou he pono tāku mahi ki te Ariki, tomo mai koutou, e noho ki tōku whare.” Nā, ka tohea mātou e ia. I te Whare Herehere i Piripai
16.16: Nā, i a mātou e haere ana ki te wāhi īnoi, ka tūtaki ki a mātou tētahi kōtiro, he wairua mata­kite nei tōna, he nui te utu i riro i a ia mā ōna ranga­tira, i a ia e poro­piti ana.
16.17: Ka whai ia i a mātou ko Paora, ka karanga, ka mea, “He pono­nga ēnei tāngata nā te Atua, nā te Runga Rawa, e whaka­pua­kina ana e rātou te ara o te ora ki a koutou.”
16.18: Nā, he maha ngā rā i mea ai ia tēnei. Otiia, ka hōhā a Paora, ka tahuri, ka mea ki te wairua, “Ko tāku kupu tēnei ki a koe i runga i te ingoa Īhu Karaiti, puta mai i roto i a ia.” Puta mai ana i taua hāora anō.
16.19: Otirā, nō te kite­nga o ōna ranga­tira kua kore he mahi­nga moni mā rātou, ka mau ki a Paora rāua ko Hira, ka tōia ki te kāinga hoko ki ngā ranga­tira.
16.20: Ā, ka oti rāua te mau ki ngā kai­whaka­wā, ka mea, “Ko ēnei tāngata he Hūrai nei, e tino whaka­raru­raru ana i tō tātou pā,
16.21: e whaka­pua­kina ana hoki e rāua he rite­nga e kore nei e tika kia whaka­ae­tia, kia mahia e tātou, e ngā tāngata o Roma.”
16.22: Nā, ko te whaka­tikanga o te mano ki a rāua. Ka huhua ō rāua kākahu e ngā kai­whaka­wā, ka mea kia whiua ki te rākau.
16.23: Ā, ka maha ō rāua whiu­nga e rātou, ka makā rāua ki te whare here­here, ka tohu­tohu­tia te kai­tiaki here­here, kia mau tāna pupuri i a rāua.
16.24: Nō te riro­nga i a ia o taua kupu, ka makā rāua e ia ki te whare here­here i roto rawa, ka whaka­ūria ō rāua wae­wae ki te rākau.
16.25: Nā, i waenga­nui pō ka īnoi a Paora rāua ko Hira, ka waiata atu ki te Atua, me te whaka­rongo anō ngā here­here ki a rāua.
16.26: Nā, ka pā whaka­rere he rū nui, i ngarue ai ngā tū­ranga o te whare here­here. Ā, puare tonu atu ngā tatau katoa, whaka­koro­koroa ana ngā here­nga o ngā tāngata katoa.
16.27: Ā, ka oho te kai­tiaki here­here i te moe, ka kite i ngā tatau o te whare here­here e puare ana, nā, ka unu i tāna hoari, ka mea ki te patu i a ia anō, hua noa kua oma ngā here­here.
16.28: Nā, ka nui te reo o Paora ki te karanga, ka mea, “Kauaka tētahi mea kino e meatia ki a koe; ina tonu hoki mātou katoa.”
16.29: Ā, karanga­tia ana e ia he rama, ka rere ki roto, ka haere wiri, ka takoto ki te aro­aro o Paora rāua ko Hira.
16.30: Ka āra­hina hoki rāua ki waho, ka mea, “E hoa mā, me aha ka ora ai ahau?”
16.31: Ka mea rāua “Me whaka­pono ki te Ariki, ki a Īhu Karaiti, ka ora ai koe, koutou tahi ko tōu whare.”
16.32: Nā, ka kōrero­tia te kupu a te Ariki ki a ia, ki ngā tāngata katoa hoki i roto tōna whare.
16.33: Ā, ka mauria rāua e ia i taua hāora o te pō, ka horoia ō rāua whiu­nga; nā, iri­iria tonu­tia iho, a ia me āna tāngata katoa.
16.34: Ā, ka āra­hina rāua e ia ki tōna whare, ka whaka­tū­ria he tēpu kai ki mua i a rāua, ā, nui atu tōna hari, me tōna whare katoa, i te mea kua whaka­pono nei ki te Atua.
16.35: I te aonga ake ia o te rā, ka tonoa, ngā kātipa e ngā kai­whaka­wā, i mea, “Tukua aua tāngata kia haere.”
16.36: Nā, ka kōrero­tia e te kai­tiaki here­here ēnei kupu ki a Paora, ka mea, “Kua tono tāngata mai ngā kai­whaka­wā, kia tukua kōrua. Tēnā rā puta mai, haere i runga i te rangi­mārie.”
16.37: Nā, ko te kīanga atu a Paora, “Kua whiua nuitia nei māua e rātou, ahakoa kāhore i whaka­wā­kia, he tāngata hoki nō Roma, ā, kua makā māua ki te whare here­here. Ā, kei te makā puku­tia atu māua āia­nei e rātou? Kāhore rāpea; engari, mā rātou tonu e haere mai, e whaka­puta i a māua ki waho.”
16.38: Nā, ka kōrero­tia ēnei kupu e ngā kātipa ki ngā kai­whaka­wā; ā, ka wehi, i tō rātou rongo­nga nō Roma rāua.
16.39: Nā, ka haere mai rātou, ka tohe ki a rāua, ā, ka oti rāua te ārahi ki waho, ka mea rātou kia haere atu rāua i te pā.
16.40: Ā, ka puta atu rāua i te whare here­here, ka tomo ki te whare o Riria, ā, nō ka kite rāua i ngā tēina, ka whaka­mārie i a rātou, ka haere.

17.1: Nā, ka hāere­ere rāua i Amapipori, Aporonia, ka tae ki Teharonika; he whare kara­kia nō ngā Hūrai i reira.
17.2: Ā, ka tomo atu a Paora ki a rātou, he tikanga hoki nāna, ā, e toru ngā hāpati i kōrero­rero ai ki a rātou i roto i ngā karaipi­ture,
17.3: i whaka­puaki ai, i kōrero ai, kua takoto hoki te tikanga kia mamae a te Karaiti, kia ara mai hoki i te hunga mate; ā, “Ko tēnei Īhu, e kauwhau­tia nei e ahau ki a koutou, ko ia te Karaiti.”
17.4: Nā, ka whaka­pono ētahi o rātou, ka piri hoki ki a Paora rāua ko Hira; he toko­maha hoki o ngā Kariki kara­kia, kīhai hoki i rua­rua ngā wāhine ranga­tira.
17.5: Heoi, ka hae ngā Hūrai, ka tango ki a rātou i ētahi tāngata kikino o te hunga māngere, ka hui­huia ngā tāngata, ka whaka­oho­tia te pā; nā, ko te hua­kanga ki te whare o Hahona, ka mea kia whaka­puta­ina rāua ki te iwi.
17.6: Ā, nō te kore­nga i kitea rāua ka tōia e rātou a Hahona rātou ko ētahi tēina ki ngā ranga­tira o te pā, ka karanga, “Kua tae mai ki konei ngā tāngata i whaka­tutū­ngia ai te ao;
17.7: kua puri­tia hoki e Hahona; e tika kē ana ngā mahi a tēnei hunga katoa i ngā ture a Hīhā, e mea ana, tērā atu tētahi kīngi, ko Īhu.”
17.8: Nā, ka rongo te mano rātou ko ngā ranga­tira o te pā ki ēnei mea, ka poro­raru.
17.9: Nā, ka tango rātou i ētahi moni pupuri i a Hahona rātou ko ērā atu, ā, tukua atu ana rātou. I Peria
17.10: Nā, tonoa tonu­tia atu e ngā tēina a Paora rāua ko Hira i te pō ki Peria; i tō rāua taenga atu, ka haere ki te whare kara­kia o ngā Hūrai.
17.11: Engari, ēnei i nui atu te āhua ranga­tira i tō ngā tāngata o Teharonika, i hohoro tonu rātou te tango i te kupu, ā, i tēnei rā, i tēnei rā, i rapu i roto i ngā karaipi­ture i te tikanga o ēnei mea.
17.12: Nā, he toko­maha o rātou i whaka­pono; kīhai hoki i toko­iti ngā wāhine ranga­tira o ngā Kariki, me ngā tāne hoki.
17.13: Otirā, i te mōhio­tanga o ngā Hūrai o Teharonika, tērā te kupu a te Atua te kauwhau­tia ana e Paora ki Peria, ka haere hoki rātou ki reira ki te whaka­oho, ki te whaka­raru­raru i ngā mano.
17.14: Nā, tonoa tonu­tia atu e ngā tēina a Paora kia haere tae noa ki te moana; ko Hira ia rāua ko Tīmoti i noho ki reira.
17.15: Nā, ka kawea a Paora e ōna kai­ārahi ki Atene; ā, ka riro he kupu ki a Hira rāua ko Tīmoti kia hohoro te haere ki a ia, ka hoki rātou. I Atene
17.16: Nā, i a Paora e tatari ana ki a rāua i Atene, ka oho tōna wairua i roto i a ia, i tāna kite­nga i te pā e kī ana i te whaka­pakoko.
17.17: Nā, totohe ana ia i roto i te whare kara­kia ki ngā Hūrai rātou ko ngā tāngata kara­kia, i te kāinga hoko hoki i ngā rā katoa ki ngā tāngata i pono ki a ia.
17.18: Ā, ka nga­ngare ki a ia ētahi tohu­nga o ngā Epikureana, o ngā Toika. Ko ētahi i mea, “He aha tā tēnei tangata kōrero­rero e mea nei?” I mea ētahi, “Me te mea he kai­whaka­puaki ia i ētahi atua tauhou.” Mō tāna kauwhau i a Īhu, i te aranga, ki a rātou.
17.19: Nā, ka mau rātou ki a ia, ka kawea ki Areopaka, ka mea, “Kia mōhio mātou, he aha rānei tēnei ako hou e kōrero­tia nei e koe?
17.20: Poka kē hoki ngā mea e mauria mai nei e koe ki ō mātou tari­nga; koia mātou i mea ai kia mōhio, he aha ēnei mea.”
17.21: Ka mutu hoki tā ngā tāngata katoa o Atene, rātou ko ngā manu­hiri e noho ana i reira, e wātea ai, ko te kōrero rānei, ko te whaka­rongo rānei ki tētahi mea hou.
17.22: Nā, ka tū a Paora i waenga­nui o Areopaka, ka mea, “E ngā tāngata o Atene, i ngā mea katoa ka kite ahau he āhua nui kē tō koutou wehi ki ngā atua māori.
17.23: I ahau hoki e hāere­ere ana, e mā­taki­taki ana i ngā mea e kara­kia nei koutou, ka kite ahau i tētahi āta, i tuhia nei a runga, ‘Ki te Atua Ngaro’. Heoi, ko tā koutou e kara­kia kūware nei, ko ia tāku e whaka­atu nei ki a koutou.
17.24: Ko te Atua, nāna nei i hangā te ao me ngā mea katoa i roto, ko ia nei te Ariki o te rangi, o te whenua, e kore ia e noho ki ngā whare i hangā e te ringa.
17.25: E kore anō e mahia he mea māna e te ringa tāngata, me te mea he mate nōna ki tētahi aha rānei, ko ia hoki hei hōmai i te ora, i te manawa, i ngā mea katoa, ki ngā tāngata katoa.
17.26: Kotahi anō te toto i hangā ai e ia ngā iwi katoa o ngā tāngata, hei noho ki te mata katoa o te whenua, nāna hoki i whaka­takoto ō rātou wā i whaka­ritea i mua, me ngā kaha o tō rātou nohoa­nga.
17.27: Kia rapu ai rātou i te Atua, me kore e whā­whā, e kite i a ia, ahakoa rā kāhore ia i matara atu i a tātou katoa.
17.28: ‘Nāna hoki tātou i ora ai, i kori­kori ai, i noho ai.’ I pērā hoki te kōrero a ētahi o ō koutou kai­tito, ‘Ko tātou hoki tōna uri.’
17.29: Nā, he uri nei tātou nō te Atua, e kore e tika kia mea tātou, kei te rite te Atua ki te kōura, ki te hiriwa, ki te kōhatu, ki te mea i whaka­iroa e te mōhio, e te whaka­aro o te tangata.
17.30: Nā, kāhore i whaka­aroa e te Atua ngā wā o te kūware­tanga; ināia­nei ia kua whaka­hau ia i ngā tāngata katoa o ngā wāhi katoa kia rīpe­netā.
17.31: Kua rite hoki i a ia he rā e whaka­wā ai ia i te ao i runga i te tika, arā mā te tangata kua whaka­ritea nei e ia; kua tukua nei hoki he tohu ki ngā tāngata katoa, i tāna whaka­ara­hanga i a ia i te hunga mate!”
17.32: Nā, ka rangona e rātou te aranga o te hunga mate, ka tāwai ētahi; ko ētahi i mea, “Taihoa mātou e whaka­rongo anō ki tēnei mea i a koe.”
17.33: Heoi, puta atu ana a Paora i waenga­nui i a rātou.
17.34: Ko ētahi tāngata ia i piri ki a ia, i whaka­pono; i roto i a rātou a Rionaihia nō Areopaka, ko tētahi wahine, ko Ramari te ingoa, rātou ko ētahi atu.

18.1: Muri iho i ēnei mea ka haere atu a Paora i Atene, ka tae ki Koriniti.
18.2: Nā, ka kite ia i tētahi Hūrai ko Akuira te ingoa, i whānau ki Ponoto, he mea tae hou mai i Itari, rāua ko tāna wahine, ko Pirihira; kua whaka­haua hoki e Karau­ria kia haere atu ngā Hūrai katoa i Roma. Ā, ka haere ia ki a rāua,
18.3: ā, nō te mea kotahi tā rātou mahi, ka noho ia ki a rāua ka mahi rātou; he tui tēneti hoki tā rāua mahi.
18.4: Nā, ka kōrero­rero ia i roto i te whare kara­kia i ngā hāpati katoa, e tohe ana ki ngā Hūrai rātou ko ngā Kariki.
18.5: Nō te taenga mai ia o Hira rāua ko Tīmoti i Makeronia, ka tākare te ngākau o Paora, ka whaka­puaki ki ngā Hūrai ko Īhu te Karaiti.
18.6: Heoi, i a rātou ka whaka­tika, ka kohu­kohu, ka ruia e ia ōna kākahu, ka mea ki a rātou, “Hei runga i ō koutou māte­nga ō koutou toto; ka mā ahau. Ko tēnei ka haere ahau ki ngā tauiwi.”
18.7: Nā, ka haere atu ia i reira, ka tomo ki te whare o tētahi tangata, ko Taituha Hutuha te ingoa, he tangata kara­kia ki te Atua; ko tōna whare i tata tonu ki te whare kara­kia.
18.8: Nā, ka whaka­pono a Kirihipu, te ranga­tira o te whare kara­kia, me tōna whare katoa ki te Ariki; he toko­maha hoki ngā Koriniti, i a rātou ka rongo, i whaka­pono, i iri­iria hoki.
18.9: Ā, ka kōrero moe­moeā te Ariki ki a Paora i te pō, “Kaua e wehi, engari me kōrero, kei noho puku;
18.10: kei a koe hoki ahau, e kore hoki tētahi tangata e pā ki a koe, e hoatu i te kino ki a koe. He nui hoki āku tāngata i tēnei pā.”
18.11: Nā, kotahi te tau e ono marama i noho ai ia i reira, i whaka­ako ai i te kupu a te Atua i roto i a rātou.
18.12: Nā, i a Kario e noho ana hei kāwana mō Akāia, kotahi tonu whaka­tikanga o ngā Hūrai ki a Paora, ā, kawea ana ia ki te nohoa­nga whaka­wā,
18.13: ka mea, “E kukume ana tēnei i ngā tāngata ki tētahi kara­kia ki te Atua e poka kē ana i tā te ture.”
18.14: Ā, e mea tonu ana te māngai o Paora ki te puaki, ka mea a Kario ki ngā Hūrai, “E ngā Hūrai, me­he­mea ko tētahi hanga hē, ko tētahi mahi kino rānei, he tika kia āta whaka­rongo ahau ki a koutou.
18.15: Ko tēnei he totohe kōrero, he mea ki ngā ingoa, ki tā koutou ture, kei a koutou te whaka­aro; e kore hoki ahau e pai kia waiho ahau hei kai­whaka­wā mō ēnā mea.”
18.16: Nā, peia atu ana rātou e ia i te nohoa­nga whaka­wā.
18.17: Nā, ka mau ngā Kariki katoa ki a Hotene, ranga­tira o te whare kara­kia, ā, whiua ana ia i mua o te nohoa­nga whaka­wā. Heoi, kīhai a Kario i whaka­aro ki tētahi o ēnei mea. Te Hokinga ki Anatioka
18.18: Ā, ka maha ngā rā i noho ai a Paora, ka poro­poro­aki ia ki ngā tēina, ā, rere ana ki Hīria, rātou ko Pirihira ko Akuira. He mea more­more tōna ūpoko i Kenekerea; he kī tau­rangi hoki nāna.
18.19: Ā, ka tae rātou ki Epeha, ka mahue rāua i a ia ki reira. Ko ia i tomo ki te whare kara­kia, kōrero­rero ai ki ngā Hūrai.
18.20: Ā, i tā rātou mea­tanga kia roa atu te wā e noho ai ia ki a rātou, kīhai ia i whaka­ae.
18.21: Heoi, poro­poro­aki ana ki a rātou, ka mea, “E hoki mai anō ahau ki a koutou, ki te pai te Atua.” Ā, rere atu ana ia i Epeha.
18.22: Ā, nō ka ū ia ki Hiha­ria, ka haere atu ka oha ki te hāhi, ā, haere ana ki Anatioka.
18.23: Ā, roa­roa iho ki reira, ka haere, ā, hāere­erea mārie­tia ana e ia te whenua Karatia, o Pirikia, me te whakaū i ngā ākonga katoa. Ko Aporo kei Epeha kei Koriniti
18.24: Nā, ka haere mai tētahi Hūrai ki Epeha, ko Aporo te ingoa, i whānau ki Arēhānaria, he pū kōrero, he tangata kaha ki ngā karaipi­ture.
18.25: I whaka­akona tēnei tangata ki te ara o te Ariki; he tangata ia e toko tonu ake ana te ngākau, ka kōrero ia, tika tonu hoki tāna whaka­ako i ngā mea mō Īhu; heoi anō, tāna i mātau ai ko te iri­iri a Hoani.
18.26: Ka anga ia ka kōrero nui i roto i te whare kara­kia. Nō te rongo­nga o Akuira rāua ko Pirihira ki a ia, ka mau rāua ki a ia, ka āta whaka­atu ki a ia i te ara o te Atua.
18.27: Ā, nō ka mea ia kia haere ki Akāia, ka tau­tokona ia e ngā tēina, ā, ka tuhi­tuhi rātou ki ngā ākonga kia whaka­manu­hiri­tia ia e rātou. Ā, nō tōna taenga atu, ka whaka­kaha­ngia e ia te hunga i meinga nei e te aroha noa kia whaka­pono.
18.28: Kaha rawa hoki tāna whawhati i tā ngā Hūrai i roto i te hui­hui; whaka­atu­ria ana e ia tā ngā karaipi­ture mō Īhu, ko te Karaiti ia.

19.1: I a Aporo i Koriniti, ka puta atu a Paora nā ngā wāhi o runga, ka tae ki Epeha, ā, tūpono atu ko ētahi ākonga.
19.2: Ā, ka mea ki a rātou, “I riro rānei te Wairua Tapu i a koutou i tō koutou whaka­pono­tanga?” Anō rā, ko rātou ki a ia, “Kāhore, kīanō mātou i rongo noa me­he­mea te Wairua Tapu i hōmai.”
19.3: Ka mea ia ki a rātou, “I iri­iria oti koutou ki roto ki te aha?” Ka mea rātou, “Ki roto ki tā Hoani iri­iri.”
19.4: Nā, ka mea a Paora, “Ko tā Hoani iri­iri he iri­iri rīpe­netā. I mea ia ki te iwi, kia whaka­pono rātou ki tētahi e haere mai ana i muri i a ia, arā ki a Īhu.”
19.5: Ā, ka rongo rātou i tēnei, ka iri­iria i runga i te ingoa o te Ariki, o Īhu.
19.6: Nā, ka oti te whaka­pā e Paora ōna ringa ki runga ki a rātou, ka tae mai te Wairua Tapu ki a rātou; nā, ka kōrero­tia e rātou ngā reo, ka poro­piti hoki.
19.7: Ā, ko tō rātou toko­maha kei te tekau mā rua.
19.8: Nā, ka tomo ia ki te whare kara­kia, ka kōrero māia atu, e toru ngā marama i kōrero­rero ai, i kukume ai ki ngā mea o te ranga­tira­tanga o te Atua.
19.9: Ā, ka pakeke ētahi, ka whaka­teka, ka whaka­hāwea ki taua rite­nga i te aro­aro o te mano, ka mawehe atu ia i roto i a rātou, ka wehea kētia ngā ākonga, ka kōrero­rero i tēnei rā, i tēnei rā, i roto i te kura o Tairanu.
19.10: Nā, e rua ōna tau i pēnei ai; ā, ka rongo katoa te hunga e noho ana i Āhia, ngā Hūrai, ngā Kariki, i te kupu a te Ariki, a Īhu. Ngā Tama a Hewa
19.11: Nā, ehara i te mere­kara noa ake a te Atua i mea ai kia meatia e ngā ringa o Paora;
19.12: ina hoki, i te mau­ranga atu i ngā aikiha me ngā ārai i tōna tinana ki te hunga mate, mutu ake ō rātou mate, ā, puta atu ana ngā wairua kino i roto i a rātou.
19.13: Kātahi, ka anga ētahi o ngā Hūrai hāere­ere noa, he hunga pei wairua, ka whaka­hua i te ingoa o te Ariki, o Īhu ki runga ki ētahi i ngā wairua kino, ka mea, “He whaka­hua tēnei nā mātou ki a koutou i a Īhu, i tā Paora e kauwhau nei.”
19.14: Nā, i pērā anō ngā tama toko­whitu a tētahi Hūrai, a Hewa, he tohu­nga nui ia.
19.15: Nā, ka whaka­hoki te wairua kino, ka mea ki a rātou, “E mōhio ana ahau ki a Īhu, e mātau ana ki a Paora; ko koutou ia, ko wai rā?”
19.16: Nā, ko te tū­peke­tanga o te tangata i a ia nei te wairua kino ki a rātou, kua kaha i a rātou, taea ana rātou e ia, nō ka oma ta­ha­nga rātou, ka oma mamae atu i taua whare.
19.17: Ā, ka mōhio­tia tēnei e ngā tāngata katoa e noho ana i Epeha, e ngā Hūrai rātou tahi ko ngā Kariki; ā, ka tau te wehi ki a rātou katoa, ā, whaka­nuia ana te ingoa o te Ariki, o Īhu.
19.18: Ā, he toko­maha o te hunga whaka­pono i haere mai, i whāki, i whaka­kite i ā rātou mahi.
19.19: He toko­maha anō o te hunga i mahi i ngā mahi tini­hanga, i hui­hui i ā rātou puka­puka, ā, tahuna ana i te aro­aro o te katoa. Ā, ka taua ngā utu o aua puka­puka, ka kitea e rima tekau mano hiriwa.
19.20: Koia anō te nui o te tupu o te kupu a te Atua, te kaha. Te Tutūtanga i Epeha
19.21: Ā, nō ka rite ēnei mea, ka mea a Paora i roto i tōna wairua, kia tika nā Makeronia, nā Akāia, kia haere ki Hiruhārama; i mea ia, “Ka tae ahau ki reira, ko Roma anō tāku e tiki ai e ti­tiro.”
19.22: Ā, toko­rua āna i tono ai ki Makeronia o te hunga e mahi ana ki a ia, ko Tīmoti rāua ko Eratu; ko ia i noho iho i Āhia mō tētahi wā.
19.23: Nā, i taua wā kīhai i nohi­nohi te nga­ngau i puta ake mō taua Ara.
19.24: Tērā hoki tētahi tangata, ko Rimitiriu te ingoa, he kai­mahi hiriwa, nāna nei i hanga ngā teme­para hiriwa o Riana, kīhai hoki i no­nohi ngā utu i tika mai i tāna mahi ki ngā kai­hanga.
19.25: Nā, ka whaka­minea rātou e ia me ērā kai­mahi o ngā pērā, ā, ka mea, “E mara mā, e mātau ana koutou, nō tēnei mahi ā tātou rawa.
19.26: Nā, e kite ana, e rongo ana koutou, ehara i te mea ko Epeha anake, engari he iti te wāhi o Āhia katoa kua mahue nei i tēnei Paora te kukume, te whaka­peau kē i te tini o te tangata, e mea ana ia, ‘Ehara ēnei i te atua, e hangā nei e te ringa.’
19.27: Nā, ehara i te mea ko tō tātou nei wāhi anake ka tata te kore noa iho; tērā anō hoki e whaka­kāhore­tia te teme­para o te atua nui, o Riana, ā, meāke memeha noa iho tōna nui, e karakia­tia nei e Āhia katoa, e te ao.”
19.28: Ā, nō tō rātou rongo­nga, ā, ka kī i te riri, ka karanga ake, ka mea, “He nui a Riana o ngā Epehi!”
19.29: Nā, ka tutū te puehu o te pā katoa, ā, ka oti te hopu e rātou a Kaiu rāua ko Aritaku, he hunga nō Makeronia, he hoa haere nō Paora, nā, kotahi tonu tā rātou kōkiri­tanga ki te whare mā­taki­taki.
19.30: Ā, i a Paora e mea ana kia tomo ki roto ki te iwi, kīhai ia i tukua e ngā ākonga.
19.31: Nā, ka unga tāngata mai ētahi o ngā ranga­tira o Āhia, i pai nei ki a ia, ka mea kia kaua ia e tuku i a ia ki roto ki te whare mā­taki­taki.
19.32: Heoi, puta kē te karanga a ētahi, puta kē a ētahi; tino raru­raru hoki taua whaka­mine­nga; ko te nuinga kīhai i mātau ki te mea i hui­hui ai rātou.
19.33: Nā, ka mauria e rātou a Arēhanara i roto i te hui, nā ngā Hūrai ia i mea kia whaka­tika atu. Ā, tā­whiri ana te ringa o Arēhānara, i mea hoki kia kōrero­tia e ia tā rātou ki te iwi.
19.34: Heoi, ka mātau rātou he Hūrai ia, kotahi tonu te reo o te katoa ki te karanga, ā tata noa ki te rua ngā hāora, “He nui a Riana o ngā Epehi!”
19.35: Ā, ka māriri iho te hui­hui i te kai­whaka­wā, ka mea ia, “E ngā Epehi, ko wai te tangata kāhore e mōhio ko te pā o ngā Epehi te kai­tiaki teme­para o te atua nui, o Riana, o te whaka­pakoko anō hoki i taka iho i a Hupita?
19.36: Nā, ka kore nei ēnei mea e taea te whākore­kore, heoi, kia āta noho, kaua hoki e hīkaka te mahi.
19.37: Kua āra­hina mai nei hoki e koutou ēnei tāngata ki konei, ehara nei i te hunga tāhae mea tapu, ehara hoki i te hunga kohu­kohu ki tō tātou atua.
19.38: Nā, ki te mea he kupu tā Rimitiriu rātou ko ōna hoa mahi mō tētahi tangata, e taea te whaka­wā, ā, tēnei anō ngā kāwana; mā rātou rātou e whaka­wā.
19.39: Nā, ki te mea he mea kē tā koutou e whai nā, waiho mā te rū­nanga tika te rite­nga.
19.40: Ko wai hoki ka tohu? Tērā pea tātou e whaka­wā­kia mō tēnei nga­ngau­tanga o nāia­nei, kāhore nei ōna take; kāhore hoki he take e tika ai tā tātou kōrero mō tēnei hui­hui.”
19.41: Ā, nō ka puaki ēnei kupu āna, ka tonoa atu e ia te whaka­mine­nga.

20.1: Ā, nō te mutu­nga o te nga­ngau, ka karanga­tia e Paora ngā ākonga, ka tohu­tohu i a rātou, ka poro­poro­aki, ā, tūria atu ana e ia, haere ana ki Makeronia.
20.2: Ā, ka hāere­erea e ia aua wāhi, me te whaka­hau i a rātou ki ngā kupu maha, ā, haere ana ia ki Kariki;
20.3: ā, ka toru ōna marama ki reira. I ngā Hūrai anō e whaka­takoto whaka­aro ana mōna, i a ia meāke rere ki Hīria, ka whaka­aro ia kia hoki mā Makeronia.
20.4: Ā, i haere tahi i a ia tae noa ki Āhia, a Hopate o Peria, te tama a Piru; a Aritaku rāua ko Hekunu o Teharonika; a Kaiu o Rerepe; a Tīmoti hoki rātou ko Tikiku, ko Toropimu o Āhia.
20.5: Otirā, kua haere atu ēnei i mua, ā, e tatari mai ana ki a mātou i Toroa.
20.6: Nā, i te mutu­nga o ngā rā o te Taro Rēwenakore ka rere atu mātou i Piripai, ā, pō rima ka tae atu ki a rātou ki Toroa, ā, e whitu ngā rā i noho ai ki reira. Te Haerenga Whakamutunga o Paora ki Toroa
20.7: Nā i te rā tua­tahi o te wiki, i te mea kua hui­hui mātou ki te whawhati taro, ka kauwhau a Paora ki a rātou, e mea ana hoki ki te haere i te aonga ake; ā, ka kūmea roatia tāna kōrero ā waenga­nui pō rā anō.
20.8: Ā, he maha ngā rama i te rūma i runga, i te wāhi i hui­hui ai mātou.
20.9: Nā, tērā tētahi tai­tama­riki, ko Ūtiku te ingoa, i te mata­pihi e noho ana, kua tino para­ngia e te moe; ā, ka roa tonu te kauwhau a Paora, nā, ka pēhia rawa­tia ia e te moe, nā, ka taka iho i te toru o ngā whaka­papa­ranga o ngā rūma, tango­hia rawa­tia ake kua mate.
20.10: Nā, ka heke iho a Paora, ā, hinga ana ki runga ki a ia, awhi ana i a ia, ka mea, “Kei nga­ngau koutou; kei roto hoki i a ia tōna wairua.”
20.11: Nā, ka kake atu anō ia, ka whawhati taro, ka kai, ā, ka roa rawa te kōrero ā pūao noa, ka haere.
20.12: Heoi, āra­hina oratia atu ana e rātou taua tai­tama, kīhai hoki i nohi­nohi te koa. Mai i Toroa ki Miretu
20.13: Nā, ko mātou kua riro i mua ki te kai­puke, ā, rere ana ki Aho, i mea kia utaina a Paora i reira; nāna hoki i whaka­rite, i mea hoki ko ia me rā uta.
20.14: Ā, ka tūtaki ki a mātou ki Aho, ka utaina ia, ā, rere ana mātou ki Mitirini.
20.15: Rere atu ana mātou i reira, ā, i te aonga ake ka taea te rite­nga atu o Kio; ao ake anō ka ū ki Hamo, ā, noho ana ki Torokiriuma; ao ake anō ka ū ki Miretu.
20.16: I mea hoki a Paora kia rere i waho ake o Epeha, kei roa ia ki Āhia; i pōrangi hoki me kore e roko­hanga atu ia e te rā o te Petekoha ki Hiruhārama. Te Poroporoaki a Paora ki ngā Kaumātua o Epeha
20.17: Nā, ka tono tāngata atu ia i Miretu ki Epeha, hei tiki i ngā kaumātua o te hāhi.
20.18: Ā, nō tō rātou taenga mai ki a ia, ka mea ia ki a rātou, “E mātau ana koutou ki tāku tikanga i roto i a koutou i ngā rā katoa, nō te rā tua­tahi iho anō o tōku taenga mai ki Āhia,
20.19: pāpaku noa iho te ngākau i mahi ai ahau ki te Ariki, he maha ia ngā roi­mata me ngā whaka­mā­tau­tau i pā ki ahau, i ngā Hūrai e whaka­takoto whaka­aro ana mōku.
20.20: Kīhai i puri­tia e ahau tētahi o ngā mea pai i whaka­kitea atu anō ki a koutou i ākona nuitia ki a koutou, i tēnei whare, i tēnei whare.
20.21: I kauwhau­tia hoki ki ngā Hūrai ki ngā Kariki, te rīpe­netā whaka te Atua, me te whaka­pono ki tō tātou Ariki, ki a Īhu Karaiti.
20.22: Nā, tēnei ahau te haere nei ki Hiruhārama, he here­here­nga nā te wairua, kāhore hoki e mōhio ki ngā mea e pā ki ahau i reira.
20.23: Heoi anō, ko tā te Wairua Tapu e whaka­atu nei ki ahau i tēnei pā, i tēnei pā, e mea ana, kei te tāria mai ahau e ngā meka­meka, e ngā mate.
20.24: Otirā, kāhore ahau e ihu­puku ki te ora, hei painga ki ahau ake, engari, kia taea tāku e whai nei, me te mahi i hōmai ki ahau e te Ariki, e Īhu, arā kia whaka­atu­ria te rongo­pai o te aroha noa o te Atua.
20.25: “Nā, e mōhio ana tēnei ahau, heoi anō, kite­nga o tōku mata e tētahi o koutou, e te hunga i kauwhau haere nei ahau i te ranga­tira­tanga o te Atua i roto i a koutou.
20.26: Koia ahau ka mea nei ki a koutou āia­nei, Kāhore ōku poke i ngā toto o tētahi tangata.
20.27: Kīhai hoki ahau i manawa­pā ki te kauwhau i te whaka­aro katoa o te Atua ki a koutou.
20.28: Nā, kia tūpato ki a koutou, ki te kāhui katoa anō i meinga ai koutou e te Wairua Tapu hei kai­tiro­tiro, whāngaia te hāhi a te Atua i hokona nei e ia ki ōna ake toto.
20.29: E mōhio ana hoki ahau ki tēnei ka riro ahau tērā e puta mai ki a koutou he wuruhi nana­kia, e kore nei e tohu i te kāhui.
20.30: Ā, ka whaka­tika ake ētahi tāngata i roto i a koutou anō, kōrero ai i ngā mea parori kē, hei kukume i ngā ākonga kia whai i a rātou.
20.31: Nā reira, kia mata­ara, kia mahara anō ki ngā tau e toru kīhai nei ahau i māngere i te pō, i te ao, ki te whaka­tūpato i tēnei, i tēnei o koutou, me te tangi anō ahau.
20.32: “Nā, tēnei ahau, te tuku nei i a koutou ki te Atua, ki te kupu hoki o tōna aroha noa, e kaha nei ki te whaka­tupu ake, ki te hoatu hoki i tētahi wāhi ki a koutou i roto i te hunga katoa kua oti te whaka­tapu.
20.33: Kīhai i hia­hia­tia e ahau te hiriwa, te kōura, te kākahu rānei, o tētahi.
20.34: E mōhio ana anō koutou, nā ēnei ringa i mahi ngā mea i matea e ahau, e ōku hoa hoki.
20.35: I ngā mea katoa i hoatu ahau he tauira ki a koutou, kia pēnei tā koutou mahi kia ata­whai­tia ai e koutou te hunga ngoi­kore, me te mahara ki ngā kupu a te Ariki, a Īhu, i mea rā ia, ‘Ko te whaka­whi­whi, nui atu te hari i tō te whi­whi.’ ”
20.36: I te mutu­nga o tēnei whai kupu āna ka tukua ōna turi ki raro, ka īnoi tahi ia me rātou katoa.
20.37: He nui hoki te tangi o te katoa; hinga iho rātou ki runga ki te kakī o Paora, ka kihi i a ia;
20.38: i tino mamae pū hoki rātou i te kupu i mea ai ia, heoi anō, tō rātou kite­nga i tōna mata. Nā, ka ārahi rātou i a ia ki te kai­puke.

21.1: Heoi, ka wehe mātou i a rātou, ka rere, ā, tika tonu atu, tae noa ki Koha, ā, ao ake te rā kei Roro, i reira atu ki Pātara.
21.2: Nā, ka roko­hanga tētahi kai­puke e whaka­whiti atu ana ki Pini­kia, ā, eke ana mātou ki runga, rere ana.
21.3: Ā, ka kitea Kai­peru, ka mahue ake i te taha ki mauī, ka rere atu mātou ki Hīria, ā, ka ū ki Tāira; hei reira hoki te kai­puke ruke ai i tōna utanga.
21.4: Ā, ka kitea ngā ākonga, e whitu ngā rā i noho ai mātou ki reira. Ka kōrero hoki rātou ki a Paora, he mea nā te Wairua, kia kaua ia e haere ki Hiruhārama.
21.5: Ā, ka rite aua rā o mātou, ka puta atu mātou, ka haere; me te kawe anō rātou katoa, me ngā wāhine, me ngā tama­riki, i a mātou ā waho rā anō o te pā. Nā, ka tukua ō mātou turi ki te taha­tai, ka īnoi;
21.6: kātahi ka poro­poro­aki mātou tētahi ki tētahi; ā, eke ana mātou ki te kai­puke; ko rātou ia i hoki ki ō rātou kāinga.
21.7: Ā, ka tutuki tō mātou rere­nga atu i Tāira, ka tae ki Toromai, nā, ka oha atu ki ngā tēina, ā, kotahi te rā i noho ai ki a rātou.
