21.8: I te aonga ake ka tūria atu e mātou, ka haere ki Hiha­ria; ā, tomo ana ki te whare o Piripi kai­kauwhau, ko ia nei tētahi o ngā toko­whitu; noho ana i a ia.
21.9: Nā, toko­whā ngā tamā­hine a taua tangata, he wāhina, he poro­piti.
21.10: Ā, ka maha ō mātou rā i noho ai, ka haere mai tētahi poro­piti i Hūria, ko Akapu te ingoa.
21.11: Ā, nō tō rātou taenga mai ki a mātou, ka mau ki te whī­tiki o Paora, herea iho e ia ōna ake ringa me ōna wae­wae, ka mea, “Ko tā te Wairua Tapu kōrero tēnei, E pēnei­tia te here te tangata nōna tēnei whī­tiki e ngā Hūrai i Hiruhārama, e tukua atu anō ia ki ngā ringa o ngā tauiwi.”
21.12: Heoi, i tō mātou rongo­nga i ēnei mea, ka tohe mātou ko ngā tāngata o taua kāinga, kia kaua ia e haere ki Hiruhārama.
21.13: Nā, ko te whaka­hoki­nga a Paora, “He aha tā koutou e tangi, e whaka­ngākau­kore nei i ahau? Ehara hoki i te mea ko te here anake tāku e pai ai, engari ko te mate anō hoki ki Hiruhārama, mō te ingoa o te Ariki, o Īhu.”
21.14: Ā, nō tōna kore­nga i rongo, ka mutu tā mātou, ka mea, “Kia meatia tā te Ariki e pai ai.”
21.15: Ā, ka pahemo ēnei rā, ka takai mātou i ā mātou mea, ā, haere ana ki Hiruhārama.
21.16: I haere tahi anō i a mātou ētahi o ngā ākonga o Hiha­ria; nā rātou i mau ake a Nahona o Kai­peru, he ākonga tawhito hei tuku­nga atu mō mātou. Ka Haere a Paora ki a Hēmi
21.17: Ā, i tō mātou taenga ki Hiruhārama, ka koa ngā tēina ki a mātou.
21.18: I te aonga ake, ka haere tahi mātou ko Paora ki a Hēmi; i reira anō ngā kaumātua katoa.
21.19: Nā, ka oha ia ki a rātou, ka kōrero­tia taki­tahi­tia ngā mea i mea ai te Atua kia mahia e ia i roto i ngā tauiwi.
21.20: Nō tō rātou rongo­nga, ka whaka­korōria i te Atua, ka mea ki a ia, “Kua kite koe, e tō mātou teina, i ngā mano tini o ngā Hūrai kua whaka­pono nei; e uaua katoa ana hoki ki te ture.
21.21: Kua rongo anō hoki rātou ki a koe, e whaka­ako ana koe i ngā Hūrai katoa i roto i ngā tauiwi, kia whaka­rērea a Mohi, e mea ana kia kaua rātou e kokoti i ngā tama­riki, kia kaua anō e haere i runga i ngā rite­nga o mua.
21.22: Nā, me pēhea? E kore hoki e kore ka rongo rātou ki tōu taenga mai.
21.23: Nā, me mea e koe tēnei e kōrero­tia nei e mātou ki a koe. Toko­whā e mātou tāngata, he kupu tau­rangi tā rātou.
21.24: Tango­hia ēnei, kia purea ngā­tahi­tia koutou, māu anō e utu ā rātou mea, kia waru­hia ai ō rātou māte­nga. Ā, ka kite rātou katoa he teka noa ngā mea i kōrero­tia mōu; engari ko koe, he tika tāu haere, kei te whaka­rite anō koe i te ture.
21.25: Tēnā ko ngā tauiwi kua whaka­pono, kua tuhi­tuhi atu mātou, kua whaka­takoto tikanga atu, kia tūpato rātou i ngā mea e patua ana mā ngā whaka­pakoko, i te toto, i te mea kua nōtia te kakī, i te moe tāhae.”
21.26: Nā, ka mau a Paora ki aua tāngata, ā, i te aonga ake ka pure tahi, ka haere tahi rātou ki roto ki te teme­para, hei whaka­atu ka whaka­ritea ngā rā mō te pure­nga, kia whaka­herea rā anō he whaka­here mō tētahi, mō tētahi o rātou. Ka Mau a Paora i roto i te Temepara
21.27: Heoi, ka tata ngā rā e whitu te taka, ka kitea ia i roto i te teme­para e ētahi Hūrai o Āhia; nā rātou i whaka­oho te mano katoa, ā, ka pā ō rātou ringa ki a ia,
21.28: ka karanga, “E ngā tāngata o Īharaira, āwhina­tia mai! Ko te tangata tēnei e whaka­ako nei i ngā tāngata katoa o ngā wāhi katoa ki ngā mea whaka­hē mō te iwi, mō te ture, mō tēnei kāinga hoki. Kua kawea mai anō e ia ētahi Kariki ki roto ki te teme­para, ā, ka noa nei i a ia tēnei wāhi tapu.”
21.29: I kite hoki rātou i mua he hoa nōna i roto i te pā, ko Toropimu o Epeha; tohu noa rātou, kua mauria mai ia e Paora ki roto ki te teme­para.
21.30: Nā, ka oho te pā katoa, ka oma ngā tāngata. Ā, ka mau rātou ki a Paora, tōia ana ia ki waho o te teme­para; tū­taki­na tonu­tia atu ngā tatau.
21.31: Nā, i a rātou e whai ana kia patua ia, ka tae te rongo ki te ranga­tira mano o te hapū hōia, kua tutū te puehu i Hiruhārama katoa.
21.32: Nā, hohoro tonu tāna mau ki ētahi hōia, ki ētahi kene­turio, ā, oma iho ana ki a rātou. Ā, nō tō rātou kite­nga i te ranga­tira mano, i ngā hōia hoki, ka mutu te patu i a Paora.
21.33: Nā, ka whaka­tata mai te ranga­tira mano, ka tango i a ia, ka mea kia herea ia ki ngā meka­meka e rua; ā, ka ui ko wai ia, i aha hoki ia.
21.34: Nā, he karanga anō tā ētahi, he karanga kē tā ētahi, i roto i te mano. Nā, kīhai ia i mōhio ki te tino tikanga, i te nga­ngau hoki, ā, whaka­haua ana kia āra­hina ia ki te pā.
21.35: Ā, nō tōna taenga ki te piki­tanga, ka hiki­tia ia e ngā hōia i te tau­tute­tute­nga hoki a te tāngata;
21.36: i aru hoki te hui­hui o te iwi, me te karanga, “Whaka­matea ia!” Te Whakahoki Kōrero a Paora mōna anō
21.37: Ā, nō ka whano a Paora te kawea ki roto ki te pā, ka mea ia ki te ranga­tira mano, “E pai ana rānei kia kōrero ahau i tētahi kupu ki a koe?” Ka mea ia, “E mātau ana rānei koe ki te reo Kariki?
21.38: Ehara oti koe i te Īhipiana, nāna nei i whaka­tupu te tutū i mua ake rā, ā, mauria ana e ia ngā tāngata kōhuru e whā mano ki te koraha?”
21.39: Ka mea a Paora, “He Hūrai ahau, nō Tarahu o Kiri­kia, he tangata tupu nō taua pā, ehara hoki i te pā ingoa­kore. Nā, ko tāku īnoi tēnei ki a koe, tukua ahau kia kōrero ki te iwi.”
21.40: Nā, tukua ana e ia, ā tū ana a Paora ki te piki­tanga, ka tā­whiri tōna ringa ki te iwi. Nā, mutu pū te turi­turi, ka kōrero ia, nō ngā Hiperu te reo, ka mea:

22.1: “E ōku tuā­kana, e ōku mātua, whaka­rongo ki tēnei kōrero āku ki a koutou.”
22.2: Ā, ka rongo rātou ko te reo Hiperu tāna i kōrero ai ki a rātou, kātahi ka mutu rawa te kīkī. Ā, ka mea ia:
22.3: “He Hūrai ahau, i whānau ki Tarahu o Kiri­kia, i whaka­tupu­ria i roto i tēnei pā ki ngā wae­wae o Kamariera, i āta whaka­akona ki te tino tikanga o te ture o ngā mātua, i uaua anō ahau mō te Atua, i pēnā me koutou katoa ināia­nei.
22.4: Ā, whaka­toia ana e ahau ngā tāngata o tēnei Tikanga, tae ana ki te mate; herea ana e ahau ngā tāne me ngā wāhine, ā, tukua ana ki ngā whare here­here.
22.5: Mā te tohu­nga, nui tēnei kōrero āku e whaka­tika, mā te hui­hui hoki o ngā kaumātua katoa. I riro mai hoki i ahau ā rātou puka­puka ki ngā tēina, ā, haere ana ahau ki Ramahiku, kia herea, kia āra­hina mai hoki te hunga o reira ki Hiruhārama kia whaka­mamae­tia.” Ka Kōrero a Paora mō tōna Huringa ki te Whakapono (Ngā Mahi 9.1-19; 26.12-18)
22.6: “Nā, i ahau e haere ana, e whaka­tata ana ki Ramahiku, i te pou­tū­mārō­tanga, ka whiti whaka­rere mai ki ahau he mārama nui nō te rangi.
22.7: Ā, hinga ana ahau ki te whenua, ka rangona he reo e mea ana ki ahau, ‘E Haora, e Haora, he aha tāu e whaka­toi nei i ahau?’
22.8: Nā, ka whaka­hokia e ahau, ‘Ko wai koe, e te Ariki?’ Ka mea ia ki ahau, ‘Ko Īhu ahau o Nahareta, e whaka­toia nei e koe.’
22.9: I kite anō ōku hoa i te mārama, otirā kīhai i rongo i te reo ōna i kōrero ki ahau.
22.10: Ka mea ahau, ‘Me aha ahau, e te Ariki?’ Ka mea te Ariki ki ahau, ‘Whaka­tika, haere ki Ramahiku; ā, ka kōrero­tia ki a koe i reira ngā mea katoa kua whaka­ritea kia meinga e koe.’
22.11: Heoi, i te mea kāhore ahau i kite, nā te korōria hoki o taua mārama, ka āra­hina-ā-ringa­tia ahau e ōku hoa haere, ka tae ki Ramahiku.
22.12: “Nā, ko tētahi tangata, ko Anania, he tangata kara­kia, i rite tonu nei ki tā te ture āna mahi, ā, e kōrero­tia paitia ana e ngā Hūrai katoa e noho ana i reira.
22.13: Haere mai ana ia ki ahau, ā, tū ana i tōku taha, ka mea mai ki ahau, ‘E tōku teina, e Haora, ti­tiro ake!’ Ā, i taua hāora anō ka ti­tiro ahau ki a ia.
22.14: I mea anō ia, ‘Nā te Atua o ō tātou mātua koe i whiri­whiri, kia mātau ki tāna e pai ai, kia kite i a te Tika, kia rongo hoki i te reo o tōna māngai.
22.15: Nō te mea ko koe hei kai­whaka­atu māna ki ngā tāngata katoa, mō ngā mea i kite ai, i rongo ai koe.
22.16: Nā, he aha tāu e whaka­roa nei? Whaka­tika, kia iri­iria koe, kia horoia ōu hara, me te karanga anō ki te ingoa o te Ariki.’ ” Te Karangatanga a Paora kia Kauwhau ki ngā Tauiwi
22.17: “Ā, nō tōku hoki­nga mai ki Hiruhārama, i ahau e īnoi ana i roto i te teme­para, ka puta te ngākau mata­kite ki ahau,
22.18: ā, ka kite ahau i a ia e mea ana mai ki ahau, ‘E āhua, kia hohoro te haere atu i Hiruhārama; e kore hoki rātou e tango i tāu kōrero mōku.’
22.19: Nā, ko tāku mea­tanga, ‘E te Ariki, e mātau ana rātou, he kai­here­here ahau, he kai­whiu i roto i ngā whare kara­kia, i te hunga i whaka­pono ki a koe.
22.20: Ā, i te whaka­heke­nga o ngā toto o tōu kai­whaka­atu, o Tepene, i reira ahau e tū ana, e whaka­ae ana, e tiaki ana hoki i ngā kākahu o ōna kai­whaka­mate.’
22.21: Nā, ko tāna mea­tanga ki ahau, ‘Haere. Ka ungā hoki koe e ahau ki tawhiti ki ngā tauiwi.’ ”
22.22: Ā, whaka­rongo ana rātou ki a ia taea noatia tēnei kupu, nā, ka hāmama rātou, ka mea, “Whaka­matea atu te korokē nei i runga i te whenua! E kore hoki e pai kia ora ia.”
22.23: Heoi, i a rātou e karanga ana, e ruke­ruke ana i ō rātou kākahu, e ākiri ana i te puehu ki te rangi.
22.24: Ka whaka­hau te ranga­tira kia kawea ia ki te pā, ka mea kia whiua, kia uia; kia mātau ai ia ki te mea i pēnei ai rātou te karanga ki a ia.
22.25: Ā, ka oti ia te here e rātou ki ngā here, ka mea a Paora ki te kene­turio e tū ana i reira, “He mea tika rānei kia whiua e koutou te tangata, he tangata nō Roma, i te mea kāhore anō i mau noa tōna hē?”
22.26: Ā, nō te rongo­nga o te kene­turio, ka haere, ka kōrero ki te ranga­tira mano, ka mea, “He aha tāu e mea ai? Nō Roma hoki te tangata nei.”
22.27: Nā, ka haere mai te ranga­tira mano, ka mea ki a ia, “Kōrero mai ki ahau, nō Roma koe?” Ka mea ia, “Āe.”
22.28: Nā, ka whaka­hoki te ranga­tira mano, “Nā te moni nui i whi­whi ai ahau ki tēnei taonga, hei tangata whenua nō Roma.” Ka mea a Paora, “Ko ahau i whānau tonu nō Roma.”
22.29: Nā whaka­rērea tonu­tia iho ia e te hunga e mea ana ki te ui ki a ia; i mataku hoki te ranga­tira mano, tōna rongo­nga nō Roma ia, mōna hoki i here i a ia. Ko Paora kei mua o te Rūnanga
22.30: Nā, i te aonga ake ka mea ia kia mātau ki te tikanga, ki te mea i whaka­wā­kia ai ia e ngā Hūrai, ka wewete i ōna here, ka whaka­hau kia haere mai ngā tohu­nga nui, me tō rātou rū­nanga katoa, ā, āra­hina iho ana a Paora, whaka­tū­ria ana ki tō rātou aro­aro.

23.1: Nā, ka ti­tiro pū a Paora ki te rū­nanga, ka mea, “E ōku tuā­kana, tika tonu ki tōku mahara tāku whaka­haere i te aro­aro o te Atua, ā taea noatia tēnei rā.”
23.2: Nā, ka mea a Anania tohu­nga nui ki te hunga e tū ana i tōna taha, kia pākia tōna māngai.
23.3: Anō rā, ko Paora ki a ia, “Tēnei ake ka papaki te Atua i a koe, e te paki­tara kua oti te pani ki te paru mā! Ā, ka noho mai koe hei whaka­wā i ahau i tā te ture i whaka­takoto ai, me te whaka­hau anō kia pākia ahau, e hē nei tēnā ki te ture?”
23.4: Nā, ka mea te hunga e tū tata ana, “E whaka­manu­manu ana koe ki te tohu­nga nui a te Atua?”
23.5: Anō rā ko Paora, “Kīhau ahau i mātau, e ōku tuā­kana, ko ia te tohu­nga nui; kua oti hoki te tuhi­tuhi, ‘Aua e kōrero­tia kino­tia te ranga­tira o tōu iwi.’ ”
23.6: Ā, nō ka kite a Paora nō ngā Haruki ētahi, ko ētahi nō ngā Parihi, ka karanga ia i roto i te rū­nanga, “E ōku tuā­kana, he Parihi ahau, he tama nā ngā Parihi. Ko te aranga o te hunga mate e tūmanako­hia nei te mea e whaka­wā­kia nei ahau.”
23.7: Ā, nō tāna kōrero­tanga i tēnei, ka tohe­tohe ngā Parihi rātou ko ngā Haruki; ka wahi­rua hoki te hui­hui.
23.8: E mea ana hoki ngā Haruki, kāhore he aranga, kāhore he ana­hera, he wairua rānei; ko ngā Parihi ia e whaka­ae ana ki aua mea e rua.
23.9: Ā, ka nui te nga­ngare; ka whaka­tika ētahi o ngā kara­ipi o tō ngā Parihi taha, ka totohe, ka mea, “Kāhore anō i mau i a mātou te hē o tēnei tangata. Tēnā, ka pēhea, me­he­mea kua kōrero tētahi wairua ki a ia, tētahi ana­hera rānei?”
23.10: Ā, nō ka nui te nga­ngau, ka mataku te ranga­tira mano kei motu­motu­hia a Paora e rātou, nā, ungā ana e ia ngā hōia kia heke atu, ki te tango mai i a ia i roto i a rātou, kia āra­hina hoki ki te pā.
23.11: Ā, i taua pō ka tū te Ariki ki tōna taha, ka mea, “Kia māia! Kia pēnā i a koe i whaka­atu nā mōku i Hiruhārama, tāu whaka­atu hoki ki Roma.” Te Whakangārahu ki a Paora
23.12: Ao ake te rā, ka hui­hui ētahi o ngā Hūrai, ka maka oati ki a rātou anō, ka mea, kia kaua rātou e kai, kia kaua e inu, kia whaka­matea rā anō e rātou a Paora.
23.13: Ā, e whā tekau nga­horo ngā tāngata nāna tēnei oati­tanga.
23.14: Nā, ka haere rātou ki ngā tohu­nga nui rātou ko ngā kaumātua, ka mea, “Kua oati mātou i tētahi oati nui, kia kaua e pā kai, kia mate rā anō a Paora i a mātou.
23.15: Nā, mā koutou tahi ko te rū­nanga e kī atu ki te ranga­tira mano kia āra­hina iho ia ki a koutou āpōpō, me te mea nei e mea ana koutou kia āta mōhio­tia te take ki a ia. Ko mātou ia, i te mea kīanō ia i tata noa, ka noho rite ki te whaka­mate i a ia.”
23.16: Otirā, ka rongo te tama a te tua­hine o Paora ki tō rātou whaka­aro whaka­papa, ka haere ia, ka tomo ki te pā, ka kōrero ki a Paora.
23.17: Kātahi, ka karanga a Paora ki tētahi kene­turio, ka mea, “Ārahina atu te tama­iti nei ki te ranga­tira mano; he kōrero hoki tāna ki a ia”.
23.18: Nā, ka mau ia ki a ia, ka ārahi i a ia ki te ranga­tira mano, ka mea, “I karanga te here­here, a Paora, i ahau, i mea kia āra­hina mai tēnei tama­iti ki a koe, he kōrero hoki tāna ki a koe.”
23.19: Nā, ka mau te ranga­tira mano ki tōna ringa, ka haere ki tahaki, ka ui atu, “He aha tāu mea hei kōrero ki ahau?”
23.20: Anō rā ko tērā, “Kua whaka­takoto whaka­aro ngā Hūrai kia mea ki a koe kia āra­hina iho a Paora āpōpō ki te rū­nanga, ānō e āta uia anō e koe tētahi atu mea mōna.
23.21: Nā, aua koe e rongo ki a rātou; e whā hoki tekau nga­horo tāngata o rātou e whanga ana ki a ia. Kua puaki tā rātou oati, kia kaua e kai, kia kaua e inu, kia mate rā anō ia i a rātou. Nā, kua rite tēnei rātou, e tatari ana ki te kupu whaka­ae i a koe.”
23.22: Kātahi, ka tukua atu taua tama­iti e te ranga­tira mano, ka mea ia, “Kaua e kōrero­tia ki tētahi tāu whaka­atu­ranga mai i ēnei mea ki ahau.” Te Mauranga i a Paora ki a Pirika te Kāwana
23.23: Nā, toko­rua ngā kene­turio i karanga­tia e ia; i mea ia, “Kia rite mai ētahi hōia kia rua rau hei haere ki Hiha­ria, me ētahi hōia eke hōiho kia whitu tekau, me tētahi hunga mau mātia kia rua rau, i te toru o ngā hāora o te pō.
23.24: Ā, ka whaka­hau ia ki a rāua, kia whaka­ritea mai he kararehe, hei whaka­noho­anga iho mō Paora ki runga, kia kawea oratia ai ia ki a Pirika, ki te kāwana.”
23.25: Ā, i tuhi­tuhia e ia he puka­puka, ka pēnei:
23.26: “Nā, Karau­ria Raihia ki a Pirika, ki te kāwana pai rawa, Tēnā koe.
23.27: I hopu­kia tēnei tangata e ngā Hūrai, ā, i a ia ka tata te whaka­matea e rātou, ka puta atu ahau me ngā hōia, ā, tango­hia mai ana ia; i rongo hoki ahau nō Roma ia.
23.28: I mea anō ahau kia rongo i te take i whaka­wā­kia ai ia e rātou, ā, āra­hina ana ia e ahau ki tō rātou rū­nanga.
23.29: Nā ka kite ahau he kupu tau­tohe nō tō rātou ture i whaka­wā­kia ai ia, kāhore hoki ōna hē i tika ai te mate, te here rānei.
23.30: Ā, nō te whaka­atu­ranga mai ki ahau, kei te whaka­papa­tia he mate mō te tangata nei, tonoa tonu­tia ia e ahau ki a koe, i mea hoki ahau ki ōna kai­whaka­pae, kia kōrero­tia ki a koe ngā mea mōna.”
23.31: Nā, ka mau ngā hōia ki a Paora, ka pērā me te mea i kōrero­tia ki a rātou, ā, āra­hina ana ia i te pō ki Anatipatari.
23.32: Ao ake te rā ka tukua atu ngā tāngata eke hōiho hei hoa haere mōna, ā, hoki ana rātou ki te pā.
23.33: Ā, nō te taenga o ērā ki Hiha­ria, ka hoatu te puka­puka ki te kāwana, ā, whaka­tū­ria ana a Paora ki tōna aro­aro.
23.34: Ā, nō te tiro­hanga iho o te kāwana, ka ui, nō tēhea kāwana­tanga ia; ā, i tōna rongo­nga nō Kiri­kia ia,
23.35: ka mea ia, “Ka whaka­rongo ahau ki a koe, ina tae mai anō hoki ōu kai­whaka­pae.” Ā, i whaka­hau ia, kia tiaki­na ia i roto i te whare whaka­wā o Herora.

24.1: Nā, ka pahure ngā rā e rima, ka haere atu a Anania, te tohu­nga nui rātou ko ētahi kaumātua, ko tētahi kai­kōrero hoki, ko Tereturu, whaka­kite ai i ngā hē o Paora ki te kāwana.
24.2: Ā, ka oti ia te karanga, ka tīmata a Tereturu te whaka­wā, ka mea: “I te mea nāu i hua ai te rangi­mārie ki a mātou, he āta ngā­rahu hoki nāu i whaka­tika­tika­ina ai ngā kino ki tēnei iwi.
24.3: Nui atu tā mātou whaka­whetai mō aua mea ka riro mai nei i a mātou, i ngā wā katoa, i ngā wāhi katoa, e Pirika, e te tangata pai rawa.
24.4: Otiia, e kore e nui atu tāku whaka­ware i a koe, koia ka īnoi atu ki a koe kia pai koe ki te whaka­rongo mai ki ētahi kupu toru­toru a mātou.
24.5: I mau hoki i a mātou te korokē nei, he tangata whaka­tūtehu, e whaka­oho ana i ngā Hūrai katoa o te ao, ko ia hoki te tino take o te tītore­hanga ki tā ngā Nahareti.
24.6: I mea hoki ia kia whaka­noa­tia te teme­para: nā ka hopu mātou i a ia, ka mea kia whaka­wā­kia ia ki tā tō mātou ture i whaka­takoto ai.
24.7: Otirā, i puta mai a Raihia, te ranga­tira mano, ā, tango­hia kino­tia atu ana ia i ō mātou ringa.
24.8: Ā, ungā ana ōna kai­whaka­pae kia haere mai ki a koe: māu e ui ki a ia, kia rongo ai koe ki ēnei mea katoa e whaka­wā­kia nei ia e mātou.”
24.9: Ā, i whaka­ae hoki ngā Hūrai ki taua whaka­pae, i mea, “Koia tērā ko aua mea.” Tā Paora Tohe i mua i a Pirika
24.10: Ā, ka tohu atu te kāwana ki a ia kia kōrero, ka whaka­hokia e Paora, “E mātau ana ahau, ka maha ōu tau e whaka­wā nei koe i tēnei iwi, koia i pai ai tōku ngākau ki te tohe i te tika o āku mea.
24.11: E takoto kau ana hoki hei mōhio­tanga mōu, kāhore i maha ake i te tekau mā rua ngā rā ōku i haere nei ki Hiruhārama, ki te kara­kia.
24.12: Kīhai anō ahau i mau i a rātou i roto i te teme­para e totohe ana ki tētahi, e mea ana rānei i te mano kia tutū, kāhore i ngā whare kara­kia, kāhore anō hoki i te pā.
24.13: E kore anō e taea e rātou te whaka­tau ki ahau i tōu aro­aro ngā mea e whaka­wā­kia nei ahau e rātou.
24.14: Otirā, me whāki tēnei e ahau ki a koe, ko te Ara e kīa nei e rātou he tītore­hanga, ko tāku tēnā i ahau e kara­kia nei ki te Atua o ōku mātua; e whaka­pono ana hoki ahau ki ngā mea katoa kua oti te whaka­rite i roto i te ture, kua oti hoki te tuhi­tuhi ki tā ngā poro­piti.
24.15: E tū­mana­ko ana ki tā te Atua, ki tā ēnei anō hoki e whaka­ae nei, arā tēnei ake ka ara te hunga mate, ngā tāngata tika, ngā tāngata hē.
24.16: Tēnei anō tāku e whai nei, kia hara­kore tonu tōku hine­ngaro i te aro­aro o te Atua, o ngā tāngata.
24.17: “Nā, muri iho i ngā tau e maha, ka tae mai ahau ki te kawe mai i ngā mea ata­whai rawa­kore ki tōku iwi, me ngā whaka­here.
24.18: I kitea ahau i reira e rātou, e purea ana i roto i te teme­para, kāhore he hui­hui, kāhore he nga­ngau.
24.19: Tērā anō rā ētahi Hūrai nō Āhia; ko te tikanga kia haere mai rātou ki a koe ki te whaka­wā, ki te mea he mea tā rātou mōku.
24.20: Tēnei rānei mā ēnei tāngata tonu e kōrero, me i kitea e rātou he hē tōku, i ahau e tū ana i mua i te rū­nanga,
24.21: ko taua kupu kotahi pea i karanga ai ahau, i ahau e tū ana i roto i a rātou, ‘Ko te aranga o te hunga mate te mea e whaka­wā­kia nei ahau e koutou ināia­nei.’ ”
24.22: Otirā, i te mea he nui atu tōna mōhio ki taua Ritenga, ka ungā rātou e Pirika, ka mea ia, “Kia tae mai a Raihia, te ranga­tira mano, ka tino rapu ahau ki te tikanga o ā koutou mea.”
24.23: Nā, ka mea ia ki te kene­turio kia tiaki­na a Paora, kia waiho noa anō ia, kia kaua e rīria ōna hoa ina mahi ki a ia. Ko Paora i te Aroaro o Pirikia rāua ko Ruhuhira
24.24: Nā, muri iho i ētahi rā ka tae mai a Pirika rāua ko tāna wahine ko Ruruhira, he Hūrai, ka mea ia kia tīkina atu a Paora, ā, ka whaka­rongo ki a ia ki te whaka­pono ki a te Karaiti.
24.25: Ā, i a ia e kōrero ana ki ngā mea o te tika, ki te hia­hia kia pēhia, ki te whaka­wā­kanga kei te haere mai, ka wiri a Pirika, ka mea, “Haere āia­nei. Kia wātea ahau, ka karanga atu ai anō i a koe.”
24.26: Tohu noa hoki ka hoatu ki a ia he moni e Paora; koia i hono ai te tiki atu i a ia, te kōrero ki a ia.
24.27: Otirā, ka pahure ngā tau e rua, ka whaka­kapia a Pirika e Porohia Petuha, ā, i tōna hia­hia ki te whaka­mānawa­reka i ngā Hūrai, ka waiho e Pirika a Paora kia here ana.

25.1: Nō te taenga mai o Petuha ki te kāwana­tanga, ka toru ngā rā, ka haere atu ia i Hiha­ria ki Hiruhārama.
25.2: Nā, ka kōrero te tohu­nga nui me ngā ranga­tira o ngā Hūrai ki a ia mō Paora, ka tohe ki a ia,
25.3: kia whaka­ae­tia tā rātou mōna, kia tīkina atu ia ki Hiruhārama, he whanga hoki tō rātou mōna kia whaka­matea ki te ara.
25.4: Otirā, ka whaka­hokia e Petuha, kei Hiha­ria a Paora e pupuri ana, ā, tērā e hohoro tōna haere ki reira.
25.5: I mea anō ia, “Me haere tahi anō i ahau ki raro ngā mea ō koutou e whai mana ana, ki te whaka­wā i taua tangata, ki te mea he kino tōna.”
25.6: Ā, ka noho ia i a rātou mō ngā rā e waru, nga­huru rānei, nā, ka haere ki Hiha­ria; ao ake te rā ka noho ki te nohoa­nga whaka­wā, ā, ka mea kia āra­hina mai a Paora.
25.7: Ā, nō tōna taenga atu, e tū ana tērā ngā Hūrai i haere mai i Hiruhārama, he maha, he nui ngā hē i whaka­pā­ngia e rātou ki a Paora; heoi kīhai i ū tā rātou.
25.8: Ā, ka utua e Paora, “Kāhore rawa ōku hara ki te ture a ngā Hūrai, kāhore hoki ki te teme­para, kāhore anō ki a Hīhā.”
25.9: Heoi, ka mea a Petuha ki a Paora, i tōna hia­hia kia pai­ngia e ngā Hūrai, “E pai ana rānei koe kia haere ki Hiruhārama, ki reira whaka­wā­kia ai mō ēnei mea ki tōku aro­aro?”
25.10: Anō rā ko Paora, “E tū ana ahau ki te nohoa­nga whaka­wā o Hīhā, hei reira tonu ahau whaka­wā­kia ai; kāhore ōku hē ki ngā Hūrai, kua tino kitea nā hoki e koe.
25.11: Me he hē tōku, kua meinga rānei e ahau tētahi mea e tika ai te mate, e kore ahau e kino kia mate; tēnā ko tēnei he teka ngā mea e whaka­pā­ngia nei e rātou ki ahau, e kore e āhei kia tukua ahau e tētahi ki a rātou. He karanga tēnei nāku ki a Hīhā”.
25.12: Nā, ka kōrero­rero a Petuha ki te rū­nanga, ā, ka mea, “Kua karanga koe ki a Hīhā; nā me haere koe ki a Hīhā.” Ko Paora i te Aroaro o Akaripa rāua ko Pereniki
25.13: Ā muri iho i ētahi rā, ka tae atu a Kīngi Akaripa, rāua ko Pereniki ki Hiha­ria, ā, ka oha ki a Petuha.
25.14: Ā, ka pō maha rāua e noho ana i reira, ka kōrero­tia e Petuha ki te kīngi te take mō Paora, ka mea, “Tēnei tētahi tangata i waiho iho e Pirika e here ana.
25.15: Ā, i ahau i Hiruhārama, ka kōrero­tia mai ia ki ahau e ngā tohu­nga nui, e ngā kaumātua o ngā Hūrai, ka tono rātou kia whaka­wā­kia ia.
25.16: Nā, ko tāku whaka­hoki­nga atu ki a rātou, ‘Ehara i te rite­nga nā ngā tāngata o Roma kia tukua he tangata kia mate i te mea kīanō i tū­ta­taki noa te tangata e whaka­wā­kia ana ki ngā kai­whaka­pae, i whai wāhi rānei ki te whaka­hoki kupu ki te kupu whaka­wā mōna.’
25.17: Nō reira, i tō rātou mine­nga mai ki konei, kīhai ahau i whaka­roa; ao ake te rā ka noho ahau ki te nohoa­nga whaka­wā, ka mea kia āra­hina mai taua tangata.
25.18: Ā, i te tū­ranga o ngā kai­whaka­pae, kīhai tētahi hē o āku i whaka­aro ai i kōrero­tia e rātou mōna.
25.19: Heoi, he kupu tau­tohe­tohe nō tā rātou kara­kia tā rātou i mea ai ki a ia, ko tētahi Īhu anō i mate, e kīa ana hoki e Paora kei te ora.
25.20: Heoi, pōhewa noa iho ahau ki taua tau­tohe, ka mea hoki me kore ia e pai kia haere ki Hiruhārama, ki reira whaka­wā­kia ai mō aua mea.
25.21: Nō te karanga­tanga a Paora kia waiho ia kia whaka­rangona tāna e te eme­para, ka whaka­haua e ahau kia puri­tia ia, kia tukua rā anō ia e ahau ki a Hīhā.”
25.22: Ka mea a Akaripa ki a Petuha, “E hia­hia ana anō ahau kia rongo i taua tangata.” Ka mea ia, “Ko āpōpō koe rongo ai ki a ia.”
25.23: Heoi, i te aonga ake, ka tae atu a Akaripa rāua ko Pereniki, me ngā whaka­pai­pai maha, ā, tomo ana ki te whare whaka­rongo, rātou ko ngā ranga­tira mano, ko ngā tāngata nunui o te pā, ā, ka whaka­haua e Petuha, ka mauria mai a Paora.
25.24: Nā, ka mea a Petuha, “E Kīngi Akaripa, e ngā tāngata katoa hoki e noho nei tātou, ka kite koutou i tēnei tangata, i tohe mai ai ki ahau te hui­hui katoa o ngā Hūrai i Hiruhārama, i konei anō hoki, i karanga ai, ehara rawa i te tika kia waiho ia kia ora ana.
25.25: Otirā, i kite ahau, kāhore āna mahi e tika ai te mate; ā, i te mea nāna anō i karanga ki te eme­para, ka mea ahau kia ungā atu ia.
25.26: Kāhore ia āku tino mea e tuhi­tuhi atu ai ahau mōna ki tōku ariki. Koia ahau ka ārahi mai nei i a ia ki a koutou, ki a koe rawa anō, e Kīngi Akaripa, kia whai mea ai ahau hei tuhi­tuhi­nga atu, ua mutu te uiui.
25.27: Ki tāku hoki he mea hē kia ungā atu he here­here, ā, kia kaua hoki e kōrero­tia te mea i whaka­wā­kia ai ia.”

26.1: Nā, ko te mea­tanga a Akaripa ki a Paora, “E āhei ana koe kia kōrero i āu kōrero.” Kātahi, ka totoro te ringa o Paora, ā, ka kōrero ia:
26.2: “He koa ngā ngākau tēnei ki ahau, e Kīngi Akaripa, kia kōrero­tia e ahau ki a koe āia­nei ngā mea katoa e whaka­wā­kia nei ahau e ngā Hūrai;
26.3: he mōhio rawa hoki koe ki ngā rite­nga katoa, ki ngā tau­tohe hoki anō a ngā Hūrai; nā reira, kia pai koe ki te whaka­rongo mārie ki ahau.
26.4: “Ko tāku whaka­haere mai o tōku tama­riki­tanga, nō te tīma­tanga mai rā anō i roto i tōku iwi, i Hiruhārama hoki, e mōhio ana ngā Hūrai katoa.
26.5: Mōhio tonu rātou ki ahau ō mua iho, me i pai rātou ki te whaka­atu; ko tāku mahi, i whai i tā te tītore­hanga pakeke rawa o tō tātou kara­kia, i tā te Parihi.
26.6: Tēnei ahau te tū nei i konei, te whaka­wā­kia nei mō te tū­mana­ko ki te mea i kōrero­tia e te Atua i mua ki ō tātou mātua.
26.7: E tū­mana­ko nei ō tātou iwi kotahi tekau mā rua kia uru ki tēnei, i a rātou e mahi tonu nei ki te Atua i te ao, i te pō. Ko tēnei e tūmanako­hia atu nei e te kīngi, te mea e whaka­wā­kia nei ahau e ngā Hūrai.
26.8: He aha rawa kia kore e whaka­pono­hia e koutou, ki te mea ka whaka­ara ake te Atua i te hunga mate?
26.9: “Ko ahau nei, i whaka­aro ahau kia maha tonu ngā mea e mahia e ahau hei pēhi mō te ingoa o Īhu o Nahareta.
26.10: Āe, i meinga anō tēnei e ahau ki Hiruhārama. He toko­maha anō te hunga tapu i uakina e ahau ki ngā whare here­here, he mea tuku mai hoki ngā tikanga nā ngā tohu­nga nui ki ahau; ā, i te whaka­mate­nga i a rātou, i whaka­ae ahau kia pērā­tia rātou.
26.11: He maha anō āku whiu­nga i a rātou i roto i ngā whare kara­kia katoa, i meinga anō rātou e ahau kia kohu­kohu; heoi, hau­rangi noa iho ahau ki a rātou, whāia ana e ahau, ā taea noatia ngā pā o tawhiti. Ka Kōrero a Paora mō tōna Huringa ki te Whakapono (Ngā Mahi 9.1-19; 22.6-16)
26.12: “Nāwai ā, i ahau e haere ana ki Ramahiku, me ngā tikanga, me te kupu whaka­ae a ngā tohu­nga nui,
26.13: i te pou­tū­mārō­tanga, e te kīngi, ka kitea e ahau i te ara he mārama i te rangi e tīaho ana ki ahau, ki ōku hoa haere anō, tērā atu i te mārama o te rā.
26.14: Heoi, hinga ana mātou katoa ki te whenua, ka rongo ahau i te reo e kōrero ana ki ahau, nō ngā Hiperu anō hoki te reo, e mea ana, ‘E Haora, e Haora, he aha tāu e whaka­toi nei i ahau? Ehara tāu te whana ki ngā koi­koi.’
26.15: Anō rā ko ahau, ‘Ko wai koe, e te Ariki?’ Ka mea ia, ‘Ko Īhu ahau e whaka­toia nei e koe.
26.16: Otirā whaka­tika, e tū ōu wae­wae ki runga. Ko te mea tēnei i puta ai ahau ki a koe, kia meinga koe hei kai­mahi, hei kai­whaka­atu mō ngā mea i kite nei koe, mō ngā mea anō e kitea ai ahau e koe.
26.17: Ka whaka­ora­ngia koe i te iwi, i ngā tauiwi, ka tonoa nei koe e ahau ki a rātou,
26.18: hei whaka­titiro i ō rātou kanohi, hei whaka­tahuri i a rātou i te pōuri ki te mārama, i te kaha o Hātana ki te Atua, kia whi­whi ai rātou ki te muru­nga hara, ki tētahi wāhi anō i roto i te hunga ka oti te whaka­tapu i runga i te whaka­pono ki ahau.’ Ka Kōrero a Paora mō āna Mahi
26.19: “Nō reira, kīhai ahau i whaka­tuturi, e Kīngi Akaripa, ki tō te rangi kite­nga.
26.20: Heoi, i kōrero ahau ki te hunga i Ramahiku i te tua­tahi, ā, i Hiruhārama, ki te whenua katoa anō o Hūria, ki ngā tauiwi hoki, kia rīpe­netā, kia tahuri ki te Atua, me te mahi anō i ngā mahi tika o te rīpe­netā.
26.21: Nō reira ngā Hūrai i hopu ai i ahau i te teme­para, i whai ai ki te whaka­mate i ahau.
26.22: Heoi, ka āwhina­tia mai ahau e te Atua, ka tū tonu nei ahau, ā mohoa noa nei, me te kōrero ki te iti, ki te rahi, kāhore āku kupu kē ake i tā ngā poro­piti rātou ko Mohi i mea ai meāke puta:
26.23: arā ko te Karaiti kia mate, ko ia te mātā­mua o te aranga o te hunga mate, māna anō e whaka­puaki te mārama ki te iwi, ki ngā tauiwi.”
26.24: I a ia e kōrero ana i ēnei mea, nui atu te reo o Petuha ki te karanga, “E Paora, he hau­rangi koe; nā te nui o tāu kōrero puka­puka i hau­rangi ai koe!”
26.25: Anō rā ko ia, “Kāhore ōku hau­rangi, e Petuha, e te tangata pai rawa; engari he pono, he whai whaka­aro, āku kupu e whaka­puaki nei.
26.26: E mātau ana hoki te kīngi ki ēnei mea, i māia ai ahau ki te kōrero ki a ia. E mea ana hoki ahau, kāhore tētahi o ēnei mea i ngaro i a ia; kīhai hoki tēnei mea i mahia i te koko­nga.
26.27: E whaka­pono ana rānei koe ki ngā poro­piti, e Kīngi Akaripa? E mea ana ahau, tēnei koe te whaka­pono nei.”
26.28: Anō rā ko Akaripa ki a Paora, “Wāhi iti kua riro atu ahau ki tāu, ki tā te Karaiti tikanga.”
26.29: Nā, ko te mea­tanga a Paora, “Pai tonu kia īnoi ahau ki te Atua kia kaua e iti, engari kia tino nui, kia kaua anō e waiho i tōu kotahi, engari, kia tino rite ki ahau te hunga katoa e whaka­rongo nei ki ahau ināia­nei; ko ēnei meka­meka ia kia kore.”
26.30: Nā, ka whaka­tika te kīngi, me te kāwana, me Pereniki, me te hunga i noho tahi rātou.
26.31: Nā, i a rātou ka wehe kē, ka kōrero­rero ki a rātou anō, ka mea, “Kāhore he hanga a tēnei tangata e tika ai te mate, te here rānei.”
26.32: Kātahi, ka mea a Akaripa ki a Petuha, “Ka tukua tēnei tangata kia haere, me i kaua ia te karanga ki a Hīhā.”

27.1: Ā, nō ka takoto te tikanga kia rere mātou ki Itari, ka tukua a Paora me ērā atu here­here ki tētahi kene­turio ko Huriu te ingoa, nō te hapū o Ākuhata.
27.2: Nā, eke ana mātou ki tētahi kai­puke o Ataramitiuma, e tika ana rā ngā kāinga o Āhia, rere ana mātou; ko Aritaku o Teharonika, he tangata nō Makeronia, tō mātou hoa.
27.3: Pō tahi ka ū mātou ki Hairona. Nā, ka ngā­wari te mahi a Huriu ki a Paora, tukua ana ia kia haere ki ōna hoa kia ata­whai­tia.
27.4: Rere atu ana i reira, ka miri haere mātou i te taha o Kai­peru, nō te mea i hē te hau.
27.5: Whiti ana mātou i te moana o Kiri­kia, o Pamapu­ria, ka ū ki Maira, he pā nō Raikia.
27.6: Nā, ka mau i te kene­turio he kai­puke ki reira nō Arēhānaria, e rere ana ki Itari; ka utaina mātou e ia ki runga.
27.7: Ā, ka pō maha i pūhoi ai te rere, ka whiti whaka­uaua ki te rite­nga atu o Hiniru, ā, tē tukua mātou e te hau, ka miri haere mātou i te taha o Kariti i te rite­nga atu o Haramone;
27.8: ā, ka pahemo whaka­uaua a reira, ka ū mātou ki tētahi kāinga, ko Ngā Kokoru Āta­ahua te ingoa; e tata ana a reira ki te pā o Rāhia.
27.9: Ā, ka maha ngā rā ka pahemo, nā, kua kino te rere­nga, nō te mea kua pahemo kē te Pō Noho­puku, ā, ka whaka­tūpato a Paora,
27.10: ka mea ki a rātou, “E mara mā, e kite ana ahau i te kino, i te nui o te mate e pā mai i tēnei rere­nga, ehara i te mea ko te utanga anake me te kai­puke, engari, ko tātou anō.”
27.11: Otirā, nui kē atu te āro o te kene­turio ki te kāpene rāua ko te tangata nōna te kai­puke i tāna ki ngā mea i kōrero ai a Paora.
27.12: Ā, i te mea kīhai i pai taua kokoru hei tūnga i te hōtoke, ka mea te toko­maha kia rere atu anō i reira, me kore e ū ki Pinike, ki reira tū ai i te hōtoke; he kokoru ia nō Kariti, e anga ana ki te uru mā tonga, ki te uru mā raki. Te Marangai i te Moana
27.13: Ā, ka pā reka­reka te tonga, ka mea rātou kua taea tā rātou i whaka­aro ai, ka hūtia te punga; ā, miri haere ana i Kariti.
27.14: Nā, kīhai i roa ka puta he hau nui whaka­hara­hara, ko Urokarairona te ingoa.
27.15: Ā, ka kā­hakina te kai­puke, tē ngo­ngo ki te hau, nā, ka tukua e mātou ki tāna, ā, ka pāea.
27.16: Nā, ka miri i te taha ruru o tētahi motu, tōna ingoa ko Karaura; ka riro whaka­uaua mai te poti i a mātou.
27.17: Ā, ka hūtia ake, ka hanga ki te whakaū, meatia he awhi mō te tangere o te puke; ā, nō ka mataku kei eke ki te tahuna, ki Hatihi, ka tukua te rā, ā, ka pāea haere­tia.
27.18: Ā, nō ka tino ākina mātou e te tūpuhi, i te aonga ake ka ākiri­tia ngā utanga.
27.19: Ā, i te toru o ngā rā ka makā atu e rātou ki ō rātou ringa ngā mea ake o te kai­puke.
27.20: Ā, he maha ngā rā i kore ai e puta te rā me ngā whetū, kīhai anō i iti te tūpuhi i ākina ai mātou, nā, ka mahue katoa tō mātou whaka­aro ki te ora.
27.21: Heoi, ka roa te noho­puku, nā, ka tū a Paora i waenga­nui o rātou, ka mea, “E mara mā, engari rā me i rongo koutou ki ahau, kia kaua e rere mai i Kariti, kei pā mai tēnei kino, tēnei mate.
27.22: Nā, ko tāku kupu tēnei ki a koutou, Kia mārama te ngākau; e kore hoki e mate tētahi o koutou, ko te kai­puke anake.
27.23: I tū hoki ki tōku taha i tēnei pō he ana­hera nā te Atua, nāna nei ahau, ko ia tāku e kara­kia atu nei,
27.24: i mea mai, ‘Aua e mataku, e Paora; me tū koe ki te aro­aro o Hīhā; nāna, kua hoatu ki a koe e te Atua te hunga katoa e rere tahi nā koutou.’
27.25: Nā, kia mārama te ngākau, e mara mā; e whaka­pono ana hoki ahau ki te Atua, e rite anō ki tāna i kōrero mai ai ki ahau.
27.26: Otirā kua takoto te tikanga kia eke tātou ki tētahi motu.”
27.27: Nā, i te tekau mā whā o ngā pō, i a mātou e kāhaki­hakina ana i te moana o Aria, i waenga­nui pō, ka mea ngā hēra­mana kei te whaka­tata rātou ki tētahi whenua.
27.28: Nā, ka whaka­tātūtū rātou, ka kite e rua tekau mārō, ā, ka neke tata atu, ka whaka­tātūtū anō, ka kite kotahi tekau mā rima mārō.
27.29: Nā, ka mataku kei pāea mātou ki ngā toka, ka tukua ngā punga e whā i te kei, ka hia­hia ki te awa­tea.
27.30: Ā, i ngā hēra­mana e mea ana kia oma atu i te kai­puke, e tuku ana hoki i te poti ki te moana, he whaka­ware, kia kīa ai e tukua ana ētahi punga i te ihu.
27.31: Ka mea a Paora ki te kene­turio rātou ko ngā hōia, “Ki te kore ēnei e noho ki te kai­puke, e kore koutou e taea te whaka­ora.”
27.32: Kātahi, ka tapa­hia ngā whaka­heke o te poti e ngā hōia, ā, tukua ana kia taka atu.
27.33: Ā, i te mea meāke pūao te rā, ka tohe a Paora ki a rātou katoa kia kai, ka mea, “Ko te tekau mā whā tēnei o ngā rā e tatari nei koutou, e noho­puku nei, tē ō te kai.
27.34: Koia ahau ka tohe nei kia kai; ko tētahi mea hoki tēnei e ora ai koutou. E kore hoki e nga­horo tētahi huru­huru o te ūpoko o tētahi o koutou.”
27.35: Ā, nō tāna kōrero­tanga i ēnei kupu, ka mau ki te taro, ka whaka­whetai ki te Atua i te aro­aro o te katoa; ā, ka whawhati, ka tīmata te kai.
27.36: Nā, ka mārama ngā ngākau o rātou katoa, ka kai anō rātou.
27.37: Nā, e rua rau e whitu tekau mā ono mātou katoa i te kai­puke.
27.38: Ā, nō ka mākona i te kai, ka whaka­māmā rātou i te kai­puke, ka ākiri­tia te wīti ki te moana. Te Pākarutanga o te Kaipuke
27.39: Ā, ka ao te rā kīhai rātou i mōhio ki tērā whenua; engari, i kite rātou i tētahi kokoru he one tō reira, ā, ka mea rātou me kore e āhei te āki atu i te kai­puke ki roto.
27.40: Nā, tapa­hia ana e rātou ngā punga, tukua ana ki te moana, i whaka­koro­koroa anō ngā here o te urungi, ka hūtia anō te rā nui ki te hau, ka tika atu ki te one.
27.41: Ā, ka puta atu ki tētahi wāhi, he tai papaki­rua, ka whaka­ekea te kai­puke; ā, titi tonu te ihu, mau tonu, ko te kei i pakaru i te kaha o te ngaru.
27.42: Ā, ki tā ngā hōia whaka­aro, me whaka­mate ngā here­here, kei kau tētahi ki uta, kei oma.
27.43: Ko te kene­turio ia i mea kia whaka­ora­ngia a Paora, kīhai hoki i tukua ki tā rātou i whaka­aro ai; nā, ka mea ia, kia mātua peke atu te hunga e mātau ana ki te kau, kia kau ki uta.
27.44: Ko ērā atu, ko ētahi i runga i ngā papa, ko ētahi i runga i ētahi o ngā mea o te kai­puke. Heoi, tae ora katoa ana rātou ki uta.

28.1: Ā, ka ora mātou, kātahi ka mōhio ko Merita te ingoa o te motu.
28.2: Nā, kīhai i nohi­nohi te ata­whai a ngā tāngata māori ki a mātou. Ka tahuna he kāpura, whaka­manu­hiri­tia ana mātou katoa, nō te mea e ua ana te ua, nō te mātao hoki.
28.3: Nā, ka kohiko­hia e Paora he pūpū wahie, ā, makā ana e ia ki te kāpura; heoi puta mai ana he neke i te wera, ka mau ki tōna ringa.
28.4: Ā, i te kite­nga o ngā tāngata māori i te ngā­rara e were­were ana ki tōna ringa, ka mea rātou tētahi ki tētahi, “Koia, he tangata kōhuru tēnei, ka ora nei ia i te moana, nā, kīhai i tukua e te tika kia ora.”
28.5: Otiia, i ruia atu e ia te ngā­rara ki te kāpura, ā, kīhai ia i mate, kīhai i aha.
28.6: Nā, whanga noa rātou kia tetere ia, kia hinga whaka­rere rānei, kia mate; heoi, ka roa noa tō rātou whanga­nga, ā, i te kite­nga kāhore he aha i pā ki a ia, ka puta kē ō rātou whaka­aro, ka mea, he atua ia.
28.7: I taua wāhi te kāinga o te tino ranga­tira o te motu, ko Pupiriu te ingoa. He manu­hiri mātou nāna; e toru ngā rā i ata­whai­tia ai mātou e ia.
28.8: Nā, i te takoto te papa o Pupiriu e mate ana i te kirikā, i te kōripi. Heoi, ka tomo a Paora ki a ia, ka īnoi, ka whaka­pā i ōna ringa ki a ia, ā, ora ake ia.
28.9: Ā, i te mea­tanga o tēnei, nā, ka haere mai anō ērā atu o te motu he mate o rātou, ā, whaka­ora­ngia ana.
28.10: Nui atu anō te hōnore i whaka­hōnore­tia ai mātou e rātou; ā, i tō mātou rere­nga ka utaina ngā mea e rite ana mā mātou. Mai i Merita ki Roma
28.11: Ā muri iho i ngā marama e toru, ka rere mātou i runga i tētahi kai­puke o Arēhānaria, i tū nei ki taua motu i te hōtoke, ko Katoro rāua ko Poruku te tohu.
28.12: Nā, ka ū ki Hairakuha, ā, e toru ō mātou rā i noho ai ki reira.
28.13: Nā, ka āwhio ake mātou i reira, ka ū ki Rekiuma. Ka pō tahi ka pā te tonga, ā, i te rua o ngā rā ka ū ki Puteori.
28.14: Ā, nō ka kitea ngā tuā­kana i reira, ka tohea mātou kia noho i a rātou, kia whitu ngā rā. Heoi, haere ana mātou ki Roma.
28.15: Ā, ka rongo ngā tuā­kana o reira ki a mātou, ka haere ake ki te whaka­tau i a mātou ki Te Mākete o Apiu, ki Whare­toru. Ā, i te kite­nga o Paora i a rātou, ka whaka­whetai ki te Atua, ka ora te ngākau. Kei Roma
28.16: Nā, ka tae mātou ki Roma, ka hoatu ngā here­here e te kene­turio ki te ranga­tira hōia. Ko Paora ia i tukua kia noho motu kē rāua ko tētahi hōia hei tiaki i a ia.
28.17: Ā, i muri i ngā rā e toru, ka hui­huia e Paora ngā tino tāngata o ngā Hūrai; ā, nō tō rātou mine­nga mai, ka mea ia ki a rātou, “E ōku tuā­kana, ko ahau kāhore ōku hara ki te iwi, ki ngā rite­nga rānei a ngā mātua, i tukua ai ahau i Hiruhārama hei here­here ki ngā ringa o ngā tāngata o Roma.
28.18: Ā, i mea rātou, i tā rātou whaka­wā­kanga i ahau kia tukua ahau, nō te mea kāhore he take e mate ai ahau.
28.19: Heoi, ka whaka­hē tonu ngā Hūrai; e taea hoki te aha? Karanga ana ahau ki a Hīhā; kāhore ia āku mea e whaka­wā ai ahau i tōku iwi.
28.20: Koia ahau i karanga ai i a koutou kia kite, kia kōrero ki ahau. Nō te mea hoki ko tā Īharaira e tū­mana­ko nei te mea i herea ai ahau ki tēnei meka­meka.”
28.21: Nā, ko tā rātou mea­tanga ki a ia, “Kāhore he puka­puka mōu i tae mai ki a mātou i Hūria, kāhore anō tētahi o ngā tuā­kana i haere mai nei i kawe kupu mai, i kōrero mai rānei i tētahi kino mōu.
28.22: Otirā, e mea ana mātou kia rongo ki a koe ki ōu whaka­aro. E mōhio ana hoki mātou ki tēnei wehe­nga, e kōrero­tia kino­tia ana i ngā wāhi katoa.”
28.23: Ā, ka oti te whaka­rite he rā ki a ia, he toko­maha i haere mai ki a ia ki tōna whare; ā, whaka­kitea ana e ia ki a rātou, whaka­atu­ria ana te ranga­tira­tanga o te Atua, ā, ka kukume i a rātou ki ngā mea o Īhu, tiki atu ai i tā te ture a Mohi, i tā ngā poro­piti, nō te ata ā ahi­ahi noa.
28.24: Ko ētahi i whaka­pono ki ngā mea i kōrero­tia, ko ētahi kīhai i whaka­pono.
28.25: Ā, te rite ā rātou kōrero, ka puta atu rātou, i muri i te kōrero­tanga a Paora i tētahi kupu, “Tika tonu te kōrero a te Wairua Tapu i a Ihāia poro­piti ki ō koutou mātua,
28.26: i mea nei, ‘Haere ki tēnei iwi, mea atu, Rongo noa koutou, e kore e mātau; ti­tiro noa koutou, e kore e kite.
28.27: Kua mā­to­toru hoki te ngākau o tēnei iwi, he pūhoi ngā tari­nga ki te whaka­rongo, ō rātou kanohi kua whaka­moea e rātou; kei kite ngā kanohi, kei rongo ngā tari­nga, kei mātau te ngākau, ā, ka tahuri rātou, ka ora i ahau.’
28.28: “Nā, kia mōhio koutou, ka tukua tēnei whaka­ora­nga a te Atua ki ngā tauiwi, ā, ka rongo rātou.”
28.29: Ā, ka mutu ēnei kōrero āna, ka haere ngā Hūrai, he nui hoki tā rātou tau­tohe­tohe ki a rātou anō.
28.30: Ā, e rua tino tau i noho ai a Paora ki tōna whare i utua e ia, ā, manaaki­tia ana e ia te hunga katoa e tomo ana ki a ia;
28.31: ā, māia tonu ia ki te kauwhau i te ranga­tira­tanga o te Atua, ki te whaka­ako i ngā mea o te Ariki, o Īhu Karaiti, kīhai anō i rīria.

1.1: Nā Paora, nā te pono­nga a Īhu Karaiti, i karanga­tia hei āpō­toro, i motu­hia ki te rongo­pai a te Atua,
1.2: i kōrero­tia rā e ia i mua, arā e āna poro­piti i roto i ngā karaipi­ture tapu,
1.3: mō tāna Tama, i whānau nei he uri nō Rāwiri, nō te wāhi ki te kiko­kiko;
1.4: i whaka­pua­kina mai nei ko te Tama a te Atua i runga i te kaha, i runga i tā te Wairua o te tapu, i te mea ka whaka­ara­hia i te hunga mate; arā a Īhu Karaiti, tō tātou Ariki.
1.5: Nāna nei mātou i whi­whi ai ki te aroha noa, ki te mahi āpō­toro, kia ngohe­ngohe ai, kia whaka­pono ai ngā iwi katoa, hei mea mō tōna ingoa.
1.6: Nō rātou nei hoki koutou, he mea karanga hei hunga mō Īhu Karaiti.
1.7: Ki te hunga katoa i Roma, e aroha­ina nei e te Atua, ka oti nei te karanga hei hunga tapu. Kia tau ki a koutou te aroha noa me te rangi­mārie, he mea nā te Atua, nā tō tātou Matua, nā te Ariki hoki, nā Īhu Karaiti. He Karakia Whakawhetai
1.8: Ko tāku mea tua­tahi, he whaka­whetai ki tōku Atua i roto i a Īhu Karaiti mō koutou katoa, nō te mea e kōrero­tia ana tō koutou whaka­pono i te ao katoa.
1.9: Ko te Atua, e mahi nei tōku wairua ki a ia i roto i te rongo­pai o tāna Tama, hei kai­whaka­atu mōku, mō te mau tonu o tāku whaka­hua­hua i a koutou, ā, i āku karakia­tanga i ngā wā katoa,
1.10: e īnoi ana me kore e pai te Atua kia whaka­tikaia tāku haere atu ki a koutou.
1.11: Nui atu hoki tōku hia­hia kia kite i a koutou, kia whaka­whi­whi ai ahau i a koutou ki tētahi mea hōmai, he mea wairua, kia whaka­ūngia ai koutou;
1.12: arā, kia ora ngā­tahi ō tātou ngākau, tōku i tō koutou whaka­pono, ō koutou i tōku.
1.13: Nā, e kore ahau e pai, e ōku tēina kia ngaro i a koutou te maha o āku mea­tanga kia haere atu ki a koutou, heoi, āraia mai ana ahau, ā, mohoa noa nei, kia whi­whi ai ahau ki tētahi hua i roto i a koutou hoki, kia pērā me te mea i ērā atu tauiwi.
1.14: He nama kei runga i ahau nā ngā Kariki, ā, nā ngā tau­tangata, nā te hunga mōhio, ā, nā te hunga whaka­aro­kore.
1.15: Nā reira, e ngākau nui ana ahau kia whaka­paua tāku ki te kauwhau hoki i te rongo­pai ki a koutou i Roma. Te Kaha o te Rongopai
1.16: Kāhore hoki ōku whaka­mā ki te rongo­pai; ko te kaha hoki ia o te Atua hei whaka­ora mō ngā tāngata katoa e whaka­pono ana; mō te Hūrai ki mua, mō te Kariki anō hoki.
1.17: Ā, kei reira e whaka­kitea ana tā te Atua tika, he mea nō te whaka­pono ki te whaka­pono; kua oti nei hoki te tuhi­tuhi, “Mā te whaka­pono e ora ai te tangata tika.” Te Hara Tangata
1.18: E whaka­kitea iho ana hoki i te rangi tō te Atua riri ki ngā karakia­kore­tanga katoa, ki ngā hē o ngā tāngata e pēhi ana i te pono i runga i te hē.
1.19: Kei roto nei i a rātou e mārama ana ngā mea o te Atua e taea te mōhio; kua whaka­mārama­tia hoki e te Atua ki a rātou.
1.20: E kitea nuitia ana hoki ngā mea ōna, kāhore nei i kitea, nō te hanga­nga iho rā o te ao, e mōhio­tia ana ki ngā mea i hangā, arā tōna kaha mau tonu, me tōna atua­tanga; kia kore ai he kupu whaka­hoki mā rātou.
1.21: I a rātou hoki e mātau ana ki te Atua, kīhai rātou i whaka­korōria i a ia hei Atua, kīhai hoki i whaka­whetai; heoi, kua kūware ō rātou whaka­aro, ā, whaka­pōuri­tia ana tō rātou ngākau pōhēhē.
1.22: I a rātou e mea ana he mōhio rātou, nā, ka wai­rangi,
1.23: ā, whaka­putaia kētia ake te korōria o te Atua e kore nei e pirau, kia rite ki te āhua o te tangata pirau noa, o ngā manu hoki, o ngā kararehe wae­wae whā, o ngā mea ngōki­ngōki.
1.24: Koia rātou i tukua ai e te Atua ki te mahi poke, i runga i ngā hia­hia o ō rātou ngākau, kia whaka­tūtūā­tia iho ai ō rātou tinana e rātou anō, tō tētahi e tētahi;
1.25: i te mea kua whaka­whiti rātou i tō te Atua pono mō te teka, ā, kara­kia ana, mahi ana ki te mea hanga, kapea ake te Kai­hanga, ko ia nei te whaka­pai­ngia ake ake. Āmine.
1.26: Koia rātou i tukua ai e te Atua ki ngā hia­hia tūtūā. Ko ā rātou wāhine hoki, mahue ake i a rātou te tikanga māori, kei te ngau kē noa atu.
1.27: Me ngā tāne anō, whaka­rērea ake e rātou te tikanga māori ki te wahine, ānō he ahi te kānga o tō rātou hia­hia ki a rātou anō; ngā tāne ki ngā tāne, mahi ai i te mea whaka­mā, me te whi­whi anō ki te utu e rite ana mō tō rātou ngau­nga kētanga.
1.28: Ā, i a rātou kīhai nei i pai kia mau tonu te Atua ki ō rātou mahara, tukua ana rātou e te Atua ki te hine­ngaro hē kia mahia ngā mea kāhore e tau kia mahia.
1.29: Kī tonu rātou i ngā mahi hē katoa, i te kino, i te apo, i te mauā­hara; whawhao rawa i te hae, i te kōhuru, i te totohe, i te hīanga, i te whanokē; he hunga kō­humu­humu,
1.30: he hunga ngau­tuarā, kino ki te Atua, he hunga whaka­hīhī, whaka­kake, whaka­peha­peha, he kai­tito i ngā mea kino. E turi ana ki ngā mātua,
1.31: kāhore ō rātou mātau­ranga, he hunga kupu taka, kāhore nei he aroha, kāhore e tohu tangata.
1.32: Ahakoa e mātau ana anō rātou ki tā te Atua tikanga, he tika te mate mō ngā kai­mahi i ēnei mea, heoi, ka mahi tonu rātou i aua mea me te whaka­ae hoki ki te hunga e pērā ana te mahi.

2.1: Nā, kāhore he kupu whaka­hoki māu, e koe, e te tangata e whaka­hē ana; i a koe hoki e whaka­hē nā i tērā, e whaka­tau ana koe i te hē ki a koe anō; kei te mahi hoki koe, te kai­whaka­hē, i aua mea nā anō.
2.2: Nā, e mātau ana tātou kei runga i te pono te whaka­hē­nga a te Atua mō ngā kai­mahi i aua mea.
2.3: Ko tōu whaka­aro rānei tēnei, e te tangata e whaka­hē ana ki ngā kai­mahi i aua mea, e mahi nā anō koe i aua mea, ko koe e ora i tā te Atua whaka­hē?
2.4: E whaka­hāwea ana rānei koe ki ngā rawa o tōna ngā­wari, o tāna tikanga māhaki, o tōna manawa­nui, e ranea tonu nei; tē mahara ko te ngā­wari o te Atua hei ārahi i a koe ki te rīpe­netā?
2.5: Heoi, pakeke tonu koe, kāhore e rīpe­netā tōu ngākau, e pū­ranga ana koe i te riri mōu, mō te rā o te riri, o te whaka­kite­nga mai anō i tā te Atua whaka­wā­kanga tika.
2.6: Māna e hōmai ki tētahi, ki tētahi, kia rite ki ā rātou mahi.
2.7: Ki te hunga e whai ana ki te korōria, ki te hōnore, ki te pirau­kore, me te mau anō ki te mahi pai, he ora tonu.
2.8: Ki te hunga ia e totohe ana, e turi ana ki te pono, e whaka­rongo ana hoki ki te hē, he riri, he ārita­rita.
2.9: He pāwera, he raru, mō ngā wairua tangata katoa e mahi ana i te kino, mō te Hūrai ki mua, mō te Kariki anō hoki;
2.10: he korōria ia, he hōnore, he rangi­mārie, mō ngā tāngata katoa e mahi ana i te pai, mō te Hūrai ki mua, mō te Kariki anō hoki.
2.11: Kāhore hoki a te Atua whaka­pai kanohi.
2.12: Ko te hunga hoki i hara ture­kore, ka ngaro ture­kore anō hoki; me te hunga i hara i runga i te ture, kei te ture anō he whaka­hē mō rātou.
2.13: He teka hoki ko ngā kai­whaka­rongo o te ture e tika ki tā te Atua; engari, ko ngā kai­mahi o te ture e whaka­tikaia.
2.14: I te mea hoki e mahia māori­tia ana ngā mea o te ture e ngā tauiwi, kāhore nei ō rātou ture, ko ēnei, kāhore nei ō rātou ture, hei ture ki a rātou anō.
2.15: I te mea ka whaka­kite rātou i te mahi a te ture, he mea tuhi­tuhi ki ō rātou ngākau, me te whaka­ae tahi anō ō rātou hine­ngaro, ko ō rātou whaka­aro kei te whaka­hēhē, kei te whaka­tika­tika rānei i a rātou.
2.16: I te rā e whaka­wā ai te Atua i ngā mea ngaro a ngā tāngata, he mea whaka­rite tonu ki tāku rongo­pai, he mea­tanga nā Īhu Karaiti. Ngā Hūrai me te Ture
2.17: Otirā, me­he­mea e tapa­ina ana koe he Hūrai, ā, e whaka­whiri­naki ana koe ki te ture, e whaka­mana­mana ana ki te Atua;
2.18: ā, e mōhio ana ki tāna e pai ai, ā, e kitea ana e koe ngā mea e tino pai ana, he mea whaka­ako hoki koe nā te ture;
2.19: ā, e ū ana tōu whaka­aro, ko koe hei kai­ārahi mō ngā matapō, hei mārama mō te hunga i roto i te pōuri,
2.20: hei kai­whaka­tika­tika mō ngā kūware, hei kai­whaka­ako mō ngā kō­hunga­hunga; kei a koe hoki te āhua o te mātau­ranga, o te pono i runga i te ture.
2.21: He kai­whaka­ako koe i tērā atu, e kore ianei koe e whaka­ako i a koe anō? E kauwhau nā koe kia kaua e tāhae, e tāhae ana rānei koe?
2.22: Ā, koe e mea nā, Kaua e pūremu, e pūremu ana rānei koe? Ā, koe e whaka­riha­riha nā ki ngā whaka­pakoko, e tāhae ana rānei koe i ngā mea o ngā teme­para?
2.23: Ā, koe e whaka­mana­mana nā ki te ture, kei te whaka­iti rānei koe i te Atua i te mea ka takahi koe i te ture?
2.24: “Nā koutou hoki i kohu­kohua ai te ingoa o te Atua i roto i ngā tauiwi, i pērā­tia ai me te mea kua oti te tuhi­tuhi.”
2.25: E whai tikanga ana hoki te kotinga, ki te mahia e koe te ture; tēnā ki te takahi koe i te ture, ka riro tōu kotinga hei kotinga­kore.
2.26: Nā, ki te mau i te kotinga­kore ngā tikanga o te ture, e kore ianei tōna kotinga­kore e kīa hei kotinga?
2.27: Ā, ki te rite te ture i te mea kīhai kotia māori­tia, e kore ianei ia e whaka­hē i a koe, e whi­whi nā ki te kupu tuhi­tuhi me te kotinga, i a koe e takahi nā i te ture?
2.28: Ehara hoki i te Hūrai te mea ko waho noa iho tōna āhua Hūrai; ehara anō i te kotinga te mea nō waho, nō te kiko­kiko.
2.29: Engari, he Hūrai ia, nō roto tōna āhua Hūrai; ā, ko te kotinga, nō te ngākau, he mea wairua, he teka nā te kupu tuhi­tuhi; ehara hoki i te mea e whaka­moe­miti­tia ana e te tangata, engari e te Atua.

3.1: Ha, he aha rā te painga i hua ki te Hūrai? He aha te rawa o te kotinga?
3.2: He nui rā i ngā mea katoa. Ko te tua­tahi, kua ākona rātou ki ngā kupu a te Atua.
3.3: Ka pēhea, me­he­mea kāhore he whaka­pono o ētahi? E taka rānei tō te Atua pono i tō rātou whaka­pono kore?
3.4: Kāhore rāpea! Engari ko te Atua kia kitea he pono, ko ngā tāngata katoa he teka kau; ko te mea hoki ia i tuhi­tuhia, “Kia tika ai tāu i tāu kōrero­tanga, kia puta ai tāu ina whaka­wā­kia koe.”
3.5: Ha, ki te mea nā tō tātou hē i kitea nuitia ai tō te Atua tika, me pēhea he kupu mā tātou? E hē ana rānei te Atua i a ia e whaka­pā ana i te riri? (He kupu tangata tēnei nāku.)
3.6: Kāhore rāpea! Pēnei me pēhea te Atua e whaka­wā ai i te ao?
3.7: Nā, ki te mea nā tōku teka i hira rawa ai tō te Atua pono hei korōria mōna; he aha ahau i whaka­hē­ngia tonu­tia ai ānō hei tangata hara?
3.8: He aha hoki tē pēnei ai, ā, ko te kupu whaka­pae teka tēnei mō mātou, ā, ki tā ētahi ko tā mātou kupu tēnei, “Tātou ka mahi i te kino, kia puta ai he pai”? Tika tonu te tau o te hē ki a rātou. Kāhore he Tangata e Tika ana
3.9: He aha koia? He pai ake rānei tō mātou wāhi i tō rātou? Kāhore rā hoki; kua oti hoki te whaka­pā e mātou i mua he hē ki ngā Hūrai, ki ngā Kariki, kei raro katoa rātou i te hara;
3.10: ko te mea hoki ia i tuhi­tuhia: “Kāhore he tangata tika, kāhore kia kotahi;
3.11: kāhore he tangata e mātau ana, kāhore he tangata e rapu ana i te Atua.
3.12: Kua peka kē rātou katoa, kua kino ngā­tahi; kāhore he tangata e mahi ana i te pai, kāhore rawa kia kotahi.
3.13: He urupā puare noa tō rātou koro­koro; e pati­pati ana ō rātou arero; kei roto i ō rātou ngutu te wai whaka­mate o ngā nākahi;
3.14: kī tonu ō rātou māngai i te kanga, i te nana­kia.
3.15: Ko ō rātou wae­wae, hohoro tonu ki te whaka­heke toto;
3.16: he whaka­ngaro, he ngākau pōuri, kei ō rātou ara;
3.17: kāhore hoki rātou i mōhio ki te ara o te rangi­mārie.
3.18: Kāhore he wehi o te Atua i mua i ō rātou kanohi.”
3.19: Nā, e mātau ana tātou ki ngā kupu o te ture, e kōrero ana ki te hunga i te ture, kia kopia ai ngā māngai katoa, kia whaka­wā­kia ai te ao katoa e te Atua.
3.20: Nō te mea kāhore he mahi o te ture e tika ai tētahi kiko­kiko i tōna aro­aro; mā roto mai i te ture te mātau­ranga ki te hara. Te Tikanga a te Atua hei Whakatika i a Tātou
3.21: Otiia, kua whaka­kitea ināia­nei he tika a te Atua, motu kē i te ture, he mea whaka­atu nā te ture, nā ngā poro­piti;
3.22: arā, ko te tika a te Atua e nā runga mai ana i te whaka­pono ki a Īhu Karaiti ki te hunga katoa e whaka­pono ana. Kāhore hoki he poka­nga kētanga;
3.23: kua hara katoa hoki, ā, kāhore e taea e rātou te korōria o te Atua;
3.24: he mea whaka­tika utu­kore nā tōna aroha noa, i runga i tā Karaiti Īhu hoko­nga;
3.25: ko ia hoki tā te Atua i whaka­ari ai hei whaka­mārie, i runga i te whaka­pono, he mea nā ōna toto. Kia whaka­kitea ai tōna tika, i te mea ka whaka­pahemo­tia atu ngā hara ō mua, he mea hoki nā te manawa­nui o te Atua;
3.26: hei whaka­kite i tōna tika i tēnei wā nei anō; he mea kia tika ai ia anō, me te kai­whaka­tika i te tangata e whaka­pono ana ki a Īhu.
3.27: Nā, kei hea te whaka­mana­mana? Kua āraia atu. E tēhea rite­nga ture? E tō ngā mahi? Kāhore, engari, e te ture o te whaka­pono.
3.28: Koia mātou ka mea ai, kei te whaka­pono he tika mō te tangata, motu kē i ngā mahi o te ture.
3.29: Ko te Atua oti te Atua o ngā Hūrai anake? Ehara rānei ia i te Atua o ngā tauiwi hoki? Āe rā, o ngā tauiwi anō hoki;
3.30: ki te mea ia he kotahi te Atua, ā, māna e whaka­tika te kotinga i runga i te whaka­pono, me te kotinga­kore ina whaka­pono.
3.31: E taka rānei te ture i tā mātou, arā i te whaka­pono? Kāhore rāpea! Engari, nā tā mātou i ū ai te ture.

4.1: He aha rā, ki tā tātou, te mea i riro i a Āperahama, i tō tātou tupuna i runga i te kiko­kiko?
4.2: Me­he­mea hoki nā ngā mahi i tika ai a Āperahama, he mea tāna e whaka­mana­mana ai ia; otirā, kāhore ki te Atua.
4.3: E pēhea ana oti tā te karaipi­ture? “I whaka­pono a Āperahama ki te Atua, ā, whaka­iria ana hei tika mōna.”
4.4: Nā, he tangata e mahi ana, e kore e kīa te utu mōna he mea aroha noa, engari, he mea mō tāna.
4.5: Otirā, ko te tangata kāhore e mahi, engari, e whaka­pono ana ki te kai­whaka­tika i te tangata karakia­kore, ka whaka­iria tōna whaka­pono hei tika mōna.
4.6: Pērā hoki me tā Rāwiri kōrero i te manaaki ki te tangata, ka whaka­iria nei e te Atua he tika ki a ia, motu kē i ngā mahi.
4.7: I kī ai ia, “Ka hari te hunga kua oti ā rātou mahi tutū te muru, ō rātou hara te hīpoki!
4.8: Ka hari te tangata e kore nei e whaka­iria e te Ariki he hara ki a ia.”
4.9: E kōrero­tia ana rānei tēnei hari­nga mō te kotinga, mō te kotinga­kore anō rānei? E mea ana hoki tātou, “I whaka­iria tōna whaka­pono hei tika mō Āperahama.”
4.10: He pēhea rā te whaka­iri­nga? I a ia i te kotinga, i te kotinga­kore rānei? He teka i a ia i te kotinga, engari, i te kotinga­kore,
4.11: ā, riro ana i a ia te kotinga hei tohu, hei hīri mō te tika o tōna whaka­pono, i a ia i te kotinga­kore. Kia waiho ai ia hei matua ki te hunga katoa e whaka­pono ana, ahakoa kāhore rātou i kotia, kia whaka­iria ai te tika ki a rātou;
4.12: hei matua anō mō te kotinga ki te hunga ehara i te mea nō te kotinga anake, engari, e takahi ana hoki i runga i ngā tapuae o taua whaka­pono o tō tātou matua, o Āperahama, i a ia kāhore anō i kotia. Mā te Whakapono e Tukuna mai ai te Kī Taurangi a te Atua
4.13: Ehara i te mea i nā runga mai i te ture te kupu ki a Āperahama rātou ko ōna uri mō te ao ka riro i a ia; engari, i nā runga mai i te tika o te whaka­pono.
4.14: Me­he­mea hoki ka riro i te hunga ture, kua tikanga­kore te whaka­pono, kua taka te kupu whaka­ari.
4.15: Ko tā te ture hoki e mahi ai, he riri; engari, ki te kāhore he ture, kāhore hoki he hara.
4.16: Koia i nā roto­tia ai i te whaka­pono, kia waiho ai mā te aroha noa; kia ū ai te kupu whaka­ari ki te whānau katoa; ehara i te mea ki tō te ture anake, engari, ki tō te whaka­pono anō o Āperahama, ko ia nei hoki te matua o tātou katoa,
4.17: ko te mea hoki ia i tuhi­tuhia, “Kua waiho koe e ahau hei matua ki ngā iwi maha,” he matua i te aro­aro o tāna i whaka­pono ai, arā o te Atua, e whaka­ora nei i ngā tū­pā­paku, e karanga nei i ngā mea kua kāhore me te mea kei konei nei anō.
4.18: Ahakoa kāhore he rawa, ū tonu tōna mā­nako­nako ki a ia, kia meinga ai ia hei matua mō ngā iwi maha, pērā me te mea i kōrero­tia, “Ka pēnei tāu whānau.”
4.19: Kīhai anō i ngoi­kore tōna whaka­pono, i mahara iho ia ki tōna tinana, he pēnei me te mea kua tū­pā­paku­tia, wāhi iti hoki kua kotahi rau ōna tau, ki te tū­pā­paku­tanga hoki o te kōpū o Hera.
4.20: Āe, i ti­tiro ia ki te kupu whaka­ari a te Atua, kīhai ia i rua­rua i runga i te whaka­pono kore, engari, ka kaha tonu tōna whaka­pono, me te whaka­korōria ki te Atua.
4.21: Ū tonu hoki tōna whaka­aro e taea e ia te mea tāna i kōrero ai.
4.22: Koia hoki “I whaka­iria ai ki a ia hei tika.”
4.23: Otirā, ehara i te mea he whaka­aro ki a ia anake i tuhi­tuhia ai taua whaka­iri­nga ki a ia;
4.24: engari, he whaka­aro ki a tātou anō hoki; ka whaka­iria ki a tātou e whaka­pono nei ki te kai­whaka­ara i a Īhu, i tō tātou Ariki, i te hunga mate.
4.25: I tukua nei mō ō tātou hē, i whaka­ara­hia mō tātou kia whaka­tikaia.

5.1: Nā, i te mea ka tika nei i te whaka­pono, kia mau tā tātou maunga rongo ki te Atua, he mea nā tō tātou Ariki, nā Īhu Karaiti;
5.2: nāna nei te whaka­tata­nga i a tātou i runga i te whaka­pono ki tēnei aroha noa e tū nei tātou; ā, kia hari tātou i te mea ka tū­mana­ko nei tātou ki te korōria o te Atua.
5.3: Ā, ehara i te mea ko tērā anake, engari, kia whaka­mana­mana anō tātou ki ō tātou mamae; e mōhio ana hoki ko tā te mamae e mahi ai he manawa­nui;
5.4: ko tā te manawa­nui he mātau­ranga; ko tā te mātau­ranga he tū­mana­ko;
5.5: e kore anō e whaka­mā i te mea ka tū­mana­ko nei. Kua ringi­hia hoki te aroha o te Atua ki ō tātou ngākau e te Wairua Tapu kua hōmai nei ki a tātou.
5.6: I a tātou hoki e ngoi­kore tonu ana, i te wā i rite ai, ka mate a te Karaiti mō te hunga karakia­kore.
5.7: E mate whaka­uaua hoki tētahi mō te tangata tika; tērā pea ia tētahi e māia rawa kia mate mō te tangata pai.
5.8: Heoi, e whaka­kitea nuitia ana e te Atua tōna aroha ki a tātou, i te mea, i a tātou anō e hara ana, ka mate a te Karaiti mō tātou.
5.9: Nā, i a tātou ka tika nei i ōna toto, tērā noa ake he whaka­ora­nga māna i a tātou i te riri o te Atua.
5.10: Me­he­mea hoki, i te wā he hoa whawhai tātou, ka houhia tā tātou rongo ki te Atua i runga i te mate­nga o tāna Tama, tērā noa ake, i te mea ka mau nei te rongo, he whaka­ora­nga mō tātou, i a ia kua ora nei.
5.11: Ehara hoki i te mea ko tērā anake, engari, e whaka­mana­mana ana anō tātou ki te Atua, he mea nā tō tātou Ariki, nā Īhu Karaiti, nāna nei tēnei hou­hanga rongo ki a tātou. Ko Ārama rāua ko Īhu Karaiti
5.12: Nā, ka rite ki te pu­tanga mai o te hara ki te ao, he mea nā te tangata kotahi, me te mate anō i runga i te hara; ka hōrapa te mate ki ngā tāngata katoa; nō te mea kua hara katoa.
5.13: I te ao nei hoki te hara, ā tae noa mai te ture; otirā, e kore e whaka­iria te hara i te mea kāhore he ture.
5.14: Ahakoa rā he mana kīngi tō te mate nō Ārama iho anō taea noatia a Mohi, ki te hunga rawa kīhai nei i rite tō rātou hara ki tō Ārama poka kē. He āhua nei hoki ia nō tēnei i tāria nei.
5.15: Otirā, kīhai i rite ki te hara te mea i hōmai noa mai. Me­he­mea hoki nā te hara o te kotahi i mate ai te toko­maha, wai­hoki tērā noa atu te huanga ki te toko­maha o tō te Atua aroha noa, o te mea hōmai hoki i runga i te aroha noa o te tangata kotahi, o Īhu Karaiti.
5.16: Kīhai anō hoki i rite te mea i hōmai ki tō te kotahi i hara. Nō te kotahi hoki te whaka­wā i tau ai te hē; nō ngā hara maha ia te mea i hōmai noa mai hei whaka­tika.
5.17: Me­he­mea hoki nā te hara o te kotahi i kīngi ai te mate, he mea nā te tangata kotahi; wai­hoki tērā noa ake he kīngi­tanga i runga i te ora mō te hunga ka riro nei i a rātou te aroha noa e hua tonu nei, me te tika i hōmai noa nei, he mea nā te kotahi, arā, nā Īhu Karaiti.
5.18: Āe rā, i te mea nā te hara kotahi i tau ai te hē ki ngā tāngata katoa, wai­hoki nā te tika kotahi i puta ai te mea hōmai noa ki ngā tāngata katoa, e tika ai, e ora ai.
5.19: Nā, i te mea nā te tutū o te tangata kotahi i whai hara ai te toko­maha, wai­hoki nā te ngohe­ngohe o te kotahi, ka meinga te toko­maha kia tika.
5.20: I puta mai te ture kia nui ai te hara; heoi i te hara e nui noa ana, kua hua noa ake te aroha noa;
5.21: he mea hoki, i te hanga ko te hara te kīngi i roto i te mate, kia kīngi hoki ko te aroha noa i runga o te tika ki te ora tonu, he mea­tanga nā Īhu Karaiti, nā tō tātou Ariki.

6.1: Hā, kia pēhea he kōrero mā tātou? Kia mau tonu oti tātou ki te hara, kia hua ai te aroha noa?
6.2: Kāhore rāpea. Ko tātou kua whaka­tūpā­paku­tia nei ki te hara, me pēhea tātou e noho tonu atu ai anō i roto i taua hara?
6.3: Kāhore ianei koutou i mōhio, ko tātou kua iri­iria nei ki roto ki a Karaiti Īhu, kua iri­iria ki roto ki tōna mate­nga?
6.4: Nā, kua tanu­mia ngā­tahi­tia tātou me ia ki roto ki te mate­nga, he mea nā te iri­iri; kia rite ai ki a te Karaiti i whaka­ara­hia ake nei i te hunga mate e te korōria o te Matua, wai­hoki ko tātou kia haere i roto i te hou­tanga o te ora.
6.5: Ki te mea hoki kua honoa tātou ki a ia i runga i te āhua o tōna mate­nga, ka honoa anō tātou ki a ia i runga i te āhua o tōna aranga.
6.6: E mōhio ana hoki ki tēnei, kua rīpeka­tia ngā­tahi­tia me ia tō tātou tangata tawhito, kia hemo ai te tinana o te hara, kia mutu ai tō tātou pononga­tanga ki te hara.
6.7: Ko te mea hoki kua mate, kua mawheto ia i te hara.
6.8: Ki te mea kua mate tahi tātou ko te Karaiti, e whaka­pono ana tātou e ora tahi anō tātou me ia.
6.9: E mātau ana hoki tātou, ka ara nei a te Karaiti i te hunga mate, heoi anō ōna mate­nga; kāhore he kīngi­tanga o te mate ki a ia ā mua tonu atu.
6.10: Ko tōna mate­nga hoki i mate ai ia, he mate kotahi ki te hara; ko tōna oranga ia, he ora ki te Atua.
6.11: Wai­hoki mahara iho ki a koutou, kua whaka­tūpā­paku­tia koutou ki te hara, e ora ana ia ki te Atua, i roto i a Īhu Karaiti.
6.12: Mō konei rā aua te hara e kīngi i roto i tō koutou tinana mate, e ngohe­ngohe ai koutou ki tā ngā hia­hia poke o taua tinana nei.
6.13: Kaua hoki e tukua ō koutou wāhi ki te hara hei kai­mahi i te hē; engari, tukua atu koutou ki te Atua, he hunga kua ora i roto i te hunga mate, me ō koutou wāhi hoki hei kai­mahi i te tika ki te Atua.
6.14: E kore hoki te hara e waiho hei ranga­tira mō koutou. Ehara i te mea kei raro koutou i te ture, engari, kei raro kē i te aroha noa. Pononga a te Tika
6.15: He aha koia? Kia hara oti tātou, nō te mea ehara tātou i te ture, engari, nō te aroha noa? Kāhore rāpea!
6.16: Kāhore oti koutou i mātau, ki te tuku koutou i a koutou ki tētahi hei pono­nga, he pono­nga koutou nā tērā kua ngohe­ngohe nā koutou ki tāna; nā te hara rānei, ā, mate iho, nā te ngohe­ngohe rānei, ā, tika ake?
6.17: Ko tēnei me whaka­whetai ki te Atua, ahakoa he pono­nga koutou nā te hara i mua, kua meinga ō koutou ngākau kia ngohe­ngohe ki te ako i whaka­akona ai koutou.
6.18: Nā, ka ātea nei koutou i te hara, ka meinga koutou he pono­nga nā te tika.
6.19: He kupu tangata tēnei nāku, nā te ngoi­kore o tō koutou kiko­kiko. Nā, i tukua rā ō koutou wāhi hei pono­nga mā te poke, mā te tutū, ki te mahi tutū; wai­hoki me tuku ō koutou wāhi āia­nei hei pono­nga mā te tika, puta ake he tapu.
6.20: I a koutou hoki e pono­nga ana ki te hara, e ātea ana koutou i te tika.
6.21: Nā, i taua wā, he aha ngā hua i a koutou o ngā mea e whaka­mā nā koutou ināia­nei? He mate hoki te mutu­nga o aua mea.
6.22: Tēnā, ko tēnei ka ātea nei koutou i te hara, ā, ka meinga hei pono­nga mā te Atua, ko ngā hua ki a koutou he tapu, ā, ko te tuku­nga iho he ora tonu.
6.23: Ko ngā utu hoki o te hara he mate; ko tā te Atua ia i hōmai ai he ora tonu, i roto i a Karaiti Īhu, i tō tātou Ariki.

7.1: Kāhore anō koutou kia mātau, e ōku tēina, e kōrero ana hoki ahau ki te hunga mātau ki te ture, hei ranga­tira te ture mō te tangata i te wā e ora ai ia?
7.2: Ko te wahine whai tāne hoki, e mau ana anō ia i te ture ki te tāne i a ia e ora ana; ki te mate ia te tāne, kua mawheto ia i te ture a te tāne.
7.3: Nā, ki te riro ia i te tangata kē i tāna tāne e ora ana anō, ka kīa ia he wahine pūremu. Tēnā, ka mate te tāne, e ātea ana ia i te ture, ka kore ia e pūremu ahakoa riro i te tangata kē.
7.4: Heoi, ko koutou anō hoki, e ōku tēina, kua meinga kia tū­pā­paku ki te ture, nā te tinana o te Karaiti; kia riro ai koutou i tētahi atu, arā i tērā i whaka­ara­hia i te hunga mate, kia whai hua ai tātou ki te Atua.
7.5: I a tātou hoki i te kiko­kiko, e mahi ana ngā hi­hiri­tanga o ngā hara, e whaka­oho­kia nei e te ture, i roto i ō tātou wāhi, ā, hua ake ko te mate.
7.6: Ko tēnei kua mawheto mai tātou i te ture, kua mate hoki tātou ki te mea i puri­tia ai tātou; nō reira e mahi ana tātou i runga i te hou­tanga o te wairua, kāhore i runga i te tawhito­tanga o te kupu tuhi­tuhi. Te Ture me te Hara
7.7: Kia pēhea rā he kupu mā tātou? He hara rānei te ture? Kāhore rāpea! Engari, kīhai ahau i mātau ki te hara, me i kaua te ture; kāhore hoki ahau i mōhio ki te hia­hia apo, me i kaua te ture te mea mai, “Aua koe e hia­hia apo.”
7.8: Nā, ka mau te hara ki tēnei, ā, ka mahi i ngā hia­hia apo katoa i roto i ahau, he mea nā te ture. Ki te kore hoki te ture ka mate te hara.
7.9: I ora hoki ahau i mua i te kore­nga o te ture. Nō te taenga mai ia o te kupu whaka­hau, ka ora ake te hara, ā, mate iho ahau.
7.10: Nā, ko te kupu whaka­hau i meinga rā hei ora, kitea kētia ana tēnei hei mate mōku.
7.11: Ka mau te hara ki tēnei, ka whaka­wai hoki i ahau i runga i te kupu whaka­hau, nāna ahau i mate ai.
7.12: Āe rā, he tapu te ture, me te kupu whaka­hau anō he tapu, he tika, he pai.
7.13: I riro koia te mea pai hei mate mōku? Kāhore rāpea! Engari, nā te hara i mea te mea pai hei mate mōku, kia whaka­kitea ai he hara te hara. Nā, ka ai te kupu whaka­hau hei mea kia tino nui noa atu. Te Pakanga i roto i a Tātou
7.14: E mātau ana hoki tātou nō te wairua te ture; ko ahau ia nō te kiko­kiko, kua hokona hei pārau mā te hara.
7.15: Ko tāku hoki e mahi nei kāhore e mōhio­tia iho e ahau. Kāhore hoki e mahia e ahau tāku i pai ai; heoi ko tāku i kino ai, meatia ana tēnei e ahau.
7.16: Ki te mahia ia e ahau taua mea kīhai nei ahau i pai atu, e whaka­ae ana ahau ki te ture he pai.
7.17: Ko tēnei ehara i ahau i mahi, engari, nā te hara e noho nei i roto i ahau.
7.18: E mātau ana hoki ahau, kāhore he mea pai e noho ana i roto i ahau, arā i roto i tōku kiko­kiko. Ko te hia­hia hoki kei ahau, ko te mea ia i te pai kāhore i ahau.
7.19: Ko te pai hoki e hia­hia­tia ana e ahau, kāhore e mahia e ahau. Engari te kino kīhai nei ahau i pai, mahia ana tēnei e ahau.
7.20: Ki te mahia ia e ahau taua mea pū kīhai nei ahau i pai atu, ehara i ahau nāna taua mea i mahi, engari, nā te hara e noho nei i roto i ahau.
7.21: Nā, kua kitea e ahau te ture, arā, kei te tata tonu te kino ki ahau e hia­hia nei kia mea i te pai.
7.22: E āhua­reka ana hoki ahau ki te ture a te Atua, arā tō roto tangata.
7.23: Otirā, kua kitea e ahau tētahi atu ture i roto i ōku wāhi, e whawhai ana ki te ture a tōku hine­ngaro, e mea ana i ahau hei tau­reka­reka mā te ture a te hara, mā tēnei i roto nei i ōku wāhi.
7.24: Auē, te mate i ahau! Mā wai ahau e whaka­ora i te tinana o tēnei mate?
7.25: Mā te Atua! E whaka­whetai tonu ana ahau ki a ia i runga i a Īhu Karaiti, i tō tātou Ariki. Nā, e mahi ana ahau anō nei, arā, tōku hine­ngaro, ki te ture a te Atua, ko tōku kiko­kiko ia ki te ture a te hara.

8.1: Nā, kāhore e tau te hē ināia­nei ki te hunga i roto i a Karaiti Īhu.
8.2: Nā te ture hoki a te Wairua o te ora i roto i a Karaiti Īhu ahau i ātea ai i te ture a te hara, a te mate.
8.3: Ko te mea kīhai i taea e te ture, he ngoi­kore nōna i te kiko­kiko, tonoa mai ana e te Atua tāna Tama, i te āhua o te kiko­kiko hara, hei whaka­here anō mō te hara, ā, whaka­taua ana e ia te hē ki te hara i roto i te kiko­kiko.
8.4: Kia rite ai tō te ture tikanga i roto i a tātou, kāhore nei e haere i runga i tā te kiko­kiko, engari, i tā te Wairua.
8.5: Ko te hunga hoki i runga i tā te kiko­kiko, whaka­aro ana rātou ki ō te kiko­kiko; ko te hunga ia i runga i tā te Wairua, ki ō te Wairua.
8.6: Ko tō te kiko­kiko whaka­aro hoki he mate, ko tō te Wairua ia he ora, he rangi­mārie.
8.7: He tikanga whawhai hoki ki te Atua te whaka­aro ki te kiko­kiko e kore nei hoki e ngā­wari ki te ture a te Atua, kāhore anō e āhei kia ngā­wari;
8.8: ā, e kore e taea e te hunga i te kiko­kiko te whaka­mānawa­reka ki te Atua.
8.9: Otiia, kāhore koutou i te kiko­kiko, engari, i te Wairua, ki te mea e noho ana te Wairua o te Atua i roto i a koutou. Ki te kāhore ia te Wairua o te Karaiti i tētahi, ehara tēnei i a ia.
8.10: Tēnā, ki te mea kei roto a te Karaiti i a koutou, he tū­pā­paku te tinana i te hara, he ora ia te wairua i te tika.
8.11: Ki te noho ia i roto i a koutou te Wairua o te kai­whaka­ara o Īhu i te hunga mate, māna, mā te kai­whaka­ara o Karaiti Īhu i roto i te hunga mate, e whaka­ora ake anō ō koutou tinana mate ki tōna Wairua e noho nā i roto i a koutou.
8.12: Nā reira, e ōku tēina, kāhore he tikanga o te kiko­kiko kei runga i a tātou, kia whai tātou i tāna.
8.13: Ki te noho hoki koutou i runga i tā te kiko­kiko, ka mate koutou; ki te mea ia ka whaka­mate koutou i ngā mahi a te tinana, he mea nā te Wairua, ka ora koutou.
8.14: Ko te hunga hoki e āra­hina ana e te Wairua o te Atua, he tama rātou nā te Atua.
8.15: He teka hoki he wairua pono­nga kua riro nei i a koutou, e mataku ai anō koutou; engari, kua riro i a koutou te Wairua e mea ana i a koutou hei tama­riki ake, e karanga ai koutou, “E Apa, e Pā!”
8.16: Ko taua Wairua rā anō hei whaka­ae ake ki ō tātou wairua, he tama­riki tātou nā te Atua.
8.17: Ki te mea hoki he tama­riki, kāti mō tātou te kāinga; mō tātou te kāinga o te Atua, mō tātou tahi ko te Karaiti; kia mamae rawa ake ai tātou tahi me ia, ka whaka­korōria­tia ngā­tahi­tia tātou me ia. Te Korōria kei te Haere mai
8.18: Ki tōku whaka­aro iho hoki, he kore noa iho ngā mamae o tēnei wā, ki te whaka­ritea ki te korōria e whaka­kitea mai ki a tātou ā mua.
8.19: Ko te tū­mana­ko hoki o te mea i hangā e tatari ana ki te whaka­kite­nga mai o ngā tama a te Atua.
8.20: Kua meinga hoki te teka­teka noa hei ranga­tira mō te mea i hangā, ehara i te mea nā tēnei ake i whaka­ae, engari, nā tā te kai­whaka­rite i pai ai, i runga i te tū­mana­ko,
8.21: tērā taua mea i hangā e whaka­atea­tia mai i te whaka­tau­reka­reka­tanga a te pirau, whaka­rangatira­tia ake ki roto ki te korōria o ngā tama­riki a te Atua.
8.22: E mōhio ana hoki tātou, kei te ngu­nguru tahi, kei te mamae tahi, ngā mea hanga katoa taea noatia tēnei rā.
8.23: Ehara i te mea ko tērā anake, engari, ko tātou anō hoki kua whi­whi nei ki te hua mātā­mua, arā ki te Wairua, inā, e auē ana hoki tātou i roto i a tātou, e tatari ana ki te whaka­tamariki­tanga, arā ki te whaka­ora­nga o ō tātou tinana.
8.24: Nā te tū­mana­ko hoki tātou i ora ai. Tēnā, ka kitea te mea e tūmanako­hia atu ana, kore ake te tū­mana­ko. Ko wai oti e tū­mana­ko ki te mea e kitea nei e ia?
8.25: Ki te tū­mana­ko atu ia tātou ki te mea kāhore nei e kitea, kātahi ka āta tāria mārire­tia atu e tātou.
8.26: Wai­hoki ko te wairua hei hoa mō tātou e ngoi­kore nei. Kāhore hoki tātou e mātau me pēhea e tika ai tā tātou īnoi; otiia, ko te Wairua tonu anō te īnoi ana mō tātou ki ōna auē e kore nei e taea te whaka­hua.
8.27: Ā, ko te kai­titiro i ngā ngākau, e mōhio ana ki te hine­ngaro o te Wairua, ko tērā hoki e īnoi ana mō te hunga tapu i runga i tā te Atua i pai ai.
8.28: Nā, e mātau ana tātou, kei te mahi tahi ngā mea katoa i te pai mō te hunga e aroha ana ki te Atua, arā mō te hunga i karanga­tia i runga i tāna i whaka­takoto ai.
8.29: Ko āna hoki i mōhio ai i mua, i whaka­ritea anō e ia i mua kia rite ki te āhua o tāna Tama, kia ai ia hei muanga i roto i ngā tēina toko­maha.
8.30: Ā, ko āna i whaka­rite ai i mua, ko ēnā anō i karanga­tia e ia; ā, ko āna i karanga ai, ko ēnā anō i whaka­tikaia e ia; ā, ko āna i whaka­tika ai, ko ēnā anō i whaka­korōria­tia e ia. Te Aroha o te Atua i roto i a Īhu Karaiti
8.31: Nā, kia pēhea tā tātou kōrero ki ēnei mea? Ki te mea ko te Atua hei hoa mō tātou, ko wai hei whawhai ki a tātou?
8.32: Ko ia kīhai nei i kai­ponu i tāna ake Tama, heoi, tukua mai ana e ia mō tātou katoa, e kore ianei ia e tāpiri noa mai ki a ia i ngā mea katoa mō tātou?
8.33: Ko wai hei whaka­pā hē ki ā te Atua i whiri­whiri ai? Ko te Atua rā hei whaka­tika.
8.34: Ko wai ianei hei whaka­tau hē? Ko Karaiti Īhu rā, i mate nei, āe rawa hoki, ko ia rā kua whaka­ara­hia ake nei i te mate, ā, kei te ringa matau o te Atua, ko ia hoki kei te īnoi mō tātou.
8.35: Mā wai tātou e momotu kē i te aroha o te Karaiti? Mā te whaka­pāwera rānei, mā te mamae, mā te whaka­toi, mā te matekai, mā te kākahu­kore, mā te mate ka tata, mā te hoari rānei?
8.36: Ko te mea hoki ia i tuhi­tuhia, “Nā te whaka­aro ki a koe mātou i whaka­matea ai i te rā roa nei; kīa ana mātou hei hipi e patua ana.”
8.37: Engari, i ēnei mea katoa hira ake te wiki­tōria i a tātou, he mea nāna i aroha nei ki a tātou.
8.38: Ū tonu hoki tōku whaka­aro, e kore te mate, te ora rānei, e kore ngā ana­hera, ngā ranga­tira­tanga rānei, e kore ngā mea onāia­nei, e kore ngā mea e puta mai ā mua, e kore ngā mana,
8.39: e kore te tike­tike, e kore te hōhonu, e kore tētahi atu mea hangā, e kaha ki te momotu i a tātou i te aroha o te Atua, i tērā i roto nei i a Karaiti Īhu, i tō tātou Ariki.

9.1: He pono tāku kōrero i roto i a te Karaiti, kāhore āku teka, ā, e whaka­ae ana tōku hine­ngaro ki ahau i roto i te Wairua Tapu,
9.2: he nui atu tōku pōuri, mau tonu te mamae o tōku ngākau.
9.3: He pai hoki ki ahau me i kangā ahau, me i motu­hia i a te Karaiti, he whaka­aro ki ōku tēina, arā, ki ōku whanau­nga o te wāhi ki te kiko­kiko.
9.4: Nō Īharaira nei rātou; nō rātou nei te whaka­tamariki­tanga, te korōria, ngā kawe­nata, te hōmai­tanga o te ture, te kara­kia ki te Atua, me ngā kupu whaka­ari;
9.5: nō rātou nei ngā mātua, nō rātou anō a te Karaiti i te wāhi ki te kiko­kiko, ko ia nei kei runga ake i ngā mea katoa, ko te Atua e whaka­pai­ngia ana ake ake. Āmine.
9.6: Ehara ia i te mea kua taka te kupu a te Atua. Ko te hunga hoki o Īharaira, ehara i te mea nō Īharaira katoa;
9.7: ahakoa he uri nō Āperahama, ehara rātou katoa i te tama­riki; engari, “Kei a Īhaka te whaka­ingoa­tanga mō ōu uri.”
9.8: Arā, ehara i te mea ko ngā tama­riki a te kiko­kiko ngā tama­riki a te Atua, engari, ko ngā tama­riki a te kupu whaka­ari, ko rātou ka kīa he uri.
9.9: He kupu whaka­ari hoki tēnei, “Kia taka tēnei wā ka haere mai ahau, ā, ka whānau he tama mā Hera.”
9.10: Nā, ehara i te mea ko tēnei anake; i a Ripeka anō ia kua hapū i tētahi, arā i a Īhaka, i tō mātou matua.
9.11: I ngā tama hoki kāhore anō i whānau noa, kāhore anō hoki i mahi te pai, i te kino rānei, he mea kia ū ai tā te Atua i whaka­takoto ai mō te whiri­whiringa, ehara i ngā mahi, engari, nā te kai­karanga;
9.12: ka kōrero­tia ki a ia, “Ko te tua­kana hei pono­nga mā te teina.”
9.13: Ko te mea ia i tuhi­tuhia, “Kua aroha ahau ki a Hākopa, kua kino ki a Ēhau.”
9.14: Ka pēhea ai i konā tā tātou kōrero? He tikanga hē koia kei te Atua? Kāhore rāpea!
9.15: I mea hoki ia ki a Mohi, “E tohu ahau i tāku e tohu ai, e ata­whai ahau ki tāku e ata­whai ai.”
9.16: Nō reira, ehara i te mea nā te hia­hia o te tangata, nā te oma rānei o te tangata, engari, nā te Atua, ko ia e tohu nei.
9.17: E mea nei hoki te karaipi­ture ki a Parao, Mō konei pū anō koe i whaka­ara­hia ai e ahau, kia ai koe hei whaka­kite i tōku kaha, kia kōrero­tia hoki tōku ingoa ki te whenua katoa.
9.18: Nā konā, e tohu­ngia ana e ia, ko tāna e pai ai, ko tāna hoki e pai ai e whaka­pakeke­tia ana e ia. Te Riri me te Atawhai o te Atua
9.19: Nā, tērā koe e mea mai ki ahau, “He aha ia i riri tonu ai? Ko wai hoki e whaka­keke ana ki tāna i pai ai?”
9.20: Ha, e te tangata nei, ko wai koe hei whaka­hoki kupu ki te Atua? Mā te mea hanga koia e mea ki tōna kai­hanga, “He aha ahau i hangā ai e koe kia pēnei?”
9.21: He teka ianei kei te kai­hanga rīhi te tikanga mō te paru, kia hangā tētahi wāhi o taua mea kotahi i poke­pokea hei oko ranga­tira, tētahi wāhi hei mea ware?
9.22: He aha hoki, me­he­mea, i tōna whaka­aro kia whaka­kitea tōna riri, ā, kia whaka­puta­ina tōna kaha, ka whaka­ririka te Atua i runga i te manawa­nui ki ngā oko o te riri, e rite rawa nei mō te whaka­ngaro?
9.23: Kia whaka­kitea anō hoki e ia ngā rawa o tōna korōria ki ngā oko o te mahi tohu, kua rite noa ake nei i a ia mō te korōria,
9.24: arā ki a tātou, i karanga­tia e ia, ehara i te mea nō ngā Hūrai anake, engari, nō ngā tauiwi anō hoki?
9.25: Ko tāna kupu anō tēnā i tā Hohea, “Ka kīa e ahau tērā ko tōku iwi, ehara nei i te iwi nōku; ā, he wahine e aroha­ina ana te wahine kīhai i aroha­ina.
9.26: Ā, tēnei ake, i te wāhi i kōrero­tia ai ki a rātou, ‘Ehara koutou i te iwi nōku’; ko reira rātou kīa ai he tama nā te Atua ora.”
9.27: Ko tā Ihāia karanga hoki mō Īharaira, “Ahakoa i rite te toko­maha o ngā tama a Īharaira ki te onepū o te moana, ko te toenga kau e ora.
9.28: Mā te Ariki hoki e whaka­tutuki tāna kupu ki runga i te whenua, māna e whaka­oti, māna e poro tata.”
9.29: Ā, e kī rā a Ihāia i mua rā, “Me kāhore te toe i te Atua o ngā mano he whānau mō tātou, kua pērā tātou me Horoma, kua rite anō hoki ki Komora.” Tā Paora Īnoi mō Īharaira
9.30: Nā, kia pēhea tā tātou kōrero? Ko ngā tauiwi, kīhai nei i whai i te tika, kua tae rātou ki te tika, arā, ki te tika, nā te whaka­pono.
9.31: Ko Īharaira ia, whai ana i tētahi ture o te tika, kīhai rātou i tae ki taua ture.
9.32: Nā te aha? Nā te mea kīhai rātou i whai i runga i te whaka­pono, engari, ānō nā runga i ngā mahi. I tūtuki hoki ō rātou wae­wae ki te kāmaka tūtuki­tanga;
9.33: ko te mea hoki ia i tuhi­tuhia, “Nana, ka whaka­takoto­ria e ahau ki Hiona he kāmaka tūtuki­tanga, he kōhatu whaka­hi­nga. Nā, ko te tangata e whaka­pono ana ki a ia, e kore e meinga kia whaka­mā.”

10.1: E ōku tēina, ko tā tōku ngākau i wawata ai, ko tōku īnoi hoki ki te Atua mō rātou, kia whaka­ora­ngia rātou.
10.2: E whaka­ae ana hoki ahau ki a rātou, he ngākau nui tō rātou ki te Atua, otiia, ehara i te mea mōhio.
10.3: I a rātou hoki e kūware ana ki tā te Atua tika, e whai ana kia whaka­ū­kia ko tō rātou ake, kīhai rātou i ngohe­ngohe ki te tika a te Atua.
10.4: Ko te Karaiti hoki te tuku­nga iho o te ture hei tika mō ngā tāngata whaka­pono katoa. Te Whakaoranga mō ngā Tāngata Katoa
10.5: Kua tuhi­tuhia hoki e Mohi, “Ko te tangata e whaka­rite ana i tā te ture tika, ka ora ia i reira.”
10.6: Ko te kupu ia tēnei o tō te whaka­pono tika, “Aua e mea i roto i tōu ngākau, ‘Ko wai hei kake ki te rangi?’ ” Arā, ki te tiki atu i a te Karaiti ki raro.
10.7: Ko wai rānei hei heke iho ki te hōhonu? Arā, ki te tiki atu i a te Karaiti i roto i te hunga mate.
10.8: E pēhea ana oti? “E tata ana ki a koe te kupu, kei tōu māngai, kei tōu ngākau.” Ko ia tēnei, ko te kupu o te whaka­pono e kauwhau nei mātou;
10.9: arā, ki te whaka­ae tōu māngai ko Īhu te Ariki, ā, ki te whaka­pono tōu ngākau nā te Atua ia i whaka­ara ake i te hunga mate, e ora koe.
10.10: Mā te ngākau hoki kia whaka­pono ka tika ai; mā te māngai kia whaka­ae ka ora ai.
10.11: E mea ana hoki te karaipi­ture, “Ko ngā tāngata katoa e whaka­pono ana ki a ia e kore e meinga kia whaka­mā.”
10.12: Kāhore hoki he rere­kē­tanga o te Hūrai, o te Kariki; ā, ko taua Ariki anō te Ariki o te katoa, ā, e hua ana āna taonga ki te hunga katoa e karanga ana ki a ia.
10.13: “E ora hoki ngā tāngata katoa e karanga ana ki te ingoa o te Ariki.”
10.14: Nā, me pēhea tā rātou karanga ki a ia, ki te kāhore i whaka­pono ki a ia? Me pēhea hoki tā rātou whaka­pono ki a ia, ki te kāhore i rongo ki a ia? Me pēhea hoki e rongo ai, ki te kāhore he kai­kauwhau?
10.15: Ā, me pēhea e kauwhau ai, ki te kāhore e tonoa? Ko te mea ia i tuhi­tuhia, “Anō te āta­ahua o ngā wae­wae o te hunga kawe mai i te rongo whaka­hari o ngā mea papai!”
10.16: Otirā, kāhore rātou katoa i ngohe­ngohe ki ngā rongo whaka­hari. E mea ana hoki a Ihāia, “E te Ariki, ko wai i whaka­pono ki tā mātou whaka­atu?”
10.17: Inā, nā te rongo te whaka­pono, ā, ko te rongo nā te kupu a te Karaiti.
10.18: Otiia, ko tāku kupu tēnei, “Kāhore rānei rātou i rongo?” Koia rā ia, “Kua puta atu tō rātou reo ki te whenua katoa, ā rātou kupu hoki ki ngā tōpito o te ao.”
10.19: Ko tāku kupu ia tēnei: Kāhore ianei a Īharaira i mōhio? Nā Mohi te kupu tua­tahi: “Māku koutou e whaka­oho kia hae ki te hunga ehara i te iwi; ka meinga e ahau te iwi pō­au­au hei whaka­oho i a koutou ki te riri.”
10.20: Ā, ka māia rawa a Ihāia, ka mea, “Kua kitea ahau e te hunga kīhai i rapu i ahau; kua whaka­kitea ahau ki te hunga kīhai nei i ui ki ahau.”
10.21: Ko tāna kupu ia mō Īharaira, “Pau noa te rā i totoro atu ai ōku ringa ki te iwi tutū ki te iwi whaka­hāwea.”
