11.1: Nā, ko tāku kupu tēnei: kua peia oti e te Atua tāna iwi? Kāhore rāpea! Nō Īharaira anō hoki ahau, nō te uri o Āperahama, nō tō Pineamine iwi.
11.2: Kāhore hoki te Atua i pei i tāna iwi i mōhio ai i mua. Kāhore oti koutou i mātau ki te kōrero a te karaipi­ture i tā Irāia? I īnoi rā hoki ia ki te Atua, i whaka­hē i a Īharaira, i mea,
11.3: “E te Ariki, kua patua e rātou āu poro­piti, kua whaka­horoa āu āta; ko ahau anake hoki, kua mahue nei, ā, e whai ana rātou kia patua ahau.”
11.4: Heoi, e pēhea ana te whaka­hoki a te Atua ki a ia? “E whitu mano tāngata kua waiho e ahau māku, kāhore nei i piko te turi ki a Paara.”
11.5: Wai­hoki i te wā nei anō, tērā anō he toenga, he whiri­whiringa nā te aroha noa.
11.6: Ki te mea ia nā te aroha noa, ehara i te mea nā ngā mahi; pēnei ehara te aroha noa i te aroha noa.
11.7: Ha, he pēhea rā? Ko tā Īharaira e rapu nei, kīhai tēnei i taea e ia; otirā kua taea e te hunga whiri­whiri, ko ērā atu ia i whaka­pakeke­tia;
11.8: ko te mea hoki ia i tuhi­tuhia, “Kua hoatu ki a rātou e te Atua he wairua hia­moe, he kanohi e kore ai rātou e kite, he tari­nga e kore ai e rongo; ā taea noatia tēnei rā.”
11.9: E mea ana hoki a Rāwiri, “Kia whaka­tupu mā­hanga tō rātou tēpu, hei rore hoki, hei tūtuki­tanga wae­wae, hei utu anō ki a rātou;
11.10: kia whaka­pōuri­tia ō rātou kanohi, kia kaua rātou e kite, ā, kia whaka­pikoa tonu­tia iho e koe tō rātou tuarā.”
11.11: Nā, ko tāku kupu tēnei, he tūtuki rānei tō rātou e hinga rawa ai? Kāhore rāpea! Engari, nā tō rātou hinga i puta ai te ora ki ngā tauiwi, he mea kia hae ai rātou.
11.12: Nā, ki te mea hei taonga mō te ao tō rātou hinga­nga, hei taonga anō mō ngā tauiwi tō rātou whaka­iti­nga; tērā noa ake i tō rātou whaka­nui­nga? Te Whakaoranga o ngā Tauiwi
11.13: Ki a koutou, ki ngā tauiwi tēnei kupu āku, i te mea he āpō­toro ahau ki ngā tauiwi, e whaka­nui ana ahau i tāku mahi minita,
11.14: me kore e hae ngā tāngata o tōku kiko­kiko, kia ora ai ētahi o rātou i ahau.
11.15: Me­he­mea hoki ko tō rātou maka­nga atu hei hou­hanga rongo mō te ao, ka aha tō rātou tango­hanga mai? He teka ianei he oranga ake i roto i te hunga mate?
11.16: Ki te mea hoki he tapu te mea mātā­mua, ka pērā anō te pū­ranga; ki te tapu hoki te paki­aka, e pērā anō ngā manga.
11.17: Engari, ki te mea kua whatia atu ētahi o ngā manga, ā, ka honoa mai koe, te ōriwa nga­here, ki roto i ngā manga, ka whi­whi ngā­tahi ki te paki­aka o te mōmona­tanga o te ōriwa;
11.18: aua e whaka­peha­peha ki ngā manga. Ki te whaka­peha­peha ia koe, ehara i te mea nāu i mau ake ai te paki­aka, engari, nā te paki­aka koe.
11.19: Nā, tērā koe e mea, “I whatia atu ngā manga, kia honoa iho ai ahau.”
11.20: Āe rā; nā te whaka­pono kore rātou i whatia atu ai, nā tōu whaka­pono koe i tū ai. Aua e whaka­kake, engari kia wehi.
11.21: Nā, ki te mea kīhai i tohu­ngia ngā manga tupu e te Atua, e kore anō ia e tohu i a koe.
11.22: Nā, tiro­hia iho te ngā­wari me te pakeke o te Atua: pakeke ki te hunga i hinga; ngā­wari ki a koe, ki te ū koe ki tāna tikanga ngā­wari; ki te kāhore, ka tapa­hia hoki koe.
11.23: Me rātou anō, ki te kore e ū ki tō rātou whaka­pono kore, ka honoa anō; e taea hoki rātou e te Atua te hono mai anō.
11.24: Me­he­mea hoki ka tapa­hia mai koe i te ōriwa nga­here, ā, ka honoa mai ki te ōriwa pai, he mea rere kē i te tikanga; tērā noa ake te honoa o ēnei, o ngā manga tupu, ki tō rātou ōriwa anō. Tā te Atua Atawhai ki te Hunga Katoa
11.25: E kore hoki ahau e pai, e ōku tēina, kia kūware koutou ki tēnei mea ngaro, kei mea noa koutou he mātau koutou, kua tau tētahi wāhi o te whaka­pakeke­tanga ki a Īharaira, kia riro mai rā anō te toko­maha­tanga o ngā tauiwi.
11.26: Ko reira a Īharaira katoa ora ai; ko te mea hoki ia i tuhi­tuhia: “Tērā e puta mai te Kai­whaka­ora i Hiona, māna e kaupare te karakia­kore i a Hākopa.
11.27: Ko tāku kawe­nata hoki tēnei ki a rātou, ina tango­hia atu e ahau ō rātou hara.”
11.28: Nā, i runga i te rongo­pai he hoa­riri rātou, he whaka­aro ki a koutou; i runga ia i te whiri­whiringa, e aroha­ina ana rātou, he whaka­aro ki ngā mātua.
11.29: I ā te Atua hōmai­tanga hoki, i tāna karanga­tanga, kāhore e puta kē te whaka­aro.
11.30: Ka rite hoki ki a koutou kīhai i whaka­pono i mua ki te Atua, ināia­nei ia kua tohu­ngia, he mea nā tō rātou whaka­pono kore;
11.31: wai­hoki kua kāhore ēnei i whaka­pono ināia­nei, kia tohu­ngia ai anō rātou i runga i te mahi tohu i whi­whi nei koutou.
11.32: Kua oti hoki te katoa te kōpani e te Atua ki roto ki te whaka­teka, he mea kia tohu­ngia ai e ia te katoa. Whakamoemiti ki te Atua
11.33: Anō te hōhonu, te hua ngā­tahi hoki o te whaka­aro o te Atua me tōna mōhio! E kore āna tikanga e taea te rapu, ōna hua­rahi te whaka­taki!
11.34: “Ko wai hoki te mōhio ana ki te hine­ngaro o te Ariki? Ko wai hoki tōna hoa whaka­takoto whaka­aro?
11.35: Ko tā wai hoki kua mātua hoatu ki a ia, ā, ka whaka­hokia mai he utu ki a ia?”
11.36: Ko ngā mea katoa nei hoki, nāna, ā kei runga anō i a ia, ā, e ahu ana hoki ki a ia. Mōna te korōria ake tonu atu! Āmine.

12.1: Koia ahau ka īnoi nei ki a koutou, e ōku tēina, kia whaka­aroa ngā mahi a te Atua, kia tāpaea atu ō koutou tinana hei whaka­here ora, tapu, e manako­hia ana e te Atua, he mahi nā tō koutou hine­ngaro.
12.2: Kaua hoki tō koutou āhua e rite ki tō tēnei ao; engari, kia puta kē, arā kia whaka­hou­tia ō koutou hine­ngaro, kia whaka­mā­tau­tau­ria ai e koutou tā te Atua e pai ai, te mea e pai ana, e manako­hia ana, e tino rite ana.
12.3: Ko tāku kupu hoki tēnei ki ngā tāngata katoa i roto i a koutou, he mea nā te aroha noa i hōmai nei ki ahau, kaua e hira ake te whaka­aro o tētahi ki a ia anō i te mea i tika kia whaka­aroa e ia; engari kia āta whaka­aro, kia rite ki te wāhi o te whaka­pono i tu­whai­na e te Atua ki tēnā, ki tēnā.
12.4: E rite ana hoki ki ō tātou wāhi ka maha nei i te tinana kotahi, kīhai ia i kotahi te mahi mā aua wāhi katoa.
12.5: Wai­hoki ko tātou toko­maha nei, he tinana kotahi i roto i a te Karaiti, ko tātou taki­tahi ia, he wāhi tētahi nō tētahi.
12.6: Nā, ka rere kē nei ngā mea i hōmai ki a tātou, he mea e rite ana ki te aroha noa i hōmai ki a tātou, ki te mea he mahi poro­piti, me poro­piti, kia rite anō ki te rahi o tō tātou whaka­pono;
12.7: he mahi minita, kia ū tātou ki tā tātou mahi minita; ko te kai­whaka­ako, kia ū ki tāna mahi whaka­ako;
12.8: ko te kai­whaka­hau­hau, kia ū ki tāna whaka­hau­hau; ko te kai­hoatu, kia māhora­hora te ngākau; ko te kai­whaka­haere kia uaua ki tāna mahi, ā, ko te kai­atawhai kia ngahau te āhua.
12.9: Ko te aroha, hei te mea tini­hanga­kore. Kia whaka­riha­riha ki te kino; kia ū ki te pai.
12.10: Ka aroha ki ngā tēina, kia tino pono te aroha tētahi ki tētahi; ka whaka­hōnore, kia nui tā tētahi i tētahi.
12.11: Kia uaua, kaua e māngere; kia toko tonu ake te wairua; me te mahi anō ki te Ariki;
12.12: kia hari i runga i te tū­mana­ko; kia manawa­nui ki te whaka­pāwera; kia ū ki te īnoi.
12.13: Whaka­whiw­hia te hunga tapu ina rawa­kore; kia mau ki te ata­whai manu­hiri.
12.14: Manaaki­tia te hunga e tūkino ana i ā koutou; manaaki­tia, kaua e kangā.
12.15: Kia hari tahi me te hunga hari, kia tangi tahi me te hunga tangi.
12.16: Kia kotahi te whaka­aro o koutou tētahi ki tētahi. Kaua e whaka­kake te whaka­aro, engari me whaka­iti ki ngā mea pāpaku. Kei mea ake koutou he mōhio koutou.
12.17: Kaua e utua tā tētahi kino ki te kino. Whaka­aroa ko ngā mea e pai ana ki mua i te aro­aro o ngā tāngata katoa.
12.18: Ki te taea, whaka­paua tā koutou kia mau te rongo ki ngā tāngata katoa.
12.19: Aua e rapu utu mō koutou, e ōku hoa aroha, engari, whaka­atea atu i te riri: kua oti hoki te tuhi­tuhi, “Māku te rapu utu; māku te hoatu utu,” e ai tā te Ariki.
12.20: “Nā, ki te matekai tōu hoa­riri; whāngai­nga; ki te mate­wai; whaka­inu­mia. Ki te pēnei hoki tāu mahi, ka pū­ranga­tia e koe he waro kāpura ki tōna māte­nga.”
12.21: Kei hinga koe i te kino, engari kia hinga te kino i tōu pai.

13.1: Kia ngohe­ngohe ngā wairua katoa ki ngā mana nunui. Kāhore hoki he mana, nō te Atua anake; ko ngā mana o tēnei wā he mea whaka­rite nā te Atua.
13.2: Nā, ki te whaka­keke tētahi ki te mana, e whaka­keke ana ia ki tā te Atua i whaka­rite ai; ā, ko te mea hoki mō te hunga e whaka­keke ana, he whaka­tau hē.
13.3: Ehara hoki ngā ranga­tira i te whaka­wehi mō ngā mahi pai, engari mō ngā mahi kino. E mea ana koe kia kaua e wehi i te mana? Meatia te pai, ā, he whaka­moe­miti tāna e hōmai ai ki a koe;
13.4: he minita hoki ia nā te Atua ki a koe mō te pai. Tēnā, ki te mahi koe i te kino, e wehi rā; ehara hoki tāna i te mau noa i te hoari. He minita hoki ia nā te Atua, he kai­rapu utu mō te riri ki te kai­mahi i te kino.
13.5: Koia i takoto ai te tikanga kia ngohe­ngohe koutou, ehara i te mea he whaka­aro kau ki te riri, engari, ki tā te hine­ngaro anō hoki.
13.6: Nā konei hoki koutou i hoatu ai i te takoha. He minita hoki rātou nā te Atua, he hunga hoki e mau tonu ana ki tēnei mea pū anō.
13.7: Hoatu ngā mea i tika ki te katoa: he takoha tangata ki te tangata i tika ai te takoha tangata; he takoha taonga ki te tangata i tika ai te takoha taonga; he wehi ki te tangata i tika ai te wehi; he hōnore ki te tangata i tika ai te hōnore. Mahi-ā-Ngākau ki tētahi ki tētahi
13.8: Kaua e nama ki tētahi, ko te aroha anake o tētahi ki tētahi; ko te tangata hoki e aroha ana ki tōna hoa tata, kua whaka­ritea e ia te ture.
13.9: Ko tēnei hoki, “Kaua e pūremu, Kaua e patu tangata, Kaua e tāhae, Kaua e hia­hia ki tā te tangata”; ā, ki te mea tērā atu anō tētahi kupu ako, ka whaka­rā­po­poto­tia ki roto ki tēnei kupu, arā, “Kia aroha ki tōu hoa tata, ānō ko koe.”
13.10: E kore te aroha e kino ki tōna hoa; nō reira ko te aroha te whaka­rite­nga o te ture.
13.11: Tēnei anō hoki tētahi, e mōhio ana tātou ki te tāima, kua taka noa ake tēnei te wā e ara ake ai koutou i te moe. Kua tata kē hoki ināia­nei tō tātou whaka­ora­nga i tō te wā i whaka­pono tua­tahi ai tātou.
13.12: Kua aua atu te pō, ka tata te ao. Mō konei rā kia whaka­rērea e tātou ngā mahi o te pōuri, kia kākahu­ria iho ngā kākahu whawhai o te mārama.
13.13: Kia pai tā tātou haere, kia rite ki tō te awa­tea; kauaka i ngā ka­kai­nga, i ngā hau­rangi­tanga, kaua i te pūremu, i ngā hia­hia tai­kaha, kaua i te nga­ngau, i te hae.
13.14: Engari, kākahu­ria iho te Ariki, a Īhu Karaiti, kaua hoki e whaka­aroa wawe­tia te kiko­kiko kia mahia ko ōna hia­hia.

14.1: Ko te tangata he ngoi­kore te whaka­pono, manako­hia, kauaka ia ki ngā tau­tohe whaka­aro.
14.2: Ko tētahi hoki e whaka­pono ana he pai ngā mea katoa hei kai māna. Ko te tangata ia he ngoi­kore tōna whaka­pono e kai ota­ota ana.
14.3: Kaua te tangata e kai ana e whaka­hāwea ki te tangata kāhore e kai, kaua hoki te tangata kāhore e kai e whaka­hē i te tangata e kai ana. Kua manako­hia hoki ia e te Atua.
14.4: Ko wai koe e whaka­hē nā i te pono­nga a tērā? Mā tōna ranga­tira ia e whaka­tū, e whaka­hi­nga rānei. Inā, ka whaka­tū­ria anō ia, e taea hoki ia e te Atua te whaka­tū.
14.5: Ki te whaka­aro o tētahi, nui atu tētahi rā i tētahi, ki tō tētahi whaka­aro ia he rite katoa ngā rā. Kia ū mārire ngā whaka­aro o tētahi, o tētahi.
14.6: Ko te tangata e whaka­aro ana ki te rā, he whaka­aro ki te Ariki tōna whaka­aro; ko te tangata e kai ana, he whaka­aro ki te Ariki tāna kai, e whaka­whetai atu ana hoki ia ki te Atua; ko te tangata kāhore e kai, he whaka­aro ki te Ariki tāna kore e kai, e whaka­whetai ana anō ia ki te Atua.
14.7: Ehara hoki i te mea ki a ia ake anō te ora o tētahi o tātou, ehara hoki i te mea ki a ia ake te mate o tētahi.
14.8: Tā te mea, ahakoa ora, e ora ana tātou ki te Ariki; ahakoa mate, e mate ana tātou ki te Ariki. Nā, ahakoa ora tātou, mate rānei, nā te Ariki tātou.
14.9: Ko te mea hoki tēnei i mate ai a te Karaiti, i ara ake ai anō, i ora ai anō, kia waiho ai ia hei Ariki ngā­tahi mō te hunga mate, mō te hunga ora.
14.10: Ko koe nā, he aha koe i whaka­hē ai i tōu teina? Me koe nā hoki, he aha koe i whaka­hāwea ai ki tōu teina? E tū katoa hoki tātou ki te nohoa­nga whaka­wā o te Atua.
14.11: Kua oti hoki te tuhi­tuhi: “ ‘E ora ana ahau,’ e ai tā te Ariki, ‘piko katoa ngā turi ki ahau; e whaka­ae anō hoki ngā arero katoa ki te Atua.’ ”
14.12: Āe rā, ka kōrero­tia e tēnei, e tēnei o tātou te tikanga o āna mahi ki te Atua. Kei Hinga tētahi i a Koe
14.13: Nā, kāti tā tātou whaka­hē tētahi i tētahi. Engari, ko tēnei kia rite i a koutou, kia kaua e whaka­takoto­ria he tūtuki­tanga wae­wae, he take whaka­hi­nga rānei mō tōna teina.
14.14: E mōhio ana ahau, ū tonu tōku whaka­aro i roto i te Ariki, i a Īhu, kāhore he mea nōna ake anō tōna noa. Hāunga ia ki te mea tētahi he noa tētahi mea, e noa anō ki a ia.
14.15: Ki te mea hoki nā te kai i pōuri ai tōu teina, kāhore e mau ana tāu haere i runga i te aroha. Kei mate i tāu kai te tangata i mate nei a te Karaiti mōna.
14.16: Nā, kei kōrero­tia kino­tia tō koutou pai.
14.17: Ehara hoki te ranga­tira­tanga o te Atua i te kai, i te inu; engari he tika, he rangi­mārie, he hari i roto i te Wairua Tapu.
14.18: Ko te tangata hoki ko ēnei hei mahi­nga māna ki a te Karaiti, ka āhua­reka­tia ia e te Atua, ka pai­ngia hoki e ngā tāngata.
14.19: Nā, kia whai tātou i ngā mea e mau ai te rongo, i ngā mea anō hoki e hangā ai te pai o tētahi, o tētahi.
14.20: Kaua e waiho te kai hei whaka­horo mō tā te Atua mahi. He mā hoki ngā mea katoa; otiia, he kino ki te tangata e kai ana me te whaka­hē tōna ngākau.
14.21: He mea pai tonu kia kaua e kai kiko­kiko, kia kaua e inu wāina, aha rānei e tūtuki ai tōu teina.
14.22: Ko te whaka­pono i a koe nā, waiho i a koe anō i te aro­aro o te Atua. Ka hari te tangata kāhore e whaka­tau i te hē ki a ia anō mō te mea i whaka­paia e ia māna.
14.23: Ki te rua­rua ia tētahi, ka tau te hē ki a ia ki te kai ia; nō te mea ehara i te kai whaka­pono. He hara hoki ngā mea katoa kīhai nei i puta ake i te whaka­pono.

15.1: Ko te mahi tika mā tātou, mā te hunga kaha, he pīkau i ngā ngoi­kore­tanga o te hunga kaha­kore; kaua hoki e whai i tā tātou ake i āhua­reka ai.
15.2: Me whai tēnā, tēnā o tātou kia āhua­reka mai tōna hoa, tōna hoa mō te mea e pai ana hei hanga i tōna whaka­pono.
15.3: Kīhai hoki a te Karaiti i whai ki tāna ake i āhua­reka ai; engari, i rite ki te mea kua oti te tuhi­tuhi, “Ko ngā tāwai­nga a te hunga e tāwai ana i a koe kua tau ki ahau.”
15.4: Ko ngā mea katoa hoki i tuhi­tuhia i mua he mea tuhi­tuhi hei whaka­ako i a tātou, kia whai tūmanako­hanga ai tātou, i te mea ka whaka­manawa­nui ka whaka­mārie­tia hoki e ngā karaipi­ture.
15.5: Heoi, mā te Atua o te manawa­nui, o te whaka­mārie, e hoatu ki a koutou kia kotahi te whaka­aro o tētahi ki tētahi, kia rite ki tā Karaiti Īhu;
15.6: kia kotahi ai te whaka­aro, kia kotahi ai te māngai, e whaka­korōria ai koutou i te Atua, arā i te Matua o tō tātou Ariki, o Īhu Karaiti. Te Rongopai ki ngā Tauiwi
15.7: Nā, me whaka­hoa koutou tētahi ki tētahi, kia rite ki a te Karaiti i mea nei i a tātou hei hoa mōna, kia whai korōria ai te Atua.
15.8: Ko tāku kupu hoki tēnei, i meinga a te Karaiti hei minita ki te kotinga, he whaka­aro ki te pono o te Atua, kia ū ai ngā mea i whaka­aria ki ngā mātua.
15.9: Kia whaka­korōria ai hoki ngā tauiwi i te Atua mō tāna mahi tohu, kia pērā ai me te mea i tuhi­tuhia: “Mō konei ka whaka­whetai ahau ki a koe i waenga­nui o ngā tauiwi, ka hīmene ki tōu ingoa.”
15.10: Tēnei anō tētahi kupu ana, “Kia hari tahi, e ngā tauiwi, me tāna iwi.”
15.11: Tēnei anō hoki, “Whaka­moe­miti­tia te Ariki, e ngā tauiwi katoa; whaka­moe­miti­tia anō ia, e ngā iwi katoa.”
15.12: E mea ana hoki a Ihāia, “Tērā e whai paki­aka a Hehe, me tētahi e whaka­tika ake ana hei ranga­tira mō ngā tauiwi; ko ia hei tūmanako­hanga mā ngā tauiwi.”
15.13: Nā, mā te Atua, nāna nei te tū­mana­ko, e whaka­kī koutou ki te hari katoa, ki te rangi­mārie, i runga i te whaka­pono, kia hua ai tō koutou tū­mana­ko, i runga i te kaha o te Wairua Tapu. Te Take o Paora e Tuhituhi Mārakerake nei
15.14: Nā, e ū ana tōku ake whaka­aro ki a koutou, e ōku tēina, e kī ana koutou i te pai, whawhao rawa ki te mātau­ranga katoa, ā, e taea anō e koutou te tohu­tohu tētahi i tētahi.
15.15: Otiia, i nui ake ai tōku māia ki te tuhi­tuhi pēnei ki a koutou, e ōku tēina, he whaka­mahara anō i a koutou, he mea nā te aroha noa kua hōmai nei ki ahau e te Atua.
15.16: I meinga ai ahau hei minita mā Īhu Karaiti ki ngā tauiwi, hei minita i te rongo­pai o te Atua, kia manako­hia ai te whaka­here o ngā tauiwi, he mea whaka­tapu nā te Wairua Tapu.
15.17: Nā, kua whai whaka­mana­mana­tanga nei ahau i roto i a Karaiti Īhu i ngā mea a te Atua.
15.18: E kore hoki ahau e māia ki te kōrero ki ētahi mea, ko ngā mea anake kua mahia e te Karaiti nā roto i ahau, hei mea kia ngohe­ngohe mai ngā tauiwi, arā, nā tāku kupu, nā tāku mahi,
15.19: i runga i te kaha o ngā tohu, o ngā mea whaka­mīharo, i runga i te kaha o te Wairua Tapu; nō ka whaka­paua e ahau te kauwhau i te rongo­pai o te Karaiti atu i Hiruhārama, ā taka noa, ki Iririkuma rawa.
15.20: Āe rā, ko ia tēnei tāku tohe ki te kauwhau i te rongo­pai, ehara i te mea ki ngā wāhi kua whaka­hua­tia nei a te Karaiti ki reira, kei hanga whare ahau ki runga ki a tētahi atu tū­ranga.
15.21: Engari, kia rite ki te mea i tuhi­tuhia: “E kite te hunga kīhai nei i kōrero­tia ia ki a rātou, ā, e mātau te hunga kīhai i rongo.” Tō Paora Whakaaro ki te Toro ki Roma
15.22: Nā, konei anō i maha ai ōku whaka­ware­nga, te tae atu ai ahau ki a koutou.
15.23: Otiia ināia­nei, kua kore nei he wāhi mōku i ēnei whenua, ā, i te mea he maha ngā tau i wawata ai ahau kia tae atu ki a koutou,
15.24: ina tūpono tāku haere ki Hipania. E tū­mana­ko ana hoki ahau kia kite i a koutou i taua haere­nga ōku, ā, kia kawea pērā­tia atu ahau e koutou, ina anō ia kia mātua rite tētahi wāhi o tōku ngākau i te kite­nga i a koutou.
15.25: Ināia­nei ia, e mea ana ahau, e haere ana tēnei ahau ki Hiruhārama, ki te mahi mea mā te hunga tapu.
15.26: Kua pai hoki a Makeronia rāua ko Akāia kia meinga tētahi kohi­kohi mā ngā mea rawa­kore o te hunga tapu i Hiruhārama.
15.27: Āe rā, i pai anō rātou ki te pērā, ā, e tika ana anō kia hoatu ki a rātou. I te mea kua uru nei ngā tauiwi ki ā rātou mea o te wairua, wai­hoki he tika anō kia mahia e ēnei ētahi mea o te kiko­kiko mā rātou.
15.28: Nā, kia oti tēnei i ahau, ā, hīri rawa tēnei hua hei mea mā rātou, ka tika atu ahau mā koutou nā ki Hipania.
15.29: Ā, e mātau ana ahau, ka haere atu ahau ki a koutou, tērā ahau e haere atu i runga i te hua noa iho o te manaaki­tanga o te rongo­pai o te Karaiti.
15.30: Nā, he tohe tēnei nāku ki a koutou, e ōku tēina, he whaka­aro ki tō tātou Ariki, ki a Īhu Karaiti, nā te aroha hoki o te Wairua, kia tohe tahi koutou me ahau i ā koutou īnoi ki te Atua mōku;
15.31: kia whaka­ora­ngia ahau i te hunga whaka­teka i Hūria; kia manako­hia anō e te hunga tapu tāku minita­tanga mō Hiruhārama;
15.32: kia haere hari atu ai ahau ki a koutou, ki te pai te Atua, kia whaka­tā tahi ai me koutou.
15.33: Nā, kia noho te Atua o te rangi­mārie ki a koutou katoa. Āmine.

16.1: Tēnā tō mātou tua­hine, a Pīpī, te tukua atu nā e ahau ki a koutou, he kai­mahi ia nā te hāhi i Kenekerea.
16.2: Hei manu­hiri ia mā koutou i roto i te Ariki, kia rite ki tā te hunga tapu tikanga, ā, kia āwhina koutou i a ia ki ngā mea e matea e ia. He toko­maha hoki āna i ata­whai ai, ahau anō hoki.
16.3: Oha atu ki a Pirihira rāua ko Akuira, ki ōku hoa mahi i roto i a Karaiti Īhu,
16.4: nā rāua nei hoki ō rāua nā kakī i tāku kia ora ai ahau. Ehara i te mea ko ahau anake e whaka­whetai ana ki a rāua, engari, ko ngā hāhi katoa hoki o ngā tauiwi.
16.5: Oha atu anō ki te hāhi i tō rāua whare. Oha atu ki a Epainetu, ki tāku i aroha ai, ko ia hoki tā te Karaiti mātā­mua o Āhia.
16.6: Oha atu ki a Meri, he nui tāna mahi ki a mātou.
16.7: Oha atu ki a Anaroniku rāua ko Hunia, ōku whanau­nga, ōku hoa here­here anō hoki, he ingoa nunui nei o rāua i roto i ngā āpō­toro, nō mua nei i ahau tō rāua urunga ki a te Karaiti.
16.8: Oha atu ki a Amapiria, ki tāku i aroha ai i roto i te Ariki.
16.9: Oha atu ki a Urupane, ki tō mātou hoa mahi i roto i a te Karaiti, ki a Takuha anō hoki, ki tāku i aroha ai.
16.10: Oha atu ki a Apere, e pai­ngia ana i roto i a te Karaiti. Oha atu ki a Aritopuru mā.
16.11: Oha atu ki a Herōriona, ki tōku whanau­nga. Oha atu ki a Nakihu mā, ki ngā mea i roto i te Ariki.
16.12: Oha atu ki a Taraipine rāua ko Taraipoha, e mahi nei i roto i te Ariki. Oha atu ki a Perahi, e aroha­ina nei, he nui nei tāna mahi i roto i te Ariki.
16.13: Oha atu ki a Rupuha, i whiri­whiria i roto i te Ariki, ki tōna whaea, arā, ki tō māua tahi.
16.14: Oha atu ki a Ahunikiritu, rātou ko Perekona, ko Herama, ko Pataropa, ko Herami, ki ngā tēina anō e noho ana i a rātou.
16.15: Oha atu ki a Piroroku rāua ko Hūria, ki a Nireu rāua ko tōna tua­hine, ki a Orimapa rātou ko te hunga tapu katoa e noho ana i a rātou.
16.16: Oha atu tētahi ki tētahi, hei te kihi tapu anō. Tēnei te oha atu nei ngā hāhi katoa a te Karaiti ki a koutou. He Tohutohu Whakamutunga
16.17: Nā, he tohe tēnei nāku ki a koutou, e ōku tēina, tiro­hia iho te hunga e mahi ana i ngā wehe­wehe­nga, i ngā tūtuki­tanga wae­wae, he mea puta kē i te whaka­ako­ranga i whaka­akona ai koutou. Tahuri atu i a rātou!
16.18: Ko te hunga pērā hoki kāhore i te mahi ki tō tātou Ariki, ki a Īhu Karaiti, engari ki tō rātou ake kōpū. E tini­hanga ana hoki rātou i ngā ngākau o te hunga kino­kore ki ā rātou kōrero māeneene, ki ā rātou kupu whaka­pai­pai.
16.19: Kua pakū hoki ki ngā tāngata katoa te rongo o tō koutou ngohe­ngohe. Koia ahau ka hari nei ki a koutou; e mea ana hoki ahau kia whai whaka­aro koutou ki te pai, kia kūware ki te mea kino.
16.20: Nā tērā te Atua o te rangi­mārie e hohoro te kuru i a Hātana ki raro i ō koutou wae­wae. Kia tau ki a koutou te aroha noa o tō tātou Ariki, o Īhu Karaiti.
16.21: Tēnei te oha atu nei ki a koutou a Tīmoti, tōku hoa mahi a Rukiu, a Hahona, a Hohipate, ōku whanau­nga.
16.22: Ko ahau tēnei, ko Teretiu, ko te kai­tuhi­tuhi o tēnei puka­puka, te oha atu nei ki a koutou i roto i te Ariki.
16.23: Tēnei te oha atu nei ki a koutou a Kaiu te kai­atawhai ōku, o te hāhi katoa. Tēnei te oha atu nei a Eratu, kai­tiaki o ngā mea o te pā, rāua ko te teina, ko Kuaratu.
16.24: Kia tau ki a koutou katoa te aroha noa o tō tātou Ariki, o Īhu Karaiti. Āmine. He Karakia Whakakapi, Whakamoemiti
16.25: Nā, he kaha nei te Atua ki te whakaū i a koutou, i runga i ngā rite­nga o tāku rongo­pai, o te kauwhau­tanga hoki o Īhu Karaiti, o te whaka­kite­nga mai anō o te mea ngaro, kīhai nei i rangona nō te tīma­tanga rā anō o te ao,
16.26: ā, kua whaka­mārama­tia mai ināia­nei e ngā karaipi­ture a ngā poro­piti, he mea whaka­rite mai nā te Atua ora tonu, ā, whaka­pua­kina mai ana ki ngā tauiwi katoa kia ngohe­ngohe ai rātou ki tā te whaka­pono.
16.27: Waiho atu i te Atua, ko ia nei anake te Mea mātau, te korōria i roto i a Īhu Karaiti, ake ake, Āmine.

1.1: Nā Paora, i pai nei te Atua kia karanga­tia hei āpō­toro mā Īhu Karaiti, nā te teina hoki, nā Hotene –
1.2: Ki te hāhi a te Atua i Koriniti, ki te hunga kua oti te whaka­tapu i roto i a Karaiti Īhu, kua karanga­tia hei hunga tapu, rātou ko te hunga katoa i ngā wāhi katoa e karanga ana ki te ingoa o tō tātou Ariki, o Īhu Karaiti, o tō rātou Ariki, o tō tātou:
1.3: Kia tau ki a koutou te aroha noa me te rangi­mārie, he mea nā te Atua, nā tō tātou Matua, nā te Ariki hoki, nā Īhu Karaiti. He Manaakitanga i roto i a te Karaiti
1.4: He whaka­whetai tonu tāku mahi ki tōku Atua mō koutou, mō te aroha noa o te Atua kua hōmai nei ki a koutou i roto i a Karaiti Īhu;
1.5: kua meinga hoki kia hua ngā mea katoa mā koutou i roto i a ia, te whaka­puaki kōrero, te mātau­ranga;
1.6: pēnā hoki me te whaka­atu­ranga i a te Karaiti kua ū nā i roto i a koutou.
1.7: I kore ai koutou e hapa i tētahi mea hōmai; i a koutou e tatari nā ki te whaka­kite­nga mai o tō tātou Ariki, o Īhu Karaiti.
1.8: Māna hoki koutou e whakaū ā taea noatia te mutu­nga, kia kore ai koutou e eke­ngia e te kupu i te rā o tō tātou Ariki, o Īhu Karaiti.
1.9: He pono te Atua, nāna nei koutou i karanga kia uru tahi ki tāna Tama, ki a Īhu Karaiti, ki tō tātou Ariki. Wehenga i roto i te Hāhi
1.10: Nā, he tohe tēnei nāku ki a koutou, e ōku tēina, i runga i te ingoa o tō tātou Ariki, o Īhu Karaiti, kia kotahi tā koutou kōrero katoa, ā, kia kaua he wehe­wehe­nga i roto i a koutou; engari, kia tui­tuia koutou i runga i te ngākau kotahi, i te whaka­aro kotahi.
1.11: Kua oti hoki koutou te tohu­tohu mai, e ōku tēina, e te hunga o te whare o Koroi, tēnā ngā tau­tohe­tohe kei roto i a koutou.
1.12: Ānei te tikanga o tāku kōrero, kei te kī tēnā o koutou nā, “Nō Paora ahau,” ā, “Nō Aporo ahau,” ā, “Ko ahau nō Kipa. Ko ahau nō te Karaiti.”
1.13: Kua oti koia a te Karaiti te wāhi? I rīpeka­tia rānei a Paora mō koutou? I iri­iria rānei koutou i runga i te ingoa o Paora?
1.14: E whaka­whetai ana ahau ki te Atua, mōku kīhai i iri­iri i tētahi o koutou, ko Kirihipu anake rāua ko Kaiu;
1.15: kei waiho e te tangata hei kōrero, nāku koutou i iri­iri i runga i tōku ingoa.
1.16: (Nāku anō i iri­iri ngā tāngata o te whare o Tepana; i kō ake, kāhore ahau i te mahara ki tāku iri­iri­nga i tētahi atu.)
1.17: Kīhai hoki ahau i tonoa e te Karaiti ki te iri­iri, engari, ki te kauwhau i te rongo­pai; ehara i te mea i runga i te mōhio ki ngā kupu, kei whaka­kāhore­tia te rīpeka o te Karaiti. Ko te Karaiti te Mana me te Mātauranga o te Atua
1.18: Ko te kōrero hoki o te rīpeka ki te hunga e whaka­ngaro­mia ana he mea wawau; ki a tātou ia, ki te hunga e whaka­ora­ngia ana, ko te kaha tērā o te Atua.
1.19: Ka oti hoki te tuhi­tuhi; “Ka ngaro i ahau te whaka­aro nui o te hunga whaka­aro, ka kore hoki i ahau te mahara o te hunga mahara.”
1.20: Kei hea te tangata whaka­aro? Kei hea te kara­ipi? Kei hea te tangata tohe o tēnei ao? Kāhore anō koia i whaka­kūware­tia e te Atua te whaka­aro nui o tēnei ao?
1.21: I te mea hoki i runga i tō te Atua whaka­aro nui, kīhai ngā whaka­aro nui o te ao i mōhio ki te Atua. Nā, ka pai te Atua kia meinga te kūware o te kupu kauwhau hei whaka­ora i te hunga e whaka­pono ana.
1.22: Inā hoki ko tā ngā Hūrai he tono tohu, ko tā ngā Kariki he rapu whaka­aro nui;
1.23: ko tā mātou ia he kauwhau i a te Karaiti i rīpeka­tia, he tūtuki­tanga wae­wae ki ngā Hūrai, he mea kūware ki ngā Kariki;
1.24: ki te hunga ia e karanga­tia ana, ahakoa Hūrai, ahakoa Kariki, ko te Karaiti, ko te kaha o te Atua, ko te whaka­aro mōhio o te Atua.
1.25: Nō te mea he kūware nō te Atua nui atu te mōhio i ngā tāngata; he ngoi­kore nō te Atua kaha atu i ngā tāngata.
1.26: Ti­tiro oti ki tō koutou karanga­tanga, e ōku tēina, kīhai i toko­maha te hunga whaka­aro o te wāhi ki te kiko­kiko, kīhai i toko­maha te hunga nunui, kīhai i toko­maha ngā ranga­tira, e karanga­tia ana.
1.27: Engari, i whiri­whiria e te Atua ko ngā mea kūware o te ao, hei mea e whaka­mā ai te hunga whaka­aro; i whiri­whiria anō e te Atua ko ngā mea ngoi­kore o te ao, hei mea e whaka­mā ai ngā mea kaha.
1.28: Ko ngā mea ware o te ao, ko ngā mea e whaka­hāwea­tia ana, ko ēnā i whiri­whiria e te Atua, āe, ko ngā mea kāhore noa iho, kia whaka­kāhore­tia ai e ia ngā tino mea ake;
1.29: kia kore ai tētahi kiko­kiko e whaka­mana­mana i te aro­aro o te Atua.
1.30: Nāna hoki koutou i roto i a Karaiti Īhu, kua meinga nei ia hei take whaka­aro nui mō tātou, he mea nā te Atua, hei tika, hei whaka­tapu, hei hoko.
1.31: Kia rite ai ki te mea kua oti te tuhi­tuhi, “Ki te whaka­mana­mana tētahi, me whaka­mana­mana ia ki te Ariki.”

2.1: Ko ahau, e ōku tēina, i ahau i haere atu ai ki a koutou, kīhai ahau i haere atu me te pai kupu, me te hua rānei o te whaka­aro, i ahau i kauwhau ai ki a koutou i te mea ngaro a te Atua.
2.2: I takoto hoki tōku whaka­aro, kia kaua ahau e mātau ki tētahi mea i roto i a koutou, ko Īhu Karaiti anake, ko ia hoki i rīpeka­tia.
2.3: Ā, i a koutou ahau me te ngoi­kore, me te wehi, me te tūiri nui.
2.4: Ko tāku kōrero me tāku kauwhau ehara i te kupu whaka­pati nā tō te tangata whaka­aro nui, engari, he whaka­kite­nga nā te Wairua, nā te kaha,
2.5: kia kore ai tō koutou whaka­pono e tū i runga i o te tangata whaka­aro nui, engari, i tō te Atua kaha. Te Mātauranga o te Atua
2.6: He ahakoa rā e kōrero ana mātou i te whaka­aro nui ki waenga­nui i te hunga tino tika. Ehara anō ia i te whaka­aro mōhio nō tēnei ao, nō ngā ranga­tira rānei o tēnei ao, e memeha haere nei.
2.7: Engari, e kōrero ana mātou i te whaka­aro nui o te Atua i roto i te mea ngaro, i te whaka­aro mōhio i huna rā, ko tā te Atua i whaka­takoto ai i mua o ngā ao, hei whaka­korōria mō tātou.
2.8: Kīhai nei tētahi o ngā ranga­tira o tēnei ao i mātau; me i mātau hoki rātou, kua kāhore e rīpeka­tia e rātou te Ariki o te korōria.
2.9: Engari, ka rite ki te mea i tuhi­tuhia rā: “Ko ngā mea kāhore te kanohi i kite, kāhore te tari­nga i rongo, kāhore anō i tapoko noa ki te ngākau o te tangata, ko ngā mea kua rite i te Atua mō te hunga e aroha ana ki a ia.”
2.10: Otiia, kua whaka­kitea mai aua mea ki a tātou e te Atua mā tōna Wairua. E rapu ana hoki te Wairua i ngā mea katoa, āe, i ngā mea hōhonu a te Atua.
2.11: Ko wai oti o ngā tāngata e mātau ana ki ngā mea a te tangata? Ko te wairua anake o te tangata i roto i a ia? Wai­hoki ko ngā mea a te Atua e kore e mātau­ria e tētahi, engari e te Wairua o te Atua.
2.12: Otiia, ko te wairua i riro mai nei i a tātou, ehara i te wairua o te ao, engari, ko te Wairua e ahu mai nei i te Atua; kia mātau ai tātou ki ngā mea kua oti nei te hōmai e te Atua ki a tātou.
2.13: Nā, ka kōrero mātou i aua mea, ehara ngā kupu i te whaka­aro mōhio o te tangata i whaka­ako mai, engari, he mea whaka­ako nā te Wairua Tapu; e whaka­rite­rite ana i ngā mea wairua ki ngā mea wairua.
2.14: Nā, e kore te tangata i te ngākau māori e tango i ngā mea o te Wairua o te Atua. Ki a ia he mea kūware ērā, ā, e kore ia e āhei te mātau, he mea mā te Wairua ka kitea ai.
2.15: Otiia, ki te mea kei tētahi te Wairua, ka kitea e ia ngā mea katoa, e kore anō ia e kitea e tētahi.
2.16: “Ko wai hoki te mātau ana ki te hine­ngaro o te Ariki, e whaka­ako ai ia i a ia?” Kei a tātou ia te hine­ngaro o te Karaiti.

3.1: Nā, ko ahau, e ōku tēina, kīhai i āhei te kōrero ki a koutou me tāku ki te hunga i te Wairua, engari, i te kiko­kiko, ānō ki ngā kō­hunga­hunga i roto i a te Karaiti.
3.2: He waiū tāku i whāngai atu nā mā koutou, ehara i te kai mārō. Kīanō hoki i taea e koutou te kai mārō, ā, kāhore nei anō i taea e koutou ināia­nei.
3.3: Kei te kiko­kiko tonu hoki koutou. I te mea kei a koutou tonu te hae, te totohe, te wehe­wehe, ehara oti koutou i te hunga i te kiko­kiko, e haere ana i runga i tā te tangata rite­nga?
3.4: I tētahi hoki ka kī nei, “Ko ahau nō Paora,” me tētahi atu, “Ko ahau nō Aporo,” ehara oti koutou i te hunga i te kiko­kiko?
3.5: Tēnā ko wai a Aporo? Ā, ko wai a Paora? He minita i whaka­pono ai koutou; ki ia tangata i tā te Ariki i hōmai ai.
3.6: Nāku i whaka­tō, nā Aporo i whaka­mākūkū; nā te Atua ia i mea kia tupu.
3.7: Heoi, he kore noa iho te kai­whaka­tō, he kore noa iho te kai­whaka­mākūkū, engari, te Atua nāna nei i mea kia tupu.
3.8: Nā, ko te kai­whaka­tō, ko te kai­whaka­mākūkū, kotahi tonu rāua. Otirā, ka rite ki tāna ake mahi, te utu e riro mai i tēnā, i tēnā o rāua.
3.9: He hoa mahi hoki mātou nō te Atua; he māra koutou nā te Atua. He whare hanga nā te Atua.
3.10: Kei te rite­nga o te aroha noa o te Atua i hōmai nei ki ahau, kua whaka­takoto­ria e ahau te tūnga, he pērā me tā te tohu­nga; ā, ko tētahi atu kei te hanga whare ki runga. Otirā, kia tūpato ia tangata ki tāna whare e hanga ai ki runga.
3.11: E kore hoki tētahi tangata e āhei te whaka­takoto i tētahi tūnga kē atu i tērā kua oti nei te whaka­takoto, arā, i a Īhu Karaiti.
3.12: Engari, ki te hanga tētahi ki runga ki te tūnga he kōura, he hiriwa, he kōhatu utu nui, he rākau, he taru­taru, he ota­ota;
3.13: ka whaka­kitea te mahi a tētahi, a tētahi; mā te rā hoki e whaka­atu, nō te mea ka whaka­kitea e te kāpura; ā, mā te kāpura tonu e whaka­mā­tau­tau te mahi a tēnā, a tēnā, he pēhea tōna āhua.
3.14: Ki te mau tonu te mahi a tētahi e hanga ai ki runga, ka riro i a ia he utu.
3.15: Ki te wera te mahi a tētahi ka mau­mau­ria tāna; ko ia, ia ka ora; otirā me te mea mā roto i te ahi.
3.16: Kāhore oti koutou i mātau, he whare tapu koutou nō te Atua, ā, kei roto i a koutou te Wairua o te Atua e noho ana?
3.17: Ki te whaka­ngaro­mia e tētahi te whare tapu o te Atua, ka whaka­ngaro­mia hoki ia e te Atua; he tapu hoki te whare o te Atua, ā, ko koutou taua whare.
3.18: Kei hanga­rau tētahi ki a ia anō. Ki te mea tētahi he tangata mōhio ia i roto i a koutou i tēnei ao, tukua ia hei kūware kia tupu ai hei tangata whaka­aro.
3.19: Ki te Atua hoki he kūware noa ngā whaka­aro mōhio o tēnei ao. Kua oti hoki te tuhi­tuhi, “Ka mau i a ia te hunga whaka­aro i runga i tō rātou tini­hanga,”
3.20: me tēnei hoki, “E mātau ana te Ariki ki ngā whaka­aro o te hunga whaka­aro, he teka­teka noa.”
3.21: Nō reira, kei whaka­mana­mana tētahi ki te tangata. Nō koutou hoki ngā mea katoa;
3.22: ahakoa a Paora, a Aporo, a Kipa, te ao, te ora, te mate rānei, ngā mea o nāia­nei, ngā mea rānei e takoto mai nei, nō koutou katoa;
3.23: ā, ko koutou nō te Karaiti, ko te Karaiti nō te Atua.

4.1: Me pēnei te whaka­aro o te tangata ki a mātou nā, he kai­mahi nā te Karaiti, he tuari hoki nō ngā mea ngaro a te Atua.
4.2: Nā, hei konei ko te mea o te tuari e mate­nui­tia ana, kia kitea he tangata pono ia.
4.3: Ki ahau ia he mea nohi­nohi rawa kia whai kupu koutou mōku, te tangata rānei; kāhore nei hoki āku kupu mōku anō.
4.4: Kāhore hoki ahau i mātau ki tētahi aha ōku; heoi, e kore tēnā e ai hei whaka­tika mōku. Otirā, ko te Ariki hei whai kupu mōku.
4.5: Nā reira, kaua e whaka­wā­kia wawe­tia tētahi mea, kia tae mai rā anō te Ariki, māna e whaka­mārama ngā mea huna o te pōuri, e whaka­kite hoki ngā whaka­aro o ngā ngākau; hei reira ia tangata whaka­moe­miti­tia ai e te Atua.
4.6: Nā, ko ēnei mea, e ōku tēina, nāku i huri mai te āhua ki a māua ko Aporo, he whaka­aro ki a koutou, kia ai māua hei whaka­ako i a koutou, kia kaua te whaka­aro e hipa atu i te mea i tuhi­tuhia; kia kaua tētahi o koutou e whaka­peha­peha mō tētahi ki runga atu i tētahi.
4.7: Ko wai kei te mea kia rere kē koe? Ko tēhea mea hoki āu ehara i te mea hoatu ki a koe? Nā, he mea i hoatu ki a koe, he aha koe ka whaka­mana­mana ai, me te mea nei ehara i te mea hoatu?
4.8: Kua mākona kē nā hoki koutou! Kua hua kē ō koutou taonga! Kua kīngi koutou ahakoa motu mai mātou! Āe rā, e pai ana ki ahau kia kīngi tonu koutou, kia kīngi tahi ai tātou.
4.9: Ki tōku whaka­aro hoki kua waiho mātou, ngā āpō­toro, e te Atua mō muri rawa, ānō he hunga mō te mate; kua meinga hoki mātou hei mā­taki­taki­nga mā te ao, mā ngā ana­hera, ā, mā ngā tāngata.
4.10: Ko mātou he kūware mō tā te Karaiti, ko koutou ia he hunga whai whaka­aro i roto i a te Karaiti; ko mātou he ngoi­kore, ko koutou ia he hunga kaha; tō koutou he korōria, tō mātou ia he hōnore­kore.
4.11: Tae tonu mai ki tēnei hāora nei e matekai ana mātou, e mate­wai ana, e haere ta­ha­nga ana, e kurua ana, kāhore hoki ō mātou kāinga tūmau.
4.12: E māuiui ana mātou, ko ō mātou ringa ake hei mahi. E taunu­tia ana, manaaki tonu mātou; e whaka­toia ana, whaka­ririka kau mātou;
4.13: ka kōrero­tia kino­tia, ka whaka­ngā­wari atu mātou. Kua meinga mātou kia rite ki te paru ruke­nga o te ao, ki te para o ngā mea katoa, taea noatia tēnei rā.
4.14: Kāhore ahau i te tuhi­tuhi atu i ēnei mea kia whaka­mā ai koutou, engari, hei whaka­tūpato i a koutou, i āku tama­riki aroha.
4.15: Nō te mea ahakoa whi­whi koutou i ngā kai­whaka­ako tekau mano i roto i a te Karaiti, kāhore i toko­maha ō koutou mātua; he whānau hoki koutou nāku i roto i a Karaiti Īhu i runga i te rongo­pai.
4.16: Koia ahau ka tohe nei ki a koutou, kia rite tā koutou ki tāku.
4.17: Nā reira i tonoa atu ai e ahau ki a koutou a Tīmoti, tāku tama aroha, tama pono i roto i te Ariki, māna koutou e whaka­mahara ki ōku ara i roto i a te Karaiti, ki tāku e whaka­ako nei i ngā wāhi katoa i roto i ngā hāhi katoa.
4.18: Nā, ko ētahi e whaka­peha­peha ana, e mea ana e kore ahau e haere atu ki a koutou.
4.19: Otirā, e kore e roa ka haere atu ahau ki a koutou, ki te pai te Ariki; ā hei reira, ehara i te kupu, engari, ko te kaha o te hunga e whaka­peha­peha ana, tāku e ti­tiro ai.
4.20: Nō te mea, ehara te ranga­tira­tanga o te Atua i te kupu, engari he kaha.
4.21: Ko tēhea tā koutou e pai ai? Kia haere atu ahau ki a koutou me te whiu, i runga rānei i te aroha me te wairua māhaki?

5.1: Kua pakū noa atu te rongo he pūremu kei roto i a koutou, he tū pūremu kāhore nei i roto i ngā tauiwi, arā, kua riro i tētahi o koutou te wahine a tōna pāpā.
5.2: Ā, e whaka­peha­peha ana koutou, tē pōuri koutou, te mea kia tango­hia atu i roto i a koutou te tangata nāna tēnei mahi.
5.3: Nā, ko ahau, ahakoa tawhiti i te tinana kei konā te wairua, kua whaka­hē noa ake i te tangata nāna tēnei mahi i runga i te ingoa o tō tātou Ariki, o Īhu, me te mea kei konā anō ahau;
5.4: e noho hui­hui ana koutou me tōku wairua, i runga i te kaha o tō tātou Ariki, o Īhu.
5.5: Ka tuku atu ai i tēnā tū tangata ki a Hātana, hei whaka­ngaro mō te kiko­kiko, kia ora ai te wairua i te rā o te Ariki, o Īhu.
5.6: Kāhore e pai tā koutou whaka­peha­peha. Kāhore koutou e mātau he iti nei te rēwena, rēwena­tia ake te pū­ranga katoa?
5.7: Kokoa ki waho te rēwena tawhito, kia ai koutou he pū­ranga hou, me koutou e rēwena­kore nā. Kua patua hoki mō tātou a te Karaiti, tō tātou Kape­nga.
5.8: Nā, kia kai tātou i te hākari, auaka te rēwena tawhito, auaka hoki te rēwena o te mauā­hara, o te kino, engari, hei te taro rēwena­kore o te tini­hanga­kore, o te pono.
5.9: I tuhi­tuhi atu ahau ki a koutou i roto i te puka­puka, kia kaua e whaka­hoa ki ngā tāngata pūremu.
5.10: Ehara ia i te mea rawa mō te hunga pūremu o tēnei ao, mō te hunga apo, hao taonga, kara­kia whaka­pakoko; pēnei me haere atu koutou ki waho o te ao.
5.11: Engari, ināia­nei ka tuhi­tuhi atu ahau ki a koutou, kia kaua e whaka­hoa, ki te mea tētahi e kīa nei he teina he tangata moe­puku, he apo rānei, e kara­kia ana rānei ki te whaka­pakoko, he tangata taunu rānei, he hau­rangi, he hao taonga rānei; kaua rawa koutou ko taua tū tangata e kai tahi.
5.12: Hei aha rā māku te whaka­wā i te hunga o waho? E kore koia koutou e whaka­wā i te hunga o roto?
5.13: Ā, ko te hunga o waho mā te Atua rātou e whaka­wā? “Nā, motu­hia atu taua tangata kino i roto i a koutou.”

6.1: Ka kaha rānei tētahi o koutou, me­he­mea he tau­tohe tāna ki tōna hoa, ki te haere ki te whaka­wā i te aro­aro o te hunga hē, ā, kauaka ki te aro­aro o te hunga tapu?
6.2: Kāhore oti koutou i mātau mā te hunga tapu e whaka­wā te ao? Ki te riro mā koutou e whaka­wā te ao, e kore rānei koutou e tau hei whaka­rite i ngā mea iti rawa?
6.3: Kāhore koutou i mātau ko tātou hei whaka­wā mō ngā ana­hera? Kauaka oti ngā mea o tēnei ao?
6.4: Nā, ki te mea he whaka­wā a koutou ki ngā mea o tēnei ao, whaka­noho­ia ai rānei e koutou ko te hunga iti o te hāhi hei whaka­rite?
6.5: I kōrero atu ai ahau i tēnei kia whaka­mā ai koutou. Koia rānei, kāhore rawa e kitea kia kotahi he tangata whaka­aro i roto i a koutou, hei whaka­rite ina whaka­wā ōna tēina i a rāua.
6.6: Kei te whaka­wā ia te tua­kana i te teina, ā, i te aro­aro rawa o te hunga whaka­pono kore?
6.7: Ehara, kua waiho kē tēnā hei hē i roto i a koutou, tā koutou whaka­wā tētahi i tētahi. He aha tē whaka­ririka kau ai ina ahatia koutou? He aha tē tango­hia noatia atu ai ā koutou mea?
6.8: Ehara, ko koutou tonu kei te mahi i te hē, ā, kei te tango poka­noa, ko ō koutou tēina anō te mea­tanga.
6.9: Tēnā rānei kāhore koutou i te mātau, e kore te hunga whaka­haere hē e whi­whi ki te ranga­tira­tanga o te Atua? Kei tini­hanga­tia koutou; e kore te hunga moe­puku, te hunga kara­kia whaka­pakoko rānei, te hunga pūremu, te hunga whaka­wahine, te hunga rānei e mea ana i te tāne hei wahine,
6.10: ngā tāngata tāhae, ngā tāngata apo, ngā hau­rangi, te hunga taunu, te hunga hao taonga rānei, e whi­whi ki te ranga­tira­tanga o te Atua.
6.11: He pērā hoki ētahi o koutou i mua; otirā, kua horoia koutou, kua whaka­tapua, kua whaka­tikaia i runga i te ingoa o te Ariki, o Īhu Karaiti, he mea­tanga nā te Wairua o tō tātou Atua. Whakamahia tō Tinana kia Whaikorōria ai te Atua
6.12: He tika ngā mea katoa māku, otirā, e kore e pai katoa. He tika ngā mea katoa māku, otirā, e kore ahau e pai ki tētahi mea hei ranga­tira mōku.
6.13: “Ko ngā kai mō te kōpū, ko te kōpū mō ngā kai,” heoi, ka ngaro tēnei i te Atua me ērā hoki. Ehara hoki te tinana i te mea mō te moe­puku, engari, mā te Ariki, ko te Ariki hoki hei Ariki mō te tinana.
6.14: Ā, nā te Atua i ara ai te Ariki wai­hoki māna tātou ka ara ai, mā tōna kaha.
6.15: Kāhore oti koutou i mātau, he wāhi ō koutou tinana nō te Karaiti? Me tango koia e ahau ngā wāhi o te Karaiti, ā, ka mea i a rātou hei wāhi mō te wahine kairau? Kāhore rāpea!
6.16: Ā, kāhore rānei koutou i mātau, ko te tangata e honoa ki te wahine kairau he tinana kotahi? E kī ana hoki ia, “Hei kiko­kiko kotahi rāua toko­rua.”
6.17: Otiia, ko te tangata e honoa ki te Ariki, kotahi tonu te wairua.
6.18: Rere atu rā i te moe­puku. Nō waho o te tinana ngā hara katoa e hara ai te tangata; ko te tangata ia e moe­puku ana, e hara ana ia ki tōna ake tinana.
6.19: Ā, kāhore rānei koutou i mātau, he whare tapu tō koutou tinana nō te Wairua Tapu i roto nā i a koutou, i hōmai nei e te Atua? Ā, ehara i te mea nō koutou ake koutou.
6.20: Kua oti hoki koutou te hoko ki te utu; whaka­korōria­tia te Atua ki ō koutou tinana.

7.1: Nā, mō ngā mea i tuhi­tuhi mai nā koutou: He mea pai anō mō te tangata kia kaua e pā ki te wahine.
7.2: Otiia, he whaka­aro kei moe­puku, kia rite mā te tāne he wahine māna ake, ā, mā te wahine he tāne māna ake.
7.3: Kia puta te whaka­aro pai o te tāne ki te wahine, hei te mea e tika ana; me tō te wahine hoki ki te tāne.
7.4: Ehara te wahine i te ranga­tira o tōna tinana ake, engari, te tāne; me te tāne anō, ehara ia i te ranga­tira o tōna ake tinana, engari, te wahine.
7.5: Kaua e kai­ponu tētahi i tētahi; hāunga ia ki te āta whaka­ritea mō tētahi wā, kia ātea ai kōrua ki te noho­puku, ki te īnoi, ka hoki ai anō ki a kōrua, kei ai tō kōrua hia­hia tai­kaha hei whaka­wai mā Hātana i a kōrua.
7.6: Otirā, ko tēnei kōrero āku he mea whaka­ae noa, ehara i te tikanga whaka­takoto.
7.7: Ko tāku ia i pai ai, kia pēnei ngā tāngata katoa i ahau nei. Otirā, e hōmai ana e te Atua te āhua mōna ki ia tangata, ki ia tangata, ki tētahi ko tēnei, ki tētahi ko tērā.
7.8: Ko tāku kupu ia tēnei ki ngā takakau, ki ngā wāhine pouaru, he mea pai mō rātou kia kāti tonu me ahau nei.
7.9: Otirā, ki te kore e taea e rāua te whaka­manawa­nui, me mārena. He pai ake hoki te mārena i te kakā o te ngākau.
7.10: Ko tāku whaka­hau ia tēnei ki te hunga whai hoa, ehara i ahau, engari ko te Ariki, “Aua te wahine e mawehe kē i tāna tāne.”
7.11: Engari, ki te mawehe ia, me noho hoa­kore, me hohou rānei te rongo ki tāna tāne. Kaua hoki te tāne e whaka­rere i tāna wahine.
7.12: Ki ērā atu ia ko tāku kupu tēnei, ehara i te Ariki. Ki te mea he wahine kore whaka­pono tā tētahi o ngā tēina, ā, ka whaka­ae taua wahine kia noho tahi rāua, kaua ia e whaka­rērea e ia.
7.13: Ā, ko te wahine, he tāne kore whaka­pono tāna, ā, ka whaka­ae kia noho tahi rāua, kaua ia e whaka­rere tāna tāne.
7.14: Nō te mea e whaka­tapua ana te tāne whaka­pono kore e te wahine e whaka­tapua ana hoki te wahine whaka­pono kore e te tāne. Me he kāhore, kua poke ā kōrua tama­riki, tēnā ko tēnei he tapu rātou.
7.15: Ki te mawehe kē ia te whaka­pono kore, māna e mawehe kē. E kore tētahi teina, tua­hine rānei, e mau te here e ngā mea pēnā. Otirā, kua karanga­tia tātou e te Atua ki te rangi­mārie.
7.16: Mā te aha koe e mōhio ai, e tai, ka ora rānei i a koe tāu tāne? Ā, koe rānei, e te tāne, mā te aha ka mōhio ai, ka ora i a koe tāu wahine? Kia Pēnā Tāu Noho i tā te Atua i Whakahau ai
7.17: Heoi anake, kia rite ki tā te Atua tū­whanga ki tēnā, ki tēnā, ki tāna karanga­tanga hoki ki tēnā, ki tēnā, kia pērā tāna haere. Nā, ko tāku whaka­takoto tēnā i roto i ngā hāhi katoa.
7.18: He mea kokoti tētahi i tōna karanga­tanga? Kaua e whaka­kāhore­tia tōna kotinga. He mea kokoti­kore tētahi i tōna karanga­tanga? Kaua ia e kotia.
7.19: He mea kore noa iho te kotinga, he mea kore noa iho anō te kotinga­kore, engari ia te pupuri i ā te Atua ture.
7.20: Kia mau ia tangata ki tōna karanga­tanga, i karanga­tia ai ia.
7.21: He pono­nga koe i tōu karanga­tanga? Kaua e mā­nuka­nuka. Otirā, ki te wātea he haere­nga noa­tanga atu mōu, me pēnā.
7.22: Ko te tangata hoki he pono­nga i tōna karanga­tanga i roto i te Ariki, he tangata tuku noa ia nā te Ariki. Wai­hoki ko te tangata ehara nei i te pono­nga i tōna karanga­tanga, he pono­nga ia nā te Karaiti.
7.23: Kua oti koutou te hoko ki te utu; aua e meinga hei pono­nga koutou mā te tangata.
7.24: E ōku tēina, ko te mahi a tēnei, a tēnei, i tōna karanga­tanga kia mau ia ki tēnā me te whaka­aro anō ki te Atua. Ngā Take e Pā ana ki ngā Takakau me ngā Pouaru
7.25: Nā, mō ngā wāhina, kāhore a te Ariki tikanga ki ahau; tēnei ia tōku whaka­aro, arā, tō te tangata i a ia nei tō te Ariki ata­whai, i pono ai.
7.26: Nā reira, ki tōku whaka­aro he pai tēnei mō te whaka­raru a tēnei wā, arā, he pai kia kāti tonu te tangata i a ia nei.
7.27: Kua herea koe ki te wahine? Kaua e whai kia wete­kia. Ka oti koe te wewete i te wahine? Kaua e whāia he wahine.
7.28: Otiia, ki te mārena koe, kāhore ōu hara; ā, ki te mārena te wāhina, kāhore ōna hara. Otiia, tērā e pā mai he whaka­raru i te kiko­kiko ki taua hunga pēnā; heoi, me āta hanga ahau ki a koutou.
7.29: Ko tāku kupu ia tēnei, e ōku tēina, e tūtata ana te wā. Heoi, ināia­nei tērā e rite te hunga whai wāhine ki te hunga kāhore nei a rātou;
7.30: me te hunga e tangi ana, ānō kāhore rātou i te tangi; me te hunga e hari ana, ānō kāhore rātou i te hari; me te hunga e hoko ana, ānō kāhore ā rātou taonga;
7.31: me te hunga i a rātou tēnei ao, ānō kāhore ā rātou hē ki te ao. E memeha haere ana hoki te āhua o tēnei ao.
7.32: Otiia, ko tāku mea tēnei kia kaua koutou e mā­nuka­nuka. Ko tā te takakau e mā­nuka­nuka ai ko ngā mea a te Ariki, me pēhea tāna whaka­mānawa­reka ki te Ariki.
7.33: Ko te tangata whai hoa ia, e mā­nuka­nuka ana ki ngā mea o te ao, me pēhea tāna whaka­mānawa­reka ki tāna wahine.
7.34: Nā tērā anō te mea i rere­kē ai te wahine whai hoa i te wāhina. Ko te wahine takakau, tāna e mā­nuka­nuka ai ko ngā mea a te Ariki, kia tapu tahi ai te tinana me te wairua. Ko te wahine whai hoa ia ka mā­nuka­nuka ki ngā mea o te ao, me pēhea tāna whaka­mānawa­reka ki tāna tāne.
7.35: Ko tēnei kōrero āku he mea kia hua ai he pai mō koutou anō; ehara i te mea kia māhanga­tia ai koutou, engari, mō te mea e hara­tau ana, kia ū ai koutou ki te Ariki, kāhore he mea hei rorona kē.
7.36: Nā, ki te whaka­aro tētahi tangata e hē ana tāna tikanga ki tāna wāhina, me­he­mea kua pahure tōna tai­ohi­nga, ā, heoi anō tikanga, māna e mea tāna e pai ai, kāhore ōna hara; me mārena rāua.
7.37: Ko te tangata ia e ū ana i tōna ngākau, ā, kāhore he mea hei aki­aki i a ia, kei a ia ake anō te tikanga mō tāna e pai ai, ā, kua oti tēnei te whaka­takoto e tōna ngākau, kia waiho tāna wāhina, kei te pai tāna mahi.
7.38: Nā, he pai te mahi a te tangata e tuku ana kia mārena­tia tāna wāhina; pai ake ia te mahi a te tangata kāhore e tuku kia mārena­tia.
7.39: E herea ana te wahine e te ture i te mea e ora ana tāna tāne; ki te mate ia te tāne, kua wātea ia ki te mārena ki tāna e pai ai; otirā i roto i te Ariki.
7.40: Ki tōku whaka­aro ia, nui kē atu tōna hari ki te kāti tonu ia. Ā, ki tāku mahara kei ahau anō hoki te Wairua o te Atua.

8.1: Nā, mō ngā mea e patua ana mā ngā whaka­pakoko. E mōhio ana tātou kei a tātou katoa te mātau­ranga. Ko tā te mātau­ranga he whaka­pupuhi; ko tā te aroha ia he wai­hanga.
8.2: Ki te mea tētahi e mātau ana ia ki tētahi mea, kāhore tōna mātau­ranga kia rite noa ki tō te mātau­ranga tikanga;
8.3: ki te aroha ia tētahi ki te Atua, kua mātau­ria tēnei e ia.
8.4: Nā reira, mō te kai i ngā mea e patua ana mā ngā whaka­pakoko, e mōhio ana tātou he kore noa iho te whaka­pakoko i te ao, kāhore hoki he Atua kē, kotahi anake.
8.5: Ahakoa hoki tērā ngā mea e kīa nei he atua, i te rangi rānei, i te whenua rānei; he tini nei hoki ngā atua, he tini ngā ariki;
8.6: ki a tātou ia kotahi anō Atua, ko te Matua, i ahu mai i a ia ngā mea katoa, ko tātou ki a ia; kotahi hoki Ariki, ko Īhu Karaiti, nāna nei ngā mea katoa, nāna hoki tātou.
8.7: Otirā, kāhore tērā mātau­ranga i ngā tāngata katoa. Engari tērā anō ētahi, i te mea kua taunga ki te whaka­pakoko tae mai ki nāia­nei, e kai ana i te mea i patua mā te whaka­pakoko; ā, ka poke tō rātou hine­ngaro ngoi­kore.
8.8: Ehara rāia te kai i te mea e pai­ngia ai tātou e te Atua. Nō te mea ahakoa kāhore tātou e kai, e kore e heke iho tō tātou pai; ā, ahakoa kai tātou, e kore e kake tō tātou pai.
8.9: Engari, kia tūpato ki tēnei wāhi i tukua nei ki a koutou, kei waiho hei whaka­­hinga mō te hunga ngoi­kore.
8.10: Ki te mea hoki ka kite tētahi i a koe, i te mea mōhio, e noho ana ki te kai i roto i te teme­para o te whaka­pakoko, e kore koia e kakama ake tōna hine­ngaro, me­he­mea ia he ngoi­kore, e kakama ake ki te kai i ngā mea e patua ana mā te whaka­pakoko?
8.11: Mā tōu mātau­ranga hoki ka ngaro ai te mea ngoi­kore, te teina he whaka­aro nei ki a ia i mate ai a te Karaiti.
8.12: Nā, i a koutou ka hara nei ki ngā tēina, ka patu nei i tō rātou hine­ngaro ngoi­kore, e hara ana koutou ki a te Karaiti.
8.13: Mō konei, ki te hē tōku teina i te kai, e kore rawa ahau e kai kiko­kiko ake tonu atu, kei hē i ahau tōku teina.

9.1: He teka ianei kei ahau anō ngā tikanga mōku? He teka ianei he āpō­toro ahau? Kīhai ianei ahau i kite i a Īhu Karaiti, i tō tātou Ariki? Ehara oti koutou i tāku mahi i roto i te Ariki?
9.2: Ahakoa ehara ahau i te āpō­toro ki ērā atu, engari rawa ia he āpō­toro ki a koutou, ko koutou hoki te hīri o tōku āpō­toro­tanga i roto i te Ariki.
9.3: Ko tāku utu tēnei ki ōku kaiui;
9.4: kāhore rānei i a mātou anō te tikanga mō te kai, mō te inu?
9.5: Kāhore rānei i a mātou anō te tikanga ki te whaka­hāereere i te hoa wahine, he wahine whaka­pono, pērā i ērā atu āpō­toro me ngā tēina o te Ariki, rātou ko Kipa?
9.6: Ko māua anake rānei ko Pānapa, kāhore rānei i a māua te tikanga kia kaua e mahi?
9.7: Ko wai ka haere hei hōia, ā, nāna ake anō ngā utu mōna? Ko wai e whaka­tō ana i te māra wāina, ā, kāhore ō reira hua e kainga e ia? Ko wai hoki e whāngai ana i te kāhui, ā, kāhore e kai i te waiū o te kāhui?
9.8: E kōrero ana rānei ahau i ēnei mea i te tikanga tangata? He pērā anō rānei tā te ture kōrero?
9.9: Kua oti hoki te tuhi­tuhi i roto i te ture a Mohi, “Kaua e whaka­mōkā­tia te māngai o te kau i te mea e patu wīti ana. Ko ngā kau koia tā te Atua i whaka­aro ai?”
9.10: Mō tātou rānei te tino tikanga o āna kōrero? Āe, he whaka­aro ki a tātou i tuhi­tuhi ai; he tika hoki kia parau te kai­parau i runga i te tū­mana­ko, kia patu wīti anō te kai­patu i runga i te tū­mana­ko ki tētahi wāhi māna.
9.11: I te mea kua ruia e mātou ngā mea wairua mā koutou, he mea nui ianei ki te kotia e mātou ā koutou mea o te kiko­kiko?
9.12: Kua uru nei ētahi atu ki tēnei tikanga a koutou, ko mātou anō ētahi kia hira ake? Otirā, kīhai mātou i mea ki tēnei tikanga, engari, e whaka­manawa­nui ana ki ngā mea katoa, kei ai tā mātou hei ārai mō te rongo­pai o te Karaiti.
9.13: Kāhore oti koutou i mātau, ko te hunga e mahi ana i ngā mea tapu, e kai ana i ngā mea o te teme­para? Ā, ko ngā kai­tiaki o te āta, mā rātou anō tētahi wāhi o tō te āta?
9.14: Pērā tonu anō tā te Ariki i whaka­takoto ai mō ngā kai­kauwhau o te rongo­pai, hei runga i te rongo­pai he oranga mō rātou.
9.15: Otiia, kīhai ahau i mea ki tētahi o ēnei mea; kāhore hoki ahau i tuhi­tuhi i ēnei mea kia pēnā­tia mai ai ahau. Ki ahau hoki he pai kē te mate, i te riro mā te tangata tāku whaka­mana­mana e whaka­kāhore.
9.16: Nō te mea ki te kauwhau ahau i te rongo­pai, kāhore māku whaka­mana­mana; kua takoto hoki tēnei hei mahi māku; he auē ia māku ki te kore ahau e kauwhau i te rongo­pai.
9.17: Ki te mea hoki nōku te ngākau ki tēnei mahi, he utu tōku. Ki te kore ia he ngākau, he mahi tuari tēnei kua tukua ki ahau.
9.18: Nā, he aha koia te utu mōku? Arā, ki te kauwhau ahau i te rongo­pai, ka meinga e ahau kia kore e utua te rongo­pai. Kia kore ai ahau e mea i te wāhi e tika ana māku i roto i te rongo­pai.
9.19: Ahakoa hoki ehara ahau i te pono­nga nā te tangata, heoi, kua waiho ahau e ahau anō hei pono­nga mā te katoa, kia toko­maha atu ai e riro mai i ahau.
9.20: Nā, ki ngā Hūrai whaka­hūrai ana ahau, kia riro ai i ahau ngā Hūrai; ki te hunga i raro i te ture me te mea i raro ahau i te ture, ahakoa rā kāhore ahau i raro i te ture, kia riro ai i ahau te hunga i raro i te ture;
9.21: ki te hunga ture­kore me he tangata ture­kore ahau, ehara i te mea he ture­kore ki te Atua, engari, i raro i te ture ki a te Karaiti, kia riro ai i ahau te hunga ture­kore.
9.22: Ki te hunga ngoi­kore me he ngoi­kore ahau, kia riro ai i ahau te i hunga ngoi­kore; waiho ana ahau hei mea katoa ki te katoa, kia taea ai e i ahau ngā mea katoa hei whaka­ora i ētahi.
9.23: I meinga ai tēnei e ahau he whaka­aro ki te rongo­pai, kia whi­whi tahi ai ahau ki tōna pai.
9.24: Kāhore oti koutou i mātau ki te hunga e oma whaka­tae­tae ana, e oma katoa ana, kotahi anō ia mōna te utu whaka­hōnore? Kia pēnā tā koutou oma, kia whi­whi ai koutou.
9.25: Nā, ko ngā tāngata katoa e whaka­tae­tae ana i ngā tākaro e whaka­koro­maki ana i ngā hia­hia katoa. Nā, e pērā ana rātou kia whi­whi ai ki te karauna pirau; ko tātou ia ki te mea e kore e pirau.
9.26: Ko ahau nei hoki, kāhore i ngaro tāku oma; e kuru ana ahau, kāhore ia e rite ki te kai­patu o te hau.
9.27: Engari, e pēhia ana e ahau tōku tinana, meinga ana hoki hei pono­nga māku; kei kauwhau pea ahau ki ētahi atu, ko ahau ia ka ākiri­tia atu.

10.1: E kore ahau e pai, e ōku tēina, kia kūware koutou, i raro katoa ō mātou mātua i te kapua, i haere katoa anō hoki rā roto i te moana;
10.2: i iri­iria anō rātou katoa ki a Mohi i roto i te kapua, i roto hoki i te moana;
10.3: ā, i kai rātou i te kai kotahi, he mea wairua;
10.4: i inu hoki rātou katoa i te wai kotahi, he mea wairua. Nō te mea i inu rātou i tā te mea wairua, arā i tā te toka i whai nei i a rātou; ā, ko taua toka rā ko te Karaiti.
10.5: Otiia, kīhai te Atua i āhua­reka ki te nuinga o rātou; i tura­kina iho hoki rātou i te koraha.
10.6: Nā, hei tohu ēnei mea ki a tātou, kia kaua tātou e hia­hia, ki ngā mea kino, kei pērā me rātou i hia­hia rā.
10.7: Kaua anō koutou e kara­kia ki ngā whaka­pakoko, kei pērā me ētahi o rātou; kua oti rā hoki te tuhi­tuhi, “I noho te iwi ki te kai, ki te inu, ā, whaka­tika ana ki te tākaro.”
10.8: Kaua hoki tātou e moe­puku, kei pērā me ētahi o rātou i moe­puku, ā, hinga ana e rua tekau mā toru ngā mano i te rā kotahi.
10.9: Kaua hoki tātou e whaka­mā­tau­tau a te Karaiti, kei pērā me ētahi o rātou i whaka­mā­tau­tau rā, ā, ngaro ana te nākahi.
10.10: Kaua hoki koutou e amu­amu, kei pērā me ētahi o rātou i amu­amu, ā, ngaro ana rātou i te kai­whaka­ngaro.
10.11: Nā, i pā ēnei mea ki a rātou hei tohu; kua tuhi­tuhia nei hoki hei whaka­tūpato i a tātou, i te hunga ka tae nei ki ngā whaka­mutu­nga o te ao.
10.12: Nā reira, ko te tangata e mea ana e tū ana ia, kia tūpato ia kei hinga.
10.13: Kāhore anō kia pono ki a koutou tētahi whaka­mā­tau­tau e rere kē ana i tō te tangata. He pono hoki te Atua, e kore nei e tuku kia nui ake i tō koutou kaha te whaka­mā­tau­tau mō koutou; engari, tahi me te whaka­mā­tau­tau ka meatia e ia he pu­tanga, kia ū ake ai koutou.
10.14: Nā reira, e ōku hoa aroha, rere atu i te kara­kia whaka­pakoko.
10.15: Ko tāku kōrero nei he mea ki te hunga mahara; whaka­aroa tāku e mea nei.
10.16: Ko te kapu whaka­pai­nga e whaka­pai nei tātou, ehara koia i te inu tahi i ngā toto o te Karaiti? Ko te taro e whati­whatia nei e tātou, ehara ianei i te kai tahi i te tinana o te Karaiti?
10.17: Inā hoki ko tātou toko­maha nei, kotahi anō taro, kotahi anō tinana; kotahi tonu nei hoki taua taro e kainga nei e tātou katoa.
10.18: Whaka­aroa a Īharaira o te kiko­kiko; he teka ianei ko te hunga e kai ana i ngā patu­nga tapu, e uru tahi ana ki tō te āta?
10.19: Nā, he pēhea rā tāku kōrero? He tikanga mea rānei te mea e patua ana mā te whaka­pakoko? He tikanga mea rānei te whaka­pakoko?
10.20: Otirā, e kī ana ahau, ko ngā mea e i patua ana e ngā tauiwi, e patua ana mā ngā rēwera, he teka mā te Atua. E kore hoki ahau e pai kia uru tahi koutou ko ngā rēwera.
10.21: E kore koutou e āhei te inu i te kapu a te Ariki, i te kapu anō a ngā rēwera. E kore koutou e āhei te kai i te tēpu a te Ariki, i te tēpu hoki a ngā rēwera.
10.22: E mea ana rānei tātou kia hae mai te Ariki? He kaha koia tātou i a ia?
10.23: “He tika ngā mea katoa,” otirā, e kore e pai katoa. “He tika ngā mea katoa,” otirā, e kore e oti te wai­hanga e ngā mea katoa.
10.24: Kaua tētahi e rapu ki tāna ake, engari, me rapu katoa i te pai mō tērā, mō tērā.
10.25: Ko ngā mea katoa e hokona ana i te mākete, kainga, kaua e uiui, kei hē te hine­ngaro.
10.26: “Nō te Ariki hoki te whenua me ōna tini mea.”
10.27: Ki te karanga­tia koutou e tētahi o te hunga whaka­pono kore, ā, ka pai koutou kia haere; ko ngā mea katoa e whaka­takoto­ria mai ki tō koutou aro­aro, kainga, kaua e uiui, kei hē te hine­ngaro.
10.28: Ki te mea ia tētahi ki a koutou, “I patua tēnei mā te whaka­pakoko,” kaua e kai, me whaka­aro ki te kai­whaka­atu, ki te hine­ngaro hoki.
10.29: Ko te hine­ngaro, e kī ana ahau, ehara i tōu, engari, ko tō tētahi; he aha tōku here­kore­tanga kia whaka­korea e tērā atu hine­ngaro?
10.30: Ki te mea hoki nā te aroha noa ahau i kai ai, he aha ahau i kōrero­tia kino­tia ai mō te mea i whaka­whetai ai ahau?
10.31: Nā reira, ahakoa kai, ahakoa inu, aha rānei, meinga katoa­tia hei whaka­korōria mō te Atua.
10.32: Kei waiho koutou hei tūtuki­tanga wae­wae ki ngā Hūrai, ki ngā Kariki rānei, ki te hāhi rānei a te Atua;
10.33: kia pēnei me ahau e whaka­mānawa­reka nei i te katoa i ngā mea katoa, i ahau kāhore nei e rapu i te pai mōku ake, engari i tō te toko­maha, kia ora ai rātou.

11.1: Kia rite tā koutou ki tāku, me tāku ka rite nei ki tā te Karaiti. Hīpokina te Ūpoko i te Koropikotanga
11.2: Nā, e whaka­moe­miti ana ahau ki a koutou, mō koutou ka mahara ki ahau i ngā mea katoa, ka pupuri hoki i ngā whaka­rere­nga iho, i āku i tuku atu nā ki a koutou.
11.3: Nā, e mea ana ahau kia mātau koutou, ko te Karaiti te ūpoko o ngā tāne katoa; ko te tāne te ūpoko o te wahine; ko te Atua anō te ūpoko o te Karaiti.
11.4: Ko te tangata e īnoi ana, e poro­piti ana, me te hīpoki anō te ūpoko, e whaka­iti ana ia i tōna ūpoko.
11.5: Ko te wahine ia e īnoi ana e poro­piti ana rānei, kāhore nei he hīpoki o te ūpoko, e whaka­iti ana ia i tōna ūpoko. E rite tonu ana tēnā ānō kua oti tōna ūpoko te heu.
11.6: Ki te kāhore hoki te wahine e hīpoki­na, kia waru­hia hoki ia. Ki te mea he mea whaka­mā ki te wahine kia waru­hia, kia heua rānei, me hīpoki ia.
11.7: E kore hoki e tika mō te tāne kia hīpoki­na tōna ūpoko, ko te āhua hoki ia, ko te korōria o te Atua. Ko te wahine ia te korōria o te tāne.
11.8: Ehara hoki i te mea nō te wahine te tāne, engari, nō te tāne te wahine.
11.9: Kīhai anō te tāne i hangā mā te wahine, engari, ko te wahine mā te tāne.
11.10: Koia i tika ai hei runga i te ūpoko o te wahine te tohu o te mana, he mea mō ngā ana­hera.
11.11: Ahakoa rā, e kore te tāne e motu­hia kētia i te wahine, e kore anō te wahine e motu­hia kētia i te tāne, i roto i te Ariki.
11.12: Nō roto hoki i te tāne te wahine, wai­hoki, i nā te wahine mai te tāne; nā te Atua anō ia ngā mea katoa.
11.13: Mā koutou tonu e whaka­aro: he mea pai rānei kia īnoi hīpoki­kore te wahine ki te Atua?
11.14: E kore rānei te whaka­aro māori nei anō e ako i a koutou, ki te mea he makawe roroa o te tāne, he mea whaka­tūtūa tērā mōna?
11.15: Tēnā, ki te mea he makawe roroa o te wahine, he mea whaka­korōria tērā mōna. Kua hoatu hoki ōna makawe ki a ia hei hīpoki.
11.16: Otirā, ki te mea he āhua totohe tētahi, kāhore ō mātou rite­nga pērā, kāhore hoki o ngā hāhi a te Atua. Te Hapa a te Ariki (Matiu 26.26-29; Māka 14.22-25; Ruka 22.14-20)
11.17: I ahau ia e kōrero nei i tēnei ki a koutou, kāhore āku whaka­moe­miti ki a koutou, kāhore hoki koutou e whaka­mine mō te pai, engari mō te kino.
11.18: Nā, ko te tua­tahi, i a koutou ka whaka­mine ki roto ki te hāhi, ka rongo ahau he wehe­wehe­nga kei roto i a koutou; ā, e whaka­pono ana ahau ki tētahi wāhi.
11.19: Kua takoto hoki kia whai tītore­hanga koutou, kia kitea ai te hunga e pai­ngia ana i roto i a koutou.
11.20: Nā, ka hui­hui koutou ki te wāhi kotahi, e kore e taea kia kai i te hapa a te Ariki.
11.21: I te mea hoki e kai ana koutou, ka kai tēnā, tēnā, i tāna hapa i mua atu i tētahi; ā, ka hia­kai tētahi, ka hau­rangi tētahi.
11.22: He aha? Kāhore koia ō koutou whare e kai ai, e inu ai koutou? E whaka­hāwea ana rānei koutou ki te hāhi a te Atua, e mea ana hoki kia whaka­mā te hunga kāhore nei ā rātou mea? Kia pēhea atu tāku kupu ki a koutou? Kia whaka­moe­miti oti ahau ki a koutou mō tēnei mea? E kore rā ahau e whaka­moe­miti.
11.23: Kua riro mai hoki i ahau i te Ariki tāku i tuku atu rā ki a koutou, arā, i taua pō i tukua ai ia, i tango­hia e te Ariki, e Īhu, te taro,
11.24: ā, ka mutu te whaka­whetai, ka whatia e ia, nā ka mea ia, “Tango­hia, kainga; ko tōku tinana tēnei ka whati­whatia nei mō koutou. Meinga tēnei hei whaka­mahara ki ahau.”
11.25: Me te kapu anō i te mutu­nga o te hapa, me tāna mea anō, “Ko te kawe­nata hou tēnei kapu i runga i ōku toto. Meinga tēnei i ngā inu­manga katoa hei whaka­mahara ki ahau.”
11.26: I ngā wā katoa hoki e kai ai koutou i tēnei taro, e inu ai i tēnei kapu, e whaka­kitea ana e koutou te mate­nga o te Ariki, kia tae mai rā anō ia.
11.27: Mō reira ki te kai hē tētahi, ki te inu hē i te kapu a te Ariki, ka whai hara ia i te tinana, i ngā toto, o te Ariki.
11.28: Engari, kia uiui te tangata ki a ia anō, ka kai ai i taua taro, ka inu ai i taua kapu.
11.29: Nō te mea ki te kai hē, ki te inu hē tētahi, e kai ana, e inu ana i te whaka­wā mōna, tē whaka­aro ko te tinana o te Ariki.
11.30: Nō konei hoki he toko­maha i roto i a koutou e ngoi­kore ana, e mate ana, he toko­maha, anō kua moe.
11.31: Me i whaka­wā hoki tātou i a tātou anō, kīhai i whaka­taua te hē ki a tātou.
11.32: Ki te whaka­wā­kia ia tātou, he mea whaka­ako tātou nā te Ariki, kei tukua ngā­tahi­tia tātou me te ao ki te hē.
11.33: Heoi, e ōku tēina, ka hui­hui koutou ki te kai, me tatari tētahi ki tētahi.
11.34: Ki te hia­kai tētahi, hei roto i tōna whare kai ai; kei ai tō koutou hui­hui­nga hei take whaka­wā. Ko ērā atu mea hoki, māku e whaka­tika ina tae atu ahau.

12.1: Nā, mō ngā mea wairua, e ōku tēina, kāhore ahau e pai kia kūware koutou.
12.2: E mātau ana koutou, i a koutou e tauiwi ana, he mea kāhaki koutou ki ngā whaka­pakoko reo­kore, me koutou i kā­hakina rā.
12.3: Koia ahau ka whaka­kite nei ki a koutou, e kore tētahi tangata, nā te Wairua nei o te Atua āna kōrero, e kī, “He mea kanga a Īhu!” E kore anō e taea e tētahi te mea, “Ko Īhu te Ariki” ki te kāhore te Wairua Tapu.
12.4: Nā, he maha ngā wehe­wehe­nga o ngā mea e hōmai ana, kotahi anō ia Wairua,
12.5: ā, he maha ngā wehe­wehe­nga o ngā minita­tanga, kotahi anō ia Ariki.
12.6: He maha anō hoki ngā tū āhua o ngā mahi; kotahi anō ia Atua hei mahi i ngā mea katoa i roto i te katoa.
12.7: Otirā, e hōmai ana ki tēnā, ki tēnā, te whaka­kite­nga a te Wairua hei pai.
12.8: E hōmai ana hoki ki tētahi e te Wairua te kupu whaka­aro; ki tētahi atu ko te kupu mātau, he mea nā taua Wairua anō;
12.9: ki tētahi atu ko te whaka­pono, nā taua Wairua rā anō; ki tētahi atu ko ngā mana whaka­ora, nā taua Wairua anō;
12.10: ki tētahi atu ko ngā mahi mere­kara; ki tētahi atu ko te mahi poro­piti; ki tētahi atu ko te mātau­ranga ki ngā wairua; ki tētahi atu ko ngā reo huhua; ki tētahi atu ko te whaka­māori­tanga i ngā reo.
12.11: Nā, ko ēnei mea katoa, he mea mahi nā taua Wairua kotahi rā anō, ko ia hei tuwha i tāna e pai ai ki tētahi, ki tētahi. Kotahi te Tinana, he Tini ōna Wāhi
12.12: Pērā hoki i te tinana e kotahi ana, he tini anō ōna wāhi, ā, ko ngā wāhi katoa o taua tinana kotahi, ahakoa tini, kotahi anō tinana; he pērā hoki a te Karaiti.
12.13: Kotahi nei hoki te Wairua i iri­iria ai tātou katoa ki roto ki te tinana kotahi, ahakoa ngā Hūrai, ahakoa ngā Kariki, ahakoa here­here, ahakoa ranga­tira; kotahi tonu te Wairua i whaka­inu­mia mai ai tātou katoa.
12.14: Ehara hoki te tinana i te wāhi kotahi, engari he tini.
12.15: Ki te mea te wae­wae, “He teka nō te tinana ahau, ehara hoki ahau i te ringa,” ehara mā tēnā e kāhore ai ia hei wāhi mō te tinana?
12.16: Ki te mea te tari­nga, “He teka nō te tinana ahau, ehara hoki ahau i te kanohi,” ehara mā tēnā e kāhore ai ia hei wāhi mō te tinana?
12.17: Me­he­mea hoki he kanohi te tinana katoa, kei hea te wāhi hei whaka­rongo? Me­he­mea he whaka­rongo tā te katoa, kei hea te wāhi hei hongi?
12.18: Ko tēnei, kua oti i te Atua te whaka­noho tēnei wāhi, tēnei wāhi, ki roto ki te tinana, āna hoki i pai ai.
12.19: Me­he­mea hoki kotahi anō wāhi rātou katoa, kei hea te tinana?
12.20: Ko tēnei, he tini ngā wāhi, kotahi anō te tinana.
12.21: E kore hoki te kanohi e āhei te mea ki te ringa, “Kāhore āku mahi māu”; te māhu­nga rānei ki ngā wae­wae, “Kāhore āku mahi mā kōrua.”
12.22: Engari, ko ngā wāhi o te tinana e kīa ana he ngoi­kore, nui rawa te mahi, mā ērā;
12.23: ko ngā wāhi hoki o te tinana e kīa ana e tātou he iti te hōnore, nui atu te hōnore e whaka­taua iho ana e tātou ki ērā; nui atu hoki te āta­ahua ki ō tātou wāhi maru­tuna;
12.24: ko ō tātou wāhi āta­ahua ia kāhore he aha e meatia ai; heoi he mea hui­hui mārire nā te Atua ngā wāhi o te tinana, he mea whaka­rite mārie, nui atu hoki te hōnore i hoatu e ia ki te wāhi i hapa;
12.25: kia kore ai he wehe­wehe­nga o te tinana; engari kia kotahi tonu te whaka­aro o ngā wāhi mō tētahi, mō tētahi.
12.26: Ā, ki te mamae tētahi wāhi, mamae tahi ana ngā wāhi katoa; ki te whaka­hōnore­tia tētahi wāhi, hari tahi ana ngā wāhi katoa.
12.27: Nā, ko koutou te tinana o te Karaiti, he wāhi anō nōna tēnei, tēnei.
12.28: Ā, kua whaka­noho­ia e te Atua ētahi i roto i te hāhi, ko ngā āpō­toro ki mua, tuarua ko ngā poro­piti, tua­toru ko ngā kai­whaka­ako, muri iho ko ngā mere­kara, me i reira ko ngā mana whaka­ora, ko ngā hoa mahi, ko ngā kai­whaka­haere tikanga, ko ngā reo huhua.
12.29: He āpō­toro oti katoa? He poro­piti oti katoa? He kai­whaka­ako katoa? He kai­mahi katoa i te mere­kara?
12.30: Kei te katoa oti ngā mana whaka­ora? E kōrero katoa ana oti i ngā reo? He kai­whaka­māori anake rānei?
12.31: Nā, whāia ngā mea hōmai papai rawa. Tēnei ia te ara tino pai rawa, māku e whaka­atu ki a koutou.

13.1: Ahakoa kōrero noa ahau i ngā reo o ngā tāngata, o ngā ana­hera, ki te kāhore ōku aroha, ka rite ahau ki te parāhi tangi, ki te himi­pora ta­tangi.
13.2: Ahakoa kei ahau te mahi poro­piti, ā, kitea ana e ahau ngā mea ngaro katoa, me te mātau­ranga katoa; ahakoa kei ahau katoa te whaka­pono, e taea ai te whaka­neke i ngā maunga, ki te kāhore ōku aroha, ehara rawa ahau.
13.3: Ahakoa ka hoatu e ahau āku taonga katoa hei whāngai i te hunga rawa­kore, ahakoa ka tukua e ahau tōku tinana kia tahuna, ki te kāhore ōku aroha, kāhore rawa he pai ki ahau.
13.4: He manawa­nui te aroha, ā, he ata­whai; e kore te aroha e hae; e kore te aroha e whakaī, e kore e whaka­peha­peha,
13.5: kāhore ōna tikanga whanokē, e kore e whai ki āna ake, e kore e riri wawe, e kore e whaka­iri kino;
13.6: e kore e hari ki te hē, engari ka hari tahi me te pono;
13.7: e whaka­manawa­nui ana ki ngā mea katoa, e whaka­pono ana ki ngā mea katoa, e tū­mana­ko ana ki ngā mea katoa, e whaka­ririka kau ana ki ngā mea katoa.
13.8: E kore rawa te aroha e taka. Nā, ahakoa mahi poro­piti, e memeha; ahakoa reo kē, e mutu; ahakoa mātau­ranga, e memeha.
13.9: E mātau ana hoki tātou ko tētahi wāhi anake, e poro­piti ana tātou ko tētahi wāhi anake.
13.10: Otirā, ka tae mai te tino mea, ko reira memeha ai taua wāhi.
13.11: I tōku tama­riki­tanga i rite āku kōrero ki ā te tama­riki, i rite tōku ngākau ki tō te tama­riki, i rite ōku whaka­aro ki ō te tama­riki; nō tōku kaumātua­tanga nei, whaka­rērea ake e ahau ngā mea tama­riki.
13.12: Ināia­nei hoki he ti­tiro pōuri­uri tā tātou i roto i te whaka­ata, ko reira ia he kanohi, he kanohi. Ināia­nei e mātau ana ahau ko tētahi wāhi anake; ko reira ia ahau e mōhio ai me ahau i mōhio­tia rā.
13.13: Nā tēnei te mau nei te whaka­pono, te tū­mana­ko, te aroha, ēnei e toru; ko te mea nui rawa ia o ēnei ko te aroha.

14.1: Whāia te aroha; kia mate­nui ki ngā mea wairua, ko te mea nui rawa ia kia poro­piti koutou.
14.2: Ki te mea he reo kē te kōrero a tētahi, ehara tāna i te kōrero ki ngā tāngata, engari ki te Atua. E kore hoki te tangata e mātau; heoi e kōrero ana ia, arā te wairua, i ngā mea ngaro.
14.3: Ko te tangata ia e poro­piti ana, e kōrero ana ia ki ngā tāngata hei hanga i te pai, hei whaka­hiri­hiri, hei whaka­mārie.
14.4: Ko te tangata e kōrero ana he reo kē, e hanga ana i te pai mōna ake; ko te tangata ia e poro­piti ana e hanga ana i te hāhi.
14.5: He pai tonu ki ahau me i kōrero koutou i ngā reo kē, erangi ia kia poro­piti koutou. Nui atu hoki te poro­piti i te tangata kōrero i ngā reo, ki te kore ia e whaka­māori, hei hanga mō te whare, arā mō te hāhi.
14.6: Nā, e ōku tēina, ki te haere atu ahau ki a koutou me te kōrero i ngā reo kē, mā te aha ka whi­whi ai koutou i te pai i ahau, ki te mea ehara tāku kōrero ki a koutou i te whaka­kite, i te mātau­ranga, i te mahi poro­piti, i te whaka­ako rānei?
14.7: Nā, ahakoa ngā mea kāhore he ora, he reo tōna, he pūtō­rino rānei, he hāpa rānei, ki te kore e puta kē te tangi, me pēhea e mōhio­tia ai te rangi o te pūtō­rino, o te hāpa rānei?
14.8: Ki te kāhore hoki e mārama te tangi o te tētere, ko wai e takatū ki te whawhai?
14.9: Wai­hoki ko koutou, ki te kāhore ō koutou arero e kōrero i te kupu mārama, me pēhea ka mōhio­tia ai te mea i kōrero­tia? E kōrero hoki koutou ki te hau.
14.10: Tēnā pea kei te ao aua reo maha, heoi kāhore he reo tikanga­kore.
14.11: Nā, ki te kore e kitea e ahau te tikanga o te reo, ka meinga ahau e te tangata e kōrero ana he tau­tangata; hei tau­tangata anō ki ahau taua tangata e kōrero ana.
14.12: Me koutou anō, ka mate­nui nā koutou ki ngā mea wairua, me whai kia hira tō koutou pai hei hanga i te whare, arā i te hāhi.
14.13: Nā, ko te tangata e kōrero ana i te reo kē, me īnoi kia taea e ia te whaka­māori.
14.14: Ki te mea hoki he reo kē tōku ina īnoi, ko tōku wairua te īnoi ana; ko tōku mahara ia kāhore he hua.
14.15: Me pēhea rā? Ka īnoi ahau i runga i te wairua, ā, ka īnoi anō i runga i te mahara; ka waiata ahau i runga i te wairua, ka waiata anō i runga i te mahara.
14.16: Pēnei, me­he­mea ki te whaka­pai koe i runga i te wairua, me pēhea te tangata e noho ana i te wāhi o te kūware ka mea ai, “Āmine” ki tāu whaka­whetai? E kore hoki ia e mōhio ki tāu e kōrero ai.
14.17: He pono ka pai tāu whaka­whetai, otiia e kore e hangā te pai o tērā.
14.18: E whaka­whetai ana ahau ki te Atua, mōku i kōrero i ngā reo maha atu i o koutou katoa;
14.19: otiia, i roto i te hāhi, pai kē atu ki ahau te kōrero i ngā kupu e rima i runga i te mahara, hei ako mō ērā atu, i te kōrero i ngā kupu tekau mano i te reo kē.
14.20: E ōku tēina, aua ō koutou mahara e whaka­tupu tama­riki; ko te mauā­hara ia, tēnā hei kō­hunga­hunga koutou, engari ko ngā mahara kia kaumātua.
14.21: Ka oti te tuhi­tuhi i roto i te ture: “He tangata reo kē, he ngutu kē hei kai­kōrero māku ki tēnei iwi; heoi e kore tonu rātou e rongo ki ahau.” e ai tā te Ariki.
14.22: Nō reira, hei tohu ngā reo kē, ehara ki te hunga whaka­pono, engari ki te hunga kāhore e whaka­pono. Ko te mahi poro­piti ia he tohu, ehara ki te hunga kāhore e whaka­pono, engari ki te hunga e whaka­pono ana.
14.23: Nā, ki te hui­hui te hāhi katoa ki te wāhi kotahi, ā, ka kōrero te katoa i ngā reo, ā, ka tomo mai te hunga kūware, te hunga whaka­pono kore, e kore rānei rātou e mea he pōrangi koutou?
14.24: Tēnā, ka poro­piti katoa, ā, ka tapoko mai tētahi tangata whaka­pono kore, kūware rānei, ka mau tōna hē i te katoa, ka whaka­wā­kia e te katoa.
14.25: Ka whaka­kitea ngā mea ngaro o tōna ngākau; nā, ka takoto tāpapa ia, ka koro­piko ki te Atua, me tāna kī ake anō, “He pono kei roto i a koutou te Atua!” Te Āhua Pai i roto i te Hāhi
14.26: Nā, e pēhea ana tēnā, e ōku tēina? Ka hui­hui koutou, he waiata tā tētahi o koutou, he whaka­ako tā tētahi, he reo tā tētahi, he whaka­kite­nga tā tētahi, he whaka­māori­tanga tā tētahi. Meinga ngā mea katoa hei hanga mō te whare.
14.27: Ki te kōrero tētahi i te reo kē, kia toko­rua, kei neke ake i te toko­toru ki te kōrero, me taki­kotahi; kia kotahi hoki hei whaka­māori.
14.28: Ki te kāhore ia he kai­whaka­māori, kaua ia e kōrero i roto i te hāhi; engari me kōrero ki a ia anō, ki te Atua hoki.
14.29: Kia toko­rua, kia toko­toru ngā poro­piti hei kōrero, mā ētahi e huri­huri atu.
14.30: Ki te whaka­kitea mai ia he mea ki tētahi e noho noa ana, me noho puku tō mua.
14.31: E āhei hoki koutou katoa te poro­piti taki­tahi, kia ako ai te katoa, kia whaka­mārie­tia ai te katoa.
14.32: E ngohe­ngohe ana hoki ki ngā poro­piti ngā wairua o ngā poro­piti.
14.33: Ehara hoki te Atua i te Atua o te whaka­raru­raru, engari nō te rangi­mārie. E pērā ana hoki i roto i ngā hāhi katoa o te hunga tapu.
14.34: Kaua ngā wāhine e kōrero i roto i ngā hāhi. E kore hoki rātou e tukua kia kōrero; engari me whaka­rongo mārie, ko tā te ture hoki tēnā e mea nei.
14.35: Ki te hia­hia hoki rātou ki te ako i tētahi mea, me ui ki ā rātou tahu i roto i te whare. He mea whaka­mā hoki kia kōrero te wāhine i roto i te hāhi.
14.36: He aha? I puta mai koia te kupu a te Atua i a koutou? I tae atu rānei ki a koutou anake?
14.37: Ki te mea tētahi he poro­piti ia, he tangata rānei i te Wairua, māna e whaka­ae ki āku e tuhi­tuhi atu nei ki a koutou, he ture ēnā nā te Ariki.
14.38: Otirā, ki te kūware tētahi, waiho atu kia kūware ana.
14.39: Nā, e ōku tēina, mate­nui­tia te mahi poro­piti, kaua hoki e rīria te kōrero i ngā reo kē.
14.40: Otirā, kia ātanga te mahi i ngā mea katoa, kia tōtika.

15.1: Nā, me whaka­atu e ahau ki a koutou, e ōku tēina, te rongo­pai i kauwhau­tia e ahau ki a koutou, tā koutou hoki i whaka­ae nā, tā koutou hoki e tū nā,
15.2: te mea hoki e ora nā koutou; ka whaka­atu ahau ki a koutou i ngā kupu i kauwhau ai ahau ki a koutou, ki te mau tērā i a koutou, ki te mea ehara tō koutou i te whaka­pono noa.
15.3: I hoatu nā hoki e ahau ki a koutou i te tua­tahi te mea i riro mai i ahau, arā: I mate a te Karaiti mō ō tātou hara, i pērā me tā ngā karaipi­ture;
15.4: ā, i tanu­mia; ā, i ara ake anō i te toru o ngā rā, i pērā me tā ngā karaipi­ture;
15.5: ā, ka whaka­kite ki a Kipa; muri iho ki te tekau mā rua.
15.6: Muri iho ka whaka­kite ki ngā hoa toko­maha ake i te rima rau i te kite­nga kotahi, e ora nei anō te nuinga o rātou, ko ētahi ia kua moe;
15.7: muri iho ka whaka­kite ki a Hēmi; muri iho ki ngā āpō­toro katoa.
15.8: Ā, muri rawa iho ka whaka­kite hoki ia ki ahau, me te mea i whānau tōmuri nei ahau.
15.9: Ko te iti rawa hoki ahau o ngā āpō­toro, kāhore e tau kia kīa he āpō­toro, mōku i whaka­toi i te hāhi a te Atua.
15.10: Heoi, nā te aroha noa o te Atua tēnei āhua ōku. Kīhai anō tōna aroha noa ki ahau i mau­mau­ria; heoi, nui atu tāku mahi i tā rātou katoa. Ehara ia i te mea nāku, engari, nā te aroha noa o te Atua i mahi tahi me ahau.
15.11: Nā, ahakoa nāku, ahakoa nā rātou, ko tā mātou kauwhau tēnei, ko tā koutou anō tēnei i whaka­pono ai. Tō Mātou Whakaaranga
15.12: Nā, e kauwhau­tia nei a te Karaiti, tōna aranga ake i te hunga mate, he pēhea te kupu a ētahi o koutou, kāhore he aranga ake o te hunga mate?
15.13: Me­he­mea hoki kāhore he aranga o te hunga mate, kīhai anō a te Karaiti i ara.
15.14: Me­he­mea hoki kāhore a te Karaiti i ara, mau­mau noa tā mātou kauwhau, mau­mau noa tō koutou whaka­pono.
15.15: Āe rā, ka kitea hoki mātou he kai­whaka­atu teka i tā te Atua; nō te mea ka whaka­atu­ria nei e mātou te Atua, nāna i whaka­ara ake a te Karaiti; kīhai nei i whaka­ara­hia e ia, ki te kāhore te hunga mate e ara.
15.16: Ki te kāhore hoki te hunga mate e whaka­ara­hia, kīhai anō a te Karaiti i whaka­ara­hia.
15.17: Ā, me­he­mea kāhore a te Karaiti i ara, he mea hanga noa tō koutou whaka­pono; kei roto tonu koutou i ō koutou hara.
15.18: Me te hunga hoki kua moe atu i roto i a te Karaiti, kua ngaro rātou.
15.19: Ki te mea hei tēnei ao anake he tū­mana­ko mā tātou ki a te Karaiti, nui atu te pōuri mō tātou i ō ngā tāngata katoa.
15.20: Ko tēnei kua ara a te Karaiti i te hunga mate, kua waiho hei mātā­mua mō te hunga kua moe.
15.21: Nā, te tangata nei hoki te mate, wai­hoki nā te tangata te aranga o te hunga mate.
15.22: I roto hoki i a Ārama ka mate katoa ngā tāngata, wai­hoki i roto i a te Karaiti ka whaka­ora­ngia katoa­tia.
15.23: Otiia ko tēnei, ko tēnei, i tōna ake tū­ranga. Ko te Karaiti te mātā­mua; muri iho ko te hunga a te Karaiti ā tōna haere­nga mai.
15.24: Ko reira te mutu­nga, ina oti te ranga­tira­tanga te hoatu e ia ki te Atua, arā ki te Matua; ina memeha i a ia ngā kāwana­tanga katoa, ngā mana katoa, me te kaha.
15.25: Kua takoto hoki te tikanga kia kīngi ia, kia meinga katoa­tia rā anō e ia ōna hoa­riri ki raro i ōna wae­wae.
15.26: Ko te hoa­riri whaka­mutu­nga e whaka­kāhore­tia ko te mate.
15.27: Nō te mea, “Ka oti ngā mea katoa te pēhi e ia ki raro i ōna wae­wae.” Otirā, i tāna kīanga, “Ka oti ngā mea katoa te pēhi ki raro i a ia”; e mārama ana kua waiho i waho te kai­pēhi o ngā mea katoa ki raro i a ia.
15.28: Ā, ka oti ngā mea katoa te pēhi e ia ki raro i a ia, ko reira hoki te Tama riro ai ki raro i te kai­pēhi o ngā mea katoa ki raro i a ia, kia katoa ai te Atua i roto i te katoa.
15.29: Pēnei, ka aha te hunga e iri­iria ana hei whaka­kapi mō te hunga mate? Ki te kāhore rawa te hunga mate e ara, he aha hoki rātou ka iri­iria ai hei whaka­kapi mō te hunga mate?
15.30: He aha anō tātou ka tū wehi ai i ngā wā katoa?
15.31: Nā, ko tāku oati, nā tōku whaka­mana­mana ki a koutou e ōku tēina, i roto i a Karaiti Īhu, inā, mō te mate ahau i ia rā, i ia rā.
15.32: Hā, me­he­mea ahau i whawhai ki te kararehe i Epeha, pērā ana me te tangata, he aha te pai ki ahau? Ki te kāhore te hunga mate e ara, “E kai tātou, e inu, ko āpōpō hoki tātou mate ai.”
15.33: Kei whaka­pōhēhē­tia koutou: “Ki te kino ngā hoa, ka heke ki te kino ngā tikanga pai.”
15.34: Oha ake ki te tika, ā, kaua e hara; kāhore hoki o ētahi mātau­ranga ki te Atua. I kōrero ai ahau kia whaka­mā ai koutou. Te Tinana i te Whakaaranga
15.35: Otirā, tērā tētahi e kī mai, “Pēhea­tia ai te whaka­ara­hanga o te hunga mate? He tinana aha hoki tō rātou ina haere mai?”
15.36: Kūware! Ko tāu e whaka­tō nā, e kore e puta ki te ora, ki te kāhore e mate.
15.37: Ā, ko tāu e whaka­tō nā, ehara i te tinana e puta ake ā mua tāu e whaka­tō nā, engari he kākano kau nō te wīti rānei, nō tētahi atu mea rānei.
15.38: E hoatu ana hoki e te Atua ki taua kākano he tinana, ko tāna i pai ai, ā, ki tēnei kākano, ki tēnei kākano, tōna ake tinana.
15.39: Ehara i te kiko­kiko kotahi ngā kiko­kiko katoa; engari, tērā anō tō te tangata kiko­kiko, ā, rerekē anō tō te kararehe kiko­kiko, rerekē tō te manu, rerekē tō te ika.
15.40: Ko ētahi tinana nō te rangi, ko ētahi tinana nō te whenua. Otiia, rerekē te korōria o ngā mea o te rangi, rerekē tō ngā mea o te whenua.
15.41: He korōria kē tō te rā, he korōria kē tō te marama, he korōria kē hoki tō ngā whetū; nā, poka kē te korōria o tētahi whetū i tō tētahi whetū.
15.42: He pērā anō te aranga o te hunga mate. E whaka­tō­kia pirau­tia ana; e whaka­ara­hia pirau­kore­tia ana.
15.43: E whaka­tō­kia hōnore­kore­tia ana; e whaka­ara­hia korōria­tia ana. E whaka­tō­kia ngoi­kore­tia ana; e whaka­ara­hia kaha­tia ana.
15.44: E whaka­tō­kia ana he tinana māori; e whaka­ara­hia ana he tinana wairua. Me­he­mea tērā he tinana māori, tērā anō hoki he tinana wairua.
15.45: He pēnei hoki te mea i tuhi­tuhia, “Ko te tangata tua­tahi, ko Ārama, i meinga hei tangata ora”; ko te Ārama whaka­mutu­nga ka waiho hei wairua whaka­ora.
15.46: He ahakoa rā ehara te mea wairua i te tua­tahi, engari, te mea māori; nō muri te mea wairua.
