3.7: e ako tonu ana, heoi kāhore rawa kia tae ki te mātau­ranga o te pono.
3.8: E rite ana ki a Hāni rāua ko Hamapiri i totohe ki a Mohi; wai­hoki ko ēnei tāngata e totohe ana ki te pono. He hunga kua kino kē te hine­ngaro, he ruke­nga atu i roto i te whaka­pono.
3.9: Heoi, e kore rātou e kake haere. Ka kitea hoki tō rātou kūware­tanga e te katoa, ka pērā hoki me tō rāua. Ngā Tohutohu Mutunga
3.10: Otirā, kua mau nā i a koe tāku whaka­ako, tāku whaka­haere, tōku whaka­aro whaka­takoto, tōku whaka­pono, tōku pūhoi ki te riri, tōku aroha, tōku manawa­nui,
3.11: ōku whaka­toi­nga, ōku mate­nga i mate ai ahau i Anatioka, i Ikoniuma, i Raihitara; ngā whaka­toi­nga i whaka­toia ai ahau. Heoi, whaka­ora­ngia ake ahau e te Ariki i roto i te katoa.
3.12: Ā, e whaka­toia anō te hunga katoa e hia­hia ana kia noho i runga i te kara­kia i roto i a Karaiti Īhu.
3.13: Ko te hunga kino ia, me te hunga māminga, ka kake haere te kino, ka tini­hanga, ā, ka tini­hanga­tia.
3.14: Tēnā, ko koe kia mau ki ngā mea i ako rā koe, i whaka­ae­tia rā e koe, e mātau nā hoki koe ki tōu kai­whaka­ako ki ēnā mea.
3.15: Ki a koe anō i mōhio o tōu tama­riki­tanga ake, ki ngā karaipi­ture tapu, ko ngā mea ērā e whai mātau­ranga ai koe, e ora ai, i runga i te whaka­pono ki a Karaiti Īhu.
3.16: Nō te hā o te Atua ngā karaipi­ture katoa, he pai hoki hei whaka­ako, hei riri i te hē, hei whaka­tika­tika, hei whaka­ako ki te tika;
3.17: kia tino rite ai te tangata a te Atua, rite rawa mō ngā mahi pai katoa.

4.1: Ko tāku kupu tēnei ki a koe i te aro­aro o te Atua, o Karaiti Īhu hoki, māna nei e whaka­wā te hunga ora me te hunga mate, i te āhua o tōna pu­tanga mai me tōna ranga­tira­tanga,
4.2: kauwhau­tia te kupu; tohea i ngā wā pai, i ngā wā kino; rīria te hē, whaka­hē­ngia iho, whaka­haua, whaka­paua te manawa­nui me te whaka­ako.
4.3: Tēnei ake hoki te wā e kore ai rātou e whaka­rongo ki te whaka­ako tika; heoi, i te mea he tari­nga mina­mina ō rātou, ka apohia e rātou he kai­whaka­ako e rite ana ki ō rātou nā hia­hia.
4.4: Ka tahuri kē ō rātou tari­nga i te pono, ka anga atu ki ngā kōrero tito noa.
4.5: Kia mau ia koe i ngā mea katoa; tukua atu ngā mamae ki a koe; mahia te mahi a te kai­kauwhau i te rongo­pai; whaka­paua tāu mahi minita.
4.6: Tēnei hoki ahau kei te ringi­hia, kua rite anō te wā hei haere­nga mōku.
4.7: Kua whawhai­tia e ahau te whawhai pai, kua omakia tōku omanga, kua rite i ahau te whaka­pono.
4.8: Kei te takoto mai mōku i ngā wā ō muri nei te karauna o te tika, e hōmai ki ahau ā taua rā e te Ariki, e te kai­whaka­wā tika. He teka ki ahau anake, engari ki te hunga katoa anō hoki kua mate­nui ki tōna pu­tanga mai. He Kupu Whaiara
4.9: Kia puta tōu uaua ki te haere wawe mai ki ahau;
4.10: kua whaka­rērea ahau e Rīmaha, he aroha nōna ki tēnei ao, ā, haere ana ia ki Teharonika; kua riro atu a Kerekena ki Karatia, a Taituha ki Raramatia.
4.11: Ko Ruka anake kei ahau. Tēnā a Māka mauria mai hei hoa mōu; he pai hoki ia mō tāku mahi minita.
4.12: Kua tonoa e ahau a Tikiku, ki Epeha.
4.13: Ka haere mai koe, mauria mai te koroka i mahue atu i ahau ki Toroa, ki a Karapu, me ngā puka­puka; tēnā rawa ia ngā kiri­hipi.
4.14: He maha ngā kino i meatia mai e Arēhanera, e te kai­mahi parāhi ki ahau. Mā te Ariki e hoatu ki a ia he utu e rite ana ki āna mahi.
4.15: Kia tūpato hoki koe ki a ia; he rahi rawa hoki tāna totohe ki ā mātou kupu.
4.16: I tāku kōrero­tanga tua­tahi, i karo ai i ahau, kāhore he tangata hei tuarā mōku, heoi, whaka­rērea ake ahau e te katoa. Kaua tēnei e whaka­iria ki a rātou.
4.17: I tū ia te Ariki ki tōku taha, nāna hoki ahau i whaka­kaha; kia whaka­paua rawa­tia ai e ahau te kauwhau, kia rongo katoa ai ngā tauiwi. Ā, tōia mai ana ahau i roto i te māngai o te raiona.
4.18: Tērā ahau e tōia mai e te Ariki i roto i ngā mahi kino katoa, e whaka­ora­ngia hoki tae noa ki tōna ranga­tira­tanga i te rangi. Waiho atu i a ia te korōria ake ake. Āmine. Poroporoaki
4.19: Oha atu ki a Pirihira rāua ko Akuira, ki te hunga anō hoki o te whare o Onehipora.
4.20: I noho atu a Eratu i Koriniti; ko Toropimu i mahue atu, i ahau ki Miretu, he mate.
4.21: Kia puta tōu uaua ki te haere mai i mua o te hōtoke. Tēnei te oha atu nei ki a koe a Ūpuru, a Purena, a Rinuha, a Karau­ria, me ngā tēina katoa.
4.22: Kia noho te Ariki ki tōu wairua. Kia tau te aroha noa ki a koutou.

1.1: Nā Paora, he pono­nga nā te Atua, he āpō­toro nā Īhu Karaiti. I runga i te whaka­pono o te hunga whiri­whiri a te Atua, i te mātau­ranga hoki ki tā te pono e rite ai te kara­kia;
1.2: i runga anō i te tū­mana­ko atu ki te ora tonu, i whaka­aria mai nei i mua atu o te ao e te Atua e kore nei e teka;
1.3: nāna nei i whaka­kite mai tāna kupu i ōna wā, rā te kupu i tukua mai ki ahau, he mea whaka­rite mai nā te Atua, nā tō tātou Kai­whaka­ora.
1.4: Ki a Taituha, ki tāku tama­iti pono i runga i tō tātou whaka­pono tahi: Kia tau te aroha noa me te rangi­mārie, he mea nā te Atua Matua, nā Karaiti Īhu, nā tō tātou Kai­whaka­ora. Te Mahi a Taituha i Kariti
1.5: Ko te mea tēnei i waiho atu ai koe e ahau ki Kariti, kia whaka­tikaia ai e koe ngā mea i mahue, kia whaka­ritea ai anō hoki he kaumātua ki ia pā, ki ia pā, kia pērā ai me tāku i whaka­takoto atu ai ki a koe.
1.6: Ki te mea he tangata kāhore e eke­ngia e te kupu, he tahu nō te wahine kotahi, he tama­riki whaka­pono ana, kāhore e kōrero­tia tō rātou tō­rere­tanga ki te kino, kāhore e tutū.
1.7: Ko te tikanga hoki mō te pīhopa, kia kaua e eke­ngia e te kupu, kia rite ki tā te Atua tuari; ehara i te mea tohe ki tāna ake, kāhore ōna ārita­rita kāhore āna kakai wāina kāhore āna papatu, kāhore e whai i te taonga hē;
1.8: engari e ata­whai ana i te manu­hiri, e aroha ana ki te pai, e whai whaka­aro ana, e tika ana, e tapu ana, e pēhi ana i ōna hia­hia.
1.9: E ū ana te pupuri i te kupu pono i whaka­akona atu nā, kia taea ai e ia, i te mea ka tika nei tāna whaka­ako, te whaka­hau­hau, te turaki anō i tā te hunga e totohe mai ana.
1.10: He toko­maha hoki te hunga tutū, kōrero teka noa, tini­hanga; nui atu ia o te hunga o te kotinga,
1.11: me kuku ō rātou waha; riro pū hoki ētahi whare te whaka­puta kē e rātou, e whaka­ako ana i ngā mea e kore e tika, he whaka­aro hoki ki te taonga hē.
1.12: I mea tētahi o rātou, he poro­piti nō rātou ake, “He teka tonu tā ngā Kariti, he kararehe kino, he puku­kai, he māngere.”
1.13: Ka pono tēnei kōrero. Nā reira, kia koi tāu kupu riri ki a rātou; kia ora ai tō rātou whaka­pono;
1.14: kei tahuri hoki rātou ki ngā kupu tito a ngā Hūrai, ki ngā ture a ngā tāngata e whaka­puta kē ana i te pono.
1.15: He mā ngā mea katoa ki te hunga mā. Tēnā, ki te hunga poke, kāhore nei ō rātou whaka­pono, kāhore he mea mā. Heoi, he mea poke ō rātou whaka­aro, ō rātou hine­ngaro.
1.16: Ki tā rātou kī, kua mātau rātou ki te Atua; heoi, ko ā rātou mahi hei whaka­kāhore ki a ia, he hunga whaka­riha­riha rātou, he hunga tutū, e kore anō e tikanga­tia mō tētahi mahi pai.

2.1: Ko koe ia, kōrero­tia ngā mea e rite ana ki tō te whaka­ako ora.
2.2: Ko ngā kaumātua kia āta whaka­haere i a rātou, kia tū kaumātua, kia whai whaka­aro, kia ora te whaka­pono, te aroha, te manawa­nui.
2.3: Me ngā wāhine tai­kaumātua hoki, kia rite ngā tikanga ki ā te hunga e whaka­aro ana ki te tapu, kia kaua e ngau­tuarā, kia kaua e riro hei pono­nga mā te wāina, kia whaka­ako i ngā mea pai;
2.4: kia meinga e rātou ngā wāhine tai­tama­riki kia whai whaka­aro, kia aroha ki ā rātou tāne, kia aroha ki ā rātou tama­riki.
2.5: Kia whai whaka­aro, kia tika, kia puku­mahi i te kāinga, kia ata­whai, kia ngohe­ngohe ki ā rātou tāne, kei kōrero­tia kino­tia te kupu a te Atua.
2.6: Me whaka­hau atu hoki ngā tai­tama­riki kia whai whaka­aro.
2.7: I ngā mea katoa kia kitea koe he tauira mō ngā mahi pai; ko tāu whaka­ako kia tapa­tahi, kia tū kaumātua,
2.8: kia ora te kupu, kei taea te whaka­hē; kia whaka­mā ai te tangata tikanga kē, tē ai he mea e kōrero­tia kino­tia ai tātou e ia.
2.9: Ko ngā pono­nga kia ngohe­ngohe ki ō rātou ranga­tira, kia whaka­mānawa­reka­tia rātou i ngā mea katoa; kaua e whaka­hoki kupu;
2.10: kaua e kaiā, engari kia kitea he pai he nui tō rātou pono; kia ai rātou i ngā mea katoa hei whaka­pai­pai i te whaka­ako a te Atua, a tō tātou Kai­whaka­ora.
2.11: Kua puta mai hoki te aroha noa o te Atua e ora ai ngā tāngata katoa,
2.12: hei whaka­ako i a tātou, kia whaka­kāhore­tia e tātou te karakia­kore me ngā hia­hia o te ao, kia noho whaka­aro tātou, i runga anō i te tika, i te kara­kia pai, i tēnei ao;
2.13: me te tatari anō ki te mea whaka­hari e tūmanako­hia atu nei, ki te pu­tanga korōria mai o tō tātou Atua nui, o tō tātou Kai­whaka­ora anō hoki, o Īhu Karaiti.
2.14: I tuku nei i a ia mō tātou, hei hoko i a tātou i roto i ngā kino katoa, hei horoi hoki i a tātou hei iwi māna ake, e ngākau nui ana ki ngā mahi pai.
2.15: Kōrero­tia ēnei mea, whaka­haua; kia nui tōu māia ki te riri i te hē. Kei whaka­hāwea tētahi ki a koe.

3.1: Whaka­mahara­tia rātou kia ngohe­ngohe ki ngā ranga­tira­tanga, ki ngā mana, kia rongo ki ngā ranga­tira, kia takatū ki ngā mahi pai katoa;
3.2: kia kaua e kōrero kino ki tētahi tangata, kia kaua e whawhai, kia ngākau ngā­wari, kia nui te māhaki o te ngākau e whaka­puta­ina ki ngā tāngata katoa.
3.3: He whaka­aro­kore hoki tātou i mua, he tutū, e tini­hanga­tia ana, he pono­nga nā ngā hia­hia, nā ngā whaka­ahua­reka maha, e noho ana i runga i te nana­kia, i te hae, he hunga whaka­riha­riha, e mauā­hara ana tētahi ki tētahi.
3.4: Otirā, i te mea ka puta mai nei te tikanga ngā­wari me te aroha o te Atua, o tō tātou Kai­whaka­ora ki ngā tāngata.
3.5: Ehara i te mea, nā ngā mahi tika i mahia e tātou, engari, nā tāna mahi tohu i whaka­ora­ngia ai tātou e ia, he mea­tanga nā te horoi­nga o te whānau­tanga hou­tanga, nā te whaka­hou­tanga a te Wairua Tapu,
3.6: i ringi­hia nuitia mai nei e ia ki runga ki a tātou, he mea nā Īhu Karaiti, nā tō tātou Kai­whaka­ora.
3.7: Kia whaka­tikaia ai tātou e tōna aroha noa, kia whi­whi ai ki te taonga, arā ki te ora tonu e tūmanako­hia atu nei.
3.8: He kōrero pono tēnei. E mea ana hoki ahau kia kaha tāu kauwhau i ēnei mea, kia mahara ai te hunga kua whaka­pono ki te Atua ki te mahi i ngā mahi pai. Ko ngā mea ēnei e āta­ahua ana, e whai pai ana mō ngā tāngata.
3.9: Ko ngā uiui­nga kūware ia, me ngā whaka­papa tūpuna, whaka­rērea atu, me ngā totohe, me ngā whawhai ki ngā mea o te ture, kāhore hoki he pai o aua mea, he mea hanga noa.
3.10: Ko te tangata whaka­pono hē, ka kotahi, ka rua ngā whaka­tūpato­tanga, whaka­rērea atu.
3.11: E mātau ana hoki koe kua whaka­putaia kētia taua tangata pērā, kei te hara anō hoki, kua mau tōna hē i a ia anō. Poroporoaki
3.12: Ka tonoa atu e ahau ki a koe a Aretema, a Tikiku rānei, kia puta tōu uaua ki te haere mai ki ahau ki Nikopori; kua takoto hoki tāku tikanga kia noho ki reira i te hōtoke.
3.13: Kia puta tōu whaka­aro kia kawea mai a Hina kaiako ture, rāua ko Aporo; kei hapa tētahi mea mō rāua.
3.14: Me ako hoki ō tātou ki te mahi i ngā mahi pai mō ngā wā o te rawa­kore kei hua­kore rātou.
3.15: Tēnei te oha atu nei ki a koe ōku hoa katoa. Oha atu ki te hunga e aroha ana ki a mātou i runga i te whaka­pono. Kia tau te aroha noa ki a koutou katoa.

1.1: Nā Paora, nā te here­here a Karaiti Īhu, nā tō tāua teina hoki, nā Tīmoti – Ki tā māua e aroha nei ki tō māua hoa mahi, ki a Pirimona,
1.2: ki a Apia hoki, ki tō māua tua­hine, ki tō māua hoa hōia, ki a Arakipu, ki te hāhi hoki i tōu whare:
1.3: Kia tau te aroha noa ki a koutou, me te rangi­mārie, he mea nā te Atua, nā tō tātou Matua, nā te Ariki hoki, nā Īhu Karaiti. Te Aroha me te Whakapono o Pirimona
1.4: Tēnei ahau te whaka­whetai atu nei ki tōku Atua, mau tonu tōku mahara ki a koe i āku karakia­tanga.
1.5: He rongo nōku ki tōu aroha, ki tōu whaka­pono ki te Ariki, ki a Īhu, ā, ki te hunga tapu katoa.
1.6: Mō te whaka­hoa­tanga mai o tōu whaka­pono kia whai mana, i runga i te mātau­ranga ki ngā pai katoa i roto i a koutou, he mea ki a Karaiti Īhu.
1.7: He nui hoki tō mātou koa, mārie ana hoki te ngākau i tōu aroha, nō te mea e ora ana ngā ngākau o te hunga tapu i a koe, e tōku teina. He Tono mō Onehimu
1.8: Heoi, ahakoa he nui tōku māia i roto i a te Karaiti ki te whaka­takoto atu i te mea tika ki a koe.
1.9: Nā te aroha kē tāku ka īnoi atu nei, arā tāku, tā te koro­heke, tā Paora, he here­here nei ināia­nei nā Īhu Karaiti.
1.10: He kupu tēnei nāku ki a koe mō tāku tama­iti, mō Onehimu, he mea whānau nāku i ahau nei i te here­here.
1.11: I mua, kāhore tētahi mea pai ana ki a koe; ināia­nei ia, kua whai pai koe i a ia, ahau anō hoki.
1.12: Kua whaka­hokia atu nei ia e ahau, tōna tinana tonu, ko tōku manawa ake ia.
1.13: I mea anō ahau kia puri­tia ia ki ahau, hei whaka­kapi mōu ki te mahi ki ahau i roto i ngā meka­meka o te rongo­pai.
1.14: Otirā, kāhore nei tāu kupu, kīhai ahau i pai kia meatia tētahi mea; kei riro whaka­uaua mai tōu pai; engari i roto anō i te ngākau.
1.15: Ko te mea anō pea tēnei i motu­hia mai ai ia i a koe mō tētahi wā, kia mau pū ai ia i a koe ake ake.
1.16: Ehara i te mea hei pono­nga ia i ēnei wā, engari tērā atu i te pono­nga, he teina i nui rawa ai tōku aroha, tērā ia e nui rawa atu tōu, i te kiko­kiko, i te Ariki anō hoki.
1.17: Nā, ki te mea kua waiho ahau hei hoa mōu, manako mai ki a ia me te mea ko ahau.
1.18: Ki te mea ia kua hē ia ki tētahi mea āu, kei a ia rānei tētahi mea āu, waiho mai māku tēnā e whaka­aro.
1.19: He tuhi­tuhi tēnei nāku, nā Paora, nā tōku ringa­ringa ake; māku e whaka­utu. Nā, kāhore āku mea­tanga atu ki a koe, tērā anō tāku taonga kei a koe, ko koe anō.
1.20: Āe rā, e tōku teina, kia whai pai ahau i a koe i roto i te Ariki; kia ora tōku ngākau i roto i te Ariki.
1.21: He ū nō tōku whaka­aro ki a koe ka ngohe­ngohe, i tuhi­tuhi atu ai ahau ki a koe, e mōhio ana hoki, tērā e nui atu tāu e mea ai i tāku e kōrero atu nei.
1.22: Tēnei anō hoki, kia rite mai i a koe tētahi whare mōku; e mea ana hoki ahau tērā e mana ā koutou īnoi, ā, ka tukua atu ahau ki a koutou. Poroporoaki
1.23: Tēnei te oha atu nei ki a koe a Epapara, tōku hoa here­here i roto i a Karaiti Īhu,
1.24: rātou tahi ko Māka, ko Aritaku, ko Rīmaha, ko Ruka, ōku hoa mahi.
1.25: Kia tau te aroha noa o tō tātou Ariki, o Īhu Karaiti ki ō koutou wairua. Āmine.

1.1: He maha ngā wāhi, he maha ngā hua­rahi i kōrero ai te Atua i mua, arā ngā poro­piti, ki ngā mātua,
1.2: i ēnei rā whaka­mutu­nga nā tāna Tama āna kōrero ki a tātou, ko tāna hoki tērā i mea ai māna ngā mea katoa, ko tāna kai­hanga hoki tērā o ngā ao.
1.3: Ko ia te kānapa­tanga o tōna korōria, te tino āhua o tōna pūmau­tanga, e whakaū nei i ngā mea katoa ki te kupu o tōna kaha, ka oti i a ia ake anō te horoi ō tātou hara, nā noho ana ia i te ringa matau o te Nui i runga rawa. Te Nui o te Tama a te Atua
1.4: Ā, meinga ana ia kia pai ake i ngā ana­hera, kia pērā me te ingoa i riro i a ia he nui atu i tō rātou.
1.5: Ki a wai hoki o ngā ana­hera tāna mea­tanga i mua: “Ko koe tāku Tama, nō nāia­nei koe i whaka­tupu­ria ai e ahau?” Me tēnei anō: “Ko ahau hei Matua ki a ia, ko ia hei Tama ki ahau?”
1.6: I tāna kawe­nga mai anō hoki i te whānau mātā­mua ki te ao, ka mea ia, “Kia koro­piko ngā ana­hera katoa a te Atua ki a ia.”
1.7: Ko tāna kupu ia mō ngā ana­hera, “Meinga ana e ia āna ana­hera hei wairua, āna kai­mahi hei mura ahi.”
1.8: Mō te Tama ia, i kī ia: “Pūmau tonu tōu torōna, e te Atua, ake, ake; ā, ko te hēpeta o te tika te hēpeta o tōu kīngi­tanga.
1.9: I aroha­ina e koe te tika, i kino­ngia e koe te hara; nō reira nui atu i tō ōu hoa te whaka­wahinga a te Atua, a tōu Atua, i a koe ki te hinu o te hari.”
1.10: Me tēnei anō: “Nāu, e te Ariki, i te tīma­tanga i whaka­takoto te whenua; he mahi anō ngā rangi nā ōu ringa.
1.11: Ko ērā e hemo atu, ko koe ia e mau tonu: ka tawhito­tia katoa­tia hoki ērā me he kākahu.
1.12: Ka pō­kai­tia e koe, ānō he koheka, ka whaka­putaia kētia. Ko koe tonu anō ia koe, kāhore hoki he mutu­nga o ōu tau.”
1.13: Ki tēhea hoki o ngā ana­hera tāna mea­tanga i mua: “Hei tōku ringa matau koe noho ai, kia meinga rā anō e ahau ōu hoa­riri hei tū­ranga wae­wae mōu”?
1.14: He teka ianei he wairua kai­mahi rātou katoa, he mea tono­tono hei minita, he whaka­aro ki te hunga mō rātou nei te ora?

2.1: Nā, ko te tikanga tēnei, kia kaha ake tō tātou whaka­aro ki ngā mea kua rangona, kei pahuhu atu i a tātou.
2.2: Me­he­mea hoki te kupu i whaka­pua­kina e ngā ana­hera he pūmau, ā, he tika tonu te utu i whaka­hokia mō ngā poka­nga kētanga katoa, mō ngā mahi tutū;
2.3: me pēhea ka mawhiti ai tātou ki te pao­pao tātou ki tēnei ora nui; i tīmata­ia nei te kōrero e te Ariki, ā, kua whaka­ū­kia mai ki a tātou e te hunga i rangona ai;
2.4: me te whaka­atu anō te Atua ki tā rātou, i runga i ngā tohu, i ngā mea whaka­mīharo, i tōna tini o ngā mere­kara, i ngā tūw­hanga mai anō hoki o te Wairua Tapu, he pērā anō me tāna i pai ai. Ko te Mea i Ārahi nei i a Mātou ki te Ora
2.5: Kāhore hoki i waiho e ia ki raro i ngā ana­hera te ao meāke nei puta, tā mātou e kōrero nei.
2.6: Heoi, i whaka­atu­ria mai e tētahi i tētahi wāhi, i mea mai: “He aha te tangata, i mahara ai koe ki a ia? Te tama rānei a te tangata, i tiro­hia ai ia e koe?
2.7: Nohi­nohi nei te whai i whaka­iti­tia iho ai ia e koe i ngā ana­hera; kua karauna­tia ia e koe ki te korōria, ki te hōnore, kua waiho anō ia e koe hei ranga­tira mō ngā mahi a ōu ringa.
2.8: Kua waiho nei e koe ngā mea katoa ki raro i ōna wae­wae.” Nā, i ngā mea katoa ka waiho nei i raro i a ia, kāhore i mahue tētahi mea kīhai nei i waiho i raro i a ia. Otirā, kāhore anō tātou kia kite noa i ngā mea katoa kua oti te waiho i raro i a ia.
2.9: Ka kite rāia tātou i a Īhu, he nohi­nohi nei te wāhi i whaka­iti­tia iho ai ia i ngā ana­hera ka oti nei te karauna ki te korōria, ki te hōnore, i muri nei i tōna ngau­nga e te mate; he mea­tanga nā tō te Atua aroha noa kia pāngia ia e te mate mō ngā tā­ngata katoa.
2.10: Ko tāna tikanga tika hoki ia, māna nei ngā mea katoa, nāna anō hoki ngā mea katoa i a ia e ārahi ana i ngā tama toko­maha ki te korōria, kia waiho ngā mamae hei mea e tino rite ai te take o tō rātou whaka­ora­nga.
2.11: Ko te kai­whaka­tapu hoki, rātou ko te hunga e whaka­tapua ana, nō te pū kotahi rātou katoa. Koia ia tē whaka­mā ai ki te hua i a rātou he tēina;
2.12: e mea nei ia: “Māku e kōrero tōu ingoa ki ōku tēina; ka hīmene atu ahau ki a koe i waenga­nui o te whaka­mine­nga.”
2.13: Me tēnei anō hoki, “Ka ū pū ahau ki a ia.” Me tēnei anō, “Nana, ahau nei me ngā tama­riki i hōmai e te Atua ki ahau.”
2.14: Nā, kei ngā tama­riki he kiko­kiko, he toto, koia hoki ia i whaka­whiw­hia ai anō hoki ki aua mea; kia ai ai tōna mate­nga hei whaka­kāhore mō te ranga­tira o te mate, arā mō te rēwera;
2.15: kia whaka­puta­ina mai ai hoki e ia ki waho te hunga i meinga e te wehi o te mate hei tau­reka­reka i ngā wā katoa i ora ai rātou.
2.16: Kīhai hoki ia i mau ki ngā ana­hera; engari i mau ia ki te uri o Āperahama.
2.17: Nā konei i tika ai kia whaka­ritea ia ki ōna tēina i ngā mea katoa, kia waiho ai ia hei tohu­nga nui e ata­whai ana, e pono ana i ngā mea­tanga ki te Atua, hei whaka­mārie mō ngā hara o te iwi.
2.18: I te mea hoki ka whaka­mā­tau­tau­ria ia, ā, mamae iho, e taea e ia te āwhina te hunga e whaka­mā­tau­tau­ria ana.

3.1: Nā, e ōku tēina tapu, e te hunga kua uru nei ki tā te rangi karanga, whaka­aroa a Īhu Karaiti, te Āpōtoro, te Tohu­nga Nui o te tikanga kua whaka­ae­tia nei e tātou;
3.2: i pono nei ki tōna kai­whaka­rite mai, i pērā anō me Mohi i tōna whare katoa.
3.3: I tika hoki kia nui ake te korōria mō tēnei tangata i tō Mohi, nō te mea nui ake i tō te whare te hōnore o te kai­hanga.
3.4: He mea hanga hoki nā tētahi ngā whare katoa; ko te Atua ia te kai­hanga o ngā mea katoa.
3.5: Ā, i pono anō a Mohi i roto i tōna whare katoa, i pērā me te pono­nga, hei whaka­atu mō ngā mea ka kōrero­tia i muri;
3.6: ko te Karaiti ia i rite ki te tama i tōna whare anō; ko tōna whare tonu hoki tātou, ki te ū tō tātou māia me te whaka­mana­mana ki te mea e tūmanako­hia atu nei, ā taea noatia te mutu­nga. He Okiokinga mō te Hunga a te Atua
3.7: Nā, kia rite ki tā te Wairua Tapu i mea ai: “Ki te rongo koutou ki tōna reo āia­nei,
3.8: kaua e whaka­pakeke­tia ō koutou ngākau, kei pērā me o te whaka­toi­nga, i te rā o te whaka­mā­tautau­ranga i te koraha.
3.9: I ahau i whaka­mā­tau­tau­ria e ō koutou mātua, i ahau i āta mōhio­tia, e whā tekau ngā tau i kite ai rātou i āku mahi.
3.10: Nā, ka hōhā ahau ki taua whaka­tupu­ranga, ka mea, ‘Kotiti kē tonu ō rātou ngākau; kāhore rātou e mōhio ki āku ara.’
3.11: Nā reira i riri ai ahau, i oati ai hoki: ‘E kore rātou e tae ki tōku oki­oki­nga.’ ”
3.12: Kia tūpato, e ōku tēina, kei noho te ngākau kino, whaka­pono kore i roto i tētahi o koutou; kei whaka­rērea te Atua ora.
3.13: Engari, me whaka­hau koutou tētahi i tētahi i tēnei rā, i tēnei rā, i te mea e kīa ana “Ko tēnei rā,” kei whaka­pakeke­tia tētahi o koutou e te tini­hanga o te hara.
3.14: Ka uru hoki tātou ki tā te Karaiti, ki te mea ka mau i a tātou te tīma­tanga o te whaka­aro pūmau, taea noatia te mutu­nga.
3.15: I te mea hoki e kōrero­tia ana: “Ki te rongo koutou ki tōna reo āia­nei, kaua e whaka­pakeke­tia ō koutou ngākau, kei pērā me o te whaka­toi­nga.”
3.16: Ko wai hoki i whaka­toi i tō rātou rongo­nga? He teka ianei ko te hunga katoa i haere mai i Īhipa, a Mohi i ārahi rā?
3.17: I riri hoki ia ki a wai i ngā tau e whā tekau? He teka ianei ki te hunga i hara, i hinga rā ō rātou tinana ki te koraha?
3.18: I oati anō ia ki a wai, e kore rātou e tae ki tōna oki­oki­nga? He teka ianei ki te hunga kīhai nei i whaka­pono?
3.19: Nā, ka kite nei tātou kīhai rātou i āhei te tae atu i te kore o te whaka­pono.

4.1: Nā, kia mataku tātou, i te mea ka tukua iho nei he kōrero pai mō tātou kia tae atu ki tōna oki­oki­nga, kei tiro­hia mai tētahi o koutou kua mahue ki muri.
4.2: He mea kauwhau hoki te rongo­pai ki a tātou, he pērā anō me tērā i a rātou. Heoi, kīhai te kupu i rangona i whai pai ki a rātou; nō te mea kīhai i whaka­nanua ki te whaka­pono i roto i te hunga i rangona ai.
4.3: Ka taea hoki te oki­oki­nga e tātou kua whaka­pono nei; ka rite ki tāna i kī rā: “Nā reira i riri ai ahau, i oati ai hoki, ‘E kore rātou e tae ki tōku oki­oki­nga!’ ” Kua oti nā hoki ngā mahi i te tīma­tanga rā anō o te ao.
4.4: Ko tāna kupu hoki tēnei i tētahi wāhi mō te rā whitu, “Ā, ka oki­oki te Atua i te rā whitu i āna mahi katoa.”
4.5: I tēnei wāhi anō hoki, “E kore rātou e tae ki tōku oki­oki­nga.”
4.6: Nā, tērā atu anō he taenga mō ētahi ki reira; kīhai hoki te hunga i kauwhau­tia ai te rongo­pai ki a rātou i mua i tae, nō te mea kāhore ō rātou whaka­pono;
4.7: ā, ka motu­hia mai e ia tētahi rā, i a ia i mea rā i tā Rāwiri, Hei āia­nei, i muri i taua wā roa rā; ko te kupu hoki tēnei: “Hei āia­nei, ki te rongo koutou ki tōna reo, kaua e whaka­pakeke­tia ō koutou ngākau.”
4.8: Me­he­mea hoki i whai oki­oki­nga rātou i a Hohua, e kore e kōrero­tia e ia tētahi atu rā i muri iho.
4.9: Inā, tērā atu anō he hāpati oki­oki­nga mō te iwi o te Atua.
4.10: Ki te tae hoki te tangata ki tōna oki­oki­nga, ka oki­oki anō ia i āna mahi ake, ka pērā me te Atua i oki­oki i āna mahi ake.
4.11: Nā, kia puta tō tātou uaua ki te tomo ki taua oki­oki­nga, kei pērā te whaka­pono kore o tētahi, ā, ka hinga.
4.12: Ora tonu hoki te kupu a te Atua, mana tonu, koi rawa atu i tētahi hoari mata­rua, ngoto tonu, ā, wehea noatia te ngākau me te wairua, ngā pona­pona me te hinu wheua, ā, wawae ana anō i ngā whaka­aro, i ngā hi­hiri­tanga o te ngākau.
4.13: Kāhore hoki he mea hanga i ngaro ki tōna aro­aro. Heoi, e takoto kau ana, e tu­whera ana ngā mea katoa ki ōna kanohi, kei a ia nei he kupu mō tātou. Ko Īhu te Tohunga Nui
4.14: Nā, he tino tohu­nga nui tō tātou, kua tomo ki ngā rangi, a Īhu, te Tama a te Atua, kia mau pū tātou ki te tikanga i whaka­ae­tia e tātou.
4.15: Ehara hoki tō tātou i te tohu­nga nui e kore e āhei kia mamae tahi me tātou e ngoi­kore nei; i whaka­mā­tau­tau­ria nei hoki ia i ngā mea katoa, i pēnei­tia me tātou, kāhore ia he hara.
4.16: Nā, kia haere māia atu tātou ki te torōna o te aroha noa, kia puta mai ai ki a tātou te mahi tohu, kia kitea ai e tātou tā te aroha noa hei āwhina mai mō ngā wā e mate ai.

5.1: Ko ia tohu­nga nui hoki e tango­hia nei i roto i ngā tāngata, he mea whaka­tū rātou mō ngā mea a ngā tāngata ki te Atua, hei tāpae i ngā whaka­here, i ngā patu­nga tapu mō ngā hara.
5.2: E taea e ia te āta hanga ki te hunga e kūware ana, e kotiti kē ana; nō te mea e muia ana anō ia e te ngoi­kore;
5.3: nā konei i tika ai, kia rite ki tāna mō te iwi tāna e tāpae ai mōna ake, hei whaka­here mō ngā hara.
5.4: E kore anō hoki tētahi e tango i tēnei hōnore ki a ia anō, engari te tangata e karanga­tia ana e te Atua, e pērā­tia ana me Ārona.
5.5: Wai­hoki ko te Karaiti kāhore āna whaka­nui i a ia hei tohu­nga nui; nā tērā kē i kī rā ki a ia: “Ko koe tāku Tama, nō nāia­nei koe i whaka­tupu­ria ai e ahau.”
5.6: Pērā hoki me tāna i kī ai i tētahi atu wāhi, “Hei tohu­nga koe ake ake i runga i te rite­nga o Merekihereke.”
5.7: I ngā rā o tōna kiko­kiko, i tukua e ia he īnoi, he kara­kia, i runga i te kāranga­ranga kaha, i te roi­mata, ki te Mea kaha ki te whaka­ora i a ia i te mate, ā, whaka­rangona ana mōna i wehi ki te Atua;
5.8: ahakoa he Tama ia, i whaka­akona ia ki te ngohe­ngohe e ōna mamae.
5.9: Ā, ka meinga nei ia kia tino rite, ka waiho ia hei take mō te ora tonu ki te hunga katoa e ngohe­ngohe ana ki a ia;
5.10: he mea karanga nā te Atua hei tohu­nga nui i runga i te rite­nga o Merekihereke. He Whakatūpato ki Whakarērea te Whakapono
5.11: He maha nei ā mātou kōrero mō tēnei, he uaua ki te whaka­mārama, he pūhoi hoki nō koutou ki te whaka­rongo.
5.12: I te mea hoki ka tika kia waiho koutou hei kai­whaka­ako nō te mea ka roa nei, nā, me tuarua te whaka­ako i a koutou ki ngā tīma­tanga rawa­tanga o ngā kupu a te Atua; me waiū hoki he kai mā koutou, kauaka te kai pakeke.
5.13: Ko ngā tāngata katoa hoki e kai ana i te waiū, he kūware rātou ki te kupu o te tika, he kō­hunga­hunga hoki.
5.14: Mā ngā pakeke e tika ai te kai mārō kua taunga­tia nei ō rātou hine­ngaro e ngā mea­tanga maha, e wehe ai i te pai, i te kino.

6.1: Nā, kāti tātou te kōrero i ngā tīma­tanga o tā te Karaiti ako, hoake tātou ki te tino tikanga; kaua e tua­rua­tia te whaka­takoto i te tū­ranga, arā i te rīpe­netā ki ngā mahi mate, i te whaka­pono hoki ki te Atua,
6.2: i te whaka­ako ki ngā iri­iri, ki te whaka­pā­nga o ngā ringa­ringa, ki te aranga o ngā tāngata mate, ki te whaka­wā­kanga mutunga­kore.
6.3: Ā, ka meatia anō tēnei e tātou ki te tukua e te Atua.
6.4: Ko te hunga hoki kua oti te whaka­mārama, kua pā ki te mea i hōmai i runga i te rangi, kua whi­whi ki te Wairua Tapu,
6.5: kua kitea anō te pai o tā te Atua kupu, me ngā mea kaha o te ao meāke nei puta;
6.6: ki te taka atu rātou, e kore rātou e taea te whaka­hou ake ki te rīpe­netā; ka rīpeka­tia houtia hoki te Tama a te Atua e rātou nei anō, ka meinga hoki kia tāwaia nuitia.
6.7: Ko te whenua hoki e inu nei i te ua hono­hono te heke ki runga ki a ia, ā, e mea ana i te ota­ota pai kia tupu ake mā te hunga i mahia ai, ka whi­whi ki tā te Atua manaaki.
6.8: Ki te tupu­ria ia e te tā­tarā­moa, e te tū­mata­kuru, ka whaka­kinoa, ka tata ki te kanga; ko tōna whaka­mutu­nga ka tahuna.
6.9: Otiia, ahakoa pēnei noa tā mātou kōrero, e ū ana anō tō mātou whaka­aro, e ōku hoa aroha, ki ngā mea pai kē atu kei a koutou, he mea hoki mō te whaka­ora­nga.
6.10: E kore hoki te Atua e hē, e ware­ware ki tā koutou mahi, ki te uaua o tō koutou aroha, i whaka­kitea mai e koutou ki tōna ingoa, i a koutou i ata­whai i te hunga tapu, ā, ka ata­whai nei anō.
6.11: Otiia, e hia­hia ana mātou kia whaka­kitea taua uaua nā anō e tēnei, e tēnei o koutou, kia taea rawa­tia te pūmau­tanga o te whaka­aro i tū­mana­ko ai koutou ā te mutu­nga rā anō.
6.12: Kia kaua e pūhoi, engari kia rite ki tā te hunga i whaka­pono, i whaka­manawa­nui, ā, riro mai ana i a rātou ngā mea i whaka­aria mai. Te Kupu Whakaari Tūturu o te Atua
6.13: I tā te Atua whaka­ari­nga mea ki a Āperahama, i te mea kāhore tētahi i nui ake hei oati­tanga, ka oati­tia e ia a ia ake anō,
6.14: ka mea, “Inā, ka manaaki­tia rawa­tia koe e ahau, ka whaka­nuia rawa­tia anō hoki koe.”
6.15: Heoi, whaka­manawa­nui ana ia, ā, riro ana i a ia te kupu whaka­ari.
6.16: Ko te mea nui ake hoki tā ngā tāngata e waiho ai hei oati; ā, ki a rātou hei mutu­nga mō ngā whaka­hoki­hoki kupu katoa te oati whakaū.
6.17: Nō reira, i te mahara o te Atua kia tino whaka­kitea ki te hunga mō rātou nei te kupu whaka­ari te pūmau o tōna whaka­aro, ka whaka­urua mai e ia he oati,
6.18: kia rua ai ngā mea pūmau, he mea e kore ai e āhei kia teka te Atua. Mā reira ka kaha ai he whaka­mārie mō tātou, mō te hunga kua rere ki te pupuri i te mea e takoto mai nei i te aro­aro, e tūmanako­hia atu nei.
6.19: Hei punga anō tēnei mā tātou mō te wairua, he tū­mana­ko mau tonu, ū tonu, tae tonu atu anō hoki ki te mea i roto i te ārai;
6.20: ki te wāhi kua tapoko atu nei a Īhu ki reira, hei mātā­mua mō tātou, i a ia i meinga hei tohu­nga nui mō ā mua tonu atu, i runga i te rite­nga o Merekihereke.

7.1: Ko tēnei Merekihereke hoki, kīngi o Harema, tohu­nga o te Atua o te Runga Rawa, i tūtaki nei ki a Āperahama i a ia e hoki ana i te patu­nga i ngā kīngi, i manaaki nei i a ia,
7.2: ā, hoatu ana e Āperahama ki a ia ngā whaka­tekau o ngā mea katoa. Ko te whaka­māori­tanga o tōna ingoa i te tua­tahi ko “te Kīngi o te tika”, i tō muri hoki ko te Kīngi o Harema, arā ko “te Kīngi o te rangi­mārie.”
7.3: He mea matua­kore, whaea­kore, kāhore nei ōna whaka­papa tūpuna, kāhore he tīma­tanga o ōna rā, kāhore he mutu­nga o tōna ora; he tangata kua whaka­ritea ki te Tama a te Atua, mau tonu ana ia hei tohu­nga.
7.4: Nā, whaka­aroa te nui o tēnei tangata i hoatu nei ki a ia e te tupuna nui, e Āperahama, ngā whaka­tekau o ngā taonga para­kete.
7.5: Ko ngā tama hoki a Rīwai, arā ngā mea kua riro nei i a rātou te mahi tohu­nga, he ture kei a rātou kia tango­hia tā te ture i whaka­rite ai, ngā whaka­tekau a te iwi, he mea nā ō rātou tēina i puta mai nei anō i te hope o Āperahama.
7.6: Ko tēnei tangata ia, ehara nei i te mea nō tō rātou kāwai, riro ana i a ia ngā whaka­tekau a Āperahama, ā, manaaki­tia ana e ia te tangata i a ia nei ngā kupu whaka­ari.
7.7: E kore rawa ia tēnei e taea te whaka­teka, arā ko te mea iti e manaaki­tia ana e te mea nui.
7.8: I konei e riro ana ngā whaka­tekau i ngā tāngata, he mate­mate nei; i reira ia, i tērā e kīa nei kei te ora ia.
7.9: Me pēnei anō te kī, ko Rīwai e tango whaka­tekau nei, hoatu ana e ia he whaka­tekau i tā Āperahama mea­tanga rā.
7.10: I roto tonu hoki ia i te hope o tōna pāpā i te tū­taki­tanga o Merekihereke ki a ia.
7.11: Nā, ki te mea nā tā te Rīwai mahi tohu­nga i tino rite ai, ā, i nā runga hoki i tērā te riro­nga o te ture i te iwi, he aha atu te mea e whaka­tika ake ai tētahi atu tohu­nga i runga i tō Merekihereke rite­nga; tē kīa ai i runga i tō Ārona rite­nga?
7.12: Ka whaka­putaia kētia nei hoki te mahi tohu­nga, ina kua puta kē anō hoki te ture.
7.13: Ko te tangata hoki mōna ēnei kōrero, he hapū kē tōna, kāhore nei tētahi o rātou i whaka­tata ki te āta.
7.14: He mea takoto mārama hoki tēnei, i puta ake tō tātou Ariki i roto i a Hūrā; hore rawa he kupu a Mohi mō te mahi tohu­nga a tērā iwi. Tētahi atu Tohunga i te Ritenga o Merekihereke
7.15: Ā, ka tino mārama rawa tā mātou i kōrero ai, ina whaka­tika ake tētahi atu tohu­nga i te rite­nga o Merekihereke;
7.16: ko tōna whaka­tohunga­tanga nei hoki ehara i te mea nō runga i te ture o ngā tikanga o te kiko­kiko, engari nō runga i te kaha o te ora e kore e mutu.
7.17: Kua whaka­atu­ria mai nei hoki e ia, “Hei tohu­nga koe ake ake i runga i te rite­nga o Merekihereke.”
7.18: Kua whaka­kāhore­tia hoki te ture i whaka­takoto­ria i mua, nō te mea kāhore ōna kaha, kāhore ōna hua,
7.19: kāhore hoki he mea i tino tika i te ture; kua mauria mai anō he mea e hira ake ai te tū­mana­ko, nā reira nei tātou ka whaka­tata atu ki te Atua.
7.20: Nā, kīhai nei i mahue te oati;
7.21: ko ērā hoki kāhore he oati i tō rātou whaka­tohunga­tanga; he oati ia i tō tēnei, nā tērā i kī mai rā ki a ia: “Kua oati te Ariki, ā, e kore e puta kē tōna whaka­aro: ‘Hei tohu­nga koe ake ake i runga i te rite­nga o Merekihereke.’ ”
7.22: Koia i nui kē ai te pai o te kawe­nata ko Īhu nei tōna kai­whaka­mau.
7.23: He toko­maha hoki rātou i whaka­tohunga­tia, tā te mea kīhai i tukua e te mate kia tū tonu;
7.24: ko tēnei ia, e mau tonu ana ake ake, e kore anō e puta kē tāna mahi tohu­nga.
7.25: Nā, e taea anō e ia te tino whaka­ora te hunga e nā runga atu ana i a ia ki te Atua; e ora tonu ana hoki ia hei īnoi mō rātou.
7.26: He pai rawa hoki tēnei tū tohu­nga nui mō tātou, te tapu, te kino­kore, te poke­kore, he mea motu kē i te hunga hara, kua whaka­neke­hia ake anō hoki ki runga ake i ngā rangi.
7.27: Kāhore āna mea e pērā ai ia me ngā tohu­nga nui, e whaka­eke patu­nga tapu ai ia i ia rā, mō ōna hara ake i te tua­tahi, muri iho mō o te iwi; kotahi tonu hoki tāna mea­tanga i tēnei, i tāna whaka­eke­nga atu i a ia ake.
7.28: Ko ngā tohu­nga nui hoki e whaka­tū­ria ana e te ture, he tāngata e pēhia ana e te ngoi­kore; ko tā te kupu ia o te oati, i muri nei i te ture, ko te Tama kua oti nei te mea kia tino tika ake ake.

8.1: Nā, ko te tino tēnei o ēnei kōrero; he tohu­nga pērā tō tātou, kua noho ki matau o te torōna o te Nui i ngā rangi;
8.2: he minita mō te wāhi tapu, mō te ta­pe­nā­kara pono, tōna kai­whaka­ara nei ko te Ariki, ehara i te tangata.
8.3: Ko ngā tohu­nga nui katoa hoki, he mea whaka­rite hei tāpae atu i ngā whaka­here, i ngā patu­nga tapu; nā konei hoki i tika ai kia whai mea anō tēnei tohu­nga nui hei tāpae­nga atu māna.
8.4: Me i runga hoki ia i te whenua, kāhore ōna tohunga­tanga; tēnei hoki ngā tohu­nga hei tāpae i ngā whaka­here i runga i tā te ture.
8.5: Ko tā rātou mahi he rite­nga, he ātā­rangi nō ngā mea i te rangi, he pērā anō me te mea i tohu­tohu­ngia ki a Mohi, i a ia meāke hanga i te ta­pe­nā­kara, i mea hoki ia, “Kia mahara kia hangā e koe ngā mea katoa kia rite ki te tauira i whaka­kitea ki a koe i runga i te maunga.”
8.6: Tēnā ko tēnei he nui kē te mahi minita kua riro nei i a ia, he pai rawa hoki te kawe­nata ko tōna taka­wae­nga nei ko ia, he pai rawa hoki ngā kupu whaka­ari, i whaka­takoto­ria ai taua kawe­nata.
8.7: Me­he­mea hoki kīhai i whai hē taua kawe­nata ō mua, e kore e rapua he wāhi mō te tuarua.
8.8: I a ia hoki e whaka­hē ana, i mea ia ki a rātou: “Nana, tēnei ake ko ngā rā, e ai tā te Ariki, e whaka­ritea ai e ahau he kawe­nata hou ki te whare o Īharaira, ki te whare anō hoki o Hūrā.
8.9: E kore e rite ki te kawe­nata i whaka­ritea e ahau ki ō rātou mātua, i te rā i mau ai ahau ki ō rātou ringa­ringa, i ārahi mai ai i a rātou i te whenua o Īhipa. Kīhai nei hoki rātou i ū ki tāku kawe­nata, ā, kore ake ōku whaka­aro ki a rātou, e ai tā te Ariki.
8.10: Ko te kawe­nata hoki tēnei e whaka­rite ai ahau ki te whare o Īharaira i muri iho i aua rā, e ai tā te Ariki: Ka hoatu e ahau āku ture ki ō rātou hine­ngaro, ka tuhi­tuhia anō hoki ki ō rātou ngākau. Ko ahau hei Atua mō rātou ko rātou hoki hei iwi māku.
8.11: I kore anō hoki rātou e whaka­ako i tōna hoa, i tōna hoa, i tōna teina, i tōna tua­kana, e mea, ‘Kia mātau koe ki te Ariki,’ e mātau katoa hoki rātou ki ahau, te nohi­nohi o rātou, te nui anō hoki o rātou.
8.12: Ka mahi tohu hoki ahau ki ō rātou kino, e kore anō hoki e mahara­tia e ahau ō rātou hara ā mua ake nei.”
8.13: I a ia i mea, “He kawe­nata hou,” kua whaka­tawhito­tia e ia te mea tua­tahi. Nā, ko te mea kua tawhito­tia, kua koro­heke­tia, ka tata te memeha.

9.1: Nā, ko te kawe­nata tua­tahi he tikanga kara­kia anō ōna, me tētahi wāhi tapu, he mea nō te ao nei.
9.2: I hangā hoki tētahi ta­pe­nā­kara, te tua­tahi, i reira te tū­ranga rama, me te tēpu, me te taro aro­aro, tōna ingoa ko te Wāhi Tapu.
9.3: I tua atu hoki o te rua o ngā ārai, ko te ta­pe­nā­kara, e huaina ana ko te Wāhi Tino Tapu.
9.4: He tahu kakara kōura i reira me te āka o te kawe­nata, he mea whaka­kiko­rua ngā wāhi katoa ki te kōura, i roto anō i taua mea ko te oko kōura i te mana, ko te toko­toko o Ārona i pihi rā, ko ngā papa o te kawe­nata.
9.5: I runga atu i tēnei ko ngā Kerupima o te korōria, e whaka­maru­maru ana i te tau­mata o te whaka­mārie­tanga. E kore aua mea e taea te kōrero taki­tahi ināia­nei.
9.6: Heoi, ka āta rite nei ēnei mea, ka hāere­ere ngā tohu­nga i ngā wā katoa ki te ta­pe­nā­kara tua­tahi, i a rātou e mahi ana i ngā rite­nga kara­kia;
9.7: ki te tuarua ia kotahi anō te haere­nga atu i te tau, o te tohu­nga nui anake, kīhai anō i mahue ngā toto; i tāpaea atu hoki mōna, mō ngā hē anō o te iwi.
9.8: Ko tā te Wairua Tapu hoki tēnei i whaka­atu ai, kīanō te hua­rahi ki te Wāhi Tino Tapu i whaka­kitea mai, i te mea e tū ana anō te ta­pe­nā­kara tua­tahi.
9.9: He āhua tērā mō tēnei wā nei, e tāpaea ai ngā whaka­here me ngā patu­nga tapu, kāhore nei e tau hei mea i te tangata nāna tērā mahi kia tino tika te hine­ngaro;
9.10: heoi anō o ērā he kainga, he inu­manga, he horoi­nga maha, he tikanga nā te kiko­kiko, he mea whaka­rite mai, ā taea noatia te wā whaka­tika­tika.
9.11: I te taenga mai ia o te Karaiti hei tohu­nga nui mō ngā mea pai e whai mai ana i muri, he nui atu anō hoki, he tino tika te ta­pe­nā­kara, ehara i te mea hangā nā te ringa­ringa, arā ehara i te mea nō tēnei hanga­nga.
9.12: Ehara anō hoki i te mea nō ngā koati ngā toto, nō ngā kūao kau rānei, engari nōna ake ngā toto i haere atu ai ia, kotahi tonu te haere­nga, ki roto ki te Wāhi Tino Tapu, i te mea ka whi­whi ki tāna mea hei hoko mai i a tātou mō ake tonu atu.
9.13: Ki te mea hoki mā ngā toto o ngā pūru, o ngā koati, mā ngā punga­rehu rānei o te kūao kau, he mea tā­uhi­uhi ki te hunga kua poke, ka tapu ai, ka mā ai te kiko­kiko.
9.14: Tērā atu tō ngā toto o te Karaiti, nāna nei i tāpae atu a ia anō, he mea koha­kore, ki te Atua, i runga i tā te Wairua ora tonu; mā ērā e mā ai ō koutou hine­ngaro i ngā mahi mate, e mahi ai koutou ki te Atua ora.
9.15: Mō konei anō ia i meinga ai hei Taka­wae­nga mō te kawe­nata hou, kia mate ai ia hei utu mō ngā hē i raro i te kawe­nata tua­tahi, kia riro ai i te hunga e karanga­tia ana te wāhi tūturu mō rātou i kōrero­tia i mua.
9.16: He ōhākī hoki, ko te mea e whai tikanga ai ko te mate­nga o te tangata nāna i whaka­takoto.
9.17: Kia mate hoki te tangata, kātahi ka whai mana te ōhākī; ka ū tonu rānei i te mea e ora ana te tangata nāna i whaka­takoto?
9.18: Koia hoki te mahue ai te toto i te whaka­tapu­nga o te kawe­nata tua­tahi.
9.19: I te mutu­nga hoki o tā Mohi kōrero i ngā tikanga katoa ki te iwi katoa, hei whaka­rite i tā te ture, ka mau ia ki ngā toto o ngā kūao kau, o ngā koati, ki te wai, ki te huru­huru whero, ki te hihopa, ā, tā­uhi­uhia ana e ia te puka­puka, me te iwi katoa;
9.20: me tāna kī anō, “Ko ngā toto ēnei o te kawe­nata kua whaka­akona mai nei e te Atua ki a koutou.”
9.21: I tā­uhi­uhia anō hoki e ia ki ngā toto te ta­pe­nā­kara, me ngā oko katoa mō te mahi minita.
9.22: I runga hoki i te ture, e tata ana ka kīa, e purea ana ngā mea katoa ki te toto; ki te kāhore hoki he ringi­hanga toto, kāhore he muru­nga hara. Te Tāpaenga a Īhu, te Whakakāhore i te Hara
9.23: Koia, i tika ai kia purea ki ēnei ngā rite­nga o ngā mea i te rangi; ko ngā tino mea ia o te rangi ki ngā patu­nga tapu, pai rawa atu i ēnei.
9.24: Ehara hoki i te mea kua tomo a te Karaiti ki te wāhi tapu i hanga e te ringa­ringa, ki te tauira o te tino wāhi; engari ki te tino rangi pū anō, puta ai ki te aro­aro o te Atua, mō tātou.
9.25: Ehara anō i te mea kia maha āna tāpae­nga i a ia, kia pērā me te tohu­nga nui e haere nei ki roto ki te Wāhi Tino Tapu i tēnei tau, i tēnei tau, nō ētahi atu anō hoki ngā toto;
9.26: pēnei kia maha he mamae­tanga mōna, he mea tīmata i te hanga­nga rā anō o te ao. Tēnā ko tēnei kotahi tonu tōna whaka­kite­nga mai i te mutu­nga o ngā wā, hei whaka­kāhore i te hara, i a ia ka meinga hei patu­nga tapu.
9.27: Nā, kua takoto nei te tikanga mō ngā tāngata kia kotahi tonu te mate­nga, ā muri iho i tēnei ko te whaka­wā;
9.28: wai­hoki ko te Karaiti, kotahi tonu tōna tāpae­nga atu hei pīkau i ngā hara o te tini, ā, tēnei ake ko te rua o ōna whaka­kite­nga mai, kāhore anō he hara, hei whaka­ora i te hunga e tatari ana ki a ia.

10.1: I te mea ko tō te ture he ātā­rangi nō ngā mea pai e puta ana mai i muri, ehara i te āhua pū o aua mea, e kore e whai mana i aua patu­nga tapu e whaka­eke­tia tonu­tia ana e rātou i tēnei tau, i tēnei tau, e tino tika ai te hunga e whaka­tata ana.
10.2: Pēnei e kore rānei e mutu te whaka­eke? Me i oti hoki te hunga nāna taua kara­kia te mea kia mā, kua kore ō rātou mahara ki ngā hara?
10.3: I aua patu­nga tapu ia e hoki­hoki ana te mahara ki ngā hara i ia tau, i ia tau.
10.4: E kore hoki e tau mā ngā toto o ngā pūru, o ngā koati e whaka­kāhore ngā hara.
10.5: Nā reira i a ia e haere mai ana ki te ao, ka mea ia: “Kīhai i mate­nui­tia e koe te patu­nga tapu me te whaka­here, kua rite mai i a koe he tinana mōku.
10.6: Kīhai koe i āhua­reka ki ngā tahu­nga tinana, ki ngā whaka­here hara.
10.7: Kātahi ahau ka mea atu, ‘Tēnei ahau te haere atu nei, kei roto i te ūpoko o te puka­puka te tuhi­tuhi­nga mōku, ki te mea i tāu i pai ai, e te Atua.’ ”
10.8: I tāna mea­tanga i mua ake, “Kīhai koe i mate­nui ki te patu­nga tapu, ki te whaka­here, ki ngā tahu­nga tinana, ki ngā whaka­here hara, kāhore anō hoki ōu āhua­reka mai,” he mea nei e tāpaea ana i runga i te ture.
10.9: Kātahi ia ka mea, “Tēnei ahau te haere atu nei ki te mea i tāu i pai ai, e te Atua.” E tango­hia ana e ia te tua­tahi, kia whaka­tū­ria ai e ia te tuarua.
10.10: Nā taua pai nei i oti ai tātou te whaka­tapu, he mea­tanga nā te tāpae­nga atu kotahi o te tinana o Īhu Karaiti.
10.11: Nā, ko ngā tohu­nga katoa, e tū ana rātou, e minita ana i tēnei rā, i tēnei rā, he maha anō hoki ā rātou whaka­eke­nga atu i aua patu­nga tapu rā anō, e kore rawa nei e tau hei tango i ngā hara.
10.12: Ko tēnei ia, kotahi nei tāna patu­nga tapu i whaka­eke atu ai mō ngā hara, noho tonu atu i te ringa matau o te Atua
10.13: i muri nei he tatari tāna kia waiho rā anō ōna hoa­riri hei taka­hanga mō ōna wae­wae.
10.14: Kotahi nei hoki tāna whaka­here, ā, tika tonu i a ia ake ake te hunga ka oti te whaka­tapu.
10.15: Hei kai­whaka­atu anō te Wairua Tapu mō tēnei ki a tātou; i muri mai i tāna kīanga mai,
10.16: “Ko te kawe­nata tēnei e whaka­ritea e ahau ki a rātou i muri i aua rā, e kī ana te Ariki: Ka hoatu e ahau āku ture ki ō rātou ngākau, ka tuhi­tuhia hoki e ahau ki ō rātou hine­ngaro.” Ā, ka mea anō ia,
10.17: “E kore hoki e mahara­tia e ahau ō rātou hara, ō rātou kino ā mua ake.”
10.18: Nā, ki te murua ēnei, kāhore he whaka­here mō ngā hara i muri iho. Kia Whakatata atu Tātou ki te Atua
10.19: Nā, e ōku tēina, ka ai nei ngā toto o Īhu hei take e māia ai tātou te tomo ki te Tino Wāhi Tapu,
10.20: hei ara hou mō tātou, arā hei ara ora, he mea whaka­tapu nāna, e tika atu ana nā te ārai, arā nā tōna kiko­kiko.
10.21: Ā, i te mea he nui tō tātou tohu­nga mō te whare o te Atua,
10.22: kia whaka­tata atu tātou, i runga i te ngākau pono, i te whaka­pono e tino ū ana, he mea tā­uhi­uhi te ngākau, kia kore ai te hine­ngaro kino, he mea horoi anō hoki te tinana ki te wai mārama.
10.23: Kia mau tā tātou whaka­ae ki te mea e tūmanako­hia atu nei, kei ngā­ueue; he pono hoki tā te kai­whaka­ari mai.
10.24: Kia whai whaka­aro anō tātou tētahi ki tētahi, kia whaka­oho­kia te aroha me ngā mahi pai,
10.25: kei mahue te hui­hui i a tātou anō, kei pērā me te hanga a ētahi. Engari me whaka­hau­hau tētahi i tētahi, kia nui rawa anō hoki i te mea ka kite koutou ka tata te rā.
10.26: Ki te hara hoki tātou i muri iho i tō tātou whi­whi­nga ki te mātau­ranga ki te pono, kāhore atu hoki he patu­nga tapu i mahue mō ngā hara;
10.27: engari, ka tatari āhua mataku ki te whaka­wā, ki te riri kino anō nā te ahi, e whaka­ngaro­mia ai ngā hoa­riri.
10.28: Ko te tangata i takahi i te ture a Mohi kīhai i tohu­ngia, ka mate i runga i te kupu a ngā kai­whaka­atu toko­rua, toko­toru rānei.
10.29: Ki tō koutou whaka­aro, e kore rānei e tika kia rahi ake te whiu mō te tangata i taka­hia ai te Tama a te Atua, i meinga ai hei mea noa ngā toto o te kawe­nata i whaka­tapua ai ia, ā, whaka­iti ana i te Wairua o te aroha noa?
10.30: E mātau ana hoki tātou nā wai tēnei kupu, “Māku te rapu utu; māku te hoatu utu, e ai tā te Ariki,” me tēnei anō, “E whaka­wā te Ariki mō tāna iwi.”
10.31: He mea mataku te taka ki roto ki ngā ringa­ringa o te Atua ora.
10.32: Engari, kia mahara ki ngā rā ō mua, i a koutou i whaka­mārama­tia rā, he nui noa atu ngā rau­hanga a te mate, i whaka­ririka kau nā koutou.
10.33: Ko tētahi wāhi, i a koutou i meinga e ngā tāwai­nga, e ngā tūkino­tanga hei mea mā­taki­taki; ko tētahi wāhi, i a koutou i meinga hei hoa mō te hunga i pērā­tia.
10.34: I mamae tahi hoki koutou me te hunga i te here­here, i hari hoki ki te pāhua­tanga o ō koutou taonga, i mahara hoki tērā atu he taonga mō koutou, he mea pai ake, he mea pūmau tonu.
10.35: Nā, kaua e whaka­rērea tō koutou māia, he rahi hoki tōna utu.
10.36: Ko te mea hoki hei mate­nui­tanga mā koutou he manawa­nui; kia oti ai i a koutou te mahi tā te Atua i pai ai, e riro tonu ai i a koutou ngā mea i whaka­aria mai rā.
10.37: “Potopoto kau ake hoki, ā, ka tae mai tēnei e haere mai nei, e kore anō e whaka­roa.
10.38: Mā te whaka­pono ia e ora ai te tangata tika; ā, ki te hoki tētahi ki muri, e kore tōku wairua e āhua­reka ki a ia.”
10.39: Otiia, ehara tātou i te hunga e hoki ana ki muri, ki te whaka­ngaro­manga, engari nō te hunga e whaka­pono ana, ā, ora ana te wairua.

11.1: Nā, ko te whaka­pono, he whaka­pūmau­tanga i ngā mea e tūmanako­hia atu ana, he whaka­kite­nga i ngā mea kāhore nei e kitea.
11.2: Nā konei hoki ngā kaumātua i kōrero­tia paitia ai.
11.3: Nā te whaka­pono i mātau ai tātou he mea hanga ngā ao e te kupu a te Atua, ā, ko ngā mea e tiro­hia atu nei kīhai i puta ake i roto i ngā mea e kitea ana.
11.4: Nā te whaka­pono i pai ake ai i tā Kaina te patu­nga tapu i tāpaea e Āpera ki te Atua, nā tēnā hoki i whaka­atu tōna tika, i whaka­atu hoki te Atua mō āna whaka­here; nā tēnā anō ia i whai kupu ai, ahakoa mate.
11.5: Nā te whaka­pono a Ēnoka i kawea kētia ai, tē kite i te mate. Nā, kāhore ia i kitea, nō te mea kua kawea kētia ia e te Atua; i mua atu hoki i tōna kawe­nga kētanga i whaka­atu­ria mai ia, e āhua­reka ana te Atua ki a ia.
11.6: Ki te kāhore hoki he whaka­pono, e kore e taea he mea e āhua­reka mai ai ia. Ki te haere hoki tētahi ki te Atua, me whaka­pono ko ia anō tēnei ko te Atua, e hōmai ana e ia he utu ki te hunga e āta rapu ana i a ia.
11.7: Nā te whaka­pono a Noa, i tōna whaka­mahara­tanga e te Atua ki ngā mea kāhore i kitea noatia, i oho ai, he wehi ki te Atua, ā, hangā ana e ia te āka hei whaka­ora mō tōna whare; he whaka­tau­nga tēnā nāna i te hē ki te ao, ā, uru ana ki te tika o te whaka­pono.
11.8: Nā te whaka­pono a Āperahama i ngohe­ngohe ai, i tōna karanga­tanga kia haere ki te wāhi meāke riro i a ia hei kāinga; ā, haere ana ia, tē mātau ki te wāhi e haere ai ia.
11.9: Nā te whaka­pono ia i noho manene ai ki te whenua i whaka­aria mai, he whenua tangata kē anō ki a ia, ā, noho tēneti ana ia, rātou ko Īhaka, ko Hākopa, ōna hoa kua uru tahi nei rātou ki taua mea i whaka­aria mai rā.
11.10: I tatari hoki ia ki te pā whai tū­ranga, ko te Atua nei te kai­hanga, te kai­mahi.
11.11: Me Hera anō hoki, nā te whaka­pono ia i whai kaha ai, i hapū ai, ā, whānau ana tāna tama i te mea kua taka kē ōna tau; i mahara hoki ia he pono tā te kai­whaka­ari mai.
11.12: Nā, whānau ake i te kotahi, he tangata anō hoki ia kua whaka­tūpā­paku­tia ki ēnei mea, me te mea ko ngā whetū o te rangi te tini, koia anō kei te onepū i te taha o te moana e kore nei e taea te tatau.
11.13: I mate katoa ēnei i runga i te whaka­pono, kīhai i whi­whi ki ngā mea i whaka­aria mai rā, engari he mea kite atu nā rātou i tawhiti, ā, whaka­pono­hia atu ana e rātou, awhi­tia atu ana, whaka­ae ana rātou he manene rātou, he noho noa iho i runga i te whenua.
11.14: Ko te hunga hoki he pēnei ā rātou kōrero, e whaka­kite pū ana rātou he whenua tupu tā rātou e rapu nei.
11.15: Me i mahara hoki rātou ki taua kāinga i haere mai nei rātou i reira, pēnei kua ātea he hoki­nga atu mō rātou.
11.16: Tēnā, ko tēnei e hia­hia ana rātou ki tētahi kāinga pai ake, ki tērā i te rangi. Koia te Atua tē whaka­mā ai ki a rātou, kia kīa ko tō rātou Atua; kua rite hoki i a ia tētahi pā mō rātou.
11.17: Nā te whaka­pono a Āperahama i tāpae ai i a Īhaka, i tōna whaka­mā­tautau­ranga; āe rā, ko te tangata i a ia nei ngā kupu whaka­ari, tāpaea ana e ia tāna hua­tahi,
11.18: mōna nei te kupu, “Kei a Īhaka he huānga mō tāu whānau.”
11.19: I whaka­aro hoki ia, ahakoa i roto nei anō i te hunga mate, e taea ia e te Atua te whaka­ara ake; ā, riro mai ana ia i reira, he mea whaka­ahua.
11.20: Nā te whaka­pono tā Īhaka kupu manaaki mō Hākopa rāua ko Ēhau; he mea­tanga ki ngā mea ō muri nei.
11.21: Nā te whaka­pono a Hākopa, i a ia ka tata te mate, i manaaki ai i ngā tama toko­rua a Hōhepa; ā, koro­piko ana i runga i tāna toko­toko.
11.22: Nā te whaka­pono a Hōhepa, i a ia e whaka­hemo­hemo ana i whaka­hua ai i te haere­nga mai o ngā tama­riki a Īharaira; i whaka­takoto tikanga ai anō mō ōna wheua.
11.23: Nā te whaka­pono a Mohi, i tōna whānau­tanga, i hunā ai e ōna mātua e toru ngā marama, i kite hoki rāua he tama­iti āta­ahua ia; kīhai hoki rāua i mataku ki te ture a te kīngi.
11.24: Nā te whaka­pono a Mohi, i tōna kaumātua­tanga, kīhai i pai kia kīa he tama nā te tamā­hine a Parao;
11.25: ki tāna hoki, ko te mamae tahi me tā te Atua iwi, he mea pai kē atu i ngā āhua­reka o te hara kia riro mō tētahi wā.
11.26: Ki tōna whaka­aro, ko te tāwai­nga mō te Karaiti, he taonga nui kē atu i ngā taonga o Īhipa; i ti­tiro atu hoki ia ki te utu ka hōmai.
11.27: Nā te whaka­pono ia i haere atu ai i Īhipa, kīhai hoki i mataku i te riri a te kīngi; i ū tonu hoki ia, he ti­tiro nōna ki te Atua e kore nei e kitea.
11.28: Nā te whaka­pono ia i whaka­rite ai i te Kape­nga, i te ringi­hanga toto, kei pā ki a rātou te kai­whaka­mate i ngā whānau mātā­mua.
11.29: Nā te whaka­pono rātou i haere ai rā te Moana Whero me te mea e nā runga ana i te whenua maroke; ā, i te whaka­mātau­ranga a ngā Īhipiana, ki te pērā horo­mia ake rātou.
11.30: Nā te whaka­pono ngā taiepa o Heriko i whenuku ai, i te mea e whitu ngā rā e tai­āwhio­tia ana.
11.31: Nā te whaka­pono a Rahapa, te wahine kairau, i kore ai e whaka­ngaro­mia ngā­tahi­tia me te hunga whaka­pono kore, mōna i whaka­manu­hiri i ngā tūtei i runga i te rangi­mārie.
11.32: Kia pēhea ake anō hoki āku kōrero? E kore hoki e ranea te tāima hei kōrero­tanga māku i ngā mea a Kiriona, a Paraka, a Hamahona, a Iepeta, a Rāwiri, a Hamuera, a ngā poro­piti.
11.33: Nā te whaka­pono nei i hinga ai i a rātou ngā ranga­tira­tanga, i mahia ai e rātou te tika, i whi­whi ai rātou ki ngā mea i whaka­aria mai i mua, i tū­taki­na ai e rātou ngā waha o ngā raiona,
11.34: i tineia ai e rātou te kaha o te ahi, i mawhiti ai i te mata o te hoari, i haere atu ai i te ngoi­kore ki te kaha, i meinga ai kia kaha i te whawhai­tanga, whati ana i a rātou ngā taua a ngā tauiwi.
11.35: Riro ana i ngā wāhine ā rātou tū­pā­paku, he mea whaka­ara ake. Ko ētahi i whaka­mamae­tia, kīhai anō i whaka­ae atu kia whaka­ora­ngia; kia whi­whi ai rātou ki te whaka­ara­hanga pai kē atu.
11.36: Ko ētahi i whaka­mātau i ngā tāwai­nga, i ngā whiu­nga, i ngā meka­meka anō hoki, i te whare here­here.
11.37: I ākina rātou ki te kōhatu, i wāhia ki te kani, i whaka­waia, i mate i te patu­nga a te hoari. I hāere­ere rātou, he hiako hipi te kākahu, he hiako koati; he hunga rawa­kore rātou, e tūkino­tia ana, e whaka­tupu­ria kino­tia ana;
11.38: kīhai nei te ao i pai mō rātou! Ātiu­tiu noa ana rātou i waenga tahora, i ngā maunga, i ngā ana, i ngā poka o te whenua.
11.39: Nā, pai tonu te kōrero mō ēnei katoa, he mea nā te whaka­pono, heoi kīhai rātou i whi­whi ki te mea i whaka­aria mai.
11.40: Kua whaka­aroa wawe­tia hoki e te Atua tētahi mea pai atu mō tātou, kei tino tika rātou i te mea kāhore nei tātou.

12.1: Nā, i tēnei kapua nui o ngā kai­whaka­atu e kara­poti nei i a tātou, whaka­rērea e tātou ngā whaka­tai­maha katoa, me te hara whaka­eke tata, kia manawa­nui hoki tātou ki te oma i te omanga e takoto nei i tō tātou aro­aro.
12.2: Me te ti­tiro pū anō ki a Īhu, ki te kai­tīmata, ki te kai­whaka­oti i te whaka­pono; i whaka­aro hoki ia ki te hari i tōna aro­aro, ā, whaka­manawa­nui ana ki te rīpeka, whaka­hāwea ana ki te whaka­mā, nā, kua noho ki matau o te torōna o te Atua.
12.3: Whaka­aroa hoki ia i whaka­manawa­nui nei ki taua totohe nui a te hunga hara ki a ia, kei hōhā ō koutou ngākau, kei ngākau­kore koutou.
12.4: Ko tā koutou pakanga, kāhore anō kia tae noa ki te toto i a koutou e whawhai nā ki te hara.
12.5: Ā, kua ware­ware koutou ki te kupu whaka­hau e kōrero nei ki a koutou, me te mea he tama koutou, “E tāku tama, kaua e whaka­hāwea ki tā te Ariki papaki; kei ngākau­kore hoki ina rīria e ia.
12.6: E papaki ana hoki te Ariki ki tāna e aroha ai, e whiua ana hoki e ia ngā tama katoa e whaka­tamariki­tia ana ki a ia.”
12.7: Hei paki­nga tā koutou e manawa­nui ai; e rite ana tā te Atua mea­tanga ki a koutou ki tāna ki ngā tama tupu. Ko wai hoki te tama e kore e pākia e tōna pāpā?
12.8: Ki te kāhore ia ō koutou paki­nga, te mea e whaka­whiw­hia ana ki te katoa, he pōriro koutou, ehara i te tama.
12.9: Tētahi, he mātua anō ō tātou nō te wāhi ki te kiko­kiko, he mea papaki tātou nā rātou; i hopo­hopo anō tātou ki a rātou. Kaua ianei e nui noa atu tō tātou ngohe­ngohe ki te Matua o ngā wairua, kia ora ai?
12.10: Ko tā rātou papaki hoki he toru­toru nei ngā rā, he mea anō nā tā rātou ake i whaka­aro ai; ko tā tēnei ia hei pai mō tātou, kia whi­whi ai tātou ki tōna tapu.
12.11: Ko ngā paki­nga katoa, e kore e kīa ināia­nei hei whaka­hari, engari hei whaka­pōuri; muri iho ia ka puta mai te hua rangi­mārie o te tika, ki te hunga e whaka­mahia ana ki taua mea. He Tohutohu Whakatūpato Hoki
12.12: Heoi, kia ara ngā ringa­ringa kua tukua iho, me ngā turi ngoi­kore,
12.13: hangā hoki ētahi hua­rahi tika mō ō koutou wae­wae, kei whaka­peaua kētia atu te kopa; engari kia ora ake i te mate.
12.14: Whāia te rongo kia mau ki te katoa, me te tapu hoki, ki te kāhore hoki tēnei e kore tētahi tangata e kite i te Ariki.
12.15: Me te ti­tiro mārie kei hapa tētahi i tō te Atua aroha noa; kei pihi ake tētahi paki­aka o te kawa hei whaka­raru­raru, e poke ai te toko­maha.
12.16: Kei moe­puku tētahi, kei whaka­riha­riha rānei, kei pērā me Ēhau; i hokona rā e ia tōna mātā­mua­tanga ki te kainga kotahi.
12.17: E mātau ana hoki koutou ki tōna hia­hia i muri kia riro i a ia te manaaki, ā, kapea ana ia. Kīhai hoki i kitea he wāhi mō te rīpe­netā; i rapua mārie­tia anō e ia me te heke anō o ngā roi­mata.
12.18: Ehara hoki i te mea kua tae koutou ki te maunga e taea te whaka­pā atu, ki te ahi e kā ana, ki te pango kere­kere, ki te pōuri, ki te tūpuhi,
12.19: ki te tangi o te tētere, ki te reo e kōrero ana; i īnoi rā te hunga i rangona ai kia kaua he kupu ki a rātou i muri iho.
12.20: Kīhai hoki rātou i kaha ake ki te mea i whaka­ritea mai, “Nā, ahakoa he kararehe e pā atu ki te maunga, me āki ki te kōhatu.”
12.21: Koia anō te mataku o te mea i puta mai rā, i mea ai a Mohi, “Mataku rawa ahau, wiri rawa.”
12.22: Engari kua tae nei koutou ki Maunga Hiona, ki te pā o te Atua ora, ki Hiruhārama i te rangi, ki ngā mano tini o ngā ana­hera,
12.23: ki te hui­hui nui, ki te hāhi o ngā mātā­mua, kua oti te tuhi­tuhi ki te rangi, ki te Atua hoki, ki te kai­whaka­wā o ngā tāngata katoa, ki ngā wairua anō o te hunga tika kua oti te mea kia tino tika,
12.24: ki a Īhu anō hoki, ki te taka­wae­nga o te kawe­nata hou, ki ngā toto o te tā­uhi­uhi­nga, he pai ake nei ngā kōrero i tō Āpera.
12.25: Kia mahara kei whaka­rere koutou i tēnei e kōrero mai nei. Ki te mea hoki kīhai i mawhiti te hunga i pao­pao ki tērā i kōrero rā i runga i te whenua, inā e kore rawa anō tātou, ki te tahuri kē atu i tēnei kua kōrero mai nei i te rangi.
12.26: Ngā­ueue ana te whenua i tōna reo i reira; ināia­nei ia kua puaki tāna kupu whaka­ari, kua mea ia, “Kia kotahi anō mea­tanga, ā, ehara i te mea ko te whenua anake, ko te rangi anō hoki tāku e whaka­ngāueue ai.”
12.27: Ko taua kupu nei hoki, “Kia kotahi mea­tanga,” hei whaka­kite i te pu­tanga kētanga o ngā mea ka whaka­ngāue­ue­tia rā, he mea hanga hoki, mau tonu iho ai ngā mea e kore nei e whaka­ngāue­ue­tia.
12.28: Nā, ka riro nei i a tātou he kīngi­tanga e kore e taea te whaka­ngāueue, kia whi­whi tātou ki te aroha noa e manako­hia mai ai tā tātou e mahi nei ki te Atua i runga i te hopo­hopo, i te wehi;
12.29: he ahi hoki e kai ana tō tātou Atua.

13.1: Kia mau tonu te aroha ki ngā tēina.
13.2: Kei ware­ware ki te ata­whai manu­hiri; nā tēnei hoki i whaka­manu­hiri ana­hera ai ētahi, kīhai anō i mātau atu.
13.3: Mahara­tia ngā here­here, me te mea nō koutou tahi te here­here­nga; me te hunga hoki e whaka­tupu­ria kino­tia ana, kei te tinana nā hoki koutou.
13.4: Meinga te mārena hei mea hōnore mā te katoa, ā, kaua te moenga e tukua kia poke. Ko te hunga moe­puku ia, me te hunga pūremu, e whaka­taua e te Atua te hē ki a rātou.
13.5: Whaka­kāhore­tia atu te mahi apo taonga; kāti anō ngā mea mā koutou ko ngā mea i a koutou nā. Kua mea mai hoki ia, “E kore ahau e whaka­rere i a koe, e kore anō hoki e mawehe i a koe.”
13.6: Heoi, ka māia tātou ki te kī ake: “Kei tōku taha te Ariki, e kore ahau e mataku ki tā te tangata e mea ai ki ahau.”
13.7: Kia mahara ki te hunga e tohu­tohu ana i a koutou, kua kōrero nei i te kupu a te Atua ki a koutou. Tiro­hia te tuku­nga iho o tā rātou whaka­haere, kia rite tō koutou ki tō rātou whaka­pono.
13.8: Tūturu tonu a Īhu Karaiti ina­nahi, ināia­nei, ā ake ake.
13.9: Kei kāhaki­hakina koutou e ngā whaka­ako­ranga maha, e ngā mea poka hou ake. He mea pai hoki kia whaka­ū­kia te ngākau ki runga i te aroha noa; ehara i te mea ki ngā kai, kāhore hoki he pai o ēnā mea mō te hunga nā rātou nei tērā mahi.
13.10: He āta anō tā tātou, e kore nei e tika kia kainga tōna e te hunga e mahi ana i tā te ta­pe­nā­kara.
13.11: Nā, ko ngā kararehe nō rātou nei ngā toto e mauria ana e te tohu­nga nei mō te hara ki roto ki te Wāhi Tino Tapu, e tahuna ana ngā tinana o ērā ki waho o te puni.
13.12: Nā reira hoki a Īhu, i tāna whaka­tapu­nga i te iwi ki ōna toto ake anō, i mamae ai ki waho o te kūwaha.
13.13: Nā, kia haere atu tātou ki a ia ki waho o te puni, me te mau anō tātou i tōna tāwai­nga.
13.14: Kāhore hoki he pā tūmau mō tātou i konei, engari e rapu ana tātou i tētahi i roto i ngā wā ā muri nei.
13.15: Nā, kia tāpaea atu e tātou ki runga ki a ia i ngā wā katoa te whaka­moe­miti ki te Atua hei whaka­here, arā te hua o ngā ngutu e whaka­whetai ana ki tōna ingoa.
13.16: Kei ware­ware hoki ki te mahi pai, ki te ata­whai. E manako­hia ana hoki e te Atua ngā patu­nga tapu pērā.
13.17: Kia ngohe­ngohe ki ō koutou kai­tohu­tohu, kia ngā­wari ki tā rātou kupu; e mata­ara ana hoki rātou ki ō koutou wairua, ā, me kōrero anō e rātou ā mua te tikanga o ā rātou mahi. Kia hari ai rātou ina mea i tēnei, kia kaua hoki e pōuri; kāhore hoki he pai o tēnei mō koutou.
13.18: Īnoi mō mātou; ū tonu hoki tō mātou whaka­aro ki tō mātou hine­ngaro he pai, e hia­hia ana hoki mātou kia tika tā mātou whaka­haere i ngā mea katoa.
13.19: I kaha rawa ai tāku whaka­hau ki a koutou kia meatia tēnei, he mea kia wawe ai ahau te whaka­hokia atu ki a koutou. He Īnoi Mutunga
13.20: Nā, mā te Atua o te rangi­mārie, nāna nei i whaka­hoki mai i roto i te hunga mate tō tātou Ariki, a Īhu, taua Hēpara nui o ngā hipi, he mea­tanga nā ngā toto o te kawe­nata mutunga­kore,
13.21: māna koutou e mea kia tino tika i runga i ngā mahi pai katoa, kia mahia anō e koutou tāna i pai ai. Māna e mahi i roto i a koutou te mea e āhua­reka ana ki tāna ti­tiro, i roto anō i a Īhu Karaiti; waiho atu i a ia te korōria ake ake. Āmine. Poroporoaki
13.22: He kupu anō tēnei nāku ki a koutou, e ōku tēina, āta whaka­rangona mai te kupu whaka­hau; he toru­toru nei hoki ngā kupu kua tuhi­tuhia atu nei e ahau ki a koutou.
13.23: Kia mātau koutou kua tukua ki waho tō tātou teina, a Tīmoti. Ki te haere wawe mai ia, ko māua tahi e kite i a koutou.
13.24: Oha atu ki te hunga katoa e tohu­tohu ana i a koutou, ki te hunga tapu katoa anō hoki. Tēnei te oha atu nei ki a koutou te hunga o Itari.
13.25: Kia tau te aroha noa ki a koutou katoa. Āmine.

1.1: Nā Hēmi, nā te pono­nga a te Atua, a te Ariki hoki, a Īhu Karaiti, ki ngā hapū kotahi tekau mā rua e noho marara ana: Tēnā koutou. Te Whakapono me te Mātauranga
1.2: Kīa iho, e ōku tēina, he mea hari nui ina taka koutou ki ngā whaka­mā­tautau­ranga maha;
1.3: e mātau ana hoki koutou, ko te whaka­mā­tautau­ranga o tō koutou whaka­pono hei mahi i te manawa­nui.
1.4: Nā, kia puta rawa te mahi a te manawa­nui, kia tino tika ai koutou, kia toitū ai, tē hapa i tētahi mea.
1.5: Ki te hapa tētahi o koutou i te mātau­ranga, me īnoi ia ki te Atua, e hōmai nui nei ki te katoa, kāhore hoki āna tāwai mai; ā, ka hōmai ki a ia.
1.6: Otirā, me īnoi whaka­pono ia, kaua e rua­rua. Ko te tangata rua­rua hoki, tōna rite kei te ngaru o te moana, e pūhia ana e te hau, e ākina ana.
1.7: Kaua hoki taua tangata e mea, e whi­whi ia ki tētahi mea i te Ariki.
1.8: E kore te tangata ngākau rua e ū i āna hanga katoa. Te Rawakore me te Whai Taonga
1.9: Ko te teina iti, kia whaka­mana­mana ia i te mea ka whaka­neke­hia ake ia,
1.10: me te tangata taonga anō, i te mea ka whaka­iti­tia. Ka memeha atu hoki ia, ānō he puāwai taru­taru.
1.11: Ko te pu­tanga mai hoki o te rā me te hau wera anō, nā, kua maroke te taru­taru, kua nga­horo tōna puāwai, ā, ngaro iho te ātanga o tōna āhua. Ka pērā anō te tangata taonga, ka memeha atu i ōna hāere­ere­nga. Whakamātautau me Whakawai
1.12: Ka hari te tangata e ū ake ana ki te whaka­mā­tautau­ranga. Nō te mea hoki ka oti ia te whaka­mā­tau­tau, ka whi­whi ia ki te karauna o te ora, kua whaka­aria mai nei e te Ariki mō te hunga e aroha ana ki a ia.
1.13: Kaua tētahi e mea ina whaka­mā­tau­tau­ria, “E whaka­mā­tau­tau­ria ana ahau e te Atua.” E kore hoki te Atua e taea te whaka­mā­tau­tau e te kino, e kore anō hoki ia e whaka­mā­tau­tau i tētahi.
1.14: Engari he mea whaka­mā­tau­tau te tangata, i a ia e kūmea ana, e poaina ana e tōna hia­hia ake anō.
1.15: Nā, i te hapū­tanga o te hia­hia, ka whānau ko te hara; ā, i te otinga o te hara, ka whānau ko te mate.
1.16: Kei whaka­pōhēhē­tia koutou, e ōku tēina aroha.
1.17: Nō runga ngā hōmai­tanga papai katoa, ngā mea katoa e tino tika ana, he mea heke iho nō te Matua o ngā whaka­mārama, kāhore nei ōna pu­tanga kētanga, kāhore hoki he ātā­rangi o te tahuri.
1.18: Nā tōna hia­hia ake anō tātou whānau ai, he mea­tanga nā te kupu o te pono, kia meinga ai tātou me he mātā­mua mō āna mea i hanga ai. Whakarongo ka Mahi ai
1.19: Kei te mōhio koutou ki tēnei, e ōku hoa aroha, kia hohoro ngā tāngata katoa ki te whaka­rongo, kia pūhoi ki te kōrero, kia pūhoi ki te riri.
1.20: E kore hoki tā te Atua tika e mahia e tō te tangata riri.
1.21: Heoi, me whaka­rere katoa atu ngā tikanga poke, me te hara e hua tonu nei, me tahuri mārire ki te kupu kua oti te whaka­tō iho; e taea hoki e tēnei te whaka­ora ō koutou wairua.
1.22: Hei kai­mahi anō koutou i te kupu, kaua hei kai­whaka­rongo anake, kei tini­hanga­tia koutou e koutou anō.
1.23: Ki te mea hoki he kai­whaka­rongo tētahi i te kupu, ehara nei i te kai­mahi, he rite ia ki te tangata e mā­taki­taki ana ki tōna kanohi māori i roto i te whaka­ata,
1.24: i tōna mā­taki­taki­nga hoki i a ia anō, haere ana, ware­ware tonu ake he āhua pēhea rānei tōna.
1.25: Tēnā ko te tangata e āta ti­tiro iho ana ki te ture tino tika, ki te mea here­kore, ā, ka ū tonu, he kai­whaka­rongo anō ia e kore e ware­ware, engari, e mahi ana i te mahi, e hari anō tēnei i tāna mahi.
1.26: Ki te mea he āhua kara­kia tō tētahi i roto i a koutou, ki te kore e pa­rai­re­tia e ia tōna arero, he tini­hanga hoki tāna ki tōna ngākau, he mau­mau kara­kia tāna.
1.27: Ko te kara­kia pono, ko te mea poke­kore ki te aro­aro o te Atua Matua, ko ia tēnei: Ko te tiro­tiro i ngā pani i ngā pouaru i ō rātou mate, ko te tiaki i a ia ake kei poke i te ao.

2.1: E ōku tēina, kaua e waiho i runga i te whaka­pai kanohi te whaka­pono ki tō tātou Ariki korōria, ki a Īhu Karaiti.
2.2: Ki te tomo mai hoki tētahi tangata ki tō koutou whare kara­kia he mō­whiti kōura nei tōna, he kākahu pai; ā, ka tomo mai anō he rawa­kore, he kākahu paru nei tōna;
2.3: ā, ka ti­tiro atu koutou ki te tangata i te kākahu pai, ka mea ki a ia, “E noho koe ki konei, ki te wāhi pai,” ā, ka mea ki te rawa­kore, “E tū koe ki konā, e noho rānei ki konei, ki raro i tōku tū­ranga wae­wae.”
2.4: He teka ianei he tikanga taha­tahi tā koutou, kua hē hoki ngā whaka­aro o koutou, o ngā kai­whaka­wā?
2.5: Whaka­rongo, e ōku tēina aroha. Kāhore anō koia te Atua i whiri­whiri i ngā rawa­kore o tēnei ao, kia whi­whi ki te taonga, arā ki te whaka­pono, kia riro hoki i a rātou te ranga­tira­tanga kua whaka­aria mai e ia mō te hunga e aroha ana ki a ia?
2.6: Heoi, ka whaka­kino nā koutou ki te rawa­kore. He teka ianei ko ngā tāngata taonga hei whaka­tupu ranga­tira ki a koutou, hei tōtō i a koutou ki ngā whaka­wā­kanga?
2.7: He teka ianei he hunga kohu­kohu rātou i te ingoa pai kua whaka­hua­tia nā ki a koutou?
2.8: Engari, ki te rite i a koutou te ture kīngi, tō te karaipi­ture, “Me aroha e koe tōu hoa, ānō ko koe,” ka pai tā koutou hanga.
2.9: Tēnā ki te whaka­pai kanohi koutou, e mahi ana koutou i te hara, ka mau hoki i te ture he hunga hē.
2.10: Ki te mau hoki te ture katoa i tētahi tangata, ā, ka kotahi anō te mea e tapepa ai ia, kua hē ia ki te katoa.
2.11: I tāna kīanga mai hoki, “Kaua e pūremu,” i kī mai anō ia, “Kaua e patu tangata.” Nā, ahakoa kāhore koe e pūremu, ki te patu tangata koe, kua taka­hia e koe te ture.
2.12: Kia rite tā koutou kōrero, tā koutou mahi, ki tā te hunga e whaka­wā­kia ā mua i runga i ngā tikanga o te ture here­kore.
2.13: Ko te tangata hoki kāhore ōna ngākau tohu, e kore e tohu­ngia ina whaka­wā­kia; ka whaka­peha­peha ia te ngākau tohu ki te whaka­wā. Te Whakapono me ngā Mahi
2.14: He aha te pai, e ōku tēina, ki te mea tētahi he whaka­pono tōna, ā, kāhore āna mahi? E taea rānei ia te whaka­ora e taua whaka­pono?
2.15: Ki te mea e noho ta­ha­nga ana tētahi teina, tua­hine rānei, ki te mea rānei kua kore he kai māna mō tēnei rā, mō tēnei rā,
2.16: ā, ka mea atu tētahi o koutou ki a rātou, “Haere mārie, kia mahana, kia mākona,” ā, kāhore e hoatu e koutou ki a rātou ngā mea e matea ana e te tinana; he aha te pai?
2.17: Wai­hoki ko te whaka­pono, ki te kāhore āna mahi, he mea mate i roto anō i a ia.
2.18: Nā, he kī tēnei mā tētahi, “He whaka­pono tōu, he mahi āku.” Whaka­kitea mai ki ahau tōu whaka­pono motu kē i āu mahi, ā, māku, arā mā āku mahi, e whaka­kite atu tōku whaka­pono ki a koe.
2.19: E whaka­pono ana koe kotahi tonu te Atua; he pai tāu mea­tanga. E whaka­pono ana hoki ngā rēwera, me te wiri anō.
2.20: Heoi, e pai ana rānei koe kia mātau, e te kūware, he mea hua­kore te whaka­pono ki te kāhore he mahi?
2.21: Kīhai ianei a Āperahama, tō tātou matua, i tika i ngā mahi, i a ia i whaka­eke atu ai i tāna tama, i a Īhaka, ki runga ki te āta?
2.22: Ka kite rānei koe i mahi tahi te whaka­pono me āna mahi, nā ngā mahi hoki i tino rite ai te whaka­pono?
2.23: Ā, i rite anō tā te karaipi­ture e mea nei, “I whaka­pono a Āperahama ki te Atua, ā, ka whaka­iria ki a ia hei tika,” ka huaina anō hoki ia “Ko te hoa o te Atua.”
2.24: Heoi, ka kite koutou kei ngā mahi he tika mō te tangata, ehara i te mea kei te whaka­pono anake.
2.25: Wai­hoki ko Rahapa, te wahine kairau, kīhai ianei ia i whaka­tikaia e ngā mahi, i a ia i whaka­manu­hiri ai i ngā karere, ā, tukua atu ana rāua e ia rā tētahi ara kē?
2.26: Ka rite hoki ki te tinana ka mate nei ki te kāhore te manawa ora, wai­hoki ko te whaka­pono, ki te kāhore he mahi, he mea mate.

3.1: Kei toko­maha koutou ki te whaka­ako, e ōku tēina, e mātau ana hoki koutou rahi ake te hē e tau ki a tātou.
3.2: He maha hoki ngā mea e tapepa ai tātou katoa. Ki te kore tētahi e tapepa i te kupu, he tino tika tēnā tangata, e taea anō e ia te pa­rai­re te tinana katoa.
3.3: Nā, ka pangā nei e tātou ngā pa­rai­re ki ngā māngai o ngā hōiho, kia rongo ai rātou ki a tātou; ā, pare­parea ana e tātou tō rātou tinana katoa.
3.4: Whaka­aroa ngā kai­puke, ngā mea nunui rawa nei, he mea āki nei e ngā hau kaha, heoi, e pare­parea ana e te urungi nohi­nohi rawa ki te wāhi e hia­hia ai te hine­ngaro o te kai­urungi.
3.5: Wai­hoki ko te arero he wāhi nohi­nohi ia, nui atu hoki tōna whaka­peha­peha. Nana, te nui o te wahie e whaka­ūngia ana e te ahi nohi­nohi!
3.6: He kāpura anō hoki te arero, ko te ao māori o te kino; pērā tonu te arero i roto i ō tātou wāhi, poke iho i a ia te tinana katoa, ngiha ana i a ia huri noa ngā mea katoa o te tangata, he mea whakaū anō ia nā te rēinga.
3.7: Ko ngā momo kararehe katoa hoki, ko ngā manu, ko ngā mea ngōki­ngōki, ko ngā mea i te moana, e whaka­rarata­tia ana, kua whaka­rarata­tia anō hoki i mua e te tangata.
3.8: Ko te arero ia e kore tēnā e taea e tētahi tangata te whaka­rata; he kino ia e kore e taea te pēhi, kī tonu i te wai whaka­mate.
3.9: Ko tā tātou mea ia hei whaka­pai i te Atua, i te Matua; ko tā tātou mea anō ia hei kanga i ngā tāngata, i hangā kia rite ki te Atua.
3.10: Kotahi tonu te māngai puta ake ana i roto ko te manaaki, ko te kanga. Ehara i te pai, e ōku tēina, kia pēnei ēnei mea.
3.11: E pupū ake ana rānei i te puna ko te reka, ko te kawa, i roto i te poka kotahi?
3.12: E hua rānei he ōriwa mā te piki, e ōku tēina, he piki rānei mā te wāina? E kore anō hoki e pupū ake i te wai tai he wai reka. Te Mātauranga e heke iho ana i Runga
3.13: Ko wai te tangata whaka­aro nui, te tangata mātau i roto i a koutou? Mā tōna whaka­haere pai e whaka­atu āna mahi, kei runga i te māhaki o te whaka­aro nui.
3.14: Tēnā, ko tēnei he hae nana­kia tō koutou, he totohe i roto i ō koutou ngākau, kaua e whaka­mana­mana, kaua hoki e teka ki te pono.
3.15: Ehara tēnei mātau­ranga i te mea e heke iho ana i runga; nō te whenua ia, nō te ngākau māori, nō te rēwera.
3.16: I te wāhi hoki e noho ai te hae me te totohe, ko reira anō te noho kino me ngā mahi hē katoa.
3.17: Ko te mātau­ranga ia o runga, he mea kino­kore i te tua­tahi, muri iho he rangi­mārie, he ngā­wari, he hohoro ki te whaka­rongo, kī tonu i te mahi tohu, i ngā hua pai, kāhore āna whiri­whiringa i te tangata, kāhore ōna tini­hanga.
3.18: Ā, e ruia ana ngā hua o te tika i roto i te rangi­mārie mā te hunga hohou rongo.

4.1: Nō hea ngā pakanga me ngā nga­ngare­tanga i roto i a koutou? He teka ianei nō tēnei, nō ō koutou hia­hia e whawhai ana i roto i ō koutou wāhi?
4.2: E hia­hia ana koutou, heoi, kāhore e whai rawa; e patu ana koutou. E mina­mina ana, ā, kāhore e whi­whi. E nga­ngare ana, e whawhai ana, heoi, kāhore e whai rawa, nō te mea kāhore koutou e īnoi.
4.3: E īnoi ana koutou, ā, kāhore e riro i a koutou, nō te mea e īnoi hē ana koutou, kia whaka­paua ai ki ō koutou hia­hia.
4.4: E ngā tāngata pūremu, e ngā wāhine pūremu, kāhore ianei koutou e mātau ko te aroha o te ao he hoa­riri­tanga ki te Atua? Nā, ko te tangata e hia­hia ana kia meinga hei hoa aroha mō te ao, e mea ana i a ia hei hoa­riri ki te Atua.
4.5: Ki tō koutou whaka­aro he kōrero noa rānei tā te karaipi­ture, “E hia­hia ana rānei te Wairua, i meinga nei e ia kia noho i roto i a tātou, kia tae rawa ki te hae”?
4.6: Nui atu ia tāna hōmai i te aroha noa. Koia tāna e mea nei, “Ka pakeke te Atua ki tā te hunga whaka­peha­peha, ka hōmai ia i te aroha noa ki te hunga ngākau pāpaku.”
4.7: Nā, kia ngohe­ngohe koutou ki tā te Atua. Tūria atu te rēwera, ā, ka oma atu ia i a koutou.
4.8: Whaka­tata atu ki te Atua, ā, ka whaka­tata mai ia ki a koutou. Horoia ō koutou ringa­ringa, e te hunga hara. Meinga ō koutou ngākau kia hēkore, e te hunga ngākau rua.
4.9: Kia pōuri koutou, kia puta te auē, te tangi. Kia puta kē tō koutou kata hei auē, tō koutou hari hei āhua whaka­pou­ruru.
4.10: Whaka­pāpaku koutou ki te aro­aro o te Ariki, ā, māna koutou e whaka­tei­tei ake. He Whakatūpato kei Whakawā tētahi i tētahi
4.11: Kāti te ngau­tuarā tētahi ki tētahi, e ōku tēina. Ko te tangata e ngau­tuarā ana ki tōna teina, e whaka­hē ana hoki i tōna teina, e ngau­tuarā ana ia ki te ture, e whaka­hē ana i te ture; ki te whaka­hē ia koe i te ture, ehara koe i te kai­mahi i te ture, engari he kai­whaka­wā.
4.12: Kotahi tonu te kai­whaka­takoto ture, kei a ia te kaha hei whaka­ora, hei whaka­ngaro. Ko wai rā koe e whaka­hē nā i tērā atu? He Whakatūpato mō te Whakamanamana
4.13: Tēnā, e te hunga e mea nei, “Hei āia­nei, hei āpōpō, ka haere mātou ki te pā rā, ā, ka noho ki reira, kia kotahi tau, ka hoko­hoko, ka whi­whi ki te taonga!”
4.14: Kāhore nā hoki koutou e mātau ki ngā mea o āpōpō. He aha oti tō koutou ora? He kohu rā, he iti nei te wā e puta mai ai, ā, kua memeha atu.
4.15: Te mea rā koutou, “Ki te pai te Ariki, ā, ka ora mātou, ka mea i tēnei mea, i tērā mea rānei.”
4.16: Tēnei ia koutou te whaka­mana­mana nei ki ā koutou kupu whaka­puta; he kino taua tū whaka­mana­mana katoa.
4.17: Nā, ko te tangata e mātau ana ki te mea i te pai, ā, kāhore e meatia e ia he hara tērā nōna.

5.1: Tēnā, e te hunga taonga, e tangi koutou, auē ki ō koutou mate meāke nei puta mai.
5.2: Kua pirau ō koutou taonga, kua kainga ō koutou kākahu e te huhu.
5.3: Kua wai­kura­tia tā koutou kōura, me tā koutou hiriwa; ko te waikura anō o aua mea hei kai­whaka­atu i tō koutou hē, hei kai hoki i ō koutou kiko­kiko, ānō he kāpura. Kua pae nā i a koutou he taonga mō ngā rā whaka­mutu­nga.
5.4: Nana, kei te karanga te utu i kai­ponu­hia e koutou mā ngā kai­mahi nāna i kokoti ā koutou māra, kua tae atu anō hoki ngā karanga a ngā kai­kokoti ki ngā tari­nga o te Ariki o ngā Mano Tini.
5.5: Kua kai koutou i ngā kai papai i runga i te whenua, whāia ana e koutou a te tinana whaka­ahua­reka; ata­whai­tia ana e koutou ō koutou ngākau, me te mea anō ko te rā okanga tēnei.
5.6: Whaka­takā ana e koutou ki te hē, patua iho te mea tika, kīhai anō ia i pēhi atu i tā koutou. Te Manawanui me te Īnoi
5.7: Nā, tatari mārie koutou, e ōku tēina, ki te haere­nga mai o te Ariki. Nā, tū­mana­ko tonu te kai­ngaki ki ngā hua utu nui o te whenua, he mea tatari mārie atu nāna, kia tae mai rā anō tō mua me tō muri ua.
5.8: Tatari mārie anō hoki koutou. Kia ū ō koutou ngākau; kua tata hoki te haere­nga mai o te Ariki.
5.9: Kaua e amu­amu tētahi ki tētahi, e ōku tēina; kei whaka­takā koutou ki te hē. Nana, kei ngā tatau te kai­whaka­wā e tū ana.
5.10: Ko ngā poro­piti i kōrero nei i runga i te ingoa o te Ariki, waiho rātou, e ōku tēina, hei tauira mō te whaka­manawa­nui ki ngā kino, mō te tatari mārie.
5.11: Nana, ki tā tātou he hari te hunga e whaka­manawa­nui ana. Kua rongo koutou ki te manawa­nui o Hopa, kua kite hoki i tō te Ariki whaka­mutu­nga, he nui tō te Ariki aroha, me tāna mahi tohu.
5.12: Ko te tua­tahi ia o ngā mea katoa, e ōku tēina, kaua te rangi, kaua te whenua, kaua tētahi atu oati, e oati­tia e koutou; engari me “Āe” tā koutou āe, me “Kāhore” tā koutou kāhore, kei taka koutou ki te whaka­wā.
5.13: Ki te pāngia tētahi o koutou e te mamae, me īnoi. Ki te koa te ngākau o tētahi, me waiata.
5.14: Ki te tūroro tētahi i roto i a koutou, me karanga e ia ki ngā kaumātua o te hāhi; ā, mā rātou e īnoi ki runga ki a ia, me te whaka­wahi anō i a ia ki te hinu i runga i te ingoa o te Ariki.
5.15: Ā, e ora te tūroro i te īnoi whaka­pono, mā te Ariki anō ia e whaka­ara ake; ki te mea hoki kua mahi hara ia, ka murua tōna hara.
5.16: Whākina ō koutou hē tētahi ki tētahi, me īnoi anō koutou tētahi mō tētahi, kia ora ai ō koutou mate. Nui atu te mana o te īnoi kaha a te tangata tika.
5.17: He tangata a Irāia, he rite tahi te ngākau ki ō tātou, heoi, ka kaha nei tāna īnoi kia kaua e ua; kore ake he ua ki runga ki te whenua, ā, e toru ngā tau, e ono ngā marama.
5.18: Īnoi ana anō ia, ā, ka hōmai he ua e te rangi, nā, hua ana ngā hua o te whenua.
5.19: E ōku tēina, ki te kotiti kē tētahi o koutou i te pono, ā, ka meinga e tētahi kia tahuri mai anō,
5.20: kia mātau ia, ko te tangata i tahuri ai te tangata hara i te hē o tōna ara, e ora i a ia he wairua kei mate, he tini anō ngā hara ka hīpoki­na e ia.

1.1: Nā Pita, he āpō­toro nā Īhu Karaiti – Ki te hunga whiri­whiri e noho manene ana i Ponoto, i Karatia, i Kaporokia, i Āhia, i Pitinia.
1.2: He hunga kua oti te whiri­whiri, te pērā anō me tā te Atua Matua i mātau ai i mua, i runga i te whaka­tapu­nga a te Wairua, kia ngohe­ngohe, kia tā­uhi­uhia ki ngā toto o Īhu Karaiti. Kia whaka­nuia ki a koutou te aroha noa, me te rangi­mārie. Te Tūmanako Ora
1.3: Kia whaka­pai­ngia te Atua, te Matua o tō tātou Ariki, o Īhu Karaiti, nāna nei, nā tāna mahi tohu e nui nei, tātou i whānau hou ai ki te tū­mana­ko ora, i a Īhu Karaiti ka ara ake nei i te hunga mate,
1.4: ki te kāinga kāhore ōna pirau, kāhore ōna poke, e kore anō hoki e memeha, e puri­tia mai nei i te rangi mō koutou.
1.5: Mō te hunga e tiaki­na nei e te kaha o te Atua i runga i te whaka­pono, kia taea rā anō te whaka­ora­nga kua rite noa ake nei, ā, ka whaka­kitea mai ā te wā whaka­mutu­nga.
1.6: Nui atu tō koutou koa ki tēnei, ahakoa pōuri mō te wā iti nei, ki te ai he pōuri, i ngā whaka­mā­tautau­ranga maha.
1.7: Nā, ko te whaka­mā­tautau­ranga o tō koutou whaka­pono, nui atu tōna pai i tō te kōura e memeha nei, āe rā, i te mea kua oti te whaka­mā­tau­tau ki te kāpura, ā, ka kitea tōna tuku­nga iho, he whaka­moe­miti, he hōnore, he korōria, ā te whaka­kite­nga mai o Īhu Karaiti.
1.8: Kāhore nei ia e kitea e koutou, heoi, aroha­ina ana e koutou; ahakoa kāhore koutou e kite ināia­nei, heoi, i a koutou ka whaka­pono nei ki a ia, nui atu te koa, he koa korōria, e kore e taea te kōrero;
1.9: i te mea, ka whi­whi ki te tuku­nga iho o tō koutou whaka­pono, ki te whaka­ora­nga o ō koutou wairua.
1.10: Ko taua whaka­ora, he mea āta rapu he mea whaka­taki iho nā ngā poro­piti i poro­piti­tia ai te aroha noa, arā tēnei i a koutou nei.
1.11: I a rātou i rapu ai ko tēhea wā, he wā pēhea hoki, tā te Wairua o te Karaiti i roto i a rātou i whaka­puaki ai, i a ia e whaka­atu ana i mua i ngā mamae o te Karaiti, i te korōria anō hoki ō muri iho.
1.12: I whaka­kitea mai nei anō ki a rātou, ehara i te mea mō rātou ake, engari mō tātou, ngā mea i minita­tia rā e rātou, kua kōrero­tia nei hoki ki a koutou ināia­nei e te hunga i kauwhau­tia ai te rongo­pai ki a koutou, he mea­tanga nā te Wairua Tapu i tonoa mai nei i te rangi. Hiahia tonu ngā ana­hera ki te mā­taki­taki ki aua mea. He Karanga ki te Oranga Tapu
1.13: Heoi, whī­tiki­ria ngā hope o ō koutou hine­ngaro, kia mata­ara, tū­mana­ko atu, ā taea noatia te mutu­nga, ki te aroha noa e kawea mai ki a koutou ā te whaka­kite­nga mai o Īhu Karaiti.
1.14: Kia rite ki ngā tama­riki ngohe­ngohe; kei rite te āhua ki ngā hia­hia tai­kaha ō mua i a koutou e kūware ana.
1.15: Engari kia rite ki te kai­karanga i a koutou, he tapu hoki ia; kia tapu anō hoki tā koutou whaka­haere katoa;
1.16: kua tuhi­tuhia nā hoki, “Kia tapu koutou; he tapu hoki ahau.”
1.17: Nā, ki te karanga koutou ki te Matua, ko ia nei hei whaka­wā mō te mahi a tēnei, a tēnei, kāhore anō hoki āna whaka­pai kanohi, e noho i runga i te mataku i a koutou e noho manene nei.
1.18: Kia mahara ehara ngā mea pirau, te hiriwa, te kōura, i te utu mō koutou, i puta mai ai i ā koutou rite­nga teka­teka i whaka­rērea mai e ō koutou mātua;
1.19: engari he toto utu nui me te mea nō te reme koha­kore, poke­kore, arā nō te Karaiti.
1.20: I whaka­ritea nei i mua o te oroko­hanga­nga o te ao, ā, kua whaka­kitea mai nei i te mutu­nga o ngā wā, he whaka­aro hoki ki a koutou,
1.21: kua meinga nei e ia kia whaka­pono ki te Atua, nāna nei ia i whaka­ara ake i te mate, ā, hoatu ana ki a ia he korōria; kia whai whaka­pono ai koutou, kia whai tūmanako­tanga atu ai ki te Atua.
1.22: Kua horoia nei e koutou ō koutou wairua, i a koutou kua meinga nei e te Wairua kia ngohe­ngohe ki te pono, e kore iho ai he tini­hanga o te aroha ki ngā tēina, nā, kia nui te aroha o tētahi ki tētahi, he aroha-ā-ngākau.
